1// SPDX-License-Identifier: LGPL-3.0-or-later
2#![warn(missing_docs)]
3//! Pure imaging kernels and CLEAN orchestration for CASA-compatible imaging.
4//!
5//! This crate is the reusable imaging boundary for the first Rust imager wave.
6//! The public contract is a documented [`ImagingRequest`] to [`ImagingResult`]
7//! transformation with explicit axis order, units, normalization, and
8//! unsupported-mode errors.
9//!
10//! Persistence and MeasurementSet concerns stay out of this crate. Adapters are
11//! expected to:
12//!
13//! - select rows and channels from a backend such as a MeasurementSet
14//! - resolve column-level storage into columnar visibility batches
15//! - call this crate with scalar batches or strict paired parallel hands
16//! - persist the resulting CASA-style products elsewhere
17//!
18//! The current implementation intentionally stages compatibility:
19//!
20//! - concrete prolate-spheroidal 7x7 gridder
21//! - concrete FFT path
22//! - natural, uniform, and Briggs weighting
23//! - strict Stokes-I collapse for paired parallel hands
24//! - staged Hogbom major/minor-cycle CLEAN with explicit stop reasons
25//! - PSF-cutoff beam fitting with interpolation and retry semantics
26

141#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
142pub(crate) struct HogbomMinorCycleOutcome {
143    pub(crate) updated_model: bool,
144    pub(crate) actual_updates: usize,
145    pub(crate) reported_updates: usize,
146    pub(crate) stop_reason: Option<CleanStopReason>,
147    pub(crate) final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
148    pub(crate) final_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
149}
150
151/// Apply the CASA-style geometric phase rotation for a visibility sample.
152///
153/// `phase_shift_m` is the path-length correction in metres and `frequency_hz`
154/// is the sample frequency. Zero shift or zero frequency returns the input
155/// unchanged.
156pub fn phase_rotate_visibility(
157    visibility: Complex32,
158    phase_shift_m: f64,
159    frequency_hz: f64,
160) -> Complex32 {
161    if phase_shift_m == 0.0 || frequency_hz == 0.0 {
162        return visibility;
163    }
164    let phase = -std::f64::consts::TAU * phase_shift_m * frequency_hz / SPEED_OF_LIGHT_M_PER_S;
165    let phasor = Complex32::new(phase.cos() as f32, phase.sin() as f32);
166    visibility * phasor
167}
168

379/// FFT-backed predictor for a standard MFS component model.
380///
381/// This mirrors the standard-gridder model prediction path used during major
382/// cycle residual refreshes, but exposes only the per-sample model visibility
383/// needed by frontends that persist a `MODEL_DATA` column.
384pub struct StandardMfsModelPredictor {
385    gridder: StandardGridder,
386    model_grid: Option<Array2<Complex32>>,
387}
388
389/// Planner for bounded standard-MFS weighted sample blocks.
390///
391/// Frontends use this helper after applying natural/uniform/Briggs weighting to
392/// convert compact weighted samples into the shared planned representation used
393/// by the CPU gridders. The planner owns the private standard gridder state, so
394/// callers do not need access to internal tap tables.
395pub struct StandardMfsPlannedSampleBuilder {
396    gridder: StandardGridder,
397}
398
399/// Replayable source of bounded standard-MFS planned sample blocks.
400///
401/// This is the core streaming input boundary for standard-MFS backends. A
402/// frontend may read MeasurementSet rows, apply weighting, and plan compact tap
403/// identities however it chooses, but it must be able to replay the same
404/// bounded blocks for the initial dirty/PSF pass and every exact residual
405/// refresh pass.
406pub(crate) trait StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlockSource {
407    /// Replay planned samples in stable input order.
408    fn replay_planned_sample_blocks(
409        &mut self,
410        consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(&[StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample]) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
411    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>;
412
413    /// Replay planned samples with explicit scalar-run ranges when available.
414    fn replay_planned_sample_run_blocks(
415        &mut self,
416        consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
417            &StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock,
418        ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
419    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
420        let mut run_block = StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock::default();
421        self.replay_planned_sample_blocks(&mut |samples| {
422            run_block.clear();
423            run_block.push_run_from_slice(samples);
424            consumer(&run_block)
425        })
426    }
427}
428
429/// Replayable source of standard-MFS routed visibility runs.
430///
431/// This boundary publishes each row/channel run as soon as it is routed, so the
432/// fixed-tile scheduler can enqueue tile work without waiting for a frontend
433/// row-block staging vector.
434pub(crate) trait StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRunSource {
435    /// Replay routed row/channel runs in stable input order.
436    fn replay_routed_visibility_runs(
437        &mut self,
438        consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRun) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
439    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>;
440}
441
442impl<F> StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlockSource for F
443where
444    F: FnMut(
445        &mut dyn FnMut(&[StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample]) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
446    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
447{
448    fn replay_planned_sample_blocks(
449        &mut self,
450        consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(&[StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample]) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
451    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
452        self(consumer)
453    }
454}
455
456impl StandardMfsPlannedSampleBuilder {
457    /// Build a planner for standard-MFS image geometry.
458    #[inline]
459    pub fn new(geometry: ImageGeometry) -> Result<Self, ImagingError> {
460        Ok(Self {
461            gridder: StandardGridder::new(geometry)?,
462        })
463    }
464
465    /// Plan one weighted sample, returning `None` when it does not grid.
466    #[inline]
467    pub(crate) fn plan_sample(
468        &self,
469        sample: StandardMfsWeightedSample,
470    ) -> Result<Option<StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample>, ImagingError> {
471        if !sample.gridable {
472            return Ok(None);
473        }
474        if !(sample.weight.is_finite()
475            && sample.weight > 0.0
476            && sample.sumwt_factor.is_finite()
477            && sample.sumwt_factor > 0.0)
478        {
479            return Ok(None);
480        }
481        let grid_weight = sample.weight * sample.sumwt_factor;
482        if !(grid_weight.is_finite() && grid_weight > 0.0) {
483            return Ok(None);
484        }
485        let Some(taps) = self
486            .gridder
487            .plan_positive_taps(sample.u_lambda, sample.v_lambda)
488        else {
489            return Ok(None);
490        };
491        let center = taps.center();
492        let flags = if finite_visibility(sample.visibility) {
493            StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample::FINITE_VISIBILITY
494        } else {
495            StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample::PSF_ONLY
496        };
497        Ok(Some(StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample {
498            u_lambda: sample.u_lambda,
499            v_lambda: sample.v_lambda,
500            center_x: center[0] as u32,
501            center_y: center[1] as u32,
502            x_start: taps.x.start as u32,
503            y_start: taps.y.start as u32,
504            x_weight_index: taps.x.weight_index as u32,
505            y_weight_index: taps.y.weight_index as u32,
506            flags,
507            tap_count: (STANDARD_GRIDDER_TAP_COUNT * STANDARD_GRIDDER_TAP_COUNT) as u8,
508            grid_weight,
509            w_lambda: sample.w_lambda,
510            visibility: sample.visibility,
511        }))
512    }
513
514    /// Plan and append one scalar visibility sample to an opaque planned block.
515    ///
516    /// Returns `true` when the sample contributes to the block, or `false` when
517    /// it is outside the grid or otherwise not gridable.
518    pub fn push_sample(
519        &self,
520        block: &mut StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlock,
521        sample: ScalarVisibilitySample,
522    ) -> Result<bool, ImagingError> {
523        if let Some(planned_sample) = self.plan_sample(sample.into())? {
524            block.push_sample(planned_sample);
525            Ok(true)
526        } else {
527            Ok(false)
528        }
529    }
530
531    /// Plan a weighted row block into a caller-provided output buffer.
532    #[cfg(test)]
533    pub(crate) fn plan_samples_into(
534        &self,
535        samples: &[StandardMfsWeightedSample],
536        planned: &mut Vec<StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample>,
537    ) -> Result<usize, ImagingError> {
538        let initial_len = planned.len();
539        planned.reserve(samples.len());
540        for &sample in samples {
541            if let Some(planned_sample) = self.plan_sample(sample)? {
542                planned.push(planned_sample);
543            }
544        }
545        Ok(planned.len() - initial_len)
546    }
547
548    /// Plan an owned visibility batch into a caller-provided output buffer.
549    #[cfg(test)]
550    pub(crate) fn plan_visibility_batch_into(
551        &self,
552        batch: &VisibilityBatch,
553        planned: &mut Vec<StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample>,
554    ) -> Result<usize, ImagingError> {
555        batch.validate()?;
556        let initial_len = planned.len();
557        planned.reserve(batch.len());
558        for sample_index in 0..batch.len() {
559            let sample = StandardMfsWeightedSample {
560                u_lambda: batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
561                v_lambda: batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
562                w_lambda: batch.w_lambda[sample_index],
563                weight: batch.weight[sample_index],
564                sumwt_factor: batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index],
565                gridable: batch.gridable[sample_index],
566                visibility: batch.visibility[sample_index],
567            };
568            if let Some(planned_sample) = self.plan_sample(sample)? {
569                planned.push(planned_sample);
570            }
571        }
572        Ok(planned.len() - initial_len)
573    }
574
575    /// Locate the positive-tap center used for fixed-tile routing.
576    #[inline]
577    pub fn route_tap_center(&self, u_lambda: f64, v_lambda: f64) -> Option<[u32; 2]> {
578        self.gridder
579            .locate_positive_tap_center(u_lambda, v_lambda)
580            .map(|center| [center[0] as u32, center[1] as u32])
581    }
582}
583
584impl StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityBlock {
585    /// Route one row-shaped standard-MFS input into this replay block.
586    ///
587    /// The block stores private backend runs while the caller receives only the
588    /// candidate/planned lane counts needed for telemetry.
589    pub fn append_visibility_row(
590        &mut self,
591        row: StandardMfsVisibilityRow,
592        planned_sample_builder: &StandardMfsPlannedSampleBuilder,
593        next_input_seq: &mut u64,
594    ) -> Result<StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityAppendCounts, ImagingError> {
595        let mut counts = StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityAppendCounts::default();
596        if row.source_channel_indices.len() != row.channel_lambda_scales.len() {
597            return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
598                "standard MFS routed row source slot count {} differs from lambda scale count {}",
599                row.source_channel_indices.len(),
600                row.channel_lambda_scales.len()
601            )));
602        }
603        if !row.gridable {
604            return Ok(counts);
605        }
606
607        let uvw_m = row.uvw_m;
608        let channel_lambda_scales = Arc::clone(&row.channel_lambda_scales);
609        let routed_row = Arc::new(row.into_routed_row());
610        let mut run_start = None::<usize>;
611        let mut tap_centers = Vec::<[u32; 2]>::new();
612
613        for (source_slot, lambda_scale) in channel_lambda_scales.iter().copied().enumerate() {
614            counts.candidate_samples += 1;
615            let u_lambda = uvw_m[0] * lambda_scale;
616            let v_lambda = uvw_m[1] * lambda_scale;
617            let Some(center) = planned_sample_builder.route_tap_center(u_lambda, v_lambda) else {
618                if let Some(start) = run_start.take() {
619                    let run_len = tap_centers.len();
620                    let centers = Arc::<[[u32; 2]]>::from(
621                        std::mem::take(&mut tap_centers).into_boxed_slice(),
622                    );
623                    self.push_run(StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRun {
624                        row: Arc::clone(&routed_row),
625                        source_slot_range: start..source_slot,
626                        tap_centers: centers,
627                        first_input_seq: *next_input_seq,
628                    });
629                    *next_input_seq = (*next_input_seq).saturating_add(run_len as u64);
630                    counts.planned_samples += run_len;
631                }
632                continue;
633            };
634            if run_start.is_none() {
635                run_start = Some(source_slot);
636            }
637            tap_centers.push(center);
638        }
639
640        if let Some(start) = run_start {
641            let run_len = tap_centers.len();
642            let centers = Arc::<[[u32; 2]]>::from(tap_centers.into_boxed_slice());
643            self.push_run(StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRun {
644                row: routed_row,
645                source_slot_range: start..channel_lambda_scales.len(),
646                tap_centers: centers,
647                first_input_seq: *next_input_seq,
648            });
649            *next_input_seq = (*next_input_seq).saturating_add(run_len as u64);
650            counts.planned_samples += run_len;
651        }
652
653        Ok(counts)
654    }
655
656    /// Append cloned runs from another routed block.
657    pub fn extend_from_block(&mut self, block: &Self) {
658        self.runs.extend_from_slice(block.runs());
659    }
660
661    /// Append runs from another routed block and assign contiguous input
662    /// sequence numbers in the receiving replay order.
663    pub fn extend_resequenced_from_block(&mut self, mut block: Self, next_input_seq: &mut u64) {
664        for mut run in block.drain_runs() {
665            run.first_input_seq = *next_input_seq;
666            *next_input_seq = (*next_input_seq).saturating_add(run.len() as u64);
667            self.push_run(run);
668        }
669    }
670
671    /// Conservative estimate of host memory retained by this replay block.
672    pub fn estimated_host_bytes(&self) -> usize {
673        let mut bytes = self
674            .runs
675            .len()
676            .saturating_mul(std::mem::size_of::<StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRun>());
677        let mut row_ptrs = HashSet::<usize>::new();
678        let mut source_channel_ptrs = HashSet::<(usize, usize)>::new();
679        let mut lambda_scale_ptrs = HashSet::<(usize, usize)>::new();
680        let mut tap_center_ptrs = HashSet::<(usize, usize)>::new();
681
682        for run in &self.runs {
683            let tap_ptr = run.tap_centers.as_ptr() as usize;
684            let tap_len = run.tap_centers.len();
685            if tap_center_ptrs.insert((tap_ptr, tap_len)) {
686                bytes =
687                    bytes.saturating_add(tap_len.saturating_mul(std::mem::size_of::<[u32; 2]>()));
688            }
689
690            let row = run.row.as_ref();
691            let row_ptr = Arc::as_ptr(&run.row) as usize;
692            if row_ptrs.insert(row_ptr) {
693                bytes = bytes
694                    .saturating_add(std::mem::size_of::<StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRow>())
695                    .saturating_add(
696                        row.data
697                            .len()
698                            .saturating_mul(std::mem::size_of::<Complex32>()),
699                    )
700                    .saturating_add(row.flag.len().saturating_mul(std::mem::size_of::<bool>()))
701                    .saturating_add(row.weight.len().saturating_mul(std::mem::size_of::<f32>()));
702                if let Some(weight_spectrum) = row.weight_spectrum.as_ref() {
703                    bytes = bytes.saturating_add(
704                        weight_spectrum
705                            .len()
706                            .saturating_mul(std::mem::size_of::<f32>()),
707                    );
708                }
709            }
710
711            let source_ptr = row.source_channel_indices.as_ptr() as usize;
712            let source_len = row.source_channel_indices.len();
713            if source_channel_ptrs.insert((source_ptr, source_len)) {
714                bytes =
715                    bytes.saturating_add(source_len.saturating_mul(std::mem::size_of::<usize>()));
716            }
717
718            let lambda_ptr = row.channel_lambda_scales.as_ptr() as usize;
719            let lambda_len = row.channel_lambda_scales.len();
720            if lambda_scale_ptrs.insert((lambda_ptr, lambda_len)) {
721                bytes = bytes.saturating_add(lambda_len.saturating_mul(std::mem::size_of::<f64>()));
722            }
723        }
724
725        bytes
726    }
727
728    /// Visit finite weighted scalar grid samples represented by this block.
729    ///
730    /// This is a diagnostic/export boundary for tools that need compact sample
731    /// records without inspecting routed worker payloads.
732    pub fn for_each_weighted_grid_sample(
733        &self,
734        weighting_plan: &StandardMfsStreamingWeightingPlan,
735        consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(StandardMfsRoutedGridSample) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
736    ) -> Result<usize, ImagingError> {
737        let mut accepted = 0usize;
738        for run in &self.runs {
739            for lane_index in 0..run.len() {
740                let Some(sample) =
741                    routed_weighted_grid_sample_from_run(run, lane_index, weighting_plan)?
742                else {
743                    continue;
744                };
745                consumer(sample)?;
746                accepted = accepted.saturating_add(1);
747            }
748        }
749        Ok(accepted)
750    }
751}
752
753/// Weighted scalar grid sample decoded from an opaque routed replay block.
754#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq)]
755pub struct StandardMfsRoutedGridSample {
756    /// Positive-tap center in the padded standard grid.
757    pub center: [u32; 2],
758    /// Final grid weight including CASA-style `sumwt` factor.
759    pub grid_weight: f32,
760    /// Scalar visibility after any configured polarization collapse.
761    pub visibility: Complex32,
762}
763
764fn routed_weighted_grid_sample_from_run(
765    run: &StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRun,
766    lane_index: usize,
767    weighting_plan: &StandardMfsStreamingWeightingPlan,
768) -> Result<Option<StandardMfsRoutedGridSample>, ImagingError> {
769    let row = &run.row;
770    if !row.gridable {
771        return Ok(None);
772    }
773    let source_slot = run
774        .source_slot_range
775        .start
776        .checked_add(lane_index)
777        .ok_or_else(|| {
778            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("routed lane source index overflowed".to_string())
779        })?;
780    let source_channel = *row.source_channel_indices.get(source_slot).ok_or_else(|| {
781        ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!("source slot {source_slot} is out of bounds"))
782    })?;
783    let local_channel = source_channel
784        .checked_sub(row.channel_origin)
785        .ok_or_else(|| {
786            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
787                "source channel {source_channel} precedes loaded channel origin {}",
788                row.channel_origin
789            ))
790        })?;
791    let lambda_scale = *row.channel_lambda_scales.get(source_slot).ok_or_else(|| {
792        ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!("lambda scale slot {source_slot} is out of bounds"))
793    })?;
794    let center = *run.tap_centers.get(lane_index).ok_or_else(|| {
795        ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!("tap center lane {lane_index} is out of bounds"))
796    })?;
797    let (visibility, natural_weight, sumwt_factor) = match row.polarization {
798        StandardMfsVisibilityPolarization::Explicit {
799            corr_index,
800            sumwt_factor,
801        } => {
802            if *row.flag.get((corr_index, local_channel)).ok_or_else(|| {
803                ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
804                    "FLAG index [{corr_index}, {source_channel}] is out of bounds"
805                ))
806            })? {
807                return Ok(None);
808            }
809            let visibility = *row.data.get((corr_index, local_channel)).ok_or_else(|| {
810                ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
811                    "DATA index [{corr_index}, {source_channel}] is out of bounds"
812                ))
813            })?;
814            if !(visibility.re.is_finite() && visibility.im.is_finite()) {
815                return Ok(None);
816            }
817            let natural_weight = if let Some(weight_spectrum) = &row.weight_spectrum {
818                *weight_spectrum
819                    .get((corr_index, local_channel))
820                    .ok_or_else(|| {
821                        ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
822                            "WEIGHT_SPECTRUM index [{corr_index}, {source_channel}] is out of bounds"
823                        ))
824                    })?
825            } else {
826                *row.weight.get(corr_index).ok_or_else(|| {
827                    ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
828                        "WEIGHT correlation {corr_index} is out of bounds"
829                    ))
830                })?
831            };
832            (visibility, natural_weight, sumwt_factor)
833        }
834        StandardMfsVisibilityPolarization::CollapsedPair {
835            first_corr_index,
836            second_corr_index,
837            transform,
838            sumwt_factor,
839        } => {
840            if *row
841                .flag
842                .get((first_corr_index, local_channel))
843                .ok_or_else(|| {
844                    ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
845                        "FLAG index [{first_corr_index}, {source_channel}] is out of bounds"
846                    ))
847                })?
848                || *row
849                    .flag
850                    .get((second_corr_index, local_channel))
851                    .ok_or_else(|| {
852                        ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
853                            "FLAG index [{second_corr_index}, {source_channel}] is out of bounds"
854                        ))
855                    })?
856            {
857                return Ok(None);
858            }
859            let first_visibility =
860                *row.data
861                    .get((first_corr_index, local_channel))
862                    .ok_or_else(|| {
863                        ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
864                            "DATA index [{first_corr_index}, {source_channel}] is out of bounds"
865                        ))
866                    })?;
867            let second_visibility = *row
868                .data
869                .get((second_corr_index, local_channel))
870                .ok_or_else(|| {
871                    ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
872                        "DATA index [{second_corr_index}, {source_channel}] is out of bounds"
873                    ))
874                })?;
875            let visibility = transform.collapse(first_visibility, second_visibility);
876            if !(visibility.re.is_finite() && visibility.im.is_finite()) {
877                return Ok(None);
878            }
879            let (first_weight, second_weight) = if let Some(weight_spectrum) = &row.weight_spectrum
880            {
881                (
882                    *weight_spectrum
883                        .get((first_corr_index, local_channel))
884                        .ok_or_else(|| {
885                            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
886                                "WEIGHT_SPECTRUM index [{first_corr_index}, {source_channel}] is out of bounds"
887                            ))
888                        })?,
889                    *weight_spectrum
890                        .get((second_corr_index, local_channel))
891                        .ok_or_else(|| {
892                            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
893                                "WEIGHT_SPECTRUM index [{second_corr_index}, {source_channel}] is out of bounds"
894                            ))
895                        })?,
896                )
897            } else {
898                (
899                    *row.weight.get(first_corr_index).ok_or_else(|| {
900                        ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
901                            "WEIGHT correlation {first_corr_index} is out of bounds"
902                        ))
903                    })?,
904                    *row.weight.get(second_corr_index).ok_or_else(|| {
905                        ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
906                            "WEIGHT correlation {second_corr_index} is out of bounds"
907                        ))
908                    })?,
909                )
910            };
911            if !(first_weight.is_finite()
912                && first_weight > 0.0
913                && second_weight.is_finite()
914                && second_weight > 0.0)
915            {
916                return Ok(None);
917            }
918            (
919                visibility,
920                0.5 * (first_weight + second_weight),
921                sumwt_factor,
922            )
923        }
924    };
925    if !(natural_weight.is_finite()
926        && natural_weight > 0.0
927        && sumwt_factor.is_finite()
928        && sumwt_factor > 0.0)
929    {
930        return Ok(None);
931    }
932    let u_lambda = row.uvw_m[0] * lambda_scale;
933    let v_lambda = row.uvw_m[1] * lambda_scale;
934    let weight = weighting_plan.weight_sample(u_lambda, v_lambda, natural_weight)?;
935    let grid_weight = weight * sumwt_factor;
936    if !(grid_weight.is_finite() && grid_weight > 0.0) {
937        return Ok(None);
938    }
939    Ok(Some(StandardMfsRoutedGridSample {
940        center,
941        grid_weight,
942        visibility,
943    }))
944}
945
946/// Opaque acceleration cache for routed standard-MFS input.
947#[derive(Debug, Default)]
948pub struct StandardMfsRoutedInputCache {
949    inner: StandardMfsMetalGroupedInputCache,
950}
951
952/// Incremental builder for an opaque routed standard-MFS input cache.
953pub struct StandardMfsRoutedInputCachePrefill {
954    inner: StandardMfsMetalGroupedInputCachePrefill,
955}
956
957impl StandardMfsRoutedInputCachePrefill {
958    /// Create a grouped Metal cache prefill for one standard-MFS geometry.
959    pub fn metal_grouped(geometry: ImageGeometry) -> Result<Self, ImagingError> {
960        Ok(Self {
961            inner: StandardMfsMetalGroupedInputCachePrefill::new(geometry)?,
962        })
963    }
964
965    /// Append one routed replay block to the prefill cache.
966    pub fn append_block(
967        &mut self,
968        block: &StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityBlock,
969    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
970        for run in block.runs() {
971            self.inner.append_run(run)?;
972        }
973        Ok(())
974    }
975
976    /// Number of routed runs appended so far.
977    pub fn run_count(&self) -> usize {
978        self.inner.run_count()
979    }
980
981    /// Number of logical channel lanes appended so far.
982    pub fn logical_lanes(&self) -> usize {
983        self.inner.logical_lanes()
984    }
985
986    /// Conservative host byte estimate for finalized and open grouped chunks.
987    pub fn estimated_host_bytes(&self) -> usize {
988        self.inner.estimated_host_bytes()
989    }
990
991    /// Finalize into a reusable routed input cache after weighting is known.
992    pub fn finish(
993        self,
994        weighting_plan: &StandardMfsStreamingWeightingPlan,
995    ) -> Result<StandardMfsRoutedInputCache, ImagingError> {
996        Ok(StandardMfsRoutedInputCache {
997            inner: self.inner.finish(weighting_plan)?,
998        })
999    }
1000}
1001
1002/// Minor-cycle execution backend selected by the frontend standard-MFS planner.
1003#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug, Default, PartialEq, Eq)]
1004pub enum StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend {
1005    /// Run the minor cycle on the CPU.
1006    #[default]
1007    Cpu,
1008    /// Run the minor cycle with the Metal backend when the selected deconvolver supports it.
1009    Metal,
1010}
1011
1012impl StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend {
1013    /// Stable diagnostic label for plan logs and benchmark metadata.
1014    pub fn label(self) -> &'static str {
1015        match self {
1016            Self::Cpu => "cpu",
1017            Self::Metal => "metal",
1018        }
1019    }
1020}
1021
1022/// Runtime execution knobs for standard-MFS backends.
1023///
1024/// These values are deliberately separate from [`ImagingRequest`] so callers
1025/// can tune memory residency without changing the imaging contract itself.
1026#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug, Default, PartialEq)]
1027pub struct StandardMfsExecutionConfig {
1028    /// Minor-cycle backend selected by the frontend planner.
1029    pub minor_cycle_backend: StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend,
1030    /// Optional byte budget for resident fixed-tile stage grids.
1031    ///
1032    /// When the fixed-tile backend is enabled, the backend converts this budget
1033    /// into a deterministic resident tile count from the actual padded grid and
1034    /// halo geometry. `CASA_RS_STANDARD_MFS_TILE_RESIDENT_LIMIT` remains an
1035    /// explicit debug override.
1036    pub fixed_tile_resident_bytes: Option<usize>,
1037    /// Optional fixed-tile interior edge selected by the frontend memory planner.
1038    ///
1039    /// `CASA_RS_STANDARD_MFS_TILE_EDGE` remains the explicit debug override.
1040    pub fixed_tile_edge: Option<usize>,
1041    /// Use the gridder-center boundary anchor when no tile-anchor env override is set.
1042    pub fixed_tile_center_boundary: bool,
1043    /// Maximum prepared row blocks the tiled scheduler may keep live.
1044    ///
1045    /// The first bounded scheduler uses one live row block; later read-ahead
1046    /// must be explicitly represented here and in the memory plan.
1047    pub fixed_tile_max_live_row_blocks: usize,
1048    /// Route fixed-tile sample replay through planned run blocks.
1049    ///
1050    /// This is selected by public standard-MFS plan variants, not by frontends.
1051    /// Keeping it private prevents an internal replay shape from becoming
1052    /// application API.
1053    fixed_tile_use_planned_run_blocks: bool,
1054    /// Reuse finalized host-side grouped Metal residual input chunks across
1055    /// major-cycle refreshes.
1056    ///
1057    /// Frontends should set this only after reserving the cache in their memory
1058    /// plan. `CASA_RS_STANDARD_MFS_METAL_GROUPED_INPUT_CACHE` remains a debug
1059    /// override for performance screening.
1060    pub metal_grouped_input_cache: bool,
1061    /// Optional maximum sample count for the materialized CPU sample-plan executor.
1062    ///
1063    /// `None` keeps the default/env threshold. Frontends can set `Some(0)` for
1064    /// dirty-only workloads where streaming taps during gridding is cheaper than
1065    /// allocating and filling a per-plane materialized sample plan.
1066    pub materialized_sample_plan_max_samples: Option<usize>,
1067    /// Optional frontend-computed maximum absolute W coordinate, in wavelengths.
1068    ///
1069    /// W-projection needs this value before kernels can be built. Supplying it
1070    /// lets streaming frontends compute the range from bounded row geometry
1071    /// instead of replaying and materializing every weighted visibility block
1072    /// once solely for a metadata scan.
1073    pub w_project_max_abs_w_lambda: Option<f64>,
1074}
1075
1076type StandardMfsWeightedBatchReplay<'a> = dyn FnMut(
1077        &mut dyn FnMut(Vec<VisibilityBatch>) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
1078    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>
1079    + 'a;
1080type StandardMfsPlannedSampleReplay<'a> = dyn FnMut(
1081        &mut dyn FnMut(&[StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample]) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
1082    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>
1083    + 'a;
1084type StandardMfsPlannedRunReplay<'a> = dyn FnMut(
1085        &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
1086    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>
1087    + 'a;
1088type StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRunReplay<'a> = dyn FnMut(
1089        &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRun) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
1090    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>
1091    + 'a;
1092
1093struct StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRunsPlan<'a> {
1094    weighting_plan: &'a StandardMfsStreamingWeightingPlan,
1095    replay: Box<StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRunReplay<'a>>,
1096    metal_grouped_input_cache: Option<StandardMfsMetalGroupedInputCache>,
1097}
1098
1099enum StandardMfsPlanSource<'a> {
1100    WeightedBatches(Box<StandardMfsWeightedBatchReplay<'a>>),
1101    PlannedRuns(Box<StandardMfsPlannedRunReplay<'a>>),
1102    RoutedVisibilityRuns(Box<StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRunsPlan<'a>>),
1103}
1104
1105/// Canonical standard-MFS execution request.
1106///
1107/// This is the public entrypoint shape for bounded, replayable standard-MFS
1108/// dirty/PSF/CLEAN execution. Source variants preserve the existing internal
1109/// weighted-batch, planned-run, routed-run, fixed-tile, and Metal cache
1110/// performance paths while callers drive them through one plan boundary.
1111pub struct StandardMfsPlan<'a> {
1112    request: ImagingRequest,
1113    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
1114    source: StandardMfsPlanSource<'a>,
1115}
1116
1117impl<'a> StandardMfsPlan<'a> {
1118    /// Build a plan from replayable weighted visibility batches.
1119    pub fn weighted_batches<F>(
1120        request: ImagingRequest,
1121        execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
1122        replay: F,
1123    ) -> Self
1124    where
1125        F: FnMut(
1126                &mut dyn FnMut(Vec<VisibilityBatch>) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
1127            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>
1128            + 'a,
1129    {
1130        Self {
1131            request,
1132            execution_config,
1133            source: StandardMfsPlanSource::WeightedBatches(Box::new(replay)),
1134        }
1135    }
1136
1137    /// Build a plan from replayable planned sample run blocks.
1138    pub fn planned_sample_run_blocks<F>(
1139        request: ImagingRequest,
1140        execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
1141        mut replay: F,
1142    ) -> Self
1143    where
1144        F: FnMut(
1145                &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlock) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
1146            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>
1147            + 'a,
1148    {
1149        let wrapped = move |consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
1150            &StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock,
1151        ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>| {
1152            replay(&mut |block: &StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlock| consumer(block.inner()))
1153        };
1154        Self {
1155            request,
1156            execution_config,
1157            source: StandardMfsPlanSource::PlannedRuns(Box::new(wrapped)),
1158        }
1159    }
1160
1161    /// Build a plan from replayable routed visibility runs.
1162    pub fn routed_visibility_runs<F>(
1163        request: ImagingRequest,
1164        execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
1165        weighting_plan: &'a StandardMfsStreamingWeightingPlan,
1166        mut replay: F,
1167        routed_input_cache: Option<StandardMfsRoutedInputCache>,
1168    ) -> Self
1169    where
1170        F: FnMut(
1171                &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityBlock) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
1172            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>
1173            + 'a,
1174    {
1175        let wrapped = move |consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
1176            &StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRun,
1177        ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>| {
1178            replay(&mut |block: &StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityBlock| {
1179                for run in block.runs() {
1180                    consumer(run)?;
1181                }
1182                Ok(())
1183            })
1184        };
1185        Self {
1186            request,
1187            execution_config,
1188            source: StandardMfsPlanSource::RoutedVisibilityRuns(Box::new(
1189                StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRunsPlan {
1190                    weighting_plan,
1191                    replay: Box::new(wrapped),
1192                    metal_grouped_input_cache: routed_input_cache.map(|cache| cache.inner),
1193                },
1194            )),
1195        }
1196    }
1197}
1198
1199/// Run a canonical standard-MFS plan.
1200pub fn run_standard_mfs_plan(plan: StandardMfsPlan<'_>) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError> {
1201    match plan.source {
1202        StandardMfsPlanSource::WeightedBatches(replay) => {
1203            run_standard_mfs_weighted_streaming_with_execution_config(
1204                plan.request,
1205                plan.execution_config,
1206                replay,
1207            )
1208        }
1209        StandardMfsPlanSource::PlannedRuns(replay) => {
1210            run_standard_mfs_planned_sample_run_block_streaming_with_execution_config(
1211                plan.request,
1212                plan.execution_config,
1213                replay,
1214            )
1215        }
1216        StandardMfsPlanSource::RoutedVisibilityRuns(source) => {
1217            let StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRunsPlan {
1218                weighting_plan,
1219                replay,
1220                metal_grouped_input_cache,
1221            } = *source;
1222            run_standard_mfs_routed_visibility_run_streaming_with_execution_config_and_metal_grouped_input_cache(
1223                plan.request,
1224                plan.execution_config,
1225                weighting_plan,
1226                replay,
1227                metal_grouped_input_cache,
1228            )
1229        }
1230    }
1231}
1232
1233/// Canonical standard-MFS dirty-only execution request.
1234///
1235/// Dirty-only cube and diagnostic paths use this plan when they need the same
1236/// bounded planned-sample replay contract without running a minor cycle.
1237pub struct StandardMfsDirtyPlan<'a> {
1238    request: ImagingRequest,
1239    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
1240    replay: Box<StandardMfsPlannedSampleReplay<'a>>,
1241}
1242
1243impl<'a> StandardMfsDirtyPlan<'a> {
1244    /// Build a dirty-only plan from replayable planned sample blocks.
1245    pub fn planned_sample_blocks<F>(
1246        request: ImagingRequest,
1247        execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
1248        mut replay: F,
1249    ) -> Self
1250    where
1251        F: FnMut(
1252                &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlock) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
1253            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>
1254            + 'a,
1255    {
1256        let wrapped = move |consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
1257            &[StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample],
1258        ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>| {
1259            replay(&mut |block: &StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlock| consumer(block.samples()))
1260        };
1261        Self {
1262            request,
1263            execution_config,
1264            replay: Box::new(wrapped),
1265        }
1266    }
1267}
1268
1269/// Run a canonical standard-MFS dirty-only plan.
1270pub fn run_standard_mfs_dirty_plan(
1271    mut plan: StandardMfsDirtyPlan<'_>,
1272) -> Result<DirtyImagingResult, ImagingError> {
1273    run_standard_mfs_dirty_planned_sample_block_source_streaming_with_execution_config(
1274        plan.request,
1275        plan.execution_config,
1276        &mut plan.replay,
1277    )
1278}
1279
1280/// Canonical prepare request for one resident standard-MFS CLEAN plane.
1281pub struct StandardMfsCleanPlan<'a> {
1282    request: ImagingRequest,
1283    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
1284    replay: Box<StandardMfsPlannedRunReplay<'a>>,
1285}
1286
1287impl<'a> StandardMfsCleanPlan<'a> {
1288    /// Build a prepare plan from replayable planned sample run blocks.
1289    pub fn planned_sample_run_blocks<F>(
1290        request: ImagingRequest,
1291        execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
1292        mut replay: F,
1293    ) -> Self
1294    where
1295        F: FnMut(
1296                &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlock) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
1297            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>
1298            + 'a,
1299    {
1300        let wrapped = move |consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
1301            &StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock,
1302        ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>| {
1303            replay(&mut |block: &StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlock| consumer(block.inner()))
1304        };
1305        Self {
1306            request,
1307            execution_config,
1308            replay: Box::new(wrapped),
1309        }
1310    }
1311}
1312
1313/// Canonical finish request for one resident standard-MFS CLEAN plane.
1314pub struct StandardMfsCleanFinishPlan<'a> {
1315    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
1316    cube_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: Option<f32>,
1317    replay: Box<StandardMfsPlannedRunReplay<'a>>,
1318}
1319
1320impl<'a> StandardMfsCleanFinishPlan<'a> {
1321    /// Build a finish plan from replayable planned sample run blocks.
1322    pub fn planned_sample_run_blocks<F>(
1323        execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
1324        cube_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: Option<f32>,
1325        mut replay: F,
1326    ) -> Self
1327    where
1328        F: FnMut(
1329                &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlock) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
1330            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>
1331            + 'a,
1332    {
1333        let wrapped = move |consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
1334            &StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock,
1335        ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>| {
1336            replay(&mut |block: &StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlock| consumer(block.inner()))
1337        };
1338        Self {
1339            execution_config,
1340            cube_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
1341            replay: Box::new(wrapped),
1342        }
1343    }
1344}
1345
1346/// Resident standard-MFS CLEAN plane session.
1347///
1348/// A session owns prepared dirty/PSF/residual state for one image plane. The
1349/// caller can inspect clean-control stats, publish a skipped plane, or finish
1350/// one/full minor-cycle pass using the same bounded replay source shape.
1351pub struct StandardMfsCleanSession {
1352    prepared: StandardMfsPreparedCleanPlane,
1353}
1354
1355impl StandardMfsCleanSession {
1356    /// Prepare one resident standard-MFS CLEAN plane.
1357    pub fn prepare(plan: StandardMfsCleanPlan<'_>) -> Result<Self, ImagingError> {
1358        let prepared =
1359            prepare_standard_mfs_planned_sample_run_block_clean_plane_with_execution_config(
1360                plan.request,
1361                plan.execution_config,
1362                plan.replay,
1363            )?;
1364        Ok(Self { prepared })
1365    }
1366
1367    /// Return the plane-local scalar values needed by a cube controller.
1368    pub fn clean_control_stats(&self) -> StandardMfsCleanControlStats {
1369        self.prepared.clean_control_stats()
1370    }
1371
1372    /// Publish this prepared plane without running a minor cycle.
1373    pub fn skip_with_cycle_threshold(
1374        self,
1375        cube_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
1376    ) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError> {
1377        skip_standard_mfs_prepared_clean_plane_with_cycle_threshold(
1378            self.prepared,
1379            cube_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
1380        )
1381    }
1382
1383    /// Finish this prepared plane with the normal standard-MFS CLEAN loop.
1384    pub fn finish(
1385        self,
1386        plan: StandardMfsCleanFinishPlan<'_>,
1387    ) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError> {
1388        finish_standard_mfs_clean_session(self.prepared, plan, false)
1389    }
1390
1391    /// Finish this prepared plane with one CASA cube-style major-cycle pass.
1392    pub fn finish_one_major_cycle(
1393        self,
1394        plan: StandardMfsCleanFinishPlan<'_>,
1395    ) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError> {
1396        finish_standard_mfs_clean_session(self.prepared, plan, true)
1397    }
1398}
1399
1400fn finish_standard_mfs_clean_session(
1401    mut prepared: StandardMfsPreparedCleanPlane,
1402    plan: StandardMfsCleanFinishPlan<'_>,
1403    one_major_cycle: bool,
1404) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError> {
1405    if one_major_cycle {
1406        prepared.request.clean.major_cycle_limit = Some(1);
1407    }
1408    finish_standard_mfs_prepared_clean_plane_with_execution_config(
1409        prepared,
1410        plan.execution_config,
1411        plan.cube_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
1412        plan.replay,
1413    )
1414}
1415
1416/// Metadata for streaming natural-weighted standard MFS dirty accumulation.
1417///
1418/// This request mirrors the dirty-only subset of [`ImagingRequest`] but leaves
1419/// visibility ownership with the caller. Frontends can therefore load one MS
1420/// chunk, feed its already-natural-weighted [`VisibilityBatch`] values into
1421/// [`StandardMfsDirtyAccumulator`], and release the chunk before reading the
1422/// next one.
1423#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq)]
1424pub struct StandardMfsDirtyAccumulatorRequest {
1425    /// Requested image geometry for the MFS image plane.
1426    pub geometry: ImageGeometry,
1427    /// Scalar imaging plane to produce.
1428    pub plane_stokes: PlaneStokes,
1429    /// Reference frequency in Hz for metadata and diagnostics.
1430    pub reffreq_hz: f64,
1431    /// Inclusive selected frequency range in Hz.
1432    pub selected_frequency_range_hz: [f64; 2],
1433    /// Dirty-run clean controls, used for PSF fitting diagnostics and thresholds.
1434    pub clean: CleanConfig,
1435    /// Optional image-plane clean mask. `true` pixels are eligible for diagnostics.
1436    pub clean_mask: Option<Array2<bool>>,
1437}
1438
1439/// Streaming standard-gridder MFS dirty accumulator for natural-weighted batches.
1440///
1441/// The accumulator preserves the dirty `run_imaging()` math for the supported
1442/// subset while avoiding a single in-memory `Vec<VisibilityBatch>` for large
1443/// MeasurementSets. It intentionally does not implement CLEAN, MT-MFS,
1444/// non-natural weighting, W-term handling, or mosaic/PB semantics.
1445pub struct StandardMfsDirtyAccumulator {
1446    request: StandardMfsDirtyAccumulatorRequest,
1447    executor: StandardMfsDirtyCpuExecutor,
1448    stage_timings: ImagingStageTimings,
1449    total_started: Instant,
1450}
1451
1452impl StandardMfsDirtyAccumulator {
1453    /// Create an empty accumulator for one standard MFS dirty image.
1454    pub fn new(request: StandardMfsDirtyAccumulatorRequest) -> Result<Self, ImagingError> {
1455        request.geometry.validate()?;
1456        request.clean.validate()?;
1457        if request.clean.niter != 0 {
1458            return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
1459                "standard MFS dirty accumulator requires clean.niter=0".to_string(),
1460            ));
1461        }
1462        if !(request.reffreq_hz.is_finite() && request.reffreq_hz > 0.0) {
1463            return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
1464                "reffreq_hz must be a finite positive frequency".to_string(),
1465            ));
1466        }
1467        if !(request.selected_frequency_range_hz[0].is_finite()
1468            && request.selected_frequency_range_hz[1].is_finite()
1469            && request.selected_frequency_range_hz[0] > 0.0
1470            && request.selected_frequency_range_hz[1] >= request.selected_frequency_range_hz[0])
1471        {
1472            return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
1473                "selected_frequency_range_hz must be a finite ordered positive range".to_string(),
1474            ));
1475        }
1476        if let Some(mask) = &request.clean_mask {
1477            if mask.dim() != (request.geometry.nx(), request.geometry.ny()) {
1478                return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
1479                    "clean mask shape {:?} does not match image shape {:?}",
1480                    mask.dim(),
1481                    (request.geometry.nx(), request.geometry.ny())
1482                )));
1483            }
1484        }
1485        let executor = StandardMfsDirtyCpuExecutor::new(request.geometry)?;
1486        Ok(Self {
1487            request,
1488            executor,
1489            stage_timings: ImagingStageTimings::default(),
1490            total_started: Instant::now(),
1491        })
1492    }
1493
1494    /// Accumulate one or more already-natural-weighted visibility batches.
1495    pub fn accumulate_batches(&mut self, batches: &[VisibilityBatch]) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
1496        let grid_started = Instant::now();
1497        self.executor.accumulate_batches(batches)?;
1498        let grid_elapsed = grid_started.elapsed();
1499        let split_grid_elapsed = Duration::from_secs_f64(grid_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 0.5);
1500        self.stage_timings.psf_grid += split_grid_elapsed;
1501        self.stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += grid_elapsed.saturating_sub(split_grid_elapsed);
1502        Ok(())
1503    }
1504
1505    /// Finish accumulation and return CASA-style dirty products and diagnostics.
1506    pub fn finish(mut self) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError> {
1507        let accumulation = self.executor.accumulation();
1508        if accumulation.normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 || accumulation.reported_sumwt <= 0.0 {
1509            return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
1510        }
1511        let (psf_grid, residual_grid) = self.executor.dirty_grids();
1512        let psf_fft_started = Instant::now();
1513        let raw_psf = centered_ifft2_f64(psf_grid);
1514        self.stage_timings.psf_fft += psf_fft_started.elapsed();
1515        let psf_normalize_started = Instant::now();
1516        let mut psf = self
1517            .executor
1518            .gridder()
1519            .corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_psf);
1520        psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32);
1521        let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&psf);
1522        if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
1523            return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
1524                "PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
1525            ));
1526        }
1527        psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
1528        self.stage_timings.psf_normalize += psf_normalize_started.elapsed();
1529
1530        let residual_fft_started = Instant::now();
1531        let raw_residual = centered_ifft2_f64(residual_grid);
1532        self.stage_timings.residual_fft += residual_fft_started.elapsed();
1533        let residual_normalize_started = Instant::now();
1534        let mut residual = self
1535            .executor
1536            .gridder()
1537            .corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_residual);
1538        residual.mapv_inplace(|value| value / accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32 / psf_peak);
1539        self.stage_timings.residual_normalize += residual_normalize_started.elapsed();
1540
1541        let max_psf_sidelobe_level = estimate_psf_sidelobe_level(
1542            &psf,
1543            self.request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
1544            self.request.clean.psf_cutoff,
1545        );
1546        let [nx, ny] = self.request.geometry.image_shape;
1547        let model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny));
1548        let clean_mask_pixels = self
1549            .request
1550            .clean_mask
1551            .as_ref()
1552            .map(|mask| mask.iter().filter(|value| **value).count())
1553            .unwrap_or(nx * ny);
1554        let initial_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual, self.request.clean_mask.as_ref());
1555        let mut warnings = Vec::new();
1556        let fractional_bandwidth = (self.request.selected_frequency_range_hz[1]
1557            - self.request.selected_frequency_range_hz[0])
1558            / self.request.reffreq_hz;
1559        if fractional_bandwidth > 0.1 {
1560            warnings.push(format!(
1561                "fractional bandwidth {:.3} exceeds the narrow-band nterms=1 comfort zone",
1562                fractional_bandwidth
1563            ));
1564        }
1565        let w_phase_metric =
1566            accumulation.max_abs_w_lambda * self.request.geometry.field_of_view_rad().powi(2);
1567        if w_phase_metric > 0.1 {
1568            warnings.push(format!(
1569                "max |w| * fov^2 = {:.3} suggests 2-D standard imaging may show non-coplanar artifacts",
1570                w_phase_metric
1571            ));
1572        }
1573
1574        let beam_fit_started = Instant::now();
1575        let BeamFitOutcome {
1576            beam,
1577            warnings: beam_warnings,
1578            attempts: beam_fit_attempts,
1579            cutoff_used: beam_fit_cutoff_used,
1580            debug: beam_fit_debug,
1581        } = fit_beam_from_psf(
1582            &psf,
1583            self.request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
1584            self.request.clean.psf_cutoff,
1585        );
1586        self.stage_timings.beam_fit += beam_fit_started.elapsed();
1587        let restore_started = Instant::now();
1588        let restored_model = restore_model(&model, self.request.geometry.cell_size_rad, beam);
1589        self.stage_timings.restore += restore_started.elapsed();
1590        let restored_image = &restored_model + &residual;
1591
1592        warnings.extend(beam_warnings);
1593        self.stage_timings.total = self.total_started.elapsed();
1594
1595        Ok(ImagingResult {
1596            psf: expand_plane(&psf),
1597            residual: expand_plane(&residual),
1598            model: expand_plane(&model),
1599            image: expand_plane(&restored_image),
1600            sumwt: expand_scalar(accumulation.reported_sumwt as f32),
1601            beam,
1602            diagnostics: ImagingDiagnostics {
1603                warnings,
1604                gridded_samples: accumulation.gridded_samples,
1605                skipped_samples: accumulation.skipped_samples,
1606                normalization_sumwt: accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32,
1607                reported_sumwt: accumulation.reported_sumwt as f32,
1608                psf_peak_normalization: psf_peak,
1609                major_cycles: 0,
1610                minor_iterations: 0,
1611                clean_stop_reason: None,
1612                minor_cycle_traces: Vec::new(),
1613                initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: initial_peak,
1614                final_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: initial_peak,
1615                max_abs_w_lambda: accumulation.max_abs_w_lambda,
1616                fractional_bandwidth,
1617                max_psf_sidelobe_level,
1618                final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: self.request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
1619                clean_mask_pixels,
1620                beam_fit_attempts,
1621                beam_fit_cutoff_used,
1622                beam_fit_debug,
1623                mosaic_weight_image: None,
1624                stage_timings: self.stage_timings,
1625            },
1626            compatibility: CompatibilityMetadata {
1627                axis_order: [
1628                    AxisKind::RightAscension,
1629                    AxisKind::Declination,
1630                    AxisKind::Stokes,
1631                    AxisKind::Frequency,
1632                ],
1633                plane_stokes: self.request.plane_stokes,
1634                reffreq_hz: self.request.reffreq_hz,
1635                channel_frequencies_hz: vec![self.request.reffreq_hz],
1636                psf_units: String::new(),
1637                residual_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
1638                model_units: "Jy/pixel".to_string(),
1639                image_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
1640            },
1641        })
1642    }
1643}
1644
1645impl StandardMfsModelPredictor {
1646    /// Build a predictor for one image geometry and final model plane.
1647    pub fn new(geometry: ImageGeometry, model: &Array2<f32>) -> Result<Self, ImagingError> {
1648        let gridder = StandardGridder::new_with_casa_composite_padding(geometry)?;
1649        let model_has_components = model.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0);
1650        let model_grid = model_has_components.then(|| centered_fft2(&gridder.apodize_model(model)));
1651        Ok(Self {
1652            gridder,
1653            model_grid,
1654        })
1655    }
1656
1657    /// Predict the model visibility at one `(u, v)` coordinate in wavelengths.
1658    pub fn predict(&self, u_lambda: f64, v_lambda: f64) -> Complex32 {
1659        let Some(model_grid) = self.model_grid.as_ref() else {
1660            return Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0);
1661        };
1662        if let Some(predicted) = self
1663            .gridder
1664            .degrid_sample_product_planned_sectdgrid(model_grid, u_lambda, v_lambda)
1665        {
1666            return predicted;
1667        }
1668        let Some(plan) = self.gridder.plan_sample(u_lambda, v_lambda) else {
1669            return Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0);
1670        };
1671        self.gridder
1672            .degrid_sample_product_planned(model_grid, &plan.positive)
1673    }
1674}
1675
1676/// Fit a CASA-style restoring beam directly from a PSF image plane.
1677///
1678/// This exposes the same beam-fit path used internally by [`run_imaging`] and
1679/// [`run_cube`], following the `StokesImageUtil::FitGaussianPSF` / `psfcutoff`
1680/// workflow used by CASA.
1681pub fn fit_restoring_beam_from_psf(
1682    psf: &Array2<f32>,
1683    cell_size_rad: [f64; 2],
1684    cutoff: f32,
1685) -> PsfBeamFitResult {
1686    let outcome = fit_beam_from_psf(psf, cell_size_rad, cutoff);
1687    PsfBeamFitResult {
1688        beam: outcome.beam,
1689        warnings: outcome.warnings,
1690        attempts: outcome.attempts,
1691        cutoff_used: outcome.cutoff_used,
1692        debug: outcome.debug,
1693    }
1694}
1695
1696/// Restore a standard MFS component model with an already-selected restoring beam.
1697///
1698/// Frontends that orchestrate more than one image plane can use this to build
1699/// the same restored-image product that [`run_imaging`] writes after its
1700/// internal Cotton-Schwab controller finishes.
1701pub fn restore_standard_mfs_model(
1702    model: &Array2<f32>,
1703    cell_size_rad: [f64; 2],
1704    beam: Option<BeamFit>,
1705) -> Array2<f32> {
1706    restore_model(model, cell_size_rad, beam)
1707}
1708
1709/// Estimate the maximum absolute PSF sidelobe level outside the fitted main lobe.
1710///
1711/// This exposes the same sidelobe-estimation path used internally by
1712/// [`run_imaging`] and [`run_cube`], following CASA's
1713/// `SIImageStore::getPSFSidelobeLevel` beam-subtraction workflow.
1714pub fn estimate_psf_sidelobe_from_psf(
1715    psf: &Array2<f32>,
1716    cell_size_rad: [f64; 2],
1717    cutoff: f32,
1718) -> f32 {
1719    estimate_psf_sidelobe_level(psf, cell_size_rad, cutoff)
1720}
1721
1722/// Run the concrete CASA-style MFS imaging pipeline for the supplied request.
1723pub fn run_imaging(request: &ImagingRequest) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError> {
1724    let total_started = Instant::now();
1725    request.validate()?;
1726    if request.compatibility != CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs {
1727        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
1728            "only CASA standard MFS compatibility mode is implemented".to_string(),
1729        ));
1730    }
1731    if request.deconvolver == Deconvolver::Mtmfs {
1732        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
1733            "deconvolver='mtmfs' requires the dedicated run_mtmfs() entrypoint".to_string(),
1734        ));
1735    }
1736    ensure_standard_mfs_backend_available()?;
1737    if let GridderMode::Mosaic(config) = &request.gridder_mode {
1738        return run_mosaic_dirty_imaging(
1739            request,
1740            config,
1741            StandardMfsExecutionConfig::default(),
1742            total_started,
1743        );
1744    }
1745
1746    let gridder = StandardGridder::new(request.geometry)?;
1747    let mut stage_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
1748    let weighting_started = Instant::now();
1749    let weighted_batches = apply_weighting(request, &gridder)?;
1750    stage_timings.weighting += weighting_started.elapsed();
1751    run_standard_mfs_imaging_with_weighted_batches(
1752        request,
1753        &weighted_batches,
1754        &gridder,
1755        StandardMfsExecutionConfig::default(),
1756        stage_timings,
1757        total_started,
1758    )
1759}
1760
1761/// Run CASA-style standard MFS imaging while consuming the request's visibility batches.
1762///
1763/// This preserves the borrowed [`run_imaging`] API for general callers, but
1764/// lets frontend owners pass prepared batches through weighting without
1765/// cloning the full visibility payload.
1766pub fn run_imaging_owned(request: ImagingRequest) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError> {
1767    run_imaging_owned_with_execution_config(request, StandardMfsExecutionConfig::default())
1768}
1769
1770/// Run CASA-style standard MFS imaging with caller-supplied backend execution knobs.
1771pub fn run_imaging_owned_with_execution_config(
1772    mut request: ImagingRequest,
1773    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
1774) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError> {
1775    let total_started = Instant::now();
1776    request.validate()?;
1777    if request.compatibility != CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs {
1778        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
1779            "only CASA standard MFS compatibility mode is implemented".to_string(),
1780        ));
1781    }
1782    if request.deconvolver == Deconvolver::Mtmfs {
1783        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
1784            "deconvolver='mtmfs' requires the dedicated run_mtmfs() entrypoint".to_string(),
1785        ));
1786    }
1787    ensure_standard_mfs_backend_available()?;
1788    if let GridderMode::Mosaic(config) = &request.gridder_mode {
1789        return run_mosaic_dirty_imaging(&request, config, execution_config, total_started);
1790    }
1791
1792    let gridder = StandardGridder::new(request.geometry)?;
1793    let mut stage_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
1794    let weighting_started = Instant::now();
1795    let source_batches = std::mem::take(&mut request.visibility_batches);
1796    let weighted_batches = apply_weighting_to_owned_batches(&request, &gridder, source_batches)?;
1797    stage_timings.weighting += weighting_started.elapsed();
1798    request.visibility_batches = weighted_batches;
1799    run_standard_mfs_imaging_with_weighted_batches(
1800        &request,
1801        &request.visibility_batches,
1802        &gridder,
1803        execution_config,
1804        stage_timings,
1805        total_started,
1806    )
1807}
1808
1809/// Run CASA-style standard MFS imaging from owned target batches and an
1810/// explicit density source.
1811///
1812/// Cube and other multi-plane frontends use this when a plane is independently
1813/// deconvolved but its Briggs/Uniform density weights must still come from a
1814/// caller-selected source such as the whole cube or the current plane.
1815pub fn run_imaging_owned_with_density_source_and_execution_config(
1816    mut request: ImagingRequest,
1817    density_batches: Option<&[VisibilityBatch]>,
1818    weight_density_mode: WeightDensityMode,
1819    uv_taper: Option<GaussianUvTaper>,
1820    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
1821) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError> {
1822    let total_started = Instant::now();
1823    request.validate()?;
1824    if request.compatibility != CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs {
1825        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
1826            "only CASA standard MFS compatibility mode is implemented".to_string(),
1827        ));
1828    }
1829    if request.deconvolver == Deconvolver::Mtmfs {
1830        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
1831            "deconvolver='mtmfs' requires the dedicated run_mtmfs() entrypoint".to_string(),
1832        ));
1833    }
1834    ensure_standard_mfs_backend_available()?;
1835    if matches!(request.gridder_mode, GridderMode::Mosaic(_)) {
1836        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
1837            "owned standard MFS density-source imaging does not support mosaic gridder metadata"
1838                .to_string(),
1839        ));
1840    }
1841
1842    let gridder = StandardGridder::new(request.geometry)?;
1843    let mut stage_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
1844    let weighting_started = Instant::now();
1845    let source_batches = std::mem::take(&mut request.visibility_batches);
1846    let fractional_bandwidth =
1847        fractional_bandwidth_from_frequency_range(request.selected_frequency_range_hz);
1848    let weighted_batches = if let Some(density_batches) = density_batches {
1849        apply_weighting_with_density_source(
1850            request.weighting,
1851            weight_density_mode,
1852            uv_taper,
1853            fractional_bandwidth,
1854            &source_batches,
1855            density_batches,
1856            &gridder,
1857        )?
1858    } else {
1859        apply_weighting_to_owned_batches_with_options(
1860            request.weighting,
1861            uv_taper,
1862            fractional_bandwidth,
1863            source_batches,
1864            &gridder,
1865        )?
1866    };
1867    stage_timings.weighting += weighting_started.elapsed();
1868    request.visibility_batches = weighted_batches;
1869    run_standard_mfs_imaging_with_weighted_batches(
1870        &request,
1871        &request.visibility_batches,
1872        &gridder,
1873        execution_config,
1874        stage_timings,
1875        total_started,
1876    )
1877}
1878
1879fn run_standard_mfs_imaging_with_weighted_batches(
1880    request: &ImagingRequest,
1881    weighted_batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
1882    gridder: &StandardGridder,
1883    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
1884    mut stage_timings: ImagingStageTimings,
1885    total_started: Instant,
1886) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError> {
1887    let use_metal_executor = should_use_standard_mfs_metal_backend(request);
1888    let use_tiled_executor = should_use_standard_mfs_tiled_backend(request);
1889    let mut standard_executor = None;
1890    if !(use_metal_executor || use_tiled_executor)
1891        && should_use_standard_mfs_executor(request, weighted_batches, execution_config)
1892    {
1893        let executor_build_started = Instant::now();
1894        standard_executor = Some(StandardMfsCpuExecutor::new(gridder, weighted_batches)?);
1895        stage_timings.executor_build += executor_build_started.elapsed();
1896    }
1897    let [nx, ny] = request.geometry.image_shape;
1898    let mut model = request
1899        .initial_model
1900        .clone()
1901        .unwrap_or_else(|| Array2::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny)));
1902    let has_initial_model = request.initial_model.is_some();
1903    let can_start_from_combined_dirty_pass =
1904        !has_initial_model && matches!(request.w_term_mode, WTermMode::None | WTermMode::WProject);
1905    let (psf_state, mut residual) = if can_start_from_combined_dirty_pass {
1906        if request.w_term_mode == WTermMode::WProject {
1907            compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_w_project(
1908                request.geometry,
1909                weighted_batches,
1910                gridder,
1911                request.w_project_planes,
1912                &mut stage_timings,
1913            )?
1914        } else if use_metal_executor {
1915            compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_metal(
1916                weighted_batches,
1917                gridder,
1918                execution_config,
1919                &mut stage_timings,
1920            )?
1921        } else if use_tiled_executor {
1922            compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_tiled(
1923                weighted_batches,
1924                gridder,
1925                execution_config,
1926                &mut stage_timings,
1927            )?
1928        } else if let Some(executor) = standard_executor.as_mut() {
1929            compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_with_executor(executor, &mut stage_timings)?
1930        } else {
1931            compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_streaming(
1932                weighted_batches,
1933                gridder,
1934                &mut stage_timings,
1935            )?
1936        }
1937    } else {
1938        let psf_state = if use_metal_executor {
1939            compute_psf_standard_metal(
1940                weighted_batches,
1941                gridder,
1942                execution_config,
1943                &mut stage_timings,
1944            )?
1945        } else if use_tiled_executor {
1946            compute_psf_standard_tiled(
1947                weighted_batches,
1948                gridder,
1949                execution_config,
1950                &mut stage_timings,
1951            )?
1952        } else if let Some(executor) = standard_executor.as_mut() {
1953            compute_psf_standard(executor, &mut stage_timings)?
1954        } else {
1955            compute_psf_standard_streaming(weighted_batches, gridder, &mut stage_timings)?
1956        };
1957        let residual = if use_metal_executor || use_tiled_executor {
1958            compute_residual_standard_tiled(
1959                weighted_batches,
1960                gridder,
1961                &model,
1962                &psf_state,
1963                execution_config,
1964                &mut stage_timings,
1965            )?
1966        } else if let Some(executor) = standard_executor.as_mut() {
1967            compute_residual_standard_with_executor(
1968                executor,
1969                &model,
1970                &psf_state,
1971                &mut stage_timings,
1972            )?
1973        } else {
1974            compute_residual_standard_streaming(
1975                request.geometry,
1976                weighted_batches,
1977                gridder,
1978                &model,
1979                &psf_state,
1980                false,
1981                &mut stage_timings,
1982            )?
1983        };
1984        (psf_state, residual)
1985    };
1986    let beam_fit_started = Instant::now();
1987    let BeamFitOutcome {
1988        beam,
1989        warnings: beam_warnings,
1990        attempts: beam_fit_attempts,
1991        cutoff_used: beam_fit_cutoff_used,
1992        debug: beam_fit_debug,
1993    } = fit_beam_from_psf(
1994        &psf_state.psf,
1995        request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
1996        request.clean.psf_cutoff,
1997    );
1998    stage_timings.beam_fit += beam_fit_started.elapsed();
1999    let max_psf_sidelobe_level =
2000        estimate_psf_sidelobe_level_for_beam(&psf_state.psf, request.geometry.cell_size_rad, beam);
2001    let clean_mask_pixels = request
2002        .clean_mask
2003        .as_ref()
2004        .map(|mask| mask.iter().filter(|value| **value).count())
2005        .unwrap_or(nx * ny);
2006    let initial_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref());
2007    let mut warnings = Vec::new();
2008
2009    let controller_started = Instant::now();
2010    let clean_state = run_cotton_schwab_controller(
2011        request,
2012        weighted_batches,
2013        &mut standard_executor,
2014        gridder,
2015        &psf_state,
2016        execution_config,
2017        &mut stage_timings,
2018        &mut model,
2019        residual,
2020        max_psf_sidelobe_level,
2021        initial_peak,
2022        &mut warnings,
2023    )?;
2024    let controller_elapsed = controller_started.elapsed();
2025    let accounted = stage_timings
2026        .minor_cycle_solve
2027        .saturating_add(stage_timings.major_cycle_refresh);
2028    stage_timings.controller_overhead += controller_elapsed.saturating_sub(accounted);
2029    residual = clean_state.residual;
2030
2031    let restore_started = Instant::now();
2032    let restored_image = if request.clean.niter == 0 && !has_initial_model {
2033        residual.clone()
2034    } else {
2035        let restored_model = restore_model(&model, request.geometry.cell_size_rad, beam);
2036        &restored_model + &residual
2037    };
2038    stage_timings.restore += restore_started.elapsed();
2039
2040    let max_abs_w_lambda = weighted_batches
2041        .iter()
2042        .flat_map(|batch| batch.w_lambda.iter())
2043        .fold(0.0f64, |max_value, value| max_value.max(value.abs()));
2044    let fractional_bandwidth = (request.selected_frequency_range_hz[1]
2045        - request.selected_frequency_range_hz[0])
2046        / request.reffreq_hz;
2047    if fractional_bandwidth > 0.1 {
2048        warnings.push(format!(
2049            "fractional bandwidth {:.3} exceeds the narrow-band nterms=1 comfort zone",
2050            fractional_bandwidth
2051        ));
2052    }
2053    let w_phase_metric = max_abs_w_lambda * request.geometry.field_of_view_rad().powi(2);
2054    if w_phase_metric > 0.1 {
2055        warnings.push(format!(
2056            "max |w| * fov^2 = {:.3} suggests 2-D standard imaging may show non-coplanar artifacts",
2057            w_phase_metric
2058        ));
2059    }
2060    warnings.extend(beam_warnings);
2061    stage_timings.total = total_started.elapsed();
2062
2063    Ok(ImagingResult {
2064        psf: expand_plane(&psf_state.psf),
2065        residual: expand_plane(&residual),
2066        model: expand_plane(&model),
2067        image: expand_plane(&restored_image),
2068        sumwt: expand_scalar(psf_state.reported_sumwt),
2069        beam,
2070        diagnostics: ImagingDiagnostics {
2071            warnings,
2072            gridded_samples: psf_state.gridded_samples,
2073            skipped_samples: psf_state.skipped_samples,
2074            normalization_sumwt: psf_state.normalization_sumwt,
2075            reported_sumwt: psf_state.reported_sumwt,
2076            psf_peak_normalization: psf_state.psf_peak,
2077            major_cycles: casa_major_cycle_count(clean_state.major_cycles, request.clean.niter),
2078            minor_iterations: clean_state.minor_iterations,
2079            clean_stop_reason: clean_state.clean_stop_reason,
2080            minor_cycle_traces: clean_state.minor_cycle_traces,
2081            initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: initial_peak,
2082            final_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: peak_abs_value_masked(
2083                &residual,
2084                request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
2085            ),
2086            max_abs_w_lambda,
2087            fractional_bandwidth,
2088            max_psf_sidelobe_level,
2089            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: clean_state.final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
2090            clean_mask_pixels,
2091            beam_fit_attempts,
2092            beam_fit_cutoff_used,
2093            beam_fit_debug,
2094            mosaic_weight_image: None,
2095            stage_timings,
2096        },
2097        compatibility: CompatibilityMetadata {
2098            axis_order: [
2099                AxisKind::RightAscension,
2100                AxisKind::Declination,
2101                AxisKind::Stokes,
2102                AxisKind::Frequency,
2103            ],
2104            plane_stokes: request.plane_stokes,
2105            reffreq_hz: request.reffreq_hz,
2106            channel_frequencies_hz: vec![request.reffreq_hz],
2107            psf_units: String::new(),
2108            residual_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
2109            model_units: "Jy/pixel".to_string(),
2110            image_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
2111        },
2112    })
2113}
2114
2115/// Run standard-MFS CLEAN from replayable weighted row-block batches.
2116///
2117/// The callback is invoked once for the initial dirty/PSF pass and once for
2118/// each exact residual-refresh pass. Each invocation must stream batches in a
2119/// stable MeasurementSet order and pass ownership of each bounded row block to
2120/// the supplied consumer.
2121fn run_standard_mfs_weighted_streaming_with_execution_config<F>(
2122    mut request: ImagingRequest,
2123    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
2124    mut replay_weighted_batches: F,
2125) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError>
2126where
2127    F: FnMut(
2128        &mut dyn FnMut(Vec<VisibilityBatch>) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
2129    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
2130{
2131    let total_started = Instant::now();
2132    request.geometry.validate()?;
2133    request.clean.validate()?;
2134    if !matches!(request.gridder_mode, GridderMode::Standard) {
2135        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
2136            "streaming standard MFS clean requires gridder='standard'".to_string(),
2137        ));
2138    }
2139    if !matches!(request.w_term_mode, WTermMode::None | WTermMode::WProject) {
2140        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
2141            "streaming standard MFS clean supports only w_term_mode='none' or 'wproject'"
2142                .to_string(),
2143        ));
2144    }
2145    if request.deconvolver == Deconvolver::Mtmfs {
2146        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
2147            "streaming standard MFS clean does not support deconvolver='mtmfs'".to_string(),
2148        ));
2149    }
2150    let gridder = StandardGridder::new(request.geometry)?;
2151    let [nx, ny] = request.geometry.image_shape;
2152    let mut model = request
2153        .initial_model
2154        .take()
2155        .unwrap_or_else(|| Array2::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny)));
2156    let has_initial_model = model.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0);
2157    let mut stage_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
2158
2159    let w_project_context = if request.w_term_mode == WTermMode::WProject {
2160        let prepare_started = Instant::now();
2161        let max_abs_w_lambda = match execution_config.w_project_max_abs_w_lambda {
2162            Some(value) if value.is_finite() && value > 0.0 => value,
2163            _ => scan_w_project_replay(&mut replay_weighted_batches)?,
2164        };
2165        let projector = WProjector::new(
2166            request.geometry,
2167            &gridder,
2168            max_abs_w_lambda,
2169            request.w_project_planes,
2170        )?;
2171        stage_timings.psf_grid += prepare_started.elapsed();
2172        Some((projector, max_abs_w_lambda))
2173    } else {
2174        None
2175    };
2176
2177    let (psf_state, mut residual, max_abs_w_lambda) = if !has_initial_model {
2178        if request.w_term_mode == WTermMode::WProject {
2179            let (projector, max_abs_w_lambda) = w_project_context.as_ref().ok_or_else(|| {
