2180                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("missing wproject execution context".to_string())
2181            })?;
2182            compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_w_project_replay(
2183                &gridder,
2184                projector,
2185                *max_abs_w_lambda,
2186                &mut replay_weighted_batches,
2187                &mut stage_timings,
2188            )?
2189        } else {
2190            compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_tiled_replay(
2191                &gridder,
2192                execution_config,
2193                &mut replay_weighted_batches,
2194                &mut stage_timings,
2195            )?
2196        }
2197    } else {
2198        if request.w_term_mode == WTermMode::WProject {
2199            let (projector, max_abs_w_lambda) = w_project_context.as_ref().ok_or_else(|| {
2200                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("missing wproject execution context".to_string())
2201            })?;
2202            let psf_state = compute_psf_w_project_replay(
2203                &gridder,
2204                projector,
2205                &mut replay_weighted_batches,
2206                &mut stage_timings,
2207            )?;
2208            let residual = compute_residual_w_project_replay(
2209                &gridder,
2210                &model,
2211                &psf_state,
2212                projector,
2213                &mut replay_weighted_batches,
2214                &mut stage_timings,
2215            )?;
2216            (psf_state, residual, *max_abs_w_lambda)
2217        } else {
2218            let psf_state = compute_psf_standard_tiled_replay(
2219                &gridder,
2220                execution_config,
2221                &mut replay_weighted_batches,
2222                &mut stage_timings,
2223            )?;
2224            let residual = compute_residual_standard_tiled_replay(
2225                request.geometry,
2226                &gridder,
2227                &model,
2228                &psf_state,
2229                execution_config,
2230                &mut replay_weighted_batches,
2231                &mut stage_timings,
2232            )?;
2233            (psf_state, residual, 0.0)
2234        }
2235    };
2236    let beam_fit_started = Instant::now();
2237    let BeamFitOutcome {
2238        beam,
2239        warnings: beam_warnings,
2240        attempts: beam_fit_attempts,
2241        cutoff_used: beam_fit_cutoff_used,
2242        debug: beam_fit_debug,
2243    } = fit_beam_from_psf(
2244        &psf_state.psf,
2245        request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
2246        request.clean.psf_cutoff,
2247    );
2248    stage_timings.beam_fit += beam_fit_started.elapsed();
2249    let max_psf_sidelobe_level =
2250        estimate_psf_sidelobe_level_for_beam(&psf_state.psf, request.geometry.cell_size_rad, beam);
2251    let clean_mask_pixels = request
2252        .clean_mask
2253        .as_ref()
2254        .map(|mask| mask.iter().filter(|value| **value).count())
2255        .unwrap_or(nx * ny);
2256    let initial_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref());
2257    let mut warnings = Vec::new();
2258
2259    let mut refresh_residual = |model: &Array2<f32>,
2260                                stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings|
2261     -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
2262        let before = ResidualRefreshTimingSnapshot::capture(stage_timings);
2263        let refresh_started = Instant::now();
2264        let residual = if request.w_term_mode == WTermMode::WProject {
2265            let (projector, _) = w_project_context.as_ref().ok_or_else(|| {
2266                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("missing wproject execution context".to_string())
2267            })?;
2268            compute_residual_w_project_replay(
2269                &gridder,
2270                model,
2271                &psf_state,
2272                projector,
2273                &mut replay_weighted_batches,
2274                stage_timings,
2275            )?
2276        } else {
2277            compute_residual_standard_tiled_replay(
2278                request.geometry,
2279                &gridder,
2280                model,
2281                &psf_state,
2282                execution_config,
2283                &mut replay_weighted_batches,
2284                stage_timings,
2285            )?
2286        };
2287        let refresh_elapsed = refresh_started.elapsed();
2288        let accounted = before.accounted_delta(stage_timings);
2289        stage_timings.major_cycle_refresh += refresh_elapsed;
2290        stage_timings.residual_refresh_overhead += refresh_elapsed.saturating_sub(accounted);
2291        log_standard_mfs_clean_residual_refresh_summary(
2292            &request,
2293            execution_config,
2294            before,
2295            stage_timings,
2296            refresh_elapsed,
2297            accounted,
2298        );
2299        Ok(residual)
2300    };
2301
2302    let controller_started = Instant::now();
2303    let clean_state = run_cotton_schwab_controller_with_refresh(
2304        &request,
2305        &psf_state,
2306        execution_config.minor_cycle_backend,
2307        &mut stage_timings,
2308        &mut refresh_residual,
2309        &mut model,
2310        residual,
2311        max_psf_sidelobe_level,
2312        initial_peak,
2313        None,
2314        &mut warnings,
2315    )?;
2316    let controller_elapsed = controller_started.elapsed();
2317    let accounted = stage_timings
2318        .minor_cycle_solve
2319        .saturating_add(stage_timings.major_cycle_refresh);
2320    stage_timings.controller_overhead += controller_elapsed.saturating_sub(accounted);
2321    residual = clean_state.residual;
2322
2323    let restore_started = Instant::now();
2324    let restored_model = restore_model(&model, request.geometry.cell_size_rad, beam);
2325    stage_timings.restore += restore_started.elapsed();
2326    let restored_image = &restored_model + &residual;
2327
2328    let fractional_bandwidth = (request.selected_frequency_range_hz[1]
2329        - request.selected_frequency_range_hz[0])
2330        / request.reffreq_hz;
2331    if fractional_bandwidth > 0.1 {
2332        warnings.push(format!(
2333            "fractional bandwidth {:.3} exceeds the narrow-band nterms=1 comfort zone",
2334            fractional_bandwidth
2335        ));
2336    }
2337    let w_phase_metric = max_abs_w_lambda * request.geometry.field_of_view_rad().powi(2);
2338    if w_phase_metric > 0.1 {
2339        warnings.push(format!(
2340            "max |w| * fov^2 = {:.3} suggests 2-D standard imaging may show non-coplanar artifacts",
2341            w_phase_metric
2342        ));
2343    }
2344    warnings.extend(beam_warnings);
2345    stage_timings.total = total_started.elapsed();
2346
2347    Ok(ImagingResult {
2348        psf: expand_plane(&psf_state.psf),
2349        residual: expand_plane(&residual),
2350        model: expand_plane(&model),
2351        image: expand_plane(&restored_image),
2352        sumwt: expand_scalar(psf_state.reported_sumwt),
2353        beam,
2354        diagnostics: ImagingDiagnostics {
2355            warnings,
2356            gridded_samples: psf_state.gridded_samples,
2357            skipped_samples: psf_state.skipped_samples,
2358            normalization_sumwt: psf_state.normalization_sumwt,
2359            reported_sumwt: psf_state.reported_sumwt,
2360            psf_peak_normalization: psf_state.psf_peak,
2361            major_cycles: casa_major_cycle_count(clean_state.major_cycles, request.clean.niter),
2362            minor_iterations: clean_state.minor_iterations,
2363            clean_stop_reason: clean_state.clean_stop_reason,
2364            minor_cycle_traces: clean_state.minor_cycle_traces,
2365            initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: initial_peak,
2366            final_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: peak_abs_value_masked(
2367                &residual,
2368                request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
2369            ),
2370            max_abs_w_lambda,
2371            fractional_bandwidth,
2372            max_psf_sidelobe_level,
2373            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: clean_state.final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
2374            clean_mask_pixels,
2375            beam_fit_attempts,
2376            beam_fit_cutoff_used,
2377            beam_fit_debug,
2378            mosaic_weight_image: None,
2379            stage_timings,
2380        },
2381        compatibility: CompatibilityMetadata {
2382            axis_order: [
2383                AxisKind::RightAscension,
2384                AxisKind::Declination,
2385                AxisKind::Stokes,
2386                AxisKind::Frequency,
2387            ],
2388            plane_stokes: request.plane_stokes,
2389            reffreq_hz: request.reffreq_hz,
2390            channel_frequencies_hz: vec![request.reffreq_hz],
2391            psf_units: String::new(),
2392            residual_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
2393            model_units: "Jy/pixel".to_string(),
2394            image_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
2395        },
2396    })
2397}
2398
2399/// Gridder-specific metadata carried by one streamed single-plane visibility block.
2400///
2401/// This is the shared app/core stream contract for one-output-plane imaging:
2402/// every mode should read MeasurementSet rows into bounded visibility blocks,
2403/// then attach only the gridder metadata needed by that mode's core consumer.
2404#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq)]
2405pub enum SinglePlaneGridderMetadata {
2406    /// No per-sample gridder metadata is required for the standard gridder.
2407    Standard,
2408    /// Mosaic PB/pointing metadata aligned with the visibility block.
2409    Mosaic(GroupedVisibilityMetadataBatch),
2410}
2411
2412/// Bounded visibility block for one-output-plane imaging.
2413#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq)]
2414pub struct SinglePlaneVisibilityBlock {
2415    /// Scalar visibility samples prepared from a bounded MS row block.
2416    pub visibility: VisibilityBatch,
2417    /// Optional gridder metadata aligned with this block.
2418    pub gridder_metadata: SinglePlaneGridderMetadata,
2419}
2420
2421/// Logical consumer pass for replayable one-output-plane visibility streams.
2422#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
2423pub enum SinglePlaneStreamPass {
2424    /// Density accumulation for uniform/Briggs-style weighting.
2425    WeightingDensity,
2426    /// Initial PSF/residual gridding.
2427    InitialDirty,
2428    /// Major-cycle residual refresh.
2429    ResidualRefresh,
2430}
2431
2432impl SinglePlaneStreamPass {
2433    /// Stable lowercase label for logs and benchmark artifacts.
2434    pub fn label(self) -> &'static str {
2435        match self {
2436            Self::WeightingDensity => "weighting_density",
2437            Self::InitialDirty => "initial_dirty",
2438            Self::ResidualRefresh => "residual_refresh",
2439        }
2440    }
2441
2442    /// Returns true when the frontend must read actual complex visibility values.
2443    pub fn needs_visibility_values(self) -> bool {
2444        !matches!(self, Self::WeightingDensity)
2445    }
2446}
2447
2448/// Run mosaic-gridder MFS imaging from a replayable bounded single-plane stream.
2449///
2450/// The callback is invoked once for the density pass when robust or uniform
2451/// weighting is requested, once for the initial dirty/PSF pass, and once for
2452/// each major-cycle residual refresh. Each invocation must replay the same
2453/// unweighted visibility samples in stable MeasurementSet order. This function
2454/// is the mosaic consumer of the shared single-plane stream; it must not own
2455/// MeasurementSet reading or full-plane materialization policy.
2456pub fn run_mosaic_mfs_from_single_plane_stream<F>(
2457    mut request: ImagingRequest,
2458    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
2459    weight_density_mode: WeightDensityMode,
2460    mut replay_unweighted_blocks: F,
2461) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError>
2462where
2463    F: FnMut(
2464        SinglePlaneStreamPass,
2465        &mut dyn FnMut(SinglePlaneVisibilityBlock) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
2466    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
2467{
2468    let total_started = Instant::now();
2469    request.geometry.validate()?;
2470    request.clean.validate()?;
2471    let GridderMode::Mosaic(config) = request.gridder_mode.clone() else {
2472        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
2473            "streaming mosaic MFS requires gridder='mosaic'".to_string(),
2474        ));
2475    };
2476    validate_mosaic_streaming_config(&config)?;
2477    if request.w_term_mode != WTermMode::None {
2478        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
2479            "streaming mosaic MFS currently supports only w_term_mode='none'".to_string(),
2480        ));
2481    }
2482    if request.deconvolver == Deconvolver::Mtmfs {
2483        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
2484            "streaming mosaic MFS does not support deconvolver='mtmfs'".to_string(),
2485        ));
2486    }
2487    if matches!(request.weighting, WeightingMode::BriggsBwTaper { .. }) {
2488        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
2489            "streaming mosaic MFS does not yet support BriggsBwTaper per-plane density".to_string(),
2490        ));
2491    }
2492    request.visibility_batches.clear();
2493
2494    let gridder = StandardGridder::new_unpadded(request.geometry)?;
2495    let [nx, ny] = request.geometry.image_shape;
2496    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
2497    let conv_sampling = mosaic_projector_sampling(request.geometry);
2498    let mut stage_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
2499
2500    let weighting_started = Instant::now();
2501    let mut weighting_plans = BTreeMap::<(u64, u64), MosaicStreamingWeightingPlan>::new();
2502    let mosaic_parallel_threads = mosaic_parallel_thread_count(usize::MAX);
2503    let density_context = MosaicStreamingDensityContext {
2504        geometry: request.geometry,
2505        weighting: request.weighting,
2506        selected_frequency_range_hz: request.selected_frequency_range_hz,
2507        weight_density_mode,
2508        _config: &config,
2509        _gridder: &gridder,
2510        _conv_sampling: conv_sampling,
2511    };
2512    if request.weighting != WeightingMode::Natural {
2513        let mut density_blocks = 0usize;
2514        let mut density_samples = 0usize;
2515        replay_unweighted_blocks(SinglePlaneStreamPass::WeightingDensity, &mut |block| {
2516            let SinglePlaneGridderMetadata::Mosaic(metadata) = block.gridder_metadata else {
2517                return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
2518                    "streaming mosaic MFS requires mosaic metadata blocks".to_string(),
2519                ));
2520            };
2521            let block_started = Instant::now();
2522            let block_samples = block.visibility.len();
2523            let block_groups = metadata.groups.len();
2524            accumulate_mosaic_streaming_density(
2525                &density_context,
2526                &block.visibility,
2527                &metadata,
2528                &mut weighting_plans,
2529                mosaic_parallel_threads,
2530            )?;
2531            density_blocks += 1;
2532            density_samples += block_samples;
2533            if profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled() {
2534                eprintln!(
2535                    "mosaic_streaming_density_block block={} samples={} metadata_groups={} weighting_plans={} threads={} elapsed_ms={:.3}",
2536                    density_blocks,
2537                    block_samples,
2538                    block_groups,
2539                    weighting_plans.len(),
2540                    mosaic_parallel_threads.min(block_groups).max(1),
2541                    profile::millis(block_started.elapsed()),
2542                );
2543            }
2544            Ok(())
2545        })?;
2546        let finish_started = Instant::now();
2547        for plan in weighting_plans.values_mut() {
2548            plan.finish_density_pass();
2549        }
2550        if profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled() {
2551            eprintln!(
2552                "mosaic_streaming_density_finish blocks={} samples={} weighting_plans={} elapsed_ms={:.3}",
2553                density_blocks,
2554                density_samples,
2555                weighting_plans.len(),
2556                profile::millis(finish_started.elapsed()),
2557            );
2558        }
2559    }
2560    stage_timings.weighting += weighting_started.elapsed();
2561
2562    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
2563    let mut accumulated_residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
2564    let mut accumulated_mosaic_weight_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
2565    let mut pointing_weights = MosaicPointingWeightAccumulator::default();
2566    let mut pointing_weight_summaries = Vec::new();
2567    let mut reported_sumwt = 0.0f64;
2568    let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
2569    let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
2570    let mut skipped_samples = 0usize;
2571    let mut max_abs_w_lambda = 0.0f64;
2572    let mut dirty_projector_cache = MosaicProjectorCache::new();
2573    let mut residual_projector_cache = MosaicProjectorCache::new();
2574
2575    let dirty_started = Instant::now();
2576    stream_weighted_mosaic_groups(
2577        &request,
2578        &config,
2579        &gridder,
2580        &weighting_plans,
2581        &mut replay_unweighted_blocks,
2582        SinglePlaneStreamPass::InitialDirty,
2583        |groups| {
2584            pointing_weights.accumulate(request.geometry, &config, &groups);
2585            max_abs_w_lambda = max_abs_w_lambda.max(max_abs_w_lambda_for_mosaic_groups(&groups));
2586            let dirty_projectors = prepare_mosaic_dirty_projector_pairs(
2587                &request,
2588                &config,
2589                &gridder,
2590                &groups,
2591                conv_sampling,
2592                &mut dirty_projector_cache,
2593            )?;
2594            let parallel = compute_mosaic_dirty_parallel(
2595                &request,
2596                &config,
2597                &gridder,
2598                &groups,
2599                conv_sampling,
2600                mosaic_parallel_threads.min(groups.len()).max(1),
2601                None,
2602                Some(&dirty_projectors),
2603            )?;
2604            add_complex64_grid(&mut psf_grid, &parallel.psf_grid);
2605            add_complex64_grid(&mut accumulated_residual_grid, &parallel.residual_grid);
2606            add_complex64_grid(&mut accumulated_mosaic_weight_grid, &parallel.weight_grid);
2607            reported_sumwt += parallel.reported_sumwt;
2608            normalization_sumwt += parallel.normalization_sumwt;
2609            gridded_samples += parallel.gridded_samples;
2610            skipped_samples += parallel.skipped_samples;
2611            pointing_weight_summaries.extend(parallel.pointing_weight_summaries);
2612            Ok(())
2613        },
2614    )?;
2615    log_mosaic_pointing_weight_summaries("stream_initial_dirty", &pointing_weight_summaries);
2616    stage_timings.psf_grid += dirty_started.elapsed();
2617
2618    if !(normalization_sumwt.is_finite() && normalization_sumwt > 0.0) {
2619        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
2620            "streaming mosaic normalization sumwt is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
2621        ));
2622    }
2623    if !(reported_sumwt.is_finite() && reported_sumwt > 0.0) {
2624        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
2625            "streaming mosaic reported sumwt is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
2626        ));
2627    }
2628
2629    let weight_image_for_mask = pointing_weights.build_image(request.geometry, &config)?;
2630    let fft_started = Instant::now();
2631    dump_mosaic_complex_grid("psf_prefft", request.reffreq_hz, &psf_grid);
2632    dump_mosaic_complex_grid(
2633        "residual_prefft",
2634        request.reffreq_hz,
2635        &accumulated_residual_grid,
2636    );
2637    dump_mosaic_complex_grid(
2638        "weight_prefft",
2639        request.reffreq_hz,
2640        &accumulated_mosaic_weight_grid,
2641    );
2642    let raw_psf = centered_ifft2_f64(&psf_grid);
2643    let raw_residual = centered_ifft2_f64(&accumulated_residual_grid);
2644    let raw_weight = centered_ifft2_f64(&accumulated_mosaic_weight_grid);
2645    stage_timings.psf_fft += fft_started.elapsed();
2646
2647    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
2648    let mut accumulated_psf = gridder.corrected_mosaic_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_psf, conv_sampling);
2649    let mut accumulated_residual =
2650        gridder.corrected_mosaic_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_residual, conv_sampling);
2651    let normalization_weight_image = gridder.mosaic_weight_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_weight);
2652    let fft_sumwt_scale = (nx * ny) as f32 / normalization_sumwt as f32;
2653    accumulated_residual.mapv_inplace(|value| value * fft_sumwt_scale);
2654    accumulated_psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value * fft_sumwt_scale);
2655    let weight_image = normalization_weight_image.mapv(|value| value * fft_sumwt_scale);
2656    trace_mosaic_weight_image("rust_stream_pre_scale_weight", &normalization_weight_image);
2657    trace_mosaic_weight_image("rust_stream_weight", &weight_image);
2658    normalize_mosaic_residual_by_weight(&mut accumulated_residual, &weight_image, config.pb_limit)?;
2659    let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&accumulated_psf);
2660    if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
2661        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
2662            "streaming mosaic PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
2663        ));
2664    }
2665    accumulated_psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
2666    stage_timings.psf_normalize += normalize_started.elapsed();
2667
2668    let reported_sumwt = reported_sumwt as f32;
2669    let max_psf_sidelobe_level = estimate_psf_sidelobe_level(
2670        &accumulated_psf,
2671        request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
2672        request.clean.psf_cutoff,
2673    );
2674    let mosaic_clean_mask = build_mosaic_clean_mask(
2675        &weight_image_for_mask,
2676        config.pb_limit,
2677        request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
2678    )?;
2679    let clean_request = request_for_mosaic_clean_mask(&request, mosaic_clean_mask);
2680    let clean_mask_pixels = clean_request
2681        .clean_mask
2682        .as_ref()
2683        .map(|mask| mask.iter().filter(|value| **value).count())
2684        .unwrap_or(nx * ny);
2685    let initial_peak =
2686        peak_abs_value_masked(&accumulated_residual, clean_request.clean_mask.as_ref());
2687    let psf_state = PsfState {
2688        psf: accumulated_psf,
2689        normalization_sumwt: normalization_sumwt as f32,
2690        reported_sumwt,
2691        psf_peak,
2692        gridded_samples,
2693        skipped_samples,
2694    };
2695    let mut model = request
2696        .initial_model
2697        .take()
2698        .unwrap_or_else(|| Array2::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny)));
2699    let mut warnings = Vec::<String>::new();
2700    let controller_started = Instant::now();
2701    let mut refresh_residual = |model: &Array2<f32>,
2702                                stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings|
2703     -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
2704        compute_mosaic_residual_streaming(
2705            &clean_request,
2706            &config,
2707            &gridder,
2708            &weighting_plans,
2709            &mut replay_unweighted_blocks,
2710            &mut residual_projector_cache,
2711            conv_sampling,
2712            model,
2713            &psf_state,
2714            &weight_image,
2715            stage_timings,
2716        )
2717    };
2718    let clean_state = if clean_request.clean.niter > 0 {
2719        run_cotton_schwab_controller_with_refresh(
2720            &clean_request,
2721            &psf_state,
2722            execution_config.minor_cycle_backend,
2723            &mut stage_timings,
2724            &mut refresh_residual,
2725            &mut model,
2726            accumulated_residual,
2727            max_psf_sidelobe_level,
2728            initial_peak,
2729            None,
2730            &mut warnings,
2731        )?
2732    } else {
2733        CottonSchwabState {
2734            residual: accumulated_residual,
2735            major_cycles: 0,
2736            minor_iterations: 0,
2737            clean_stop_reason: None,
2738            minor_cycle_traces: Vec::new(),
2739            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: 0.0,
2740        }
2741    };
2742    let accounted = stage_timings
2743        .minor_cycle_solve
2744        .saturating_add(stage_timings.major_cycle_refresh);
2745    stage_timings.controller_overhead += controller_started.elapsed().saturating_sub(accounted);
2746    let residual = clean_state.residual;
2747
2748    let beam_fit_started = Instant::now();
2749    let BeamFitOutcome {
2750        beam,
2751        warnings: beam_warnings,
2752        attempts: beam_fit_attempts,
2753        cutoff_used: beam_fit_cutoff_used,
2754        debug: beam_fit_debug,
2755    } = fit_beam_from_psf(
2756        &psf_state.psf,
2757        request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
2758        request.clean.psf_cutoff,
2759    );
2760    stage_timings.beam_fit += beam_fit_started.elapsed();
2761    warnings.extend(beam_warnings);
2762    let restore_started = Instant::now();
2763    let restored_model = restore_model(&model, request.geometry.cell_size_rad, beam);
2764    stage_timings.restore += restore_started.elapsed();
2765    let restored_image = &restored_model + &residual;
2766    stage_timings.total = total_started.elapsed();
2767
2768    Ok(ImagingResult {
2769        psf: expand_plane(&psf_state.psf),
2770        residual: expand_plane(&residual),
2771        model: expand_plane(&model),
2772        image: expand_plane(&restored_image),
2773        sumwt: expand_scalar(psf_state.reported_sumwt),
2774        beam,
2775        diagnostics: ImagingDiagnostics {
2776            warnings,
2777            gridded_samples: psf_state.gridded_samples,
2778            skipped_samples: psf_state.skipped_samples,
2779            normalization_sumwt: psf_state.normalization_sumwt,
2780            reported_sumwt: psf_state.reported_sumwt,
2781            psf_peak_normalization: psf_state.psf_peak,
2782            major_cycles: casa_major_cycle_count(clean_state.major_cycles, request.clean.niter),
2783            minor_iterations: clean_state.minor_iterations,
2784            clean_stop_reason: clean_state.clean_stop_reason,
2785            minor_cycle_traces: clean_state.minor_cycle_traces,
2786            initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: initial_peak,
2787            final_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: peak_abs_value_masked(
2788                &residual,
2789                clean_request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
2790            ),
2791            max_abs_w_lambda,
2792            fractional_bandwidth: (request.selected_frequency_range_hz[1]
2793                - request.selected_frequency_range_hz[0])
2794                / request.reffreq_hz,
2795            max_psf_sidelobe_level,
2796            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: clean_state.final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
2797            clean_mask_pixels,
2798            beam_fit_attempts,
2799            beam_fit_cutoff_used,
2800            beam_fit_debug,
2801            mosaic_weight_image: Some(weight_image),
2802            stage_timings,
2803        },
2804        compatibility: CompatibilityMetadata {
2805            axis_order: [
2806                AxisKind::RightAscension,
2807                AxisKind::Declination,
2808                AxisKind::Stokes,
2809                AxisKind::Frequency,
2810            ],
2811            plane_stokes: request.plane_stokes,
2812            reffreq_hz: request.reffreq_hz,
2813            channel_frequencies_hz: vec![request.reffreq_hz],
2814            psf_units: String::new(),
2815            residual_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
2816            model_units: "Jy/pixel".to_string(),
2817            image_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
2818        },
2819    })
2820}
2821
2822fn validate_mosaic_streaming_config(config: &MosaicGridderConfig) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
2823    if !(config.phase_center_direction_rad[0].is_finite()
2824        && config.phase_center_direction_rad[1].is_finite())
2825    {
2826        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
2827            "mosaic phase-center direction must be finite radians".to_string(),
2828        ));
2829    }
2830    match config.primary_beam_model {
2831        PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
2832            dish_diameter_m,
2833            blockage_diameter_m,
2834        } => {
2835            if !(dish_diameter_m.is_finite() && dish_diameter_m > 0.0) {
2836                return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
2837                    "primary-beam dish diameter must be finite and > 0 m".to_string(),
2838                ));
2839            }
2840            if !(blockage_diameter_m.is_finite() && blockage_diameter_m >= 0.0) {
2841                return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
2842                    "primary-beam blockage diameter must be finite and >= 0 m".to_string(),
2843                ));
2844            }
2845            if blockage_diameter_m >= dish_diameter_m {
2846                return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
2847                    "primary-beam blockage diameter must be smaller than the dish diameter"
2848                        .to_string(),
2849                ));
2850            }
2851        }
2852        PrimaryBeamModel::EvlaLBandCommon => {}
2853    }
2854    if !(config.pb_limit.is_finite() && config.pb_limit != 0.0) {
2855        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
2856            "mosaic pb_limit must be finite and non-zero".to_string(),
2857        ));
2858    }
2859    Ok(())
2860}
2861
2862fn mosaic_pointing_key(pointing_direction_rad: [f64; 2]) -> (u64, u64) {
2863    (
2864        pointing_direction_rad[0].to_bits(),
2865        pointing_direction_rad[1].to_bits(),
2866    )
2867}
2868
2869fn mosaic_reported_sumwt_from_grid_weight(grid_weight: f32, _sumwt_factor: f32) -> f64 {
2870    f64::from(grid_weight)
2871}
2872
2873struct MosaicStreamingDensityContext<'a> {
2874    geometry: ImageGeometry,
2875    weighting: WeightingMode,
2876    selected_frequency_range_hz: [f64; 2],
2877    weight_density_mode: WeightDensityMode,
2878    _config: &'a MosaicGridderConfig,
2879    _gridder: &'a StandardGridder,
2880    _conv_sampling: usize,
2881}
2882
2883fn accumulate_mosaic_streaming_density(
2884    context: &MosaicStreamingDensityContext<'_>,
2885    batch: &VisibilityBatch,
2886    metadata: &GroupedVisibilityMetadataBatch,
2887    weighting_plans: &mut BTreeMap<(u64, u64), MosaicStreamingWeightingPlan>,
2888    thread_count: usize,
2889) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
2890    metadata.validate_len(batch.len())?;
2891    if context.weight_density_mode == WeightDensityMode::PerPlane {
2892        return accumulate_mosaic_streaming_density_serial(
2893            context,
2894            batch,
2895            metadata.groups.as_slice(),
2896            weighting_plans,
2897        );
2898    }
2899    let actual_threads = thread_count.min(metadata.groups.len()).max(1);
2900    if actual_threads == 1 {
2901        return accumulate_mosaic_streaming_density_serial(
2902            context,
2903            batch,
2904            metadata.groups.as_slice(),
2905            weighting_plans,
2906        );
2907    }
2908
2909    let chunk_len = metadata.groups.len().div_ceil(actual_threads);
2910    let mut local_maps = Vec::with_capacity(actual_threads);
2911    thread::scope(|scope| {
2912        let mut handles = Vec::with_capacity(actual_threads);
2913        for groups in metadata.groups.chunks(chunk_len) {
2914            handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
2915                let mut local = BTreeMap::<(u64, u64), MosaicStreamingWeightingPlan>::new();
2916                accumulate_mosaic_streaming_density_serial(context, batch, groups, &mut local)
2917                    .map(|()| local)
2918            }));
2919        }
2920        for handle in handles {
2921            local_maps.push(
2922                handle
2923                    .join()
2924                    .expect("streaming mosaic density worker panicked"),
2925            );
2926        }
2927    });
2928    for local in local_maps {
2929        for (key, local_plan) in local? {
2930            match weighting_plans.get_mut(&key) {
2931                Some(plan) => plan.merge_density_accumulator(local_plan)?,
2932                None => {
2933                    weighting_plans.insert(key, local_plan);
2934                }
2935            }
2936        }
2937    }
2938    Ok(())
2939}
2940
2941fn accumulate_mosaic_streaming_density_serial(
2942    context: &MosaicStreamingDensityContext<'_>,
2943    batch: &VisibilityBatch,
2944    groups: &[GroupedVisibilityMetadata],
2945    weighting_plans: &mut BTreeMap<(u64, u64), MosaicStreamingWeightingPlan>,
2946) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
2947    for group in groups {
2948        let key = mosaic_pointing_key(group.pointing_direction_rad);
2949        let plan = match weighting_plans.get_mut(&key) {
2950            Some(plan) => plan,
2951            None => {
2952                weighting_plans.insert(
2953                    key,
2954                    MosaicStreamingWeightingPlan::new(
2955                        context.geometry,
2956                        context.weighting,
2957                        context.selected_frequency_range_hz,
2958                        context.weight_density_mode,
2959                    )?,
2960                );
2961                weighting_plans
2962                    .get_mut(&key)
2963                    .expect("inserted mosaic weighting plan")
2964            }
2965        };
2966        plan.accumulate_density_group(batch, group)?;
2967    }
2968    Ok(())
2969}
2970
2971fn weight_mosaic_streaming_batch(
2972    request: &ImagingRequest,
2973    batch: VisibilityBatch,
2974    metadata: &GroupedVisibilityMetadataBatch,
2975    weighting_plans: &BTreeMap<(u64, u64), MosaicStreamingWeightingPlan>,
2976) -> Result<VisibilityBatch, ImagingError> {
2977    metadata.validate_len(batch.len())?;
2978    if request.weighting == WeightingMode::Natural {
2979        return Ok(batch);
2980    }
2981    let mut weighted = batch;
2982    for group in &metadata.groups {
2983        let key = mosaic_pointing_key(group.pointing_direction_rad);
2984        let plan = weighting_plans.get(&key).ok_or_else(|| {
2985            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
2986                "streaming mosaic weighting plan missing pointing density".to_string(),
2987            )
2988        })?;
2989        for range in &group.sample_ranges {
2990            if range.end > weighted.len() || range.start > range.end {
2991                return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
2992                    "grouped mosaic metadata range exceeds visibility batch".to_string(),
2993                ));
2994            }
2995            for sample_index in range.start..range.end {
2996                weighted.weight[sample_index] = plan.weight_sample(
2997                    weighted.u_lambda[sample_index],
2998                    weighted.v_lambda[sample_index],
2999                    weighted.weight[sample_index],
3000                )?;
3001            }
3002        }
3003    }
3004    Ok(weighted)
3005}
3006
3007fn stream_weighted_mosaic_groups<F, C>(
3008    request: &ImagingRequest,
3009    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
3010    _gridder: &StandardGridder,
3011    weighting_plans: &BTreeMap<(u64, u64), MosaicStreamingWeightingPlan>,
3012    replay_unweighted_blocks: &mut F,
3013    pass: SinglePlaneStreamPass,
3014    mut consume_groups: C,
3015) -> Result<(), ImagingError>
3016where
3017    F: FnMut(
3018        SinglePlaneStreamPass,
3019        &mut dyn FnMut(SinglePlaneVisibilityBlock) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3020    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3021    C: FnMut(Vec<MosaicPointingGroup>) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3022{
3023    replay_unweighted_blocks(pass, &mut |block| {
3024        let SinglePlaneGridderMetadata::Mosaic(metadata) = block.gridder_metadata else {
3025            return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
3026                "streaming mosaic MFS requires mosaic metadata blocks".to_string(),
3027            ));
3028        };
3029        let weighted =
3030            weight_mosaic_streaming_batch(request, block.visibility, &metadata, weighting_plans)?;
3031        let groups = build_mosaic_pointing_groups_from_grouped(&[weighted], &[metadata], false)?;
3032        if profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled() {
3033            let samples = groups.iter().map(|group| group.batch.len()).sum::<usize>();
3034            eprintln!(
3035                "mosaic_streaming_group_block groups={} samples={} pb_limit={}",
3036                groups.len(),
3037                samples,
3038                config.pb_limit,
3039            );
3040        }
3041        consume_groups(groups)
3042    })
3043}
3044
3045type MosaicPointingWeightKey = (u64, u64, u64, (u8, u64, u64));
3046type MosaicPointingWeightValue = ([f64; 2], PrimaryBeamModel, f64, f64);
3047
3048#[derive(Default)]
3049struct MosaicPointingWeightAccumulator {
3050    pointing_weights: BTreeMap<MosaicPointingWeightKey, MosaicPointingWeightValue>,
3051}
3052
3053impl MosaicPointingWeightAccumulator {
3054    fn accumulate(
3055        &mut self,
3056        geometry: ImageGeometry,
3057        config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
3058        groups: &[MosaicPointingGroup],
3059    ) {
3060        for group in groups {
3061            if !mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
3062                geometry,
3063                config.phase_center_direction_rad,
3064                group.pointing_direction_rad,
3065            ) {
3066                continue;
3067            }
3068            let mut group_weight = 0.0f64;
3069            for sample_index in 0..group.batch.len() {
3070                if !group.batch.gridable[sample_index] {
3071                    continue;
3072                }
3073                let weight = group.batch.weight[sample_index];
3074                if weight.is_finite() && weight > 0.0 {
3075                    group_weight += f64::from(weight);
3076                }
3077            }
3078            if !(group_weight.is_finite() && group_weight > 0.0) {
3079                continue;
3080            }
3081            let key = (
3082                group.pointing_direction_rad[0].to_bits(),
3083                group.pointing_direction_rad[1].to_bits(),
3084                group.frequency_hz.to_bits(),
3085                primary_beam_model_key(group.primary_beam_model),
3086            );
3087            let entry = self.pointing_weights.entry(key).or_insert((
3088                group.pointing_direction_rad,
3089                group.primary_beam_model,
3090                group.frequency_hz,
3091                0.0,
3092            ));
3093            entry.3 += group_weight;
3094        }
3095    }
3096
3097    fn build_image(
3098        self,
3099        geometry: ImageGeometry,
3100        config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
3101    ) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
3102        let pointing_weights = self
3103            .pointing_weights
3104            .into_values()
3105            .filter(|(_, _, _, pointing_weight)| {
3106                pointing_weight.is_finite() && *pointing_weight > 0.0
3107            })
3108            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
3109        let thread_count = mosaic_pointing_weight_image_thread_count(pointing_weights.len());
3110        let start = Instant::now();
3111        let weight_image = if thread_count > 1 {
3112            build_mosaic_pointing_weight_image_parallel(
3113                geometry,
3114                config,
3115                &pointing_weights,
3116                thread_count,
3117            )
3118        } else {
3119            build_mosaic_pointing_weight_image_serial(geometry, config, &pointing_weights)
3120        };
3121        if profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled() {
3122            eprintln!(
3123                "mosaic_pointing_weight_image_build entries={} threads={} elapsed_ms={:.3}",
3124                pointing_weights.len(),
3125                thread_count,
3126                start.elapsed().as_secs_f64() * 1000.0
3127            );
3128        }
3129        if weight_image
3130            .iter()
3131            .copied()
3132            .any(|value| value.is_finite() && value > 0.0)
3133        {
3134            Ok(weight_image)
3135        } else {
3136            Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
3137                "streaming mosaic weight image has no finite positive samples".to_string(),
3138            ))
3139        }
3140    }
3141}
3142
3143fn build_mosaic_pointing_weight_image_serial(
3144    geometry: ImageGeometry,
3145    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
3146    pointing_weights: &[MosaicPointingWeightValue],
3147) -> Array2<f32> {
3148    let mut weight_image = Array2::<f32>::zeros((geometry.nx(), geometry.ny()));
3149    for &(pointing_direction_rad, primary_beam_model, frequency_hz, pointing_weight) in
3150        pointing_weights
3151    {
3152        accumulate_mosaic_pointing_weight_image(
3153            &mut weight_image,
3154            geometry,
3155            config,
3156            pointing_direction_rad,
3157            primary_beam_model,
3158            frequency_hz,
3159            pointing_weight,
3160        );
3161    }
3162    weight_image
3163}
3164
3165fn build_mosaic_pointing_weight_image_parallel(
3166    geometry: ImageGeometry,
3167    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
3168    pointing_weights: &[MosaicPointingWeightValue],
3169    thread_count: usize,
3170) -> Array2<f32> {
3171    let actual_threads = thread_count.max(1).min(pointing_weights.len().max(1));
3172    let chunk_len = pointing_weights.len().div_ceil(actual_threads);
3173    let partials = thread::scope(|scope| {
3174        pointing_weights
3175            .chunks(chunk_len)
3176            .map(|chunk| {
3177                scope.spawn(move || {
3178                    build_mosaic_pointing_weight_image_serial(geometry, config, chunk)
3179                })
3180            })
3181            .collect::<Vec<_>>()
3182            .into_iter()
3183            .map(|handle| handle.join().expect("mosaic weight-image worker panicked"))
3184            .collect::<Vec<_>>()
3185    });
3186    let mut weight_image = Array2::<f32>::zeros((geometry.nx(), geometry.ny()));
3187    for partial in partials {
3188        Zip::from(&mut weight_image)
3189            .and(&partial)
3190            .for_each(|target, &value| *target += value);
3191    }
3192    weight_image
3193}
3194
3195fn mosaic_pointing_weight_image_thread_count(work_items: usize) -> usize {
3196    thread::available_parallelism()
3197        .map_or(1, |value| value.get())
3198        .min(MOSAIC_PROJECTOR_BUILD_THREADS)
3199        .min(work_items)
3200        .max(1)
3201}
3202
3203fn accumulate_mosaic_pointing_weight_image(
3204    weight_image: &mut Array2<f32>,
3205    geometry: ImageGeometry,
3206    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
3207    pointing_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
3208    primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel,
3209    frequency_hz: f64,
3210    pointing_weight: f64,
3211) {
3212    if !(pointing_weight.is_finite() && pointing_weight > 0.0) {
3213        return;
3214    }
3215    let [pointing_x, pointing_y] = mosaic_pointing_pixel_position(
3216        geometry,
3217        config.phase_center_direction_rad,
3218        pointing_direction_rad,
3219    );
3220    if mosaic_weight_trace_enabled() {
3221        eprintln!(
3222            "CASA_RS_W3_MOSAIC_PB_POINTING label=rust_stream pointing_x={pointing_x:.12e} pointing_y={pointing_y:.12e} frequency_hz={frequency_hz:.9e} pointing_weight={pointing_weight:.17e}"
3223        );
3224    }
3225    let voltage_pattern = MosaicWeightImageVoltagePattern::new(primary_beam_model);
3226    let (x_range, y_range) = mosaic_weight_image_pixel_bounds(
3227        geometry,
3228        primary_beam_model,
3229        pointing_x,
3230        pointing_y,
3231        frequency_hz,
3232    );
3233    for x in x_range {
3234        let l = (x as f64 - pointing_x) * geometry.cell_size_rad[0].abs();
3235        for y in y_range.clone() {
3236            let m = (y as f64 - pointing_y) * geometry.cell_size_rad[1].abs();
3237            let radius_rad = (l * l + m * m).sqrt();
3238            let vp = voltage_pattern.evaluate(l, m, frequency_hz);
3239            if (x == 640 || x % 160 == 0) && (y == 640 || y % 160 == 0) {
3240                trace_mosaic_pb_sample(MosaicPbTraceSample {
3241                    label: "rust_stream",
3242                    primary_beam_model,
3243                    pointing_x,
3244                    pointing_y,
3245                    x,
3246                    y,
3247                    radius_rad,
3248                    frequency_hz,
3249                    vp,
3250                });
3251            }
3252            let pb = vp * vp;
3253            weight_image[(x, y)] += (pointing_weight as f32) * pb * pb;
3254        }
3255    }
3256}
3257
3258fn mosaic_weight_image_pixel_bounds(
3259    geometry: ImageGeometry,
3260    primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel,
3261    pointing_x: f64,
3262    pointing_y: f64,
3263    frequency_hz: f64,
3264) -> (std::ops::Range<usize>, std::ops::Range<usize>) {
3265    let full = 0..geometry.nx();
3266    let full_y = 0..geometry.ny();
3267    let Some(max_radius_arcsec_at_100ghz) =
3268        primary_beam_max_radius_arcsec_at_100ghz(primary_beam_model)
3269    else {
3270        return (full, full_y);
3271    };
3272    if !(pointing_x.is_finite()
3273        && pointing_y.is_finite()
3274        && frequency_hz.is_finite()
3275        && frequency_hz > 0.0
3276        && geometry.cell_size_rad[0].is_finite()
3277        && geometry.cell_size_rad[0] != 0.0
3278        && geometry.cell_size_rad[1].is_finite()
3279        && geometry.cell_size_rad[1] != 0.0)
3280    {
3281        return (full, full_y);
3282    }
3283    let max_radius_rad =
3284        (max_radius_arcsec_at_100ghz * (100.0e9 / frequency_hz) / 3600.0).to_radians();
3285    if !(max_radius_rad.is_finite() && max_radius_rad > 0.0) {
3286        return (full, full_y);
3287    }
3288    let x_radius = max_radius_rad / geometry.cell_size_rad[0].abs();
3289    let y_radius = max_radius_rad / geometry.cell_size_rad[1].abs();
3290    let x_start = (pointing_x - x_radius).floor().max(0.0) as usize;
3291    let y_start = (pointing_y - y_radius).floor().max(0.0) as usize;
3292    let x_end = (pointing_x + x_radius)
3293        .ceil()
3294        .min(geometry.nx().saturating_sub(1) as f64) as usize
3295        + 1;
3296    let y_end = (pointing_y + y_radius)
3297        .ceil()
3298        .min(geometry.ny().saturating_sub(1) as f64) as usize
3299        + 1;
3300    (x_start..x_end.max(x_start), y_start..y_end.max(y_start))
3301}
3302
3303#[derive(Clone)]
3304enum MosaicWeightImageVoltagePattern {
3305    Airy(AiryVoltageLookup),
3306    Model(PrimaryBeamModel),
3307}
3308
3309impl MosaicWeightImageVoltagePattern {
3310    fn new(primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel) -> Self {
3311        match primary_beam_model {
3312            PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
3313                dish_diameter_m,
3314                blockage_diameter_m,
3315            } => Self::Airy(AiryVoltageLookup::new(dish_diameter_m, blockage_diameter_m)),
3316            PrimaryBeamModel::EvlaLBandCommon => Self::Model(primary_beam_model),
3317        }
3318    }
3319
3320    fn evaluate(&self, l_rad: f64, m_rad: f64, frequency_hz: f64) -> f32 {
3321        match self {
3322            Self::Airy(lookup) => lookup.evaluate_offsets(l_rad, m_rad, frequency_hz),
3323            Self::Model(primary_beam_model) => primary_beam_voltage_pattern_for_offsets(
3324                *primary_beam_model,
3325                l_rad,
3326                m_rad,
3327                frequency_hz,
3328            ),
3329        }
3330    }
3331}
3332
3333/// Cached voltage-pattern evaluator for repeated primary-beam samples.
3334#[derive(Clone)]
3335pub struct PrimaryBeamVoltagePattern {
3336    inner: MosaicWeightImageVoltagePattern,
3337}
3338
3339impl PrimaryBeamVoltagePattern {
3340    /// Build a cached evaluator for a primary-beam model.
3341    pub fn new(primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel) -> Self {
3342        Self {
3343            inner: MosaicWeightImageVoltagePattern::new(primary_beam_model),
3344        }
3345    }
3346
3347    /// Evaluate the voltage pattern at direction-cosine offsets in radians.
3348    pub fn evaluate_offsets(&self, l_rad: f64, m_rad: f64, frequency_hz: f64) -> f32 {
3349        self.inner.evaluate(l_rad, m_rad, frequency_hz)
3350    }
3351}
3352
3353fn max_abs_w_lambda_for_mosaic_groups(groups: &[MosaicPointingGroup]) -> f64 {
3354    groups
3355        .iter()
3356        .flat_map(|group| group.batch.w_lambda.iter())
3357        .fold(0.0f64, |max_value, value| max_value.max(value.abs()))
3358}
3359
3360fn normalize_mosaic_residual_by_weight(
3361    residual: &mut Array2<f32>,
3362    weight_image: &Array2<f32>,
3363    pb_limit: f32,
3364) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
3365    let weight_peak = weight_image
3366        .iter()
3367        .copied()
3368        .fold(0.0f32, |peak, value| peak.max(value));
3369    if !(weight_peak.is_finite() && weight_peak > 0.0) {
3370        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
3371            "streaming mosaic residual weight peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
3372        ));
3373    }
3374    let pb_limit_threshold = pb_limit.abs() * pb_limit.abs() * weight_peak;
3375    for ((x, y), weight_value) in weight_image.indexed_iter() {
3376        let sensitivity = weight_value.max(0.0);
3377        if sensitivity > pb_limit_threshold {
3378            residual[(x, y)] /= (sensitivity * weight_peak).sqrt();
3379        } else {
3380            residual[(x, y)] = 0.0;
3381        }
3382    }
3383    Ok(())
3384}
3385
3386#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
3387fn compute_mosaic_residual_streaming<F>(
3388    request: &ImagingRequest,
3389    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
3390    gridder: &StandardGridder,
3391    weighting_plans: &BTreeMap<(u64, u64), MosaicStreamingWeightingPlan>,
3392    replay_unweighted_blocks: &mut F,
3393    projector_cache: &mut MosaicProjectorCache,
3394    conv_sampling: usize,
3395    model: &Array2<f32>,
3396    psf_state: &PsfState,
3397    weight_image: &Array2<f32>,
3398    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
3399) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError>
3400where
3401    F: FnMut(
3402        SinglePlaneStreamPass,
3403        &mut dyn FnMut(SinglePlaneVisibilityBlock) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3404    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3405{
3406    let refresh_started = Instant::now();
3407    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
3408    let mut timings = ResidualComputationTimings::default();
3409    let model_grid = if model.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0) {
3410        let model_fft_started = Instant::now();
3411        let model_for_prediction =
3412            flat_sky_mosaic_model_for_prediction(model, weight_image, config.pb_limit)?;
3413        let transformed =
3414            centered_fft2(&gridder.apodize_mosaic_model(&model_for_prediction, conv_sampling));
3415        timings.model_fft = model_fft_started.elapsed();
3416        Some(transformed)
3417    } else {
3418        None
3419    };
3420
3421    let degrid_started = Instant::now();
3422    let mut accumulated_residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
3423    let mosaic_parallel_threads = mosaic_parallel_thread_count(usize::MAX);
3424    stream_weighted_mosaic_groups(
3425        request,
3426        config,
3427        gridder,
3428        weighting_plans,
3429        replay_unweighted_blocks,
3430        SinglePlaneStreamPass::ResidualRefresh,
3431        |groups| {
3432            let residual_projectors = prepare_mosaic_residual_projectors(
3433                request,
3434                config,
3435                gridder,
3436                &groups,
3437                conv_sampling,
3438                projector_cache,
3439            )?;
3440            let parallel = compute_mosaic_residual_parallel(
3441                request,
3442                config,
3443                gridder,
3444                &groups,
3445                conv_sampling,
3446                model_grid.as_ref(),
3447                mosaic_parallel_threads.min(groups.len()).max(1),
3448                None,
3449                Some(&residual_projectors),
3450            )?;
3451            profile::log_parallel_stage(profile::ParallelStageProfile {
3452                stage: "mosaic_stream_residual_grid",
3453                requested_threads: standard_mfs_grid_threads(),
3454                actual_threads: parallel.worker_compute.len(),
3455                chunking: "pointing-group",
3456                chunk_len: groups.len().div_ceil(parallel.worker_compute.len().max(1)),
3457                samples_total: groups.iter().map(|group| group.batch.len()).sum(),
3458                samples_per_worker: parallel.worker_samples.clone(),
3459                local_grid_bytes_per_worker: complex64_grid_bytes(grid_nx, grid_ny, 1),
3460                local_grid_count: 1,
3461                local_alloc_zero_by_worker: parallel.worker_alloc.clone(),
3462                worker_compute_by_worker: parallel.worker_compute.clone(),
3463                join_duration: parallel.join_elapsed,
3464                merge_duration: parallel.merge_elapsed,
3465                stage_duration: parallel.elapsed,
3466            });
3467            add_complex64_grid(&mut accumulated_residual_grid, &parallel.residual_grid);
3468            Ok(())
3469        },
3470    )?;
3471    timings.degrid_grid = degrid_started.elapsed();
3472
3473    let fft_started = Instant::now();
3474    let raw_residual = centered_ifft2_f64(&accumulated_residual_grid);
3475    timings.fft += fft_started.elapsed();
3476    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
3477    let accumulated_residual_image =
3478        gridder.corrected_mosaic_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_residual, conv_sampling);
3479    timings.normalize += normalize_started.elapsed();
3480
3481    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
3482    let fft_sumwt_scale =
3483        (request.geometry.nx() * request.geometry.ny()) as f32 / psf_state.normalization_sumwt;
3484    let mut residual = accumulated_residual_image;
3485    residual.mapv_inplace(|value| value * fft_sumwt_scale);
3486    normalize_mosaic_residual_by_weight(&mut residual, weight_image, config.pb_limit)?;
3487    timings.normalize += normalize_started.elapsed();
3488    stage_timings.model_fft += timings.model_fft;
3489    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += timings.degrid_grid;
3490    stage_timings.residual_fft += timings.fft;
3491    stage_timings.residual_normalize += timings.normalize;
3492    stage_timings.major_cycle_refresh += refresh_started.elapsed();
3493    Ok(residual)
3494}
3495
3496/// Run standard-MFS CLEAN from replayable weighted samples.
3497///
3498/// This is the sample-stream equivalent of
3499/// [`run_standard_mfs_weighted_streaming_with_execution_config`]. The callback
3500/// is invoked once for the initial dirty/PSF pass and once for each exact
3501/// residual-refresh pass. Each invocation must stream samples in a stable
3502/// MeasurementSet order.
3503#[cfg(test)]
3504fn run_standard_mfs_weighted_sample_streaming_with_execution_config<F>(
3505    request: ImagingRequest,
3506    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
3507    mut replay_weighted_samples: F,
3508) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError>
3509where
3510    F: FnMut(
3511        &mut dyn FnMut(StandardMfsWeightedSample) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3512    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3513{
3514    run_standard_mfs_weighted_sample_block_streaming_with_execution_config(
3515        request,
3516        execution_config,
3517        |consume_blocks| {
3518            replay_weighted_samples(&mut |sample| consume_blocks(std::slice::from_ref(&sample)))
3519        },
3520    )
3521}
3522
3523/// Run standard-MFS CLEAN from replayable blocks of weighted samples.
3524///
3525/// This is the preferred frontend/core boundary for trace-free streaming: the
3526/// frontend can hand one bounded row block of compact weighted samples to the
3527/// core, avoiding a dynamic callback crossing for every scalar sample.
3528#[cfg(test)]
3529fn run_standard_mfs_weighted_sample_block_streaming_with_execution_config<F>(
3530    request: ImagingRequest,
3531    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
3532    mut replay_weighted_samples: F,
3533) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError>
3534where
3535    F: FnMut(
3536        &mut dyn FnMut(&[StandardMfsWeightedSample]) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3537    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3538{
3539    let planner = StandardMfsPlannedSampleBuilder::new(request.geometry)?;
3540    let mut planned = Vec::<StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample>::new();
3541    run_standard_mfs_planned_sample_block_streaming_with_execution_config(
3542        request,
3543        execution_config,
3544        |consume_planned| {
3545            replay_weighted_samples(&mut |weighted| {
3546                planned.clear();
3547                planner.plan_samples_into(weighted, &mut planned)?;
3548                consume_planned(&planned)
3549            })
3550        },
3551    )
3552}
3553
3554/// Run standard-MFS CLEAN from replayable blocks of planned weighted samples.
3555///
3556/// Planned sample blocks are the shared single-worker and fixed-tile work-unit
3557/// shape: they are bounded to row-block lifetime and already carry compact
3558/// standard-gridder tap identity.
3559#[cfg(test)]
3560fn run_standard_mfs_planned_sample_block_streaming_with_execution_config<F>(
3561    request: ImagingRequest,
3562    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
3563    mut replay_weighted_samples: F,
3564) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError>
3565where
3566    F: FnMut(
3567        &mut dyn FnMut(&[StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample]) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3568    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3569{
3570    run_standard_mfs_planned_sample_block_source_streaming_with_execution_config(
3571        request,
3572        execution_config,
3573        &mut replay_weighted_samples,
3574    )
3575}
3576
3577/// Run standard-MFS CLEAN from replayable blocks of planned scalar runs.
3578///
3579/// This keeps row/channel run boundaries available to fixed-tile backends while
3580/// retaining the scalar planned-sample payload used by the existing gridders.
3581fn run_standard_mfs_planned_sample_run_block_streaming_with_execution_config<F>(
3582    request: ImagingRequest,
3583    mut execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
3584    replay_planned_runs: F,
3585) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError>
3586where
3587    F: FnMut(
3588        &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3589    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3590{
3591    execution_config.fixed_tile_use_planned_run_blocks = true;
3592    struct RunBlockSource<F> {
3593        replay: F,
3594    }
3595
3596    impl<F> StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlockSource for RunBlockSource<F>
3597    where
3598        F: FnMut(
3599            &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3600        ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3601    {
3602        fn replay_planned_sample_blocks(
3603            &mut self,
3604            consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
3605                &[StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample],
3606            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3607        ) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
3608            (self.replay)(&mut |run_block| consumer(run_block.samples()))
3609        }
3610
3611        fn replay_planned_sample_run_blocks(
3612            &mut self,
3613            consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
3614                &StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock,
3615            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3616        ) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
3617            (self.replay)(consumer)
3618        }
3619    }
3620
3621    let mut source = RunBlockSource {
3622        replay: replay_planned_runs,
3623    };
3624    run_standard_mfs_planned_sample_block_source_streaming_with_execution_config(
3625        request,
3626        execution_config,
3627        &mut source,
3628    )
3629}
3630
3631/// Scalar CLEAN-control values computed while a dirty/PSF plane is resident.
3632#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq)]
3633pub struct StandardMfsCleanControlStats {
3634    /// Peak absolute residual before minor-cycle CLEAN iterations.
3635    pub initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: f32,
3636    /// CASA-style maximum PSF sidelobe contribution for this plane.
3637    pub max_psf_sidelobe_level: f32,
3638    /// Number of usable mask pixels, or the full plane area when unmasked.
3639    pub clean_mask_pixels: usize,
3640}
3641
3642/// Resident standard-gridder single-plane state prepared for a later CLEAN pass.
3643///
3644/// Cube-like frontends use this to build dirty/PSF plane state, reduce
3645/// cube-level CLEAN controls across planes, and then run minor cycles without
3646/// rereading the MeasurementSet or recomputing the initial dirty/PSF products.
3647pub(crate) struct StandardMfsPreparedCleanPlane {
3648    request: ImagingRequest,
3649    psf_state: PsfState,
3650    residual: Array2<f32>,
3651    model: Array2<f32>,
3652    model_has_flux: bool,
3653    max_abs_w_lambda: f64,
3654    beam: Option<BeamFit>,
3655    warnings: Vec<String>,
3656    beam_fit_attempts: usize,
3657    beam_fit_cutoff_used: Option<f32>,
3658    beam_fit_debug: Option<BeamFitDebugSummary>,
3659    stats: StandardMfsCleanControlStats,
3660    stage_timings: ImagingStageTimings,
3661    total_started: Instant,
3662}
3663
3664impl StandardMfsPreparedCleanPlane {
3665    /// Return the plane-local scalar values needed by a cube controller.
3666    pub fn clean_control_stats(&self) -> StandardMfsCleanControlStats {
3667        self.stats
3668    }
3669}
3670
3671/// Run only the dirty/PSF construction phase for a replayable planned-run plane.
3672fn prepare_standard_mfs_planned_sample_run_block_clean_plane_with_execution_config<F>(
3673    request: ImagingRequest,
3674    mut execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
3675    replay_planned_runs: F,
3676) -> Result<StandardMfsPreparedCleanPlane, ImagingError>
3677where
3678    F: FnMut(
3679        &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3680    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3681{
3682    execution_config.fixed_tile_use_planned_run_blocks = true;
3683    struct RunBlockSource<F> {
3684        replay: F,
3685    }
3686
3687    impl<F> StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlockSource for RunBlockSource<F>
3688    where
3689        F: FnMut(
3690            &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3691        ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3692    {
3693        fn replay_planned_sample_blocks(
3694            &mut self,
3695            consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
3696                &[StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample],
3697            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3698        ) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
3699            (self.replay)(&mut |run_block| consumer(run_block.samples()))
3700        }
3701
3702        fn replay_planned_sample_run_blocks(
3703            &mut self,
3704            consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
3705                &StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock,
3706            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3707        ) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
3708            (self.replay)(consumer)
3709        }
3710    }
3711
3712    let mut source = RunBlockSource {
3713        replay: replay_planned_runs,
3714    };
3715    prepare_standard_mfs_planned_sample_block_source_clean_plane_with_execution_config(
3716        request,
3717        execution_config,
3718        &mut source,
3719    )
3720}
3721
3722/// Run only the dirty/PSF construction phase for a replayable planned-sample plane.
3723fn prepare_standard_mfs_planned_sample_block_source_clean_plane_with_execution_config(
3724    mut request: ImagingRequest,
3725    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
3726    replay_weighted_samples: &mut dyn StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlockSource,
3727) -> Result<StandardMfsPreparedCleanPlane, ImagingError> {
3728    let total_started = Instant::now();
3729    request.geometry.validate()?;
3730    request.clean.validate()?;
3731    if !matches!(request.gridder_mode, GridderMode::Standard) {
3732        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
3733            "prepared standard MFS clean requires gridder='standard'".to_string(),
3734        ));
3735    }
3736    if !matches!(request.w_term_mode, WTermMode::None) {
3737        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
3738            "prepared standard MFS clean does not support W-term gridding".to_string(),
3739        ));
3740    }
3741    if request.deconvolver == Deconvolver::Mtmfs {
3742        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
3743            "prepared standard MFS clean does not support deconvolver='mtmfs'".to_string(),
3744        ));
3745    }
3746    let gridder = StandardGridder::new(request.geometry)?;
3747    let [nx, ny] = request.geometry.image_shape;
3748    let model = request
3749        .initial_model
3750        .take()
3751        .unwrap_or_else(|| Array2::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny)));
3752    let has_initial_model = model.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0);
3753    let mut stage_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
3754    let mut replay_plan =
3755        StandardMfsReplayPlan::planned_samples(&gridder, execution_config, replay_weighted_samples);
3756
3757    let (psf_state, residual, max_abs_w_lambda) = if !has_initial_model {
3758        replay_plan.compute_dirty_psf_and_residual(&mut stage_timings)?
3759    } else {
3760        let psf_state = replay_plan.compute_psf(&mut stage_timings)?;
3761        let residual = replay_plan.compute_residual(
3762            request.geometry,
3763            &model,
3764            &psf_state,
3765            &mut stage_timings,
3766        )?;
3767        (psf_state, residual, 0.0)
3768    };
3769
3770    let beam_fit_started = Instant::now();
3771    let BeamFitOutcome {
3772        beam,
3773        warnings: beam_warnings,
3774        attempts: beam_fit_attempts,
3775        cutoff_used: beam_fit_cutoff_used,
3776        debug: beam_fit_debug,
3777    } = fit_beam_from_psf(
3778        &psf_state.psf,
3779        request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
3780        request.clean.psf_cutoff,
3781    );
3782    stage_timings.beam_fit += beam_fit_started.elapsed();
3783    let max_psf_sidelobe_level =
3784        estimate_psf_sidelobe_level_for_beam(&psf_state.psf, request.geometry.cell_size_rad, beam);
3785    let clean_mask_pixels = request
3786        .clean_mask
3787        .as_ref()
3788        .map(|mask| mask.iter().filter(|value| **value).count())
3789        .unwrap_or(nx * ny);
3790    let initial_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref());
3791
3792    Ok(StandardMfsPreparedCleanPlane {
3793        request,
3794        psf_state,
3795        residual,
3796        model,
3797        model_has_flux: has_initial_model,
3798        max_abs_w_lambda,
3799        beam,
3800        warnings: beam_warnings,
3801        beam_fit_attempts,
3802        beam_fit_cutoff_used,
3803        beam_fit_debug,
3804        stats: StandardMfsCleanControlStats {
3805            initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: initial_peak,
3806            max_psf_sidelobe_level,
3807            clean_mask_pixels,
3808        },
3809        stage_timings,
3810        total_started,
3811    })
3812}
3813
3814/// Publish a resident standard-gridder CLEAN plane without running a minor cycle.
3815///
3816/// Cube frontends use this when the cube-level controller decides that a
3817/// prepared plane is already below the shared cycle threshold. The dirty/PSF
3818/// state that was already computed is preserved, the component model is left
3819/// unchanged, and no CPU or Metal deconvolver work is run.
3820fn skip_standard_mfs_prepared_clean_plane_with_cycle_threshold(
3821    prepared: StandardMfsPreparedCleanPlane,
3822    cube_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
3823) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError> {
3824    let StandardMfsPreparedCleanPlane {
3825        request,
3826        psf_state,
3827        residual,
3828        model,
3829        model_has_flux,
3830        max_abs_w_lambda,
3831        beam,
3832        mut warnings,
3833        beam_fit_attempts,
3834        beam_fit_cutoff_used,
3835        beam_fit_debug,
3836        stats,
3837        mut stage_timings,
3838        total_started,
3839    } = prepared;
3840
3841    let restore_started = Instant::now();
3842    let restored_image = if model_has_flux {
3843        let restored_model = restore_model(&model, request.geometry.cell_size_rad, beam);
3844        &restored_model + &residual
3845    } else {
3846        residual.clone()
3847    };
3848    stage_timings.restore += restore_started.elapsed();
3849
3850    let fractional_bandwidth = (request.selected_frequency_range_hz[1]
3851        - request.selected_frequency_range_hz[0])
3852        / request.reffreq_hz;
3853    if fractional_bandwidth > 0.1 {
3854        warnings.push(format!(
3855            "fractional bandwidth {:.3} exceeds the narrow-band nterms=1 comfort zone",
3856            fractional_bandwidth
3857        ));
3858    }
3859    let w_phase_metric = max_abs_w_lambda * request.geometry.field_of_view_rad().powi(2);
3860    if w_phase_metric > 0.1 {
3861        warnings.push(format!(
3862            "max |w| * fov^2 = {:.3} suggests 2-D standard imaging may show non-coplanar artifacts",
3863            w_phase_metric
3864        ));
3865    }
3866    let cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam =
3867        nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref(), request.clean);
3868    let clean_stop_reason = tolerant_clean_stop_reason(
3869        stats.initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam,
3870        request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
3871        cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
3872    )
3873    .or(Some(CleanStopReason::CycleThresholdReached));
3874    stage_timings.total = total_started.elapsed();
3875
3876    Ok(ImagingResult {
3877        psf: expand_plane(&psf_state.psf),
3878        residual: expand_plane(&residual),
3879        model: expand_plane(&model),
3880        image: expand_plane(&restored_image),
3881        sumwt: expand_scalar(psf_state.reported_sumwt),
3882        beam,
3883        diagnostics: ImagingDiagnostics {
3884            warnings,
3885            gridded_samples: psf_state.gridded_samples,
3886            skipped_samples: psf_state.skipped_samples,
3887            normalization_sumwt: psf_state.normalization_sumwt,
3888            reported_sumwt: psf_state.reported_sumwt,
3889            psf_peak_normalization: psf_state.psf_peak,
3890            major_cycles: casa_major_cycle_count(0, request.clean.niter),
3891            minor_iterations: 0,
3892            clean_stop_reason,
3893            minor_cycle_traces: Vec::new(),
3894            initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: stats.initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam,
3895            final_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: stats.initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam,
3896            max_abs_w_lambda,
3897            fractional_bandwidth,
3898            max_psf_sidelobe_level: stats.max_psf_sidelobe_level,
3899            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: cube_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
3900            clean_mask_pixels: stats.clean_mask_pixels,
3901            beam_fit_attempts,
3902            beam_fit_cutoff_used,
3903            beam_fit_debug,
3904            mosaic_weight_image: None,
3905            stage_timings,
3906        },
3907        compatibility: CompatibilityMetadata {
3908            axis_order: [
3909                AxisKind::RightAscension,
3910                AxisKind::Declination,
3911                AxisKind::Stokes,
3912                AxisKind::Frequency,
3913            ],
3914            plane_stokes: request.plane_stokes,
3915            reffreq_hz: request.reffreq_hz,
3916            channel_frequencies_hz: vec![request.reffreq_hz],
3917            psf_units: String::new(),
3918            residual_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
3919            model_units: "Jy/pixel".to_string(),
3920            image_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
3921        },
3922    })
3923}
3924
3925/// Finish a resident standard-gridder CLEAN plane with an optional cube threshold.
3926fn finish_standard_mfs_prepared_clean_plane_with_execution_config<F>(
3927    prepared: StandardMfsPreparedCleanPlane,
3928    mut execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
3929    cube_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: Option<f32>,
3930    replay_planned_runs: F,
3931) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError>
3932where
3933    F: FnMut(
3934        &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3935    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3936{
3937    execution_config.fixed_tile_use_planned_run_blocks = true;
3938    struct RunBlockSource<F> {
3939        replay: F,
3940    }
3941
3942    impl<F> StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlockSource for RunBlockSource<F>
3943    where
3944        F: FnMut(
3945            &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3946        ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3947    {
3948        fn replay_planned_sample_blocks(
3949            &mut self,
3950            consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
3951                &[StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample],
3952            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3953        ) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
3954            (self.replay)(&mut |run_block| consumer(run_block.samples()))
3955        }
3956
3957        fn replay_planned_sample_run_blocks(
3958            &mut self,
3959            consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
3960                &StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock,
3961            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
3962        ) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
3963            (self.replay)(consumer)
3964        }
3965    }
3966
3967    let mut source = RunBlockSource {
3968        replay: replay_planned_runs,
3969    };
3970    finish_standard_mfs_prepared_clean_plane_with_block_source(
3971        prepared,
3972        execution_config,
3973        cube_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
3974        &mut source,
3975    )
3976}
3977
3978fn finish_standard_mfs_prepared_clean_plane_with_block_source(
3979    prepared: StandardMfsPreparedCleanPlane,
3980    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
3981    cube_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: Option<f32>,
3982    replay_weighted_samples: &mut dyn StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlockSource,
3983) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError> {
3984    let StandardMfsPreparedCleanPlane {
3985        request,
3986        psf_state,
3987        residual,
3988        mut model,
3989        model_has_flux: _,
3990        max_abs_w_lambda,
3991        beam,
3992        mut warnings,
3993        beam_fit_attempts,
3994        beam_fit_cutoff_used,
3995        beam_fit_debug,
3996        stats,
3997        mut stage_timings,
3998        total_started,
3999    } = prepared;
4000
4001    let gridder = StandardGridder::new(request.geometry)?;
4002    let mut replay_plan =
4003        StandardMfsReplayPlan::planned_samples(&gridder, execution_config, replay_weighted_samples);
4004    let mut refresh_residual = |model: &Array2<f32>,
4005                                stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings|
4006     -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
4007        let before = ResidualRefreshTimingSnapshot::capture(stage_timings);
4008        let refresh_started = Instant::now();
4009        let residual =
4010            replay_plan.compute_residual(request.geometry, model, &psf_state, stage_timings)?;
4011        let refresh_elapsed = refresh_started.elapsed();
4012        let accounted = before.accounted_delta(stage_timings);
4013        stage_timings.major_cycle_refresh += refresh_elapsed;
4014        stage_timings.residual_refresh_overhead += refresh_elapsed.saturating_sub(accounted);
4015        log_standard_mfs_clean_residual_refresh_summary(
4016            &request,
4017            execution_config,
4018            before,
4019            stage_timings,
4020            refresh_elapsed,
4021            accounted,
4022        );
4023        Ok(residual)
4024    };
4025
4026    let controller_started = Instant::now();
4027    let clean_state = run_cotton_schwab_controller_with_refresh(
4028        &request,
4029        &psf_state,
4030        execution_config.minor_cycle_backend,
4031        &mut stage_timings,
4032        &mut refresh_residual,
4033        &mut model,
4034        residual,
4035        stats.max_psf_sidelobe_level,
4036        stats.initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam,
4037        cube_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
4038        &mut warnings,
4039    )?;
4040    let controller_elapsed = controller_started.elapsed();
4041    let accounted = stage_timings
4042        .minor_cycle_solve
4043        .saturating_add(stage_timings.major_cycle_refresh);
4044    stage_timings.controller_overhead += controller_elapsed.saturating_sub(accounted);
4045    let residual = clean_state.residual;
4046
4047    let restore_started = Instant::now();
4048    let restored_model = restore_model(&model, request.geometry.cell_size_rad, beam);
4049    stage_timings.restore += restore_started.elapsed();
4050    let restored_image = &restored_model + &residual;
4051
4052    let fractional_bandwidth = (request.selected_frequency_range_hz[1]
4053        - request.selected_frequency_range_hz[0])
4054        / request.reffreq_hz;
4055    if fractional_bandwidth > 0.1 {
4056        warnings.push(format!(
4057            "fractional bandwidth {:.3} exceeds the narrow-band nterms=1 comfort zone",
4058            fractional_bandwidth
4059        ));
4060    }
4061    let w_phase_metric = max_abs_w_lambda * request.geometry.field_of_view_rad().powi(2);
4062    if w_phase_metric > 0.1 {
4063        warnings.push(format!(
4064            "max |w| * fov^2 = {:.3} suggests 2-D standard imaging may show non-coplanar artifacts",
4065            w_phase_metric
4066        ));
4067    }
4068    stage_timings.total = total_started.elapsed();
4069
4070    Ok(ImagingResult {
4071        psf: expand_plane(&psf_state.psf),
4072        residual: expand_plane(&residual),
4073        model: expand_plane(&model),
4074        image: expand_plane(&restored_image),
4075        sumwt: expand_scalar(psf_state.reported_sumwt),
4076        beam,
4077        diagnostics: ImagingDiagnostics {
4078            warnings,
4079            gridded_samples: psf_state.gridded_samples,
4080            skipped_samples: psf_state.skipped_samples,
4081            normalization_sumwt: psf_state.normalization_sumwt,
4082            reported_sumwt: psf_state.reported_sumwt,
4083            psf_peak_normalization: psf_state.psf_peak,
4084            major_cycles: casa_major_cycle_count(clean_state.major_cycles, request.clean.niter),
4085            minor_iterations: clean_state.minor_iterations,
4086            clean_stop_reason: clean_state.clean_stop_reason,
