4087            minor_cycle_traces: clean_state.minor_cycle_traces,
4088            initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: stats.initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam,
4089            final_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: peak_abs_value_masked(
4090                &residual,
4091                request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
4092            ),
4093            max_abs_w_lambda,
4094            fractional_bandwidth,
4095            max_psf_sidelobe_level: stats.max_psf_sidelobe_level,
4096            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: clean_state.final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
4097            clean_mask_pixels: stats.clean_mask_pixels,
4098            beam_fit_attempts,
4099            beam_fit_cutoff_used,
4100            beam_fit_debug,
4101            mosaic_weight_image: None,
4102            stage_timings,
4103        },
4104        compatibility: CompatibilityMetadata {
4105            axis_order: [
4106                AxisKind::RightAscension,
4107                AxisKind::Declination,
4108                AxisKind::Stokes,
4109                AxisKind::Frequency,
4110            ],
4111            plane_stokes: request.plane_stokes,
4112            reffreq_hz: request.reffreq_hz,
4113            channel_frequencies_hz: vec![request.reffreq_hz],
4114            psf_units: String::new(),
4115            residual_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
4116            model_units: "Jy/pixel".to_string(),
4117            image_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
4118        },
4119    })
4120}
4121
4122/// Run standard-MFS CLEAN from directly replayable routed visibility runs and
4123/// an optional prebuilt Metal grouped input cache.
4124fn run_standard_mfs_routed_visibility_run_streaming_with_execution_config_and_metal_grouped_input_cache<
4125    F,
4126>(
4127    request: ImagingRequest,
4128    mut execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
4129    weighting_plan: &StandardMfsStreamingWeightingPlan,
4130    replay_routed_runs: F,
4131    metal_grouped_input_cache: Option<StandardMfsMetalGroupedInputCache>,
4132) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError>
4133where
4134    F: FnMut(
4135        &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRun) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
4136    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
4137{
4138    execution_config.fixed_tile_use_planned_run_blocks = true;
4139    struct RunSource<F> {
4140        replay: F,
4141    }
4142
4143    impl<F> StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRunSource for RunSource<F>
4144    where
4145        F: FnMut(
4146            &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRun) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
4147        ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
4148    {
4149        fn replay_routed_visibility_runs(
4150            &mut self,
4151            consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRun) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
4152        ) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
4153            (self.replay)(consumer)
4154        }
4155    }
4156
4157    let mut source = RunSource {
4158        replay: replay_routed_runs,
4159    };
4160    run_standard_mfs_routed_visibility_run_source_streaming_with_execution_config_inner(
4161        request,
4162        execution_config,
4163        weighting_plan,
4164        &mut source,
4165        metal_grouped_input_cache,
4166    )
4167}
4168
4169/// Run standard-MFS CLEAN from a replayable planned-sample block source.
4170fn run_standard_mfs_planned_sample_block_source_streaming_with_execution_config(
4171    mut request: ImagingRequest,
4172    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
4173    replay_weighted_samples: &mut dyn StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlockSource,
4174) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError> {
4175    let total_started = Instant::now();
4176    request.geometry.validate()?;
4177    request.clean.validate()?;
4178    if !matches!(request.gridder_mode, GridderMode::Standard) {
4179        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
4180            "sample streaming standard MFS clean requires gridder='standard'".to_string(),
4181        ));
4182    }
4183    if !matches!(request.w_term_mode, WTermMode::None) {
4184        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
4185            "sample streaming standard MFS clean does not support W-term gridding".to_string(),
4186        ));
4187    }
4188    if request.deconvolver == Deconvolver::Mtmfs {
4189        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
4190            "sample streaming standard MFS clean does not support deconvolver='mtmfs'".to_string(),
4191        ));
4192    }
4193    let gridder = StandardGridder::new(request.geometry)?;
4194    let [nx, ny] = request.geometry.image_shape;
4195    let mut model = request
4196        .initial_model
4197        .take()
4198        .unwrap_or_else(|| Array2::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny)));
4199    let has_initial_model = model.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0);
4200    let mut stage_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
4201    let mut replay_plan =
4202        StandardMfsReplayPlan::planned_samples(&gridder, execution_config, replay_weighted_samples);
4203
4204    let (psf_state, mut residual, max_abs_w_lambda) = if !has_initial_model {
4205        replay_plan.compute_dirty_psf_and_residual(&mut stage_timings)?
4206    } else {
4207        let psf_state = replay_plan.compute_psf(&mut stage_timings)?;
4208        let residual = replay_plan.compute_residual(
4209            request.geometry,
4210            &model,
4211            &psf_state,
4212            &mut stage_timings,
4213        )?;
4214        (psf_state, residual, 0.0)
4215    };
4216    let max_psf_sidelobe_level = estimate_psf_sidelobe_level(
4217        &psf_state.psf,
4218        request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
4219        request.clean.psf_cutoff,
4220    );
4221    let clean_mask_pixels = request
4222        .clean_mask
4223        .as_ref()
4224        .map(|mask| mask.iter().filter(|value| **value).count())
4225        .unwrap_or(nx * ny);
4226    let initial_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref());
4227    let mut warnings = Vec::new();
4228
4229    let mut refresh_residual = |model: &Array2<f32>,
4230                                stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings|
4231     -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
4232        let before = ResidualRefreshTimingSnapshot::capture(stage_timings);
4233        let refresh_started = Instant::now();
4234        let residual =
4235            replay_plan.compute_residual(request.geometry, model, &psf_state, stage_timings)?;
4236        let refresh_elapsed = refresh_started.elapsed();
4237        let accounted = before.accounted_delta(stage_timings);
4238        stage_timings.major_cycle_refresh += refresh_elapsed;
4239        stage_timings.residual_refresh_overhead += refresh_elapsed.saturating_sub(accounted);
4240        log_standard_mfs_clean_residual_refresh_summary(
4241            &request,
4242            execution_config,
4243            before,
4244            stage_timings,
4245            refresh_elapsed,
4246            accounted,
4247        );
4248        Ok(residual)
4249    };
4250
4251    let controller_started = Instant::now();
4252    let clean_state = run_cotton_schwab_controller_with_refresh(
4253        &request,
4254        &psf_state,
4255        execution_config.minor_cycle_backend,
4256        &mut stage_timings,
4257        &mut refresh_residual,
4258        &mut model,
4259        residual,
4260        max_psf_sidelobe_level,
4261        initial_peak,
4262        None,
4263        &mut warnings,
4264    )?;
4265    let controller_elapsed = controller_started.elapsed();
4266    let accounted = stage_timings
4267        .minor_cycle_solve
4268        .saturating_add(stage_timings.major_cycle_refresh);
4269    stage_timings.controller_overhead += controller_elapsed.saturating_sub(accounted);
4270    residual = clean_state.residual;
4271
4272    let beam_fit_started = Instant::now();
4273    let BeamFitOutcome {
4274        beam,
4275        warnings: beam_warnings,
4276        attempts: beam_fit_attempts,
4277        cutoff_used: beam_fit_cutoff_used,
4278        debug: beam_fit_debug,
4279    } = fit_beam_from_psf(
4280        &psf_state.psf,
4281        request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
4282        request.clean.psf_cutoff,
4283    );
4284    stage_timings.beam_fit += beam_fit_started.elapsed();
4285    let restore_started = Instant::now();
4286    let restored_model = restore_model(&model, request.geometry.cell_size_rad, beam);
4287    stage_timings.restore += restore_started.elapsed();
4288    let restored_image = &restored_model + &residual;
4289
4290    let fractional_bandwidth = (request.selected_frequency_range_hz[1]
4291        - request.selected_frequency_range_hz[0])
4292        / request.reffreq_hz;
4293    if fractional_bandwidth > 0.1 {
4294        warnings.push(format!(
4295            "fractional bandwidth {:.3} exceeds the narrow-band nterms=1 comfort zone",
4296            fractional_bandwidth
4297        ));
4298    }
4299    let w_phase_metric = max_abs_w_lambda * request.geometry.field_of_view_rad().powi(2);
4300    if w_phase_metric > 0.1 {
4301        warnings.push(format!(
4302            "max |w| * fov^2 = {:.3} suggests 2-D standard imaging may show non-coplanar artifacts",
4303            w_phase_metric
4304        ));
4305    }
4306    warnings.extend(beam_warnings);
4307    stage_timings.total = total_started.elapsed();
4308
4309    Ok(ImagingResult {
4310        psf: expand_plane(&psf_state.psf),
4311        residual: expand_plane(&residual),
4312        model: expand_plane(&model),
4313        image: expand_plane(&restored_image),
4314        sumwt: expand_scalar(psf_state.reported_sumwt),
4315        beam,
4316        diagnostics: ImagingDiagnostics {
4317            warnings,
4318            gridded_samples: psf_state.gridded_samples,
4319            skipped_samples: psf_state.skipped_samples,
4320            normalization_sumwt: psf_state.normalization_sumwt,
4321            reported_sumwt: psf_state.reported_sumwt,
4322            psf_peak_normalization: psf_state.psf_peak,
4323            major_cycles: casa_major_cycle_count(clean_state.major_cycles, request.clean.niter),
4324            minor_iterations: clean_state.minor_iterations,
4325            clean_stop_reason: clean_state.clean_stop_reason,
4326            minor_cycle_traces: clean_state.minor_cycle_traces,
4327            initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: initial_peak,
4328            final_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: peak_abs_value_masked(
4329                &residual,
4330                request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
4331            ),
4332            max_abs_w_lambda,
4333            fractional_bandwidth,
4334            max_psf_sidelobe_level,
4335            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: clean_state.final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
4336            clean_mask_pixels,
4337            beam_fit_attempts,
4338            beam_fit_cutoff_used,
4339            beam_fit_debug,
4340            mosaic_weight_image: None,
4341            stage_timings,
4342        },
4343        compatibility: CompatibilityMetadata {
4344            axis_order: [
4345                AxisKind::RightAscension,
4346                AxisKind::Declination,
4347                AxisKind::Stokes,
4348                AxisKind::Frequency,
4349            ],
4350            plane_stokes: request.plane_stokes,
4351            reffreq_hz: request.reffreq_hz,
4352            channel_frequencies_hz: vec![request.reffreq_hz],
4353            psf_units: String::new(),
4354            residual_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
4355            model_units: "Jy/pixel".to_string(),
4356            image_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
4357        },
4358    })
4359}
4360
4361/// Run standard-MFS dirty imaging from a replayable planned-sample block source.
4362fn run_standard_mfs_dirty_planned_sample_block_source_streaming_with_execution_config(
4363    mut request: ImagingRequest,
4364    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
4365    replay_weighted_samples: &mut dyn StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlockSource,
4366) -> Result<DirtyImagingResult, ImagingError> {
4367    let total_started = Instant::now();
4368    request.geometry.validate()?;
4369    request.clean.validate()?;
4370    if request.clean.niter != 0 {
4371        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
4372            "dirty planned-sample standard MFS run requires niter=0".to_string(),
4373        ));
4374    }
4375    if !matches!(request.gridder_mode, GridderMode::Standard) {
4376        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
4377            "dirty planned-sample standard MFS run requires gridder='standard'".to_string(),
4378        ));
4379    }
4380    if !matches!(request.w_term_mode, WTermMode::None) {
4381        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
4382            "dirty planned-sample standard MFS run does not support W-term gridding".to_string(),
4383        ));
4384    }
4385    if request.deconvolver == Deconvolver::Mtmfs {
4386        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
4387            "dirty planned-sample standard MFS run does not support deconvolver='mtmfs'"
4388                .to_string(),
4389        ));
4390    }
4391    if let Some(initial_model) = request.initial_model.take() {
4392        if initial_model.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0) {
4393            return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
4394                "dirty planned-sample standard MFS run does not accept a non-zero initial model"
4395                    .to_string(),
4396            ));
4397        }
4398    }
4399    let gridder = StandardGridder::new(request.geometry)?;
4400    let [nx, ny] = request.geometry.image_shape;
4401    let mut stage_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
4402    let mut replay_plan =
4403        StandardMfsReplayPlan::planned_samples(&gridder, execution_config, replay_weighted_samples);
4404    let (psf_state, residual, max_abs_w_lambda) =
4405        replay_plan.compute_dirty_psf_and_residual(&mut stage_timings)?;
4406    let max_psf_sidelobe_level = estimate_psf_sidelobe_level(
4407        &psf_state.psf,
4408        request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
4409        request.clean.psf_cutoff,
4410    );
4411    let clean_mask_pixels = request
4412        .clean_mask
4413        .as_ref()
4414        .map(|mask| mask.iter().filter(|value| **value).count())
4415        .unwrap_or(nx * ny);
4416    let initial_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref());
4417    let mut warnings = Vec::new();
4418
4419    let beam_fit_started = Instant::now();
4420    let BeamFitOutcome {
4421        beam,
4422        warnings: beam_warnings,
4423        attempts: beam_fit_attempts,
4424        cutoff_used: beam_fit_cutoff_used,
4425        debug: beam_fit_debug,
4426    } = fit_beam_from_psf(
4427        &psf_state.psf,
4428        request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
4429        request.clean.psf_cutoff,
4430    );
4431    stage_timings.beam_fit += beam_fit_started.elapsed();
4432
4433    let fractional_bandwidth = (request.selected_frequency_range_hz[1]
4434        - request.selected_frequency_range_hz[0])
4435        / request.reffreq_hz;
4436    if fractional_bandwidth > 0.1 {
4437        warnings.push(format!(
4438            "fractional bandwidth {:.3} exceeds the narrow-band nterms=1 comfort zone",
4439            fractional_bandwidth
4440        ));
4441    }
4442    let w_phase_metric = max_abs_w_lambda * request.geometry.field_of_view_rad().powi(2);
4443    if w_phase_metric > 0.1 {
4444        warnings.push(format!(
4445            "max |w| * fov^2 = {:.3} suggests 2-D standard imaging may show non-coplanar artifacts",
4446            w_phase_metric
4447        ));
4448    }
4449    warnings.extend(beam_warnings);
4450    stage_timings.total = total_started.elapsed();
4451
4452    Ok(DirtyImagingResult {
4453        psf: expand_plane(&psf_state.psf),
4454        residual: expand_plane(&residual),
4455        sumwt: expand_scalar(psf_state.reported_sumwt),
4456        beam,
4457        diagnostics: ImagingDiagnostics {
4458            warnings,
4459            gridded_samples: psf_state.gridded_samples,
4460            skipped_samples: psf_state.skipped_samples,
4461            normalization_sumwt: psf_state.normalization_sumwt,
4462            reported_sumwt: psf_state.reported_sumwt,
4463            psf_peak_normalization: psf_state.psf_peak,
4464            major_cycles: 0,
4465            minor_iterations: 0,
4466            clean_stop_reason: None,
4467            minor_cycle_traces: Vec::new(),
4468            initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: initial_peak,
4469            final_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: initial_peak,
4470            max_abs_w_lambda,
4471            fractional_bandwidth,
4472            max_psf_sidelobe_level,
4473            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
4474            clean_mask_pixels,
4475            beam_fit_attempts,
4476            beam_fit_cutoff_used,
4477            beam_fit_debug,
4478            mosaic_weight_image: None,
4479            stage_timings,
4480        },
4481        compatibility: CompatibilityMetadata {
4482            axis_order: [
4483                AxisKind::RightAscension,
4484                AxisKind::Declination,
4485                AxisKind::Stokes,
4486                AxisKind::Frequency,
4487            ],
4488            plane_stokes: request.plane_stokes,
4489            reffreq_hz: request.reffreq_hz,
4490            channel_frequencies_hz: vec![request.reffreq_hz],
4491            psf_units: String::new(),
4492            residual_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
4493            model_units: "Jy/pixel".to_string(),
4494            image_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
4495        },
4496    })
4497}
4498
4499fn run_standard_mfs_routed_visibility_run_source_streaming_with_execution_config_inner(
4500    mut request: ImagingRequest,
4501    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
4502    weighting_plan: &StandardMfsStreamingWeightingPlan,
4503    replay_routed_runs: &mut dyn StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRunSource,
4504    prebuilt_metal_grouped_input_cache: Option<StandardMfsMetalGroupedInputCache>,
4505) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError> {
4506    let total_started = Instant::now();
4507    request.geometry.validate()?;
4508    request.clean.validate()?;
4509    if !matches!(request.gridder_mode, GridderMode::Standard) {
4510        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
4511            "routed visibility-run streaming standard MFS clean requires gridder='standard'"
4512                .to_string(),
4513        ));
4514    }
4515    if !matches!(request.w_term_mode, WTermMode::None) {
4516        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
4517            "routed visibility-run streaming standard MFS clean does not support W-term gridding"
4518                .to_string(),
4519        ));
4520    }
4521    if request.deconvolver == Deconvolver::Mtmfs {
4522        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
4523            "routed visibility-run streaming standard MFS clean does not support deconvolver='mtmfs'"
4524                .to_string(),
4525        ));
4526    }
4527    if !standard_mfs_fixed_tile_backend_enabled() {
4528        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
4529            "routed visibility-run streaming standard MFS clean requires the fixed-tile backend"
4530                .to_string(),
4531        ));
4532    }
4533    let gridder = StandardGridder::new(request.geometry)?;
4534    let [nx, ny] = request.geometry.image_shape;
4535    let mut model = request
4536        .initial_model
4537        .take()
4538        .unwrap_or_else(|| Array2::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny)));
4539    let has_initial_model = model.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0);
4540    let mut stage_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
4541    let mut metal_grouped_input_cache = prebuilt_metal_grouped_input_cache.or_else(|| {
4542        standard_mfs_metal_grouped_input_cache_enabled(execution_config.metal_grouped_input_cache)
4543            .then(StandardMfsMetalGroupedInputCache::default)
4544    });
4545    let mut replay_plan = StandardMfsReplayPlan::routed_visibility_runs(
4546        &gridder,
4547        execution_config,
4548        weighting_plan,
4549        replay_routed_runs,
4550        metal_grouped_input_cache.as_mut(),
4551    );
4552
4553    let (psf_state, mut residual, max_abs_w_lambda) = if !has_initial_model {
4554        replay_plan.compute_dirty_psf_and_residual(&mut stage_timings)?
4555    } else {
4556        let psf_state = replay_plan.compute_psf(&mut stage_timings)?;
4557        let residual = replay_plan.compute_residual(
4558            request.geometry,
4559            &model,
4560            &psf_state,
4561            &mut stage_timings,
4562        )?;
4563        (psf_state, residual, 0.0)
4564    };
4565    let max_psf_sidelobe_level = estimate_psf_sidelobe_level(
4566        &psf_state.psf,
4567        request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
4568        request.clean.psf_cutoff,
4569    );
4570    let clean_mask_pixels = request
4571        .clean_mask
4572        .as_ref()
4573        .map(|mask| mask.iter().filter(|value| **value).count())
4574        .unwrap_or(nx * ny);
4575    let initial_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref());
4576    let mut warnings = Vec::new();
4577
4578    let mut refresh_residual = |model: &Array2<f32>,
4579                                stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings|
4580     -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
4581        let before = ResidualRefreshTimingSnapshot::capture(stage_timings);
4582        let refresh_started = Instant::now();
4583        let residual =
4584            replay_plan.compute_residual(request.geometry, model, &psf_state, stage_timings)?;
4585        let refresh_elapsed = refresh_started.elapsed();
4586        let accounted = before.accounted_delta(stage_timings);
4587        stage_timings.major_cycle_refresh += refresh_elapsed;
4588        stage_timings.residual_refresh_overhead += refresh_elapsed.saturating_sub(accounted);
4589        log_standard_mfs_clean_residual_refresh_summary(
4590            &request,
4591            execution_config,
4592            before,
4593            stage_timings,
4594            refresh_elapsed,
4595            accounted,
4596        );
4597        Ok(residual)
4598    };
4599
4600    let controller_started = Instant::now();
4601    let clean_state = run_cotton_schwab_controller_with_refresh(
4602        &request,
4603        &psf_state,
4604        execution_config.minor_cycle_backend,
4605        &mut stage_timings,
4606        &mut refresh_residual,
4607        &mut model,
4608        residual,
4609        max_psf_sidelobe_level,
4610        initial_peak,
4611        None,
4612        &mut warnings,
4613    )?;
4614    let controller_elapsed = controller_started.elapsed();
4615    let accounted = stage_timings
4616        .minor_cycle_solve
4617        .saturating_add(stage_timings.major_cycle_refresh);
4618    stage_timings.controller_overhead += controller_elapsed.saturating_sub(accounted);
4619    residual = clean_state.residual;
4620
4621    let beam_fit_started = Instant::now();
4622    let BeamFitOutcome {
4623        beam,
4624        warnings: beam_warnings,
4625        attempts: beam_fit_attempts,
4626        cutoff_used: beam_fit_cutoff_used,
4627        debug: beam_fit_debug,
4628    } = fit_beam_from_psf(
4629        &psf_state.psf,
4630        request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
4631        request.clean.psf_cutoff,
4632    );
4633    stage_timings.beam_fit += beam_fit_started.elapsed();
4634    let restore_started = Instant::now();
4635    let restored_model = restore_model(&model, request.geometry.cell_size_rad, beam);
4636    stage_timings.restore += restore_started.elapsed();
4637    let restored_image = &restored_model + &residual;
4638
4639    let fractional_bandwidth = (request.selected_frequency_range_hz[1]
4640        - request.selected_frequency_range_hz[0])
4641        / request.reffreq_hz;
4642    if fractional_bandwidth > 0.1 {
4643        warnings.push(format!(
4644            "fractional bandwidth {:.3} exceeds the narrow-band nterms=1 comfort zone",
4645            fractional_bandwidth
4646        ));
4647    }
4648    let w_phase_metric = max_abs_w_lambda * request.geometry.field_of_view_rad().powi(2);
4649    if w_phase_metric > 0.1 {
4650        warnings.push(format!(
4651            "max |w| * fov^2 = {:.3} suggests 2-D standard imaging may show non-coplanar artifacts",
4652            w_phase_metric
4653        ));
4654    }
4655    warnings.extend(beam_warnings);
4656    stage_timings.total = total_started.elapsed();
4657
4658    Ok(ImagingResult {
4659        psf: expand_plane(&psf_state.psf),
4660        residual: expand_plane(&residual),
4661        model: expand_plane(&model),
4662        image: expand_plane(&restored_image),
4663        sumwt: expand_scalar(psf_state.reported_sumwt),
4664        beam,
4665        diagnostics: ImagingDiagnostics {
4666            warnings,
4667            gridded_samples: psf_state.gridded_samples,
4668            skipped_samples: psf_state.skipped_samples,
4669            normalization_sumwt: psf_state.normalization_sumwt,
4670            reported_sumwt: psf_state.reported_sumwt,
4671            psf_peak_normalization: psf_state.psf_peak,
4672            major_cycles: casa_major_cycle_count(clean_state.major_cycles, request.clean.niter),
4673            minor_iterations: clean_state.minor_iterations,
4674            clean_stop_reason: clean_state.clean_stop_reason,
4675            minor_cycle_traces: clean_state.minor_cycle_traces,
4676            initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: initial_peak,
4677            final_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: peak_abs_value_masked(
4678                &residual,
4679                request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
4680            ),
4681            max_abs_w_lambda,
4682            fractional_bandwidth,
4683            max_psf_sidelobe_level,
4684            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: clean_state.final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
4685            clean_mask_pixels,
4686            beam_fit_attempts,
4687            beam_fit_cutoff_used,
4688            beam_fit_debug,
4689            mosaic_weight_image: None,
4690            stage_timings,
4691        },
4692        compatibility: CompatibilityMetadata {
4693            axis_order: [
4694                AxisKind::RightAscension,
4695                AxisKind::Declination,
4696                AxisKind::Stokes,
4697                AxisKind::Frequency,
4698            ],
4699            plane_stokes: request.plane_stokes,
4700            reffreq_hz: request.reffreq_hz,
4701            channel_frequencies_hz: vec![request.reffreq_hz],
4702            psf_units: String::new(),
4703            residual_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
4704            model_units: "Jy/pixel".to_string(),
4705            image_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
4706        },
4707    })
4708}
4709
4710fn accumulate_dirty_accumulation(
4711    target: &mut StandardMfsDirtyAccumulation,
4712    source: StandardMfsDirtyAccumulation,
4713) {
4714    target.normalization_sumwt += source.normalization_sumwt;
4715    target.reported_sumwt += source.reported_sumwt;
4716    target.gridded_samples += source.gridded_samples;
4717    target.skipped_samples += source.skipped_samples;
4718    target.max_abs_w_lambda = target.max_abs_w_lambda.max(source.max_abs_w_lambda);
4719}
4720
4721fn accumulate_residual_accumulation(
4722    target: &mut StandardMfsTiledResidualAccumulation,
4723    source: StandardMfsTiledResidualAccumulation,
4724) {
4725    target.valid_samples += source.valid_samples;
4726    target.planned_samples += source.planned_samples;
4727    target.gridded_residual_samples += source.gridded_residual_samples;
4728    target.skipped_not_gridable += source.skipped_not_gridable;
4729    target.skipped_invalid_weight += source.skipped_invalid_weight;
4730    target.skipped_invalid_sumwt += source.skipped_invalid_sumwt;
4731    target.skipped_out_of_grid += source.skipped_out_of_grid;
4732    target.skipped_nonfinite_visibility += source.skipped_nonfinite_visibility;
4733}
4734
4735enum StandardMfsReplaySource<'a> {
4736    PlannedSamples(&'a mut dyn StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlockSource),
4737    RoutedVisibilityRuns {
4738        weighting_plan: &'a StandardMfsStreamingWeightingPlan,
4739        source: &'a mut dyn StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRunSource,
4740        metal_grouped_input_cache: Option<&'a mut StandardMfsMetalGroupedInputCache>,
4741    },
4742}
4743
4744struct StandardMfsReplayPlan<'a> {
4745    gridder: &'a StandardGridder,
4746    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
4747    source: StandardMfsReplaySource<'a>,
4748}
4749
4750impl<'a> StandardMfsReplayPlan<'a> {
4751    fn planned_samples(
4752        gridder: &'a StandardGridder,
4753        execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
4754        source: &'a mut dyn StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlockSource,
4755    ) -> Self {
4756        Self {
4757            gridder,
4758            execution_config,
4759            source: StandardMfsReplaySource::PlannedSamples(source),
4760        }
4761    }
4762
4763    fn routed_visibility_runs(
4764        gridder: &'a StandardGridder,
4765        execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
4766        weighting_plan: &'a StandardMfsStreamingWeightingPlan,
4767        source: &'a mut dyn StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRunSource,
4768        metal_grouped_input_cache: Option<&'a mut StandardMfsMetalGroupedInputCache>,
4769    ) -> Self {
4770        Self {
4771            gridder,
4772            execution_config,
4773            source: StandardMfsReplaySource::RoutedVisibilityRuns {
4774                weighting_plan,
4775                source,
4776                metal_grouped_input_cache,
4777            },
4778        }
4779    }
4780
4781    fn compute_dirty_psf_and_residual(
4782        &mut self,
4783        stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
4784    ) -> Result<(PsfState, Array2<f32>, f64), ImagingError> {
4785        match &mut self.source {
4786            StandardMfsReplaySource::PlannedSamples(source) => {
4787                compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_sample_replay(
4788                    self.gridder,
4789                    self.execution_config,
4790                    *source,
4791                    stage_timings,
4792                )
4793            }
4794            StandardMfsReplaySource::RoutedVisibilityRuns {
4795                weighting_plan,
4796                source,
4797                metal_grouped_input_cache,
4798            } => compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_routed_visibility_run_replay(
4799                self.gridder,
4800                self.execution_config,
4801                weighting_plan,
4802                *source,
4803                stage_timings,
4804                metal_grouped_input_cache.as_deref_mut(),
4805            ),
4806        }
4807    }
4808
4809    fn compute_psf(
4810        &mut self,
4811        stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
4812    ) -> Result<PsfState, ImagingError> {
4813        match &mut self.source {
4814            StandardMfsReplaySource::PlannedSamples(source) => compute_psf_standard_sample_replay(
4815                self.gridder,
4816                self.execution_config,
4817                *source,
4818                stage_timings,
4819            ),
4820            StandardMfsReplaySource::RoutedVisibilityRuns {
4821                weighting_plan,
4822                source,
4823                metal_grouped_input_cache,
4824            } => compute_psf_standard_routed_visibility_run_replay(
4825                self.gridder,
4826                self.execution_config,
4827                weighting_plan,
4828                *source,
4829                stage_timings,
4830                metal_grouped_input_cache.as_deref_mut(),
4831            ),
4832        }
4833    }
4834
4835    fn compute_residual(
4836        &mut self,
4837        geometry: ImageGeometry,
4838        model: &Array2<f32>,
4839        psf_state: &PsfState,
4840        stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
4841    ) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
4842        match &mut self.source {
4843            StandardMfsReplaySource::PlannedSamples(source) => {
4844                compute_residual_standard_sample_replay(
4845                    geometry,
4846                    self.gridder,
4847                    model,
4848                    psf_state,
4849                    self.execution_config,
4850                    *source,
4851                    stage_timings,
4852                )
4853            }
4854            StandardMfsReplaySource::RoutedVisibilityRuns {
4855                weighting_plan,
4856                source,
4857                metal_grouped_input_cache,
4858            } => compute_residual_standard_routed_visibility_run_replay(
4859                geometry,
4860                self.gridder,
4861                model,
4862                psf_state,
4863                self.execution_config,
4864                weighting_plan,
4865                *source,
4866                stage_timings,
4867                metal_grouped_input_cache.as_deref_mut(),
4868            ),
4869        }
4870    }
4871}
4872
4873fn compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_tiled_replay<F>(
4874    gridder: &StandardGridder,
4875    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
4876    replay_weighted_batches: &mut F,
4877    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
4878) -> Result<(PsfState, Array2<f32>, f64), ImagingError>
4879where
4880    F: FnMut(
4881        &mut dyn FnMut(Vec<VisibilityBatch>) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
4882    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
4883{
4884    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
4885    let psf_alloc_started = Instant::now();
4886    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
4887    stage_timings.psf_grid_alloc += psf_alloc_started.elapsed();
4888    let residual_alloc_started = Instant::now();
4889    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
4890    stage_timings.residual_grid_alloc += residual_alloc_started.elapsed();
4891    let executor =
4892        StandardMfsTiledCpuExecutor::new_with_execution_config(gridder, execution_config)?;
4893    let mut accumulation = StandardMfsDirtyAccumulation {
4894        normalization_sumwt: 0.0,
4895        reported_sumwt: 0.0,
4896        gridded_samples: 0,
4897        skipped_samples: 0,
4898        max_abs_w_lambda: 0.0,
4899    };
4900
4901    let grid_started = Instant::now();
4902    if executor.has_all_resident_tiles() {
4903        accumulation = executor.accumulate_dirty_grids_direct_owned_replay(
4904            replay_weighted_batches,
4905            &mut psf_grid,
4906            &mut residual_grid,
4907            execution_config.fixed_tile_max_live_row_blocks,
4908        )?;
4909    } else {
4910        replay_weighted_batches(&mut |batches| {
4911            let block_accumulation =
4912                executor.accumulate_dirty_grids(&batches, &mut psf_grid, &mut residual_grid)?;
4913            accumulate_dirty_accumulation(&mut accumulation, block_accumulation);
4914            Ok(())
4915        })?;
4916    }
4917    let grid_elapsed = grid_started.elapsed();
4918    let split_grid_elapsed = Duration::from_secs_f64(grid_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 0.5);
4919    stage_timings.psf_grid += split_grid_elapsed;
4920    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += grid_elapsed.saturating_sub(split_grid_elapsed);
4921
4922    dirty_grids_to_psf_and_residual_owned(
4923        gridder,
4924        psf_grid,
4925        residual_grid,
4926        accumulation,
4927        stage_timings,
4928    )
4929    .map(|(psf_state, residual)| (psf_state, residual, accumulation.max_abs_w_lambda))
4930}
4931
4932#[inline(always)]
4933fn planned_sample_positive_taps(
4934    gridder: &StandardGridder,
4935    sample: StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample,
4936) -> Result<PositiveTapSet, ImagingError> {
4937    let taps = gridder
4938        .plan_positive_taps(sample.u_lambda, sample.v_lambda)
4939        .ok_or_else(|| {
4940            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
4941                "standard MFS planned sample no longer maps to positive taps".to_string(),
4942            )
4943        })?;
4944    if taps.center() != [sample.center_x as usize, sample.center_y as usize] {
4945        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
4946            "standard MFS planned sample center changed during worker tap planning".to_string(),
4947        ));
4948    }
4949    Ok(taps)
4950}
4951
4952#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug, PartialEq, Eq)]
4953struct PlannedCompactTaps {
4954    x_start: usize,
4955    y_start: usize,
4956    x_weight_index: usize,
4957    y_weight_index: usize,
4958}
4959
4960#[inline(always)]
4961fn planned_sample_compact_taps(sample: StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample) -> PlannedCompactTaps {
4962    PlannedCompactTaps {
4963        x_start: sample.x_start as usize,
4964        y_start: sample.y_start as usize,
4965        x_weight_index: sample.x_weight_index as usize,
4966        y_weight_index: sample.y_weight_index as usize,
4967    }
4968}
4969
4970fn compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_sample_replay(
4971    gridder: &StandardGridder,
4972    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
4973    replay_weighted_samples: &mut dyn StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlockSource,
4974    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
4975) -> Result<(PsfState, Array2<f32>, f64), ImagingError> {
4976    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
4977    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
4978    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
4979    if standard_mfs_fixed_tile_backend_enabled() && standard_mfs_grid_threads() > 1 {
4980        let executor =
4981            StandardMfsTiledCpuExecutor::new_with_execution_config(gridder, execution_config)?;
4982        let grid_started = Instant::now();
4983        let accumulation = if execution_config.fixed_tile_use_planned_run_blocks {
4984            let mut replay = |consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
4985                &StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock,
4986            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>| {
4987                replay_weighted_samples.replay_planned_sample_run_blocks(consumer)
4988            };
4989            executor.accumulate_dirty_grids_direct_planned_run_replay(
4990                &mut replay,
4991                &mut psf_grid,
4992                &mut residual_grid,
4993            )?
4994        } else {
4995            let mut replay = |consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
4996                &[StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample],
4997            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>| {
4998                replay_weighted_samples.replay_planned_sample_blocks(consumer)
4999            };
5000            executor.accumulate_dirty_grids_direct_planned_replay(
5001                &mut replay,
5002                &mut psf_grid,
5003                &mut residual_grid,
5004            )?
5005        };
5006        let grid_elapsed = grid_started.elapsed();
5007        let split_grid_elapsed = Duration::from_secs_f64(grid_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 0.5);
5008        stage_timings.psf_grid += split_grid_elapsed;
5009        stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += grid_elapsed.saturating_sub(split_grid_elapsed);
5010        return dirty_grids_to_psf_and_residual_owned(
5011            gridder,
5012            psf_grid,
5013            residual_grid,
5014            accumulation,
5015            stage_timings,
5016        )
5017        .map(|(psf_state, residual)| (psf_state, residual, accumulation.max_abs_w_lambda));
5018    }
5019    let mut accumulation = StandardMfsDirtyAccumulation {
5020        normalization_sumwt: 0.0,
5021        reported_sumwt: 0.0,
5022        gridded_samples: 0,
5023        skipped_samples: 0,
5024        max_abs_w_lambda: 0.0,
5025    };
5026
5027    let grid_started = Instant::now();
5028    let mut grid_update_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
5029    if let (Some(psf_storage), Some(residual_storage)) = (
5030        psf_grid.as_slice_memory_order_mut(),
5031        residual_grid.as_slice_memory_order_mut(),
5032    ) {
5033        replay_weighted_samples.replay_planned_sample_blocks(&mut |samples| {
5034            let update_started = Instant::now();
5035            for &sample in samples {
5036                accumulation.max_abs_w_lambda =
5037                    accumulation.max_abs_w_lambda.max(sample.w_lambda.abs());
5038                let taps = planned_sample_compact_taps(sample);
5039                let grid_weight = sample.grid_weight;
5040                let grid_weight = f64::from(grid_weight);
5041                accumulation.normalization_sumwt += grid_weight;
5042                accumulation.reported_sumwt += grid_weight;
5043                accumulation.gridded_samples += 1;
5044                if sample.finite_visibility() {
5045                    let residual = Complex64::new(
5046                        f64::from(sample.visibility.re) * grid_weight,
5047                        f64::from(sample.visibility.im) * grid_weight,
5048                    );
5049                    gridder.grid_compact_taps_real_complex_pair_planned_f64_storage(
5050                        psf_storage,
5051                        grid_weight,
5052                        residual_storage,
5053                        residual,
5054                        taps.x_start,
5055                        taps.y_start,
5056                        taps.x_weight_index,
5057                        taps.y_weight_index,
5058                    );
5059                } else {
5060                    gridder.grid_compact_taps_real_planned_f64_storage(
5061                        psf_storage,
5062                        grid_weight,
5063                        taps.x_start,
5064                        taps.y_start,
5065                        taps.x_weight_index,
5066                        taps.y_weight_index,
5067                    );
5068                }
5069            }
5070            grid_update_elapsed += update_started.elapsed();
5071            Ok(())
5072        })?;
5073    } else {
5074        replay_weighted_samples.replay_planned_sample_blocks(&mut |samples| {
5075            let update_started = Instant::now();
5076            for &sample in samples {
5077                accumulation.max_abs_w_lambda =
5078                    accumulation.max_abs_w_lambda.max(sample.w_lambda.abs());
5079                let taps = planned_sample_positive_taps(gridder, sample)?;
5080                let grid_weight = sample.grid_weight;
5081                let grid_weight = f64::from(grid_weight);
5082                accumulation.normalization_sumwt += grid_weight;
5083                accumulation.reported_sumwt += grid_weight;
5084                accumulation.gridded_samples += 1;
5085                if sample.finite_visibility() {
5086                    let residual = Complex64::new(
5087                        f64::from(sample.visibility.re) * grid_weight,
5088                        f64::from(sample.visibility.im) * grid_weight,
5089                    );
5090                    gridder.grid_sample_taps_real_complex_pair_planned_f64(
5091                        &mut psf_grid,
5092                        grid_weight,
5093                        &mut residual_grid,
5094                        residual,
5095                        &taps,
5096                    );
5097                } else {
5098                    gridder.grid_sample_taps_real_planned_f64(&mut psf_grid, &taps, grid_weight);
5099                }
5100            }
5101            grid_update_elapsed += update_started.elapsed();
5102            Ok(())
5103        })?;
5104    }
5105    let grid_elapsed = grid_started.elapsed();
5106    stage_timings.planned_sample_replay += grid_elapsed.saturating_sub(grid_update_elapsed);
5107    stage_timings.grid_update += grid_update_elapsed;
5108    let split_grid_elapsed = Duration::from_secs_f64(grid_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 0.5);
5109    stage_timings.psf_grid += split_grid_elapsed;
5110    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += grid_elapsed.saturating_sub(split_grid_elapsed);
5111
5112    dirty_grids_to_psf_and_residual_owned(
5113        gridder,
5114        psf_grid,
5115        residual_grid,
5116        accumulation,
5117        stage_timings,
5118    )
5119    .map(|(psf_state, residual)| (psf_state, residual, accumulation.max_abs_w_lambda))
5120}
5121
5122#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
5123fn begin_metal_grouped_input_cache_prime<'a>(
5124    gridder: &'a StandardGridder,
5125    weighting_plan: &StandardMfsStreamingWeightingPlan,
5126    enabled: bool,
5127) -> Result<
5128    Option<(
5129        StandardMfsMetalExecutor<'a>,
5130        StandardMfsMetalGroupedInputCacheFill,
5131        Instant,
5132    )>,
5133    ImagingError,
5134> {
5135    if !enabled {
5136        return Ok(None);
5137    }
5138    if !matches!(
5139        standard_mfs_residual_backend_selection_from_env()?,
5140        Some(StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRunGrouped)
5141    ) {
5142        return Ok(None);
5143    }
5144    let metal_executor = StandardMfsMetalExecutor::new_with_resident_bytes(gridder, None)?;
5145    let fill = metal_executor.begin_grouped_input_cache_fill(weighting_plan)?;
5146    Ok(Some((metal_executor, fill, Instant::now())))
5147}
5148
5149fn compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_routed_visibility_run_replay(
5150    gridder: &StandardGridder,
5151    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
5152    weighting_plan: &StandardMfsStreamingWeightingPlan,
5153    replay_routed_runs: &mut dyn StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRunSource,
5154    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
5155    metal_grouped_input_cache: Option<&mut StandardMfsMetalGroupedInputCache>,
5156) -> Result<(PsfState, Array2<f32>, f64), ImagingError> {
5157    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
5158    if matches!(
5159        standard_mfs_initial_dirty_backend_selection_from_env()?,
5160        Some(StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRunGrouped)
5161    ) {
5162        #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
5163        {
5164            let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
5165            let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
5166            let mut metal_grouped_input_cache = metal_grouped_input_cache;
5167            let grid_started = Instant::now();
5168            let metal_executor =
5169                StandardMfsMetalExecutor::new_with_initial_dirty_grouped(gridder, None)?;
5170            if let Some(cache) = metal_grouped_input_cache.as_deref_mut() {
5171                if let Some(accumulation) = metal_executor
5172                    .accumulate_initial_dirty_grids_from_grouped_input_cache(
5173                        weighting_plan,
5174                        cache,
5175                        &mut psf_grid,
5176                        &mut residual_grid,
5177                    )?
5178                {
5179                    let grid_elapsed = grid_started.elapsed();
5180                    let split_grid_elapsed =
5181                        Duration::from_secs_f64(grid_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 0.5);
5182                    stage_timings.psf_grid += split_grid_elapsed;
5183                    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid +=
5184                        grid_elapsed.saturating_sub(split_grid_elapsed);
5185                    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled() {
5186                        eprintln!(
5187                            "standard_mfs_metal_grouped_initial_dirty source=input_cache total_elapsed_ms={:.3}",
5188                            profile::millis(grid_elapsed)
5189                        );
5190                    }
5191                    return dirty_grids_to_psf_and_residual_owned(
5192                        gridder,
5193                        psf_grid,
5194                        residual_grid,
5195                        accumulation,
5196                        stage_timings,
5197                    )
5198                    .map(|(psf_state, residual)| {
5199                        (psf_state, residual, accumulation.max_abs_w_lambda)
5200                    });
5201                }
5202            }
5203            let mut state =
5204                metal_executor.begin_grouped_initial_dirty_accumulation(weighting_plan)?;
5205            let dispatch_started = Instant::now();
5206            replay_routed_runs.replay_routed_visibility_runs(&mut |routed_run| {
5207                metal_executor.append_grouped_initial_dirty_run(
5208                    &mut state,
5209                    routed_run,
5210                    weighting_plan,
5211                )
5212            })?;
5213            let mut local_cache = StandardMfsMetalGroupedInputCache::default();
5214            let cache = match metal_grouped_input_cache {
5215                Some(cache) => cache,
5216                None => &mut local_cache,
5217            };
5218            let accumulation = metal_executor.finish_grouped_initial_dirty_accumulation(
5219                state,
5220                cache,
5221                &mut psf_grid,
5222                &mut residual_grid,
5223            )?;
5224            let grid_elapsed = grid_started.elapsed();
5225            let split_grid_elapsed = Duration::from_secs_f64(grid_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 0.5);
5226            stage_timings.psf_grid += split_grid_elapsed;
5227            stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += grid_elapsed.saturating_sub(split_grid_elapsed);
5228            if profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled() {
5229                eprintln!(
5230                    "standard_mfs_metal_grouped_initial_dirty source=initial_dirty dispatch_elapsed_ms={:.3} total_elapsed_ms={:.3}",
5231                    profile::millis(dispatch_started.elapsed()),
5232                    profile::millis(grid_elapsed)
5233                );
5234            }
5235            return dirty_grids_to_psf_and_residual_owned(
5236                gridder,
5237                psf_grid,
5238                residual_grid,
5239                accumulation,
5240                stage_timings,
5241            )
5242            .map(|(psf_state, residual)| (psf_state, residual, accumulation.max_abs_w_lambda));
5243        }
5244        #[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
5245        {
5246            return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
5247                "standard MFS initial dirty backend 'metal-row-run-grouped' requires macOS Metal"
5248                    .to_string(),
5249            ));
5250        }
5251    }
5252    let executor =
5253        StandardMfsTiledCpuExecutor::new_with_execution_config(gridder, execution_config)?;
5254    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
5255    let mut metal_cache_prime = begin_metal_grouped_input_cache_prime(
5256        gridder,
5257        weighting_plan,
5258        metal_grouped_input_cache.is_some(),
5259    )?;
5260    #[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
5261    let _ = metal_grouped_input_cache;
5262    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
5263    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
5264    let grid_started = Instant::now();
5265    let mut replay =
5266        |consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRun) -> Result<(), ImagingError>| {
5267            replay_routed_runs.replay_routed_visibility_runs(&mut |routed_run| {
5268                #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
5269                if let Some((metal_executor, fill, _)) = metal_cache_prime.as_mut() {
5270                    metal_executor.append_grouped_input_cache_run(
5271                        fill,
5272                        routed_run,
5273                        weighting_plan,
5274                    )?;
5275                }
5276                consumer(routed_run)
5277            })
5278        };
5279    let accumulation = executor.accumulate_dirty_grids_direct_routed_visibility_run_replay(
5280        &mut replay,
5281        weighting_plan,
5282        &mut psf_grid,
5283        &mut residual_grid,
5284    )?;
5285    let grid_elapsed = grid_started.elapsed();
5286    let split_grid_elapsed = Duration::from_secs_f64(grid_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 0.5);
5287    stage_timings.psf_grid += split_grid_elapsed;
5288    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += grid_elapsed.saturating_sub(split_grid_elapsed);
5289    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
5290    if let (Some((metal_executor, fill, fill_started)), Some(cache)) =
5291        (metal_cache_prime, metal_grouped_input_cache)
5292    {
5293        let cache_finish_started = Instant::now();
5294        metal_executor.finish_grouped_input_cache_fill(fill, cache)?;
5295        stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += cache_finish_started.elapsed();
5296        if profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled() {
5297            eprintln!(
5298                "standard_mfs_metal_grouped_input_cache_prime source=initial_dirty elapsed_ms={:.3}",
5299                profile::millis(fill_started.elapsed())
5300            );
5301        }
5302    }
5303
5304    dirty_grids_to_psf_and_residual_owned(
5305        gridder,
5306        psf_grid,
5307        residual_grid,
5308        accumulation,
5309        stage_timings,
5310    )
5311    .map(|(psf_state, residual)| (psf_state, residual, accumulation.max_abs_w_lambda))
5312}
5313
5314fn compute_psf_standard_tiled_replay<F>(
5315    gridder: &StandardGridder,
5316    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
5317    replay_weighted_batches: &mut F,
5318    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
5319) -> Result<PsfState, ImagingError>
5320where
5321    F: FnMut(
5322        &mut dyn FnMut(Vec<VisibilityBatch>) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
5323    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
5324{
5325    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
5326    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
5327    let executor =
5328        StandardMfsTiledCpuExecutor::new_with_execution_config(gridder, execution_config)?;
5329    let mut accumulation = StandardMfsDirtyAccumulation {
5330        normalization_sumwt: 0.0,
5331        reported_sumwt: 0.0,
5332        gridded_samples: 0,
5333        skipped_samples: 0,
5334        max_abs_w_lambda: 0.0,
5335    };
5336
5337    let grid_started = Instant::now();
5338    if executor.has_all_resident_tiles() {
5339        accumulation = executor.accumulate_psf_grid_direct_owned_replay(
5340            replay_weighted_batches,
5341            &mut psf_grid,
5342            execution_config.fixed_tile_max_live_row_blocks,
5343        )?;
5344    } else {
5345        replay_weighted_batches(&mut |batches| {
5346            let block_accumulation = executor.accumulate_psf_grid(&batches, &mut psf_grid)?;
5347            accumulate_dirty_accumulation(&mut accumulation, block_accumulation);
5348            Ok(())
5349        })?;
5350    }
5351    stage_timings.psf_grid += grid_started.elapsed();
5352    psf_grid_to_state(gridder, &psf_grid, accumulation, stage_timings)
5353}
5354
5355fn compute_psf_standard_sample_replay(
5356    gridder: &StandardGridder,
5357    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
5358    replay_weighted_samples: &mut dyn StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlockSource,
5359    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
5360) -> Result<PsfState, ImagingError> {
5361    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
5362    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
5363    if standard_mfs_fixed_tile_backend_enabled() && standard_mfs_grid_threads() > 1 {
5364        let executor =
5365            StandardMfsTiledCpuExecutor::new_with_execution_config(gridder, execution_config)?;
5366        let grid_started = Instant::now();
5367        let accumulation = if execution_config.fixed_tile_use_planned_run_blocks {
5368            let mut replay = |consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
5369                &StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock,
5370            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>| {
5371                replay_weighted_samples.replay_planned_sample_run_blocks(consumer)
5372            };
5373            executor.accumulate_psf_grid_direct_planned_run_replay(&mut replay, &mut psf_grid)?
5374        } else {
5375            let mut replay = |consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
5376                &[StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample],
5377            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>| {
5378                replay_weighted_samples.replay_planned_sample_blocks(consumer)
5379            };
5380            executor.accumulate_psf_grid_direct_planned_replay(&mut replay, &mut psf_grid)?
5381        };
5382        stage_timings.psf_grid += grid_started.elapsed();
5383        return psf_grid_to_state(gridder, &psf_grid, accumulation, stage_timings);
5384    }
5385    let mut accumulation = StandardMfsDirtyAccumulation {
5386        normalization_sumwt: 0.0,
5387        reported_sumwt: 0.0,
5388        gridded_samples: 0,
5389        skipped_samples: 0,
5390        max_abs_w_lambda: 0.0,
5391    };
5392
5393    let grid_started = Instant::now();
5394    let mut grid_update_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
5395    if let Some(psf_storage) = psf_grid.as_slice_memory_order_mut() {
5396        replay_weighted_samples.replay_planned_sample_blocks(&mut |samples| {
5397            let update_started = Instant::now();
5398            for &sample in samples {
5399                accumulation.max_abs_w_lambda =
5400                    accumulation.max_abs_w_lambda.max(sample.w_lambda.abs());
5401                let taps = planned_sample_compact_taps(sample);
5402                let grid_weight = sample.grid_weight;
5403                let grid_weight = f64::from(grid_weight);
5404                accumulation.normalization_sumwt += grid_weight;
5405                accumulation.reported_sumwt += grid_weight;
5406                accumulation.gridded_samples += 1;
5407                gridder.grid_compact_taps_real_planned_f64_storage(
5408                    psf_storage,
5409                    grid_weight,
5410                    taps.x_start,
5411                    taps.y_start,
5412                    taps.x_weight_index,
5413                    taps.y_weight_index,
5414                );
5415            }
5416            grid_update_elapsed += update_started.elapsed();
5417            Ok(())
5418        })?;
5419    } else {
5420        replay_weighted_samples.replay_planned_sample_blocks(&mut |samples| {
5421            let update_started = Instant::now();
5422            for &sample in samples {
5423                accumulation.max_abs_w_lambda =
5424                    accumulation.max_abs_w_lambda.max(sample.w_lambda.abs());
5425                let taps = planned_sample_positive_taps(gridder, sample)?;
5426                let grid_weight = sample.grid_weight;
5427                let grid_weight = f64::from(grid_weight);
5428                accumulation.normalization_sumwt += grid_weight;
5429                accumulation.reported_sumwt += grid_weight;
5430                accumulation.gridded_samples += 1;
5431                gridder.grid_sample_taps_real_planned_f64(&mut psf_grid, &taps, grid_weight);
5432            }
5433            grid_update_elapsed += update_started.elapsed();
5434            Ok(())
5435        })?;
5436    }
5437    let grid_elapsed = grid_started.elapsed();
5438    stage_timings.planned_sample_replay += grid_elapsed.saturating_sub(grid_update_elapsed);
5439    stage_timings.grid_update += grid_update_elapsed;
5440    stage_timings.psf_grid += grid_elapsed;
5441    psf_grid_to_state(gridder, &psf_grid, accumulation, stage_timings)
5442}
5443
5444fn compute_psf_standard_routed_visibility_run_replay(
5445    gridder: &StandardGridder,
5446    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
5447    weighting_plan: &StandardMfsStreamingWeightingPlan,
5448    replay_routed_runs: &mut dyn StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRunSource,
5449    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
5450    metal_grouped_input_cache: Option<&mut StandardMfsMetalGroupedInputCache>,
5451) -> Result<PsfState, ImagingError> {
5452    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
5453    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
5454    let executor =
5455        StandardMfsTiledCpuExecutor::new_with_execution_config(gridder, execution_config)?;
5456    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
5457    let mut metal_cache_prime = begin_metal_grouped_input_cache_prime(
5458        gridder,
5459        weighting_plan,
5460        metal_grouped_input_cache.is_some(),
5461    )?;
5462    #[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
5463    let _ = metal_grouped_input_cache;
5464    let grid_started = Instant::now();
5465    let mut replay =
5466        |consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRun) -> Result<(), ImagingError>| {
5467            replay_routed_runs.replay_routed_visibility_runs(&mut |routed_run| {
5468                #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
5469                if let Some((metal_executor, fill, _)) = metal_cache_prime.as_mut() {
5470                    metal_executor.append_grouped_input_cache_run(
5471                        fill,
5472                        routed_run,
5473                        weighting_plan,
5474                    )?;
5475                }
5476                consumer(routed_run)
5477            })
5478        };
5479    let accumulation = executor.accumulate_psf_grid_direct_routed_visibility_run_replay(
5480        &mut replay,
5481        weighting_plan,
5482        &mut psf_grid,
5483    )?;
5484    stage_timings.psf_grid += grid_started.elapsed();
5485    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
5486    if let (Some((metal_executor, fill, fill_started)), Some(cache)) =
5487        (metal_cache_prime, metal_grouped_input_cache)
5488    {
5489        let cache_finish_started = Instant::now();
5490        metal_executor.finish_grouped_input_cache_fill(fill, cache)?;
5491        stage_timings.psf_grid += cache_finish_started.elapsed();
5492        if profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled() {
5493            eprintln!(
5494                "standard_mfs_metal_grouped_input_cache_prime source=initial_psf elapsed_ms={:.3}",
5495                profile::millis(fill_started.elapsed())
5496            );
5497        }
5498    }
5499    psf_grid_to_state(gridder, &psf_grid, accumulation, stage_timings)
5500}
5501
5502fn compute_residual_standard_tiled_replay<F>(
5503    _geometry: ImageGeometry,
5504    gridder: &StandardGridder,
5505    model: &Array2<f32>,
5506    psf_state: &PsfState,
5507    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
5508    replay_weighted_batches: &mut F,
5509    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
5510) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError>
5511where
5512    F: FnMut(
5513        &mut dyn FnMut(Vec<VisibilityBatch>) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
5514    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
5515{
5516    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
5517    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
5518    let mut timings = ResidualComputationTimings::default();
5519    let model_grid = if model.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0) {
5520        let model_fft_started = Instant::now();
5521        let transformed = centered_fft2(&gridder.apodize_model(model));
5522        timings.model_fft = model_fft_started.elapsed();
5523        Some(transformed)
5524    } else {
5525        None
5526    };
5527
5528    let executor =
5529        StandardMfsTiledCpuExecutor::new_with_execution_config(gridder, execution_config)?;
5530    let mut counts = StandardMfsTiledResidualAccumulation::default();
5531    let degrid_grid_started = Instant::now();
5532    if executor.has_all_resident_tiles() {
5533        counts = executor.accumulate_residual_grid_direct_owned_replay(
5534            replay_weighted_batches,
5535            model_grid.as_ref(),
5536            &mut residual_grid,
5537            execution_config.fixed_tile_max_live_row_blocks,
5538        )?;
5539    } else {
5540        replay_weighted_batches(&mut |batches| {
5541            let block_counts = executor.accumulate_residual_grid(
5542                &batches,
5543                model_grid.as_ref(),
5544                &mut residual_grid,
5545            )?;
5546            accumulate_residual_accumulation(&mut counts, block_counts);
5547            Ok(())
5548        })?;
5549    }
5550    timings.degrid_grid = degrid_grid_started.elapsed();
5551
5552    let fft_started = Instant::now();
5553    let raw = centered_ifft2_f64(&residual_grid);
5554    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
5555    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
5556    let mut image = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw);
5557    image.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_state.normalization_sumwt / psf_state.psf_peak);
5558    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
5559    stage_timings.model_fft += timings.model_fft;
5560    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += timings.degrid_grid;
5561    stage_timings.residual_fft += timings.fft;
5562    stage_timings.residual_normalize += timings.normalize;
5563
5564    profile::log_serial_stage(profile::SerialStageProfile {
5565        stage: "streaming_tiled_residual_refresh",
5566        samples_total: counts.valid_samples
5567            + counts.skipped_not_gridable
5568            + counts.skipped_invalid_weight
5569            + counts.skipped_nonfinite_visibility,
5570        finite_visibility_samples: counts.valid_samples,
5571        nonfinite_visibility_samples: counts.skipped_nonfinite_visibility,
5572        planned_samples: counts.planned_samples,
5573        model_grid_present_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
5574            counts.gridded_residual_samples
5575        } else {
5576            0
5577        },
5578        model_grid_absent_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
5579            0
5580        } else {
5581            counts.gridded_residual_samples
5582        },
5583        degrid_tap_visits: if model_grid.is_some() {
5584            counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49)
5585        } else {
5586            0
5587        },
5588        grid_tap_visits: counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49),
5589        stage_duration: timings.degrid_grid,
5590    });
5591
5592    Ok(image)
5593}
5594
5595fn compute_residual_standard_sample_replay(
5596    _geometry: ImageGeometry,
5597    gridder: &StandardGridder,
5598    model: &Array2<f32>,
5599    psf_state: &PsfState,
5600    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
5601    replay_weighted_samples: &mut dyn StandardMfsPlannedSampleBlockSource,
5602    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
5603) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
5604    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
5605    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
5606    let mut timings = ResidualComputationTimings::default();
5607    let model_grid = if model.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0) {
5608        let model_fft_started = Instant::now();
5609        let transformed = centered_fft2(&gridder.apodize_model(model));
5610        timings.model_fft = model_fft_started.elapsed();
5611        Some(transformed)
5612    } else {
5613        None
5614    };
5615
5616    if standard_mfs_fixed_tile_backend_enabled() && standard_mfs_grid_threads() > 1 {
5617        let executor =
5618            StandardMfsTiledCpuExecutor::new_with_execution_config(gridder, execution_config)?;
5619        let degrid_grid_started = Instant::now();
5620        let counts = if execution_config.fixed_tile_use_planned_run_blocks {
5621            let mut replay = |consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
5622                &StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock,
5623            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>| {
5624                replay_weighted_samples.replay_planned_sample_run_blocks(consumer)
5625            };
5626            executor.accumulate_residual_grid_direct_planned_run_replay(
5627                &mut replay,
5628                model_grid.as_ref(),
5629                &mut residual_grid,
5630            )?
5631        } else {
5632            let mut replay = |consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(
5633                &[StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample],
5634            ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>| {
5635                replay_weighted_samples.replay_planned_sample_blocks(consumer)
5636            };
5637            executor.accumulate_residual_grid_direct_planned_replay(
5638                &mut replay,
5639                model_grid.as_ref(),
5640                &mut residual_grid,
5641            )?
5642        };
5643        timings.degrid_grid = degrid_grid_started.elapsed();
5644
5645        let fft_started = Instant::now();
5646        let raw = centered_ifft2_f64(&residual_grid);
5647        timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
5648        let normalize_started = Instant::now();
5649        let mut image = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw);
5650        image.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_state.normalization_sumwt / psf_state.psf_peak);
5651        timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
5652        stage_timings.model_fft += timings.model_fft;
5653        stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += timings.degrid_grid;
5654        stage_timings.residual_fft += timings.fft;
5655        stage_timings.residual_normalize += timings.normalize;
5656
5657        profile::log_serial_stage(profile::SerialStageProfile {
5658            stage: "streaming_tiled_planned_residual_refresh",
5659            samples_total: counts.valid_samples
5660                + counts.skipped_not_gridable
5661                + counts.skipped_invalid_weight
5662                + counts.skipped_nonfinite_visibility,
5663            finite_visibility_samples: counts.valid_samples,
5664            nonfinite_visibility_samples: counts.skipped_nonfinite_visibility,
5665            planned_samples: counts.planned_samples,
5666            model_grid_present_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
5667                counts.gridded_residual_samples
5668            } else {
5669                0
5670            },
5671            model_grid_absent_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
5672                0
5673            } else {
5674                counts.gridded_residual_samples
5675            },
5676            degrid_tap_visits: if model_grid.is_some() {
5677                counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49)
5678            } else {
5679                0
5680            },
5681            grid_tap_visits: counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49),
5682            stage_duration: timings.degrid_grid,
5683        });
5684        return Ok(image);
5685    }
5686
5687    let mut counts = StandardMfsTiledResidualAccumulation::default();
5688    let degrid_grid_started = Instant::now();
5689    let mut grid_update_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
5690    if let (Some(model_storage), Some(residual_storage)) = (
5691        model_grid
5692            .as_ref()
5693            .and_then(|grid| grid.as_slice_memory_order()),
5694        residual_grid.as_slice_memory_order_mut(),
5695    ) {
5696        replay_weighted_samples.replay_planned_sample_blocks(&mut |samples| {
5697            let update_started = Instant::now();
5698            for &sample in samples {
5699                accumulate_weighted_residual_sample_storage(
5700                    gridder,
5701                    sample,
5702                    Some(model_storage),
5703                    residual_storage,
5704                    &mut counts,
5705                )?;
5706            }
5707            grid_update_elapsed += update_started.elapsed();
5708            Ok(())
5709        })?;
5710    } else if model_grid.is_none()
5711        && let Some(residual_storage) = residual_grid.as_slice_memory_order_mut()
5712    {
5713        replay_weighted_samples.replay_planned_sample_blocks(&mut |samples| {
5714            let update_started = Instant::now();
5715            for &sample in samples {
5716                accumulate_weighted_residual_sample_storage(
5717                    gridder,
5718                    sample,
5719                    None,
5720                    residual_storage,
5721                    &mut counts,
5722                )?;
5723            }
5724            grid_update_elapsed += update_started.elapsed();
5725            Ok(())
5726        })?;
5727    } else {
5728        replay_weighted_samples.replay_planned_sample_blocks(&mut |samples| {
5729            let update_started = Instant::now();
5730            for &sample in samples {
5731                accumulate_weighted_residual_sample_array(
5732                    gridder,
5733                    sample,
5734                    model_grid.as_ref(),
5735                    &mut residual_grid,
5736                    &mut counts,
5737                )?;
5738            }
5739            grid_update_elapsed += update_started.elapsed();
5740            Ok(())
5741        })?;
5742    }
5743    timings.degrid_grid = degrid_grid_started.elapsed();
5744    stage_timings.planned_sample_replay += timings.degrid_grid.saturating_sub(grid_update_elapsed);
5745    stage_timings.grid_update += grid_update_elapsed;
5746
5747    let fft_started = Instant::now();
5748    let raw = centered_ifft2_f64(&residual_grid);
5749    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
5750    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
5751    let mut image = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw);
5752    image.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_state.normalization_sumwt / psf_state.psf_peak);
5753    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
5754    stage_timings.model_fft += timings.model_fft;
5755    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += timings.degrid_grid;
5756    stage_timings.residual_fft += timings.fft;
5757    stage_timings.residual_normalize += timings.normalize;
5758
5759    profile::log_serial_stage(profile::SerialStageProfile {
5760        stage: "sample_streaming_residual_refresh",
5761        samples_total: counts.valid_samples
5762            + counts.skipped_not_gridable
5763            + counts.skipped_invalid_weight
5764            + counts.skipped_nonfinite_visibility,
5765        finite_visibility_samples: counts.valid_samples,
5766        nonfinite_visibility_samples: counts.skipped_nonfinite_visibility,
5767        planned_samples: counts.planned_samples,
5768        model_grid_present_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
5769            counts.gridded_residual_samples
5770        } else {
5771            0
5772        },
5773        model_grid_absent_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
5774            0
5775        } else {
5776            counts.gridded_residual_samples
5777        },
5778        degrid_tap_visits: if model_grid.is_some() {
5779            counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49)
5780        } else {
5781            0
5782        },
5783        grid_tap_visits: counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49),
5784        stage_duration: timings.degrid_grid,
5785    });
5786
5787    Ok(image)
5788}
5789
5790#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
5791fn compute_residual_standard_routed_visibility_run_replay(
5792    _geometry: ImageGeometry,
5793    gridder: &StandardGridder,
5794    model: &Array2<f32>,
5795    psf_state: &PsfState,
5796    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
5797    weighting_plan: &StandardMfsStreamingWeightingPlan,
5798    replay_routed_runs: &mut dyn StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRunSource,
5799    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
5800    _metal_grouped_input_cache: Option<&mut StandardMfsMetalGroupedInputCache>,
5801) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
5802    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
5803    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
5804    let mut timings = ResidualComputationTimings::default();
5805    let model_grid = if model.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0) {
5806        let model_fft_started = Instant::now();
5807        let transformed = centered_fft2(&gridder.apodize_model(model));
5808        timings.model_fft = model_fft_started.elapsed();
5809        Some(transformed)
5810    } else {
5811        None
5812    };
5813
5814    let degrid_grid_started = Instant::now();
5815    let mut replay =
5816        |consumer: &mut dyn FnMut(&StandardMfsRoutedVisibilityRun) -> Result<(), ImagingError>| {
5817            replay_routed_runs.replay_routed_visibility_runs(consumer)
5818        };
5819    let counts = match standard_mfs_residual_backend_selection_from_env()? {
5820        Some(StandardMfsBackendSelection::Metal) => {
5821            #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
5822            {
5823                let executor = StandardMfsMetalExecutor::new_with_resident_bytes(gridder, None)?;
5824                executor.accumulate_residual_grid_direct_routed_visibility_run_replay(
5825                    &mut replay,
5826                    weighting_plan,
5827                    model_grid.as_ref(),
5828                    &mut residual_grid,
5829                )?
5830            }
5831            #[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
5832            {
5833                return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
5834                    "standard MFS residual backend 'metal' requires macOS Metal".to_string(),
5835                ));
5836            }
5837        }
5838        Some(StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRun) => {
5839            #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
5840            {
5841                let executor = StandardMfsMetalExecutor::new_with_resident_bytes(gridder, None)?;
5842                executor.accumulate_residual_grid_direct_routed_visibility_run_replay_row_run(
5843                    &mut replay,
5844                    weighting_plan,
5845                    model_grid.as_ref(),
5846                    &mut residual_grid,
5847                )?
5848            }
5849            #[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
5850            {
5851                return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
5852                    "standard MFS residual backend 'metal-row-run' requires macOS Metal"
5853                        .to_string(),
5854                ));
5855            }
5856        }
5857        Some(StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRunGrouped) => {
5858            #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
5859            {
5860                let executor = StandardMfsMetalExecutor::new_with_resident_bytes(gridder, None)?;
5861                executor
5862                    .accumulate_residual_grid_direct_routed_visibility_run_replay_row_run_grouped(
5863                        &mut replay,
5864                        weighting_plan,
5865                        model_grid.as_ref(),
5866                        &mut residual_grid,
5867                        _metal_grouped_input_cache,
5868                    )?
5869            }
5870            #[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
5871            {
5872                return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
5873                    "standard MFS residual backend 'metal-row-run-grouped' requires macOS Metal"
5874                        .to_string(),
5875                ));
5876            }
5877        }
5878        _ => {
5879            let executor =
5880                StandardMfsTiledCpuExecutor::new_with_execution_config(gridder, execution_config)?;
5881            executor.accumulate_residual_grid_direct_routed_visibility_run_replay(
5882                &mut replay,
5883                weighting_plan,
5884                model_grid.as_ref(),
