5885                &mut residual_grid,
5886            )?
5887        }
5888    };
5889    timings.degrid_grid = degrid_grid_started.elapsed();
5890
5891    let fft_started = Instant::now();
5892    let raw = centered_ifft2_f64(&residual_grid);
5893    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
5894    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
5895    let mut image = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw);
5896    image.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_state.normalization_sumwt / psf_state.psf_peak);
5897    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
5898    stage_timings.model_fft += timings.model_fft;
5899    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += timings.degrid_grid;
5900    stage_timings.residual_fft += timings.fft;
5901    stage_timings.residual_normalize += timings.normalize;
5902
5903    profile::log_serial_stage(profile::SerialStageProfile {
5904        stage: "streaming_tiled_routed_visibility_residual_refresh",
5905        samples_total: counts.valid_samples
5906            + counts.skipped_not_gridable
5907            + counts.skipped_invalid_weight
5908            + counts.skipped_nonfinite_visibility,
5909        finite_visibility_samples: counts.valid_samples,
5910        nonfinite_visibility_samples: counts.skipped_nonfinite_visibility,
5911        planned_samples: counts.planned_samples,
5912        model_grid_present_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
5913            counts.gridded_residual_samples
5914        } else {
5915            0
5916        },
5917        model_grid_absent_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
5918            0
5919        } else {
5920            counts.gridded_residual_samples
5921        },
5922        degrid_tap_visits: if model_grid.is_some() {
5923            counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49)
5924        } else {
5925            0
5926        },
5927        grid_tap_visits: counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49),
5928        stage_duration: timings.degrid_grid,
5929    });
5930
5931    Ok(image)
5932}
5933
5934fn accumulate_weighted_residual_sample_storage(
5935    gridder: &StandardGridder,
5936    sample: StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample,
5937    model_storage: Option<&[Complex32]>,
5938    residual_storage: &mut [Complex64],
5939    counts: &mut StandardMfsTiledResidualAccumulation,
5940) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
5941    if !sample.finite_visibility() {
5942        counts.skipped_nonfinite_visibility += 1;
5943        return Ok(());
5944    }
5945    counts.valid_samples += 1;
5946    let taps = planned_sample_compact_taps(sample);
5947    counts.planned_samples += 1;
5948    let residual_weight = sample.grid_weight;
5949    let residual_weight = f64::from(residual_weight);
5950    if let Some(model_storage) = model_storage {
5951        gridder.degrid_model_and_grid_residual_compact_taps_planned_f64_storage(
5952            model_storage,
5953            residual_storage,
5954            sample.visibility,
5955            residual_weight,
5956            taps.x_start,
5957            taps.y_start,
5958            taps.x_weight_index,
5959            taps.y_weight_index,
5960        );
5961    } else {
5962        let residual = Complex64::new(
5963            f64::from(sample.visibility.re) * residual_weight,
5964            f64::from(sample.visibility.im) * residual_weight,
5965        );
5966        gridder.grid_compact_taps_planned_f64_storage(
5967            residual_storage,
5968            residual,
5969            taps.x_start,
5970            taps.y_start,
5971            taps.x_weight_index,
5972            taps.y_weight_index,
5973        );
5974    }
5975    counts.gridded_residual_samples += 1;
5976    Ok(())
5977}
5978
5979fn accumulate_weighted_residual_sample_array(
5980    gridder: &StandardGridder,
5981    sample: StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample,
5982    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
5983    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
5984    counts: &mut StandardMfsTiledResidualAccumulation,
5985) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
5986    if !sample.finite_visibility() {
5987        counts.skipped_nonfinite_visibility += 1;
5988        return Ok(());
5989    }
5990    counts.valid_samples += 1;
5991    let taps = planned_sample_positive_taps(gridder, sample)?;
5992    counts.planned_samples += 1;
5993    let residual_weight = sample.grid_weight;
5994    let residual_weight = f64::from(residual_weight);
5995    if let Some(model_grid) = model_grid {
5996        gridder.degrid_model_and_grid_residual_taps_planned_f64(
5997            model_grid,
5998            residual_grid,
5999            &taps,
6000            sample.visibility,
6001            residual_weight,
6002        );
6003    } else {
6004        let residual = Complex64::new(
6005            f64::from(sample.visibility.re) * residual_weight,
6006            f64::from(sample.visibility.im) * residual_weight,
6007        );
6008        gridder.grid_sample_taps_planned_f64(residual_grid, &taps, residual);
6009    }
6010    counts.gridded_residual_samples += 1;
6011    Ok(())
6012}
6013
6014fn dirty_grids_to_psf_and_residual_owned(
6015    gridder: &StandardGridder,
6016    psf_grid: Array2<Complex64>,
6017    residual_grid: Array2<Complex64>,
6018    accumulation: StandardMfsDirtyAccumulation,
6019    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
6020) -> Result<(PsfState, Array2<f32>), ImagingError> {
6021    if accumulation.normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 || accumulation.reported_sumwt <= 0.0 {
6022        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
6023    }
6024
6025    let psf_fft_started = Instant::now();
6026    let mut psf = match centered_ifft2_f64_owned_unshifted_even(psf_grid) {
6027        Ok(raw_psf) => {
6028            stage_timings.psf_fft += psf_fft_started.elapsed();
6029            let psf_correction_started = Instant::now();
6030            let image = gridder.corrected_image_from_unshifted_centered_grid_f64(&raw_psf);
6031            let correction_elapsed = psf_correction_started.elapsed();
6032            stage_timings.psf_image_correction += correction_elapsed;
6033            stage_timings.psf_normalize += correction_elapsed;
6034            image
6035        }
6036        Err(psf_grid) => {
6037            let raw_psf = centered_ifft2_f64_owned(psf_grid);
6038            stage_timings.psf_fft += psf_fft_started.elapsed();
6039            let psf_correction_started = Instant::now();
6040            let image = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_psf);
6041            let correction_elapsed = psf_correction_started.elapsed();
6042            stage_timings.psf_image_correction += correction_elapsed;
6043            stage_timings.psf_normalize += correction_elapsed;
6044            image
6045        }
6046    };
6047    let psf_normalize_started = Instant::now();
6048    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32);
6049    let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&psf);
6050    if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
6051        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
6052            "PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
6053        ));
6054    }
6055    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
6056    stage_timings.psf_normalize += psf_normalize_started.elapsed();
6057
6058    let residual_fft_started = Instant::now();
6059    let mut residual = match centered_ifft2_f64_owned_unshifted_even(residual_grid) {
6060        Ok(raw_residual) => {
6061            stage_timings.residual_fft += residual_fft_started.elapsed();
6062            let residual_correction_started = Instant::now();
6063            let image = gridder.corrected_image_from_unshifted_centered_grid_f64(&raw_residual);
6064            let correction_elapsed = residual_correction_started.elapsed();
6065            stage_timings.residual_image_correction += correction_elapsed;
6066            stage_timings.residual_normalize += correction_elapsed;
6067            image
6068        }
6069        Err(residual_grid) => {
6070            let raw_residual = centered_ifft2_f64_owned(residual_grid);
6071            stage_timings.residual_fft += residual_fft_started.elapsed();
6072            let residual_correction_started = Instant::now();
6073            let image = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_residual);
6074            let correction_elapsed = residual_correction_started.elapsed();
6075            stage_timings.residual_image_correction += correction_elapsed;
6076            stage_timings.residual_normalize += correction_elapsed;
6077            image
6078        }
6079    };
6080    let residual_normalize_started = Instant::now();
6081    residual.mapv_inplace(|value| value / accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32 / psf_peak);
6082    stage_timings.residual_normalize += residual_normalize_started.elapsed();
6083
6084    Ok((
6085        PsfState {
6086            psf,
6087            normalization_sumwt: accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32,
6088            reported_sumwt: accumulation.reported_sumwt as f32,
6089            psf_peak,
6090            gridded_samples: accumulation.gridded_samples,
6091            skipped_samples: accumulation.skipped_samples,
6092        },
6093        residual,
6094    ))
6095}
6096
6097fn psf_grid_to_state(
6098    gridder: &StandardGridder,
6099    psf_grid: &Array2<Complex64>,
6100    accumulation: StandardMfsDirtyAccumulation,
6101    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
6102) -> Result<PsfState, ImagingError> {
6103    if accumulation.normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 || accumulation.reported_sumwt <= 0.0 {
6104        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
6105    }
6106
6107    let fft_started = Instant::now();
6108    let raw_psf = centered_ifft2_f64(psf_grid);
6109    stage_timings.psf_fft += fft_started.elapsed();
6110    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
6111    let mut psf = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_psf);
6112    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32);
6113    let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&psf);
6114    if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
6115        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
6116            "PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
6117        ));
6118    }
6119    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
6120    stage_timings.psf_normalize += normalize_started.elapsed();
6121
6122    Ok(PsfState {
6123        psf,
6124        normalization_sumwt: accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32,
6125        reported_sumwt: accumulation.reported_sumwt as f32,
6126        psf_peak,
6127        gridded_samples: accumulation.gridded_samples,
6128        skipped_samples: accumulation.skipped_samples,
6129    })
6130}
6131
6132fn should_use_standard_mfs_executor(
6133    request: &ImagingRequest,
6134    weighted_batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
6135    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
6136) -> bool {
6137    if !matches!(request.w_term_mode, WTermMode::None) {
6138        return false;
6139    }
6140    let max_samples = execution_config
6141        .materialized_sample_plan_max_samples
6142        .unwrap_or_else(standard_mfs_executor_max_samples);
6143    standard_mfs_sample_count(weighted_batches) <= max_samples
6144}
6145
6146fn should_use_standard_mfs_tiled_backend(request: &ImagingRequest) -> bool {
6147    matches!(request.w_term_mode, WTermMode::None) && standard_mfs_fixed_tile_backend_enabled()
6148}
6149
6150/// Return whether this process can create a default macOS Metal device.
6151///
6152/// Auto runtime planners use this as an availability gate. Explicit Metal
6153/// backend selections are still allowed to reach the backend so callers get
6154/// the detailed backend error if the device cannot be opened.
6155pub fn standard_mfs_metal_device_available() -> bool {
6156    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
6157    {
6158        objc2_metal::MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice().is_some()
6159    }
6160    #[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
6161    {
6162        false
6163    }
6164}
6165
6166fn should_use_standard_mfs_metal_backend(request: &ImagingRequest) -> bool {
6167    matches!(request.w_term_mode, WTermMode::None) && standard_mfs_metal_backend_enabled()
6168}
6169
6170fn ensure_standard_mfs_backend_available() -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
6171    match standard_mfs_backend_selection_from_env()? {
6172        StandardMfsBackendSelection::Cpu | StandardMfsBackendSelection::FixedTile => Ok(()),
6173        StandardMfsBackendSelection::Metal
6174        | StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRun
6175        | StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRunGrouped => {
6176            #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
6177            {
6178                Ok(())
6179            }
6180            #[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
6181            {
6182                Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
6183                    "standard MFS backend 'metal' requires macOS Metal and is not available \
6184                     on this platform"
6185                        .to_string(),
6186                ))
6187            }
6188        }
6189    }
6190}
6191
6192fn standard_mfs_fixed_tile_backend_enabled() -> bool {
6193    matches!(
6194        standard_mfs_backend_selection_from_env(),
6195        Ok(StandardMfsBackendSelection::FixedTile)
6196    )
6197}
6198
6199fn standard_mfs_metal_backend_enabled() -> bool {
6200    matches!(
6201        standard_mfs_backend_selection_from_env(),
6202        Ok(StandardMfsBackendSelection::Metal
6203            | StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRun
6204            | StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRunGrouped)
6205    )
6206}
6207
6208fn standard_mfs_mtmfs_metal_backend_enabled() -> bool {
6209    if standard_mfs_metal_backend_enabled() {
6210        return true;
6211    }
6212    matches!(
6213        standard_mfs_residual_backend_selection_from_env(),
6214        Ok(Some(
6215            StandardMfsBackendSelection::Metal
6216                | StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRun
6217                | StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRunGrouped
6218        ))
6219    )
6220}
6221
6222fn w_project_initial_dirty_metal_backend_enabled() -> bool {
6223    standard_mfs_metal_backend_enabled()
6224        || matches!(
6225            standard_mfs_initial_dirty_backend_selection_from_env(),
6226            Ok(Some(
6227                StandardMfsBackendSelection::Metal
6228                    | StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRun
6229                    | StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRunGrouped
6230            ))
6231        )
6232}
6233
6234fn w_project_residual_metal_backend_enabled() -> bool {
6235    standard_mfs_mtmfs_metal_backend_enabled()
6236}
6237
6238fn mosaic_initial_dirty_metal_backend_enabled() -> bool {
6239    w_project_initial_dirty_metal_backend_enabled()
6240}
6241
6242fn mosaic_residual_metal_backend_enabled() -> bool {
6243    w_project_residual_metal_backend_enabled()
6244}
6245
6246fn standard_mfs_metal_grouped_input_cache_enabled(planned_default: bool) -> bool {
6247    env::var("CASA_RS_STANDARD_MFS_METAL_GROUPED_INPUT_CACHE")
6248        .map(|value| {
6249            !matches!(
6250                value.trim().to_ascii_lowercase().as_str(),
6251                "0" | "false" | "no" | "off"
6252            )
6253        })
6254        .unwrap_or(planned_default)
6255}
6256
6257fn standard_mfs_backend_selection_from_env() -> Result<StandardMfsBackendSelection, ImagingError> {
6258    env::var(STANDARD_MFS_BACKEND_ENV)
6259        .map(|value| parse_standard_mfs_backend_selection(&value))
6260        .unwrap_or(Ok(StandardMfsBackendSelection::Cpu))
6261}
6262
6263fn standard_mfs_residual_backend_selection_from_env()
6264-> Result<Option<StandardMfsBackendSelection>, ImagingError> {
6265    env::var(STANDARD_MFS_RESIDUAL_BACKEND_ENV)
6266        .map(|value| {
6267            let selection = parse_standard_mfs_backend_selection(&value)?;
6268            Ok(match selection {
6269                StandardMfsBackendSelection::Cpu | StandardMfsBackendSelection::FixedTile => None,
6270                StandardMfsBackendSelection::Metal => Some(StandardMfsBackendSelection::Metal),
6271                StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRun => {
6272                    Some(StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRun)
6273                }
6274                StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRunGrouped => {
6275                    Some(StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRunGrouped)
6276                }
6277            })
6278        })
6279        .unwrap_or(Ok(None))
6280}
6281
6282fn standard_mfs_initial_dirty_backend_selection_from_env()
6283-> Result<Option<StandardMfsBackendSelection>, ImagingError> {
6284    env::var(STANDARD_MFS_INITIAL_DIRTY_BACKEND_ENV)
6285        .map(|value| {
6286            let selection = parse_standard_mfs_backend_selection(&value)?;
6287            match selection {
6288                StandardMfsBackendSelection::Cpu | StandardMfsBackendSelection::FixedTile => {
6289                    Ok(None)
6290                }
6291                StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRunGrouped => {
6292                    Ok(Some(StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRunGrouped))
6293                }
6294                StandardMfsBackendSelection::Metal | StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRun => {
6295                    Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
6296                        "standard MFS initial dirty backend '{value}' is not implemented; expected cpu, fixed_tile, or metal-row-run-grouped"
6297                    )))
6298                }
6299            }
6300        })
6301        .unwrap_or(Ok(None))
6302}
6303
6304fn parse_standard_mfs_backend_selection(
6305    value: &str,
6306) -> Result<StandardMfsBackendSelection, ImagingError> {
6307    let normalized = value.trim().to_ascii_lowercase();
6308    match normalized.as_str() {
6309        "" | "cpu" | "default" => Ok(StandardMfsBackendSelection::Cpu),
6310        "fixed_tile" | "fixed-tile" | "tile" | "tiled" | "streaming_fixed_tile" => {
6311            Ok(StandardMfsBackendSelection::FixedTile)
6312        }
6313        "metal" => Ok(StandardMfsBackendSelection::Metal),
6314        "metal-row-run" | "metal_row_run" | "metal-rowrun" | "metal_rowrun" => {
6315            Ok(StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRun)
6316        }
6317        "metal-row-run-grouped" | "metal_row_run_grouped" | "metal-grouped" | "metal_grouped" => {
6318            Ok(StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRunGrouped)
6319        }
6320        _ => Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
6321            "standard MFS backend '{value}' is not recognized; expected cpu, fixed_tile, metal, metal-row-run, or metal-row-run-grouped"
6322        ))),
6323    }
6324}
6325
6326fn standard_mfs_executor_max_samples() -> usize {
6327    env::var("CASA_RS_STANDARD_MFS_EXECUTOR_MAX_SAMPLES")
6328        .ok()
6329        .and_then(|value| value.parse::<usize>().ok())
6330        .unwrap_or(DEFAULT_STANDARD_MFS_EXECUTOR_MAX_SAMPLES)
6331}
6332
6333fn standard_mfs_grid_threads() -> usize {
6334    standard_mfs_thread_count_from_env()
6335}
6336
6337fn standard_mfs_thread_count_from_env() -> usize {
6338    env::var(STANDARD_MFS_GRID_THREADS_ENV)
6339        .ok()
6340        .and_then(|value| parse_standard_mfs_thread_count(&value))
6341        .unwrap_or(1)
6342}
6343
6344fn parse_standard_mfs_thread_count(value: &str) -> Option<usize> {
6345    let value = value.trim();
6346    if value.eq_ignore_ascii_case("auto") {
6347        return Some(thread::available_parallelism().map_or(1, |value| value.get()));
6348    }
6349    value.parse::<usize>().ok().filter(|value| *value > 0)
6350}
6351
6352fn standard_mfs_sample_count(batches: &[VisibilityBatch]) -> usize {
6353    batches.iter().map(VisibilityBatch::len).sum()
6354}
6355
6356fn complex64_grid_bytes(nx: usize, ny: usize, grid_count: usize) -> usize {
6357    nx.saturating_mul(ny)
6358        .saturating_mul(grid_count)
6359        .saturating_mul(std::mem::size_of::<Complex64>())
6360}
6361
6362/// Run CASA-style MTMFS imaging on already-prepared MFS visibilities.
6363///
6364/// The current Rust implementation follows CASA's point-source MTMFS structure:
6365/// Taylor-weighted dirty/PSF terms, a coupled Hessian solve in the minor
6366/// cycle, Cotton-Schwab residual refreshes against the measured visibilities,
6367/// and CASA-style `.tt*`, `.alpha`, and `.alpha.error` products.
6368///
6369/// This implementation mirrors CASA's historical Hogbom off-by-one behavior
6370/// for MTMFS minor-cycle budgeting: the reported `niter` remains capped, but a
6371/// single minor-cycle call can commit one extra component.
6372pub fn run_mtmfs(request: &MtmfsRequest) -> Result<MtmfsResult, ImagingError> {
6373    let total_started = Instant::now();
6374    request.validate()?;
6375    if request.compatibility != CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs {
6376        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
6377            "only CASA standard MFS compatibility mode is implemented".to_string(),
6378        ));
6379    }
6380    if !matches!(request.gridder_mode, GridderMode::Standard) {
6381        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
6382            "MTMFS currently supports gridder='standard' only".to_string(),
6383        ));
6384    }
6385
6386    let gridder = StandardGridder::new(request.geometry)?;
6387    let mut acceleration_backend = MtmfsAccelerationBackend::new(request, &gridder)?;
6388    let mut stage_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
6389    let weighting_started = Instant::now();
6390    let weighting_request = ImagingRequest {
6391        geometry: request.geometry,
6392        visibility_batches: request.visibility_batches.clone(),
6393        gridder_mode: request.gridder_mode.clone(),
6394        plane_stokes: request.plane_stokes,
6395        weighting: request.weighting,
6396        reffreq_hz: request.reffreq_hz,
6397        selected_frequency_range_hz: request.selected_frequency_range_hz,
6398        deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
6399        multiscale_scales: request.multiscale_scales.clone(),
6400        small_scale_bias: request.small_scale_bias,
6401        clean: request.clean,
6402        clean_mask: request.clean_mask.clone(),
6403        initial_model: None,
6404        w_term_mode: request.w_term_mode,
6405        w_project_planes: request.w_project_planes,
6406        compatibility: request.compatibility,
6407    };
6408    let weighted_batches = apply_weighting(&weighting_request, &gridder)?;
6409    stage_timings.weighting += weighting_started.elapsed();
6410    acceleration_backend.prepare_weighted_batches(request, &weighted_batches)?;
6411
6412    let psf_state = compute_mtmfs_psf_terms(
6413        request,
6414        &weighted_batches,
6415        &gridder,
6416        &acceleration_backend,
6417        &mut stage_timings,
6418    )?;
6419    let [nx, ny] = request.geometry.image_shape;
6420    let mut model_terms = vec![Array2::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny)); request.nterms];
6421    let mut residual_terms = compute_mtmfs_residual_terms(
6422        request,
6423        &weighted_batches,
6424        &gridder,
6425        &acceleration_backend,
6426        &model_terms,
6427        &psf_state,
6428        &mut stage_timings,
6429    )?;
6430    let max_psf_sidelobe_level = estimate_psf_sidelobe_level(
6431        &psf_state.psf_terms[0],
6432        request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
6433        request.clean.psf_cutoff,
6434    );
6435    let clean_mask_pixels = request
6436        .clean_mask
6437        .as_ref()
6438        .map(|mask| mask.iter().filter(|value| **value).count())
6439        .unwrap_or(nx * ny);
6440    let initial_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual_terms[0], request.clean_mask.as_ref());
6441    let mut warnings = Vec::new();
6442
6443    let hessian = mtmfs_hessian(&psf_state.psf_terms, request.nterms)?;
6444    let inv_hessian = invert_small_matrix(&hessian)?;
6445
6446    let controller_started = Instant::now();
6447    let mut reported_minor_iterations = 0usize;
6448    let mut major_cycles = 0usize;
6449    let mut clean_stop_reason = None::<CleanStopReason>;
6450    let mut minor_cycle_traces = Vec::<MinorCycleTrace>::new();
6451    let mut final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam = request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam;
6452    let mut min_residual_peak_jy_per_beam = initial_peak;
6453    let mut divergence_warned = false;
6454    let mut residual_needs_refresh = false;
6455
6456    while reported_minor_iterations < request.clean.niter {
6457        if request
6458            .clean
6459            .major_cycle_limit
6460            .is_some_and(|limit| major_cycles >= limit)
6461        {
6462            clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::MajorCycleLimitReached);
6463            break;
6464        }
6465        let Some((_, cycle_peak_value)) =
6466            peak_location_masked(&residual_terms[0], request.clean_mask.as_ref())
6467        else {
6468            clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels);
6469            break;
6470        };
6471        let cycle_peak = cycle_peak_value.abs();
6472        let cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam = nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam(
6473            &residual_terms[0],
6474            request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
6475            request.clean,
6476        );
6477        if let Some(stop_reason) = tolerant_clean_stop_reason(
6478            cycle_peak,
6479            request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
6480            cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
6481        ) {
6482            clean_stop_reason = Some(stop_reason);
6483            break;
6484        }
6485        let remaining_reported = request.clean.niter - reported_minor_iterations;
6486        let cycle_reported_niter = remaining_reported.min(request.clean.minor_cycle_length);
6487        let start_reported_iteration = reported_minor_iterations;
6488        let cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam =
6489            clean_cycle_threshold(cycle_peak, max_psf_sidelobe_level, request.clean);
6490        let (outcome, probe) = run_mtmfs_minor_cycle(
6491            request,
6492            &psf_state.psf_terms,
6493            &hessian,
6494            &inv_hessian,
6495            &mut model_terms,
6496            &mut residual_terms,
6497            cycle_reported_niter,
6498            cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
6499            cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
6500            &mut stage_timings,
6501        );
6502        minor_cycle_traces.push(make_minor_cycle_trace(
6503            minor_cycle_traces.len(),
6504            start_reported_iteration,
6505            outcome,
6506            cycle_peak,
6507            &residual_terms[0],
6508            &model_terms[0],
6509            probe,
6510        ));
6511        reported_minor_iterations += outcome.reported_updates;
6512        final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam = outcome.final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam;
6513        let mut stop_after_refresh = None::<CleanStopReason>;
6514        if let Some(reason) = outcome.stop_reason {
6515            match reason {
6516                CleanStopReason::CycleThresholdReached if outcome.updated_model => {}
6517                CleanStopReason::CycleThresholdReached => {
6518                    clean_stop_reason = Some(reason);
6519                }
6520                _ => {
6521                    clean_stop_reason = Some(reason);
6522                    stop_after_refresh = Some(reason);
6523                }
6524            }
6525        }
6526        if !outcome.updated_model {
6527            break;
6528        }
6529        residual_needs_refresh = true;
6530        let minor_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual_terms[0], request.clean_mask.as_ref());
6531        if let Some(stop_reason) = update_divergence_state(
6532            &mut warnings,
6533            &mut min_residual_peak_jy_per_beam,
6534            minor_peak,
6535            &mut divergence_warned,
6536        ) {
6537            clean_stop_reason = Some(stop_reason);
6538            break;
6539        }
6540        if reported_minor_iterations >= request.clean.niter {
6541            clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::IterationLimitReached);
6542            break;
6543        }
6544        let refresh_started = Instant::now();
6545        residual_terms = compute_mtmfs_residual_terms(
6546            request,
6547            &weighted_batches,
6548            &gridder,
6549            &acceleration_backend,
6550            &model_terms,
6551            &psf_state,
6552            &mut stage_timings,
6553        )?;
6554        stage_timings.major_cycle_refresh += refresh_started.elapsed();
6555        major_cycles += 1;
6556        residual_needs_refresh = false;
6557        let refreshed_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual_terms[0], request.clean_mask.as_ref());
6558        let refreshed_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam = nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam(
6559            &residual_terms[0],
6560            request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
6561            request.clean,
6562        );
6563        if stop_after_refresh.is_some() {
6564            break;
6565        }
6566        if let Some(stop_reason) = tolerant_clean_stop_reason(
6567            refreshed_peak,
6568            request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
6569            refreshed_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
6570        ) {
6571            clean_stop_reason = Some(stop_reason);
6572            break;
6573        }
6574    }
6575    if request.clean.niter > 0 && clean_stop_reason.is_none() {
6576        clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::IterationLimitReached);
6577    }
6578    if residual_needs_refresh {
6579        let refresh_started = Instant::now();
6580        residual_terms = compute_mtmfs_residual_terms(
6581            request,
6582            &weighted_batches,
6583            &gridder,
6584            &acceleration_backend,
6585            &model_terms,
6586            &psf_state,
6587            &mut stage_timings,
6588        )?;
6589        stage_timings.major_cycle_refresh += refresh_started.elapsed();
6590    }
6591    let controller_elapsed = controller_started.elapsed();
6592    let accounted = stage_timings
6593        .minor_cycle_solve
6594        .saturating_add(stage_timings.major_cycle_refresh);
6595    stage_timings.controller_overhead += controller_elapsed.saturating_sub(accounted);
6596
6597    let beam_fit_started = Instant::now();
6598    let BeamFitOutcome {
6599        beam,
6600        warnings: beam_warnings,
6601        attempts: beam_fit_attempts,
6602        cutoff_used: beam_fit_cutoff_used,
6603        debug: beam_fit_debug,
6604    } = fit_beam_from_psf(
6605        &psf_state.psf_terms[0],
6606        request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
6607        request.clean.psf_cutoff,
6608    );
6609    stage_timings.beam_fit += beam_fit_started.elapsed();
6610    let restore_started = Instant::now();
6611    let principal_residual_terms = principal_solution_terms(&residual_terms, &inv_hessian);
6612    let mut image_terms = Vec::with_capacity(request.nterms);
6613    for (model_term, residual_term) in model_terms.iter().zip(principal_residual_terms.iter()) {
6614        let restored_model = restore_model(model_term, request.geometry.cell_size_rad, beam);
6615        image_terms.push(&restored_model + residual_term);
6616    }
6617    stage_timings.restore += restore_started.elapsed();
6618
6619    let max_abs_w_lambda = weighted_batches
6620        .iter()
6621        .flat_map(|batch| batch.w_lambda.iter())
6622        .fold(0.0f64, |max_value, value| max_value.max(value.abs()));
6623    let fractional_bandwidth = (request.selected_frequency_range_hz[1]
6624        - request.selected_frequency_range_hz[0])
6625        / request.reffreq_hz;
6626    warnings.extend(beam_warnings);
6627    stage_timings.total = total_started.elapsed();
6628
6629    let (alpha, alpha_error) =
6630        compute_mtmfs_alpha_products(&image_terms, &principal_residual_terms);
6631
6632    Ok(MtmfsResult {
6633        psf_terms: psf_state.psf_terms.iter().map(expand_plane).collect(),
6634        residual_terms: residual_terms.iter().map(expand_plane).collect(),
6635        model_terms: model_terms.iter().map(expand_plane).collect(),
6636        image_terms: image_terms.iter().map(expand_plane).collect(),
6637        sumwt_terms: psf_state
6638            .reported_sumwt_terms
6639            .iter()
6640            .copied()
6641            .map(expand_scalar)
6642            .collect(),
6643        alpha: alpha.as_ref().map(expand_plane),
6644        alpha_error: alpha_error.as_ref().map(expand_plane),
6645        beam,
6646        diagnostics: ImagingDiagnostics {
6647            warnings,
6648            gridded_samples: psf_state.gridded_samples,
6649            skipped_samples: psf_state.skipped_samples,
6650            normalization_sumwt: psf_state.normalization_sumwt,
6651            reported_sumwt: psf_state
6652                .reported_sumwt_terms
6653                .first()
6654                .copied()
6655                .unwrap_or(0.0),
6656            psf_peak_normalization: psf_state.psf_peak,
6657            major_cycles: casa_major_cycle_count(major_cycles, request.clean.niter),
6658            minor_iterations: reported_minor_iterations,
6659            clean_stop_reason,
6660            minor_cycle_traces,
6661            initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: initial_peak,
6662            final_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: peak_abs_value_masked(
6663                &residual_terms[0],
6664                request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
6665            ),
6666            max_abs_w_lambda,
6667            fractional_bandwidth,
6668            max_psf_sidelobe_level,
6669            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
6670            clean_mask_pixels,
6671            beam_fit_attempts,
6672            beam_fit_cutoff_used,
6673            beam_fit_debug,
6674            mosaic_weight_image: None,
6675            stage_timings,
6676        },
6677        compatibility: CompatibilityMetadata {
6678            axis_order: [
6679                AxisKind::RightAscension,
6680                AxisKind::Declination,
6681                AxisKind::Stokes,
6682                AxisKind::Frequency,
6683            ],
6684            plane_stokes: request.plane_stokes,
6685            reffreq_hz: request.reffreq_hz,
6686            channel_frequencies_hz: vec![request.reffreq_hz],
6687            psf_units: String::new(),
6688            residual_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
6689            model_units: "Jy/pixel".to_string(),
6690            image_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
6691        },
6692    })
6693}
6694
6695#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
6696struct MosaicPointingGroup {
6697    pointing_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
6698    frequency_hz: f64,
6699    primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel,
6700    batch: VisibilityBatch,
6701    sample_frequency_hz: Vec<f64>,
6702}
6703
6704fn empty_visibility_batch_with_capacity(capacity: usize) -> VisibilityBatch {
6705    VisibilityBatch {
6706        u_lambda: Vec::with_capacity(capacity),
6707        v_lambda: Vec::with_capacity(capacity),
6708        w_lambda: Vec::with_capacity(capacity),
6709        weight: Vec::with_capacity(capacity),
6710        sumwt_factor: Vec::with_capacity(capacity),
6711        gridable: Vec::with_capacity(capacity),
6712        visibility: Vec::with_capacity(capacity),
6713    }
6714}
6715
6716fn append_visibility_batch_range(
6717    target: &mut VisibilityBatch,
6718    source: &VisibilityBatch,
6719    range: VisibilitySampleRange,
6720) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
6721    if range.start > range.end || range.end > source.len() {
6722        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
6723            "mosaic grouped metadata references an unknown sample range".to_string(),
6724        ));
6725    }
6726    target
6727        .u_lambda
6728        .extend_from_slice(&source.u_lambda[range.start..range.end]);
6729    target
6730        .v_lambda
6731        .extend_from_slice(&source.v_lambda[range.start..range.end]);
6732    target
6733        .w_lambda
6734        .extend_from_slice(&source.w_lambda[range.start..range.end]);
6735    target
6736        .weight
6737        .extend_from_slice(&source.weight[range.start..range.end]);
6738    target
6739        .sumwt_factor
6740        .extend_from_slice(&source.sumwt_factor[range.start..range.end]);
6741    target
6742        .gridable
6743        .extend_from_slice(&source.gridable[range.start..range.end]);
6744    target
6745        .visibility
6746        .extend_from_slice(&source.visibility[range.start..range.end]);
6747    Ok(())
6748}
6749
6750struct MosaicGroupedRangeSpec {
6751    pointing_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
6752    frequency_hz: f64,
6753    primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel,
6754    sample_count: usize,
6755    ranges: Vec<VisibilitySampleRangeRef>,
6756}
6757
6758enum MosaicStreamingWeightingPlan {
6759    Standard(StandardMfsStreamingWeightingPlan),
6760}
6761
6762impl MosaicStreamingWeightingPlan {
6763    fn new(
6764        geometry: ImageGeometry,
6765        weighting: WeightingMode,
6766        selected_frequency_range_hz: [f64; 2],
6767        weight_density_mode: WeightDensityMode,
6768    ) -> Result<Self, ImagingError> {
6769        Ok(Self::Standard(
6770            StandardMfsStreamingWeightingPlan::new_with_density_mode(
6771                geometry,
6772                weighting,
6773                selected_frequency_range_hz,
6774                weight_density_mode,
6775            )?,
6776        ))
6777    }
6778
6779    fn finish_density_pass(&mut self) {
6780        match self {
6781            Self::Standard(plan) => plan.finish_density_pass(),
6782        }
6783    }
6784
6785    fn merge_density_accumulator(&mut self, other: Self) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
6786        match (self, other) {
6787            (Self::Standard(plan), Self::Standard(other)) => plan.merge_density_accumulator(other),
6788        }
6789    }
6790
6791    fn accumulate_density_group(
6792        &mut self,
6793        batch: &VisibilityBatch,
6794        group: &GroupedVisibilityMetadata,
6795    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
6796        match self {
6797            Self::Standard(plan) => {
6798                for range in &group.sample_ranges {
6799                    if range.end > batch.len() || range.start > range.end {
6800                        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
6801                            "grouped mosaic metadata range exceeds visibility batch".to_string(),
6802                        ));
6803                    }
6804                    for sample_index in range.start..range.end {
6805                        plan.accumulate_density_sample(
6806                            batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
6807                            batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
6808                            batch.weight[sample_index],
6809                        );
6810                    }
6811                }
6812                Ok(())
6813            }
6814        }
6815    }
6816
6817    fn weight_sample(
6818        &self,
6819        u_lambda: f64,
6820        v_lambda: f64,
6821        weight: f32,
6822    ) -> Result<f32, ImagingError> {
6823        match self {
6824            Self::Standard(plan) => plan.weight_sample(u_lambda, v_lambda, weight),
6825        }
6826    }
6827}
6828
6829fn materialize_mosaic_grouped_range_spec(
6830    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
6831    spec: &MosaicGroupedRangeSpec,
6832) -> Result<MosaicPointingGroup, ImagingError> {
6833    let mut group = MosaicPointingGroup {
6834        pointing_direction_rad: spec.pointing_direction_rad,
6835        frequency_hz: spec.frequency_hz,
6836        primary_beam_model: spec.primary_beam_model,
6837        batch: empty_visibility_batch_with_capacity(spec.sample_count),
6838        sample_frequency_hz: Vec::new(),
6839    };
6840    for range_ref in &spec.ranges {
6841        let Some(batch) = batches.get(range_ref.batch_index) else {
6842            return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
6843                "grouped mosaic metadata references an unknown visibility batch".to_string(),
6844            ));
6845        };
6846        append_visibility_batch_range(&mut group.batch, batch, range_ref.range)?;
6847    }
6848    Ok(group)
6849}
6850

6877struct MosaicDirtyGroupSummary {

6882    skipped_samples: usize,

6885struct MosaicPointingWeightSummary {
6886    pointing_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
6887    frequency_hz: f64,
6888    raw_samples: usize,
6889    group_weight_grid_sum: f64,
6890    reported_sumwt: f64,
6891    normalization_sumwt: f64,
6892    gridded_samples: usize,
6893    skipped_samples: usize,
6894}
6895
6896fn mosaic_pointing_weight_summary_from_contribution(
6897    group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
6898    group_weight_grid_sum: f64,
6899    reported_sumwt: f64,
6900    normalization_sumwt: f64,
6901    gridded_samples: usize,
6902    skipped_samples: usize,
6903) -> MosaicPointingWeightSummary {
6904    MosaicPointingWeightSummary {
6905        pointing_direction_rad: group.pointing_direction_rad,
6906        frequency_hz: group.frequency_hz,
6907        raw_samples: group.batch.len(),
6908        group_weight_grid_sum,
6909        reported_sumwt,
6910        normalization_sumwt,
6911        gridded_samples,
6912        skipped_samples,
6913    }
6914}
6915
6916fn log_mosaic_pointing_weight_summaries(pass: &str, summaries: &[MosaicPointingWeightSummary]) {
6917    if !profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled() || summaries.is_empty() {
6918        return;
6919    }
6920    type PointingKey = (u64, u64, u64);
6921    let mut totals = BTreeMap::<PointingKey, MosaicPointingWeightSummary>::new();
6922    for summary in summaries {
6923        let key = (
6924            summary.pointing_direction_rad[0].to_bits(),
6925            summary.pointing_direction_rad[1].to_bits(),
6926            summary.frequency_hz.to_bits(),
6927        );
6928        totals
6929            .entry(key)
6930            .and_modify(|total| {
6931                total.raw_samples += summary.raw_samples;
6932                total.group_weight_grid_sum += summary.group_weight_grid_sum;
6933                total.reported_sumwt += summary.reported_sumwt;
6934                total.normalization_sumwt += summary.normalization_sumwt;
6935                total.gridded_samples += summary.gridded_samples;
6936                total.skipped_samples += summary.skipped_samples;
6937            })
6938            .or_insert_with(|| MosaicPointingWeightSummary {
6939                pointing_direction_rad: summary.pointing_direction_rad,
6940                frequency_hz: summary.frequency_hz,
6941                raw_samples: summary.raw_samples,
6942                group_weight_grid_sum: summary.group_weight_grid_sum,
6943                reported_sumwt: summary.reported_sumwt,
6944                normalization_sumwt: summary.normalization_sumwt,
6945                gridded_samples: summary.gridded_samples,
6946                skipped_samples: summary.skipped_samples,
6947            });
6948    }
6949    for summary in totals.values() {
6950        eprintln!(
6951            "mosaic_pointing_weight_summary pass={} pointing_ra={:.12e} pointing_dec={:.12e} frequency_hz={:.9e} raw_samples={} gridded_samples={} skipped={} group_weight_sum={:.12e} reported_sumwt={:.12e} normalization_sumwt={:.12e}",
6952            pass,
6953            summary.pointing_direction_rad[0],
6954            summary.pointing_direction_rad[1],
6955            summary.frequency_hz,
6956            summary.raw_samples,
6957            summary.gridded_samples,
6958            summary.skipped_samples,
6959            summary.group_weight_grid_sum,
6960            summary.reported_sumwt,
6961            summary.normalization_sumwt,
6962        );
6963    }
6964}
6965
6966struct MosaicDirtyProjectorPair {
6967    projector: ScreenProjector,
6968    weight_projector: ScreenProjector,
6969    weight_plan: ScreenProjectSamplePlan,
6970}
6971
6972#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug, Eq, Hash, Ord, PartialEq, PartialOrd)]
6973struct MosaicWeightSupportKey {
6974    min_ix: i32,
6975    max_ix: i32,
6976    min_iy: i32,
6977    max_iy: i32,
6978}
6979
6980#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
6981struct MosaicWeightSupportSum {
6982    key: MosaicWeightSupportKey,
6983    weight: f64,
6984}
6985
6986#[derive(Clone, Debug)]
6987struct MosaicWeightGridAccumulator {
6988    full_support: MosaicWeightSupportKey,
6989    full_weight_sum: f64,
6990    cropped_weight_sums: BTreeMap<MosaicWeightSupportKey, f64>,
6991    total_weight_sum: f64,
6992}
6993
6994impl MosaicWeightGridAccumulator {
6995    fn new(weight_projector: &ScreenProjector) -> Self {
6996        let support = weight_projector.support() as i32;
6997        Self {
6998            full_support: MosaicWeightSupportKey {
6999                min_ix: -support,
7000                max_ix: support,
7001                min_iy: -support,
7002                max_iy: support,
7003            },
7004            full_weight_sum: 0.0,
7005            cropped_weight_sums: BTreeMap::new(),
7006            total_weight_sum: 0.0,
7007        }
7008    }
7009
7010    fn add_plan(&mut self, plan: &ScreenProjectSamplePlan, weight: f64) {
7011        if !(weight.is_finite() && weight > 0.0) {
7012            return;
7013        }
7014        let key = MosaicWeightSupportKey {
7015            min_ix: plan.min_ix as i32,
7016            max_ix: plan.max_ix as i32,
7017            min_iy: plan.min_iy as i32,
7018            max_iy: plan.max_iy as i32,
7019        };
7020        self.total_weight_sum += weight;
7021        if key == self.full_support {
7022            self.full_weight_sum += weight;
7023        } else {
7024            *self.cropped_weight_sums.entry(key).or_insert(0.0) += weight;
7025        }
7026    }
7027
7028    fn extend(&mut self, other: &Self) {
7029        debug_assert_eq!(self.full_support, other.full_support);
7030        self.full_weight_sum += other.full_weight_sum;
7031        self.total_weight_sum += other.total_weight_sum;
7032        for (&key, &weight) in &other.cropped_weight_sums {
7033            *self.cropped_weight_sums.entry(key).or_insert(0.0) += weight;
7034        }
7035    }
7036
7037    fn support_sums(&self) -> Vec<MosaicWeightSupportSum> {
7038        let mut sums = Vec::with_capacity(
7039            usize::from(self.full_weight_sum > 0.0) + self.cropped_weight_sums.len(),
7040        );
7041        if self.full_weight_sum > 0.0 {
7042            sums.push(MosaicWeightSupportSum {
7043                key: self.full_support,
7044                weight: self.full_weight_sum,
7045            });
7046        }
7047        sums.extend(
7048            self.cropped_weight_sums
7049                .iter()
7050                .filter(|(_, weight)| **weight > 0.0)
7051                .map(|(&key, &weight)| MosaicWeightSupportSum { key, weight }),
7052        );
7053        sums
7054    }
7055}
7056
7057fn add_mosaic_weight_support_sample(
7058    accumulator: &mut MosaicWeightGridAccumulator,
7059    weight_projector: &ScreenProjector,
7060    u_lambda: f64,
7061    v_lambda: f64,
7062    grid_weight: f64,
7063) {
7064    if let Some(weight_sample_plan) = weight_projector.plan_sample_for_grid(u_lambda, v_lambda) {
7065        accumulator.add_plan(&weight_sample_plan, grid_weight);
7066    }
7067}
7068
7069fn add_mosaic_center_weight_grid_from_support_sums(
7070    weight_projector: &ScreenProjector,
7071    center_weight_plan: &ScreenProjectSamplePlan,
7072    weight_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
7073    support_sums: &[MosaicWeightSupportSum],
7074) {
7075    for support_sum in support_sums {
7076        if !(support_sum.weight.is_finite() && support_sum.weight > 0.0) {
7077            continue;
7078        }
7079        let mut plan = *center_weight_plan;
7080        plan.min_ix = support_sum.key.min_ix as isize;
7081        plan.max_ix = support_sum.key.max_ix as isize;
7082        plan.min_iy = support_sum.key.min_iy as isize;
7083        plan.max_iy = support_sum.key.max_iy as isize;
7084        weight_projector.grid_sample_planned_f64(
7085            weight_grid,
7086            &plan,
7087            Complex64::new(support_sum.weight, 0.0),
7088        );
7089    }
7090}
7091

7094}

7124
7125#[repr(C)]
7126#[derive(Clone, Copy)]
7127struct MosaicMetalSample {
7128    loc: u32,
7129    support: u32,
7130    offset: [i32; 2],
7131    range_x: [i32; 2],
7132    range_y: [i32; 2],
7133    weight: f32,
7134    visibility_re: f32,
7135    visibility_im: f32,
7136    kernel_base: u32,
7137}
7138
7139#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug, Eq, Hash, Ord, PartialEq, PartialOrd)]
7140struct MosaicMetalSampleKey {
7141    loc: u32,
7142    support: u32,
7143    offset: [i32; 2],
7144    range_x: [i32; 2],
7145    range_y: [i32; 2],
7146}
7147
7148#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
7149struct MosaicMetalSampleAccumulator {
7150    weight: f64,
7151    weighted_visibility_re: f64,
7152    weighted_visibility_im: f64,
7153}
7154
7155#[derive(Default)]
7156struct MosaicMetalSampleHasher(u64);
7157
7158impl Hasher for MosaicMetalSampleHasher {
7159    fn finish(&self) -> u64 {
7160        self.0
7161    }
7162
7163    fn write(&mut self, bytes: &[u8]) {
7164        for chunk in bytes.chunks(8) {
7165            let mut word = 0u64;
7166            for (shift, byte) in chunk.iter().enumerate() {
7167                word |= u64::from(*byte) << (shift * 8);
7168            }
7169            self.write_u64(word);
7170        }
7171    }
7172
7173    fn write_u8(&mut self, value: u8) {
7174        self.write_u64(u64::from(value));
7175    }
7176
7177    fn write_u16(&mut self, value: u16) {
7178        self.write_u64(u64::from(value));
7179    }
7180
7181    fn write_u32(&mut self, value: u32) {
7182        self.write_u64(u64::from(value));
7183    }
7184
7185    fn write_u64(&mut self, value: u64) {
7186        self.0 = self.0.rotate_left(5) ^ value.wrapping_mul(0x517c_c1b7_2722_0a95);
7187    }
7188
7189    fn write_usize(&mut self, value: usize) {
7190        self.write_u64(value as u64);
7191    }
7192
7193    fn write_i8(&mut self, value: i8) {
7194        self.write_u64(value as u8 as u64);
7195    }
7196
7197    fn write_i16(&mut self, value: i16) {
7198        self.write_u64(value as u16 as u64);
7199    }
7200
7201    fn write_i32(&mut self, value: i32) {
7202        self.write_u64(value as u32 as u64);
7203    }
7204
7205    fn write_i64(&mut self, value: i64) {
7206        self.write_u64(value as u64);
7207    }
7208
7209    fn write_isize(&mut self, value: isize) {
7210        self.write_u64(value as u64);
7211    }
7212}
7213
7214type MosaicMetalSampleHashMap = HashMap<
7215    MosaicMetalSampleKey,
7216    MosaicMetalSampleAccumulator,
7217    BuildHasherDefault<MosaicMetalSampleHasher>,
7218>;
7219
7220struct MosaicMetalPreparedGroup {
7221    samples: Vec<MosaicMetalSample>,
7222    weight_support_sums: Vec<MosaicWeightSupportSum>,
7223    group_weight_grid_sum: f64,
7224    reported_sumwt: f64,
7225    normalization_sumwt: f64,
7226    gridded_samples: usize,
7227    skipped_samples: usize,
7228}
7229
7230impl MosaicMetalPreparedGroup {}
7231
7232impl MosaicMetalSample {
7233    fn key(self) -> MosaicMetalSampleKey {
7234        MosaicMetalSampleKey {
7235            loc: self.loc,
7236            support: self.support,
7237            offset: self.offset,
7238            range_x: self.range_x,
7239            range_y: self.range_y,
7240        }
7241    }
7242}
7243
7244impl MosaicMetalSampleKey {
7245    fn into_sample(self, accumulator: MosaicMetalSampleAccumulator) -> Option<MosaicMetalSample> {
7246        if !(accumulator.weight.is_finite() && accumulator.weight > 0.0) {
7247            return None;
7248        }
7249        Some(MosaicMetalSample {
7250            loc: self.loc,
7251            support: self.support,
7252            offset: self.offset,
7253            range_x: self.range_x,
7254            range_y: self.range_y,
7255            weight: accumulator.weight as f32,
7256            visibility_re: (accumulator.weighted_visibility_re / accumulator.weight) as f32,
7257            visibility_im: (accumulator.weighted_visibility_im / accumulator.weight) as f32,
7258            kernel_base: 0,
7259        })
7260    }
7261}
7262
7263fn push_mosaic_metal_sample_aggregate(
7264    aggregates: &mut MosaicMetalSampleHashMap,
7265    sample: MosaicMetalSample,
7266) {
7267    let weight = f64::from(sample.weight);
7268    let entry = aggregates
7269        .entry(sample.key())
7270        .or_insert(MosaicMetalSampleAccumulator {
7271            weight: 0.0,
7272            weighted_visibility_re: 0.0,
7273            weighted_visibility_im: 0.0,
7274        });
7275    entry.weight += weight;
7276    entry.weighted_visibility_re += f64::from(sample.visibility_re) * weight;
7277    entry.weighted_visibility_im += f64::from(sample.visibility_im) * weight;
7278}
7279
7280fn finish_mosaic_metal_sample_aggregates(
7281    aggregates: MosaicMetalSampleHashMap,
7282) -> Vec<MosaicMetalSample> {
7283    let mut grouped = aggregates.into_iter().collect::<Vec<_>>();
7284    grouped.sort_unstable_by_key(|(key, _)| *key);
7285    grouped
7286        .into_iter()
7287        .filter_map(|(key, accumulator)| key.into_sample(accumulator))
7288        .collect()
7289}
7290
7291#[repr(C)]
7292#[derive(Clone, Copy)]
7293#[cfg_attr(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage), allow(dead_code))]
7294struct MosaicMetalParams {
7295    sample_count: u32,
7296    grid_width: u32,
7297    grid_height: u32,
7298    kernel_width: u32,
7299    kernel_center: u32,
7300    sampling: u32,
7301    mode: u32,
7302    model_present: u32,
7303    partial_grid_count: u32,
7304    partial_chunk_len: u32,
7305    _pad0: u32,
7306}
7307
7308const MOSAIC_METAL_MODE_DIRTY: u32 = 1;
7309const MOSAIC_METAL_MODE_RESIDUAL: u32 = 2;
7310#[cfg_attr(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage), allow(dead_code))]
7311const MOSAIC_METAL_PARTIAL_GRID_TARGET_BYTES: usize = 64 * 1024 * 1024;
7312#[cfg_attr(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage), allow(dead_code))]
7313const MOSAIC_METAL_TARGET_SAMPLES_PER_PARTIAL_GRID: usize = 25_000;
7314#[cfg_attr(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage), allow(dead_code))]
7315const MOSAIC_METAL_SINGLE_GRID_GROUPED_SAMPLE_LIMIT: usize = 128_000;
7316const MOSAIC_METAL_INITIAL_DIRTY_MIN_PREPARED_SAMPLES: usize = 25_000;
7317const MOSAIC_GROUPED_RESIDUAL_MIN_RAW_SAMPLES: usize = 10_000;
7318const MOSAIC_METAL_RESIDUAL_MIN_PREPARED_SAMPLES: usize = 25_000;
7319const MOSAIC_CPU_GROUPED_DIRTY_MIN_RAW_SAMPLES: usize = 10_000;
7320
7321#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug, Default)]
7322struct MosaicMetalGridStats {
7323    calls: usize,
7324    dirty_calls: usize,
7325    residual_calls: usize,
7326    samples: usize,
7327    kernel_pack: Duration,
7328    device_queue: Duration,
7329    shader_compile: Duration,
7330    pipeline: Duration,
7331    buffer_alloc: Duration,
7332    model_pack: Duration,
7333    zero_outputs: Duration,
7334    encode: Duration,
7335    dispatch_wait: Duration,
7336    reduce_wait: Duration,
7337    readback: Duration,
7338    total: Duration,
7339}
7340
7341impl MosaicMetalGridStats {
7342    fn add_assign(&mut self, other: Self) {
7343        self.calls += other.calls;
7344        self.dirty_calls += other.dirty_calls;
7345        self.residual_calls += other.residual_calls;
7346        self.samples += other.samples;
7347        self.kernel_pack += other.kernel_pack;
7348        self.device_queue += other.device_queue;
7349        self.shader_compile += other.shader_compile;
7350        self.pipeline += other.pipeline;
7351        self.buffer_alloc += other.buffer_alloc;
7352        self.model_pack += other.model_pack;
7353        self.zero_outputs += other.zero_outputs;
7354        self.encode += other.encode;
7355        self.dispatch_wait += other.dispatch_wait;
7356        self.reduce_wait += other.reduce_wait;
7357        self.readback += other.readback;
7358        self.total += other.total;
7359    }
7360}
7361
7362#[cfg_attr(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage), allow(dead_code))]
7363fn mosaic_metal_partial_grid_count(sample_count: usize, cell_count: usize) -> usize {
7364    if sample_count <= MOSAIC_METAL_SINGLE_GRID_GROUPED_SAMPLE_LIMIT {
7365        return 1;
7366    }
7367    let bytes_per_partial_grid = cell_count
7368        .checked_mul(std::mem::size_of::<f32>())
7369        .and_then(|bytes| bytes.checked_mul(4))
7370        .unwrap_or(usize::MAX);
7371    let max_by_memory = MOSAIC_METAL_PARTIAL_GRID_TARGET_BYTES
7372        .checked_div(bytes_per_partial_grid)
7373        .unwrap_or(1)
7374        .max(1);
7375    sample_count
7376        .div_ceil(MOSAIC_METAL_TARGET_SAMPLES_PER_PARTIAL_GRID)
7377        .clamp(1, max_by_memory.min(32))
7378}
7379
7380fn mosaic_initial_dirty_metal_group_eligible(
7381    _group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
7382    prepared_group: Option<&MosaicMetalPreparedGroup>,
7383) -> bool {
7384    if !mosaic_initial_dirty_metal_backend_enabled() {
7385        return false;
7386    }
7387    match prepared_group {
7388        Some(prepared) => prepared.samples.len() >= MOSAIC_METAL_INITIAL_DIRTY_MIN_PREPARED_SAMPLES,
7389        None => false,
7390    }
7391}
7392
7393struct MosaicDirtyParallelContribution {
7394    psf_grid: Array2<Complex64>,
7395    residual_grid: Array2<Complex64>,
7396    weight_grid: Array2<Complex64>,
7397    pointing_weight_summaries: Vec<MosaicPointingWeightSummary>,
7398    reported_sumwt: f64,
7399    normalization_sumwt: f64,
7400    gridded_samples: usize,
7401    skipped_samples: usize,
7402    elapsed: Duration,
7403    worker_samples: Vec<usize>,
7404    worker_alloc: Vec<Duration>,
7405    worker_compute: Vec<Duration>,
7406    join_elapsed: Duration,
7407    merge_elapsed: Duration,
7408}
7409
7410fn run_mosaic_dirty_imaging(
7411    request: &ImagingRequest,
7412    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
7413    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
7414    total_started: Instant,
7415) -> Result<ImagingResult, ImagingError> {
7416    if request.w_term_mode != WTermMode::None {
7417        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
7418            "mosaic gridder currently supports only w_term_mode='none'".to_string(),
7419        ));
7420    }
7421
7422    let gridder = StandardGridder::new_unpadded(request.geometry)?;
7423    let mut stage_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
7424    let weighting_started = Instant::now();
7425    let weighted_batches = apply_mosaic_weighting(request, config, &gridder)?;
7426    let weighting_elapsed = weighting_started.elapsed();
7427    stage_timings.weighting += weighting_elapsed;
7428    let conv_sampling = mosaic_projector_sampling(request.geometry);
7429    let trace_enabled = mosaic_trace_enabled();
7430    let cell_trace_targets = mosaic_cell_trace_targets();
7431    let group_started = Instant::now();
7432    let retain_sample_frequency_hz = trace_enabled && !cell_trace_targets.is_empty();
7433    let groups = if config.grouped_metadata_batches.is_empty() {
7434        build_mosaic_pointing_groups(
7435            &weighted_batches,
7436            &config.metadata_batches,
7437            retain_sample_frequency_hz,
7438        )?
7439    } else {
7440        build_mosaic_pointing_groups_from_grouped(
7441            &weighted_batches,
7442            &config.grouped_metadata_batches,
7443            retain_sample_frequency_hz,
7444        )?
7445    };
7446    let group_elapsed = group_started.elapsed();
7447    if groups.is_empty() {
7448        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
7449    }
7450    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled() {
7451        let group_samples = groups.iter().map(|group| group.batch.len()).sum::<usize>();
7452        let (group_min, group_p50, group_max) = profile::min_p50_max_usize(
7453            &groups
7454                .iter()
7455                .map(|group| group.batch.len())
7456                .collect::<Vec<_>>(),
7457        );
7458        eprintln!(
7459            "mosaic_dirty_setup weighting_ms={:.3} build_groups_ms={:.3} input_batches={} metadata_batches={} grouped_metadata_batches={} groups={} grouped_samples={} group_samples_min={} group_samples_p50={} group_samples_max={}",
7460            profile::millis(weighting_elapsed),
7461            profile::millis(group_elapsed),
7462            weighted_batches.len(),
7463            config.metadata_batches.len(),
7464            config.grouped_metadata_batches.len(),
7465            groups.len(),
7466            group_samples,
7467            group_min,
7468            group_p50,
7469            group_max,
7470        );
7471    }
7472
7473    let [nx, ny] = request.geometry.image_shape;
7474    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
7475    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
7476    let mut model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny));
7477    let mut accumulated_residual_image = Array2::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny));
7478    let mut accumulated_weight_image = Array2::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny));
7479    let dump_grids = mosaic_grid_dump_enabled();
7480    let mut accumulated_residual_grid =
7481        dump_grids.then(|| Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny)));
7482    let mut accumulated_mosaic_weight_grid =
7483        dump_grids.then(|| Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny)));
7484    let mut reported_sumwt = 0.0f64;
7485    let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
7486    let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
7487    let mut skipped_samples = 0usize;
7488    let mut projector_cache = MosaicProjectorCache::new();
7489
7490    let weight_image_started = Instant::now();
7491    let pb_weight_image = build_mosaic_weight_image(request.geometry, config, &groups)?;
7492    let weight_image_elapsed = weight_image_started.elapsed();
7493    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled() {
7494        eprintln!(
7495            "mosaic_dirty_setup weight_image_ms={:.3}",
7496            profile::millis(weight_image_elapsed),
7497        );
7498    }
7499
7500    let mosaic_parallel_threads = mosaic_parallel_thread_count(groups.len());
7501    let mosaic_metal_group_cache = if !trace_enabled
7502        && cell_trace_targets.is_empty()
7503        && !dump_grids
7504        && (mosaic_initial_dirty_metal_backend_enabled() || mosaic_residual_metal_backend_enabled())
7505    {
7506        let cache_started = Instant::now();
7507        let cache = prepare_mosaic_metal_group_cache(
7508            request,
7509            config,
7510            &gridder,
7511            &groups,
7512            conv_sampling,
7513            mosaic_parallel_threads,
7514        )?;
7515        stage_timings.psf_grid += cache_started.elapsed();
7516        Some(cache)
7517    } else {
7518        None
7519    };
7520    if !trace_enabled && cell_trace_targets.is_empty() && !dump_grids {
7521        let parallel = compute_mosaic_dirty_parallel(
7522            request,
7523            config,
7524            &gridder,
7525            &groups,
7526            conv_sampling,
7527            mosaic_parallel_threads,
7528            mosaic_metal_group_cache.as_deref(),
7529            None,
7530        )?;
7531        psf_grid = parallel.psf_grid;
7532        let fft_started = Instant::now();
7533        let raw_residual = centered_ifft2_f64(&parallel.residual_grid);
7534        let raw_weight = centered_ifft2_f64(&parallel.weight_grid);
7535        stage_timings.psf_fft += fft_started.elapsed();
7536        let normalize_started = Instant::now();
7537        accumulated_residual_image =
7538            gridder.corrected_mosaic_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_residual, conv_sampling);
7539        accumulated_weight_image = gridder.mosaic_weight_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_weight);
7540        stage_timings.psf_normalize += normalize_started.elapsed();
7541        reported_sumwt = parallel.reported_sumwt;
7542        normalization_sumwt = parallel.normalization_sumwt;
7543        gridded_samples = parallel.gridded_samples;
7544        skipped_samples = parallel.skipped_samples;
7545        log_mosaic_pointing_weight_summaries("initial_dirty", &parallel.pointing_weight_summaries);
7546        stage_timings.psf_grid += parallel.elapsed;
7547        profile::log_parallel_stage(profile::ParallelStageProfile {
7548            stage: "mosaic_dirty_grid",
7549            requested_threads: standard_mfs_grid_threads(),
7550            actual_threads: parallel.worker_compute.len(),
7551            chunking: "pointing-group",
7552            chunk_len: groups.len().div_ceil(parallel.worker_compute.len().max(1)),
7553            samples_total: groups.iter().map(|group| group.batch.len()).sum(),
7554            samples_per_worker: parallel.worker_samples,
7555            local_grid_bytes_per_worker: complex64_grid_bytes(grid_nx, grid_ny, 3),
7556            local_grid_count: 3,
7557            local_alloc_zero_by_worker: parallel.worker_alloc,
7558            worker_compute_by_worker: parallel.worker_compute,
7559            join_duration: parallel.join_elapsed,
7560            merge_duration: parallel.merge_elapsed,
7561            stage_duration: parallel.elapsed,
7562        });
7563    } else {
7564        for group in &groups {
7565            if !mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
7566                request.geometry,
7567                config.phase_center_direction_rad,
7568                group.pointing_direction_rad,
7569            ) {
7570                if env::var_os("CASA_RS_DEBUG_MOSAIC").is_some() {
7571                    eprintln!(
7572                        "mosaic skipping group outside image footprint dir={:?} freq_hz={:.6e}",
7573                        group.pointing_direction_rad, group.frequency_hz
7574                    );
7575                }
7576                continue;
7577            }
7578            let projector_started = Instant::now();
7579            let projector = cached_mosaic_projector(
7580                &mut projector_cache,
7581                request.geometry,
7582                &gridder,
7583                config.phase_center_direction_rad,
7584                group.pointing_direction_rad,
7585                group.primary_beam_model,
7586                group.frequency_hz,
7587                conv_sampling,
7588                2,
7589                true,
7590            )?;
7591            let weight_projector = cached_mosaic_projector(
7592                &mut projector_cache,
7593                request.geometry,
7594                &gridder,
7595                config.phase_center_direction_rad,
7596                group.pointing_direction_rad,
7597                group.primary_beam_model,
7598                group.frequency_hz,
7599                conv_sampling,
7600                4,
7601                true,
7602            )?;
7603            let weight_plan = weight_projector
7604                .plan_sample_for_grid(0.0, 0.0)
7605                .ok_or_else(|| {
7606                    ImagingError::Normalization(
7607                        "mosaic weight projector failed to plan the centered kernel".to_string(),
7608                    )
7609                })?;
7610            let mut group_residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
7611            let mut group_weight_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
7612            stage_timings.psf_grid += projector_started.elapsed();
7613            if env::var_os("CASA_RS_DEBUG_MOSAIC").is_some() {
7614                eprintln!(
7615                    "mosaic group dir={:?} freq_hz={:.6e} support={} sampling={} samples={}",
7616                    group.pointing_direction_rad,
7617                    group.frequency_hz,
7618                    projector.support(),
7619                    projector.sampling(),
7620                    group.batch.len()
7621                );
7622            }
7623            if trace_enabled {
7624                append_mosaic_trace(format!(
7625                    "{{\"event\":\"group\",\"pointing_ra\":{:.17e},\"pointing_dec\":{:.17e},\"freq_hz\":{:.17e},\"support\":{},\"sampling\":{},\"samples\":{},\"imaging_kernel_sum_re\":{:.17e},\"imaging_kernel_sum_im\":{:.17e},\"weight_kernel_sum_re\":{:.17e},\"weight_kernel_sum_im\":{:.17e}}}",
7626                    group.pointing_direction_rad[0],
7627                    group.pointing_direction_rad[1],
7628                    group.frequency_hz,
7629                    projector.support(),
7630                    projector.sampling(),
7631                    group.batch.len(),
7632                    projector.normalization_sum().re,
7633                    projector.normalization_sum().im,
7634                    weight_projector.normalization_sum().re,
7635                    weight_projector.normalization_sum().im,
7636                ));
7637            }
7638            let grid_started = Instant::now();
7639            let mut logged_first_sample = !trace_enabled;
7640            let mut trace_group_value_sum = Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0);
7641            let mut trace_group_weight_sum = 0.0f64;
7642            let mut trace_group_sample_count = 0usize;
7643            let mut trace_group_center_count = 0usize;
7644            let mut weight_support_sums = MosaicWeightGridAccumulator::new(&weight_projector);
7645            for sample_index in 0..group.batch.len() {
7646                if !group.batch.gridable[sample_index] {
7647                    skipped_samples += 1;
7648                    continue;
7649                }
7650                let weight = group.batch.weight[sample_index];
7651                let sumwt_factor = group.batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index];
7652                let visibility = group.batch.visibility[sample_index];
7653                if !(weight.is_finite()
7654                    && weight > 0.0
7655                    && sumwt_factor.is_finite()
7656                    && sumwt_factor > 0.0
7657                    && visibility.re.is_finite()
7658                    && visibility.im.is_finite())
7659                {
7660                    skipped_samples += 1;
7661                    continue;
7662                }
7663                let grid_weight = weight * sumwt_factor;
7664                let plan = if trace_enabled {
7665                    projector.plan_sample(
7666                        group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
7667                        group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
7668                    )
7669                } else {
7670                    projector.plan_sample_for_grid(
7671                        group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
7672                        group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
7673                    )
7674                };
7675                let Some(plan) = plan else {
7676                    skipped_samples += 1;
7677                    continue;
7678                };
7679                if trace_enabled {
7680                    trace_group_value_sum += visibility * grid_weight;
7681                    trace_group_weight_sum += f64::from(grid_weight);
7682                    trace_group_sample_count += 1;
7683                }
7684                if trace_enabled && !cell_trace_targets.is_empty() {
7685                    let value = Complex64::new(visibility.re as f64, visibility.im as f64)
7686                        * f64::from(grid_weight);
7687                    for &(target_x, target_y) in &cell_trace_targets {
7688                        let ix = target_x - plan.loc_x;
7689                        let iy = target_y - plan.loc_y;
7690                        let Some(tap) = projector.trace_sample_tap_at(&plan, ix, iy) else {
7691                            continue;
7692                        };
7693                        let contribution = value * Complex64::new(tap.re as f64, tap.im as f64);
7694                        let sample_frequency_hz = group
7695                            .sample_frequency_hz
7696                            .get(sample_index)
7697                            .copied()
7698                            .unwrap_or(group.frequency_hz);
7699                        append_mosaic_trace(format!(
7700                            "{{\"event\":\"cell_contribution\",\"target\":[{},{}],\"pointing_ra\":{:.17e},\"pointing_dec\":{:.17e},\"freq_hz\":{:.17e},\"plane_freq_hz\":{:.17e},\"sample_freq_hz\":{:.17e},\"sample_index\":{},\"u_lambda\":{:.17e},\"v_lambda\":{:.17e},\"w_lambda\":{:.17e},\"loc\":[{},{}],\"off\":[{},{}],\"tap_offset\":[{},{}],\"tap\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"visibility\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"weight\":{:.17e},\"sumwt_factor\":{:.17e},\"grid_weight\":{:.17e},\"weighted_value\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"contribution\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}]}}",
7701                            target_x,
7702                            target_y,
7703                            group.pointing_direction_rad[0],
7704                            group.pointing_direction_rad[1],
7705                            group.frequency_hz,
7706                            request.reffreq_hz,
7707                            sample_frequency_hz,
7708                            sample_index,
7709                            group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
7710                            group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
7711                            group.batch.w_lambda[sample_index],
7712                            plan.loc_x,
7713                            plan.loc_y,
7714                            plan.off_x,
7715                            plan.off_y,
7716                            ix,
7717                            iy,
7718                            tap.re,
7719                            tap.im,
7720                            visibility.re,
7721                            visibility.im,
7722                            weight,
7723                            sumwt_factor,
7724                            grid_weight,
7725                            value.re,
7726                            value.im,
7727                            contribution.re,
7728                            contribution.im,
7729                        ));
7730                    }
7731                }
7732                if !logged_first_sample {
7733                    let (tap_sum, center_tap, first_tap) =
7734                        projector.trace_sample_taps(&plan).unwrap_or((
7735                            Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0),
7736                            Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0),
7737                            Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0),
7738                        ));
7739                    let tap_matrix_json = projector
7740                        .trace_sample_tap_matrix(&plan)
7741                        .map(|taps| {
7742                            taps.into_iter()
7743                                .map(|(ix, iy, tap)| {
7744                                    format!("[{ix},{iy},{:.17e},{:.17e}]", tap.re, tap.im)
7745                                })
7746                                .collect::<Vec<_>>()
7747                                .join(",")
7748                        })
7749                        .unwrap_or_default();
7750                    append_mosaic_trace(format!(
7751                        "{{\"event\":\"sample\",\"pointing_ra\":{:.17e},\"pointing_dec\":{:.17e},\"sample_index\":{},\"u_lambda\":{:.17e},\"v_lambda\":{:.17e},\"w_lambda\":{:.17e},\"loc\":[{},{}],\"off\":[{},{}],\"normalization\":{:.17e},\"tap_sum\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"center_tap\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"first_tap\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"taps\":[{}],\"visibility\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"weight\":{:.17e},\"sumwt_factor\":{:.17e},\"grid_weight\":{:.17e}}}",
7752                        group.pointing_direction_rad[0],
7753                        group.pointing_direction_rad[1],
7754                        sample_index,
7755                        group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
7756                        group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
7757                        group.batch.w_lambda[sample_index],
7758                        plan.loc_x,
7759                        plan.loc_y,
7760                        plan.off_x,
7761                        plan.off_y,
7762                        plan.normalization,
7763                        tap_sum.re,
7764                        tap_sum.im,
7765                        center_tap.re,
7766                        center_tap.im,
7767                        first_tap.re,
7768                        first_tap.im,
7769                        tap_matrix_json,
7770                        visibility.re,
7771                        visibility.im,
7772                        weight,
7773                        sumwt_factor,
7774                        grid_weight,
7775                    ));
7776                    logged_first_sample = true;
7777                }
7778                let grid_weight64 = f64::from(grid_weight);
7779                projector.grid_sample_planned_f64(
7780                    &mut psf_grid,
7781                    &plan,
7782                    Complex64::new(grid_weight64, 0.0),
7783                );
7784                projector.grid_sample_planned_f64(
7785                    &mut group_residual_grid,
7786                    &plan,
7787                    Complex64::new(visibility.re as f64, visibility.im as f64) * grid_weight64,
7788                );
7789                add_mosaic_weight_support_sample(
7790                    &mut weight_support_sums,
7791                    &weight_projector,
7792                    group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
7793                    group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
7794                    grid_weight64,
7795                );
7796                if plan.center_in_bounds {
7797                    normalization_sumwt += grid_weight64;
7798                    reported_sumwt +=
7799                        mosaic_reported_sumwt_from_grid_weight(grid_weight, sumwt_factor);
7800                    trace_group_center_count += 1;
7801                }
7802                gridded_samples += 1;
7803            }
7804            let support_sums = weight_support_sums.support_sums();
7805            trace_mosaic_weight_support_contributions(
7806                group,
7807                &weight_projector,
7808                &weight_plan,
7809                &support_sums,
7810                &cell_trace_targets,
7811            );
7812            add_mosaic_center_weight_grid_from_support_sums(
7813                &weight_projector,
7814                &weight_plan,
7815                &mut group_weight_grid,
7816                &support_sums,
7817            );
7818            if let Some(residual_grid) = accumulated_residual_grid.as_mut() {
7819                Zip::from(residual_grid)
7820                    .and(&group_residual_grid)
7821                    .for_each(|accumulated, value| *accumulated += *value);
7822            }
7823            if let Some(weight_grid) = accumulated_mosaic_weight_grid.as_mut() {
7824                Zip::from(weight_grid)
7825                    .and(&group_weight_grid)
7826                    .for_each(|accumulated, value| *accumulated += *value);
7827            }
7828            if trace_enabled {
7829                append_mosaic_trace(format!(
7830                    "{{\"event\":\"group_aggregate\",\"pointing_ra\":{:.17e},\"pointing_dec\":{:.17e},\"freq_hz\":{:.17e},\"samples\":{},\"center_samples\":{},\"grid_weight_sum\":{:.17e},\"weighted_visibility_sum\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}]}}",
7831                    group.pointing_direction_rad[0],
7832                    group.pointing_direction_rad[1],
7833                    group.frequency_hz,
7834                    trace_group_sample_count,
7835                    trace_group_center_count,
7836                    trace_group_weight_sum,
7837                    trace_group_value_sum.re,
7838                    trace_group_value_sum.im,
