7839                ));
7840            }
7841            let raw_group_residual = centered_ifft2_f64(&group_residual_grid);
7842            let group_residual_image =
7843                gridder.corrected_mosaic_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_group_residual, conv_sampling);
7844            let raw_group_weight = centered_ifft2_f64(&group_weight_grid);
7845            let group_weight_image = gridder.mosaic_weight_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_group_weight);
7846            if trace_enabled {
7847                append_mosaic_trace(format!(
7848                    "{{\"event\":\"group_image\",\"pointing_ra\":{:.17e},\"pointing_dec\":{:.17e},\"freq_hz\":{:.17e},\"pixels\":{}}}",
7849                    group.pointing_direction_rad[0],
7850                    group.pointing_direction_rad[1],
7851                    group.frequency_hz,
7852                    mosaic_trace_group_pixels_json(&group_residual_image, &group_weight_image),
7853                ));
7854            }
7855            Zip::from(&mut accumulated_residual_image)
7856                .and(&group_residual_image)
7857                .for_each(|accumulated, residual_value| {
7858                    *accumulated += *residual_value;
7859                });
7860            Zip::from(&mut accumulated_weight_image)
7861                .and(&group_weight_image)
7862                .for_each(|accumulated, weight_value| {
7863                    *accumulated += *weight_value;
7864                });
7865            stage_timings.psf_grid += grid_started.elapsed();
7866        }
7867    }
7868
7869    if !(normalization_sumwt.is_finite() && normalization_sumwt > 0.0) {
7870        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
7871            "mosaic normalization sumwt is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
7872        ));
7873    }
7874    if !(reported_sumwt.is_finite() && reported_sumwt > 0.0) {
7875        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
7876            "mosaic reported sumwt is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
7877        ));
7878    }
7879
7880    let fft_started = Instant::now();
7881    dump_mosaic_complex_grid("psf_prefft", request.reffreq_hz, &psf_grid);
7882    if let Some(residual_grid) = accumulated_residual_grid.as_ref() {
7883        dump_mosaic_complex_grid("residual_prefft", request.reffreq_hz, residual_grid);
7884    }
7885    if let Some(weight_grid) = accumulated_mosaic_weight_grid.as_ref() {
7886        dump_mosaic_complex_grid("weight_prefft", request.reffreq_hz, weight_grid);
7887    }
7888    let raw_psf = centered_ifft2_f64(&psf_grid);
7889    stage_timings.psf_fft += fft_started.elapsed();
7890
7891    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
7892    let mut accumulated_psf = gridder.corrected_mosaic_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_psf, conv_sampling);
7893    let mut accumulated_residual = accumulated_residual_image;
7894    let normalization_weight_image = accumulated_weight_image;
7895    let fft_sumwt_scale =
7896        (request.geometry.nx() * request.geometry.ny()) as f32 / normalization_sumwt as f32;
7897    accumulated_residual.mapv_inplace(|value| value * fft_sumwt_scale);
7898    accumulated_psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value * fft_sumwt_scale);
7899    if trace_enabled {
7900        append_mosaic_trace(format!(
7901            "{{\"event\":\"pre_normalize\",\"normalization_sumwt\":{:.17e},\"reported_sumwt\":{:.17e},\"raw_residual_peak\":{:.17e},\"raw_psf_peak\":{:.17e},\"normalization_weight_peak\":{:.17e},\"pixels\":{}}}",
7902            normalization_sumwt,
7903            reported_sumwt,
7904            peak_abs_value(&accumulated_residual),
7905            peak_abs_value(&accumulated_psf),
7906            peak_abs_value(&normalization_weight_image),
7907            mosaic_trace_pixels_json(
7908                &accumulated_residual,
7909                &accumulated_psf,
7910                &normalization_weight_image,
7911                None
7912            ),
7913        ));
7914    }
7915    let weight_image = normalization_weight_image.mapv(|value| value * fft_sumwt_scale);
7916    trace_mosaic_weight_image("rust_pre_scale_weight", &normalization_weight_image);
7917    trace_mosaic_weight_image("rust_weight", &weight_image);
7918    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled() {
7919        eprintln!(
7920            "mosaic_weight_normalization reported_sumwt={:.9e} normalization_sumwt={:.9e} fft_sumwt_scale={:.9e} pre_scale_weight_peak={:.9e} post_scale_weight_peak={:.9e}",
7921            reported_sumwt,
7922            normalization_sumwt,
7923            fft_sumwt_scale,
7924            peak_abs_value(&normalization_weight_image),
7925            peak_abs_value(&weight_image),
7926        );
7927    }
7928    if env::var_os("CASA_RS_DEBUG_MOSAIC").is_some() {
7929        let pre_weight_peak = peak_abs_value(&accumulated_residual);
7930        let pre_weight_peak_loc = peak_location_masked(&accumulated_residual, None);
7931        eprintln!(
7932            "mosaic pre-weight residual peak={pre_weight_peak:.9e} loc={pre_weight_peak_loc:?}"
7933        );
7934    }
7935    if env::var_os("CASA_RS_DEBUG_MOSAIC").is_some() {
7936        let weight_peak = peak_abs_value(&normalization_weight_image);
7937        let weight_peak_loc = peak_location_masked(&normalization_weight_image, None);
7938        eprintln!("mosaic weight peak={weight_peak:.9e} loc={weight_peak_loc:?}");
7939    }
7940
7941    let weight_peak = weight_image
7942        .iter()
7943        .copied()
7944        .fold(0.0f32, |peak, value| peak.max(value));
7945    if !(weight_peak.is_finite() && weight_peak > 0.0) {
7946        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
7947            "mosaic weight peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
7948        ));
7949    }
7950    let pb_limit_threshold = config.pb_limit.abs() * config.pb_limit.abs() * weight_peak;
7951    for ((x, y), weight_value) in weight_image.indexed_iter() {
7952        let sensitivity = weight_value.max(0.0);
7953        if sensitivity > pb_limit_threshold {
7954            accumulated_residual[(x, y)] /= (sensitivity * weight_peak).sqrt();
7955        } else {
7956            accumulated_residual[(x, y)] = 0.0;
7957        }
7958    }
7959
7960    let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&accumulated_psf);
7961    if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
7962        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
7963            "mosaic PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
7964        ));
7965    }
7966    accumulated_psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
7967    if trace_enabled {
7968        append_mosaic_trace(format!(
7969            "{{\"event\":\"post_normalize\",\"psf_peak\":{:.17e},\"weight_peak\":{:.17e},\"pb_limit_threshold\":{:.17e},\"pixels\":{}}}",
7970            psf_peak,
7971            weight_peak,
7972            pb_limit_threshold,
7973            mosaic_trace_pixels_json(
7974                &accumulated_residual,
7975                &accumulated_psf,
7976                &normalization_weight_image,
7977                Some(&weight_image)
7978            ),
7979        ));
7980    }
7981    stage_timings.psf_normalize += normalize_started.elapsed();
7982    if env::var_os("CASA_RS_DEBUG_MOSAIC").is_some() {
7983        eprintln!(
7984            "mosaic totals: gridded={gridded_samples} skipped={skipped_samples} normalization_sumwt={normalization_sumwt:.9e} reported_sumwt={reported_sumwt:.9e}"
7985        );
7986    }
7987
7988    let reported_sumwt = reported_sumwt as f32;
7989    let max_psf_sidelobe_level = estimate_psf_sidelobe_level(
7990        &accumulated_psf,
7991        request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
7992        request.clean.psf_cutoff,
7993    );
7994    let mosaic_clean_mask = build_mosaic_clean_mask(
7995        &pb_weight_image,
7996        config.pb_limit,
7997        request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
7998    )?;
7999    let clean_request = request_for_mosaic_clean_mask(request, mosaic_clean_mask);
8000    let clean_mask_pixels = clean_request
8001        .clean_mask
8002        .as_ref()
8003        .map(|mask| mask.iter().filter(|value| **value).count())
8004        .unwrap_or(nx * ny);
8005    let initial_peak =
8006        peak_abs_value_masked(&accumulated_residual, clean_request.clean_mask.as_ref());
8007    let psf_state = PsfState {
8008        psf: accumulated_psf,
8009        normalization_sumwt: normalization_sumwt as f32,
8010        reported_sumwt,
8011        psf_peak,
8012        gridded_samples,
8013        skipped_samples,
8014    };
8015    let mut warnings = Vec::<String>::new();
8016    let controller_started = Instant::now();
8017    let clean_state = if request.clean.niter > 0 {
8018        run_mosaic_image_domain_controller(
8019            &clean_request,
8020            config,
8021            &gridder,
8022            &groups,
8023            &mut projector_cache,
8024            conv_sampling,
8025            &weight_image,
8026            &psf_state,
8027            &mut stage_timings,
8028            &mut model,
8029            accumulated_residual,
8030            max_psf_sidelobe_level,
8031            initial_peak,
8032            execution_config.minor_cycle_backend,
8033            &mut warnings,
8034            mosaic_metal_group_cache.as_deref(),
8035        )?
8036    } else {
8037        CottonSchwabState {
8038            residual: accumulated_residual,
8039            major_cycles: 0,
8040            minor_iterations: 0,
8041            clean_stop_reason: None,
8042            minor_cycle_traces: Vec::new(),
8043            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: 0.0,
8044        }
8045    };
8046    let accounted = stage_timings
8047        .minor_cycle_solve
8048        .saturating_add(stage_timings.major_cycle_refresh);
8049    stage_timings.controller_overhead += controller_started.elapsed().saturating_sub(accounted);
8050    let residual = clean_state.residual;
8051
8052    let beam_fit_started = Instant::now();
8053    let BeamFitOutcome {
8054        beam,
8055        warnings: beam_warnings,
8056        attempts: beam_fit_attempts,
8057        cutoff_used: beam_fit_cutoff_used,
8058        debug: beam_fit_debug,
8059    } = fit_beam_from_psf(
8060        &psf_state.psf,
8061        request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
8062        request.clean.psf_cutoff,
8063    );
8064    stage_timings.beam_fit += beam_fit_started.elapsed();
8065    warnings.extend(beam_warnings);
8066    let restore_started = Instant::now();
8067    let restored_model = restore_model(&model, request.geometry.cell_size_rad, beam);
8068    stage_timings.restore += restore_started.elapsed();
8069    let restored_image = &restored_model + &residual;
8070    stage_timings.total = total_started.elapsed();
8071
8072    Ok(ImagingResult {
8073        psf: expand_plane(&psf_state.psf),
8074        residual: expand_plane(&residual),
8075        model: expand_plane(&model),
8076        image: expand_plane(&restored_image),
8077        sumwt: expand_scalar(psf_state.reported_sumwt),
8078        beam,
8079        diagnostics: ImagingDiagnostics {
8080            warnings,
8081            gridded_samples: psf_state.gridded_samples,
8082            skipped_samples: psf_state.skipped_samples,
8083            normalization_sumwt: psf_state.normalization_sumwt,
8084            reported_sumwt: psf_state.reported_sumwt,
8085            psf_peak_normalization: psf_state.psf_peak,
8086            major_cycles: casa_major_cycle_count(clean_state.major_cycles, request.clean.niter),
8087            minor_iterations: clean_state.minor_iterations,
8088            clean_stop_reason: clean_state.clean_stop_reason,
8089            minor_cycle_traces: clean_state.minor_cycle_traces,
8090            initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: initial_peak,
8091            final_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: peak_abs_value_masked(
8092                &residual,
8093                request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
8094            ),
8095            max_abs_w_lambda: request
8096                .visibility_batches
8097                .iter()
8098                .flat_map(|batch| batch.w_lambda.iter())
8099                .fold(0.0f64, |max_value, value| max_value.max(value.abs())),
8100            fractional_bandwidth: (request.selected_frequency_range_hz[1]
8101                - request.selected_frequency_range_hz[0])
8102                / request.reffreq_hz,
8103            max_psf_sidelobe_level,
8104            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: clean_state.final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
8105            clean_mask_pixels,
8106            beam_fit_attempts,
8107            beam_fit_cutoff_used,
8108            beam_fit_debug,
8109            mosaic_weight_image: Some(weight_image),
8110            stage_timings,
8111        },
8112        compatibility: CompatibilityMetadata {
8113            axis_order: [
8114                AxisKind::RightAscension,
8115                AxisKind::Declination,
8116                AxisKind::Stokes,
8117                AxisKind::Frequency,
8118            ],
8119            plane_stokes: request.plane_stokes,
8120            reffreq_hz: request.reffreq_hz,
8121            channel_frequencies_hz: vec![request.reffreq_hz],
8122            psf_units: String::new(),
8123            residual_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
8124            model_units: "Jy/pixel".to_string(),
8125            image_units: "Jy/beam".to_string(),
8126        },
8127    })
8128}
8129
8130fn primary_beam_model_key(model: PrimaryBeamModel) -> (u8, u64, u64) {
8131    match model {
8132        PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
8133            dish_diameter_m,
8134            blockage_diameter_m,
8135        } => (0, dish_diameter_m.to_bits(), blockage_diameter_m.to_bits()),
8136        PrimaryBeamModel::EvlaLBandCommon => (1, 0, 0),
8137    }
8138}
8139
8140fn build_mosaic_pointing_groups(
8141    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
8142    metadata_batches: &[VisibilityMetadataBatch],
8143    retain_sample_frequency_hz: bool,
8144) -> Result<Vec<MosaicPointingGroup>, ImagingError> {
8145    let mut group_indices = BTreeMap::<(u64, u64, u64, (u8, u64, u64)), usize>::new();
8146    let mut groups = Vec::<MosaicPointingGroup>::new();
8147    for (batch, metadata) in batches.iter().zip(metadata_batches.iter()) {
8148        for sample_index in 0..batch.len() {
8149            let pointing_direction_rad = metadata.pointing_direction_rad[sample_index];
8150            let frequency_hz = metadata.beam_frequency_hz[sample_index];
8151            let key = (
8152                pointing_direction_rad[0].to_bits(),
8153                pointing_direction_rad[1].to_bits(),
8154                frequency_hz.to_bits(),
8155                primary_beam_model_key(metadata.primary_beam_model),
8156            );
8157            let group_index = match group_indices.get(&key).copied() {
8158                Some(index) => index,
8159                None => {
8160                    let index = groups.len();
8161                    group_indices.insert(key, index);
8162                    groups.push(MosaicPointingGroup {
8163                        pointing_direction_rad,
8164                        frequency_hz,
8165                        primary_beam_model: metadata.primary_beam_model,
8166                        batch: empty_visibility_batch_with_capacity(0),
8167                        sample_frequency_hz: Vec::new(),
8168                    });
8169                    index
8170                }
8171            };
8172            let entry = &mut groups[group_index];
8173            entry.batch.u_lambda.push(batch.u_lambda[sample_index]);
8174            entry.batch.v_lambda.push(batch.v_lambda[sample_index]);
8175            entry.batch.w_lambda.push(batch.w_lambda[sample_index]);
8176            entry.batch.weight.push(batch.weight[sample_index]);
8177            entry
8178                .batch
8179                .sumwt_factor
8180                .push(batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index]);
8181            entry.batch.gridable.push(batch.gridable[sample_index]);
8182            entry.batch.visibility.push(batch.visibility[sample_index]);
8183            if retain_sample_frequency_hz {
8184                entry
8185                    .sample_frequency_hz
8186                    .push(metadata.sample_frequency_hz[sample_index]);
8187            }
8188        }
8189    }
8190    Ok(groups)
8191}
8192
8193fn build_mosaic_pointing_groups_from_grouped(
8194    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
8195    metadata_batches: &[GroupedVisibilityMetadataBatch],
8196    retain_sample_frequency_hz: bool,
8197) -> Result<Vec<MosaicPointingGroup>, ImagingError> {
8198    if retain_sample_frequency_hz {
8199        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
8200            "grouped mosaic metadata does not carry per-sample frequencies needed for cell trace"
8201                .to_string(),
8202        ));
8203    }
8204    type MosaicGroupKey = (u64, u64, u64, (u8, u64, u64));
8205    let profile_started = profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled().then(Instant::now);
8206    let spec_started = profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled().then(Instant::now);
8207    let mut specs = BTreeMap::<MosaicGroupKey, MosaicGroupedRangeSpec>::new();
8208    for (batch_index, metadata) in metadata_batches.iter().enumerate() {
8209        for metadata_group in &metadata.groups {
8210            let pointing_direction_rad = metadata_group.pointing_direction_rad;
8211            let frequency_hz = metadata_group.beam_frequency_hz;
8212            let key = (
8213                pointing_direction_rad[0].to_bits(),
8214                pointing_direction_rad[1].to_bits(),
8215                frequency_hz.to_bits(),
8216                primary_beam_model_key(metadata_group.primary_beam_model),
8217            );
8218            let sample_count = metadata_group
8219                .sample_ranges
8220                .iter()
8221                .map(|range| range.end.saturating_sub(range.start))
8222                .sum::<usize>();
8223            let spec = specs.entry(key).or_insert_with(|| MosaicGroupedRangeSpec {
8224                pointing_direction_rad,
8225                frequency_hz,
8226                primary_beam_model: metadata_group.primary_beam_model,
8227                sample_count: 0,
8228                ranges: Vec::new(),
8229            });
8230            spec.sample_count += sample_count;
8231            spec.ranges.extend(
8232                metadata_group
8233                    .sample_ranges
8234                    .iter()
8235                    .copied()
8236                    .map(|range| VisibilitySampleRangeRef { batch_index, range }),
8237            );
8238        }
8239    }
8240    let spec_elapsed = spec_started.map_or(Duration::ZERO, |started| started.elapsed());
8241    let specs = specs.into_values().collect::<Vec<_>>();
8242    let materialize_started =
8243        profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled().then(Instant::now);
8244    let thread_count = mosaic_parallel_thread_count(specs.len());
8245    let groups = if thread_count <= 1 || specs.len() < 2 {
8246        specs
8247            .iter()
8248            .map(|spec| materialize_mosaic_grouped_range_spec(batches, spec))
8249            .collect::<Result<Vec<_>, _>>()?
8250    } else {
8251        let chunk_len = specs.len().div_ceil(thread_count);
8252        let mut worker_results = Vec::<(usize, Vec<MosaicPointingGroup>)>::new();
8253        thread::scope(|scope| {
8254            let mut handles = Vec::new();
8255            for (chunk_index, chunk) in specs.chunks(chunk_len).enumerate() {
8256                handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
8257                    let groups = chunk
8258                        .iter()
8259                        .map(|spec| materialize_mosaic_grouped_range_spec(batches, spec))
8260                        .collect::<Result<Vec<_>, _>>()?;
8261                    Ok::<_, ImagingError>((chunk_index, groups))
8262                }));
8263            }
8264            for handle in handles {
8265                worker_results.push(handle.join().map_err(|_| {
8266                    ImagingError::Unsupported(
8267                        "grouped mosaic materialization worker panicked".to_string(),
8268                    )
8269                })??);
8270            }
8271            Ok::<(), ImagingError>(())
8272        })?;
8273        worker_results.sort_by_key(|(chunk_index, _)| *chunk_index);
8274        worker_results
8275            .into_iter()
8276            .flat_map(|(_, groups)| groups)
8277            .collect()
8278    };
8279    let materialize_elapsed =
8280        materialize_started.map_or(Duration::ZERO, |started| started.elapsed());
8281    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled() {
8282        let total_ranges = specs.iter().map(|spec| spec.ranges.len()).sum::<usize>();
8283        eprintln!(
8284            "mosaic_grouped_materialize specs={} ranges={} requested_threads={} actual_threads={} spec_ms={:.3} materialize_ms={:.3} total_ms={:.3}",
8285            specs.len(),
8286            total_ranges,
8287            standard_mfs_grid_threads(),
8288            thread_count.min(specs.len()).max(1),
8289            profile::millis(spec_elapsed),
8290            profile::millis(materialize_elapsed),
8291            profile::millis(profile_started.map_or(Duration::ZERO, |started| started.elapsed())),
8292        );
8293    }
8294    Ok(groups)
8295}
8296
8297fn mosaic_parallel_thread_count(work_items: usize) -> usize {
8298    standard_mfs_grid_threads()
8299        .min(work_items)
8300        .min(thread::available_parallelism().map_or(1, |value| value.get()))
8301        .max(1)
8302}
8303
8304fn prepare_mosaic_dirty_projector_pairs(
8305    request: &ImagingRequest,
8306    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
8307    gridder: &StandardGridder,
8308    groups: &[MosaicPointingGroup],
8309    conv_sampling: usize,
8310    cache: &mut MosaicProjectorCache,
8311) -> Result<Vec<Option<MosaicDirtyProjectorPair>>, ImagingError> {
8312    let started = profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled().then(Instant::now);
8313    let mut pairs = Vec::with_capacity(groups.len());
8314    let mut prepared = 0usize;
8315    for group in groups {
8316        if !mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
8317            request.geometry,
8318            config.phase_center_direction_rad,
8319            group.pointing_direction_rad,
8320        ) {
8321            pairs.push(None);
8322            continue;
8323        }
8324        let projector = cached_mosaic_projector(
8325            cache,
8326            request.geometry,
8327            gridder,
8328            config.phase_center_direction_rad,
8329            group.pointing_direction_rad,
8330            group.primary_beam_model,
8331            group.frequency_hz,
8332            conv_sampling,
8333            2,
8334            true,
8335        )?;
8336        let weight_projector = cached_mosaic_projector(
8337            cache,
8338            request.geometry,
8339            gridder,
8340            config.phase_center_direction_rad,
8341            group.pointing_direction_rad,
8342            group.primary_beam_model,
8343            group.frequency_hz,
8344            conv_sampling,
8345            4,
8346            true,
8347        )?;
8348        let weight_plan = weight_projector
8349            .plan_sample_for_grid(0.0, 0.0)
8350            .ok_or_else(|| {
8351                ImagingError::Normalization(
8352                    "mosaic weight projector failed to plan the centered kernel".to_string(),
8353                )
8354            })?;
8355        pairs.push(Some(MosaicDirtyProjectorPair {
8356            projector,
8357            weight_projector,
8358            weight_plan,
8359        }));
8360        prepared += 1;
8361    }
8362    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled() {
8363        eprintln!(
8364            "mosaic_dirty_projector_pairs groups={} prepared={} cache_entries={} total_ms={:.3}",
8365            groups.len(),
8366            prepared,
8367            cache.len(),
8368            profile::millis(started.map_or(Duration::ZERO, |started| started.elapsed())),
8369        );
8370    }
8371    Ok(pairs)
8372}
8373
8374fn prepare_mosaic_residual_projectors(
8375    request: &ImagingRequest,
8376    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
8377    gridder: &StandardGridder,
8378    groups: &[MosaicPointingGroup],
8379    conv_sampling: usize,
8380    cache: &mut MosaicProjectorCache,
8381) -> Result<Vec<Option<MosaicResidualProjector>>, ImagingError> {
8382    let started = profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled().then(Instant::now);
8383    let mut projectors = Vec::with_capacity(groups.len());
8384    let mut prepared = 0usize;
8385    for group in groups {
8386        if !mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
8387            request.geometry,
8388            config.phase_center_direction_rad,
8389            group.pointing_direction_rad,
8390        ) {
8391            projectors.push(None);
8392            continue;
8393        }
8394        let projector = cached_mosaic_projector(
8395            cache,
8396            request.geometry,
8397            gridder,
8398            config.phase_center_direction_rad,
8399            group.pointing_direction_rad,
8400            group.primary_beam_model,
8401            group.frequency_hz,
8402            conv_sampling,
8403            2,
8404            true,
8405        )?;
8406        projectors.push(Some(MosaicResidualProjector { projector }));
8407        prepared += 1;
8408    }
8409    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled() {
8410        eprintln!(
8411            "mosaic_residual_projectors groups={} prepared={} cache_entries={} total_ms={:.3}",
8412            groups.len(),
8413            prepared,
8414            cache.len(),
8415            profile::millis(started.map_or(Duration::ZERO, |started| started.elapsed())),
8416        );
8417    }
8418    Ok(projectors)
8419}
8420
8421#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
8422fn compute_mosaic_dirty_parallel(
8423    request: &ImagingRequest,
8424    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
8425    gridder: &StandardGridder,
8426    groups: &[MosaicPointingGroup],
8427    conv_sampling: usize,
8428    thread_count: usize,
8429    metal_group_cache: Option<&[Option<MosaicMetalPreparedGroup>]>,
8430    dirty_projectors: Option<&[Option<MosaicDirtyProjectorPair>]>,
8431) -> Result<MosaicDirtyParallelContribution, ImagingError> {
8432    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
8433    let chunk_len = groups.len().div_ceil(thread_count.max(1)).max(1);
8434    let indexed_groups = groups.iter().enumerate().collect::<Vec<_>>();
8435    let started = Instant::now();
8436    let mut worker_results = Vec::new();
8437    let join_started = Instant::now();
8438    thread::scope(|scope| {
8439        let mut handles = Vec::new();
8440        for chunk in indexed_groups.chunks(chunk_len) {
8441            handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
8442                let alloc_started = Instant::now();
8443                let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
8444                let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
8445                let mut weight_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
8446                let alloc_elapsed = alloc_started.elapsed();
8447                let worker_started = Instant::now();
8448                let mut pointing_weight_summaries = Vec::with_capacity(chunk.len());
8449                let mut reported_sumwt = 0.0f64;
8450                let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
8451                let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
8452                let mut skipped_samples = 0usize;
8453                let mut worker_samples = 0usize;
8454                let mut metal_stats = MosaicMetalGridStats::default();
8455                for &(group_index, group) in chunk {
8456                    worker_samples += group.batch.len();
8457                    let prepared_metal = metal_group_cache
8458                        .and_then(|cache| cache.get(group_index))
8459                        .and_then(Option::as_ref);
8460                    let dirty_projector = dirty_projectors
8461                        .and_then(|projectors| projectors.get(group_index))
8462                        .and_then(Option::as_ref);
8463                    if mosaic_initial_dirty_metal_group_eligible(group, prepared_metal)
8464                        && let Some(projectors) = dirty_projector
8465                    {
8466                        let contribution = compute_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution_metal(
8467                            gridder,
8468                            group,
8469                            &projectors.projector,
8470                            &projectors.weight_projector,
8471                            &projectors.weight_plan,
8472                            prepared_metal,
8473                        )?;
8474                        metal_stats.add_assign(contribution.metal_stats);
8475                        add_complex64_grid(&mut psf_grid, &contribution.psf_grid);
8476                        add_complex64_grid(&mut residual_grid, &contribution.residual_grid);
8477                        add_complex64_grid(&mut weight_grid, &contribution.weight_grid);
8478                        pointing_weight_summaries.push(mosaic_pointing_weight_summary_from_contribution(
8479                            group,
8480                            contribution.group_weight_grid_sum,
8481                            contribution.reported_sumwt,
8482                            contribution.normalization_sumwt,
8483                            contribution.gridded_samples,
8484                            contribution.skipped_samples,
8485                        ));
8486                        reported_sumwt += contribution.reported_sumwt;
8487                        normalization_sumwt += contribution.normalization_sumwt;
8488                        gridded_samples += contribution.gridded_samples;
8489                        skipped_samples += contribution.skipped_samples;
8490                        continue;
8491                    }
8492                    if let Some(projectors) = dirty_projector {
8493                        let summary =
8494                            accumulate_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution_grouped_cpu_into_with_projectors(
8495                                group,
8496                                &projectors.projector,
8497                                &projectors.weight_projector,
8498                                &projectors.weight_plan,
8499                                prepared_metal,
8500                                &mut psf_grid,
8501                                &mut residual_grid,
8502                                &mut weight_grid,
8503                            )?;
8504                        reported_sumwt += summary.reported_sumwt;
8505                        pointing_weight_summaries.push(
8506                            mosaic_pointing_weight_summary_from_contribution(
8507                                group,
8508                                summary.group_weight_grid_sum,
8509                                summary.reported_sumwt,
8510                                summary.normalization_sumwt,
8511                                summary.gridded_samples,
8512                                summary.skipped_samples,
8513                            ),
8514                        );
8515                        normalization_sumwt += summary.normalization_sumwt;
8516                        gridded_samples += summary.gridded_samples;
8517                        skipped_samples += summary.skipped_samples;
8518                        continue;
8519                    }
8520                    if !mosaic_initial_dirty_metal_backend_enabled()
8521                        && group.batch.len() >= MOSAIC_CPU_GROUPED_DIRTY_MIN_RAW_SAMPLES
8522                    {
8523                        let summary = accumulate_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution_grouped_cpu_into(
8524                            request,
8525                            config,
8526                            gridder,
8527                            group,
8528                            conv_sampling,
8529                            prepared_metal,
8530                            &mut psf_grid,
8531                            &mut residual_grid,
8532                            &mut weight_grid,
8533                        )?;
8534                        reported_sumwt += summary.reported_sumwt;
8535                        pointing_weight_summaries.push(mosaic_pointing_weight_summary_from_contribution(
8536                            group,
8537                            summary.group_weight_grid_sum,
8538                            summary.reported_sumwt,
8539                            summary.normalization_sumwt,
8540                            summary.gridded_samples,
8541                            summary.skipped_samples,
8542                        ));
8543                        normalization_sumwt += summary.normalization_sumwt;
8544                        gridded_samples += summary.gridded_samples;
8545                        skipped_samples += summary.skipped_samples;
8546                        continue;
8547                    }
8548                    let contribution = compute_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution(
8549                        request,
8550                        config,
8551                        gridder,
8552                        group,
8553                        conv_sampling,
8554                        thread_count,
8555                        prepared_metal,
8556                    )?;
8557                    metal_stats.add_assign(contribution.metal_stats);
8558                    add_complex64_grid(&mut psf_grid, &contribution.psf_grid);
8559                    add_complex64_grid(&mut residual_grid, &contribution.residual_grid);
8560                    add_complex64_grid(&mut weight_grid, &contribution.weight_grid);
8561                    pointing_weight_summaries.push(mosaic_pointing_weight_summary_from_contribution(
8562                        group,
8563                        contribution.group_weight_grid_sum,
8564                        contribution.reported_sumwt,
8565                        contribution.normalization_sumwt,
8566                        contribution.gridded_samples,
8567                        contribution.skipped_samples,
8568                    ));
8569                    reported_sumwt += contribution.reported_sumwt;
8570                    normalization_sumwt += contribution.normalization_sumwt;
8571                    gridded_samples += contribution.gridded_samples;
8572                    skipped_samples += contribution.skipped_samples;
8573                }
8574                Ok::<_, ImagingError>((
8575                    worker_samples,
8576                    alloc_elapsed,
8577                    worker_started.elapsed(),
8578                    psf_grid,
8579                    residual_grid,
8580                    weight_grid,
8581                    pointing_weight_summaries,
8582                    reported_sumwt,
8583                    normalization_sumwt,
8584                    gridded_samples,
8585                    skipped_samples,
8586                    metal_stats,
8587                ))
8588            }));
8589        }
8590        for handle in handles {
8591            worker_results.push(handle.join().expect("mosaic dirty worker panicked")?);
8592        }
8593        Ok::<(), ImagingError>(())
8594    })?;
8595    let join_elapsed = join_started.elapsed();
8596
8597    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
8598    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
8599    let mut weight_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
8600    let mut reported_sumwt = 0.0f64;
8601    let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
8602    let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
8603    let mut skipped_samples = 0usize;
8604    let mut pointing_weight_summaries = Vec::new();
8605    let mut worker_samples = Vec::with_capacity(worker_results.len());
8606    let mut worker_alloc = Vec::with_capacity(worker_results.len());
8607    let mut worker_compute = Vec::with_capacity(worker_results.len());
8608    let mut metal_stats = MosaicMetalGridStats::default();
8609    let merge_started = Instant::now();
8610    for (
8611        samples,
8612        alloc,
8613        compute,
8614        local_psf_grid,
8615        local_residual_grid,
8616        local_weight_grid,
8617        local_pointing_weight_summaries,
8618        local_reported_sumwt,
8619        local_normalization_sumwt,
8620        local_gridded_samples,
8621        local_skipped_samples,
8622        local_metal_stats,
8623    ) in worker_results
8624    {
8625        add_complex64_grid(&mut psf_grid, &local_psf_grid);
8626        add_complex64_grid(&mut residual_grid, &local_residual_grid);
8627        add_complex64_grid(&mut weight_grid, &local_weight_grid);
8628        pointing_weight_summaries.extend(local_pointing_weight_summaries);
8629        reported_sumwt += local_reported_sumwt;
8630        normalization_sumwt += local_normalization_sumwt;
8631        gridded_samples += local_gridded_samples;
8632        skipped_samples += local_skipped_samples;
8633        worker_samples.push(samples);
8634        worker_alloc.push(alloc);
8635        worker_compute.push(compute);
8636        metal_stats.add_assign(local_metal_stats);
8637    }
8638    let merge_elapsed = merge_started.elapsed();
8639    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled() {
8640        let total_worker_samples = worker_samples.iter().sum::<usize>();
8641        let grouped_samples = groups.iter().map(|group| group.batch.len()).sum::<usize>();
8642        let metal_cache_prepared_groups = metal_group_cache
8643            .map(|cache| cache.iter().filter(|group| group.is_some()).count())
8644            .unwrap_or(0);
8645        let metal_cache_prepared_ge_threshold = metal_group_cache
8646            .map(|cache| {
8647                cache
8648                    .iter()
8649                    .filter_map(|group| group.as_ref())
8650                    .filter(|group| {
8651                        group.samples.len() >= MOSAIC_METAL_INITIAL_DIRTY_MIN_PREPARED_SAMPLES
8652                    })
8653                    .count()
8654            })
8655            .unwrap_or(0);
8656        let metal_cache_prepared_below_threshold =
8657            metal_cache_prepared_groups.saturating_sub(metal_cache_prepared_ge_threshold);
8658        let metal_groups_missing_prepared =
8659            groups.len().saturating_sub(metal_cache_prepared_groups);
8660        eprintln!(
8661            "mosaic_dirty_parallel groups={} grouped_samples={} total_worker_samples={} requested_threads={} chunk_len={} partition=group-contiguous actual_threads={} worker_samples={:?} worker_alloc_ms={:?} worker_ms={:?} metal_backend_enabled={} metal_cache_present={} metal_cache_prepared_groups={} metal_cache_prepared_ge_threshold={} metal_cache_prepared_below_threshold={} metal_groups_missing_prepared={} metal_threshold_prepared_samples={} metal_calls={} metal_dirty_calls={} metal_residual_calls={} metal_samples={} metal_kernel_pack_ms={:.3} metal_device_queue_ms={:.3} metal_shader_compile_ms={:.3} metal_pipeline_ms={:.3} metal_buffer_alloc_ms={:.3} metal_model_pack_ms={:.3} metal_zero_outputs_ms={:.3} metal_encode_ms={:.3} metal_dispatch_wait_ms={:.3} metal_reduce_wait_ms={:.3} metal_readback_ms={:.3} metal_total_ms={:.3} join_ms={:.3} merge_ms={:.3} total_ms={:.3}",
8662            groups.len(),
8663            grouped_samples,
8664            total_worker_samples,
8665            thread_count,
8666            chunk_len,
8667            worker_samples.len(),
8668            worker_samples,
8669            worker_alloc
8670                .iter()
8671                .map(|elapsed| profile::millis(*elapsed))
8672                .collect::<Vec<_>>(),
8673            worker_compute
8674                .iter()
8675                .map(|elapsed| profile::millis(*elapsed))
8676                .collect::<Vec<_>>(),
8677            mosaic_initial_dirty_metal_backend_enabled(),
8678            metal_group_cache.is_some(),
8679            metal_cache_prepared_groups,
8680            metal_cache_prepared_ge_threshold,
8681            metal_cache_prepared_below_threshold,
8682            metal_groups_missing_prepared,
8683            MOSAIC_METAL_INITIAL_DIRTY_MIN_PREPARED_SAMPLES,
8684            metal_stats.calls,
8685            metal_stats.dirty_calls,
8686            metal_stats.residual_calls,
8687            metal_stats.samples,
8688            profile::millis(metal_stats.kernel_pack),
8689            profile::millis(metal_stats.device_queue),
8690            profile::millis(metal_stats.shader_compile),
8691            profile::millis(metal_stats.pipeline),
8692            profile::millis(metal_stats.buffer_alloc),
8693            profile::millis(metal_stats.model_pack),
8694            profile::millis(metal_stats.zero_outputs),
8695            profile::millis(metal_stats.encode),
8696            profile::millis(metal_stats.dispatch_wait),
8697            profile::millis(metal_stats.reduce_wait),
8698            profile::millis(metal_stats.readback),
8699            profile::millis(metal_stats.total),
8700            profile::millis(join_elapsed),
8701            profile::millis(merge_elapsed),
8702            profile::millis(started.elapsed()),
8703        );
8704    }
8705
8706    Ok(MosaicDirtyParallelContribution {
8707        psf_grid,
8708        residual_grid,
8709        weight_grid,
8710        pointing_weight_summaries,
8711        reported_sumwt,
8712        normalization_sumwt,
8713        gridded_samples,
8714        skipped_samples,
8715        elapsed: started.elapsed(),
8716        worker_samples,
8717        worker_alloc,
8718        worker_compute,
8719        join_elapsed,
8720        merge_elapsed,
8721    })
8722}
8723
8724#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug, PartialEq, Eq)]
8725enum MosaicDirtyGroupBackend {
8726    Metal,
8727    GroupedCpu,
8728    SampleRanges { thread_count: usize },
8729    Scalar,
8730}
8731
8732struct MosaicDirtyGroupStrategy<'a> {
8733    projector: &'a ScreenProjector,
8734    weight_projector: &'a ScreenProjector,
8735    weight_plan: &'a ScreenProjectSamplePlan,
8736    prepared_metal: Option<&'a MosaicMetalPreparedGroup>,
8737    backend: MosaicDirtyGroupBackend,
8738}
8739
8740fn select_mosaic_dirty_group_backend(
8741    group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
8742    prepared_metal: Option<&MosaicMetalPreparedGroup>,
8743    actual_threads: usize,
8744) -> MosaicDirtyGroupBackend {
8745    if mosaic_initial_dirty_metal_group_eligible(group, prepared_metal) {
8746        MosaicDirtyGroupBackend::Metal
8747    } else if group.batch.len() >= MOSAIC_CPU_GROUPED_DIRTY_MIN_RAW_SAMPLES {
8748        MosaicDirtyGroupBackend::GroupedCpu
8749    } else if actual_threads > 1 {
8750        MosaicDirtyGroupBackend::SampleRanges {
8751            thread_count: actual_threads,
8752        }
8753    } else {
8754        MosaicDirtyGroupBackend::Scalar
8755    }
8756}
8757
8758fn compute_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution_with_strategy(
8759    gridder: &StandardGridder,
8760    group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
8761    strategy: MosaicDirtyGroupStrategy<'_>,
8762) -> Result<MosaicDirtyGroupContribution, ImagingError> {
8763    match strategy.backend {
8764        MosaicDirtyGroupBackend::Metal => compute_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution_metal(
8765            gridder,
8766            group,
8767            strategy.projector,
8768            strategy.weight_projector,
8769            strategy.weight_plan,
8770            strategy.prepared_metal,
8771        ),
8772        MosaicDirtyGroupBackend::GroupedCpu => compute_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution_grouped_cpu(
8773            gridder,
8774            group,
8775            strategy.projector,
8776            strategy.weight_projector,
8777            strategy.weight_plan,
8778            strategy.prepared_metal,
8779        ),
8780        MosaicDirtyGroupBackend::SampleRanges { thread_count } => {
8781            compute_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution_sample_ranges(
8782                gridder,
8783                group,
8784                strategy.projector,
8785                strategy.weight_projector,
8786                strategy.weight_plan,
8787                thread_count,
8788            )
8789        }
8790        MosaicDirtyGroupBackend::Scalar => compute_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution_scalar(
8791            gridder,
8792            group,
8793            strategy.projector,
8794            strategy.weight_projector,
8795            strategy.weight_plan,
8796        ),
8797    }
8798}
8799
8800fn compute_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution(
8801    request: &ImagingRequest,
8802    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
8803    gridder: &StandardGridder,
8804    group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
8805    conv_sampling: usize,
8806    thread_count: usize,
8807    prepared_metal: Option<&MosaicMetalPreparedGroup>,
8808) -> Result<MosaicDirtyGroupContribution, ImagingError> {
8809    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
8810    let psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
8811    let residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
8812    let weight_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
8813    if !mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
8814        request.geometry,
8815        config.phase_center_direction_rad,
8816        group.pointing_direction_rad,
8817    ) {
8818        return Ok(MosaicDirtyGroupContribution {
8819            psf_grid,
8820            residual_grid,
8821            weight_grid,
8822            metal_stats: MosaicMetalGridStats::default(),
8823            group_weight_grid_sum: 0.0,
8824            reported_sumwt: 0.0,
8825            normalization_sumwt: 0.0,
8826            gridded_samples: 0,
8827            skipped_samples: group.batch.len(),
8828        });
8829    }
8830    let projector = build_mosaic_projector(
8831        request.geometry,
8832        gridder,
8833        config.phase_center_direction_rad,
8834        group.pointing_direction_rad,
8835        group.primary_beam_model,
8836        group.frequency_hz,
8837        conv_sampling,
8838        2,
8839        true,
8840    )?;
8841    let weight_projector = build_mosaic_projector(
8842        request.geometry,
8843        gridder,
8844        config.phase_center_direction_rad,
8845        group.pointing_direction_rad,
8846        group.primary_beam_model,
8847        group.frequency_hz,
8848        conv_sampling,
8849        4,
8850        true,
8851    )?;
8852    let weight_plan = weight_projector
8853        .plan_sample_for_grid(0.0, 0.0)
8854        .ok_or_else(|| {
8855            ImagingError::Normalization(
8856                "mosaic weight projector failed to plan the centered kernel".to_string(),
8857            )
8858        })?;
8859    let actual_threads = mosaic_parallel_thread_count(group.batch.len()).min(thread_count);
8860    let backend = select_mosaic_dirty_group_backend(group, prepared_metal, actual_threads);
8861    compute_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution_with_strategy(
8862        gridder,
8863        group,
8864        MosaicDirtyGroupStrategy {
8865            projector: &projector,
8866            weight_projector: &weight_projector,
8867            weight_plan: &weight_plan,
8868            prepared_metal,
8869            backend,
8870        },
8871    )
8872}
8873
8874fn compute_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution_scalar(
8875    gridder: &StandardGridder,
8876    group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
8877    projector: &ScreenProjector,
8878    weight_projector: &ScreenProjector,
8879    weight_plan: &ScreenProjectSamplePlan,
8880) -> Result<MosaicDirtyGroupContribution, ImagingError> {
8881    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
8882    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
8883    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
8884    let mut weight_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
8885    let mut reported_sumwt = 0.0f64;
8886    let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
8887    let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
8888    let mut skipped_samples = 0usize;
8889    let mut weight_support_sums = MosaicWeightGridAccumulator::new(weight_projector);
8890    for sample_index in 0..group.batch.len() {
8891        if !group.batch.gridable[sample_index] {
8892            skipped_samples += 1;
8893            continue;
8894        }
8895        let weight = group.batch.weight[sample_index];
8896        let sumwt_factor = group.batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index];
8897        let visibility = group.batch.visibility[sample_index];
8898        if !(weight.is_finite()
8899            && weight > 0.0
8900            && sumwt_factor.is_finite()
8901            && sumwt_factor > 0.0
8902            && visibility.re.is_finite()
8903            && visibility.im.is_finite())
8904        {
8905            skipped_samples += 1;
8906            continue;
8907        }
8908        let grid_weight = weight * sumwt_factor;
8909        let Some(plan) = projector.plan_sample_for_grid(
8910            group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
8911            group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
8912        ) else {
8913            skipped_samples += 1;
8914            continue;
8915        };
8916        let grid_weight64 = f64::from(grid_weight);
8917        projector.grid_sample_planned_f64(&mut psf_grid, &plan, Complex64::new(grid_weight64, 0.0));
8918        projector.grid_sample_planned_f64(
8919            &mut residual_grid,
8920            &plan,
8921            Complex64::new(visibility.re as f64, visibility.im as f64) * grid_weight64,
8922        );
8923        add_mosaic_weight_support_sample(
8924            &mut weight_support_sums,
8925            weight_projector,
8926            group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
8927            group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
8928            grid_weight64,
8929        );
8930        if plan.center_in_bounds {
8931            normalization_sumwt += grid_weight64;
8932            reported_sumwt += mosaic_reported_sumwt_from_grid_weight(grid_weight, sumwt_factor);
8933        }
8934        gridded_samples += 1;
8935    }
8936    let support_sums = weight_support_sums.support_sums();
8937    dump_mosaic_weight_support_sums(group, projector.support(), gridded_samples, &support_sums);
8938    let cell_trace_targets = mosaic_cell_trace_targets();
8939    trace_mosaic_weight_support_contributions(
8940        group,
8941        weight_projector,
8942        weight_plan,
8943        &support_sums,
8944        &cell_trace_targets,
8945    );
8946    add_mosaic_center_weight_grid_from_support_sums(
8947        weight_projector,
8948        weight_plan,
8949        &mut weight_grid,
8950        &support_sums,
8951    );
8952    Ok(MosaicDirtyGroupContribution {
8953        psf_grid,
8954        residual_grid,
8955        weight_grid,
8956        metal_stats: MosaicMetalGridStats::default(),
8957        group_weight_grid_sum: weight_support_sums.total_weight_sum,
8958        reported_sumwt,
8959        normalization_sumwt,
8960        gridded_samples,
8961        skipped_samples,
8962    })
8963}
8964
8965fn mosaic_grouped_sample_plan(sample: MosaicMetalSample) -> ScreenProjectSamplePlan {
8966    let loc_x = isize::try_from(sample.loc & 0xffff).expect("u16 x fits in isize");
8967    let loc_y = isize::try_from(sample.loc >> 16).expect("u16 y fits in isize");
8968    ScreenProjectSamplePlan {
8969        loc_x,
8970        loc_y,
8971        off_x: sample.offset[0] as isize,
8972        off_y: sample.offset[1] as isize,
8973        min_ix: sample.range_x[0] as isize,
8974        max_ix: sample.range_x[1] as isize,
8975        min_iy: sample.range_y[0] as isize,
8976        max_iy: sample.range_y[1] as isize,
8977        center_in_bounds: true,
8978        normalization: 0.0,
8979    }
8980}
8981
8982fn accumulate_mosaic_grouped_dirty_cpu(
8983    projector: &ScreenProjector,
8984    samples: &[MosaicMetalSample],
8985    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
8986    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
8987) {
8988    for sample in samples {
8989        let plan = mosaic_grouped_sample_plan(*sample);
8990        let weight = f64::from(sample.weight);
8991        projector.grid_sample_planned_f64(psf_grid, &plan, Complex64::new(weight, 0.0));
8992        projector.grid_sample_planned_f64(
8993            residual_grid,
8994            &plan,
8995            Complex64::new(sample.visibility_re as f64, sample.visibility_im as f64) * weight,
8996        );
8997    }
8998}
8999
9000fn accumulate_mosaic_grouped_residual_cpu(
9001    projector: &ScreenProjector,
9002    samples: &[MosaicMetalSample],
9003    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
9004    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
9005) {
9006    for sample in samples {
9007        let plan = mosaic_grouped_sample_plan(*sample);
9008        let predicted = model_grid
9009            .map(|grid| projector.degrid_sample_planned(grid, &plan))
9010            .unwrap_or_else(|| Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0));
9011        let residual_visibility =
9012            Complex32::new(sample.visibility_re, sample.visibility_im) - predicted;
9013        let weight = f64::from(sample.weight);
9014        projector.grid_sample_planned_f64(
9015            residual_grid,
9016            &plan,
9017            Complex64::new(residual_visibility.re as f64, residual_visibility.im as f64) * weight,
9018        );
9019    }
9020}
9021
9022fn mosaic_metal_sample_from_plan(
9023    plan: &ScreenProjectSamplePlan,
9024    support: usize,
9025    weight: f32,
9026    visibility: Complex32,
9027) -> Result<MosaicMetalSample, ImagingError> {
9028    let loc_x = u16::try_from(plan.loc_x).map_err(|_| {
9029        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal sample x coordinate exceeds u16".to_string())
9030    })?;
9031    let loc_y = u16::try_from(plan.loc_y).map_err(|_| {
9032        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal sample y coordinate exceeds u16".to_string())
9033    })?;
9034    Ok(MosaicMetalSample {
9035        loc: u32::from(loc_x) | (u32::from(loc_y) << 16),
9036        support: u32::try_from(support).map_err(|_| {
9037            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal support exceeds u32".to_string())
9038        })?,
9039        offset: [
9040            i32::try_from(plan.off_x).map_err(|_| {
9041                ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
9042                    "mosaic Metal x subpixel offset exceeds i32".to_string(),
9043                )
9044            })?,
9045            i32::try_from(plan.off_y).map_err(|_| {
9046                ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
9047                    "mosaic Metal y subpixel offset exceeds i32".to_string(),
9048                )
9049            })?,
9050        ],
9051        range_x: [
9052            i32::try_from(plan.min_ix).map_err(|_| {
9053                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal min x tap exceeds i32".to_string())
9054            })?,
9055            i32::try_from(plan.max_ix).map_err(|_| {
9056                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal max x tap exceeds i32".to_string())
9057            })?,
9058        ],
9059        range_y: [
9060            i32::try_from(plan.min_iy).map_err(|_| {
9061                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal min y tap exceeds i32".to_string())
9062            })?,
9063            i32::try_from(plan.max_iy).map_err(|_| {
9064                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal max y tap exceeds i32".to_string())
9065            })?,
9066        ],
9067        weight,
9068        visibility_re: visibility.re,
9069        visibility_im: visibility.im,
9070        kernel_base: 0,
9071    })
9072}
9073
9074fn complex32_grid_to_complex64(source: &Array2<Complex32>) -> Array2<Complex64> {
9075    source.mapv(|value| Complex64::new(value.re as f64, value.im as f64))
9076}
9077
9078#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
9079fn collect_mosaic_metal_samples(
9080    group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
9081    projector: &ScreenProjector,
9082    weight_projector: Option<&ScreenProjector>,
9083) -> Result<MosaicMetalPreparedGroup, ImagingError> {
9084    let started = Instant::now();
9085    let mut samples = MosaicMetalSampleHashMap::with_capacity_and_hasher(
9086        group.batch.len().min(1_048_576),
9087        BuildHasherDefault::<MosaicMetalSampleHasher>::default(),
9088    );
9089    let mut weight_support_sums = weight_projector.map(MosaicWeightGridAccumulator::new);
9090    let mut reported_sumwt = 0.0f64;
9091    let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
9092    let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
9093    let mut skipped_samples = 0usize;
9094    let trace_enabled = mosaic_trace_enabled();
9095    let mut center_samples = 0usize;
9096    if trace_enabled {
9097        let weight_kernel_sum = weight_projector
9098            .map(|projector| projector.normalization_sum())
9099            .unwrap_or_else(|| Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0));
9100        let weight_zero_plan =
9101            weight_projector.and_then(|weight_projector| weight_projector.plan_sample(0.0, 0.0));
9102        let (weight_zero_tap_sum, weight_zero_center_tap, weight_zero_first_tap) = weight_projector
9103            .zip(weight_zero_plan.as_ref())
9104            .and_then(|(weight_projector, weight_zero_plan)| {
9105                weight_projector.trace_sample_taps(weight_zero_plan)
9106            })
9107            .unwrap_or((
9108                Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0),
9109                Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0),
9110                Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0),
9111            ));
9112        let weight_zero_tap_matrix_json = weight_projector
9113            .zip(weight_zero_plan.as_ref())
9114            .and_then(|(weight_projector, weight_zero_plan)| {
9115                weight_projector.trace_sample_tap_matrix(weight_zero_plan)
9116            })
9117            .map(|taps| {
9118                taps.into_iter()
9119                    .map(|(ix, iy, tap)| format!("[{ix},{iy},{:.17e},{:.17e}]", tap.re, tap.im))
9120                    .collect::<Vec<_>>()
9121                    .join(",")
9122            })
9123            .unwrap_or_default();
9124        append_mosaic_trace(format!(
9125            "{{\"event\":\"group\",\"pointing_ra\":{:.17e},\"pointing_dec\":{:.17e},\"freq_hz\":{:.17e},\"support\":{},\"sampling\":{},\"samples\":{},\"imaging_kernel_sum_re\":{:.17e},\"imaging_kernel_sum_im\":{:.17e},\"weight_kernel_sum_re\":{:.17e},\"weight_kernel_sum_im\":{:.17e},\"weight_zero_loc\":[{},{}],\"weight_zero_off\":[{},{}],\"weight_zero_normalization\":{:.17e},\"weight_zero_tap_sum\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"weight_zero_center_tap\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"weight_zero_first_tap\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"weight_zero_taps\":[{}],\"path\":\"metal_collect\"}}",
9126            group.pointing_direction_rad[0],
9127            group.pointing_direction_rad[1],
9128            group.frequency_hz,
9129            projector.support(),
9130            projector.sampling(),
9131            group.batch.len(),
9132            projector.normalization_sum().re,
9133            projector.normalization_sum().im,
9134            weight_kernel_sum.re,
9135            weight_kernel_sum.im,
9136            weight_zero_plan.as_ref().map_or(0, |plan| plan.loc_x),
9137            weight_zero_plan.as_ref().map_or(0, |plan| plan.loc_y),
9138            weight_zero_plan.as_ref().map_or(0, |plan| plan.off_x),
9139            weight_zero_plan.as_ref().map_or(0, |plan| plan.off_y),
9140            weight_zero_plan
9141                .as_ref()
9142                .map_or(0.0, |plan| plan.normalization),
9143            weight_zero_tap_sum.re,
9144            weight_zero_tap_sum.im,
9145            weight_zero_center_tap.re,
9146            weight_zero_center_tap.im,
9147            weight_zero_first_tap.re,
9148            weight_zero_first_tap.im,
9149            weight_zero_tap_matrix_json,
9150        ));
9151    }
9152    let mut logged_first_sample = !trace_enabled;
9153    for sample_index in 0..group.batch.len() {
9154        if !group.batch.gridable[sample_index] {
9155            skipped_samples += 1;
9156            continue;
9157        }
9158        let weight = group.batch.weight[sample_index];
9159        let sumwt_factor = group.batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index];
9160        let visibility = group.batch.visibility[sample_index];
9161        if !(weight.is_finite()
9162            && weight > 0.0
9163            && sumwt_factor.is_finite()
9164            && sumwt_factor > 0.0
9165            && visibility.re.is_finite()
9166            && visibility.im.is_finite())
9167        {
9168            skipped_samples += 1;
9169            continue;
9170        }
9171        let grid_weight = weight * sumwt_factor;
9172        let plan = if trace_enabled {
9173            projector.plan_sample(
9174                group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
9175                group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
9176            )
9177        } else {
9178            projector.plan_sample_for_grid(
9179                group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
9180                group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
9181            )
9182        };
9183        let Some(plan) = plan else {
9184            skipped_samples += 1;
9185            continue;
9186        };
9187        if !logged_first_sample {
9188            let weight_plan = weight_projector.and_then(|weight_projector| {
9189                weight_projector.plan_sample(
9190                    group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
9191                    group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
9192                )
9193            });
9194            let (tap_sum, center_tap, first_tap) = projector.trace_sample_taps(&plan).unwrap_or((
9195                Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0),
9196                Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0),
9197                Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0),
9198            ));
9199            let (weight_tap_sum, weight_center_tap, weight_first_tap) = weight_projector
9200                .zip(weight_plan.as_ref())
9201                .and_then(|(weight_projector, weight_plan)| {
9202                    weight_projector.trace_sample_taps(weight_plan)
9203                })
9204                .unwrap_or((
9205                    Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0),
9206                    Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0),
9207                    Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0),
9208                ));
9209            let tap_matrix_json = projector
9210                .trace_sample_tap_matrix(&plan)
9211                .map(|taps| {
9212                    taps.into_iter()
9213                        .map(|(ix, iy, tap)| format!("[{ix},{iy},{:.17e},{:.17e}]", tap.re, tap.im))
9214                        .collect::<Vec<_>>()
9215                        .join(",")
9216                })
9217                .unwrap_or_default();
9218            let weight_tap_matrix_json = weight_projector
9219                .zip(weight_plan.as_ref())
9220                .and_then(|(weight_projector, weight_plan)| {
9221                    weight_projector.trace_sample_tap_matrix(weight_plan)
9222                })
9223                .map(|taps| {
9224                    taps.into_iter()
9225                        .map(|(ix, iy, tap)| format!("[{ix},{iy},{:.17e},{:.17e}]", tap.re, tap.im))
9226                        .collect::<Vec<_>>()
9227                        .join(",")
9228                })
9229                .unwrap_or_default();
9230            append_mosaic_trace(format!(
9231                "{{\"event\":\"sample\",\"pointing_ra\":{:.17e},\"pointing_dec\":{:.17e},\"freq_hz\":{:.17e},\"sample_index\":{},\"u_lambda\":{:.17e},\"v_lambda\":{:.17e},\"w_lambda\":{:.17e},\"loc\":[{},{}],\"off\":[{},{}],\"normalization\":{:.17e},\"tap_sum\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"center_tap\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"first_tap\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"taps\":[{}],\"weight_loc\":[{},{}],\"weight_off\":[{},{}],\"weight_normalization\":{:.17e},\"weight_tap_sum\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"weight_center_tap\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"weight_first_tap\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"weight_taps\":[{}],\"visibility\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"weight\":{:.17e},\"sumwt_factor\":{:.17e},\"grid_weight\":{:.17e},\"path\":\"metal_collect\"}}",
9232                group.pointing_direction_rad[0],
9233                group.pointing_direction_rad[1],
9234                group.frequency_hz,
9235                sample_index,
9236                group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
9237                group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
9238                group.batch.w_lambda[sample_index],
9239                plan.loc_x,
9240                plan.loc_y,
9241                plan.off_x,
9242                plan.off_y,
9243                plan.normalization,
9244                tap_sum.re,
9245                tap_sum.im,
9246                center_tap.re,
9247                center_tap.im,
9248                first_tap.re,
9249                first_tap.im,
9250                tap_matrix_json,
9251                weight_plan.as_ref().map_or(0, |plan| plan.loc_x),
9252                weight_plan.as_ref().map_or(0, |plan| plan.loc_y),
9253                weight_plan.as_ref().map_or(0, |plan| plan.off_x),
9254                weight_plan.as_ref().map_or(0, |plan| plan.off_y),
9255                weight_plan.as_ref().map_or(0.0, |plan| plan.normalization),
9256                weight_tap_sum.re,
9257                weight_tap_sum.im,
9258                weight_center_tap.re,
9259                weight_center_tap.im,
9260                weight_first_tap.re,
9261                weight_first_tap.im,
9262                weight_tap_matrix_json,
9263                visibility.re,
9264                visibility.im,
9265                weight,
9266                sumwt_factor,
9267                grid_weight,
9268            ));
9269            logged_first_sample = true;
9270        }
9271        let sample =
9272            mosaic_metal_sample_from_plan(&plan, projector.support(), grid_weight, visibility)?;
9273        push_mosaic_metal_sample_aggregate(&mut samples, sample);
9274        let grid_weight64 = f64::from(grid_weight);
9275        if let (Some(accumulator), Some(weight_projector)) =
9276            (weight_support_sums.as_mut(), weight_projector)
9277        {
9278            add_mosaic_weight_support_sample(
9279                accumulator,
9280                weight_projector,
9281                group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
9282                group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
9283                grid_weight64,
9284            );
9285        }
9286        if plan.center_in_bounds {
9287            normalization_sumwt += grid_weight64;
9288            reported_sumwt += mosaic_reported_sumwt_from_grid_weight(grid_weight, sumwt_factor);
9289            center_samples += 1;
9290        }
9291        gridded_samples += 1;
9292    }
9293    if trace_enabled {
9294        append_mosaic_trace(format!(
9295            "{{\"event\":\"group_aggregate\",\"pointing_ra\":{:.17e},\"pointing_dec\":{:.17e},\"freq_hz\":{:.17e},\"samples\":{},\"center_samples\":{},\"grid_weight_sum\":{:.17e},\"path\":\"metal_collect\"}}",
9296            group.pointing_direction_rad[0],
9297            group.pointing_direction_rad[1],
9298            group.frequency_hz,
9299            gridded_samples,
9300            center_samples,
9301            reported_sumwt,
9302        ));
9303    }
9304    let finalize_started = Instant::now();
9305    let samples = finish_mosaic_metal_sample_aggregates(samples);
9306    let weight_support_sums = weight_support_sums
9307        .map(|accumulator| accumulator.support_sums())
9308        .unwrap_or_default();
9309    dump_mosaic_weight_support_sums(
9310        group,
9311        projector.support(),
9312        gridded_samples,
9313        &weight_support_sums,
9314    );
9315    let group_weight_grid_sum = weight_support_sums
9316        .iter()
9317        .map(|support_sum| support_sum.weight)
9318        .sum::<f64>();
9319    let full_weight_grid_sum = weight_projector
9320        .map(|weight_projector| {
9321            let support = weight_projector.support() as i32;
9322            weight_support_sums
9323                .iter()
9324                .filter(|support_sum| {
9325                    support_sum.key.min_ix == -support
9326                        && support_sum.key.max_ix == support
9327                        && support_sum.key.min_iy == -support
9328                        && support_sum.key.max_iy == support
9329                })
9330                .map(|support_sum| support_sum.weight)
9331                .sum::<f64>()
9332        })
9333        .unwrap_or(0.0);
9334    let cropped_weight_grid_sum = group_weight_grid_sum - full_weight_grid_sum;
9335    let finalize_elapsed = finalize_started.elapsed();
9336    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled() {
9337        let (weight_zero_offset_tap_sum, weight_center_tap) = weight_projector
9338            .and_then(|weight_projector| {
9339                let plan = weight_projector.plan_sample_for_grid(0.0, 0.0)?;
9340                let (sum, center, _) = weight_projector.trace_sample_taps(&plan)?;
9341                Some((sum, center))
9342            })
9343            .unwrap_or((Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0), Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0)));
9344        let grouped_sample_ratio = if gridded_samples == 0 {
9345            0.0
9346        } else {
9347            samples.len() as f64 / gridded_samples as f64
9348        };
9349        eprintln!(
9350            "mosaic_metal_prepare pointing_ra={:.12e} pointing_dec={:.12e} frequency_hz={:.9e} raw_samples={} grouped_samples={} grouped_sample_ratio={:.6} gridded_samples={} skipped={} group_weight_sum={:.12e} full_weight_sum={:.12e} cropped_weight_sum={:.12e} weight_support_ranges={} weight_zero_offset_tap_sum=[{:.12e},{:.12e}] weight_center_tap=[{:.12e},{:.12e}] reported_sumwt={:.12e} normalization_sumwt={:.12e} support={} compact_tap_width={} grouping_ms={:.3} total_ms={:.3}",
9351            group.pointing_direction_rad[0],
9352            group.pointing_direction_rad[1],
9353            group.frequency_hz,
9354            gridded_samples,
9355            samples.len(),
9356            grouped_sample_ratio,
9357            gridded_samples,
9358            skipped_samples,
9359            group_weight_grid_sum,
9360            full_weight_grid_sum,
9361            cropped_weight_grid_sum,
9362            weight_support_sums.len(),
9363            weight_zero_offset_tap_sum.re,
9364            weight_zero_offset_tap_sum.im,
9365            weight_center_tap.re,
9366            weight_center_tap.im,
9367            reported_sumwt,
9368            normalization_sumwt,
9369            projector.support(),
9370            projector.support() * 2 + 1,
9371            profile::millis(finalize_elapsed),
9372            profile::millis(started.elapsed()),
9373        );
9374    }
9375    Ok(MosaicMetalPreparedGroup {
9376        samples,
9377        weight_support_sums,
9378        group_weight_grid_sum,
9379        reported_sumwt,
9380        normalization_sumwt,
9381        gridded_samples,
9382        skipped_samples,
9383    })
9384}
9385
9386fn prepare_mosaic_metal_group_cache(
9387    request: &ImagingRequest,
9388    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
9389    gridder: &StandardGridder,
9390    groups: &[MosaicPointingGroup],
9391    conv_sampling: usize,
9392    thread_count: usize,
9393) -> Result<Vec<Option<MosaicMetalPreparedGroup>>, ImagingError> {
9394    let started = Instant::now();
9395    let chunk_len = groups.len().div_ceil(thread_count.max(1));
9396    let indexed_groups = groups.iter().enumerate().collect::<Vec<_>>();
9397    let mut worker_results = Vec::<Vec<(usize, Option<MosaicMetalPreparedGroup>)>>::new();
9398    thread::scope(|scope| {
9399        let mut handles = Vec::new();
9400        for chunk in indexed_groups.chunks(chunk_len) {
9401            handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
9402                let mut prepared = Vec::with_capacity(chunk.len());
9403                for &(group_index, group) in chunk {
9404                    if !mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
9405                        request.geometry,
9406                        config.phase_center_direction_rad,
9407                        group.pointing_direction_rad,
9408                    ) {
9409                        prepared.push((group_index, None));
9410                        continue;
9411                    }
9412                    let projector = build_mosaic_projector(
9413                        request.geometry,
9414                        gridder,
9415                        config.phase_center_direction_rad,
9416                        group.pointing_direction_rad,
9417                        group.primary_beam_model,
9418                        group.frequency_hz,
9419                        conv_sampling,
9420                        2,
9421                        true,
9422                    )?;
9423                    let weight_projector = build_mosaic_projector(
9424                        request.geometry,
9425                        gridder,
9426                        config.phase_center_direction_rad,
9427                        group.pointing_direction_rad,
9428                        group.primary_beam_model,
9429                        group.frequency_hz,
9430                        conv_sampling,
9431                        4,
9432                        true,
9433                    )?;
9434                    prepared.push((
9435                        group_index,
9436                        Some(collect_mosaic_metal_samples(
9437                            group,
9438                            &projector,
9439                            Some(&weight_projector),
9440                        )?),
9441                    ));
9442                }
9443                Ok::<_, ImagingError>(prepared)
9444            }));
9445        }
9446        for handle in handles {
9447            worker_results.push(handle.join().map_err(|_| {
9448                ImagingError::Unsupported("mosaic Metal cache worker panicked".to_string())
9449            })??);
9450        }
9451        Ok::<(), ImagingError>(())
9452    })?;
9453
9454    let mut cache = (0..groups.len()).map(|_| None).collect::<Vec<_>>();
9455    for worker in worker_results {
9456        for (group_index, prepared) in worker {
9457            cache[group_index] = prepared;
9458        }
9459    }
9460    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled() {
9461        let prepared_groups = cache.iter().filter(|group| group.is_some()).count();
9462        let grouped_samples = cache
9463            .iter()
9464            .filter_map(|group| group.as_ref())
9465            .map(|group| group.samples.len())
9466            .sum::<usize>();
9467        let gridded_samples = cache
9468            .iter()
9469            .filter_map(|group| group.as_ref())
9470            .map(|group| group.gridded_samples)
9471            .sum::<usize>();
9472        eprintln!(
9473            "mosaic_metal_cache_prepare groups={} prepared_groups={} gridded_samples={} grouped_samples={} grouped_sample_ratio={:.6} total_ms={:.3}",
9474            groups.len(),
9475            prepared_groups,
9476            gridded_samples,
9477            grouped_samples,
9478            if gridded_samples == 0 {
9479                0.0
9480            } else {
9481                grouped_samples as f64 / gridded_samples as f64
9482            },
9483            profile::millis(started.elapsed()),
9484        );
9485    }
9486    Ok(cache)
9487}
9488
9489fn compute_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution_metal(
9490    gridder: &StandardGridder,
9491    group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
9492    projector: &ScreenProjector,
9493    weight_projector: &ScreenProjector,
9494    weight_plan: &ScreenProjectSamplePlan,
9495    prepared_group: Option<&MosaicMetalPreparedGroup>,
9496) -> Result<MosaicDirtyGroupContribution, ImagingError> {
9497    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
9498    let collected_prepared;
9499    let prepared = match prepared_group {
9500        Some(prepared) => prepared,
9501        None => {
9502            collected_prepared =
9503                collect_mosaic_metal_samples(group, projector, Some(weight_projector))?;
9504            &collected_prepared
9505        }
9506    };
9507    if prepared.samples.is_empty() {
9508        return Ok(MosaicDirtyGroupContribution {
9509            psf_grid: Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny)),
9510            residual_grid: Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny)),
9511            weight_grid: Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny)),
9512            metal_stats: MosaicMetalGridStats::default(),
9513            group_weight_grid_sum: prepared.group_weight_grid_sum,
9514            reported_sumwt: prepared.reported_sumwt,
9515            normalization_sumwt: prepared.normalization_sumwt,
9516            gridded_samples: prepared.gridded_samples,
9517            skipped_samples: prepared.skipped_samples,
9518        });
9519    }
9520    let mut psf_grid32 = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
9521    let mut residual_grid32 = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
9522    let metal_stats = accumulate_mosaic_grid_metal_samples(
9523        projector,
9524        &prepared.samples,
9525        None,
9526        &mut psf_grid32,
9527        &mut residual_grid32,
9528        MOSAIC_METAL_MODE_DIRTY,
9529    )?;
9530    let mut weight_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
9531    let cell_trace_targets = mosaic_cell_trace_targets();
9532    trace_mosaic_weight_support_contributions(
9533        group,
9534        weight_projector,
9535        weight_plan,
9536        &prepared.weight_support_sums,
9537        &cell_trace_targets,
9538    );
9539    add_mosaic_center_weight_grid_from_support_sums(
9540        weight_projector,
9541        weight_plan,
9542        &mut weight_grid,
9543        &prepared.weight_support_sums,
9544    );
9545    Ok(MosaicDirtyGroupContribution {
9546        psf_grid: complex32_grid_to_complex64(&psf_grid32),
9547        residual_grid: complex32_grid_to_complex64(&residual_grid32),
9548        weight_grid,
9549        metal_stats,
9550        group_weight_grid_sum: prepared.group_weight_grid_sum,
9551        reported_sumwt: prepared.reported_sumwt,
9552        normalization_sumwt: prepared.normalization_sumwt,
9553        gridded_samples: prepared.gridded_samples,
9554        skipped_samples: prepared.skipped_samples,
9555    })
9556}
9557
9558fn compute_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution_grouped_cpu(
9559    gridder: &StandardGridder,
9560    group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
9561    projector: &ScreenProjector,
9562    weight_projector: &ScreenProjector,
9563    weight_plan: &ScreenProjectSamplePlan,
9564    prepared_group: Option<&MosaicMetalPreparedGroup>,
9565) -> Result<MosaicDirtyGroupContribution, ImagingError> {
9566    let started = profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled().then(Instant::now);
9567    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
9568    let collected_prepared;
9569    let prepared = match prepared_group {
9570        Some(prepared) => prepared,
9571        None => {
9572            collected_prepared =
9573                collect_mosaic_metal_samples(group, projector, Some(weight_projector))?;
9574            &collected_prepared
9575        }
9576    };
9577    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
