9578    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
9579    let grid_started = profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled().then(Instant::now);
9580    accumulate_mosaic_grouped_dirty_cpu(
9581        projector,
9582        &prepared.samples,
9583        &mut psf_grid,
9584        &mut residual_grid,
9585    );
9586    let grid_elapsed = grid_started.map_or(Duration::ZERO, |started| started.elapsed());
9587    let mut weight_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
9588    let cell_trace_targets = mosaic_cell_trace_targets();
9589    trace_mosaic_weight_support_contributions(
9590        group,
9591        weight_projector,
9592        weight_plan,
9593        &prepared.weight_support_sums,
9594        &cell_trace_targets,
9595    );
9596    add_mosaic_center_weight_grid_from_support_sums(
9597        weight_projector,
9598        weight_plan,
9599        &mut weight_grid,
9600        &prepared.weight_support_sums,
9601    );
9602    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled() {
9603        eprintln!(
9604            "mosaic_grouped_cpu_dirty raw_samples={} grouped_samples={} grouped_sample_ratio={:.6} grid_ms={:.3} total_ms={:.3}",
9605            prepared.gridded_samples,
9606            prepared.samples.len(),
9607            if prepared.gridded_samples == 0 {
9608                0.0
9609            } else {
9610                prepared.samples.len() as f64 / prepared.gridded_samples as f64
9611            },
9612            profile::millis(grid_elapsed),
9613            profile::millis(started.map_or(Duration::ZERO, |started| started.elapsed())),
9614        );
9615    }
9616    Ok(MosaicDirtyGroupContribution {
9617        psf_grid,
9618        residual_grid,
9619        weight_grid,
9620        metal_stats: MosaicMetalGridStats::default(),
9621        group_weight_grid_sum: prepared.group_weight_grid_sum,
9622        reported_sumwt: prepared.reported_sumwt,
9623        normalization_sumwt: prepared.normalization_sumwt,
9624        gridded_samples: prepared.gridded_samples,
9625        skipped_samples: prepared.skipped_samples,
9626    })
9627}
9628
9629#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
9630fn accumulate_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution_grouped_cpu_into(
9631    request: &ImagingRequest,
9632    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
9633    gridder: &StandardGridder,
9634    group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
9635    conv_sampling: usize,
9636    prepared_group: Option<&MosaicMetalPreparedGroup>,
9637    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
9638    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
9639    weight_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
9640) -> Result<MosaicDirtyGroupSummary, ImagingError> {
9641    if !mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
9642        request.geometry,
9643        config.phase_center_direction_rad,
9644        group.pointing_direction_rad,
9645    ) {
9646        return Ok(MosaicDirtyGroupSummary {
9647            group_weight_grid_sum: 0.0,
9648            reported_sumwt: 0.0,
9649            normalization_sumwt: 0.0,
9650            gridded_samples: 0,
9651            skipped_samples: group.batch.len(),
9652        });
9653    }
9654    let projector = build_mosaic_projector(
9655        request.geometry,
9656        gridder,
9657        config.phase_center_direction_rad,
9658        group.pointing_direction_rad,
9659        group.primary_beam_model,
9660        group.frequency_hz,
9661        conv_sampling,
9662        2,
9663        true,
9664    )?;
9665    let weight_projector = build_mosaic_projector(
9666        request.geometry,
9667        gridder,
9668        config.phase_center_direction_rad,
9669        group.pointing_direction_rad,
9670        group.primary_beam_model,
9671        group.frequency_hz,
9672        conv_sampling,
9673        4,
9674        true,
9675    )?;
9676    let weight_plan = weight_projector
9677        .plan_sample_for_grid(0.0, 0.0)
9678        .ok_or_else(|| {
9679            ImagingError::Normalization(
9680                "mosaic weight projector failed to plan the centered kernel".to_string(),
9681            )
9682        })?;
9683    accumulate_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution_grouped_cpu_into_with_projectors(
9684        group,
9685        &projector,
9686        &weight_projector,
9687        &weight_plan,
9688        prepared_group,
9689        psf_grid,
9690        residual_grid,
9691        weight_grid,
9692    )
9693}
9694
9695#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
9696fn accumulate_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution_grouped_cpu_into_with_projectors(
9697    group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
9698    projector: &ScreenProjector,
9699    weight_projector: &ScreenProjector,
9700    weight_plan: &ScreenProjectSamplePlan,
9701    prepared_group: Option<&MosaicMetalPreparedGroup>,
9702    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
9703    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
9704    weight_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
9705) -> Result<MosaicDirtyGroupSummary, ImagingError> {
9706    let started = profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled().then(Instant::now);
9707    let collected_prepared;
9708    let prepared = match prepared_group {
9709        Some(prepared) => prepared,
9710        None => {
9711            collected_prepared =
9712                collect_mosaic_metal_samples(group, projector, Some(weight_projector))?;
9713            &collected_prepared
9714        }
9715    };
9716    let grid_started = profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled().then(Instant::now);
9717    accumulate_mosaic_grouped_dirty_cpu(projector, &prepared.samples, psf_grid, residual_grid);
9718    let grid_elapsed = grid_started.map_or(Duration::ZERO, |started| started.elapsed());
9719    let cell_trace_targets = mosaic_cell_trace_targets();
9720    trace_mosaic_weight_support_contributions(
9721        group,
9722        weight_projector,
9723        weight_plan,
9724        &prepared.weight_support_sums,
9725        &cell_trace_targets,
9726    );
9727    add_mosaic_center_weight_grid_from_support_sums(
9728        weight_projector,
9729        weight_plan,
9730        weight_grid,
9731        &prepared.weight_support_sums,
9732    );
9733    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled() {
9734        eprintln!(
9735            "mosaic_grouped_cpu_dirty_into raw_samples={} grouped_samples={} grouped_sample_ratio={:.6} grid_ms={:.3} total_ms={:.3}",
9736            prepared.gridded_samples,
9737            prepared.samples.len(),
9738            if prepared.gridded_samples == 0 {
9739                0.0
9740            } else {
9741                prepared.samples.len() as f64 / prepared.gridded_samples as f64
9742            },
9743            profile::millis(grid_elapsed),
9744            profile::millis(started.map_or(Duration::ZERO, |started| started.elapsed())),
9745        );
9746    }
9747    Ok(MosaicDirtyGroupSummary {
9748        group_weight_grid_sum: prepared.group_weight_grid_sum,
9749        reported_sumwt: prepared.reported_sumwt,
9750        normalization_sumwt: prepared.normalization_sumwt,
9751        gridded_samples: prepared.gridded_samples,
9752        skipped_samples: prepared.skipped_samples,
9753    })
9754}
9755
9756#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
9757fn compute_mosaic_dirty_group_contribution_sample_ranges(
9758    gridder: &StandardGridder,
9759    group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
9760    projector: &ScreenProjector,
9761    weight_projector: &ScreenProjector,
9762    weight_plan: &ScreenProjectSamplePlan,
9763    thread_count: usize,
9764) -> Result<MosaicDirtyGroupContribution, ImagingError> {
9765    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
9766    let chunk_len = group.batch.len().div_ceil(thread_count);
9767    let stage_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
9768    let join_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
9769    let mut worker_results = Vec::<MosaicDirtyRangeContribution>::new();
9770    thread::scope(|scope| {
9771        let mut handles = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
9772        for sample_start in (0..group.batch.len()).step_by(chunk_len) {
9773            let sample_end = (sample_start + chunk_len).min(group.batch.len());
9774            handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
9775                let alloc_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
9776                let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
9777                let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
9778                let alloc_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(alloc_started);
9779                let compute_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
9780                let mut reported_sumwt = 0.0f64;
9781                let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
9782                let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
9783                let mut skipped_samples = 0usize;
9784                let mut weight_support_sums = MosaicWeightGridAccumulator::new(weight_projector);
9785                for sample_index in sample_start..sample_end {
9786                    if !group.batch.gridable[sample_index] {
9787                        skipped_samples += 1;
9788                        continue;
9789                    }
9790                    let weight = group.batch.weight[sample_index];
9791                    let sumwt_factor = group.batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index];
9792                    let visibility = group.batch.visibility[sample_index];
9793                    if !(weight.is_finite()
9794                        && weight > 0.0
9795                        && sumwt_factor.is_finite()
9796                        && sumwt_factor > 0.0
9797                        && visibility.re.is_finite()
9798                        && visibility.im.is_finite())
9799                    {
9800                        skipped_samples += 1;
9801                        continue;
9802                    }
9803                    let grid_weight = weight * sumwt_factor;
9804                    let Some(plan) = projector.plan_sample_for_grid(
9805                        group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
9806                        group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
9807                    ) else {
9808                        skipped_samples += 1;
9809                        continue;
9810                    };
9811                    let grid_weight64 = f64::from(grid_weight);
9812                    projector.grid_sample_planned_f64(
9813                        &mut psf_grid,
9814                        &plan,
9815                        Complex64::new(grid_weight64, 0.0),
9816                    );
9817                    projector.grid_sample_planned_f64(
9818                        &mut residual_grid,
9819                        &plan,
9820                        Complex64::new(visibility.re as f64, visibility.im as f64) * grid_weight64,
9821                    );
9822                    add_mosaic_weight_support_sample(
9823                        &mut weight_support_sums,
9824                        weight_projector,
9825                        group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
9826                        group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
9827                        grid_weight64,
9828                    );
9829                    if plan.center_in_bounds {
9830                        normalization_sumwt += grid_weight64;
9831                        reported_sumwt +=
9832                            mosaic_reported_sumwt_from_grid_weight(grid_weight, sumwt_factor);
9833                    }
9834                    gridded_samples += 1;
9835                }
9836                MosaicDirtyRangeContribution {
9837                    sample_start,
9838                    samples_assigned: sample_end - sample_start,
9839                    psf_grid,
9840                    residual_grid,
9841                    weight_support_sums,
9842                    reported_sumwt,
9843                    normalization_sumwt,
9844                    gridded_samples,
9845                    skipped_samples,
9846                    alloc_elapsed,
9847                    compute_elapsed: profile::elapsed_since(compute_started),
9848                }
9849            }));
9850        }
9851        for handle in handles {
9852            worker_results.push(handle.join().map_err(|_| {
9853                ImagingError::Unsupported("mosaic dirty sample worker panicked".to_string())
9854            })?);
9855        }
9856        Ok::<(), ImagingError>(())
9857    })?;
9858    let join_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(join_started);
9859
9860    worker_results.sort_by_key(|result| result.sample_start);
9861    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
9862    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
9863    let mut weight_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
9864    let mut reported_sumwt = 0.0f64;
9865    let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
9866    let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
9867    let mut skipped_samples = 0usize;
9868    let mut weight_support_sums = MosaicWeightGridAccumulator::new(weight_projector);
9869    let merge_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
9870    for contribution in &worker_results {
9871        add_complex64_grid(&mut psf_grid, &contribution.psf_grid);
9872        add_complex64_grid(&mut residual_grid, &contribution.residual_grid);
9873        weight_support_sums.extend(&contribution.weight_support_sums);
9874        reported_sumwt += contribution.reported_sumwt;
9875        normalization_sumwt += contribution.normalization_sumwt;
9876        gridded_samples += contribution.gridded_samples;
9877        skipped_samples += contribution.skipped_samples;
9878    }
9879    let support_sums = weight_support_sums.support_sums();
9880    dump_mosaic_weight_support_sums(
9881        group,
9882        weight_projector.support(),
9883        gridded_samples,
9884        &support_sums,
9885    );
9886    add_mosaic_center_weight_grid_from_support_sums(
9887        weight_projector,
9888        weight_plan,
9889        &mut weight_grid,
9890        &support_sums,
9891    );
9892    let merge_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(merge_started);
9893    profile::log_parallel_stage(profile::ParallelStageProfile {
9894        stage: "mosaic_dirty_group_grid",
9895        requested_threads: standard_mfs_grid_threads(),
9896        actual_threads: worker_results.len(),
9897        chunking: "sample-range",
9898        chunk_len,
9899        samples_total: group.batch.len(),
9900        samples_per_worker: worker_results
9901            .iter()
9902            .map(|result| result.samples_assigned)
9903            .collect(),
9904        local_grid_bytes_per_worker: complex64_grid_bytes(grid_nx, grid_ny, 2),
9905        local_grid_count: 2,
9906        local_alloc_zero_by_worker: worker_results
9907            .iter()
9908            .map(|result| result.alloc_elapsed)
9909            .collect(),
9910        worker_compute_by_worker: worker_results
9911            .iter()
9912            .map(|result| result.compute_elapsed)
9913            .collect(),
9914        join_duration: join_elapsed,
9915        merge_duration: merge_elapsed,
9916        stage_duration: profile::elapsed_since(stage_started),
9917    });
9918    Ok(MosaicDirtyGroupContribution {
9919        psf_grid,
9920        residual_grid,
9921        weight_grid,
9922        metal_stats: MosaicMetalGridStats::default(),
9923        group_weight_grid_sum: weight_support_sums.total_weight_sum,
9924        reported_sumwt,
9925        normalization_sumwt,
9926        gridded_samples,
9927        skipped_samples,
9928    })
9929}
9930
9931fn apply_mosaic_weighting(
9932    request: &ImagingRequest,
9933    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
9934    gridder: &StandardGridder,
9935) -> Result<Vec<VisibilityBatch>, ImagingError> {
9936    if request.weighting == WeightingMode::Natural {
9937        return apply_weighting(request, gridder);
9938    }
9939    if !config.grouped_metadata_batches.is_empty() {
9940        if request.visibility_batches.len() != config.grouped_metadata_batches.len() {
9941            return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
9942                "grouped mosaic metadata batch count does not match visibility batch count"
9943                    .to_string(),
9944            ));
9945        }
9946        let mut grouped = BTreeMap::<(u64, u64), Vec<VisibilitySampleRangeRef>>::new();
9947        for (batch_index, metadata) in config.grouped_metadata_batches.iter().enumerate() {
9948            for group in &metadata.groups {
9949                let pointing = group.pointing_direction_rad;
9950                let entry = grouped
9951                    .entry((pointing[0].to_bits(), pointing[1].to_bits()))
9952                    .or_default();
9953                for range in &group.sample_ranges {
9954                    entry.push(VisibilitySampleRangeRef {
9955                        batch_index,
9956                        range: *range,
9957                    });
9958                }
9959            }
9960        }
9961        let fractional_bandwidth =
9962            fractional_bandwidth_from_frequency_range(request.selected_frequency_range_hz);
9963        let density_mode = match request.weighting {
9964            WeightingMode::BriggsBwTaper { .. } => WeightDensityMode::PerPlane,
9965            _ => WeightDensityMode::Combined,
9966        };
9967        let sample_groups = grouped.into_values().collect::<Vec<_>>();
9968        return apply_weighting_to_owned_batches_by_sample_range_groups(
9969            request.weighting,
9970            density_mode,
9971            None,
9972            fractional_bandwidth,
9973            request.visibility_batches.clone(),
9974            &sample_groups,
9975            gridder,
9976        );
9977    }
9978
9979    let mut grouped = BTreeMap::<(u64, u64), Vec<(usize, usize)>>::new();
9980    if request.visibility_batches.len() != config.metadata_batches.len() {
9981        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
9982            "mosaic metadata batch count does not match visibility batch count".to_string(),
9983        ));
9984    } else {
9985        for (batch_index, (batch, metadata)) in request
9986            .visibility_batches
9987            .iter()
9988            .zip(config.metadata_batches.iter())
9989            .enumerate()
9990        {
9991            if batch.len() != metadata.pointing_direction_rad.len() {
9992                return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
9993                    "mosaic metadata sample count does not match visibility batch sample count"
9994                        .to_string(),
9995                ));
9996            }
9997            for sample_index in 0..batch.len() {
9998                let pointing = metadata.pointing_direction_rad[sample_index];
9999                grouped
10000                    .entry((pointing[0].to_bits(), pointing[1].to_bits()))
10001                    .or_default()
10002                    .push((batch_index, sample_index));
10003            }
10004        }
10005    }
10006
10007    let fractional_bandwidth =
10008        fractional_bandwidth_from_frequency_range(request.selected_frequency_range_hz);
10009    let density_mode = match request.weighting {
10010        WeightingMode::BriggsBwTaper { .. } => WeightDensityMode::PerPlane,
10011        _ => WeightDensityMode::Combined,
10012    };
10013    let sample_groups = grouped.into_values().collect::<Vec<_>>();
10014    apply_weighting_to_owned_batches_by_sample_groups(
10015        request.weighting,
10016        density_mode,
10017        None,
10018        fractional_bandwidth,
10019        request.visibility_batches.clone(),
10020        &sample_groups,
10021        gridder,
10022    )
10023}
10024
10025fn append_mosaic_trace(line: String) {
10026    let Some(path) = env::var_os("CASA_RS_MOSAIC_TRACE") else {
10027        return;
10028    };
10029    match OpenOptions::new().create(true).append(true).open(path) {
10030        Ok(mut file) => {
10031            let _ = writeln!(file, "{line}");
10032        }
10033        Err(error) => {
10034            eprintln!("failed to append CASA_RS_MOSAIC_TRACE: {error}");
10035        }
10036    }
10037}
10038
10039fn append_hogbom_trace(line: String) {
10040    let Some(path) = env::var_os("CASA_RS_HOGBOM_TRACE") else {
10041        return;
10042    };
10043    static HOGBOM_TRACE_LOCK: OnceLock<Mutex<()>> = OnceLock::new();
10044    let Ok(_guard) = HOGBOM_TRACE_LOCK.get_or_init(|| Mutex::new(())).lock() else {
10045        eprintln!("failed to append CASA_RS_HOGBOM_TRACE: trace lock poisoned");
10046        return;
10047    };
10048    match OpenOptions::new().create(true).append(true).open(path) {
10049        Ok(mut file) => {
10050            let mut record = line;
10051            record.push('\n');
10052            let _ = file.write_all(record.as_bytes());
10053        }
10054        Err(error) => {
10055            eprintln!("failed to append CASA_RS_HOGBOM_TRACE: {error}");
10056        }
10057    }
10058}
10059
10060fn append_clark_trace(line: String) {
10061    let Some(path) = env::var_os("CASA_RS_CLARK_TRACE") else {
10062        return;
10063    };
10064    static CLARK_TRACE_LOCK: OnceLock<Mutex<()>> = OnceLock::new();
10065    let Ok(_guard) = CLARK_TRACE_LOCK.get_or_init(|| Mutex::new(())).lock() else {
10066        eprintln!("failed to append CASA_RS_CLARK_TRACE: trace lock poisoned");
10067        return;
10068    };
10069    match OpenOptions::new().create(true).append(true).open(path) {
10070        Ok(mut file) => {
10071            let mut record = line;
10072            record.push('\n');
10073            let _ = file.write_all(record.as_bytes());
10074        }
10075        Err(error) => {
10076            eprintln!("failed to append CASA_RS_CLARK_TRACE: {error}");
10077        }
10078    }
10079}
10080
10081fn mosaic_trace_enabled() -> bool {
10082    env::var_os("CASA_RS_MOSAIC_TRACE").is_some()
10083}
10084
10085fn mosaic_cell_trace_targets() -> Vec<(isize, isize)> {
10086    let Some(raw) = env::var_os("CASA_RS_MOSAIC_CELL_TRACE") else {
10087        return Vec::new();
10088    };
10089    raw.to_string_lossy()
10090        .split([';', ' ', '\n', '\t'])
10091        .filter_map(|entry| {
10092            let entry = entry.trim();
10093            if entry.is_empty() {
10094                return None;
10095            }
10096            let (x, y) = entry.split_once(',')?;
10097            Some((x.trim().parse().ok()?, y.trim().parse().ok()?))
10098        })
10099        .collect()
10100}
10101
10102fn mosaic_grid_dump_enabled() -> bool {
10103    env::var_os("CASA_RS_MOSAIC_GRID_DUMP").is_some()
10104}
10105
10106fn dump_mosaic_complex_grid(role: &str, frequency_hz: f64, grid: &Array2<Complex64>) {
10107    let Some(root) = env::var_os("CASA_RS_MOSAIC_GRID_DUMP") else {
10108        return;
10109    };
10110    let root = std::path::PathBuf::from(root);
10111    if let Err(error) = std::fs::create_dir_all(&root) {
10112        eprintln!(
10113            "failed to create CASA_RS_MOSAIC_GRID_DUMP directory {}: {error}",
10114            root.display()
10115        );
10116        return;
10117    }
10118    let frequency_tag = format!("{frequency_hz:.0}");
10119    let meta_path = root.join(format!("rust-{role}-{frequency_tag}.json"));
10120    let data_path = root.join(format!("rust-{role}-{frequency_tag}.bin"));
10121    let (nx, ny) = grid.dim();
10122    let meta = format!(
10123        "{{\"producer\":\"rust\",\"role\":\"{}\",\"frequency_hz\":{:.17e},\"shape\":[{},{}],\"dtype\":\"complex128\",\"order\":\"x_y_re_im_f64_le\"}}\n",
10124        role, frequency_hz, nx, ny
10125    );
10126    if let Err(error) = std::fs::write(&meta_path, meta) {
10127        eprintln!(
10128            "failed to write mosaic grid dump metadata {}: {error}",
10129            meta_path.display()
10130        );
10131        return;
10132    }
10133    let mut file = match OpenOptions::new()
10134        .create(true)
10135        .truncate(true)
10136        .write(true)
10137        .open(&data_path)
10138    {
10139        Ok(file) => file,
10140        Err(error) => {
10141            eprintln!(
10142                "failed to open mosaic grid dump {}: {error}",
10143                data_path.display()
10144            );
10145            return;
10146        }
10147    };
10148    for x in 0..nx {
10149        for y in 0..ny {
10150            let value = grid[(x, y)];
10151            if file.write_all(&value.re.to_le_bytes()).is_err()
10152                || file.write_all(&value.im.to_le_bytes()).is_err()
10153            {
10154                eprintln!("failed to write mosaic grid dump {}", data_path.display());
10155                return;
10156            }
10157        }
10158    }
10159}
10160
10161fn dump_mosaic_weight_support_sums(
10162    group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
10163    support: usize,
10164    gridded_samples: usize,
10165    support_sums: &[MosaicWeightSupportSum],
10166) {
10167    if support_sums.is_empty() {
10168        return;
10169    }
10170    let Some(root) = env::var_os("CASA_RS_MOSAIC_SUPPORT_DUMP") else {
10171        return;
10172    };
10173    let root = std::path::PathBuf::from(root);
10174    if let Err(error) = std::fs::create_dir_all(&root) {
10175        eprintln!(
10176            "failed to create CASA_RS_MOSAIC_SUPPORT_DUMP directory {}: {error}",
10177            root.display()
10178        );
10179        return;
10180    }
10181    let frequency_tag = format!("{:.0}", group.frequency_hz);
10182    let pointing_ra_tag = format!("{:016x}", group.pointing_direction_rad[0].to_bits());
10183    let pointing_dec_tag = format!("{:016x}", group.pointing_direction_rad[1].to_bits());
10184    static SUPPORT_DUMP_INDEX: AtomicUsize = AtomicUsize::new(0);
10185    let dump_index = SUPPORT_DUMP_INDEX.fetch_add(1, Ordering::Relaxed);
10186    let path = root.join(format!(
10187        "rust-weight_support-{dump_index:08}-{frequency_tag}-{pointing_ra_tag}-{pointing_dec_tag}.json"
10188    ));
10189    let mut file = match OpenOptions::new()
10190        .create(true)
10191        .truncate(true)
10192        .write(true)
10193        .open(&path)
10194    {
10195        Ok(file) => file,
10196        Err(error) => {
10197            eprintln!(
10198                "failed to open CASA_RS_MOSAIC_SUPPORT_DUMP file {}: {error}",
10199                path.display()
10200            );
10201            return;
10202        }
10203    };
10204    let total_weight = support_sums
10205        .iter()
10206        .map(|support_sum| support_sum.weight)
10207        .sum::<f64>();
10208    let _ = write!(
10209        file,
10210        "{{\"producer\":\"rust\",\"role\":\"weight_support\",\"pointing_ra\":{:.17e},\"pointing_dec\":{:.17e},\"frequency_hz\":{:.17e},\"support\":{},\"samples\":{},\"total_weight\":{:.17e},\"bins\":[",
10211        group.pointing_direction_rad[0],
10212        group.pointing_direction_rad[1],
10213        group.frequency_hz,
10214        support,
10215        gridded_samples,
10216        total_weight,
10217    );
10218    for (index, support_sum) in support_sums.iter().enumerate() {
10219        if index > 0 {
10220            let _ = write!(file, ",");
10221        }
10222        let key = support_sum.key;
10223        let _ = write!(
10224            file,
10225            "{{\"key\":\"{}:{}:{}:{}\",\"weight\":{:.17e}}}",
10226            key.min_ix, key.max_ix, key.min_iy, key.max_iy, support_sum.weight
10227        );
10228    }
10229    let _ = writeln!(file, "]}}");
10230}
10231
10232fn trace_mosaic_weight_support_contributions(
10233    group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
10234    weight_projector: &ScreenProjector,
10235    center_weight_plan: &ScreenProjectSamplePlan,
10236    support_sums: &[MosaicWeightSupportSum],
10237    cell_trace_targets: &[(isize, isize)],
10238) {
10239    if !mosaic_trace_enabled() || cell_trace_targets.is_empty() {
10240        return;
10241    }
10242    for support_sum in support_sums {
10243        if !(support_sum.weight.is_finite() && support_sum.weight > 0.0) {
10244            continue;
10245        }
10246        let mut plan = *center_weight_plan;
10247        plan.min_ix = support_sum.key.min_ix as isize;
10248        plan.max_ix = support_sum.key.max_ix as isize;
10249        plan.min_iy = support_sum.key.min_iy as isize;
10250        plan.max_iy = support_sum.key.max_iy as isize;
10251        for &(target_x, target_y) in cell_trace_targets {
10252            let ix = target_x - plan.loc_x;
10253            let iy = target_y - plan.loc_y;
10254            let Some(tap) = weight_projector.trace_sample_tap_at(&plan, ix, iy) else {
10255                continue;
10256            };
10257            let contribution = Complex64::new(tap.re as f64, tap.im as f64) * support_sum.weight;
10258            append_mosaic_trace(format!(
10259                "{{\"event\":\"weight_cell_contribution\",\"target\":[{},{}],\"pointing_ra\":{:.17e},\"pointing_dec\":{:.17e},\"freq_hz\":{:.17e},\"support_key\":\"{}:{}:{}:{}\",\"support_weight\":{:.17e},\"tap_offset\":[{},{}],\"tap\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}],\"contribution\":[{:.17e},{:.17e}]}}",
10260                target_x,
10261                target_y,
10262                group.pointing_direction_rad[0],
10263                group.pointing_direction_rad[1],
10264                group.frequency_hz,
10265                support_sum.key.min_ix,
10266                support_sum.key.max_ix,
10267                support_sum.key.min_iy,
10268                support_sum.key.max_iy,
10269                support_sum.weight,
10270                ix,
10271                iy,
10272                tap.re,
10273                tap.im,
10274                contribution.re,
10275                contribution.im,
10276            ));
10277        }
10278    }
10279}
10280
10281fn mosaic_trace_pixels_json(
10282    residual: &Array2<f32>,
10283    psf: &Array2<f32>,
10284    normalization_weight: &Array2<f32>,
10285    output_weight: Option<&Array2<f32>>,
10286) -> String {
10287    let candidates = [
10288        ("center", residual.dim().0 / 2, residual.dim().1 / 2),
10289        ("central_source", 246usize, 259usize),
10290        ("worst_negative_source", 74usize, 199usize),
10291        ("worst_positive_source", 76usize, 383usize),
10292        ("pb_edge_source", 424usize, 110usize),
10293        ("upper_source", 133usize, 415usize),
10294        ("off_axis_source", 425usize, 137usize),
10295        ("off_axis_source_2", 426usize, 138usize),
10296    ];
10297    let mut entries = Vec::new();
10298    for (name, x, y) in candidates {
10299        if x >= residual.dim().0 || y >= residual.dim().1 {
10300            continue;
10301        }
10302        let output_weight_value = output_weight
10303            .map(|weight| format!("{:.17e}", weight[(x, y)]))
10304            .unwrap_or_else(|| "null".to_string());
10305        entries.push(format!(
10306            "{{\"name\":\"{}\",\"x\":{},\"y\":{},\"residual\":{:.17e},\"psf\":{:.17e},\"normalization_weight\":{:.17e},\"output_weight\":{}}}",
10307            name,
10308            x,
10309            y,
10310            residual[(x, y)],
10311            psf[(x, y)],
10312            normalization_weight[(x, y)],
10313            output_weight_value
10314        ));
10315    }
10316    format!("[{}]", entries.join(","))
10317}
10318
10319fn mosaic_trace_group_pixels_json(residual: &Array2<f32>, weight: &Array2<f32>) -> String {
10320    let candidates = [
10321        ("center", residual.dim().0 / 2, residual.dim().1 / 2),
10322        ("central_source", 246usize, 259usize),
10323        ("worst_negative_source", 74usize, 199usize),
10324        ("worst_positive_source", 76usize, 383usize),
10325        ("pb_edge_source", 424usize, 110usize),
10326        ("upper_source", 133usize, 415usize),
10327        ("off_axis_source", 425usize, 137usize),
10328        ("off_axis_source_2", 426usize, 138usize),
10329    ];
10330    let mut entries = Vec::new();
10331    for (name, x, y) in candidates {
10332        if x >= residual.dim().0 || y >= residual.dim().1 {
10333            continue;
10334        }
10335        entries.push(format!(
10336            "{{\"name\":\"{}\",\"x\":{},\"y\":{},\"residual\":{:.17e},\"weight\":{:.17e}}}",
10337            name,
10338            x,
10339            y,
10340            residual[(x, y)],
10341            weight[(x, y)],
10342        ));
10343    }
10344    format!("[{}]", entries.join(","))
10345}
10346
10347fn mosaic_weight_trace_enabled() -> bool {
10348    env::var_os("CASA_RS_W3_MOSAIC_WEIGHT_TRACE").is_some()
10349}
10350
10351fn multiscale_trace_sink() -> Option<String> {
10352    env::var("CASA_RS_MULTISCALE_TRACE")
10353        .ok()
10354        .filter(|path| !path.is_empty())
10355}
10356
10357fn append_multiscale_trace(path: &str, line: String) {
10358    if let Ok(mut file) = OpenOptions::new().create(true).append(true).open(path) {
10359        let _ = writeln!(file, "{line}");
10360    }
10361}
10362
10363fn trace_mosaic_weight_image(label: &str, image: &Array2<f32>) {
10364    if !mosaic_weight_trace_enabled() {
10365        return;
10366    }
10367    let (nx, ny) = image.dim();
10368    let mut count = 0usize;
10369    let mut positive_count = 0usize;
10370    let mut sum = 0.0f64;
10371    let mut min_value = f32::INFINITY;
10372    let mut max_value = f32::NEG_INFINITY;
10373    let mut max_location = (0usize, 0usize);
10374    for ((x, y), value) in image.indexed_iter() {
10375        if !value.is_finite() {
10376            continue;
10377        }
10378        count += 1;
10379        if *value > 0.0 {
10380            positive_count += 1;
10381        }
10382        sum += f64::from(*value);
10383        if *value < min_value {
10384            min_value = *value;
10385        }
10386        if *value > max_value {
10387            max_value = *value;
10388            max_location = (x, y);
10389        }
10390    }
10391    eprintln!(
10392        "CASA_RS_W3_MOSAIC_WEIGHT_TRACE label={} nx={} ny={} finite={} positive={} sum={:.17e} min={:.17e} max={:.17e} max_x={} max_y={}",
10393        label,
10394        nx,
10395        ny,
10396        count,
10397        positive_count,
10398        sum,
10399        min_value,
10400        max_value,
10401        max_location.0,
10402        max_location.1,
10403    );
10404    let step_x = (nx / 16).max(1);
10405    let step_y = (ny / 16).max(1);
10406    let mut x = 0usize;
10407    while x < nx {
10408        let mut y = 0usize;
10409        while y < ny {
10410            eprintln!(
10411                "CASA_RS_W3_MOSAIC_WEIGHT_SAMPLE label={} x={} y={} value={:.17e}",
10412                label,
10413                x,
10414                y,
10415                image[(x, y)],
10416            );
10417            y = y.saturating_add(step_y);
10418        }
10419        x = x.saturating_add(step_x);
10420    }
10421    let center_x = nx / 2;
10422    let center_y = ny / 2;
10423    eprintln!(
10424        "CASA_RS_W3_MOSAIC_WEIGHT_SAMPLE label={} x={} y={} value={:.17e}",
10425        label,
10426        center_x,
10427        center_y,
10428        image[(center_x, center_y)],
10429    );
10430}
10431
10432struct MosaicPbTraceSample {
10433    label: &'static str,
10434    primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel,
10435    pointing_x: f64,
10436    pointing_y: f64,
10437    x: usize,
10438    y: usize,
10439    radius_rad: f64,
10440    frequency_hz: f64,
10441    vp: f32,
10442}
10443
10444fn trace_mosaic_pb_sample(sample: MosaicPbTraceSample) {
10445    if !mosaic_weight_trace_enabled() {
10446        return;
10447    }
10448    let radius_arcmin_ghz =
10449        (sample.radius_rad.to_degrees() * 60.0 * (sample.frequency_hz / 1.0e9)) as f32 as f64;
10450    let maximum_radius_arcmin_ghz =
10451        primary_beam_max_radius_arcsec_at_100ghz(sample.primary_beam_model).unwrap_or(0.0) * 100.0
10452            / 60.0;
10453    let index = if radius_arcmin_ghz > maximum_radius_arcmin_ghz {
10454        -1
10455    } else {
10456        (radius_arcmin_ghz * 9_999.0 / maximum_radius_arcmin_ghz)
10457            .floor()
10458            .clamp(0.0, 9_999.0) as i32
10459    };
10460    let pb = sample.vp * sample.vp;
10461    let label = sample.label;
10462    let pointing_x = sample.pointing_x;
10463    let pointing_y = sample.pointing_y;
10464    let x = sample.x;
10465    let y = sample.y;
10466    let radius_rad = sample.radius_rad;
10467    let frequency_hz = sample.frequency_hz;
10468    let vp = sample.vp;
10469    eprintln!(
10470        "CASA_RS_W3_MOSAIC_PB_SAMPLE label={label} pointing_x={pointing_x:.12e} pointing_y={pointing_y:.12e} x={x} y={y} radius_rad={radius_rad:.17e} radius_arcmin_ghz={radius_arcmin_ghz:.17e} frequency_hz={frequency_hz:.9e} index={index} vp={vp:.17e} pb={pb:.17e} pb2={:.17e}",
10471        pb * pb
10472    );
10473}
10474
10475fn build_mosaic_weight_image(
10476    geometry: ImageGeometry,
10477    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
10478    groups: &[MosaicPointingGroup],
10479) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
10480    let mut pointing_weights =
10481        BTreeMap::<MosaicPointingWeightKey, MosaicPointingWeightValue>::new();
10482    for group in groups {
10483        if !mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
10484            geometry,
10485            config.phase_center_direction_rad,
10486            group.pointing_direction_rad,
10487        ) {
10488            continue;
10489        }
10490        let mut group_weight = 0.0f64;
10491        for sample_index in 0..group.batch.len() {
10492            if !group.batch.gridable[sample_index] {
10493                continue;
10494            }
10495            let weight = group.batch.weight[sample_index];
10496            if weight.is_finite() && weight > 0.0 {
10497                group_weight += f64::from(weight);
10498            }
10499        }
10500        if !(group_weight.is_finite() && group_weight > 0.0) {
10501            continue;
10502        }
10503        let key = (
10504            group.pointing_direction_rad[0].to_bits(),
10505            group.pointing_direction_rad[1].to_bits(),
10506            group.frequency_hz.to_bits(),
10507            primary_beam_model_key(group.primary_beam_model),
10508        );
10509        let entry = pointing_weights.entry(key).or_insert((
10510            group.pointing_direction_rad,
10511            group.primary_beam_model,
10512            group.frequency_hz,
10513            0.0,
10514        ));
10515        entry.3 += group_weight;
10516    }
10517
10518    let mut weight_image = Array2::<f32>::zeros((geometry.nx(), geometry.ny()));
10519    for (pointing_direction_rad, primary_beam_model, frequency_hz, pointing_weight) in
10520        pointing_weights.into_values()
10521    {
10522        if !(pointing_weight.is_finite() && pointing_weight > 0.0) {
10523            continue;
10524        }
10525        let [pointing_x, pointing_y] = mosaic_pointing_pixel_position(
10526            geometry,
10527            config.phase_center_direction_rad,
10528            pointing_direction_rad,
10529        );
10530        if mosaic_weight_trace_enabled() {
10531            eprintln!(
10532                "CASA_RS_W3_MOSAIC_PB_POINTING label=rust_nonstream pointing_x={pointing_x:.12e} pointing_y={pointing_y:.12e} frequency_hz={frequency_hz:.9e} pointing_weight={pointing_weight:.17e}"
10533            );
10534        }
10535        let voltage_pattern = MosaicWeightImageVoltagePattern::new(primary_beam_model);
10536        let (x_range, y_range) = mosaic_weight_image_pixel_bounds(
10537            geometry,
10538            primary_beam_model,
10539            pointing_x,
10540            pointing_y,
10541            frequency_hz,
10542        );
10543        for x in x_range {
10544            let l = (x as f64 - pointing_x) * geometry.cell_size_rad[0].abs();
10545            for y in y_range.clone() {
10546                let m = (y as f64 - pointing_y) * geometry.cell_size_rad[1].abs();
10547                let radius_rad = (l * l + m * m).sqrt();
10548                let vp = voltage_pattern.evaluate(l, m, frequency_hz);
10549                if (x == 640 || x % 160 == 0) && (y == 640 || y % 160 == 0) {
10550                    trace_mosaic_pb_sample(MosaicPbTraceSample {
10551                        label: "rust_nonstream",
10552                        primary_beam_model,
10553                        pointing_x,
10554                        pointing_y,
10555                        x,
10556                        y,
10557                        radius_rad,
10558                        frequency_hz,
10559                        vp,
10560                    });
10561                }
10562                let pb = vp * vp;
10563                weight_image[(x, y)] += (pointing_weight as f32) * pb * pb;
10564            }
10565        }
10566    }
10567    if weight_image
10568        .iter()
10569        .copied()
10570        .any(|value| value.is_finite() && value > 0.0)
10571    {
10572        Ok(weight_image)
10573    } else {
10574        Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
10575            "mosaic weight image has no finite positive samples".to_string(),
10576        ))
10577    }
10578}
10579
10580fn build_mosaic_clean_mask(
10581    weight_image: &Array2<f32>,
10582    pb_limit: f32,
10583    user_clean_mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
10584) -> Result<Array2<bool>, ImagingError> {
10585    let peak = weight_image
10586        .iter()
10587        .copied()
10588        .filter(|value| value.is_finite())
10589        .fold(0.0f32, f32::max);
10590    if !(peak.is_finite() && peak > 0.0) {
10591        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
10592            "mosaic PB clean mask peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
10593        ));
10594    }
10595    let threshold = pb_limit.abs() * pb_limit.abs() * peak;
10596    let mut mask = Array2::<bool>::from_elem(weight_image.dim(), false);
10597    for ((x, y), value) in weight_image.indexed_iter() {
10598        let in_pb_support = value.is_finite() && *value > threshold;
10599        let in_user_mask = user_clean_mask.is_none_or(|user_mask| user_mask[(x, y)]);
10600        mask[(x, y)] = in_pb_support && in_user_mask;
10601    }
10602    Ok(mask)
10603}
10604
10605fn request_for_mosaic_clean_mask(
10606    request: &ImagingRequest,
10607    clean_mask: Array2<bool>,
10608) -> ImagingRequest {
10609    ImagingRequest {
10610        geometry: request.geometry,
10611        visibility_batches: Vec::new(),
10612        gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
10613        plane_stokes: request.plane_stokes,
10614        weighting: request.weighting,
10615        reffreq_hz: request.reffreq_hz,
10616        selected_frequency_range_hz: request.selected_frequency_range_hz,
10617        deconvolver: request.deconvolver,
10618        multiscale_scales: request.multiscale_scales.clone(),
10619        small_scale_bias: request.small_scale_bias,
10620        clean: request.clean,
10621        clean_mask: Some(clean_mask),
10622        initial_model: None,
10623        w_term_mode: request.w_term_mode,
10624        w_project_planes: request.w_project_planes,
10625        compatibility: request.compatibility,
10626    }
10627}
10628
10629fn clean_mask_summary(
10630    clean_mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
10631    fallback_shape: (usize, usize),
10632) -> CleanMaskSummary {
10633    let Some(clean_mask) = clean_mask else {
10634        return CleanMaskSummary {
10635            has_mask: false,
10636            pixels: fallback_shape.0.saturating_mul(fallback_shape.1),
10637            fingerprint: 0,
10638        };
10639    };
10640
10641    let mut pixels = 0usize;
10642    let mut fingerprint = 0xcbf29ce484222325u64;
10643    fingerprint ^= clean_mask.dim().0 as u64;
10644    fingerprint = fingerprint.wrapping_mul(0x100000001b3);
10645    fingerprint ^= clean_mask.dim().1 as u64;
10646    fingerprint = fingerprint.wrapping_mul(0x100000001b3);
10647    for ((x, y), value) in clean_mask.indexed_iter() {
10648        if !*value {
10649            continue;
10650        }
10651        pixels = pixels.saturating_add(1);
10652        fingerprint ^= ((x as u64) << 32) ^ y as u64;
10653        fingerprint = fingerprint.wrapping_mul(0x100000001b3);
10654    }
10655    CleanMaskSummary {
10656        has_mask: true,
10657        pixels,
10658        fingerprint,
10659    }
10660}
10661
10662#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
10663fn compute_mosaic_residual(
10664    request: &ImagingRequest,
10665    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
10666    gridder: &StandardGridder,
10667    groups: &[MosaicPointingGroup],
10668    projector_cache: &mut MosaicProjectorCache,
10669    conv_sampling: usize,
10670    model: &Array2<f32>,
10671    psf_state: &PsfState,
10672    weight_image: &Array2<f32>,
10673    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
10674    metal_group_cache: Option<&[Option<MosaicMetalPreparedGroup>]>,
10675) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
10676    let refresh_started = Instant::now();
10677    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
10678    let mut timings = ResidualComputationTimings::default();
10679    let model_grid = if model.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0) {
10680        let model_fft_started = Instant::now();
10681        let model_for_prediction =
10682            flat_sky_mosaic_model_for_prediction(model, weight_image, config.pb_limit)?;
10683        let transformed =
10684            centered_fft2(&gridder.apodize_mosaic_model(&model_for_prediction, conv_sampling));
10685        timings.model_fft = model_fft_started.elapsed();
10686        Some(transformed)
10687    } else {
10688        None
10689    };
10690
10691    let degrid_started = Instant::now();
10692    let mut accumulated_residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
10693    let residual_parallel_threads = mosaic_parallel_thread_count(groups.len());
10694    if residual_parallel_threads > 1 {
10695        let parallel = compute_mosaic_residual_parallel(
10696            request,
10697            config,
10698            gridder,
10699            groups,
10700            conv_sampling,
10701            model_grid.as_ref(),
10702            residual_parallel_threads,
10703            metal_group_cache,
10704            None,
10705        )?;
10706        accumulated_residual_grid = parallel.residual_grid;
10707        timings.degrid_grid = parallel.elapsed;
10708        profile::log_parallel_stage(profile::ParallelStageProfile {
10709            stage: "mosaic_residual_grid",
10710            requested_threads: standard_mfs_grid_threads(),
10711            actual_threads: parallel.worker_compute.len(),
10712            chunking: "pointing-group",
10713            chunk_len: groups.len().div_ceil(parallel.worker_compute.len().max(1)),
10714            samples_total: groups.iter().map(|group| group.batch.len()).sum(),
10715            samples_per_worker: parallel.worker_samples,
10716            local_grid_bytes_per_worker: complex64_grid_bytes(grid_nx, grid_ny, 1),
10717            local_grid_count: 1,
10718            local_alloc_zero_by_worker: parallel.worker_alloc,
10719            worker_compute_by_worker: parallel.worker_compute,
10720            join_duration: parallel.join_elapsed,
10721            merge_duration: parallel.merge_elapsed,
10722            stage_duration: parallel.elapsed,
10723        });
10724    } else {
10725        for (group_index, group) in groups.iter().enumerate() {
10726            let prepared_metal = metal_group_cache
10727                .and_then(|cache| cache.get(group_index))
10728                .and_then(Option::as_ref);
10729            let contribution = compute_mosaic_residual_group_contribution(
10730                request,
10731                config,
10732                gridder,
10733                group,
10734                conv_sampling,
10735                model_grid.as_ref(),
10736                standard_mfs_grid_threads(),
10737                Some(&mut *projector_cache),
10738                prepared_metal,
10739                None,
10740            )?;
10741            add_complex64_grid(&mut accumulated_residual_grid, &contribution.residual_grid);
10742        }
10743        timings.degrid_grid = degrid_started.elapsed();
10744    }
10745
10746    let fft_started = Instant::now();
10747    let raw_residual = centered_ifft2_f64(&accumulated_residual_grid);
10748    timings.fft += fft_started.elapsed();
10749    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
10750    let accumulated_residual_image =
10751        gridder.corrected_mosaic_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_residual, conv_sampling);
10752    timings.normalize += normalize_started.elapsed();
10753
10754    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
10755    let fft_sumwt_scale =
10756        (request.geometry.nx() * request.geometry.ny()) as f32 / psf_state.normalization_sumwt;
10757    let mut residual = accumulated_residual_image;
10758    residual.mapv_inplace(|value| value * fft_sumwt_scale);
10759    let weight_peak = weight_image
10760        .iter()
10761        .copied()
10762        .fold(0.0f32, |peak, value| peak.max(value));
10763    if !(weight_peak.is_finite() && weight_peak > 0.0) {
10764        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
10765            "mosaic residual refresh weight peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
10766        ));
10767    }
10768    let pb_limit_threshold = config.pb_limit.abs() * config.pb_limit.abs() * weight_peak;
10769    for ((x, y), weight_value) in weight_image.indexed_iter() {
10770        let sensitivity = weight_value.max(0.0);
10771        if sensitivity > pb_limit_threshold {
10772            residual[(x, y)] /= (sensitivity * weight_peak).sqrt();
10773        } else {
10774            residual[(x, y)] = 0.0;
10775        }
10776    }
10777    timings.normalize += normalize_started.elapsed();
10778    stage_timings.model_fft += timings.model_fft;
10779    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += timings.degrid_grid;
10780    stage_timings.residual_fft += timings.fft;
10781    stage_timings.residual_normalize += timings.normalize;
10782    stage_timings.major_cycle_refresh += refresh_started.elapsed();
10783    Ok(residual)
10784}
10785
10786#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
10787fn compute_mosaic_residual_parallel(
10788    request: &ImagingRequest,
10789    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
10790    gridder: &StandardGridder,
10791    groups: &[MosaicPointingGroup],
10792    conv_sampling: usize,
10793    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
10794    thread_count: usize,
10795    metal_group_cache: Option<&[Option<MosaicMetalPreparedGroup>]>,
10796    residual_projectors: Option<&[Option<MosaicResidualProjector>]>,
10797) -> Result<MosaicResidualParallelContribution, ImagingError> {
10798    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
10799    let chunk_len = groups.len().div_ceil(thread_count.max(1)).max(1);
10800    let indexed_groups = groups.iter().enumerate().collect::<Vec<_>>();
10801    let started = Instant::now();
10802    let mut worker_results = Vec::new();
10803    let join_started = Instant::now();
10804    thread::scope(|scope| {
10805        let mut handles = Vec::new();
10806        for chunk in indexed_groups.chunks(chunk_len) {
10807            handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
10808                let alloc_started = Instant::now();
10809                let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
10810                let alloc_elapsed = alloc_started.elapsed();
10811                let worker_started = Instant::now();
10812                let mut worker_samples = 0usize;
10813                let mut metal_stats = MosaicMetalGridStats::default();
10814                for &(group_index, group) in chunk {
10815                    worker_samples += group.batch.len();
10816                    let prepared_metal = metal_group_cache
10817                        .and_then(|cache| cache.get(group_index))
10818                        .and_then(Option::as_ref);
10819                    let residual_projector = residual_projectors
10820                        .and_then(|projectors| projectors.get(group_index))
10821                        .and_then(Option::as_ref)
10822                        .map(|projector| &projector.projector);
10823                    if let Some(projector) = residual_projector
10824                        && group.batch.len() >= MOSAIC_GROUPED_RESIDUAL_MIN_RAW_SAMPLES
10825                        && mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
10826                            request.geometry,
10827                            config.phase_center_direction_rad,
10828                            group.pointing_direction_rad,
10829                        )
10830                    {
10831                        let collected_prepared;
10832                        let prepared = match prepared_metal {
10833                            Some(prepared) => prepared,
10834                            None => {
10835                                collected_prepared =
10836                                    collect_mosaic_metal_samples(group, projector, None)?;
10837                                &collected_prepared
10838                            }
10839                        };
10840                        if mosaic_residual_metal_backend_enabled()
10841                            && prepared.samples.len() >= MOSAIC_METAL_RESIDUAL_MIN_PREPARED_SAMPLES
10842                        {
10843                            let contribution = compute_mosaic_residual_group_grid_metal(
10844                                gridder,
10845                                group,
10846                                projector,
10847                                model_grid,
10848                                Some(prepared),
10849                            )?;
10850                            metal_stats.add_assign(contribution.metal_stats);
10851                            add_complex64_grid(&mut residual_grid, &contribution.residual_grid);
10852                            continue;
10853                        }
10854                        accumulate_mosaic_residual_group_grid_grouped_cpu_into(
10855                            projector,
10856                            model_grid,
10857                            prepared,
10858                            &mut residual_grid,
10859                        );
10860                        continue;
10861                    }
10862                    let contribution = compute_mosaic_residual_group_contribution(
10863                        request,
10864                        config,
10865                        gridder,
10866                        group,
10867                        conv_sampling,
10868                        model_grid,
10869                        thread_count,
10870                        None,
10871                        prepared_metal,
10872                        residual_projector,
10873                    )?;
10874                    metal_stats.add_assign(contribution.metal_stats);
10875                    add_complex64_grid(&mut residual_grid, &contribution.residual_grid);
10876                }
10877                Ok::<_, ImagingError>((
10878                    worker_samples,
10879                    alloc_elapsed,
10880                    worker_started.elapsed(),
10881                    residual_grid,
10882                    metal_stats,
10883                ))
10884            }));
10885        }
10886        for handle in handles {
10887            worker_results.push(handle.join().expect("mosaic residual worker panicked")?);
10888        }
10889        Ok::<(), ImagingError>(())
10890    })?;
10891    let join_elapsed = join_started.elapsed();
10892
10893    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
10894    let mut worker_samples = Vec::with_capacity(worker_results.len());
10895    let mut worker_alloc = Vec::with_capacity(worker_results.len());
10896    let mut worker_compute = Vec::with_capacity(worker_results.len());
10897    let mut metal_stats = MosaicMetalGridStats::default();
10898    let merge_started = Instant::now();
10899    for (samples, alloc, compute, local_residual_grid, local_metal_stats) in worker_results {
10900        add_complex64_grid(&mut residual_grid, &local_residual_grid);
10901        worker_samples.push(samples);
10902        worker_alloc.push(alloc);
10903        worker_compute.push(compute);
10904        metal_stats.add_assign(local_metal_stats);
10905    }
10906    let merge_elapsed = merge_started.elapsed();
10907    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled() {
10908        let total_worker_samples = worker_samples.iter().sum::<usize>();
10909        let grouped_samples = groups.iter().map(|group| group.batch.len()).sum::<usize>();
10910        let residual_on_demand_candidate_groups = groups
10911            .iter()
10912            .filter(|group| {
10913                group.batch.len() >= MOSAIC_GROUPED_RESIDUAL_MIN_RAW_SAMPLES
10914                    && mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
10915                        request.geometry,
10916                        config.phase_center_direction_rad,
10917                        group.pointing_direction_rad,
10918                    )
10919            })
10920            .count();
10921        let residual_raw_below_grouped_threshold = groups
10922            .iter()
10923            .filter(|group| group.batch.len() < MOSAIC_GROUPED_RESIDUAL_MIN_RAW_SAMPLES)
10924            .count();
10925        let residual_pb_rejected_groups = groups
10926            .iter()
10927            .filter(|group| {
10928                !mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
10929                    request.geometry,
10930                    config.phase_center_direction_rad,
10931                    group.pointing_direction_rad,
10932                )
10933            })
10934            .count();
10935        let metal_cache_prepared_groups = metal_group_cache
10936            .map(|cache| cache.iter().filter(|group| group.is_some()).count())
10937            .unwrap_or(0);
10938        let metal_cache_prepared_ge_threshold = metal_group_cache
10939            .map(|cache| {
10940                cache
10941                    .iter()
10942                    .filter_map(|group| group.as_ref())
10943                    .filter(|group| {
10944                        group.samples.len() >= MOSAIC_METAL_RESIDUAL_MIN_PREPARED_SAMPLES
10945                    })
10946                    .count()
10947            })
10948            .unwrap_or(0);
10949        let metal_cache_prepared_below_threshold =
10950            metal_cache_prepared_groups.saturating_sub(metal_cache_prepared_ge_threshold);
10951        eprintln!(
10952            "mosaic_residual_parallel groups={} grouped_samples={} total_worker_samples={} requested_threads={} chunk_len={} partition=group-contiguous actual_threads={} worker_samples={:?} worker_alloc_ms={:?} worker_ms={:?} metal_backend_enabled={} metal_cache_present={} metal_cache_prepared_groups={} metal_cache_prepared_ge_threshold={} metal_cache_prepared_below_threshold={} metal_on_demand_candidate_groups={} metal_raw_below_grouped_threshold={} metal_pb_rejected_groups={} metal_threshold_raw_samples={} metal_threshold_prepared_samples={} metal_calls={} metal_dirty_calls={} metal_residual_calls={} metal_samples={} metal_kernel_pack_ms={:.3} metal_device_queue_ms={:.3} metal_shader_compile_ms={:.3} metal_pipeline_ms={:.3} metal_buffer_alloc_ms={:.3} metal_model_pack_ms={:.3} metal_zero_outputs_ms={:.3} metal_encode_ms={:.3} metal_dispatch_wait_ms={:.3} metal_reduce_wait_ms={:.3} metal_readback_ms={:.3} metal_total_ms={:.3} join_ms={:.3} merge_ms={:.3} total_ms={:.3}",
10953            groups.len(),
10954            grouped_samples,
10955            total_worker_samples,
10956            thread_count,
10957            chunk_len,
10958            worker_samples.len(),
10959            worker_samples,
10960            worker_alloc
10961                .iter()
10962                .map(|elapsed| profile::millis(*elapsed))
10963                .collect::<Vec<_>>(),
10964            worker_compute
10965                .iter()
10966                .map(|elapsed| profile::millis(*elapsed))
10967                .collect::<Vec<_>>(),
10968            mosaic_residual_metal_backend_enabled(),
10969            metal_group_cache.is_some(),
10970            metal_cache_prepared_groups,
10971            metal_cache_prepared_ge_threshold,
10972            metal_cache_prepared_below_threshold,
10973            residual_on_demand_candidate_groups,
10974            residual_raw_below_grouped_threshold,
10975            residual_pb_rejected_groups,
10976            MOSAIC_GROUPED_RESIDUAL_MIN_RAW_SAMPLES,
10977            MOSAIC_METAL_RESIDUAL_MIN_PREPARED_SAMPLES,
10978            metal_stats.calls,
10979            metal_stats.dirty_calls,
10980            metal_stats.residual_calls,
10981            metal_stats.samples,
10982            profile::millis(metal_stats.kernel_pack),
10983            profile::millis(metal_stats.device_queue),
10984            profile::millis(metal_stats.shader_compile),
10985            profile::millis(metal_stats.pipeline),
10986            profile::millis(metal_stats.buffer_alloc),
10987            profile::millis(metal_stats.model_pack),
10988            profile::millis(metal_stats.zero_outputs),
10989            profile::millis(metal_stats.encode),
10990            profile::millis(metal_stats.dispatch_wait),
10991            profile::millis(metal_stats.reduce_wait),
10992            profile::millis(metal_stats.readback),
10993            profile::millis(metal_stats.total),
10994            profile::millis(join_elapsed),
10995            profile::millis(merge_elapsed),
10996            profile::millis(started.elapsed()),
10997        );
10998    }
10999
11000    Ok(MosaicResidualParallelContribution {
11001        residual_grid,
11002        worker_samples,
11003        worker_alloc,
11004        worker_compute,
11005        join_elapsed,
11006        merge_elapsed,
11007        elapsed: started.elapsed(),
11008    })
11009}
11010
11011#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
11012fn compute_mosaic_residual_group_contribution(
11013    request: &ImagingRequest,
11014    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
11015    gridder: &StandardGridder,
11016    group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
11017    conv_sampling: usize,
11018    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
11019    thread_count: usize,
11020    projector_cache: Option<&mut MosaicProjectorCache>,
11021    prepared_metal: Option<&MosaicMetalPreparedGroup>,
11022    prepared_projector: Option<&ScreenProjector>,
11023) -> Result<MosaicResidualGroupContribution, ImagingError> {
11024    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
11025    if !mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
11026        request.geometry,
11027        config.phase_center_direction_rad,
11028        group.pointing_direction_rad,
11029    ) {
11030        return Ok(MosaicResidualGroupContribution {
11031            residual_grid: Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny)),
11032            metal_stats: MosaicMetalGridStats::default(),
11033            worker_samples: Vec::new(),
11034            worker_compute: Vec::new(),
11035            worker_alloc: Vec::new(),
11036            join_elapsed: Duration::ZERO,
11037            merge_elapsed: Duration::ZERO,
11038            stage_elapsed: Duration::ZERO,
11039        });
11040    }
11041    let built_projector;
11042    let cached_projector;
11043    let projector = match prepared_projector {
11044        Some(projector) => projector,
11045        None => match projector_cache {
11046            Some(cache) => {
11047                cached_projector = cached_mosaic_projector(
11048                    cache,
11049                    request.geometry,
11050                    gridder,
11051                    config.phase_center_direction_rad,
11052                    group.pointing_direction_rad,
11053                    group.primary_beam_model,
11054                    group.frequency_hz,
11055                    conv_sampling,
11056                    2,
11057                    true,
11058                )?;
11059                &cached_projector
11060            }
11061            None => {
11062                built_projector = build_mosaic_projector(
11063                    request.geometry,
11064                    gridder,
11065                    config.phase_center_direction_rad,
11066                    group.pointing_direction_rad,
11067                    group.primary_beam_model,
11068                    group.frequency_hz,
11069                    conv_sampling,
11070                    2,
11071                    true,
11072                )?;
11073                &built_projector
11074            }
11075        },
11076    };
11077    if group.batch.len() >= MOSAIC_GROUPED_RESIDUAL_MIN_RAW_SAMPLES {
11078        let collected_prepared;
11079        let prepared = match prepared_metal {
11080            Some(prepared) => Some(prepared),
11081            None => {
11082                collected_prepared = collect_mosaic_metal_samples(group, projector, None)?;
11083                Some(&collected_prepared)
11084            }
11085        };
11086        if mosaic_residual_metal_backend_enabled()
11087            && prepared.is_some_and(|prepared| {
11088                prepared.samples.len() >= MOSAIC_METAL_RESIDUAL_MIN_PREPARED_SAMPLES
11089            })
11090        {
11091            return compute_mosaic_residual_group_grid_metal(
11092                gridder, group, projector, model_grid, prepared,
11093            );
11094        }
11095        if let Some(prepared) = prepared {
11096            return compute_mosaic_residual_group_grid_grouped_cpu(
11097                gridder, group, projector, model_grid, prepared,
11098            );
11099        }
11100    }
11101    let actual_threads = mosaic_parallel_thread_count(group.batch.len()).min(thread_count);
11102    if actual_threads > 1 {
11103        let contribution = compute_mosaic_residual_group_grid_sample_ranges(
11104            gridder,
11105            group,
11106            projector,
11107            model_grid,
11108            actual_threads,
11109        )?;
11110        profile::log_parallel_stage(profile::ParallelStageProfile {
11111            stage: "mosaic_residual_group_grid",
11112            requested_threads: standard_mfs_grid_threads(),
11113            actual_threads: contribution.worker_compute.len(),
11114            chunking: "sample-range",
11115            chunk_len: group.batch.len().div_ceil(actual_threads),
11116            samples_total: group.batch.len(),
11117            samples_per_worker: contribution.worker_samples.clone(),
11118            local_grid_bytes_per_worker: complex64_grid_bytes(grid_nx, grid_ny, 1),
11119            local_grid_count: 1,
11120            local_alloc_zero_by_worker: contribution.worker_alloc.clone(),
11121            worker_compute_by_worker: contribution.worker_compute.clone(),
11122            join_duration: contribution.join_elapsed,
11123            merge_duration: contribution.merge_elapsed,
11124            stage_duration: contribution.stage_elapsed,
11125        });
11126        return Ok(contribution);
11127    }
11128    let started = Instant::now();
11129    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
11130    for sample_index in 0..group.batch.len() {
11131        if !group.batch.gridable[sample_index] {
11132            continue;
11133        }
11134        let weight = group.batch.weight[sample_index];
11135        let sumwt_factor = group.batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index];
11136        let visibility = group.batch.visibility[sample_index];
11137        if !(weight.is_finite()
11138            && weight > 0.0
11139            && sumwt_factor.is_finite()
11140            && sumwt_factor > 0.0
11141            && visibility.re.is_finite()
11142            && visibility.im.is_finite())
11143        {
11144            continue;
11145        }
11146        let Some(plan) = projector.plan_sample_for_grid(
11147            group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
11148            group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
11149        ) else {
11150            continue;
11151        };
11152        let predicted = model_grid
11153            .map(|grid| projector.degrid_sample_planned(grid, &plan))
11154            .unwrap_or_else(|| Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0));
11155        let residual_visibility = visibility - predicted;
11156        let grid_weight = weight * sumwt_factor;
11157        projector.grid_sample_planned_f64(
11158            &mut residual_grid,
11159            &plan,
11160            Complex64::new(residual_visibility.re as f64, residual_visibility.im as f64)
11161                * f64::from(grid_weight),
11162        );
11163    }
11164    Ok(MosaicResidualGroupContribution {
11165        residual_grid,
11166        metal_stats: MosaicMetalGridStats::default(),
11167        worker_samples: vec![group.batch.len()],
11168        worker_compute: vec![started.elapsed()],
11169        worker_alloc: Vec::new(),
11170        join_elapsed: started.elapsed(),
11171        merge_elapsed: Duration::ZERO,
11172        stage_elapsed: started.elapsed(),
11173    })
11174}
11175
11176fn compute_mosaic_residual_group_grid_grouped_cpu(
11177    gridder: &StandardGridder,
11178    group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
11179    projector: &ScreenProjector,
11180    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
11181    prepared: &MosaicMetalPreparedGroup,
11182) -> Result<MosaicResidualGroupContribution, ImagingError> {
11183    let started = profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled().then(Instant::now);
11184    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
11185    let alloc_started = profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled().then(Instant::now);
11186    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
11187    let alloc_elapsed = alloc_started.map_or(Duration::ZERO, |started| started.elapsed());
11188    let grid_started = profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled().then(Instant::now);
11189    accumulate_mosaic_grouped_residual_cpu(
11190        projector,
11191        &prepared.samples,
11192        model_grid,
11193        &mut residual_grid,
11194    );
11195    let grid_elapsed = grid_started.map_or(Duration::ZERO, |started| started.elapsed());
11196    let stage_elapsed = started.map_or(Duration::ZERO, |started| started.elapsed());
11197    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled() {
11198        eprintln!(
11199            "mosaic_grouped_cpu_residual raw_samples={} grouped_samples={} grouped_sample_ratio={:.6} grid_ms={:.3} alloc_ms={:.3} total_ms={:.3}",
11200            prepared.gridded_samples,
11201            prepared.samples.len(),
11202            if prepared.gridded_samples == 0 {
11203                0.0
11204            } else {
11205                prepared.samples.len() as f64 / prepared.gridded_samples as f64
11206            },
11207            profile::millis(grid_elapsed),
11208            profile::millis(alloc_elapsed),
11209            profile::millis(stage_elapsed),
11210        );
11211    }
11212    Ok(MosaicResidualGroupContribution {
11213        residual_grid,
11214        metal_stats: MosaicMetalGridStats::default(),
11215        worker_samples: vec![group.batch.len()],
11216        worker_compute: vec![grid_elapsed],
11217        worker_alloc: vec![alloc_elapsed],
11218        join_elapsed: stage_elapsed,
11219        merge_elapsed: Duration::ZERO,
11220        stage_elapsed,
11221    })
11222}
11223
11224fn accumulate_mosaic_residual_group_grid_grouped_cpu_into(
11225    projector: &ScreenProjector,
11226    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
11227    prepared: &MosaicMetalPreparedGroup,
11228    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
11229) {
11230    let started = profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled().then(Instant::now);
11231    let grid_started = profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled().then(Instant::now);
11232    accumulate_mosaic_grouped_residual_cpu(projector, &prepared.samples, model_grid, residual_grid);
11233    let grid_elapsed = grid_started.map_or(Duration::ZERO, |started| started.elapsed());
11234    let stage_elapsed = started.map_or(Duration::ZERO, |started| started.elapsed());
11235    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled() {
11236        eprintln!(
11237            "mosaic_grouped_cpu_residual_into raw_samples={} grouped_samples={} grouped_sample_ratio={:.6} grid_ms={:.3} total_ms={:.3}",
11238            prepared.gridded_samples,
11239            prepared.samples.len(),
11240            if prepared.gridded_samples == 0 {
11241                0.0
11242            } else {
11243                prepared.samples.len() as f64 / prepared.gridded_samples as f64
11244            },
11245            profile::millis(grid_elapsed),
11246            profile::millis(stage_elapsed),
11247        );
11248    }
11249}
11250
11251fn compute_mosaic_residual_group_grid_sample_ranges(
11252    gridder: &StandardGridder,
11253    group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
11254    projector: &ScreenProjector,
11255    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
11256    thread_count: usize,
11257) -> Result<MosaicResidualGroupContribution, ImagingError> {
11258    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
11259    let chunk_len = group.batch.len().div_ceil(thread_count);
11260    let stage_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
11261    let join_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
11262    let mut worker_results = Vec::<MosaicResidualRangeContribution>::new();
11263    thread::scope(|scope| {
11264        let mut handles = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
11265        for sample_start in (0..group.batch.len()).step_by(chunk_len) {
11266            let sample_end = (sample_start + chunk_len).min(group.batch.len());
11267            handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
11268                let alloc_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
11269                let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
11270                let alloc_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(alloc_started);
11271                let compute_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
11272                for sample_index in sample_start..sample_end {
11273                    if !group.batch.gridable[sample_index] {
11274                        continue;
11275                    }
11276                    let weight = group.batch.weight[sample_index];
11277                    let sumwt_factor = group.batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index];
11278                    let visibility = group.batch.visibility[sample_index];
11279                    if !(weight.is_finite()
11280                        && weight > 0.0
11281                        && sumwt_factor.is_finite()
11282                        && sumwt_factor > 0.0
11283                        && visibility.re.is_finite()
11284                        && visibility.im.is_finite())
11285                    {
11286                        continue;
11287                    }
11288                    let Some(plan) = projector.plan_sample_for_grid(
11289                        group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
11290                        group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
11291                    ) else {
11292                        continue;
11293                    };
11294                    let predicted = model_grid
11295                        .map(|grid| projector.degrid_sample_planned(grid, &plan))
11296                        .unwrap_or_else(|| Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0));
11297                    let residual_visibility = visibility - predicted;
11298                    let grid_weight = weight * sumwt_factor;
11299                    projector.grid_sample_planned_f64(
11300                        &mut residual_grid,
11301                        &plan,
11302                        Complex64::new(
11303                            residual_visibility.re as f64,
11304                            residual_visibility.im as f64,
11305                        ) * f64::from(grid_weight),
11306                    );
11307                }
11308                MosaicResidualRangeContribution {
11309                    sample_start,
11310                    samples_assigned: sample_end - sample_start,
11311                    residual_grid,
11312                    alloc_elapsed,
11313                    compute_elapsed: profile::elapsed_since(compute_started),
11314                }
11315            }));
11316        }
11317        for handle in handles {
11318            worker_results.push(handle.join().map_err(|_| {
11319                ImagingError::Unsupported("mosaic residual sample worker panicked".to_string())
11320            })?);
11321        }
11322        Ok::<(), ImagingError>(())
11323    })?;
11324    let join_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(join_started);
11325
11326    worker_results.sort_by_key(|result| result.sample_start);
11327    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
11328    let merge_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
11329    for contribution in &worker_results {
11330        add_complex64_grid(&mut residual_grid, &contribution.residual_grid);
11331    }
11332    let merge_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(merge_started);
11333    Ok(MosaicResidualGroupContribution {
11334        residual_grid,
11335        metal_stats: MosaicMetalGridStats::default(),
11336        worker_samples: worker_results
11337            .iter()
11338            .map(|result| result.samples_assigned)
11339            .collect(),
11340        worker_compute: worker_results
11341            .iter()
11342            .map(|result| result.compute_elapsed)
11343            .collect(),
11344        worker_alloc: worker_results
11345            .iter()
11346            .map(|result| result.alloc_elapsed)
11347            .collect(),
11348        join_elapsed,
11349        merge_elapsed,
11350        stage_elapsed: profile::elapsed_since(stage_started),
11351    })
11352}
11353
11354fn compute_mosaic_residual_group_grid_metal(
11355    gridder: &StandardGridder,
11356    group: &MosaicPointingGroup,
11357    projector: &ScreenProjector,
11358    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
11359    prepared_group: Option<&MosaicMetalPreparedGroup>,
11360) -> Result<MosaicResidualGroupContribution, ImagingError> {
11361    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
11362    let collected_prepared;
11363    let prepared = match prepared_group {
11364        Some(prepared) => prepared,
11365        None => {
11366            collected_prepared = collect_mosaic_metal_samples(group, projector, None)?;
11367            &collected_prepared
11368        }
11369    };
11370    if prepared.samples.is_empty() {
11371        return Ok(MosaicResidualGroupContribution {
11372            residual_grid: Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny)),
11373            metal_stats: MosaicMetalGridStats::default(),
11374            worker_samples: Vec::new(),
11375            worker_compute: Vec::new(),
11376            worker_alloc: Vec::new(),
11377            join_elapsed: Duration::ZERO,
11378            merge_elapsed: Duration::ZERO,
11379            stage_elapsed: Duration::ZERO,
11380        });
11381    }
11382    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
11383    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
11384    let started = Instant::now();
11385    let metal_stats = accumulate_mosaic_grid_metal_samples(
11386        projector,
