11387        &prepared.samples,
11388        model_grid,
11389        &mut psf_grid,
11390        &mut residual_grid,
11391        MOSAIC_METAL_MODE_RESIDUAL,
11392    )?;
11393    Ok(MosaicResidualGroupContribution {
11394        residual_grid: complex32_grid_to_complex64(&residual_grid),
11395        metal_stats,
11396        worker_samples: vec![prepared.samples.len()],
11397        worker_compute: vec![started.elapsed()],
11398        worker_alloc: Vec::new(),
11399        join_elapsed: started.elapsed(),
11400        merge_elapsed: Duration::ZERO,
11401        stage_elapsed: started.elapsed(),
11402    })
11403}
11404
11405fn accumulate_mosaic_grid_metal_samples(
11406    projector: &ScreenProjector,
11407    samples: &[MosaicMetalSample],
11408    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
11409    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
11410    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
11411    mode: u32,
11412) -> Result<MosaicMetalGridStats, ImagingError> {
11413    accumulate_mosaic_grid_metal_samples_impl(
11414        projector,
11415        samples,
11416        model_grid,
11417        psf_grid,
11418        residual_grid,
11419        mode,
11420    )
11421}
11422
11423#[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
11424fn accumulate_mosaic_grid_metal_samples_impl(
11425    _projector: &ScreenProjector,
11426    _samples: &[MosaicMetalSample],
11427    _model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
11428    _psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
11429    _residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
11430    _mode: u32,
11431) -> Result<MosaicMetalGridStats, ImagingError> {
11432    Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
11433        "mosaic backend 'metal' requires macOS Metal and is not available on this platform"
11434            .to_string(),
11435    ))
11436}
11437
11438#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
11439fn accumulate_mosaic_grid_metal_samples_impl(
11440    projector: &ScreenProjector,
11441    samples: &[MosaicMetalSample],
11442    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
11443    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
11444    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
11445    mode: u32,
11446) -> Result<MosaicMetalGridStats, ImagingError> {
11447    use std::{ffi::c_void, mem, ptr, ptr::NonNull, slice};
11448
11449    use objc2_metal::{
11450        MTLBuffer, MTLCommandBuffer, MTLCommandBufferStatus, MTLCommandEncoder, MTLCommandQueue,
11451        MTLComputeCommandEncoder, MTLComputePipelineState, MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice, MTLDevice,
11452        MTLLibrary, MTLResourceOptions, MTLSize,
11453    };
11454
11455    let profile_detail = profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled();
11456    let total_started = Instant::now();
11457    let [grid_width, grid_height] = gridder_shape_from_complex32_grid(psf_grid);
11458    let cell_count = grid_width.checked_mul(grid_height).ok_or_else(|| {
11459        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal grid is too large".to_string())
11460    })?;
11461    if samples.is_empty() {
11462        return Ok(MosaicMetalGridStats::default());
11463    }
11464    let partial_grid_count = mosaic_metal_partial_grid_count(samples.len(), cell_count);
11465    let partial_chunk_len = samples.len().div_ceil(partial_grid_count);
11466    let use_partial_grids = partial_grid_count > 1;
11467    let sample_bytes = mem::size_of_val(samples);
11468    let kernel_pack_started = Instant::now();
11469    let compact_kernel = projector.compact_phased_kernel_weights();
11470    let kernel_values = compact_kernel
11471        .values
11472        .iter()
11473        .map(|value| WProjectMetalComplex {
11474            re: value.re,
11475            im: value.im,
11476        })
11477        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
11478    let kernel_pack_elapsed = kernel_pack_started.elapsed();
11479    let kernel_bytes = mem::size_of_val(kernel_values.as_slice());
11480    let model_pack_started = Instant::now();
11481    let model_values = if let Some(model_grid) = model_grid {
11482        model_grid
11483            .iter()
11484            .map(|value| WProjectMetalComplex {
11485                re: value.re,
11486                im: value.im,
11487            })
11488            .collect::<Vec<_>>()
11489    } else {
11490        vec![WProjectMetalComplex { re: 0.0, im: 0.0 }]
11491    };
11492    let model_pack_elapsed = model_pack_started.elapsed();
11493    let model_bytes = mem::size_of_val(model_values.as_slice());
11494    let params = MosaicMetalParams {
11495        sample_count: u32::try_from(samples.len()).map_err(|_| {
11496            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal sample count exceeds u32".to_string())
11497        })?,
11498        grid_width: u32::try_from(grid_width).map_err(|_| {
11499            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal grid width exceeds u32".to_string())
11500        })?,
11501        grid_height: u32::try_from(grid_height).map_err(|_| {
11502            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal grid height exceeds u32".to_string())
11503        })?,
11504        kernel_width: u32::try_from(compact_kernel.tap_width).map_err(|_| {
11505            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal tap width exceeds u32".to_string())
11506        })?,
11507        kernel_center: u32::try_from(compact_kernel.offset_bias).map_err(|_| {
11508            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal offset bias exceeds u32".to_string())
11509        })?,
11510        sampling: u32::try_from(compact_kernel.offset_count).map_err(|_| {
11511            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal offset count exceeds u32".to_string())
11512        })?,
11513        mode,
11514        model_present: u32::from(model_grid.is_some()),
11515        partial_grid_count: u32::try_from(partial_grid_count).map_err(|_| {
11516            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal partial grid count exceeds u32".to_string())
11517        })?,
11518        partial_chunk_len: u32::try_from(partial_chunk_len).map_err(|_| {
11519            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
11520                "mosaic Metal partial grid chunk length exceeds u32".to_string(),
11521            )
11522        })?,
11523        _pad0: 0,
11524    };
11525
11526    let device_queue_started = Instant::now();
11527    let device = MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice().ok_or_else(|| {
11528        ImagingError::Unsupported(
11529            "mosaic backend 'metal' could not find a default Metal device".to_string(),
11530        )
11531    })?;
11532    let queue = device.newCommandQueue().ok_or_else(|| {
11533        ImagingError::Unsupported(
11534            "mosaic backend 'metal' could not create a Metal command queue".to_string(),
11535        )
11536    })?;
11537    let device_queue_elapsed = device_queue_started.elapsed();
11538    let shader_compile_started = Instant::now();
11539    let source = objc2_foundation::NSString::from_str(MOSAIC_METAL_SHADER);
11540    let library = device
11541        .newLibraryWithSource_options_error(&source, None)
11542        .map_err(|error| {
11543            ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
11544                "mosaic backend 'metal' failed to compile shader: {error:?}"
11545            ))
11546        })?;
11547    let shader_compile_elapsed = shader_compile_started.elapsed();
11548    let pipeline_started = Instant::now();
11549    let entry_point = if use_partial_grids {
11550        "mosaic_grid_chunked_samples"
11551    } else {
11552        "mosaic_grid_samples"
11553    };
11554    let function_name = objc2_foundation::NSString::from_str(entry_point);
11555    let function = library.newFunctionWithName(&function_name).ok_or_else(|| {
11556        ImagingError::Unsupported(
11557            "mosaic backend 'metal' shader entry point was not found".to_string(),
11558        )
11559    })?;
11560    let pipeline = device
11561        .newComputePipelineStateWithFunction_error(&function)
11562        .map_err(|error| {
11563            ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
11564                "mosaic backend 'metal' failed to create pipeline: {error:?}"
11565            ))
11566        })?;
11567    let pipeline_elapsed = pipeline_started.elapsed();
11568    let reduce_pipeline = if use_partial_grids {
11569        let reduce_function_name =
11570            objc2_foundation::NSString::from_str("mosaic_reduce_chunked_grids");
11571        let reduce_function = library
11572            .newFunctionWithName(&reduce_function_name)
11573            .ok_or_else(|| {
11574                ImagingError::Unsupported(
11575                    "mosaic backend 'metal' reduction shader entry point was not found".to_string(),
11576                )
11577            })?;
11578        Some(
11579            device
11580                .newComputePipelineStateWithFunction_error(&reduce_function)
11581                .map_err(|error| {
11582                    ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
11583                        "mosaic backend 'metal' failed to create reduction pipeline: {error:?}"
11584                    ))
11585                })?,
11586        )
11587    } else {
11588        None
11589    };
11590    let storage_options = MTLResourceOptions::StorageModeShared;
11591
11592    let buffer_started = Instant::now();
11593    let sample_buffer = unsafe {
11594        let pointer =
11595            NonNull::new(samples.as_ptr().cast::<c_void>() as *mut c_void).ok_or_else(|| {
11596                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal sample pointer was null".to_string())
11597            })?;
11598        device
11599            .newBufferWithBytesNoCopy_length_options_deallocator(
11600                pointer,
11601                sample_bytes,
11602                storage_options,
11603                None,
11604            )
11605            .ok_or_else(|| {
11606                ImagingError::Unsupported(
11607                    "mosaic backend 'metal' could not wrap sample buffer".to_string(),
11608                )
11609            })?
11610    };
11611    let kernel_buffer = unsafe {
11612        let pointer = NonNull::new(kernel_values.as_ptr().cast::<c_void>() as *mut c_void)
11613            .ok_or_else(|| {
11614                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal kernel pointer was null".to_string())
11615            })?;
11616        device
11617            .newBufferWithBytesNoCopy_length_options_deallocator(
11618                pointer,
11619                kernel_bytes,
11620                storage_options,
11621                None,
11622            )
11623            .ok_or_else(|| {
11624                ImagingError::Unsupported(
11625                    "mosaic backend 'metal' could not wrap kernel buffer".to_string(),
11626                )
11627            })?
11628    };
11629    let model_buffer = unsafe {
11630        let pointer = NonNull::new(model_values.as_ptr().cast::<c_void>() as *mut c_void)
11631            .ok_or_else(|| {
11632                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal model pointer was null".to_string())
11633            })?;
11634        device
11635            .newBufferWithBytesNoCopy_length_options_deallocator(
11636                pointer,
11637                model_bytes,
11638                storage_options,
11639                None,
11640            )
11641            .ok_or_else(|| {
11642                ImagingError::Unsupported(
11643                    "mosaic backend 'metal' could not wrap model buffer".to_string(),
11644                )
11645            })?
11646    };
11647    let params_buffer = unsafe {
11648        let params_slice = slice::from_ref(&params);
11649        let byte_len = mem::size_of_val(params_slice);
11650        let pointer = NonNull::new(params_slice.as_ptr().cast::<c_void>() as *mut c_void)
11651            .ok_or_else(|| {
11652                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal params pointer was null".to_string())
11653            })?;
11654        device
11655            .newBufferWithBytes_length_options(pointer, byte_len, storage_options)
11656            .ok_or_else(|| {
11657                ImagingError::Unsupported(
11658                    "mosaic backend 'metal' could not allocate params buffer".to_string(),
11659                )
11660            })?
11661    };
11662    let output_bytes = cell_count
11663        .checked_mul(mem::size_of::<u32>())
11664        .ok_or_else(|| {
11665            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("mosaic Metal output grid is too large".to_string())
11666        })?;
11667    let partial_output_bytes = output_bytes
11668        .checked_mul(partial_grid_count)
11669        .ok_or_else(|| {
11670            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
11671                "mosaic Metal partial output grid is too large".to_string(),
11672            )
11673        })?;
11674    let psf_re = device
11675        .newBufferWithLength_options(output_bytes, storage_options)
11676        .ok_or_else(|| {
11677            ImagingError::Unsupported(
11678                "mosaic backend 'metal' could not allocate PSF real buffer".to_string(),
11679            )
11680        })?;
11681    let psf_im = device
11682        .newBufferWithLength_options(output_bytes, storage_options)
11683        .ok_or_else(|| {
11684            ImagingError::Unsupported(
11685                "mosaic backend 'metal' could not allocate PSF imag buffer".to_string(),
11686            )
11687        })?;
11688    let residual_re = device
11689        .newBufferWithLength_options(output_bytes, storage_options)
11690        .ok_or_else(|| {
11691            ImagingError::Unsupported(
11692                "mosaic backend 'metal' could not allocate residual real buffer".to_string(),
11693            )
11694        })?;
11695    let residual_im = device
11696        .newBufferWithLength_options(output_bytes, storage_options)
11697        .ok_or_else(|| {
11698            ImagingError::Unsupported(
11699                "mosaic backend 'metal' could not allocate residual imag buffer".to_string(),
11700            )
11701        })?;
11702    let partial_psf_re = if use_partial_grids {
11703        Some(
11704            device
11705                .newBufferWithLength_options(partial_output_bytes, storage_options)
11706                .ok_or_else(|| {
11707                    ImagingError::Unsupported(
11708                        "mosaic backend 'metal' could not allocate partial PSF real buffer"
11709                            .to_string(),
11710                    )
11711                })?,
11712        )
11713    } else {
11714        None
11715    };
11716    let partial_psf_im = if use_partial_grids {
11717        Some(
11718            device
11719                .newBufferWithLength_options(partial_output_bytes, storage_options)
11720                .ok_or_else(|| {
11721                    ImagingError::Unsupported(
11722                        "mosaic backend 'metal' could not allocate partial PSF imag buffer"
11723                            .to_string(),
11724                    )
11725                })?,
11726        )
11727    } else {
11728        None
11729    };
11730    let partial_residual_re = if use_partial_grids {
11731        Some(
11732            device
11733                .newBufferWithLength_options(partial_output_bytes, storage_options)
11734                .ok_or_else(|| {
11735                    ImagingError::Unsupported(
11736                        "mosaic backend 'metal' could not allocate partial residual real buffer"
11737                            .to_string(),
11738                    )
11739                })?,
11740        )
11741    } else {
11742        None
11743    };
11744    let partial_residual_im = if use_partial_grids {
11745        Some(
11746            device
11747                .newBufferWithLength_options(partial_output_bytes, storage_options)
11748                .ok_or_else(|| {
11749                    ImagingError::Unsupported(
11750                        "mosaic backend 'metal' could not allocate partial residual imag buffer"
11751                            .to_string(),
11752                    )
11753                })?,
11754        )
11755    } else {
11756        None
11757    };
11758    let buffer_elapsed = buffer_started.elapsed();
11759    let accum_psf_re = partial_psf_re.as_ref().unwrap_or(&psf_re);
11760    let accum_psf_im = partial_psf_im.as_ref().unwrap_or(&psf_im);
11761    let accum_residual_re = partial_residual_re.as_ref().unwrap_or(&residual_re);
11762    let accum_residual_im = partial_residual_im.as_ref().unwrap_or(&residual_im);
11763    let accum_output_bytes = if use_partial_grids {
11764        partial_output_bytes
11765    } else {
11766        output_bytes
11767    };
11768    let zero_started = Instant::now();
11769    unsafe {
11770        ptr::write_bytes(
11771            accum_psf_re.contents().as_ptr().cast::<u8>(),
11772            0,
11773            accum_output_bytes,
11774        );
11775        ptr::write_bytes(
11776            accum_psf_im.contents().as_ptr().cast::<u8>(),
11777            0,
11778            accum_output_bytes,
11779        );
11780        ptr::write_bytes(
11781            accum_residual_re.contents().as_ptr().cast::<u8>(),
11782            0,
11783            accum_output_bytes,
11784        );
11785        ptr::write_bytes(
11786            accum_residual_im.contents().as_ptr().cast::<u8>(),
11787            0,
11788            accum_output_bytes,
11789        );
11790    }
11791    let zero_elapsed = zero_started.elapsed();
11792
11793    if profile_detail {
11794        eprintln!(
11795            "mosaic_metal_dispatch_begin mode={} entry={} samples={} grid={}x{} support={} full_kernel_width={} compact_tap_width={} offset_count={} partial_grids={} partial_chunk_len={} sample_bytes={} kernel_bytes={} model_bytes={} accum_output_bytes={}",
11796            mode,
11797            entry_point,
11798            samples.len(),
11799            grid_width,
11800            grid_height,
11801            projector.support(),
11802            projector.kernel_weight_width(),
11803            compact_kernel.tap_width,
11804            compact_kernel.offset_count,
11805            partial_grid_count,
11806            partial_chunk_len,
11807            sample_bytes,
11808            kernel_bytes,
11809            model_bytes,
11810            accum_output_bytes * 4,
11811        );
11812    }
11813
11814    let encode_started = Instant::now();
11815    let command_buffer = queue.commandBuffer().ok_or_else(|| {
11816        ImagingError::Unsupported(
11817            "mosaic backend 'metal' could not create a command buffer".to_string(),
11818        )
11819    })?;
11820    let encoder = command_buffer.computeCommandEncoder().ok_or_else(|| {
11821        ImagingError::Unsupported(
11822            "mosaic backend 'metal' could not create a compute encoder".to_string(),
11823        )
11824    })?;
11825    encoder.setComputePipelineState(&pipeline);
11826    unsafe {
11827        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&sample_buffer), 0, 0);
11828        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&kernel_buffer), 0, 1);
11829        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&model_buffer), 0, 2);
11830        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(accum_psf_re), 0, 3);
11831        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(accum_psf_im), 0, 4);
11832        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(accum_residual_re), 0, 5);
11833        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(accum_residual_im), 0, 6);
11834        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&params_buffer), 0, 7);
11835    }
11836    let thread_count = samples.len();
11837    let thread_width = pipeline.threadExecutionWidth().max(1);
11838    let max_threads = pipeline.maxTotalThreadsPerThreadgroup().max(1);
11839    let threads_per_group = thread_width.min(max_threads).min(thread_count).max(1);
11840    encoder.dispatchThreads_threadsPerThreadgroup(
11841        MTLSize {
11842            width: thread_count,
11843            height: 1,
11844            depth: 1,
11845        },
11846        MTLSize {
11847            width: threads_per_group,
11848            height: 1,
11849            depth: 1,
11850        },
11851    );
11852    encoder.endEncoding();
11853    let encode_elapsed = encode_started.elapsed();
11854    let dispatch_started = Instant::now();
11855    command_buffer.commit();
11856    command_buffer.waitUntilCompleted();
11857    let dispatch_elapsed = dispatch_started.elapsed();
11858    if command_buffer.status() == MTLCommandBufferStatus::Error {
11859        let message = command_buffer
11860            .error()
11861            .map(|error| format!("{error:?}"))
11862            .unwrap_or_else(|| "unknown Metal command buffer error".to_string());
11863        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
11864            "mosaic backend 'metal' command failed: {message}"
11865        )));
11866    }
11867    let mut reduce_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
11868    if use_partial_grids {
11869        let reduce_started = Instant::now();
11870        let reduce_command_buffer = queue.commandBuffer().ok_or_else(|| {
11871            ImagingError::Unsupported(
11872                "mosaic backend 'metal' could not create a reduction command buffer".to_string(),
11873            )
11874        })?;
11875        let reduce_encoder = reduce_command_buffer
11876            .computeCommandEncoder()
11877            .ok_or_else(|| {
11878                ImagingError::Unsupported(
11879                    "mosaic backend 'metal' could not create a reduction compute encoder"
11880                        .to_string(),
11881                )
11882            })?;
11883        reduce_encoder
11884            .setComputePipelineState(reduce_pipeline.as_ref().expect("reduction pipeline"));
11885        unsafe {
11886            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(accum_psf_re), 0, 0);
11887            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(accum_psf_im), 0, 1);
11888            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(accum_residual_re), 0, 2);
11889            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(accum_residual_im), 0, 3);
11890            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&psf_re), 0, 4);
11891            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&psf_im), 0, 5);
11892            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&residual_re), 0, 6);
11893            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&residual_im), 0, 7);
11894            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&params_buffer), 0, 8);
11895        }
11896        let reduce_thread_count = cell_count;
11897        let reduce_thread_width = reduce_pipeline
11898            .as_ref()
11899            .expect("reduction pipeline")
11900            .threadExecutionWidth()
11901            .max(1);
11902        let reduce_max_threads = reduce_pipeline
11903            .as_ref()
11904            .expect("reduction pipeline")
11905            .maxTotalThreadsPerThreadgroup()
11906            .max(1);
11907        let reduce_threads_per_group = reduce_thread_width
11908            .min(reduce_max_threads)
11909            .min(reduce_thread_count)
11910            .max(1);
11911        reduce_encoder.dispatchThreads_threadsPerThreadgroup(
11912            MTLSize {
11913                width: reduce_thread_count,
11914                height: 1,
11915                depth: 1,
11916            },
11917            MTLSize {
11918                width: reduce_threads_per_group,
11919                height: 1,
11920                depth: 1,
11921            },
11922        );
11923        reduce_encoder.endEncoding();
11924        reduce_command_buffer.commit();
11925        reduce_command_buffer.waitUntilCompleted();
11926        reduce_elapsed = reduce_started.elapsed();
11927        if reduce_command_buffer.status() == MTLCommandBufferStatus::Error {
11928            let message = reduce_command_buffer
11929                .error()
11930                .map(|error| format!("{error:?}"))
11931                .unwrap_or_else(|| "unknown Metal command buffer error".to_string());
11932            return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
11933                "mosaic backend 'metal' reduction command failed: {message}"
11934            )));
11935        }
11936    }
11937
11938    let readback_started = Instant::now();
11939    let residual_re_values =
11940        unsafe { slice::from_raw_parts(residual_re.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(), cell_count) };
11941    let residual_im_values =
11942        unsafe { slice::from_raw_parts(residual_im.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(), cell_count) };
11943    if mode == MOSAIC_METAL_MODE_DIRTY {
11944        let psf_re_values =
11945            unsafe { slice::from_raw_parts(psf_re.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(), cell_count) };
11946        let psf_im_values =
11947            unsafe { slice::from_raw_parts(psf_im.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(), cell_count) };
11948        for (
11949            (((psf_cell, &psf_re_value), &psf_im_value), residual_cell),
11950            (&residual_re_value, &residual_im_value),
11951        ) in psf_grid
11952            .as_slice_memory_order_mut()
11953            .expect("mosaic PSF grid should be contiguous")
11954            .iter_mut()
11955            .zip(psf_re_values)
11956            .zip(psf_im_values)
11957            .zip(
11958                residual_grid
11959                    .as_slice_memory_order_mut()
11960                    .expect("mosaic residual grid should be contiguous")
11961                    .iter_mut(),
11962            )
11963            .zip(residual_re_values.iter().zip(residual_im_values))
11964        {
11965            *psf_cell = Complex32::new(psf_re_value, psf_im_value);
11966            *residual_cell = Complex32::new(residual_re_value, residual_im_value);
11967        }
11968    } else {
11969        for (residual_cell, (&residual_re_value, &residual_im_value)) in residual_grid
11970            .as_slice_memory_order_mut()
11971            .expect("mosaic residual grid should be contiguous")
11972            .iter_mut()
11973            .zip(residual_re_values.iter().zip(residual_im_values))
11974        {
11975            *residual_cell = Complex32::new(residual_re_value, residual_im_value);
11976        }
11977    }
11978    let readback_elapsed = readback_started.elapsed();
11979
11980    let stats = MosaicMetalGridStats {
11981        calls: 1,
11982        dirty_calls: usize::from(mode == MOSAIC_METAL_MODE_DIRTY),
11983        residual_calls: usize::from(mode == MOSAIC_METAL_MODE_RESIDUAL),
11984        samples: samples.len(),
11985        kernel_pack: kernel_pack_elapsed,
11986        device_queue: device_queue_elapsed,
11987        shader_compile: shader_compile_elapsed,
11988        pipeline: pipeline_elapsed,
11989        buffer_alloc: buffer_elapsed,
11990        model_pack: model_pack_elapsed,
11991        zero_outputs: zero_elapsed,
11992        encode: encode_elapsed,
11993        dispatch_wait: dispatch_elapsed,
11994        reduce_wait: reduce_elapsed,
11995        readback: readback_elapsed,
11996        total: total_started.elapsed(),
11997    };
11998
11999    if profile_detail {
12000        eprintln!(
12001            "mosaic_metal_grid mode={} entry={} samples={} grid={}x{} support={} full_kernel_width={} compact_tap_width={} offset_count={} partial_grids={} partial_chunk_len={} sample_bytes={} kernel_bytes={} model_bytes={} output_bytes={} partial_output_bytes={} thread_width={} max_threads={} threads_per_group={} kernel_pack_ms={:.3} device_queue_ms={:.3} shader_compile_ms={:.3} pipeline_ms={:.3} buffer_alloc_ms={:.3} model_pack_ms={:.3} zero_outputs_ms={:.3} encode_ms={:.3} dispatch_wait_ms={:.3} reduce_wait_ms={:.3} readback_ms={:.3} total_ms={:.3}",
12002            mode,
12003            entry_point,
12004            samples.len(),
12005            grid_width,
12006            grid_height,
12007            projector.support(),
12008            projector.kernel_weight_width(),
12009            compact_kernel.tap_width,
12010            compact_kernel.offset_count,
12011            partial_grid_count,
12012            partial_chunk_len,
12013            sample_bytes,
12014            kernel_bytes,
12015            model_bytes,
12016            output_bytes * 4,
12017            if use_partial_grids {
12018                partial_output_bytes * 4
12019            } else {
12020                0
12021            },
12022            thread_width,
12023            max_threads,
12024            threads_per_group,
12025            profile::millis(kernel_pack_elapsed),
12026            profile::millis(device_queue_elapsed),
12027            profile::millis(shader_compile_elapsed),
12028            profile::millis(pipeline_elapsed),
12029            profile::millis(buffer_elapsed),
12030            profile::millis(model_pack_elapsed),
12031            profile::millis(zero_elapsed),
12032            profile::millis(encode_elapsed),
12033            profile::millis(dispatch_elapsed),
12034            profile::millis(reduce_elapsed),
12035            profile::millis(readback_elapsed),
12036            profile::millis(stats.total),
12037        );
12038    }
12039    Ok(stats)
12040}
12041
12042#[cfg_attr(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage), allow(dead_code))]
12043fn gridder_shape_from_complex32_grid(grid: &Array2<Complex32>) -> [usize; 2] {
12044    let dim = grid.dim();
12045    [dim.0, dim.1]
12046}
12047
12048#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
12049const MOSAIC_METAL_SHADER: &str = r#"
12050#include <metal_stdlib>
12051using namespace metal;
12052
12053struct MosaicSample {
12054    uint loc;
12055    uint support;
12056    int2 offset;
12057    int2 range_x;
12058    int2 range_y;
12059    float weight;
12060    float visibility_re;
12061    float visibility_im;
12062    uint kernel_base;
12063};
12064
12065struct MosaicParams {
12066    uint sample_count;
12067    uint grid_width;
12068    uint grid_height;
12069    uint kernel_width;
12070    uint kernel_center;
12071    uint sampling;
12072    uint mode;
12073    uint model_present;
12074    uint partial_grid_count;
12075    uint partial_chunk_len;
12076    uint _pad0;
12077};
12078
12079static inline void mosaic_atomic_add_float(device atomic_float *address, float value) {
12080    atomic_fetch_add_explicit(address, value, memory_order_relaxed);
12081}
12082
12083static inline uint mosaic_sample_loc_x(MosaicSample sample) {
12084    return sample.loc & 0xffffu;
12085}
12086
12087static inline uint mosaic_sample_loc_y(MosaicSample sample) {
12088    return sample.loc >> 16;
12089}
12090
12091static inline uint mosaic_kernel_index(MosaicSample sample, constant MosaicParams &params, int ix, int iy) {
12092    const uint offset_x = uint(sample.offset.x + int(params.kernel_center));
12093    const uint offset_y = uint(sample.offset.y + int(params.kernel_center));
12094    const uint tap_x = uint(ix + int(sample.support));
12095    const uint tap_y = uint(iy + int(sample.support));
12096    const uint offset_base =
12097        (offset_y * params.sampling + offset_x) * params.kernel_width * params.kernel_width;
12098    return sample.kernel_base + offset_base + tap_y * params.kernel_width + tap_x;
12099}
12100
12101kernel void mosaic_grid_samples(
12102    device const MosaicSample *samples [[buffer(0)]],
12103    device const float2 *kernels [[buffer(1)]],
12104    device const float2 *model [[buffer(2)]],
12105    device atomic_float *psf_re [[buffer(3)]],
12106    device atomic_float *psf_im [[buffer(4)]],
12107    device atomic_float *residual_re [[buffer(5)]],
12108    device atomic_float *residual_im [[buffer(6)]],
12109    constant MosaicParams &params [[buffer(7)]],
12110    uint sample_index [[thread_position_in_grid]]
12111) {
12112    if (sample_index >= params.sample_count) {
12113        return;
12114    }
12115    const MosaicSample sample = samples[sample_index];
12116    float predicted_re = 0.0f;
12117    float predicted_im = 0.0f;
12118    const bool needs_model = params.mode == 2u && params.model_present != 0u;
12119    if (needs_model) {
12120        for (int iy = sample.range_y.x; iy <= sample.range_y.y; ++iy) {
12121            const uint grid_y = uint(int(mosaic_sample_loc_y(sample)) + iy);
12122            for (int ix = sample.range_x.x; ix <= sample.range_x.y; ++ix) {
12123                const uint grid_x = uint(int(mosaic_sample_loc_x(sample)) + ix);
12124                const float2 cwt = kernels[mosaic_kernel_index(sample, params, ix, iy)];
12125                const float2 cell = model[grid_x * params.grid_height + grid_y];
12126                predicted_re += cwt.x * cell.x + cwt.y * cell.y;
12127                predicted_im += cwt.x * cell.y - cwt.y * cell.x;
12128            }
12129        }
12130    }
12131
12132    const bool write_psf = params.mode == 1u;
12133    const bool write_residual = params.mode == 1u || params.mode == 2u;
12134    const float residual_value_re = sample.visibility_re - predicted_re;
12135    const float residual_value_im = sample.visibility_im - predicted_im;
12136    for (int iy = sample.range_y.x; iy <= sample.range_y.y; ++iy) {
12137        const uint grid_y = uint(int(mosaic_sample_loc_y(sample)) + iy);
12138        for (int ix = sample.range_x.x; ix <= sample.range_x.y; ++ix) {
12139            const uint grid_x = uint(int(mosaic_sample_loc_x(sample)) + ix);
12140            const float2 cwt = kernels[mosaic_kernel_index(sample, params, ix, iy)];
12141            const uint cell = grid_x * params.grid_height + grid_y;
12142            if (write_psf) {
12143                mosaic_atomic_add_float(&psf_re[cell], sample.weight * cwt.x);
12144                mosaic_atomic_add_float(&psf_im[cell], sample.weight * cwt.y);
12145            }
12146            if (write_residual) {
12147                const float weighted_re =
12148                    sample.weight * (residual_value_re * cwt.x - residual_value_im * cwt.y);
12149                const float weighted_im =
12150                    sample.weight * (residual_value_re * cwt.y + residual_value_im * cwt.x);
12151                mosaic_atomic_add_float(&residual_re[cell], weighted_re);
12152                mosaic_atomic_add_float(&residual_im[cell], weighted_im);
12153            }
12154        }
12155    }
12156}
12157
12158kernel void mosaic_grid_chunked_samples(
12159    device const MosaicSample *samples [[buffer(0)]],
12160    device const float2 *kernels [[buffer(1)]],
12161    device const float2 *model [[buffer(2)]],
12162    device atomic_float *psf_re [[buffer(3)]],
12163    device atomic_float *psf_im [[buffer(4)]],
12164    device atomic_float *residual_re [[buffer(5)]],
12165    device atomic_float *residual_im [[buffer(6)]],
12166    constant MosaicParams &params [[buffer(7)]],
12167    uint sample_index [[thread_position_in_grid]]
12168) {
12169    if (sample_index >= params.sample_count) {
12170        return;
12171    }
12172    const MosaicSample sample = samples[sample_index];
12173    const uint partial_grid_index = min(
12174        sample_index / max(params.partial_chunk_len, 1u),
12175        params.partial_grid_count - 1u
12176    );
12177    const uint partial_grid_offset = partial_grid_index * params.grid_width * params.grid_height;
12178    float predicted_re = 0.0f;
12179    float predicted_im = 0.0f;
12180    const bool needs_model = params.mode == 2u && params.model_present != 0u;
12181    if (needs_model) {
12182        for (int iy = sample.range_y.x; iy <= sample.range_y.y; ++iy) {
12183            const uint grid_y = uint(int(mosaic_sample_loc_y(sample)) + iy);
12184            for (int ix = sample.range_x.x; ix <= sample.range_x.y; ++ix) {
12185                const uint grid_x = uint(int(mosaic_sample_loc_x(sample)) + ix);
12186                const float2 cwt = kernels[mosaic_kernel_index(sample, params, ix, iy)];
12187                const float2 cell = model[grid_x * params.grid_height + grid_y];
12188                predicted_re += cwt.x * cell.x + cwt.y * cell.y;
12189                predicted_im += cwt.x * cell.y - cwt.y * cell.x;
12190            }
12191        }
12192    }
12193
12194    const bool write_psf = params.mode == 1u;
12195    const bool write_residual = params.mode == 1u || params.mode == 2u;
12196    const float residual_value_re = sample.visibility_re - predicted_re;
12197    const float residual_value_im = sample.visibility_im - predicted_im;
12198    for (int iy = sample.range_y.x; iy <= sample.range_y.y; ++iy) {
12199        const uint grid_y = uint(int(mosaic_sample_loc_y(sample)) + iy);
12200        for (int ix = sample.range_x.x; ix <= sample.range_x.y; ++ix) {
12201            const uint grid_x = uint(int(mosaic_sample_loc_x(sample)) + ix);
12202            const float2 cwt = kernels[mosaic_kernel_index(sample, params, ix, iy)];
12203            const uint cell = partial_grid_offset + grid_x * params.grid_height + grid_y;
12204            if (write_psf) {
12205                mosaic_atomic_add_float(&psf_re[cell], sample.weight * cwt.x);
12206                mosaic_atomic_add_float(&psf_im[cell], sample.weight * cwt.y);
12207            }
12208            if (write_residual) {
12209                const float weighted_re =
12210                    sample.weight * (residual_value_re * cwt.x - residual_value_im * cwt.y);
12211                const float weighted_im =
12212                    sample.weight * (residual_value_re * cwt.y + residual_value_im * cwt.x);
12213                mosaic_atomic_add_float(&residual_re[cell], weighted_re);
12214                mosaic_atomic_add_float(&residual_im[cell], weighted_im);
12215            }
12216        }
12217    }
12218}
12219
12220kernel void mosaic_reduce_chunked_grids(
12221    device const float *partial_psf_re [[buffer(0)]],
12222    device const float *partial_psf_im [[buffer(1)]],
12223    device const float *partial_residual_re [[buffer(2)]],
12224    device const float *partial_residual_im [[buffer(3)]],
12225    device float *psf_re [[buffer(4)]],
12226    device float *psf_im [[buffer(5)]],
12227    device float *residual_re [[buffer(6)]],
12228    device float *residual_im [[buffer(7)]],
12229    constant MosaicParams &params [[buffer(8)]],
12230    uint cell [[thread_position_in_grid]]
12231) {
12232    const uint cell_count = params.grid_width * params.grid_height;
12233    if (cell >= cell_count) {
12234        return;
12235    }
12236
12237    float sum_psf_re = 0.0f;
12238    float sum_psf_im = 0.0f;
12239    float sum_residual_re = 0.0f;
12240    float sum_residual_im = 0.0f;
12241    for (uint partial = 0; partial < params.partial_grid_count; ++partial) {
12242        const uint index = partial * cell_count + cell;
12243        sum_psf_re += partial_psf_re[index];
12244        sum_psf_im += partial_psf_im[index];
12245        sum_residual_re += partial_residual_re[index];
12246        sum_residual_im += partial_residual_im[index];
12247    }
12248    psf_re[cell] = sum_psf_re;
12249    psf_im[cell] = sum_psf_im;
12250    residual_re[cell] = sum_residual_re;
12251    residual_im[cell] = sum_residual_im;
12252}
12253"#;
12254
12255fn flat_sky_mosaic_model_for_prediction(
12256    model: &Array2<f32>,
12257    weight_image: &Array2<f32>,
12258    pb_limit: f32,
12259) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
12260    let weight_peak = weight_image
12261        .iter()
12262        .copied()
12263        .fold(0.0f32, |peak, value| peak.max(value));
12264    if !(weight_peak.is_finite() && weight_peak > 0.0) {
12265        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
12266            "mosaic model prediction weight peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
12267        ));
12268    }
12269    let pb_scale_factor = weight_peak.sqrt();
12270    let mut prediction_model = Array2::<f32>::zeros(model.dim());
12271    for ((x, y), model_value) in model.indexed_iter() {
12272        let deno = weight_image[(x, y)].abs().sqrt() / pb_scale_factor;
12273        if deno.is_finite() && deno > pb_limit.abs() {
12274            prediction_model[(x, y)] = *model_value / deno;
12275        }
12276    }
12277    Ok(prediction_model)
12278}
12279
12280#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
12281fn cached_mosaic_projector(
12282    cache: &mut MosaicProjectorCache,
12283    geometry: ImageGeometry,
12284    gridder: &StandardGridder,
12285    phase_center_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
12286    pointing_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
12287    primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel,
12288    frequency_hz: f64,
12289    conv_sampling: usize,
12290    screen_power: u8,
12291    apply_phase_gradient: bool,
12292) -> Result<ScreenProjector, ImagingError> {
12293    let key = mosaic_projector_key(primary_beam_model, frequency_hz, screen_power);
12294    let base = if let Some(projector) = cache.get(&key) {
12295        projector.clone()
12296    } else {
12297        let projector = build_mosaic_projector(
12298            geometry,
12299            gridder,
12300            phase_center_direction_rad,
12301            phase_center_direction_rad,
12302            primary_beam_model,
12303            frequency_hz,
12304            conv_sampling,
12305            screen_power,
12306            false,
12307        )?;
12308        cache.insert(key, projector.clone());
12309        projector
12310    };
12311    if !apply_phase_gradient {
12312        return Ok(base);
12313    }
12314    Ok(base
12315        .clone()
12316        .with_phase_gradient(mosaic_projector_phase_gradient_rad_per_sample(
12317            geometry,
12318            phase_center_direction_rad,
12319            pointing_direction_rad,
12320            conv_sampling,
12321        )))
12322}
12323
12324fn mosaic_projector_key(
12325    primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel,
12326    frequency_hz: f64,
12327    screen_power: u8,
12328) -> MosaicProjectorKey {
12329    (
12330        primary_beam_model_key(primary_beam_model),
12331        mosaic_projector_frequency_key_bits(frequency_hz),
12332        screen_power,
12333    )
12334}
12335
12336fn mosaic_projector_frequency_key_bits(frequency_hz: f64) -> u64 {
12337    frequency_hz.to_bits()
12338}
12339
12340#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
12341fn build_mosaic_projector(
12342    geometry: ImageGeometry,
12343    gridder: &StandardGridder,
12344    phase_center_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
12345    pointing_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
12346    primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel,
12347    frequency_hz: f64,
12348    conv_sampling: usize,
12349    screen_power: u8,
12350    apply_phase_gradient: bool,
12351) -> Result<ScreenProjector, ImagingError> {
12352    let conv_size = hetarray_screen_conv_size(geometry);
12353    let projector = match primary_beam_model {
12354        PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
12355            dish_diameter_m,
12356            blockage_diameter_m,
12357        } => {
12358            let airy_lookup = AiryVoltageLookup::new(dish_diameter_m, blockage_diameter_m);
12359            ScreenProjector::from_hetarray_screens(
12360                geometry,
12361                gridder,
12362                conv_sampling,
12363                conv_size,
12364                |l, m| {
12365                    let vp = airy_lookup.evaluate_offsets(l, m, frequency_hz);
12366                    let value = match screen_power {
12367                        1 => vp,
12368                        2 => vp * vp,
12369                        4 => {
12370                            let pb = vp * vp;
12371                            pb * pb
12372                        }
12373                        _ => unreachable!("unsupported mosaic screen power"),
12374                    };
12375                    Complex32::new(value, 0.0)
12376                },
12377                |l, m| {
12378                    let vp = airy_lookup.evaluate_offsets(l, m, frequency_hz);
12379                    let pb = vp * vp;
12380                    Complex32::new(pb * pb, 0.0)
12381                },
12382            )?
12383        }
12384        PrimaryBeamModel::EvlaLBandCommon => ScreenProjector::from_hetarray_screens(
12385            geometry,
12386            gridder,
12387            conv_sampling,
12388            conv_size,
12389            |l, m| {
12390                let vp = primary_beam_voltage_pattern_for_offsets(
12391                    primary_beam_model,
12392                    l,
12393                    m,
12394                    frequency_hz,
12395                );
12396                let value = match screen_power {
12397                    1 => vp,
12398                    2 => vp * vp,
12399                    4 => {
12400                        let pb = vp * vp;
12401                        pb * pb
12402                    }
12403                    _ => unreachable!("unsupported mosaic screen power"),
12404                };
12405                Complex32::new(value, 0.0)
12406            },
12407            |l, m| {
12408                let vp = primary_beam_voltage_pattern_for_offsets(
12409                    primary_beam_model,
12410                    l,
12411                    m,
12412                    frequency_hz,
12413                );
12414                let pb = vp * vp;
12415                Complex32::new(pb * pb, 0.0)
12416            },
12417        )?,
12418    };
12419    if !apply_phase_gradient {
12420        return Ok(projector);
12421    }
12422    let projector_sampling = projector.sampling();
12423    Ok(
12424        projector.with_phase_gradient(mosaic_projector_phase_gradient_rad_per_sample(
12425            geometry,
12426            phase_center_direction_rad,
12427            pointing_direction_rad,
12428            projector_sampling,
12429        )),
12430    )
12431}
12432
12433fn mosaic_projector_phase_gradient_rad_per_sample(
12434    geometry: ImageGeometry,
12435    phase_center_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
12436    pointing_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
12437    conv_sampling: usize,
12438) -> [f64; 2] {
12439    let pixel_offset =
12440        mosaic_pointing_pixel_offset(geometry, phase_center_direction_rad, pointing_direction_rad);
12441    // CASA's HetArrayConvFunc applies the pointing phase ramp to the final
12442    // stored convolution function. MosaicFT passes mosaic.oversampling as
12443    // convSamp; the HetArray temporary lattice uses internal convSampling=1
12444    // and is resampled to this stored sampling before rephasing.
12445    let conv_samp = conv_sampling as f64;
12446    [
12447        -pixel_offset[0] * std::f64::consts::TAU / (geometry.nx() as f64 * conv_samp),
12448        -pixel_offset[1] * std::f64::consts::TAU / (geometry.ny() as f64 * conv_samp),
12449    ]
12450}
12451
12452fn mosaic_projector_sampling(geometry: ImageGeometry) -> usize {
12453    // CASA's HetArrayConvFunc path uses the `mosaic.oversampling` Aipsrc value,
12454    // which defaults to 10, after enforcing a minimum of 10.
12455    let _ = geometry;
12456    10
12457}
12458
12459fn mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
12460    geometry: ImageGeometry,
12461    phase_center_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
12462    pointing_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
12463) -> bool {
12464    // CASA's SimplePBConvFunc::addPBToFlux() records PB coverage only when
12465    // the pointing center converts to a pixel inside the target image. This is
12466    // intentionally a center-pixel rule, not a PB-wing overlap estimate; an
12467    // earlier broader estimate admitted far off-image pointings and broke
12468    // `papersky_mosaic.ms` parity.
12469    let [pixel_x, pixel_y] = mosaic_pointing_pixel_position(
12470        geometry,
12471        phase_center_direction_rad,
12472        pointing_direction_rad,
12473    );
12474    mosaic_pointing_pixel_inside_image(geometry, [pixel_x, pixel_y])
12475}
12476
12477fn mosaic_pointing_pixel_inside_image(geometry: ImageGeometry, pixel: [f64; 2]) -> bool {
12478    pixel[0] >= 0.0
12479        && pixel[0] < geometry.nx() as f64
12480        && pixel[1] >= 0.0
12481        && pixel[1] < geometry.ny() as f64
12482}
12483
12484fn mosaic_pointing_pixel_offset(
12485    geometry: ImageGeometry,
12486    phase_center_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
12487    pointing_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
12488) -> [f64; 2] {
12489    let [pixel_x, pixel_y] = mosaic_pointing_pixel_position(
12490        geometry,
12491        phase_center_direction_rad,
12492        pointing_direction_rad,
12493    );
12494    [
12495        pixel_x - geometry.nx() as f64 / 2.0,
12496        pixel_y - geometry.ny() as f64 / 2.0,
12497    ]
12498}
12499
12500fn mosaic_pointing_pixel_position(
12501    geometry: ImageGeometry,
12502    phase_center_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
12503    pointing_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
12504) -> [f64; 2] {
12505    let delta_ra =
12506        circular_angle_delta_rad(pointing_direction_rad[0] - phase_center_direction_rad[0]);
12507    let dec = pointing_direction_rad[1];
12508    let dec0 = phase_center_direction_rad[1];
12509    let l = dec.cos() * delta_ra.sin();
12510    let m = dec.sin() * dec0.cos() - dec.cos() * dec0.sin() * delta_ra.cos();
12511    [
12512        geometry.nx() as f64 / 2.0 - l / geometry.cell_size_rad[0].abs(),
12513        geometry.ny() as f64 / 2.0 + m / geometry.cell_size_rad[1].abs(),
12514    ]
12515}
12516
12517fn circular_angle_delta_rad(angle_rad: f64) -> f64 {
12518    (angle_rad + std::f64::consts::PI).rem_euclid(std::f64::consts::TAU) - std::f64::consts::PI
12519}
12520
12521/// Build the CASA-compatible image coordinate system for imager output products.
12522#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
12523pub fn build_image_coordinate_system(
12524    imsize: usize,
12525    phase_center: [f64; 2],
12526    cell_arcsec: f64,
12527    freq_ref: FrequencyRef,
12528    direction_ref: DirectionRef,
12529    plane_stokes: PlaneStokes,
12530    channel_frequencies_hz: &[f64],
12531    spectral_delta_hz: Option<f64>,
12532    requested_rest_frequency_hz: Option<f64>,
12533) -> CoordinateSystem {
12534    let cell_rad = cell_arcsec * std::f64::consts::PI / (180.0 * 3600.0);
12535    let mut coords = CoordinateSystem::new();
12536    coords.add_coordinate(Box::new(DirectionCoordinate::new(
12537        direction_ref,
12538        Projection::new(ProjectionType::SIN),
12539        phase_center,
12540        [-cell_rad, cell_rad],
12541        [imsize as f64 / 2.0, imsize as f64 / 2.0],
12542    )));
12543    coords.add_coordinate(Box::new(StokesCoordinate::new(vec![plane_to_stokes_type(
12544        plane_stokes,
12545    )])));
12546    coords.add_coordinate(Box::new(build_image_spectral_coordinate(
12547        freq_ref,
12548        channel_frequencies_hz,
12549        spectral_delta_hz,
12550        requested_rest_frequency_hz,
12551    )));
12552    coords
12553}
12554
12555fn build_image_spectral_coordinate(
12556    freq_ref: FrequencyRef,
12557    channel_frequencies_hz: &[f64],
12558    spectral_delta_hz: Option<f64>,
12559    requested_rest_frequency_hz: Option<f64>,
12560) -> SpectralCoordinate {
12561    let rest_frequency = requested_rest_frequency_hz.unwrap_or_else(|| {
12562        if channel_frequencies_hz.is_empty() {
12563            0.0
12564        } else {
12565            0.5 * (channel_frequencies_hz[0]
12566                + channel_frequencies_hz[channel_frequencies_hz.len() - 1])
12567        }
12568    });
12569    match channel_frequencies_hz {
12570        [] => SpectralCoordinate::new(
12571            freq_ref,
12572            0.0,
12573            spectral_delta_hz.unwrap_or(1.0),
12574            0.0,
12575            rest_frequency,
12576        ),
12577        [single] => SpectralCoordinate::new(
12578            freq_ref,
12579            *single,
12580            spectral_delta_hz.unwrap_or(1.0),
12581            0.0,
12582            rest_frequency,
12583        ),
12584        frequencies => {
12585            let delta = frequencies[1] - frequencies[0];
12586            let is_linear = frequencies.windows(2).all(|window| {
12587                let step = window[1] - window[0];
12588                (step - delta).abs() <= delta.abs().max(1.0) * 1.0e-9
12589            });
12590            if is_linear {
12591                SpectralCoordinate::new(freq_ref, frequencies[0], delta, 0.0, rest_frequency)
12592            } else {
12593                SpectralCoordinate::from_tabular(
12594                    freq_ref,
12595                    (0..frequencies.len()).map(|index| index as f64).collect(),
12596                    frequencies.to_vec(),
12597                    frequencies[0],
12598                    delta,
12599                    0.0,
12600                    rest_frequency,
12601                )
12602                .expect("validated channel frequency table")
12603            }
12604        }
12605    }
12606}
12607
12608fn plane_to_stokes_type(plane: PlaneStokes) -> StokesType {
12609    match plane {
12610        PlaneStokes::I => StokesType::I,
12611        PlaneStokes::Q => StokesType::Q,
12612        PlaneStokes::U => StokesType::U,
12613        PlaneStokes::V => StokesType::V,
12614        PlaneStokes::XX => StokesType::XX,
12615        PlaneStokes::YY => StokesType::YY,
12616        PlaneStokes::RR => StokesType::RR,
12617        PlaneStokes::LL => StokesType::LL,
12618    }
12619}
12620
12621/// Return the CASA-compatible voltage-pattern value for a homogeneous primary beam.
12622pub fn primary_beam_voltage_pattern(
12623    primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel,
12624    radius_rad: f64,
12625    frequency_hz: f64,
12626) -> f32 {
12627    match primary_beam_model {
12628        PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
12629            dish_diameter_m,
12630            blockage_diameter_m,
12631        } => airy_voltage_pattern(
12632            radius_rad,
12633            frequency_hz,
12634            dish_diameter_m,
12635            blockage_diameter_m,
12636        ),
12637        PrimaryBeamModel::EvlaLBandCommon => evla_common_voltage_pattern(radius_rad, frequency_hz),
12638    }
12639}
12640
12641#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
12642struct PrimaryBeamProductContext {
12643    phase_center_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
12644    primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel,
12645}
12646
12647/// Weighted frequency sample used when validating primary-beam product inputs.
12648#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug, PartialEq)]
12649pub struct PrimaryBeamWeightSample {
12650    /// Sample frequency in Hz.
12651    pub frequency_hz: f64,
12652    /// Sample weight.
12653    pub weight: f32,
12654}
12655
12656/// Primary-beam product request.
12657pub enum PrimaryBeamProductRequest<'a> {
12658    /// Convert a mosaic weight product into a normalized primary-beam product.
12659    MosaicFromWeight {
12660        /// Mosaic weight product.
12661        weight_product: &'a Array4<f32>,
12662    },
12663    /// Build a single-field primary-beam power product using image coordinates.
12664    SingleField {
12665        /// Output coordinate system.
12666        coords: &'a CoordinateSystem,
12667        /// Output product shape `(nx, ny, nstokes, nchan)`.
12668        shape: (usize, usize, usize, usize),
12669        /// Image-channel frequencies in Hz.
12670        channel_frequencies_hz: &'a [f64],
12671        /// Phase-center direction used for the primary-beam product, in radians.
12672        phase_center_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
12673        /// Primary-beam model used to evaluate the product.
12674        primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel,
12675    },
12676    /// Build a weighted single-field primary-beam product.
12677    WeightedSingleField {
12678        /// Output coordinate system.
12679        coords: &'a CoordinateSystem,
12680        /// Output product shape `(nx, ny, nstokes, nchan)`.
12681        shape: (usize, usize, usize, usize),
12682        /// Image-channel frequencies in Hz.
12683        channel_frequencies_hz: &'a [f64],
12684        /// Weighted source samples used to validate the request.
12685        samples: &'a [PrimaryBeamWeightSample],
12686        /// Phase-center direction used for the primary-beam product, in radians.
12687        phase_center_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
12688        /// Primary-beam model used to evaluate the product.
12689        primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel,
12690    },
12691    /// Build the primary-beam spectral-index correction product.
12692    Alpha {
12693        /// Output coordinate system.
12694        coords: &'a CoordinateSystem,
12695        /// Output product shape `(nx, ny, nstokes, nchan)`.
12696        shape: (usize, usize, usize, usize),
12697        /// Reference frequency in Hz.
12698        reference_frequency_hz: f64,
12699        /// Phase-center direction used for the primary-beam product, in radians.
12700        phase_center_direction_rad: [f64; 2],
12701        /// Primary-beam model used to evaluate the product.
12702        primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel,
12703    },
12704}
12705
12706#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
12707struct PrimaryBeamPlaneGeometry {
12708    pointing_x_pixel: f64,
12709    pointing_y_pixel: f64,
12710    increment_x_rad: f64,
12711    increment_y_rad: f64,
12712}
12713
12714/// Build a primary-beam product from a compact request.
12715pub fn primary_beam_product(
12716    request: PrimaryBeamProductRequest<'_>,
12717) -> Result<Array4<f32>, ImagingError> {
12718    match request {
12719        PrimaryBeamProductRequest::MosaicFromWeight { weight_product } => Ok(
12720            mosaic_primary_beam_product_from_weight_product(weight_product),
12721        ),
12722        PrimaryBeamProductRequest::SingleField {
12723            coords,
12724            shape,
12725            channel_frequencies_hz,
12726            phase_center_direction_rad,
12727            primary_beam_model,
12728        } => single_field_primary_beam_product(
12729            coords,
12730            shape,
12731            channel_frequencies_hz,
12732            PrimaryBeamProductContext {
12733                phase_center_direction_rad,
12734                primary_beam_model,
12735            },
12736        ),
12737        PrimaryBeamProductRequest::WeightedSingleField {
12738            coords,
12739            shape,
12740            channel_frequencies_hz,
12741            samples,
12742            phase_center_direction_rad,
12743            primary_beam_model,
12744        } => {
12745            let usable_samples = collapse_primary_beam_weight_samples(samples);
12746            if usable_samples.is_empty() {
12747                return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
12748                    "weighted primary-beam product requires at least one finite positive weighted sample"
12749                        .to_string(),
12750                ));
12751            }
12752            single_field_primary_beam_product(
12753                coords,
12754                shape,
12755                channel_frequencies_hz,
12756                PrimaryBeamProductContext {
12757                    phase_center_direction_rad,
12758                    primary_beam_model,
12759                },
12760            )
12761        }
12762        PrimaryBeamProductRequest::Alpha {
12763            coords,
12764            shape,
12765            reference_frequency_hz,
12766            phase_center_direction_rad,
12767            primary_beam_model,
12768        } => single_field_primary_beam_alpha_product(
12769            coords,
12770            shape,
12771            reference_frequency_hz,
12772            PrimaryBeamProductContext {
12773                phase_center_direction_rad,
12774                primary_beam_model,
12775            },
12776        ),
12777    }
12778}
12779
12780fn mosaic_primary_beam_product_from_weight_product(weight_product: &Array4<f32>) -> Array4<f32> {
12781    let mut pb = Array4::<f32>::zeros(weight_product.dim());
12782    let (_, _, nstokes, nchan) = weight_product.dim();
12783    for stokes_index in 0..nstokes {
12784        for channel_index in 0..nchan {
12785            let weight_plane = weight_product.slice(s![.., .., stokes_index, channel_index]);
12786            let peak = weight_plane
12787                .iter()
12788                .copied()
12789                .filter(|value| value.is_finite())
12790                .fold(0.0f32, f32::max);
12791            if peak <= 0.0 {
12792                continue;
12793            }
12794            let mut pb_plane = pb.slice_mut(s![.., .., stokes_index, channel_index]);
12795            Zip::from(&mut pb_plane)
12796                .and(&weight_plane)
12797                .for_each(|pb_value, weight_value| {
12798                    let normalized = (*weight_value).max(0.0) / peak;
12799                    if normalized.is_finite() && normalized > 0.0 {
12800                        *pb_value = normalized.sqrt();
12801                    }
12802                });
12803        }
12804    }
12805    pb
12806}
12807
12808/// Divide an image product by a primary beam above the configured cutoff.
12809pub fn primary_beam_correct_image_product(
12810    image: &Array4<f32>,
12811    pb: &Array4<f32>,
12812    pb_limit: f32,
12813) -> Array4<f32> {
12814    let pb_cutoff = pb_limit.abs();
12815    let mut corrected = Array4::<f32>::zeros(image.dim());
12816    Zip::from(&mut corrected).and(image).and(pb).for_each(
12817        |corrected_value, image_value, pb_value| {
12818            if pb_value.is_finite() && *pb_value > pb_cutoff {
12819                *corrected_value = *image_value / *pb_value;
12820            }
12821        },
12822    );
12823    corrected
12824}
12825
12826/// Build a primary-beam support mask using the configured cutoff.
12827pub fn primary_beam_support_mask_product(pb: &Array4<f32>, pb_limit: f32) -> ArrayD<bool> {
12828    let pb_cutoff = pb_limit.abs();
12829    pb.mapv(|value| value.is_finite() && value > pb_cutoff)
12830        .into_dyn()
12831}
12832
12833/// Zero primary-beam samples below the configured cutoff.
12834pub fn primary_beam_limited_product(pb: &Array4<f32>, pb_limit: f32) -> Array4<f32> {
12835    let pb_cutoff = pb_limit.abs();
12836    pb.mapv(|value| {
12837        if value.is_finite() && value > pb_cutoff {
12838            value
12839        } else {
12840            0.0
12841        }
12842    })
12843}
12844
12845/// Clean-mask product request.
12846pub enum CleanMaskProductRequest<'a> {
12847    /// Repeat one 2-D mask plane across all output channels.
12848    Plane {
12849        /// Plane mask in image-pixel order.
12850        mask: &'a Array2<bool>,
12851        /// Number of output channels to materialize.
12852        channel_count: usize,
12853    },
12854    /// Convert an already channelized mask cube.
12855    Cube {
12856        /// Cube mask in CASA image-product order.
12857        mask: &'a Array4<bool>,
12858    },
12859}
12860
12861/// Extract the `(x, y)` MFS plane from a CASA-style 4-D image product.
12862pub fn extract_mfs_plane_product(product: &Array4<f32>) -> Array2<f32> {
12863    product.slice(s![.., .., 0, 0]).to_owned()
12864}
12865
12866/// Expand a single `(x, y)` image plane to a one-Stokes, one-channel product.
12867pub fn single_plane_image_product(plane: &Array2<f32>) -> Array4<f32> {
12868    let (nx, ny) = plane.dim();
12869    let mut product = Array4::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny, 1, 1));
12870    product.slice_mut(s![.., .., 0, 0]).assign(plane);
12871    product
12872}
12873
12874/// Count true pixels in a 2-D clean mask.
12875pub fn clean_mask_pixel_count(mask: &Array2<bool>) -> usize {
12876    mask.iter().filter(|value| **value).count()
12877}
12878
12879/// Return the absolute finite masked peak in the MFS plane of a 4-D product.
12880pub fn mfs_image_product_peak_abs_masked(
12881    product: &Array4<f32>,
12882    clean_mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
12883    relative_tolerance: f32,
12884) -> f32 {
12885    let plane = extract_mfs_plane_product(product);
12886    clean_peak_location_masked_with_relative_tolerance(&plane, clean_mask, relative_tolerance)
12887        .map(|(_, value)| value.abs())
12888        .unwrap_or(0.0)
12889}
12890
12891/// Build the CASA-style floating clean-mask product.
12892pub fn clean_mask_image_product(request: CleanMaskProductRequest<'_>) -> Array4<f32> {
12893    match request {
12894        CleanMaskProductRequest::Plane {
12895            mask,
12896            channel_count,
12897        } => {
12898            let channel_count = channel_count.max(1);
12899            let (nx, ny) = mask.dim();
12900            let mut product = Array4::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny, 1, channel_count));
12901            for channel_index in 0..channel_count {
12902                for x in 0..nx {
12903                    for y in 0..ny {
12904                        product[(x, y, 0, channel_index)] = if mask[(x, y)] { 1.0 } else { 0.0 };
12905                    }
12906                }
12907            }
12908            product
12909        }
12910        CleanMaskProductRequest::Cube { mask } => mask.mapv(|value| if value { 1.0 } else { 0.0 }),
12911    }
12912}
12913
12914/// Build primary-beam side products for one image product.
12915///
12916/// Returns `(limited_pb, support_mask, image_pbcor)`.
12917pub fn primary_beam_output_products(
12918    image: Option<&Array4<f32>>,
12919    pb: &Array4<f32>,
12920    pb_limit: f32,
12921    include_image_pbcor: bool,
12922) -> (Array4<f32>, ArrayD<bool>, Option<Array4<f32>>) {
12923    let limited_pb = primary_beam_limited_product(pb, pb_limit);
12924    let support_mask = primary_beam_support_mask_product(pb, pb_limit);
12925    let image_pbcor = if include_image_pbcor {
12926        image.map(|image| primary_beam_correct_image_product(image, pb, pb_limit))
12927    } else {
12928        None
12929    };
12930    (limited_pb, support_mask, image_pbcor)
12931}
12932
12933/// Apply CASA-style primary-beam spectral-index correction.
12934pub fn primary_beam_correct_alpha_product(
12935    alpha: &Array4<f32>,
12936    pb_alpha: &Array4<f32>,
12937    pb: &Array4<f32>,
12938    pb_limit: f32,
12939) -> Array4<f32> {
12940    let pb_cutoff = pb_limit.abs();
12941    let mut corrected_alpha = alpha.clone();
12942    Zip::from(&mut corrected_alpha)
12943        .and(pb_alpha)
12944        .and(pb)
12945        .for_each(|alpha_value, pb_alpha_value, pb_value| {
12946            if pb_value.is_finite() && *pb_value > pb_cutoff {
12947                *alpha_value -= *pb_alpha_value;
12948            } else {
12949                *alpha_value = 0.0;
12950            }
12951        });
12952    corrected_alpha
12953}
12954
12955fn primary_beam_plane_geometry(
12956    coords: &CoordinateSystem,
12957    context: PrimaryBeamProductContext,
12958) -> Result<PrimaryBeamPlaneGeometry, ImagingError> {
12959    let mut pixel_axis_offset = 0usize;
12960    let mut direction_coordinate_index = None;
12961    for coordinate_index in 0..coords.n_coordinates() {
12962        let coordinate = coords.coordinate(coordinate_index);
12963        if coordinate.coordinate_type() == CoordinateType::Direction {
12964            direction_coordinate_index = Some((coordinate_index, pixel_axis_offset));
12965            break;
12966        }
12967        pixel_axis_offset += coordinate.n_pixel_axes();
12968    }
12969    let (direction_coordinate_index, pixel_axis_offset) =
12970        direction_coordinate_index.ok_or_else(|| {
12971            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
12972                "primary-beam product requires a direction coordinate".to_string(),
12973            )
12974        })?;
12975    if pixel_axis_offset != 0 {
12976        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
12977            "primary-beam product requires direction pixel axes first".to_string(),
12978        ));
12979    }
12980    let direction_coordinate = coords.coordinate(direction_coordinate_index);
12981    let pointing_pixel = direction_coordinate
12982        .to_pixel(&context.phase_center_direction_rad)
12983        .map_err(|error| {
12984            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!("convert PB pointing direction to pixel: {error}"))
12985        })?;
12986    let increments = direction_coordinate.increment();
12987    if pointing_pixel.len() < 2 || increments.len() < 2 {
12988        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
12989            "primary-beam direction coordinate must have two axes".to_string(),
12990        ));
12991    }
12992    Ok(PrimaryBeamPlaneGeometry {
12993        pointing_x_pixel: pointing_pixel[0],
12994        pointing_y_pixel: pointing_pixel[1],
12995        increment_x_rad: increments[0],
12996        increment_y_rad: increments[1],
12997    })
12998}
12999
13000fn primary_beam_radius_rad_from_plane(
13001    geometry: PrimaryBeamPlaneGeometry,
13002    x: usize,
13003    y: usize,
13004) -> f64 {
13005    let dx = geometry.increment_x_rad * (x as f64 - geometry.pointing_x_pixel);
13006    let dy = geometry.increment_y_rad * (y as f64 - geometry.pointing_y_pixel);
13007    (dx * dx + dy * dy).sqrt()
13008}
13009
13010fn single_field_primary_beam_product(
13011    coords: &CoordinateSystem,
13012    shape: (usize, usize, usize, usize),
13013    channel_frequencies_hz: &[f64],
13014    context: PrimaryBeamProductContext,
13015) -> Result<Array4<f32>, ImagingError> {
13016    let (nx, ny, nstokes, nchan) = shape;
13017    let mut pb = Array4::<f32>::zeros(shape);
13018    let pixel_axis_count = coords.n_pixel_axes();
13019    if pixel_axis_count < 2 {
13020        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
13021            "primary-beam product requires at least two direction pixel axes".to_string(),
13022        ));
13023    }
13024    let plane_geometry = primary_beam_plane_geometry(coords, context)?;
13025    let fallback_frequency_hz = channel_frequencies_hz
13026        .iter()
13027        .copied()
13028        .find(|frequency_hz| frequency_hz.is_finite() && *frequency_hz > 0.0)
13029        .ok_or_else(|| {
13030            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
13031                "primary-beam product requires a finite positive image frequency".to_string(),
13032            )
13033        })?;
13034    for channel_index in 0..nchan {
13035        let frequency_hz = channel_frequencies_hz
13036            .get(channel_index)
13037            .copied()
13038            .filter(|frequency_hz| frequency_hz.is_finite() && *frequency_hz > 0.0)
13039            .unwrap_or(fallback_frequency_hz);
13040        for x in 0..nx {
13041            for y in 0..ny {
13042                let radius_rad = primary_beam_radius_rad_from_plane(plane_geometry, x, y);
13043                let value = primary_beam_voltage_pattern(
13044                    context.primary_beam_model,
13045                    radius_rad,
13046                    frequency_hz,
13047                );
13048                let value = value * value;
13049                for stokes_index in 0..nstokes {
13050                    pb[(x, y, stokes_index, channel_index)] = value;
13051                }
13052            }
13053        }
13054    }
13055    Ok(pb)
13056}
13057
13058fn collapse_primary_beam_weight_samples(
13059    samples: &[PrimaryBeamWeightSample],
13060) -> Vec<PrimaryBeamWeightSample> {
13061    const CASA_PB_FREQUENCY_BIN_FRACTION: f64 = 0.005;
13062    let log_bin_width = (1.0 + CASA_PB_FREQUENCY_BIN_FRACTION).ln();
13063    let mut by_frequency_bin = BTreeMap::<i64, (f64, f64)>::new();
13064    for sample in samples {
13065        if !(sample.frequency_hz.is_finite()
13066            && sample.frequency_hz > 0.0
13067            && sample.weight.is_finite()
13068            && sample.weight > 0.0)
13069        {
13070            continue;
13071        }
13072        let key = (sample.frequency_hz.ln() / log_bin_width).round() as i64;
13073        let weight = f64::from(sample.weight);
13074        let entry = by_frequency_bin.entry(key).or_insert((0.0, 0.0));
13075        entry.0 += sample.frequency_hz * weight;
13076        entry.1 += weight;
13077    }
13078    by_frequency_bin
13079        .into_values()
13080        .filter_map(|(weighted_frequency_sum, weight)| {
13081            (weight.is_finite() && weight > 0.0).then_some(PrimaryBeamWeightSample {
13082                frequency_hz: weighted_frequency_sum / weight,
13083                weight: weight as f32,
13084            })
13085        })
13086        .collect()
13087}
13088
13089#[cfg(test)]
13090fn normalized_weighted_primary_beam_product(
13091    coords: &CoordinateSystem,
13092    shape: (usize, usize, usize, usize),
13093    samples: &[PrimaryBeamWeightSample],
13094    context: PrimaryBeamProductContext,
13095) -> Result<Array4<f32>, ImagingError> {
13096    let usable_samples = collapse_primary_beam_weight_samples(samples);
13097    if usable_samples.is_empty() {
13098        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
13099            "weighted primary-beam product requires at least one finite positive weighted sample"
13100                .to_string(),
13101        ));
13102    }
13103
13104    let (nx, ny, nstokes, nchan) = shape;
13105    let mut pb = Array4::<f32>::zeros(shape);
13106    let pixel_axis_count = coords.n_pixel_axes();
13107    if pixel_axis_count < 2 {
13108        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
13109            "primary-beam product requires at least two direction pixel axes".to_string(),
13110        ));
13111    }
13112    let total_weight = usable_samples
13113        .iter()
13114        .map(|sample| f64::from(sample.weight))
13115        .sum::<f64>();
13116    if !(total_weight.is_finite() && total_weight > 0.0) {
13117        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
13118            "weighted primary-beam product has non-positive total weight".to_string(),
13119        ));
13120    }
13121
13122    let plane_geometry = primary_beam_plane_geometry(coords, context)?;
13123    let mut peak = 0.0f32;
13124    for channel_index in 0..nchan {
13125        for x in 0..nx {
13126            for y in 0..ny {
13127                let radius_rad = primary_beam_radius_rad_from_plane(plane_geometry, x, y);
13128                let weighted_power = usable_samples
13129                    .iter()
13130                    .map(|sample| {
13131                        let voltage = primary_beam_voltage_pattern(
13132                            context.primary_beam_model,
13133                            radius_rad,
13134                            sample.frequency_hz,
13135                        ) as f64;
13136                        f64::from(sample.weight) * voltage * voltage
13137                    })
13138                    .sum::<f64>();
13139                let value = (weighted_power / total_weight).max(0.0).sqrt() as f32;
13140                peak = peak.max(value);
13141                for stokes_index in 0..nstokes {
13142                    pb[(x, y, stokes_index, channel_index)] = value;
13143                }
13144            }
13145        }
13146    }
13147    if peak > 0.0 {
13148        pb.mapv_inplace(|value| value / peak);
13149    }
13150    Ok(pb)
13151}
13152
13153fn single_field_primary_beam_alpha_product(
13154    coords: &CoordinateSystem,
13155    shape: (usize, usize, usize, usize),
13156    reference_frequency_hz: f64,
13157    context: PrimaryBeamProductContext,
13158) -> Result<Array4<f32>, ImagingError> {
13159    if !(reference_frequency_hz.is_finite() && reference_frequency_hz > 0.0) {
13160        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
13161            "primary-beam alpha product requires a finite positive reference frequency".to_string(),
13162        ));
13163    }
13164    let lower_frequency_hz = reference_frequency_hz * 0.995;
13165    let upper_frequency_hz = reference_frequency_hz * 1.005;
13166    let log_frequency_ratio = (upper_frequency_hz / lower_frequency_hz).ln();
13167    let lower = single_field_primary_beam_product(coords, shape, &[lower_frequency_hz], context)?;
13168    let upper = single_field_primary_beam_product(coords, shape, &[upper_frequency_hz], context)?;
13169    let mut alpha = Array4::<f32>::zeros(shape);
13170    Zip::from(&mut alpha).and(&lower).and(&upper).for_each(
13171        |alpha_value, lower_value, upper_value| {
13172            if *lower_value > 0.0 && *upper_value > 0.0 {
13173                *alpha_value =
13174                    ((*upper_value as f64 / *lower_value as f64).ln() / log_frequency_ratio) as f32;
13175            }
13176        },
13177    );
13178    Ok(alpha)
13179}
13180
13181fn primary_beam_voltage_pattern_for_offsets(
13182    primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel,
13183    l_rad: f64,
13184    m_rad: f64,
13185    frequency_hz: f64,
13186) -> f32 {
13187    match primary_beam_model {
13188        PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
13189            dish_diameter_m,
13190            blockage_diameter_m,
13191        } => airy_voltage_pattern_for_offsets(
13192            l_rad,
13193            m_rad,
13194            frequency_hz,
13195            dish_diameter_m,
13196            blockage_diameter_m,
13197        ),
13198        PrimaryBeamModel::EvlaLBandCommon => {
13199            let radius_rad = (l_rad * l_rad + m_rad * m_rad).sqrt();
13200            evla_common_voltage_pattern(radius_rad, frequency_hz)
13201        }
13202    }
13203}
13204
13205fn airy_voltage_pattern(
13206    radius_rad: f64,
13207    frequency_hz: f64,
13208    dish_diameter_m: f64,
13209    blockage_diameter_m: f64,
13210) -> f32 {
13211    if !(radius_rad.is_finite()
13212        && radius_rad >= 0.0
13213        && frequency_hz.is_finite()
13214        && frequency_hz > 0.0)
13215    {
13216        return 0.0;
13217    }
13218    // CASA PBMath1D stores per-pixel radius terms as Float before looking up
13219    // the tabulated voltage pattern.
13220    let radius_arcmin_ghz = (radius_rad.to_degrees() * 60.0 * (frequency_hz / 1.0e9)) as f32 as f64;
13221    airy_voltage_pattern_from_arcmin_ghz(radius_arcmin_ghz, dish_diameter_m, blockage_diameter_m)
13222}
13223
13224fn airy_voltage_pattern_for_offsets(
13225    l_rad: f64,
13226    m_rad: f64,
13227    frequency_hz: f64,
13228    dish_diameter_m: f64,
13229    blockage_diameter_m: f64,
13230) -> f32 {
13231    if !(l_rad.is_finite() && m_rad.is_finite() && frequency_hz.is_finite() && frequency_hz > 0.0) {
13232        return 0.0;
13233    }
13234    let l_deg = l_rad.to_degrees() as f32;
13235    let m_deg = m_rad.to_degrees() as f32;
13236    let radius_deg = (l_deg * l_deg + m_deg * m_deg).sqrt();
13237    let radius_arcmin_ghz = (f64::from(radius_deg) * 60.0 * (frequency_hz / 1.0e9)) as f32 as f64;
13238    airy_voltage_pattern_from_arcmin_ghz(radius_arcmin_ghz, dish_diameter_m, blockage_diameter_m)
13239}
13240
13241#[derive(Clone)]
13242struct AiryVoltageLookup {
13243    maximum_radius_arcmin_ghz: f64,
13244    values: Vec<f32>,
13245}
13246
13247impl AiryVoltageLookup {
13248    fn new(dish_diameter_m: f64, blockage_diameter_m: f64) -> Self {
13249        let maximum_radius_arcmin_ghz =
13250            casa_airy_max_radius_arcmin_ghz(dish_diameter_m, blockage_diameter_m);
13251        Self::new_with_maximum_radius(
13252            maximum_radius_arcmin_ghz,
13253            dish_diameter_m,
13254            blockage_diameter_m,
13255        )
13256    }
13257
13258    fn new_with_maximum_radius(
13259        maximum_radius_arcmin_ghz: f64,
13260        dish_diameter_m: f64,
13261        blockage_diameter_m: f64,
13262    ) -> Self {
13263        let sample_count_minus_one = 9_999.0;
13264        let values = (0..=sample_count_minus_one as usize)
13265            .map(|index| {
13266                airy_voltage_pattern_from_table_index(
13267                    index as f64,
13268                    maximum_radius_arcmin_ghz,
13269                    dish_diameter_m,
13270                    blockage_diameter_m,
13271                )
13272            })
13273            .collect();
13274        Self {
