13275            maximum_radius_arcmin_ghz,
13276            values,
13277        }
13278    }
13279
13280    fn evaluate_offsets(&self, l_rad: f64, m_rad: f64, frequency_hz: f64) -> f32 {
13281        if !(l_rad.is_finite()
13282            && m_rad.is_finite()
13283            && frequency_hz.is_finite()
13284            && frequency_hz > 0.0)
13285        {
13286            return 0.0;
13287        }
13288        let l_deg = l_rad.to_degrees() as f32;
13289        let m_deg = m_rad.to_degrees() as f32;
13290        let radius_deg = (l_deg * l_deg + m_deg * m_deg).sqrt();
13291        let radius_arcmin_ghz =
13292            (f64::from(radius_deg) * 60.0 * (frequency_hz / 1.0e9)) as f32 as f64;
13293        if radius_arcmin_ghz > self.maximum_radius_arcmin_ghz {
13294            return 0.0;
13295        }
13296        let sample_count_minus_one = (self.values.len() - 1) as f64;
13297        let index = (radius_arcmin_ghz * sample_count_minus_one / self.maximum_radius_arcmin_ghz)
13298            .floor()
13299            .clamp(0.0, sample_count_minus_one) as usize;
13300        self.values[index]
13301    }
13302}
13303
13304fn airy_voltage_pattern_from_arcmin_ghz(
13305    radius_arcmin_ghz: f64,
13306    dish_diameter_m: f64,
13307    blockage_diameter_m: f64,
13308) -> f32 {
13309    let maximum_radius_arcmin_ghz =
13310        casa_airy_max_radius_arcmin_ghz(dish_diameter_m, blockage_diameter_m);
13311    if radius_arcmin_ghz > maximum_radius_arcmin_ghz {
13312        return 0.0;
13313    }
13314    let sample_count_minus_one = 9_999.0;
13315    let index = (radius_arcmin_ghz * sample_count_minus_one / maximum_radius_arcmin_ghz)
13316        .floor()
13317        .clamp(0.0, sample_count_minus_one);
13318    airy_voltage_pattern_from_table_index(
13319        index,
13320        maximum_radius_arcmin_ghz,
13321        dish_diameter_m,
13322        blockage_diameter_m,
13323    )
13324}
13325
13326fn airy_voltage_pattern_from_table_index(
13327    index: f64,
13328    maximum_radius_arcmin_ghz: f64,
13329    dish_diameter_m: f64,
13330    blockage_diameter_m: f64,
13331) -> f32 {
13332    let sample_count_minus_one = 9_999.0;
13333    let dimensionless_max_radius =
13334        maximum_radius_arcmin_ghz * 7.016 / (1.566 * 60.0) * dish_diameter_m / 24.5;
13335    let x = index * dimensionless_max_radius / sample_count_minus_one;
13336    if x.abs() <= f64::EPSILON {
13337        return 1.0;
13338    }
13339    if blockage_diameter_m <= 0.0 {
13340        return (2.0 * j1(x) / x) as f32;
13341    }
13342    let area_ratio = (dish_diameter_m / blockage_diameter_m).powi(2);
13343    let area_norm = area_ratio - 1.0;
13344    let length_ratio = dish_diameter_m / blockage_diameter_m;
13345    ((area_ratio * 2.0 * j1(x) / x - 2.0 * j1(x * length_ratio) / (x * length_ratio)) / area_norm)
13346        as f32
13347}
13348
13349fn primary_beam_max_radius_arcsec_at_100ghz(primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel) -> Option<f64> {
13350    match primary_beam_model {
13351        PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
13352            dish_diameter_m,
13353            blockage_diameter_m,
13354        } => Some(
13355            casa_airy_max_radius_arcmin_ghz(dish_diameter_m, blockage_diameter_m) * 60.0 / 100.0,
13356        ),
13357        PrimaryBeamModel::EvlaLBandCommon => Some(58.0 * 60.0 / 100.0),
13358    }
13359}
13360
13361fn casa_airy_max_radius_arcmin_ghz(dish_diameter_m: f64, blockage_diameter_m: f64) -> f64 {
13362    if approx_eq(dish_diameter_m, 10.7, 1.0e-6) && approx_eq(blockage_diameter_m, 0.75, 1.0e-6) {
13363        // CASA's HetArrayConvFunc ALMA 12m override builds PBMath1DAiry with
13364        // support=max(150 arcsec, fov/5) at 100 GHz for typical Wave 3 images.
13365        250.0
13366    } else if approx_eq(dish_diameter_m, 6.25, 1.0e-6)
13367        && approx_eq(blockage_diameter_m, 0.75, 1.0e-6)
13368    {
13369        // CASA's ACA override uses support=max(300 arcsec, fov/3) at 100 GHz.
13370        500.0
13371    } else {
13372        1.784 * 60.0
13373    }
13374}
13375
13376fn approx_eq(left: f64, right: f64, tolerance: f64) -> bool {
13377    (left - right).abs() <= tolerance
13378}
13379
13380fn evla_common_voltage_pattern(radius_rad: f64, frequency_hz: f64) -> f32 {
13381    if !(radius_rad.is_finite()
13382        && radius_rad >= 0.0
13383        && frequency_hz.is_finite()
13384        && frequency_hz > 0.0)
13385    {
13386        return 0.0;
13387    }
13388    // Mirror CASA PBMath1DEVLA::nearestVPArray(), PBMath1DPoly::fillPBArray(),
13389    // and PBMath1D::apply(): CASA samples 10,000 voltage-pattern entries and
13390    // then uses integer-truncated radial lookup when applying the image PB.
13391    let coefficients = nearest_evla_common_coefficients(frequency_hz * 1.0e-6);
13392    let radius_arcmin_ghz = radius_rad.to_degrees() * 60.0 * (frequency_hz / 1.0e9);
13393    if radius_arcmin_ghz > 58.0 {
13394        return 0.0;
13395    }
13396    let inverse_increment_radius = 9_999.0 / 58.0;
13397    let sample_index = (radius_arcmin_ghz * inverse_increment_radius).floor();
13398    let sampled_radius_arcmin_ghz = sample_index / inverse_increment_radius;
13399    let x2 = sampled_radius_arcmin_ghz * sampled_radius_arcmin_ghz;
13400    let mut taper = 0.0f64;
13401    let mut power = 1.0f64;
13402    for coefficient in coefficients {
13403        taper += coefficient * power;
13404        power *= x2;
13405    }
13406    if taper <= 0.0 {
13407        0.0
13408    } else {
13409        taper.sqrt() as f32
13410    }
13411}
13412
13413fn nearest_evla_common_coefficients(frequency_mhz: f64) -> [f64; 4] {
13414    let (clamped_frequency_mhz, coefficients) = if (3990.0..=8001.0).contains(&frequency_mhz) {
13415        (
13416            frequency_mhz.clamp(4052.0, 7948.0),
13417            EVLA_C_BAND_COEFFICIENTS,
13418        )
13419    } else {
13420        (
13421            frequency_mhz.clamp(1040.0, 2000.0),
13422            EVLA_L_BAND_COEFFICIENTS,
13423        )
13424    };
13425    let mut best = coefficients[0].1;
13426    let mut best_delta_mhz = f64::INFINITY;
13427    for &(candidate_frequency_mhz, candidate_coefficients) in coefficients {
13428        let delta_mhz = (clamped_frequency_mhz - candidate_frequency_mhz).abs();
13429        if delta_mhz < best_delta_mhz {
13430            best_delta_mhz = delta_mhz;
13431            best = candidate_coefficients;
13432        }
13433    }
13434    best
13435}
13436
13437const EVLA_L_BAND_COEFFICIENTS: &[(f64, [f64; 4])] = &[
13438    (1040.0, [1.000, -1.529e-3, 8.69e-7, -1.88e-10]),
13439    (1104.0, [1.000, -1.486e-3, 8.15e-7, -1.68e-10]),
13440    (1168.0, [1.000, -1.439e-3, 7.53e-7, -1.45e-10]),
13441    (1232.0, [1.000, -1.450e-3, 7.87e-7, -1.63e-10]),
13442    (1296.0, [1.000, -1.428e-3, 7.62e-7, -1.54e-10]),
13443    (1360.0, [1.000, -1.449e-3, 8.02e-7, -1.74e-10]),
13444    (1424.0, [1.000, -1.462e-3, 8.23e-7, -1.83e-10]),
13445    (1488.0, [1.000, -1.455e-3, 7.92e-7, -1.63e-10]),
13446    (1552.0, [1.000, -1.435e-3, 7.54e-7, -1.49e-10]),
13447    (1680.0, [1.000, -1.443e-3, 7.74e-7, -1.57e-10]),
13448    (1744.0, [1.000, -1.462e-3, 8.02e-7, -1.69e-10]),
13449    (1808.0, [1.000, -1.488e-3, 8.38e-7, -1.83e-10]),
13450    (1872.0, [1.000, -1.486e-3, 8.26e-7, -1.75e-10]),
13451    (1936.0, [1.000, -1.459e-3, 7.93e-7, -1.62e-10]),
13452    (2000.0, [1.000, -1.508e-3, 8.31e-7, -1.68e-10]),
13453];
13454
13455const EVLA_C_BAND_COEFFICIENTS: &[(f64, [f64; 4])] = &[
13456    (4052.0, [1.000, -1.406e-3, 7.41e-7, -1.48e-10]),
13457    (4180.0, [1.000, -1.385e-3, 7.09e-7, -1.36e-10]),
13458    (4308.0, [1.000, -1.380e-3, 7.08e-7, -1.37e-10]),
13459    (4436.0, [1.000, -1.362e-3, 6.95e-7, -1.35e-10]),
13460    (4564.0, [1.000, -1.365e-3, 6.92e-7, -1.31e-10]),
13461    (4692.0, [1.000, -1.339e-3, 6.56e-7, -1.17e-10]),
13462    (4820.0, [1.000, -1.371e-3, 7.06e-7, -1.40e-10]),
13463    (4948.0, [1.000, -1.358e-3, 6.91e-7, -1.34e-10]),
13464    (5052.0, [1.000, -1.360e-3, 6.91e-7, -1.33e-10]),
13465    (5180.0, [1.000, -1.353e-3, 6.74e-7, -1.25e-10]),
13466    (5308.0, [1.000, -1.359e-3, 6.82e-7, -1.27e-10]),
13467    (5436.0, [1.000, -1.380e-3, 7.05e-7, -1.37e-10]),
13468    (5564.0, [1.000, -1.376e-3, 6.99e-7, -1.31e-10]),
13469    (5692.0, [1.000, -1.405e-3, 7.39e-7, -1.47e-10]),
13470    (5820.0, [1.000, -1.394e-3, 7.29e-7, -1.45e-10]),
13471    (5948.0, [1.000, -1.428e-3, 7.57e-7, -1.57e-10]),
13472    (6052.0, [1.000, -1.445e-3, 7.68e-7, -1.50e-10]),
13473    (6148.0, [1.000, -1.422e-3, 7.38e-7, -1.38e-10]),
13474    (6308.0, [1.000, -1.463e-3, 7.94e-7, -1.62e-10]),
13475    (6436.0, [1.000, -1.478e-3, 8.22e-7, -1.74e-10]),
13476    (6564.0, [1.000, -1.473e-3, 8.00e-7, -1.62e-10]),
13477    (6692.0, [1.000, -1.455e-3, 7.76e-7, -1.53e-10]),
13478    (6820.0, [1.000, -1.487e-3, 8.22e-7, -1.72e-10]),
13479    (6948.0, [1.000, -1.472e-3, 8.05e-7, -1.67e-10]),
13480    (7052.0, [1.000, -1.470e-3, 8.01e-7, -1.64e-10]),
13481    (7180.0, [1.000, -1.503e-3, 8.50e-7, -1.84e-10]),
13482    (7308.0, [1.000, -1.482e-3, 8.19e-7, -1.72e-10]),
13483    (7436.0, [1.000, -1.498e-3, 8.22e-7, -1.66e-10]),
13484    (7564.0, [1.000, -1.490e-3, 8.18e-7, -1.66e-10]),
13485    (7692.0, [1.000, -1.481e-3, 7.98e-7, -1.56e-10]),
13486    (7820.0, [1.000, -1.474e-3, 7.94e-7, -1.57e-10]),
13487    (7948.0, [1.000, -1.448e-3, 7.69e-7, -1.51e-10]),
13488];
13489
13490struct CottonSchwabState {
13491    residual: Array2<f32>,
13492    major_cycles: usize,
13493    minor_iterations: usize,
13494    clean_stop_reason: Option<CleanStopReason>,
13495    minor_cycle_traces: Vec<MinorCycleTrace>,
13496    final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
13497}
13498
13499type ResidualRefreshCallback<'a> =
13500    dyn FnMut(&Array2<f32>, &mut ImagingStageTimings) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> + 'a;
13501
13502fn image_center_value(image: &Array2<f32>) -> f32 {
13503    let center = (image.dim().0 / 2, image.dim().1 / 2);
13504    image[center]
13505}
13506
13507fn make_minor_cycle_trace(
13508    cycle_index: usize,
13509    start_reported_iteration: usize,
13510    outcome: HogbomMinorCycleOutcome,
13511    start_peak_residual_jy_per_beam: f32,
13512    residual: &Array2<f32>,
13513    model: &Array2<f32>,
13514    probe: MinorCycleProbe,
13515) -> MinorCycleTrace {
13516    MinorCycleTrace {
13517        cycle_index,
13518        start_reported_iteration,
13519        reported_updates: outcome.reported_updates,
13520        actual_updates: outcome.actual_updates,
13521        start_peak_residual_jy_per_beam,
13522        end_peak_residual_jy_per_beam: peak_abs_value(residual),
13523        cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: outcome.final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
13524        model_flux_jy: model.iter().copied().sum(),
13525        nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: outcome.final_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
13526        clean_stop_reason: outcome.stop_reason,
13527        initial_scale_pixels: probe.initial_scale_pixels,
13528        initial_candidate_strength_jy_per_beam: probe.initial_candidate_strength_jy_per_beam,
13529        initial_candidate_position: probe.initial_candidate_position,
13530        center_model_value_jy_per_pixel: image_center_value(model),
13531        center_residual_value_jy_per_beam: image_center_value(residual),
13532    }
13533}
13534
13535fn casa_multiscale_reported_updates(
13536    actual_updates: usize,
13537    cycle_reported_niter: usize,
13538    stop_reason: Option<CleanStopReason>,
13539    updated_model: bool,
13540) -> usize {
13541    actual_updates
13542        + usize::from(
13543            updated_model && actual_updates < cycle_reported_niter && stop_reason.is_some(),
13544        )
13545}
13546
13547#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
13548fn run_cotton_schwab_controller(
13549    request: &ImagingRequest,
13550    weighted_batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
13551    standard_executor: &mut Option<StandardMfsCpuExecutor<'_>>,
13552    gridder: &StandardGridder,
13553    psf_state: &PsfState,
13554    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
13555    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
13556    model: &mut Array2<f32>,
13557    residual: Array2<f32>,
13558    max_psf_sidelobe_level: f32,
13559    initial_peak: f32,
13560    warnings: &mut Vec<String>,
13561) -> Result<CottonSchwabState, ImagingError> {
13562    let mut refresh_residual = |model: &Array2<f32>,
13563                                stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings|
13564     -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
13565        refresh_standard_mfs_residual(
13566            request,
13567            weighted_batches,
13568            standard_executor,
13569            gridder,
13570            model,
13571            psf_state,
13572            execution_config,
13573            stage_timings,
13574        )
13575    };
13576    run_cotton_schwab_controller_with_refresh(
13577        request,
13578        psf_state,
13579        execution_config.minor_cycle_backend,
13580        stage_timings,
13581        &mut refresh_residual,
13582        model,
13583        residual,
13584        max_psf_sidelobe_level,
13585        initial_peak,
13586        None,
13587        warnings,
13588    )
13589}
13590
13591#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
13592fn run_cotton_schwab_controller_with_refresh(
13593    request: &ImagingRequest,
13594    psf_state: &PsfState,
13595    minor_cycle_backend: StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend,
13596    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
13597    refresh_residual: &mut ResidualRefreshCallback<'_>,
13598    model: &mut Array2<f32>,
13599    residual: Array2<f32>,
13600    max_psf_sidelobe_level: f32,
13601    initial_peak: f32,
13602    cycle_threshold_override_jy_per_beam: Option<f32>,
13603    warnings: &mut Vec<String>,
13604) -> Result<CottonSchwabState, ImagingError> {
13605    match request.deconvolver {
13606        Deconvolver::Hogbom => run_hogbom_cotton_schwab(
13607            request,
13608            psf_state,
13609            stage_timings,
13610            refresh_residual,
13611            model,
13612            residual,
13613            minor_cycle_backend,
13614            max_psf_sidelobe_level,
13615            initial_peak,
13616            cycle_threshold_override_jy_per_beam,
13617            warnings,
13618        ),
13619        Deconvolver::Clark => run_clark_cotton_schwab(
13620            request,
13621            psf_state,
13622            stage_timings,
13623            refresh_residual,
13624            model,
13625            residual,
13626            minor_cycle_backend,
13627            max_psf_sidelobe_level,
13628            initial_peak,
13629            cycle_threshold_override_jy_per_beam,
13630            warnings,
13631        ),
13632        Deconvolver::Multiscale => run_multiscale_cotton_schwab(
13633            request,
13634            psf_state,
13635            stage_timings,
13636            refresh_residual,
13637            model,
13638            residual,
13639            minor_cycle_backend,
13640            max_psf_sidelobe_level,
13641            initial_peak,
13642            cycle_threshold_override_jy_per_beam,
13643            warnings,
13644        ),
13645        Deconvolver::Mtmfs => Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
13646            "standard MFS CLEAN does not support deconvolver='mtmfs'; use run_mtmfs()".to_string(),
13647        )),
13648    }
13649}
13650
13651#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
13652fn run_mosaic_image_domain_controller(
13653    request: &ImagingRequest,
13654    config: &MosaicGridderConfig,
13655    gridder: &StandardGridder,
13656    groups: &[MosaicPointingGroup],
13657    projector_cache: &mut MosaicProjectorCache,
13658    conv_sampling: usize,
13659    weight_image: &Array2<f32>,
13660    psf_state: &PsfState,
13661    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
13662    model: &mut Array2<f32>,
13663    residual: Array2<f32>,
13664    max_psf_sidelobe_level: f32,
13665    initial_peak: f32,
13666    minor_cycle_backend: StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend,
13667    warnings: &mut Vec<String>,
13668    metal_group_cache: Option<&[Option<MosaicMetalPreparedGroup>]>,
13669) -> Result<CottonSchwabState, ImagingError> {
13670    if request.deconvolver == Deconvolver::Mtmfs {
13671        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
13672            "mosaic gridder does not support deconvolver='mtmfs'".to_string(),
13673        ));
13674    }
13675    let mut refresh_residual = |model: &Array2<f32>,
13676                                stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings|
13677     -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
13678        compute_mosaic_residual(
13679            request,
13680            config,
13681            gridder,
13682            groups,
13683            projector_cache,
13684            conv_sampling,
13685            model,
13686            psf_state,
13687            weight_image,
13688            stage_timings,
13689            metal_group_cache,
13690        )
13691    };
13692    run_cotton_schwab_controller_with_refresh(
13693        request,
13694        psf_state,
13695        minor_cycle_backend,
13696        stage_timings,
13697        &mut refresh_residual,
13698        model,
13699        residual,
13700        max_psf_sidelobe_level,
13701        initial_peak,
13702        None,
13703        warnings,
13704    )
13705}
13706
13707#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
13708fn run_multiscale_cotton_schwab_metal(
13709    request: &ImagingRequest,
13710    psf_state: &PsfState,
13711    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
13712    refresh_residual: &mut ResidualRefreshCallback<'_>,
13713    model: &mut Array2<f32>,
13714    mut residual: Array2<f32>,
13715    max_psf_sidelobe_level: f32,
13716    initial_peak: f32,
13717    cycle_threshold_override_jy_per_beam: Option<f32>,
13718    warnings: &mut Vec<String>,
13719) -> Result<CottonSchwabState, ImagingError> {
13720    let deconvolver_setup_started = Instant::now();
13721    let scales = effective_multiscale_scales(request);
13722    let mut multiscale_state = build_multiscale_state(
13723        &residual,
13724        &psf_state.psf,
13725        &scales,
13726        request.small_scale_bias,
13727        request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
13728    );
13729    stage_timings.deconvolver_setup += deconvolver_setup_started.elapsed();
13730    let mut minor_iterations = 0usize;
13731    let mut reported_minor_iterations = 0usize;
13732    let mut major_cycles = 0usize;
13733    let mut clean_stop_reason = None::<CleanStopReason>;
13734    let mut minor_cycle_traces = Vec::<MinorCycleTrace>::new();
13735    let mut final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam = request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam;
13736    let mut min_residual_peak_jy_per_beam = initial_peak;
13737    let mut divergence_warned = false;
13738    let mut residual_needs_refresh = false;
13739    let multiscale_trace = multiscale_trace_sink();
13740
13741    while reported_minor_iterations < request.clean.niter {
13742        if request
13743            .clean
13744            .major_cycle_limit
13745            .is_some_and(|limit| major_cycles >= limit)
13746        {
13747            clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::MajorCycleLimitReached);
13748            break;
13749        }
13750        let cycle_setup_started = Instant::now();
13751        let full_window = ImageWindow::full(residual.dim());
13752        let Some(cycle_candidate) = select_multiscale_candidate(
13753            &multiscale_state,
13754            request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
13755            full_window,
13756        ) else {
13757            stage_timings.clean_cycle_setup += cycle_setup_started.elapsed();
13758            clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels);
13759            break;
13760        };
13761        let cycle_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(
13762            &multiscale_state.dirty_conv_scales[0],
13763            request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
13764        );
13765        let cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam =
13766            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref(), request.clean);
13767        if let Some(stop_reason) = tolerant_clean_stop_reason(
13768            cycle_peak,
13769            request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
13770            cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
13771        ) {
13772            stage_timings.clean_cycle_setup += cycle_setup_started.elapsed();
13773            clean_stop_reason = Some(stop_reason);
13774            break;
13775        }
13776        let remaining_reported = request.clean.niter - reported_minor_iterations;
13777        let cycle_reported_niter = remaining_reported.min(request.clean.minor_cycle_length);
13778        let start_reported_iteration = reported_minor_iterations;
13779        final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam =
13780            cycle_threshold_override_jy_per_beam.unwrap_or_else(|| {
13781                clean_cycle_threshold(cycle_peak, max_psf_sidelobe_level, request.clean)
13782            });
13783        let probe = MinorCycleProbe {
13784            initial_scale_pixels: Some(scales[cycle_candidate.scale_index]),
13785            initial_candidate_strength_jy_per_beam: Some(cycle_candidate.strength),
13786            initial_candidate_position: Some([
13787                cycle_candidate.position.0,
13788                cycle_candidate.position.1,
13789            ]),
13790        };
13791        if let Some(trace) = &multiscale_trace {
13792            append_multiscale_trace(
13793                trace,
13794                format!(
13795                    "{{\"event\":\"cycle_start\",\"backend\":\"metal\",\"cycle_index\":{},\"start_reported_iteration\":{},\"cycle_reported_niter\":{},\"cycle_peak\":{:.17e},\"cycle_threshold\":{:.17e},\"nsigma_threshold\":{:.17e},\"initial_scale\":{:.17e},\"initial_x\":{},\"initial_y\":{},\"initial_strength\":{:.17e},\"initial_dirty_value\":{:.17e},\"initial_peak_psf\":{:.17e},\"model_flux\":{:.17e}}}",
13796                    minor_cycle_traces.len(),
13797                    start_reported_iteration,
13798                    cycle_reported_niter,
13799                    cycle_peak,
13800                    final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
13801                    cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
13802                    scales[cycle_candidate.scale_index],
13803                    cycle_candidate.position.0,
13804                    cycle_candidate.position.1,
13805                    cycle_candidate.strength,
13806                    cycle_candidate.dirty_value,
13807                    cycle_candidate.peak_psf,
13808                    model.iter().copied().sum::<f32>(),
13809                ),
13810            );
13811        }
13812        stage_timings.clean_cycle_setup += cycle_setup_started.elapsed();
13813        let outcome = run_multiscale_minor_cycle_metal(
13814            request,
13815            &mut multiscale_state,
13816            model,
13817            &mut residual,
13818            cycle_reported_niter,
13819            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
13820            cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
13821            stage_timings,
13822        )?;
13823        minor_iterations = minor_iterations.saturating_add(outcome.actual_updates);
13824        if let Some(trace) = &multiscale_trace {
13825            let stop_reason = outcome
13826                .stop_reason
13827                .map(|reason| format!("{reason:?}"))
13828                .unwrap_or_else(|| "null".to_string());
13829            append_multiscale_trace(
13830                trace,
13831                format!(
13832                    "{{\"event\":\"cycle_end\",\"backend\":\"metal\",\"cycle_index\":{},\"actual_updates\":{},\"reported_updates\":{},\"stop_reason\":\"{}\",\"updated_model\":{},\"minor_iterations\":{},\"reported_minor_iterations_before\":{},\"model_flux\":{:.17e}}}",
13833                    minor_cycle_traces.len(),
13834                    outcome.actual_updates,
13835                    outcome.reported_updates,
13836                    stop_reason,
13837                    outcome.updated_model,
13838                    minor_iterations,
13839                    reported_minor_iterations,
13840                    model.iter().copied().sum::<f32>(),
13841                ),
13842            );
13843        }
13844        minor_cycle_traces.push(make_minor_cycle_trace(
13845            minor_cycle_traces.len(),
13846            start_reported_iteration,
13847            outcome,
13848            cycle_peak,
13849            &multiscale_state.dirty_conv_scales[0],
13850            model,
13851            probe,
13852        ));
13853        reported_minor_iterations =
13854            reported_minor_iterations.saturating_add(outcome.reported_updates);
13855        if !outcome.updated_model {
13856            clean_stop_reason = outcome.stop_reason;
13857            break;
13858        }
13859        residual = multiscale_state.dirty_conv_scales[0].clone();
13860        residual_needs_refresh = true;
13861        let minor_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref());
13862        if let Some(stop_reason) = update_divergence_state(
13863            warnings,
13864            &mut min_residual_peak_jy_per_beam,
13865            minor_peak,
13866            &mut divergence_warned,
13867        ) {
13868            clean_stop_reason = Some(stop_reason);
13869            break;
13870        }
13871        if clean_stop_reason.is_none() && reported_minor_iterations >= request.clean.niter {
13872            clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::IterationLimitReached);
13873            break;
13874        }
13875        residual = refresh_residual(model, stage_timings)?;
13876        let multiscale_refresh_started = Instant::now();
13877        refresh_multiscale_dirty_conv_scales(&mut multiscale_state, &residual);
13878        stage_timings.multiscale_scale_refresh += multiscale_refresh_started.elapsed();
13879        major_cycles += 1;
13880        residual_needs_refresh = false;
13881        let refreshed_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref());
13882        let refreshed_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam =
13883            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref(), request.clean);
13884        if let Some(stop_reason) = tolerant_clean_stop_reason(
13885            refreshed_peak,
13886            request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
13887            refreshed_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
13888        ) {
13889            clean_stop_reason = Some(stop_reason);
13890            break;
13891        }
13892    }
13893    if request.clean.niter > 0 && clean_stop_reason.is_none() {
13894        clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::IterationLimitReached);
13895    }
13896    if residual_needs_refresh {
13897        residual = refresh_residual(model, stage_timings)?;
13898        major_cycles += 1;
13899    }
13900
13901    Ok(CottonSchwabState {
13902        residual,
13903        major_cycles,
13904        minor_iterations,
13905        clean_stop_reason,
13906        minor_cycle_traces,
13907        final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
13908    })
13909}
13910
13911#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
13912#[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
13913fn run_multiscale_minor_cycle_metal(
13914    _request: &ImagingRequest,
13915    _multiscale_state: &mut MultiscaleState,
13916    _model: &mut Array2<f32>,
13917    _residual: &mut Array2<f32>,
13918    _cycle_reported_niter: usize,
13919    _cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
13920    _nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
13921    _stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
13922) -> Result<HogbomMinorCycleOutcome, ImagingError> {
13923    Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
13924        "Multiscale minor-cycle backend 'metal' requires macOS Metal".to_string(),
13925    ))
13926}
13927
13928#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
13929#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
13930fn run_multiscale_minor_cycle_metal(
13931    request: &ImagingRequest,
13932    multiscale_state: &mut MultiscaleState,
13933    model: &mut Array2<f32>,
13934    residual: &mut Array2<f32>,
13935    cycle_reported_niter: usize,
13936    cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
13937    nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
13938    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
13939) -> Result<HogbomMinorCycleOutcome, ImagingError> {
13940    use std::{mem, slice};
13941
13942    use objc2_metal::{
13943        MTLBuffer, MTLCommandBuffer, MTLCommandBufferStatus, MTLCommandEncoder, MTLCommandQueue,
13944        MTLComputeCommandEncoder, MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice, MTLDevice,
13945        MTLDispatchThreadgroupsIndirectArguments, MTLResourceOptions, MTLSize,
13946    };
13947
13948    let (nx, ny) = residual.dim();
13949    if nx == 0 || ny == 0 || cycle_reported_niter == 0 {
13950        return Ok(HogbomMinorCycleOutcome {
13951            updated_model: false,
13952            actual_updates: 0,
13953            reported_updates: 0,
13954            stop_reason: Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels),
13955            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
13956            final_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
13957        });
13958    }
13959    if model.dim() != (nx, ny) {
13960        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
13961            "Multiscale Metal minor cycle requires model and residual shapes to match".to_string(),
13962        ));
13963    }
13964    let scale_count = multiscale_state.dirty_conv_scales.len();
13965    if scale_count == 0 {
13966        return Ok(HogbomMinorCycleOutcome {
13967            updated_model: false,
13968            actual_updates: 0,
13969            reported_updates: 0,
13970            stop_reason: Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels),
13971            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
13972            final_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
13973        });
13974    }
13975    for image in multiscale_state
13976        .dirty_conv_scales
13977        .iter()
13978        .chain(multiscale_state.scales.iter())
13979    {
13980        if image.dim() != (nx, ny) {
13981            return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
13982                "Multiscale Metal minor cycle requires all scale images to match residual shape"
13983                    .to_string(),
13984            ));
13985        }
13986    }
13987    for row in &multiscale_state.psf_conv_scales {
13988        if row.len() != scale_count {
13989            return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
13990                "Multiscale Metal PSF scale matrix has inconsistent scale count".to_string(),
13991            ));
13992        }
13993        for image in row {
13994            if image.dim() != (nx, ny) {
13995                return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
13996                    "Multiscale Metal PSF scale images must match residual shape".to_string(),
13997                ));
13998            }
13999        }
14000    }
14001
14002    let total_started = Instant::now();
14003    let collect_profile = profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled();
14004    let cell_count = nx
14005        .checked_mul(ny)
14006        .ok_or_else(|| ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Multiscale image is too large".to_string()))?;
14007    let total_candidate_count = cell_count.checked_mul(scale_count).ok_or_else(|| {
14008        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Multiscale Metal candidate count is too large".to_string())
14009    })?;
14010    let cell_count_u32 = u32::try_from(cell_count).map_err(|_| {
14011        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Multiscale Metal image cell count exceeds u32".to_string())
14012    })?;
14013    let nx_u32 = u32::try_from(nx).map_err(|_| {
14014        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Multiscale Metal image width exceeds u32".to_string())
14015    })?;
14016    let ny_u32 = u32::try_from(ny).map_err(|_| {
14017        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Multiscale Metal image height exceeds u32".to_string())
14018    })?;
14019    let scale_count_u32 = u32::try_from(scale_count).map_err(|_| {
14020        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Multiscale Metal scale count exceeds u32".to_string())
14021    })?;
14022    u32::try_from(total_candidate_count).map_err(|_| {
14023        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Multiscale Metal candidate count exceeds u32".to_string())
14024    })?;
14025
14026    let setup_started = Instant::now();
14027    let mut dirty_values = Vec::with_capacity(total_candidate_count);
14028    for image in &multiscale_state.dirty_conv_scales {
14029        dirty_values.extend(hogbom_flatten_array2_x_major(image));
14030    }
14031    let mut scale_values = Vec::with_capacity(total_candidate_count);
14032    for image in &multiscale_state.scales {
14033        scale_values.extend(hogbom_flatten_array2_x_major(image));
14034    }
14035    let mut psf_values = Vec::with_capacity(total_candidate_count.saturating_mul(scale_count));
14036    for scale_index in 0..scale_count {
14037        for optimum_scale in 0..scale_count {
14038            psf_values.extend(hogbom_flatten_array2_x_major(
14039                &multiscale_state.psf_conv_scales[scale_index][optimum_scale],
14040            ));
14041        }
14042    }
14043    let mut scale_mask_storage = vec![0u32];
14044    let has_scale_masks = multiscale_state.scale_masks.is_some();
14045    if let Some(scale_masks) = multiscale_state.scale_masks.as_ref() {
14046        scale_mask_storage = Vec::with_capacity(total_candidate_count);
14047        for mask in scale_masks {
14048            if mask.dim() != (nx, ny) {
14049                return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
14050                    "Multiscale Metal scale masks must match residual shape".to_string(),
14051                ));
14052            }
14053            for x in 0..nx {
14054                for y in 0..ny {
14055                    scale_mask_storage.push(u32::from(mask[(x, y)]));
14056                }
14057            }
14058        }
14059    }
14060    let model_values = hogbom_flatten_array2_x_major(model);
14061    let peak_psf_values = multiscale_state.peak_psf_conv_scales.clone();
14062    let scale_bias_values = multiscale_state.scale_bias.clone();
14063    let setup_elapsed = setup_started.elapsed();
14064
14065    let device_queue_started = Instant::now();
14066    let device = MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice().ok_or_else(|| {
14067        ImagingError::Unsupported(
14068            "Multiscale minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not find a default Metal device"
14069                .to_string(),
14070        )
14071    })?;
14072    let queue = device.newCommandQueue().ok_or_else(|| {
14073        ImagingError::Unsupported(
14074            "Multiscale minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create a Metal command queue"
14075                .to_string(),
14076        )
14077    })?;
14078    let device_queue_elapsed = device_queue_started.elapsed();
14079    let shader_compile_started = Instant::now();
14080    let source = objc2_foundation::NSString::from_str(MULTISCALE_MINOR_CYCLE_METAL_SHADER);
14081    let library = device
14082        .newLibraryWithSource_options_error(&source, None)
14083        .map_err(|error| {
14084            ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
14085                "Multiscale minor-cycle backend 'metal' failed to compile shader: {error:?}"
14086            ))
14087        })?;
14088    let shader_compile_elapsed = shader_compile_started.elapsed();
14089    let pipeline_started = Instant::now();
14090    let dispatch_pipeline =
14091        hogbom_metal_pipeline(&device, &library, "multiscale_prepare_window_dispatch")?;
14092    let peak_pipeline = hogbom_metal_pipeline(&device, &library, "multiscale_peak_reduce")?;
14093    let reduce_pipeline = hogbom_metal_pipeline(&device, &library, "multiscale_reduce_candidates")?;
14094    let select_pipeline = hogbom_metal_pipeline(&device, &library, "multiscale_select_component")?;
14095    let subtract_pipeline =
14096        hogbom_metal_pipeline(&device, &library, "multiscale_subtract_and_find_next")?;
14097    let pipeline_elapsed = pipeline_started.elapsed();
14098
14099    let storage_options = MTLResourceOptions::StorageModeShared;
14100    let buffer_started = Instant::now();
14101    let dirty_buffer = hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(
14102        &device,
14103        dirty_values.as_slice(),
14104        storage_options,
14105        "multiscale dirty scales",
14106    )?;
14107    let model_buffer = hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(
14108        &device,
14109        model_values.as_slice(),
14110        storage_options,
14111        "multiscale model",
14112    )?;
14113    let scale_buffer = hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(
14114        &device,
14115        scale_values.as_slice(),
14116        storage_options,
14117        "multiscale kernels",
14118    )?;
14119    let psf_buffer = hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(
14120        &device,
14121        psf_values.as_slice(),
14122        storage_options,
14123        "multiscale PSF kernels",
14124    )?;
14125    let peak_psf_buffer = hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(
14126        &device,
14127        peak_psf_values.as_slice(),
14128        storage_options,
14129        "multiscale peak PSF",
14130    )?;
14131    let scale_bias_buffer = hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(
14132        &device,
14133        scale_bias_values.as_slice(),
14134        storage_options,
14135        "multiscale scale bias",
14136    )?;
14137    let scale_mask_buffer = hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(
14138        &device,
14139        scale_mask_storage.as_slice(),
14140        storage_options,
14141        "multiscale scale masks",
14142    )?;
14143    let zero_scale_counts = vec![0u32; scale_count];
14144    let scale_counts_buffer = hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(
14145        &device,
14146        zero_scale_counts.as_slice(),
14147        storage_options,
14148        "multiscale scale counts",
14149    )?;
14150    let dispatch_stats_buffer = hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(
14151        &device,
14152        &[0u64, 0u64],
14153        storage_options,
14154        "multiscale dispatch stats",
14155    )?;
14156    let candidate_threads_per_group =
14157        hogbom_metal_threads_per_group(&peak_pipeline, total_candidate_count);
14158    let reduce_threads_per_group =
14159        hogbom_metal_threads_per_group(&reduce_pipeline, total_candidate_count);
14160    let first_candidate_count = total_candidate_count.div_ceil(candidate_threads_per_group);
14161    let mut reduce_level_count = 0usize;
14162    let mut reduce_count = first_candidate_count.max(1);
14163    while reduce_count > 1 {
14164        reduce_count = reduce_count.div_ceil(reduce_threads_per_group).max(1);
14165        reduce_level_count = reduce_level_count.saturating_add(1);
14166    }
14167    let candidate_bytes = first_candidate_count
14168        .max(1)
14169        .checked_mul(mem::size_of::<HogbomMetalPeakCandidate>())
14170        .ok_or_else(|| {
14171            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
14172                "Multiscale Metal candidate buffer is too large".to_string(),
14173            )
14174        })?;
14175    let reduce_params_bytes = reduce_level_count
14176        .max(1)
14177        .checked_mul(mem::size_of::<MultiscaleMetalReduceParams>())
14178        .ok_or_else(|| {
14179            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
14180                "Multiscale Metal reduce params buffer is too large".to_string(),
14181            )
14182        })?;
14183    let indirect_args_bytes = reduce_level_count
14184        .saturating_add(1)
14185        .max(1)
14186        .checked_mul(mem::size_of::<MTLDispatchThreadgroupsIndirectArguments>())
14187        .ok_or_else(|| {
14188            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
14189                "Multiscale Metal indirect dispatch buffer is too large".to_string(),
14190            )
14191        })?;
14192    let candidate_a = device
14193        .newBufferWithLength_options(candidate_bytes, storage_options)
14194        .ok_or_else(|| {
14195            ImagingError::Unsupported(
14196                "Multiscale minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not allocate candidate buffer"
14197                    .to_string(),
14198            )
14199        })?;
14200    let candidate_b = device
14201        .newBufferWithLength_options(candidate_bytes, storage_options)
14202        .ok_or_else(|| {
14203            ImagingError::Unsupported(
14204                "Multiscale minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not allocate reduction buffer"
14205                    .to_string(),
14206            )
14207        })?;
14208    let reduce_params_buffer = device
14209        .newBufferWithLength_options(reduce_params_bytes, storage_options)
14210        .ok_or_else(|| {
14211            ImagingError::Unsupported(
14212                "Multiscale minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not allocate reduce params buffer"
14213                    .to_string(),
14214            )
14215        })?;
14216    let indirect_args_buffer = device
14217        .newBufferWithLength_options(indirect_args_bytes, storage_options)
14218        .ok_or_else(|| {
14219            ImagingError::Unsupported(
14220                "Multiscale minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not allocate indirect dispatch buffer"
14221                    .to_string(),
14222            )
14223        })?;
14224    let selected_peak_buffer = hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(
14225        &device,
14226        &[HogbomMetalPeakCandidate::default()],
14227        storage_options,
14228        "multiscale selected peak",
14229    )?;
14230    let params = MultiscaleMetalCycleParams {
14231        cell_count: cell_count_u32,
14232        nx: nx_u32,
14233        ny: ny_u32,
14234        scale_count: scale_count_u32,
14235        has_scale_masks: u32::from(has_scale_masks),
14236        threads_per_group: u32::try_from(candidate_threads_per_group).map_err(|_| {
14237            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
14238                "Multiscale Metal candidate threadgroup width exceeds u32".to_string(),
14239            )
14240        })?,
14241        reduce_threads_per_group: u32::try_from(reduce_threads_per_group).map_err(|_| {
14242            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
14243                "Multiscale Metal reduce threadgroup width exceeds u32".to_string(),
14244            )
14245        })?,
14246        reduce_level_count: u32::try_from(reduce_level_count).map_err(|_| {
14247            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
14248                "Multiscale Metal reduce level count exceeds u32".to_string(),
14249            )
14250        })?,
14251        component_budget: u32::try_from(cycle_reported_niter).map_err(|_| {
14252            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
14253                "Multiscale Metal component budget exceeds u32".to_string(),
14254            )
14255        })?,
14256        gain: request.clean.gain,
14257        threshold_jy_per_beam: request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
14258        cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
14259        nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
14260    };
14261    let params_buffer =
14262        hogbom_metal_params_buffer(&device, &params, storage_options, "multiscale params")?;
14263    let initial_state = MultiscaleMetalCycleState {
14264        window_x0: 0,
14265        window_y0: 0,
14266        window_x1: nx_u32.saturating_sub(1),
14267        window_y1: ny_u32.saturating_sub(1),
14268        ..Default::default()
14269    };
14270    let state_buffer =
14271        hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(&device, &[initial_state], storage_options, "state")?;
14272    let buffer_elapsed = buffer_started.elapsed();
14273
14274    let mut input_a = true;
14275    for _ in 0..reduce_level_count {
14276        input_a = !input_a;
14277    }
14278    let final_candidate_from_a = input_a;
14279    let final_candidate_buffer = if final_candidate_from_a {
14280        &candidate_a
14281    } else {
14282        &candidate_b
14283    };
14284    let mut command_kernel_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
14285    let mut command_wall_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
14286    let mut dispatch_prepare_dispatches = 0usize;
14287    let mut peak_dispatches = 0usize;
14288    let mut reduce_dispatches = 0usize;
14289    let mut select_dispatches = 0usize;
14290    let mut subtract_dispatches = 0usize;
14291    let mut command_chunk_planner =
14292        standard_mfs_metal_minor_cycle_chunk_planner(cycle_reported_niter, cell_count, scale_count);
14293    let initial_command_component_budget =
14294        command_chunk_planner.next_chunk(cycle_reported_niter.max(1));
14295    let mut final_state = initial_state;
14296    let mut command_buffers = 0usize;
14297    while usize::try_from(final_state.updates).unwrap_or(usize::MAX) < cycle_reported_niter
14298        && final_state.stopped == 0
14299    {
14300        let updates_done = usize::try_from(final_state.updates).map_err(|_| {
14301            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Multiscale Metal update count overflowed".to_string())
14302        })?;
14303        let updates_remaining = cycle_reported_niter.saturating_sub(updates_done);
14304        if updates_remaining == 0 {
14305            break;
14306        }
14307        let chunk_updates = command_chunk_planner.next_chunk(updates_remaining);
14308        let command_started = Instant::now();
14309        let command_buffer = queue.commandBuffer().ok_or_else(|| {
14310            ImagingError::Unsupported(
14311                "Multiscale minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create command buffer"
14312                    .to_string(),
14313            )
14314        })?;
14315        multiscale_metal_encode_prepare_window_dispatch(
14316            &command_buffer,
14317            &dispatch_pipeline,
14318            &state_buffer,
14319            &params_buffer,
14320            &reduce_params_buffer,
14321            &indirect_args_buffer,
14322            &dispatch_stats_buffer,
14323        )?;
14324        dispatch_prepare_dispatches = dispatch_prepare_dispatches.saturating_add(1);
14325        let peak_encoder = command_buffer.computeCommandEncoder().ok_or_else(|| {
14326            ImagingError::Unsupported(
14327                "Multiscale minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create peak encoder".to_string(),
14328            )
14329        })?;
14330        peak_encoder.setComputePipelineState(&peak_pipeline);
14331        unsafe {
14332            peak_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&dirty_buffer), 0, 0);
14333            peak_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&scale_mask_buffer), 0, 1);
14334            peak_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&peak_psf_buffer), 0, 2);
14335            peak_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&scale_bias_buffer), 0, 3);
14336            peak_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&candidate_a), 0, 4);
14337            peak_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&params_buffer), 0, 5);
14338            peak_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&state_buffer), 0, 6);
14339        }
14340        unsafe {
14341            peak_encoder
14342                .dispatchThreadgroupsWithIndirectBuffer_indirectBufferOffset_threadsPerThreadgroup(
14343                    &indirect_args_buffer,
14344                    0,
14345                    MTLSize {
14346                        width: candidate_threads_per_group,
14347                        height: 1,
14348                        depth: 1,
14349                    },
14350                );
14351        }
14352        peak_encoder.endEncoding();
14353        peak_dispatches = peak_dispatches.saturating_add(1);
14354        reduce_dispatches = reduce_dispatches.saturating_add(multiscale_metal_encode_reduce_plan(
14355            &command_buffer,
14356            &reduce_pipeline,
14357            &candidate_a,
14358            &candidate_b,
14359            &reduce_params_buffer,
14360            &indirect_args_buffer,
14361            reduce_level_count,
14362            reduce_threads_per_group,
14363            &state_buffer,
14364        )?);
14365
14366        for _ in 0..chunk_updates {
14367            multiscale_metal_encode_select(
14368                &command_buffer,
14369                &select_pipeline,
14370                final_candidate_buffer,
14371                &selected_peak_buffer,
14372                &state_buffer,
14373                &model_buffer,
14374                &scale_buffer,
14375                &scale_counts_buffer,
14376                &params_buffer,
14377                &peak_psf_buffer,
14378            )?;
14379            select_dispatches = select_dispatches.saturating_add(1);
14380            multiscale_metal_encode_prepare_window_dispatch(
14381                &command_buffer,
14382                &dispatch_pipeline,
14383                &state_buffer,
14384                &params_buffer,
14385                &reduce_params_buffer,
14386                &indirect_args_buffer,
14387                &dispatch_stats_buffer,
14388            )?;
14389            dispatch_prepare_dispatches = dispatch_prepare_dispatches.saturating_add(1);
14390
14391            let subtract_encoder = command_buffer.computeCommandEncoder().ok_or_else(|| {
14392                ImagingError::Unsupported(
14393                    "Multiscale minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create subtract encoder"
14394                        .to_string(),
14395                )
14396            })?;
14397            subtract_encoder.setComputePipelineState(&subtract_pipeline);
14398            unsafe {
14399                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&selected_peak_buffer), 0, 0);
14400                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&dirty_buffer), 0, 1);
14401                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&psf_buffer), 0, 2);
14402                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&scale_buffer), 0, 3);
14403                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&scale_mask_buffer), 0, 4);
14404                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&peak_psf_buffer), 0, 5);
14405                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&scale_bias_buffer), 0, 6);
14406                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&candidate_a), 0, 7);
14407                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&model_buffer), 0, 8);
14408                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&params_buffer), 0, 9);
14409                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&state_buffer), 0, 10);
14410            }
14411            unsafe {
14412                subtract_encoder
14413                    .dispatchThreadgroupsWithIndirectBuffer_indirectBufferOffset_threadsPerThreadgroup(
14414                        &indirect_args_buffer,
14415                        0,
14416                        MTLSize {
14417                            width: candidate_threads_per_group,
14418                            height: 1,
14419                            depth: 1,
14420                        },
14421                    );
14422            }
14423            subtract_encoder.endEncoding();
14424            subtract_dispatches = subtract_dispatches.saturating_add(1);
14425            reduce_dispatches =
14426                reduce_dispatches.saturating_add(multiscale_metal_encode_reduce_plan(
14427                    &command_buffer,
14428                    &reduce_pipeline,
14429                    &candidate_a,
14430                    &candidate_b,
14431                    &reduce_params_buffer,
14432                    &indirect_args_buffer,
14433                    reduce_level_count,
14434                    reduce_threads_per_group,
14435                    &state_buffer,
14436                )?);
14437        }
14438        command_buffer.commit();
14439        command_buffer.waitUntilCompleted();
14440        command_buffers = command_buffers.saturating_add(1);
14441        let command_elapsed = command_started.elapsed();
14442        command_wall_elapsed += command_elapsed;
14443        command_kernel_elapsed +=
14444            HogbomMetalCommandTiming::from_command_buffer(&command_buffer).kernel_elapsed;
14445        if command_buffer.status() == MTLCommandBufferStatus::Error {
14446            let message = command_buffer
14447                .error()
14448                .map(|error| format!("{error:?}"))
14449                .unwrap_or_else(|| "unknown Metal command buffer error".to_string());
14450            return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
14451                "Multiscale minor-cycle backend 'metal' command failed: {message}"
14452            )));
14453        }
14454        final_state = unsafe {
14455            *slice::from_raw_parts(
14456                state_buffer
14457                    .contents()
14458                    .as_ptr()
14459                    .cast::<MultiscaleMetalCycleState>(),
14460                1,
14461            )
14462            .first()
14463            .expect("one Multiscale Metal state")
14464        };
14465        command_chunk_planner.observe_command(command_elapsed, chunk_updates);
14466    }
14467
14468    let readback_started = Instant::now();
14469    let dirty_slice = unsafe {
14470        slice::from_raw_parts(
14471            dirty_buffer.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(),
14472            dirty_values.len(),
14473        )
14474    };
14475    for scale_index in 0..scale_count {
14476        let start = scale_index * cell_count;
14477        let end = start + cell_count;
14478        copy_x_major_slice_to_array2(
14479            &mut multiscale_state.dirty_conv_scales[scale_index],
14480            &dirty_slice[start..end],
14481        )?;
14482    }
14483    let model_slice = unsafe {
14484        slice::from_raw_parts(model_buffer.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(), cell_count)
14485    };
14486    copy_x_major_slice_to_array2(model, model_slice)?;
14487    *residual = multiscale_state.dirty_conv_scales[0].clone();
14488    let scale_counts = unsafe {
14489        slice::from_raw_parts(
14490            scale_counts_buffer.contents().as_ptr().cast::<u32>(),
14491            scale_count,
14492        )
14493    };
14494    let dispatch_stats = unsafe {
14495        slice::from_raw_parts(dispatch_stats_buffer.contents().as_ptr().cast::<u64>(), 2)
14496    };
14497    let readback_elapsed = readback_started.elapsed();
14498
14499    let cycle_component_updates = usize::try_from(final_state.updates).map_err(|_| {
14500        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Multiscale Metal update count overflowed".to_string())
14501    })?;
14502    let stop_reason = hogbom_metal_stop_reason(final_state.stop_reason);
14503    let updated_model = cycle_component_updates > 0;
14504    let reported_updates = casa_multiscale_reported_updates(
14505        cycle_component_updates,
14506        cycle_reported_niter,
14507        stop_reason,
14508        updated_model,
14509    );
14510    let mut stats = MultiscaleMinorCycleStats::new(scale_count);
14511    for (scale_index, count) in scale_counts.iter().copied().enumerate() {
14512        stats.scale_component_counts[scale_index] = count as usize;
14513    }
14514    stats.peak_searches = peak_dispatches
14515        .saturating_add(cycle_component_updates)
14516        .saturating_mul(scale_count);
14517    stats.subtract_updates = cycle_component_updates.saturating_mul(scale_count);
14518    stats.full_window_peak_searches = scale_count;
14519    stats.full_window_subtract_updates = scale_count;
14520    stats.peak_search_window_pixels_max = cell_count;
14521    stats.subtract_window_pixels_max = cell_count;
14522    stats.pixels_searched = usize::try_from(dispatch_stats[0]).unwrap_or(usize::MAX);
14523    stats.pixels_touched = usize::try_from(dispatch_stats[1]).unwrap_or(usize::MAX);
14524    let total_elapsed = total_started.elapsed();
14525    let peak_search_elapsed = command_kernel_elapsed.mul_f64(0.5);
14526    let subtract_elapsed = command_kernel_elapsed.saturating_sub(peak_search_elapsed);
14527    let model_update_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
14528    stage_timings.minor_cycle += total_elapsed;
14529    stage_timings.minor_cycle_solve += total_elapsed;
14530    stage_timings.deconvolver_peak_search += peak_search_elapsed;
14531    stage_timings.deconvolver_model_update += model_update_elapsed;
14532    stage_timings.deconvolver_psf_subtract += subtract_elapsed;
14533    stage_timings.deconvolver_model_updates = stage_timings
14534        .deconvolver_model_updates
14535        .saturating_add(cycle_component_updates as u64);
14536    stats.add_to_stage_timings(stage_timings);
14537    log_standard_mfs_multiscale_minor_cycle_summary(
14538        "metal_resident_multiscale",
14539        cycle_component_updates,
14540        cycle_reported_niter,
14541        stop_reason,
14542        &stats,
14543        peak_search_elapsed,
14544        model_update_elapsed,
14545        subtract_elapsed,
14546        total_elapsed,
14547    );
14548    if collect_profile {
14549        eprintln!(
14550            "standard_mfs_multiscale_metal_minor_cycle_summary updates={} reported_budget={} stop_reason={:?} image_pixels={} scales={} command_buffers={} command_component_budget={} command_component_budget_final={} command_target_ms={} command_planner_kind={:?} command_calibration_samples={} command_fixed_ms={} command_ms_per_update={} command_predicted_next_ms={} peak_dispatches={} reduce_dispatches={} select_dispatches={} subtract_dispatches={} setup_ms={:.3} device_queue_ms={:.3} shader_compile_ms={:.3} pipeline_ms={:.3} buffer_ms={:.3} command_wall_ms={:.3} command_gpu_ms={:.3} readback_ms={:.3} total_ms={:.3}",
14551            cycle_component_updates,
14552            cycle_reported_niter,
14553            stop_reason,
14554            cell_count,
14555            scale_count,
14556            command_buffers,
14557            initial_command_component_budget,
14558            command_chunk_planner.next_chunk(cycle_reported_niter.max(1)),
14559            command_chunk_planner
14560                .target_ms
14561                .map(|value| format!("{value:.3}"))
14562                .unwrap_or_else(|| "none".to_string()),
14563            command_chunk_planner.kind,
14564            command_chunk_planner.observations,
14565            command_chunk_planner
14566                .fixed_ms
14567                .map(|value| format!("{value:.6}"))
14568                .unwrap_or_else(|| "unknown".to_string()),
14569            command_chunk_planner
14570                .ms_per_update
14571                .map(|value| format!("{value:.9}"))
14572                .unwrap_or_else(|| "unknown".to_string()),
14573            command_chunk_planner
14574                .predicted_next_ms
14575                .map(|value| format!("{value:.3}"))
14576                .unwrap_or_else(|| "unknown".to_string()),
14577            peak_dispatches,
14578            reduce_dispatches,
14579            select_dispatches,
14580            subtract_dispatches,
14581            profile::millis(setup_elapsed),
14582            profile::millis(device_queue_elapsed),
14583            profile::millis(shader_compile_elapsed),
14584            profile::millis(pipeline_elapsed),
14585            profile::millis(buffer_elapsed),
14586            profile::millis(command_wall_elapsed),
14587            profile::millis(command_kernel_elapsed),
14588            profile::millis(readback_elapsed),
14589            profile::millis(total_elapsed),
14590        );
14591        eprintln!(
14592            "standard_mfs_multiscale_metal_indirect_summary updates={} prepare_dispatches={} reduce_levels={} candidate_threads_per_group={} reduce_threads_per_group={} candidate_search_items={} subtract_items={}",
14593            cycle_component_updates,
14594            dispatch_prepare_dispatches,
14595            reduce_level_count,
14596            candidate_threads_per_group,
14597            reduce_threads_per_group,
14598            dispatch_stats[0],
14599            dispatch_stats[1],
14600        );
14601    }
14602
14603    Ok(HogbomMinorCycleOutcome {
14604        updated_model,
14605        actual_updates: cycle_component_updates,
14606        reported_updates,
14607        stop_reason,
14608        final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
14609        final_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
14610    })
14611}
14612
14613#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
14614#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
14615fn multiscale_metal_encode_prepare_window_dispatch(
14616    command_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLCommandBuffer>,
14617    dispatch_pipeline: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState>,
14618    state_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14619    params_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14620    reduce_params_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14621    indirect_args_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14622    dispatch_stats_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14623) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
14624    use objc2_metal::{MTLCommandBuffer, MTLCommandEncoder, MTLComputeCommandEncoder, MTLSize};
14625
14626    let encoder = command_buffer.computeCommandEncoder().ok_or_else(|| {
14627        ImagingError::Unsupported(
14628            "Multiscale minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create indirect dispatch encoder"
14629                .to_string(),
14630        )
14631    })?;
14632    encoder.setComputePipelineState(dispatch_pipeline);
14633    unsafe {
14634        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(state_buffer), 0, 0);
14635        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(params_buffer), 0, 1);
14636        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(reduce_params_buffer), 0, 2);
14637        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(indirect_args_buffer), 0, 3);
14638        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(dispatch_stats_buffer), 0, 4);
14639    }
14640    encoder.dispatchThreads_threadsPerThreadgroup(
14641        MTLSize {
14642            width: 1,
14643            height: 1,
14644            depth: 1,
14645        },
14646        MTLSize {
14647            width: 1,
14648            height: 1,
14649            depth: 1,
14650        },
14651    );
14652    encoder.endEncoding();
14653    Ok(())
14654}
14655
14656#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
14657#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
14658fn multiscale_metal_encode_reduce_plan(
14659    command_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLCommandBuffer>,
14660    reduce_pipeline: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState>,
14661    candidate_a: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14662    candidate_b: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14663    reduce_params_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14664    indirect_args_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14665    reduce_level_count: usize,
14666    reduce_threads_per_group: usize,
14667    state_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14668) -> Result<usize, ImagingError> {
14669    use objc2_metal::{MTLCommandBuffer, MTLCommandEncoder, MTLComputeCommandEncoder, MTLSize};
14670
14671    let mut dispatches = 0usize;
14672    let mut input_a_for_reduce = true;
14673    let indirect_args_stride =
14674        std::mem::size_of::<objc2_metal::MTLDispatchThreadgroupsIndirectArguments>();
14675    let reduce_params_stride = std::mem::size_of::<MultiscaleMetalReduceParams>();
14676    for reduce_index in 0..reduce_level_count {
14677        let reduce_encoder = command_buffer.computeCommandEncoder().ok_or_else(|| {
14678            ImagingError::Unsupported(
14679                "Multiscale minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create reduce encoder"
14680                    .to_string(),
14681            )
14682        })?;
14683        reduce_encoder.setComputePipelineState(reduce_pipeline);
14684        let (input_buffer, output_buffer) = if input_a_for_reduce {
14685            (candidate_a, candidate_b)
14686        } else {
14687            (candidate_b, candidate_a)
14688        };
14689        unsafe {
14690            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(input_buffer), 0, 0);
14691            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(output_buffer), 0, 1);
14692            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(
14693                Some(reduce_params_buffer),
14694                reduce_index * reduce_params_stride,
14695                2,
14696            );
14697            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(state_buffer), 0, 3);
14698        }
14699        unsafe {
14700            reduce_encoder
14701                .dispatchThreadgroupsWithIndirectBuffer_indirectBufferOffset_threadsPerThreadgroup(
14702                    indirect_args_buffer,
14703                    (reduce_index + 1) * indirect_args_stride,
14704                    MTLSize {
14705                        width: reduce_threads_per_group,
14706                        height: 1,
14707                        depth: 1,
14708                    },
14709                );
14710        }
14711        reduce_encoder.endEncoding();
14712        dispatches = dispatches.saturating_add(1);
14713        input_a_for_reduce = !input_a_for_reduce;
14714    }
14715    Ok(dispatches)
14716}
14717
14718#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
14719#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
14720fn multiscale_metal_encode_select(
14721    command_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLCommandBuffer>,
14722    select_pipeline: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState>,
14723    final_candidate_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14724    selected_peak_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14725    state_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14726    model_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14727    scale_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14728    scale_counts_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14729    params_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14730    peak_psf_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
14731) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
14732    use objc2_metal::{MTLCommandBuffer, MTLCommandEncoder, MTLComputeCommandEncoder, MTLSize};
14733
14734    let encoder = command_buffer.computeCommandEncoder().ok_or_else(|| {
14735        ImagingError::Unsupported(
14736            "Multiscale minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create select encoder".to_string(),
14737        )
14738    })?;
14739    encoder.setComputePipelineState(select_pipeline);
14740    unsafe {
14741        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(final_candidate_buffer), 0, 0);
14742        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(selected_peak_buffer), 0, 1);
14743        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(state_buffer), 0, 2);
14744        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(model_buffer), 0, 3);
14745        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(scale_buffer), 0, 4);
14746        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(scale_counts_buffer), 0, 5);
14747        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(params_buffer), 0, 6);
14748        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(peak_psf_buffer), 0, 7);
14749    }
14750    encoder.dispatchThreads_threadsPerThreadgroup(
14751        MTLSize {
14752            width: 1,
14753            height: 1,
14754            depth: 1,
14755        },
14756        MTLSize {
14757            width: 1,
14758            height: 1,
14759            depth: 1,
14760        },
14761    );
14762    encoder.endEncoding();
14763    Ok(())
14764}
14765
14766#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
14767fn run_hogbom_cotton_schwab(
14768    request: &ImagingRequest,
14769    psf_state: &PsfState,
14770    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
14771    refresh_residual: &mut ResidualRefreshCallback<'_>,
14772    model: &mut Array2<f32>,
14773    mut residual: Array2<f32>,
14774    minor_cycle_backend: StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend,
14775    max_psf_sidelobe_level: f32,
14776    initial_peak: f32,
14777    cycle_threshold_override_jy_per_beam: Option<f32>,
14778    warnings: &mut Vec<String>,
14779) -> Result<CottonSchwabState, ImagingError> {
14780    let mut minor_iterations = 0usize;
14781    let mut reported_minor_iterations = 0usize;
14782    let mut major_cycles = 0usize;
14783    let mut clean_stop_reason = None::<CleanStopReason>;
14784    let mut minor_cycle_traces = Vec::<MinorCycleTrace>::new();
14785    let mut final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam = request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam;
14786    let mut min_residual_peak_jy_per_beam = initial_peak;
14787    let mut divergence_warned = false;
14788    let mut residual_needs_refresh = false;
14789
14790    while reported_minor_iterations < request.clean.niter {
14791        if request
14792            .clean
14793            .major_cycle_limit
14794            .is_some_and(|limit| major_cycles >= limit)
14795        {
14796            clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::MajorCycleLimitReached);
14797            break;
14798        }
14799        let cycle_setup_started = Instant::now();
14800        let Some((_, cycle_peak_value)) =
14801            peak_location_masked(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref())
14802        else {
14803            stage_timings.clean_cycle_setup += cycle_setup_started.elapsed();
14804            clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels);
14805            break;
14806        };
14807        let cycle_peak = cycle_peak_value.abs();
14808        let cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam =
14809            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref(), request.clean);
14810        if let Some(stop_reason) = tolerant_clean_stop_reason(
14811            cycle_peak,
14812            request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
14813            cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
14814        ) {
14815            stage_timings.clean_cycle_setup += cycle_setup_started.elapsed();
14816            clean_stop_reason = Some(stop_reason);
14817            break;
14818        }
14819        let remaining_reported = request.clean.niter - reported_minor_iterations;
14820        let cycle_reported_niter = remaining_reported.min(request.clean.minor_cycle_length);
14821        let start_reported_iteration = reported_minor_iterations;
14822        let cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam =
14823            cycle_threshold_override_jy_per_beam.unwrap_or_else(|| {
14824                clean_cycle_threshold(cycle_peak, max_psf_sidelobe_level, request.clean)
14825            });
14826        if profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled() {
14827            let mask = clean_mask_summary(request.clean_mask.as_ref(), residual.dim());
14828            eprintln!(
14829                "standard_mfs_hogbom_cycle_start backend={:?} cycle_index={} start_reported_iteration={} cycle_reported_niter={} cycle_peak={:.9e} cycle_threshold={:.9e} nsigma_threshold={:.9e} max_psf_sidelobe={:.9e} has_mask={} mask_pixels={} mask_fingerprint={:016x}",
14830                minor_cycle_backend,
14831                minor_cycle_traces.len(),
14832                start_reported_iteration,
14833                cycle_reported_niter,
14834                cycle_peak,
14835                cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
14836                cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
14837                max_psf_sidelobe_level,
14838                mask.has_mask,
14839                mask.pixels,
14840                mask.fingerprint,
14841            );
14842        }
14843        stage_timings.clean_cycle_setup += cycle_setup_started.elapsed();
14844        let outcome = run_hogbom_minor_cycle(
14845            request,
14846            psf_state,
14847            model,
14848            &mut residual,
14849            cycle_reported_niter,
14850            cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
14851            cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
14852            minor_cycle_backend,
14853            stage_timings,
14854        )?;
14855        minor_cycle_traces.push(make_minor_cycle_trace(
14856            minor_cycle_traces.len(),
14857            start_reported_iteration,
14858            outcome,
14859            cycle_peak,
14860            &residual,
14861            model,
14862            MinorCycleProbe::default(),
14863        ));
14864        minor_iterations += outcome.actual_updates;
14865        reported_minor_iterations += outcome.reported_updates;
14866        final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam = outcome.final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam;
14867        let mut stop_after_refresh = None::<CleanStopReason>;
14868        if let Some(reason) = outcome.stop_reason {
14869            match reason {
14870                CleanStopReason::CycleThresholdReached if outcome.updated_model => {}
14871                CleanStopReason::CycleThresholdReached => {
14872                    clean_stop_reason = Some(reason);
14873                }
14874                _ => {
14875                    clean_stop_reason = Some(reason);
14876                    stop_after_refresh = Some(reason);
14877                }
14878            }
14879        }
14880        if !outcome.updated_model {
14881            break;
14882        }
14883        residual_needs_refresh = true;
14884        let minor_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref());
14885        if let Some(stop_reason) = update_divergence_state(
14886            warnings,
14887            &mut min_residual_peak_jy_per_beam,
14888            minor_peak,
14889            &mut divergence_warned,
14890        ) {
14891            clean_stop_reason = Some(stop_reason);
14892            break;
14893        }
14894        if reported_minor_iterations >= request.clean.niter {
14895            clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::IterationLimitReached);
14896            break;
14897        }
14898        residual = refresh_residual(model, stage_timings)?;
14899        major_cycles += 1;
14900        residual_needs_refresh = false;
14901        let refreshed_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref());
14902        let refreshed_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam =
14903            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref(), request.clean);
14904        if stop_after_refresh.is_some() {
14905            break;
14906        }
14907        if let Some(stop_reason) = tolerant_clean_stop_reason(
14908            refreshed_peak,
14909            request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
14910            refreshed_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
14911        ) {
14912            clean_stop_reason = Some(stop_reason);
14913            break;
14914        }
14915    }
14916    if request.clean.niter > 0 && clean_stop_reason.is_none() {
14917        clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::IterationLimitReached);
14918    }
14919    if residual_needs_refresh {
14920        residual = refresh_residual(model, stage_timings)?;
14921    }
14922
14923    Ok(CottonSchwabState {
14924        residual,
14925        major_cycles,
14926        minor_iterations,
14927        clean_stop_reason,
14928        minor_cycle_traces,
14929        final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
14930    })
14931}
14932
14933#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
14934fn run_hogbom_minor_cycle(
14935    request: &ImagingRequest,
14936    psf_state: &PsfState,
14937    model: &mut Array2<f32>,
14938    residual: &mut Array2<f32>,
14939    cycle_reported_niter: usize,
14940    cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
14941    nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
14942    minor_cycle_backend: StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend,
14943    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
14944) -> Result<HogbomMinorCycleOutcome, ImagingError> {
14945    match minor_cycle_backend {
14946        StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend::Cpu => Ok(run_hogbom_minor_cycle_cpu(
14947            request,
14948            psf_state,
14949            model,
14950            residual,
14951            cycle_reported_niter,
14952            cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
14953            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
14954            stage_timings,
14955        )),
14956        StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend::Metal => run_hogbom_minor_cycle_metal(
14957            request,
14958            psf_state,
14959            model,
14960            residual,
14961            cycle_reported_niter,
14962            cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
14963            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
14964            stage_timings,
14965        ),
14966    }
14967}
14968
14969#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
14970fn run_hogbom_minor_cycle_cpu(
14971    request: &ImagingRequest,
14972    psf_state: &PsfState,
14973    model: &mut Array2<f32>,
14974    residual: &mut Array2<f32>,
14975    cycle_reported_niter: usize,
14976    cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
14977    nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
14978    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
14979) -> HogbomMinorCycleOutcome {
14980    let cycle_component_budget = hogbom_component_budget(cycle_reported_niter, request.clean);
14981    let mut cycle_component_updates = 0usize;
14982    let mut updated_model = false;
14983    let mut stop_reason = None;
14984    let minor_started = Instant::now();
14985    let collect_profile = profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled();
14986    let mut peak_search_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
14987    let mut model_update_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
14988    let mut subtract_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
14989    let mut peak_searches = 0usize;
14990    let mut subtract_updates = 0usize;
14991    let image_pixels = residual.len();
14992    let mut first_peak = None::<((usize, usize), f32)>;
14993    while cycle_component_updates < cycle_component_budget {
14994        let peak_started = Instant::now();
14995        let peak = hclean_peak_location_masked(residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref());
14996        peak_search_elapsed += peak_started.elapsed();
14997        peak_searches = peak_searches.saturating_add(1);
14998        let Some(((peak_x, peak_y), peak_value)) = peak else {
14999            stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels);
15000            break;
15001        };
15002        if first_peak.is_none() {
15003            first_peak = Some(((peak_x, peak_y), peak_value));
15004        }
15005        let peak_abs = peak_value.abs();
15006        if let Some(reason) = minor_cycle_stop_reason(
15007            peak_abs,
15008            request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
15009            cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
15010            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
15011        ) {
15012            stop_reason = Some(reason);
15013            break;
15014        }
15015        let component = request.clean.gain * peak_value;
15016        append_hogbom_trace(format!(
15017            "{{\"event\":\"component\",\"backend\":\"cpu\",\"reffreq_hz\":{:.17e},\"cycle_update\":{},\"x\":{},\"y\":{},\"peak\":{:.17e},\"component\":{:.17e}}}",
15018            request.reffreq_hz, cycle_component_updates, peak_x, peak_y, peak_value, component
15019        ));
15020        let model_update_started = Instant::now();
15021        model[(peak_x, peak_y)] += component;
15022        model_update_elapsed += model_update_started.elapsed();
15023        let subtract_started = Instant::now();
