15024        subtract_shifted_psf(residual, &psf_state.psf, (peak_x, peak_y), component);
15025        subtract_elapsed += subtract_started.elapsed();
15026        subtract_updates = subtract_updates.saturating_add(1);
15027        cycle_component_updates += 1;
15028        updated_model = true;
15029        if collect_profile && cycle_component_updates % 100 == 0 {
15030            eprintln!(
15031                "standard_mfs_hogbom_minor_cycle_progress updates={} budget={} image_pixels={} peak_searches={} subtract_updates={} peak_scan_estimated_bytes={} peak_search_ms={:.3} subtract_ms={:.3} elapsed_ms={:.3}",
15032                cycle_component_updates,
15033                cycle_component_budget,
15034                image_pixels,
15035                peak_searches,
15036                subtract_updates,
15037                peak_searches
15038                    .saturating_mul(image_pixels)
15039                    .saturating_mul(std::mem::size_of::<f32>()),
15040                profile::millis(peak_search_elapsed),
15041                profile::millis(subtract_elapsed),
15042                profile::millis(minor_started.elapsed()),
15043            );
15044        }
15045    }
15046    let minor_elapsed = minor_started.elapsed();
15047    if collect_profile {
15048        let mask = clean_mask_summary(request.clean_mask.as_ref(), residual.dim());
15049        let (first_peak_abs, first_peak_x, first_peak_y) = first_peak
15050            .map(|((x, y), value)| (value.abs(), x, y))
15051            .unwrap_or((0.0, 0, 0));
15052        eprintln!(
15053            "standard_mfs_hogbom_minor_cycle_summary backend=cpu updates={} reported_budget={} component_budget={} stop_reason={:?} image_pixels={} has_mask={} mask_pixels={} mask_fingerprint={:016x} first_peak_abs={:.9e} first_peak_x={} first_peak_y={} peak_searches={} subtract_updates={} peak_scan_estimated_bytes={} peak_search_ms={:.3} subtract_ms={:.3} total_ms={:.3}",
15054            cycle_component_updates,
15055            cycle_reported_niter,
15056            cycle_component_budget,
15057            stop_reason,
15058            image_pixels,
15059            mask.has_mask,
15060            mask.pixels,
15061            mask.fingerprint,
15062            first_peak_abs,
15063            first_peak_x,
15064            first_peak_y,
15065            peak_searches,
15066            subtract_updates,
15067            peak_searches
15068                .saturating_mul(image_pixels)
15069                .saturating_mul(std::mem::size_of::<f32>()),
15070            profile::millis(peak_search_elapsed),
15071            profile::millis(subtract_elapsed),
15072            profile::millis(minor_elapsed),
15073        );
15074    }
15075    stage_timings.minor_cycle += minor_elapsed;
15076    stage_timings.minor_cycle_solve += minor_elapsed;
15077    stage_timings.deconvolver_peak_search += peak_search_elapsed;
15078    stage_timings.deconvolver_model_update += model_update_elapsed;
15079    stage_timings.deconvolver_psf_subtract += subtract_elapsed;
15080    stage_timings.deconvolver_peak_searches = stage_timings
15081        .deconvolver_peak_searches
15082        .saturating_add(peak_searches as u64);
15083    stage_timings.deconvolver_model_updates = stage_timings
15084        .deconvolver_model_updates
15085        .saturating_add(cycle_component_updates as u64);
15086    stage_timings.deconvolver_subtract_updates = stage_timings
15087        .deconvolver_subtract_updates
15088        .saturating_add(subtract_updates as u64);
15089    stage_timings.deconvolver_pixels_searched = stage_timings
15090        .deconvolver_pixels_searched
15091        .saturating_add((peak_searches as u64).saturating_mul(image_pixels as u64));
15092    stage_timings.deconvolver_pixels_touched = stage_timings
15093        .deconvolver_pixels_touched
15094        .saturating_add((subtract_updates as u64).saturating_mul(image_pixels as u64));
15095    HogbomMinorCycleOutcome {
15096        updated_model,
15097        actual_updates: cycle_component_updates,
15098        reported_updates: cycle_component_updates.min(cycle_reported_niter),
15099        stop_reason,
15100        final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
15101        final_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
15102    }
15103}
15104
15105#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
15106fn hogbom_flatten_array2_x_major(values: &Array2<f32>) -> Vec<f32> {
15107    let (nx, ny) = values.dim();
15108    let mut flattened = Vec::with_capacity(nx.saturating_mul(ny));
15109    for x in 0..nx {
15110        for y in 0..ny {
15111            flattened.push(values[(x, y)]);
15112        }
15113    }
15114    flattened
15115}
15116
15117#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
15118fn copy_x_major_slice_to_array2(
15119    target: &mut Array2<f32>,
15120    values: &[f32],
15121) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
15122    let (nx, ny) = target.dim();
15123    if values.len() != nx.saturating_mul(ny) {
15124        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
15125            "Metal x-major readback length mismatch: got {} values for array shape {}x{}",
15126            values.len(),
15127            nx,
15128            ny
15129        )));
15130    }
15131    if target.is_standard_layout()
15132        && let Some(target_values) = target.as_slice_memory_order_mut()
15133    {
15134        target_values.copy_from_slice(values);
15135        return Ok(());
15136    }
15137    for x in 0..nx {
15138        for y in 0..ny {
15139            target[(x, y)] = values[x * ny + y];
15140        }
15141    }
15142    Ok(())
15143}
15144
15145#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
15146type Array2FirstDiff = ((usize, usize), f32, f32);
15147
15148#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
15149fn array2_max_abs_diff_with_first(
15150    lhs: &Array2<f32>,
15151    rhs: &Array2<f32>,
15152) -> (f32, Option<Array2FirstDiff>) {
15153    let (nx, ny) = lhs.dim();
15154    if rhs.dim() != (nx, ny) {
15155        return (f32::INFINITY, None);
15156    }
15157    let mut max_abs = 0.0f32;
15158    let mut first = None;
15159    for x in 0..nx {
15160        for y in 0..ny {
15161            let diff = (lhs[(x, y)] - rhs[(x, y)]).abs();
15162            if diff > max_abs {
15163                max_abs = diff;
15164            }
15165            if diff > 1.0e-5 && first.is_none() {
15166                first = Some(((x, y), lhs[(x, y)], rhs[(x, y)]));
15167            }
15168        }
15169    }
15170    (max_abs, first)
15171}
15172
15173#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
15174#[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
15175fn run_hogbom_minor_cycle_metal(
15176    _request: &ImagingRequest,
15177    _psf_state: &PsfState,
15178    _model: &mut Array2<f32>,
15179    _residual: &mut Array2<f32>,
15180    _cycle_reported_niter: usize,
15181    _cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
15182    _nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
15183    _stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
15184) -> Result<HogbomMinorCycleOutcome, ImagingError> {
15185    Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
15186        "Hogbom minor-cycle backend 'metal' requires macOS Metal".to_string(),
15187    ))
15188}
15189
15190#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
15191#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
15192fn run_hogbom_minor_cycle_metal(
15193    request: &ImagingRequest,
15194    psf_state: &PsfState,
15195    model: &mut Array2<f32>,
15196    residual: &mut Array2<f32>,
15197    cycle_reported_niter: usize,
15198    cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
15199    nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
15200    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
15201) -> Result<HogbomMinorCycleOutcome, ImagingError> {
15202    use std::{mem, slice};
15203
15204    use objc2_metal::{MTLBuffer, MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice, MTLDevice, MTLResourceOptions};
15205
15206    let (nx, ny) = residual.dim();
15207    if nx == 0 || ny == 0 {
15208        return Ok(HogbomMinorCycleOutcome {
15209            updated_model: false,
15210            actual_updates: 0,
15211            reported_updates: 0,
15212            stop_reason: Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels),
15213            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
15214            final_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
15215        });
15216    }
15217    if psf_state.psf.dim() != (nx, ny) {
15218        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
15219            "Hogbom Metal minor cycle requires residual and PSF shapes to match".to_string(),
15220        ));
15221    }
15222    if let Some(mask) = request.clean_mask.as_ref()
15223        && mask.dim() != (nx, ny)
15224    {
15225        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
15226            "Hogbom Metal minor cycle requires clean-mask and residual shapes to match".to_string(),
15227        ));
15228    }
15229    let cell_count = nx
15230        .checked_mul(ny)
15231        .ok_or_else(|| ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Hogbom image is too large".to_string()))?;
15232    let cell_count_u32 = u32::try_from(cell_count).map_err(|_| {
15233        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Hogbom Metal image cell count exceeds u32".to_string())
15234    })?;
15235    let nx_u32 = u32::try_from(nx).map_err(|_| {
15236        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Hogbom Metal image width exceeds u32".to_string())
15237    })?;
15238    let ny_u32 = u32::try_from(ny).map_err(|_| {
15239        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Hogbom Metal image height exceeds u32".to_string())
15240    })?;
15241
15242    let total_started = Instant::now();
15243    let collect_profile = profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled();
15244    let verify_cpu = env::var_os("CASA_RS_HOGBOM_METAL_VERIFY_CPU").is_some();
15245    let setup_started = Instant::now();
15246    let cpu_reference_peak = collect_profile
15247        .then(|| hclean_peak_location_masked(residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref()))
15248        .flatten();
15249    let (cpu_reference_peak_abs, cpu_reference_peak_x, cpu_reference_peak_y) = cpu_reference_peak
15250        .map(|((x, y), value)| (value.abs(), x, y))
15251        .unwrap_or((0.0, 0, 0));
15252    let clean_mask = clean_mask_summary(request.clean_mask.as_ref(), (nx, ny));
15253    let residual_values = hogbom_flatten_array2_x_major(residual);
15254    let psf_values = hogbom_flatten_array2_x_major(&psf_state.psf);
15255    let mask_values = request.clean_mask.as_ref().map(|mask| {
15256        let (mask_nx, mask_ny) = mask.dim();
15257        let mut values = Vec::with_capacity(mask_nx.saturating_mul(mask_ny));
15258        for x in 0..mask_nx {
15259            for y in 0..mask_ny {
15260                values.push(u32::from(mask[(x, y)]));
15261            }
15262        }
15263        values
15264    });
15265    let cpu_verify_inputs = verify_cpu.then(|| (model.clone(), residual.clone()));
15266    let setup_elapsed = setup_started.elapsed();
15267
15268    let device_queue_started = Instant::now();
15269    let device = MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice().ok_or_else(|| {
15270        ImagingError::Unsupported(
15271            "Hogbom minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not find a default Metal device".to_string(),
15272        )
15273    })?;
15274    let queue = device.newCommandQueue().ok_or_else(|| {
15275        ImagingError::Unsupported(
15276            "Hogbom minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create a Metal command queue".to_string(),
15277        )
15278    })?;
15279    let device_queue_elapsed = device_queue_started.elapsed();
15280    let shader_compile_started = Instant::now();
15281    let source = objc2_foundation::NSString::from_str(HOGBOM_MINOR_CYCLE_METAL_SHADER);
15282    let library = device
15283        .newLibraryWithSource_options_error(&source, None)
15284        .map_err(|error| {
15285            ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
15286                "Hogbom minor-cycle backend 'metal' failed to compile shader: {error:?}"
15287            ))
15288        })?;
15289    let shader_compile_elapsed = shader_compile_started.elapsed();
15290    let pipeline_started = Instant::now();
15291    let peak_pipeline = hogbom_metal_pipeline(&device, &library, "hogbom_peak_reduce_pixels")?;
15292    let reduce_pipeline = hogbom_metal_pipeline(&device, &library, "hogbom_reduce_candidates")?;
15293    let select_pipeline =
15294        hogbom_metal_pipeline(&device, &library, "hogbom_select_peak_from_candidate")?;
15295    let subtract_peak_pipeline =
15296        hogbom_metal_pipeline(&device, &library, "hogbom_subtract_psf_and_find_next_peak")?;
15297    let pipeline_elapsed = pipeline_started.elapsed();
15298
15299    let storage_options = MTLResourceOptions::StorageModeShared;
15300    let buffer_started = Instant::now();
15301    let residual_buffer = hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(
15302        &device,
15303        residual_values.as_slice(),
15304        storage_options,
15305        "residual",
15306    )?;
15307    let model_values = hogbom_flatten_array2_x_major(model);
15308    let model_buffer =
15309        hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(&device, model_values.as_slice(), storage_options, "model")?;
15310    let psf_buffer =
15311        hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(&device, psf_values.as_slice(), storage_options, "psf")?;
15312    let mask_storage = mask_values.unwrap_or_else(|| vec![0u32]);
15313    let mask_buffer =
15314        hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(&device, mask_storage.as_slice(), storage_options, "mask")?;
15315    let peak_threads_per_group = hogbom_metal_threads_per_group(&peak_pipeline, cell_count);
15316    let first_candidate_count = cell_count.div_ceil(peak_threads_per_group);
15317    let candidate_bytes = first_candidate_count
15318        .max(1)
15319        .checked_mul(mem::size_of::<HogbomMetalPeakCandidate>())
15320        .ok_or_else(|| {
15321            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Hogbom Metal candidate buffer is too large".to_string())
15322        })?;
15323    let candidate_a = device
15324        .newBufferWithLength_options(candidate_bytes, storage_options)
15325        .ok_or_else(|| {
15326            ImagingError::Unsupported(
15327                "Hogbom minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not allocate candidate buffer"
15328                    .to_string(),
15329            )
15330        })?;
15331    let candidate_b = device
15332        .newBufferWithLength_options(candidate_bytes, storage_options)
15333        .ok_or_else(|| {
15334            ImagingError::Unsupported(
15335                "Hogbom minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not allocate reduction buffer"
15336                    .to_string(),
15337            )
15338        })?;
15339    let selected_peak_buffer = hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(
15340        &device,
15341        &[HogbomMetalPeakCandidate::default()],
15342        storage_options,
15343        "selected peak",
15344    )?;
15345    let buffer_elapsed = buffer_started.elapsed();
15346
15347    let cycle_component_budget = hogbom_component_budget(cycle_reported_niter, request.clean);
15348    let cycle_component_budget_u32 = u32::try_from(cycle_component_budget).map_err(|_| {
15349        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Hogbom Metal component budget exceeds u32".to_string())
15350    })?;
15351    let mut readback_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
15352    let peak_threads_per_group_u32 = u32::try_from(peak_threads_per_group).map_err(|_| {
15353        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Hogbom Metal peak threadgroup width exceeds u32".to_string())
15354    })?;
15355    let cycle_params = HogbomMetalCycleParams {
15356        cell_count: cell_count_u32,
15357        nx: nx_u32,
15358        ny: ny_u32,
15359        has_mask: u32::from(request.clean_mask.is_some()),
15360        peak_threads_per_group: peak_threads_per_group_u32,
15361        component_budget: cycle_component_budget_u32,
15362        gain: request.clean.gain,
15363        threshold_jy_per_beam: request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
15364        cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
15365        nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
15366        trace_components: u32::from(env::var_os("CASA_RS_HOGBOM_TRACE").is_some()),
15367        _pad0: 0,
15368    };
15369    let trace_storage = vec![
15370        HogbomMetalComponentTrace::default();
15371        if cycle_params.trace_components != 0 {
15372            cycle_component_budget.max(1)
15373        } else {
15374            1
15375        }
15376    ];
15377    let trace_buffer = hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(
15378        &device,
15379        trace_storage.as_slice(),
15380        storage_options,
15381        "component trace",
15382    )?;
15383    let cycle_started = Instant::now();
15384    let (
15385        cycle_state,
15386        cycle_timing,
15387        peak_dispatches,
15388        reduce_dispatches,
15389        select_dispatches,
15390        subtract_peak_dispatches,
15391    ) = hogbom_metal_run_resident_cycle(
15392        &queue,
15393        &device,
15394        &peak_pipeline,
15395        &reduce_pipeline,
15396        &select_pipeline,
15397        &subtract_peak_pipeline,
15398        &residual_buffer,
15399        &model_buffer,
15400        &psf_buffer,
15401        &mask_buffer,
15402        &candidate_a,
15403        &candidate_b,
15404        &selected_peak_buffer,
15405        &trace_buffer,
15406        storage_options,
15407        cycle_params,
15408        first_candidate_count,
15409    )?;
15410    let cycle_elapsed = cycle_started.elapsed();
15411    let cycle_component_updates = usize::try_from(cycle_state.updates).map_err(|_| {
15412        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Hogbom Metal update count overflowed".to_string())
15413    })?;
15414    let updated_model = cycle_component_updates > 0;
15415    let stop_reason = hogbom_metal_stop_reason(cycle_state.stop_reason);
15416    let peak_searches = cycle_component_budget;
15417    let subtract_updates = cycle_component_updates;
15418    let command_buffers = 1usize;
15419    let last_peak_abs = cycle_state.peak.abs_value;
15420    let last_peak_value = cycle_state.peak.value;
15421    let last_peak_index = cycle_state.peak.flat_index;
15422
15423    let readback_started = Instant::now();
15424    let residual_slice = unsafe {
15425        slice::from_raw_parts(
15426            residual_buffer.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(),
15427            cell_count,
15428        )
15429    };
15430    copy_x_major_slice_to_array2(residual, residual_slice)?;
15431    let model_slice = unsafe {
15432        slice::from_raw_parts(model_buffer.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(), cell_count)
15433    };
15434    copy_x_major_slice_to_array2(model, model_slice)?;
15435    readback_elapsed += readback_started.elapsed();
15436    if cycle_params.trace_components != 0 {
15437        let trace_slice = unsafe {
15438            slice::from_raw_parts(
15439                trace_buffer
15440                    .contents()
15441                    .as_ptr()
15442                    .cast::<HogbomMetalComponentTrace>(),
15443                trace_storage.len(),
15444            )
15445        };
15446        for trace in trace_slice.iter().take(cycle_component_updates) {
15447            let x = usize::try_from(trace.flat_index)
15448                .ok()
15449                .map(|flat| flat / ny)
15450                .unwrap_or(0);
15451            let y = usize::try_from(trace.flat_index)
15452                .ok()
15453                .map(|flat| flat % ny)
15454                .unwrap_or(0);
15455            append_hogbom_trace(format!(
15456                "{{\"event\":\"component\",\"backend\":\"metal\",\"reffreq_hz\":{:.17e},\"cycle_update\":{},\"x\":{},\"y\":{},\"peak\":{:.17e},\"component\":{:.17e}}}",
15457                request.reffreq_hz, trace.update_index, x, y, trace.value, trace.component
15458            ));
15459        }
15460    }
15461    if let Some((mut cpu_model, mut cpu_residual)) = cpu_verify_inputs {
15462        let mut cpu_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
15463        let cpu_outcome = run_hogbom_minor_cycle_cpu(
15464            request,
15465            psf_state,
15466            &mut cpu_model,
15467            &mut cpu_residual,
15468            cycle_reported_niter,
15469            cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
15470            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
15471            &mut cpu_timings,
15472        );
15473        let model_diff = array2_max_abs_diff_with_first(model, &cpu_model);
15474        let residual_diff = array2_max_abs_diff_with_first(residual, &cpu_residual);
15475        eprintln!(
15476            "hogbom_metal_cpu_verify metal_updates={} cpu_updates={} metal_stop={:?} cpu_stop={:?} model_max_abs_diff={:.9e} model_first_diff={:?} residual_max_abs_diff={:.9e} residual_first_diff={:?}",
15477            cycle_component_updates,
15478            cpu_outcome.actual_updates,
15479            stop_reason,
15480            cpu_outcome.stop_reason,
15481            model_diff.0,
15482            model_diff.1,
15483            residual_diff.0,
15484            residual_diff.1,
15485        );
15486    }
15487
15488    let total_elapsed = total_started.elapsed();
15489    if collect_profile {
15490        eprintln!(
15491            "standard_mfs_hogbom_minor_cycle_summary backend=metal_resident_fused_peak updates={} reported_budget={} component_budget={} stop_reason={:?} image_pixels={} has_mask={} mask_pixels={} mask_fingerprint={:016x} cpu_reference_peak_abs={:.9e} cpu_reference_peak_x={} cpu_reference_peak_y={} peak_searches={} subtract_updates={} initial_peak_dispatches={} reduce_dispatches={} select_dispatches={} subtract_peak_dispatches={} command_buffers={} first_candidate_count={} candidate_bytes={} last_peak_abs={:.9e} last_peak_value={:.9e} last_peak_index={} setup_ms={:.3} device_queue_ms={:.3} shader_compile_ms={:.3} pipeline_ms={:.3} buffer_ms={:.3} cycle_wall_ms={:.3} cycle_gpu_ms={:.3} cycle_host_wait_ms={:.3} readback_ms={:.3} total_ms={:.3}",
15492            cycle_component_updates,
15493            cycle_reported_niter,
15494            cycle_component_budget,
15495            stop_reason,
15496            cell_count,
15497            clean_mask.has_mask,
15498            clean_mask.pixels,
15499            clean_mask.fingerprint,
15500            cpu_reference_peak_abs,
15501            cpu_reference_peak_x,
15502            cpu_reference_peak_y,
15503            peak_searches,
15504            subtract_updates,
15505            peak_dispatches,
15506            reduce_dispatches,
15507            select_dispatches,
15508            subtract_peak_dispatches,
15509            command_buffers,
15510            first_candidate_count,
15511            candidate_bytes,
15512            last_peak_abs,
15513            last_peak_value,
15514            last_peak_index,
15515            profile::millis(setup_elapsed),
15516            profile::millis(device_queue_elapsed),
15517            profile::millis(shader_compile_elapsed),
15518            profile::millis(pipeline_elapsed),
15519            profile::millis(buffer_elapsed),
15520            profile::millis(cycle_elapsed),
15521            profile::millis(cycle_timing.kernel_elapsed),
15522            profile::millis(cycle_elapsed.saturating_sub(cycle_timing.kernel_elapsed)),
15523            profile::millis(readback_elapsed),
15524            profile::millis(total_elapsed),
15525        );
15526    }
15527    stage_timings.minor_cycle += total_elapsed;
15528    stage_timings.minor_cycle_solve += total_elapsed;
15529    Ok(HogbomMinorCycleOutcome {
15530        updated_model,
15531        actual_updates: cycle_component_updates,
15532        reported_updates: cycle_component_updates.min(cycle_reported_niter),
15533        stop_reason,
15534        final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
15535        final_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
15536    })
15537}
15538
15539#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
15540const HOGBOM_METAL_THREADS_PER_GROUP: usize = 1024;
15541
15542#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
15543type HogbomMetalBuffer =
15544    objc2::rc::Retained<objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>>;
15545
15546#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
15547type HogbomMetalPipeline =
15548    objc2::rc::Retained<objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState>>;
15549
15550#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
15551#[derive(Debug, Default, Clone, Copy)]
15552struct HogbomMetalCommandTiming {
15553    kernel_elapsed: Duration,
15554}
15555
15556#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
15557impl HogbomMetalCommandTiming {
15558    fn from_command_buffer(
15559        command_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLCommandBuffer>,
15560    ) -> Self {
15561        use objc2_metal::MTLCommandBuffer;
15562
15563        let start = command_buffer.kernelStartTime();
15564        let end = command_buffer.kernelEndTime();
15565        let kernel_elapsed = if end > start {
15566            Duration::from_secs_f64(end - start)
15567        } else {
15568            Duration::ZERO
15569        };
15570        Self { kernel_elapsed }
15571    }
15572}
15573
15574#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
15575fn hogbom_metal_pipeline(
15576    device: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLDevice>,
15577    library: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLLibrary>,
15578    entry_point: &str,
15579) -> Result<HogbomMetalPipeline, ImagingError> {
15580    use objc2_metal::{MTLDevice, MTLLibrary};
15581
15582    let function_name = objc2_foundation::NSString::from_str(entry_point);
15583    let function = library.newFunctionWithName(&function_name).ok_or_else(|| {
15584        ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
15585            "Hogbom minor-cycle backend 'metal' shader entry point '{entry_point}' was not found"
15586        ))
15587    })?;
15588    device
15589        .newComputePipelineStateWithFunction_error(&function)
15590        .map_err(|error| {
15591            ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
15592                "Hogbom minor-cycle backend 'metal' failed to create pipeline '{entry_point}': {error:?}"
15593            ))
15594        })
15595}
15596
15597#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
15598fn hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice<T>(
15599    device: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLDevice>,
15600    values: &[T],
15601    storage_options: objc2_metal::MTLResourceOptions,
15602    label: &str,
15603) -> Result<HogbomMetalBuffer, ImagingError> {
15604    use std::{mem, ptr};
15605
15606    use objc2_metal::{MTLBuffer, MTLDevice};
15607
15608    let byte_len = mem::size_of_val(values);
15609    let buffer = device
15610        .newBufferWithLength_options(byte_len, storage_options)
15611        .ok_or_else(|| {
15612            ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
15613                "Hogbom minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not allocate {label} buffer"
15614            ))
15615        })?;
15616    if byte_len > 0 {
15617        unsafe {
15618            ptr::copy_nonoverlapping(
15619                values.as_ptr().cast::<u8>(),
15620                buffer.contents().as_ptr().cast::<u8>(),
15621                byte_len,
15622            );
15623        }
15624    }
15625    Ok(buffer)
15626}
15627
15628#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
15629fn hogbom_metal_params_buffer<T>(
15630    device: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLDevice>,
15631    params: &T,
15632    storage_options: objc2_metal::MTLResourceOptions,
15633    label: &str,
15634) -> Result<HogbomMetalBuffer, ImagingError> {
15635    hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(device, std::slice::from_ref(params), storage_options, label)
15636}
15637
15638#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
15639fn hogbom_metal_stop_reason(code: u32) -> Option<CleanStopReason> {
15640    match code {
15641        0 => None,
15642        1 => Some(CleanStopReason::GlobalThresholdReached),
15643        2 => Some(CleanStopReason::NsigmaThresholdReached),
15644        3 => Some(CleanStopReason::CycleThresholdReached),
15645        6 => Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels),
15646        7 => Some(CleanStopReason::DivergenceDetected),
15647        _ => None,
15648    }
15649}
15650
15651#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq)]
15652#[cfg(any(test, all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage))))]
15653enum StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkKind {
15654    Full,
15655    Fixed,
15656    Auto,
15657}
15658
15659#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
15660#[cfg(any(test, all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage))))]
15661struct StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkPlanner {
15662    kind: StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkKind,
15663    next_chunk: usize,
15664    min_chunk: usize,
15665    max_chunk: usize,
15666    target_ms: Option<f64>,
15667    observations: usize,
15668    sum_updates: f64,
15669    sum_updates_squared: f64,
15670    sum_ms: f64,
15671    sum_update_ms: f64,
15672    fixed_ms: Option<f64>,
15673    ms_per_update: Option<f64>,
15674    predicted_next_ms: Option<f64>,
15675}
15676
15677#[cfg(any(test, all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage))))]
15678impl StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkPlanner {
15679    fn next_chunk(&self, updates_remaining: usize) -> usize {
15680        self.next_chunk.max(1).min(updates_remaining.max(1))
15681    }
15682
15683    fn observe_command(&mut self, command_elapsed: Duration, encoded_updates: usize) {
15684        if self.kind != StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkKind::Auto {
15685            return;
15686        }
15687        let Some(target_ms) = self.target_ms else {
15688            return;
15689        };
15690        let encoded_updates = encoded_updates.max(1);
15691        let observed_ms = profile::millis(command_elapsed);
15692        if !observed_ms.is_finite() || observed_ms <= 0.0 {
15693            return;
15694        }
15695        self.observations = self.observations.saturating_add(1);
15696        let updates = encoded_updates as f64;
15697        self.sum_updates += updates;
15698        self.sum_updates_squared += updates * updates;
15699        self.sum_ms += observed_ms;
15700        self.sum_update_ms += updates * observed_ms;
15701        self.recompute_cost_model();
15702        self.next_chunk = self
15703            .planned_chunk_for_target(target_ms)
15704            .clamp(self.min_chunk, self.max_chunk);
15705        self.predicted_next_ms = self.predict_ms(self.next_chunk);
15706    }
15707
15708    fn recompute_cost_model(&mut self) {
15709        if self.observations >= 2 {
15710            let count = self.observations as f64;
15711            let denominator = count * self.sum_updates_squared - self.sum_updates.powi(2);
15712            if denominator.abs() > f64::EPSILON {
15713                let slope =
15714                    (count * self.sum_update_ms - self.sum_updates * self.sum_ms) / denominator;
15715                let intercept = (self.sum_ms - slope * self.sum_updates) / count;
15716                if slope.is_finite() && slope > 0.0 && intercept.is_finite() {
15717                    self.ms_per_update = Some(slope);
15718                    self.fixed_ms = Some(intercept.max(0.0));
15719                    return;
15720                }
15721            }
15722        }
15723        if self.sum_updates > 0.0 {
15724            let slope = self.sum_ms / self.sum_updates;
15725            if slope.is_finite() && slope > 0.0 {
15726                self.ms_per_update = Some(slope);
15727                self.fixed_ms = Some(0.0);
15728            }
15729        }
15730    }
15731
15732    fn planned_chunk_for_target(&self, target_ms: f64) -> usize {
15733        let Some(ms_per_update) = self.ms_per_update else {
15734            return self.next_chunk;
15735        };
15736        if !ms_per_update.is_finite() || ms_per_update <= 0.0 {
15737            return self.next_chunk;
15738        }
15739        let fixed_ms = self.fixed_ms.unwrap_or(0.0).max(0.0);
15740        let variable_budget_ms = (target_ms - fixed_ms).max(ms_per_update);
15741        let modeled_chunk = (variable_budget_ms / ms_per_update).floor() as usize;
15742        modeled_chunk.max(1)
15743    }
15744
15745    fn predict_ms(&self, chunk: usize) -> Option<f64> {
15746        let ms_per_update = self.ms_per_update?;
15747        let fixed_ms = self.fixed_ms.unwrap_or(0.0).max(0.0);
15748        Some(fixed_ms + ms_per_update * chunk.max(1) as f64)
15749    }
15750}
15751
15752#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
15753fn standard_mfs_metal_minor_cycle_chunk_planner(
15754    cycle_reported_niter: usize,
15755    cell_count: usize,
15756    scale_count: usize,
15757) -> StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkPlanner {
15758    let value = env::var(STANDARD_MFS_METAL_MINOR_CYCLE_CHUNK_ENV).ok();
15759    standard_mfs_metal_minor_cycle_chunk_planner_from_value(
15760        value.as_deref(),
15761        cycle_reported_niter,
15762        cell_count,
15763        scale_count,
15764    )
15765}
15766
15767#[cfg(any(test, all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage))))]
15768fn standard_mfs_metal_minor_cycle_chunk_planner_from_value(
15769    value: Option<&str>,
15770    cycle_reported_niter: usize,
15771    cell_count: usize,
15772    scale_count: usize,
15773) -> StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkPlanner {
15774    let cycle_reported_niter = cycle_reported_niter.max(1);
15775    let Some(value) = value.map(str::trim).filter(|value| !value.is_empty()) else {
15776        return StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkPlanner {
15777            kind: StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkKind::Full,
15778            next_chunk: cycle_reported_niter,
15779            min_chunk: cycle_reported_niter,
15780            max_chunk: cycle_reported_niter,
15781            target_ms: None,
15782            observations: 0,
15783            sum_updates: 0.0,
15784            sum_updates_squared: 0.0,
15785            sum_ms: 0.0,
15786            sum_update_ms: 0.0,
15787            fixed_ms: None,
15788            ms_per_update: None,
15789            predicted_next_ms: None,
15790        };
15791    };
15792    if value.eq_ignore_ascii_case("full") || value == "0" {
15793        return StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkPlanner {
15794            kind: StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkKind::Full,
15795            next_chunk: cycle_reported_niter,
15796            min_chunk: cycle_reported_niter,
15797            max_chunk: cycle_reported_niter,
15798            target_ms: None,
15799            observations: 0,
15800            sum_updates: 0.0,
15801            sum_updates_squared: 0.0,
15802            sum_ms: 0.0,
15803            sum_update_ms: 0.0,
15804            fixed_ms: None,
15805            ms_per_update: None,
15806            predicted_next_ms: None,
15807        };
15808    }
15809    if let Some(target_ms) = parse_standard_mfs_metal_minor_cycle_auto_target_ms(value) {
15810        let max_chunk = STANDARD_MFS_METAL_MINOR_CYCLE_MAX_AUTO_CHUNK.min(cycle_reported_niter);
15811        let min_chunk = STANDARD_MFS_METAL_MINOR_CYCLE_MIN_AUTO_CHUNK
15812            .min(max_chunk)
15813            .max(1);
15814        return StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkPlanner {
15815            kind: StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkKind::Auto,
15816            next_chunk: standard_mfs_metal_minor_cycle_initial_auto_chunk(
15817                cycle_reported_niter,
15818                cell_count,
15819                scale_count,
15820                min_chunk,
15821                max_chunk,
15822            ),
15823            min_chunk,
15824            max_chunk,
15825            target_ms: Some(target_ms),
15826            observations: 0,
15827            sum_updates: 0.0,
15828            sum_updates_squared: 0.0,
15829            sum_ms: 0.0,
15830            sum_update_ms: 0.0,
15831            fixed_ms: None,
15832            ms_per_update: None,
15833            predicted_next_ms: None,
15834        };
15835    }
15836    if let Some(chunk) = value.parse::<usize>().ok().filter(|value| *value > 0) {
15837        let chunk = chunk.min(cycle_reported_niter).max(1);
15838        return StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkPlanner {
15839            kind: StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkKind::Fixed,
15840            next_chunk: chunk,
15841            min_chunk: chunk,
15842            max_chunk: chunk,
15843            target_ms: None,
15844            observations: 0,
15845            sum_updates: 0.0,
15846            sum_updates_squared: 0.0,
15847            sum_ms: 0.0,
15848            sum_update_ms: 0.0,
15849            fixed_ms: None,
15850            ms_per_update: None,
15851            predicted_next_ms: None,
15852        };
15853    }
15854    StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkPlanner {
15855        kind: StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkKind::Full,
15856        next_chunk: cycle_reported_niter,
15857        min_chunk: cycle_reported_niter,
15858        max_chunk: cycle_reported_niter,
15859        target_ms: None,
15860        observations: 0,
15861        sum_updates: 0.0,
15862        sum_updates_squared: 0.0,
15863        sum_ms: 0.0,
15864        sum_update_ms: 0.0,
15865        fixed_ms: None,
15866        ms_per_update: None,
15867        predicted_next_ms: None,
15868    }
15869}
15870
15871#[cfg(any(test, all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage))))]
15872fn parse_standard_mfs_metal_minor_cycle_auto_target_ms(value: &str) -> Option<f64> {
15873    if value.eq_ignore_ascii_case("auto") {
15874        return Some(DEFAULT_STANDARD_MFS_METAL_MINOR_CYCLE_TARGET_MS);
15875    }
15876    let lowercase = value.to_ascii_lowercase();
15877    let suffix = lowercase.strip_prefix("auto:")?;
15878    let target_ms = suffix.parse::<f64>().ok()?;
15879    target_ms
15880        .is_finite()
15881        .then_some(target_ms)
15882        .filter(|value| *value > 0.0)
15883}
15884
15885#[cfg(any(test, all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage))))]
15886fn standard_mfs_metal_minor_cycle_initial_auto_chunk(
15887    cycle_reported_niter: usize,
15888    cell_count: usize,
15889    scale_count: usize,
15890    min_chunk: usize,
15891    max_chunk: usize,
15892) -> usize {
15893    let work_items_per_update = cell_count.max(1).saturating_mul(scale_count.max(1));
15894    let reference_work_items = STANDARD_MFS_METAL_MINOR_CYCLE_REFERENCE_PIXELS
15895        .saturating_mul(STANDARD_MFS_METAL_MINOR_CYCLE_REFERENCE_SCALES);
15896    let numerator =
15897        STANDARD_MFS_METAL_MINOR_CYCLE_REFERENCE_INITIAL_CHUNK.saturating_mul(reference_work_items);
15898    numerator
15899        .div_ceil(work_items_per_update)
15900        .clamp(min_chunk, max_chunk)
15901        .min(cycle_reported_niter.max(1))
15902}
15903
15904#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
15905#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
15906fn hogbom_metal_run_resident_cycle(
15907    queue: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLCommandQueue>,
15908    device: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLDevice>,
15909    peak_pipeline: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState>,
15910    reduce_pipeline: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState>,
15911    select_pipeline: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState>,
15912    subtract_peak_pipeline: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<
15913        dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState,
15914    >,
15915    residual_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
15916    model_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
15917    psf_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
15918    mask_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
15919    candidate_a: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
15920    candidate_b: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
15921    selected_peak_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
15922    trace_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
15923    storage_options: objc2_metal::MTLResourceOptions,
15924    params: HogbomMetalCycleParams,
15925    first_candidate_count: usize,
15926) -> Result<
15927    (
15928        HogbomMetalCycleState,
15929        HogbomMetalCommandTiming,
15930        usize,
15931        usize,
15932        usize,
15933        usize,
15934    ),
15935    ImagingError,
15936> {
15937    use objc2_metal::{
15938        MTLBuffer, MTLCommandBuffer, MTLCommandBufferStatus, MTLCommandEncoder, MTLCommandQueue,
15939        MTLComputeCommandEncoder, MTLSize,
15940    };
15941
15942    let command_buffer = queue.commandBuffer().ok_or_else(|| {
15943        ImagingError::Unsupported(
15944            "Hogbom minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create resident command buffer"
15945                .to_string(),
15946        )
15947    })?;
15948    let cycle_params_buffer =
15949        hogbom_metal_params_buffer(device, &params, storage_options, "resident cycle params")?;
15950    let initial_state = HogbomMetalCycleState::default();
15951    let state_buffer =
15952        hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(device, &[initial_state], storage_options, "cycle state")?;
15953
15954    let peak_threads = usize::try_from(params.cell_count).map_err(|_| {
15955        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Hogbom Metal peak thread count overflowed".to_string())
15956    })?;
15957    let peak_threads_per_group = usize::try_from(params.peak_threads_per_group).map_err(|_| {
15958        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Hogbom Metal peak threadgroup width overflowed".to_string())
15959    })?;
15960    let peak_group_count = peak_threads.div_ceil(peak_threads_per_group);
15961
15962    let mut reduce_param_buffers = Vec::new();
15963    let mut reduce_plan = Vec::new();
15964    let mut input_a = true;
15965    let mut current_count = first_candidate_count.max(1);
15966    while current_count > 1 {
15967        let reduce_threads_per_group =
15968            hogbom_metal_threads_per_group(reduce_pipeline, current_count);
15969        let output_count = current_count.div_ceil(reduce_threads_per_group);
15970        let reduce_params = HogbomMetalReduceParams {
15971            candidate_count: u32::try_from(current_count).map_err(|_| {
15972                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Hogbom Metal candidate count exceeds u32".to_string())
15973            })?,
15974            nx: params.nx,
15975            ny: params.ny,
15976            threads_per_group: u32::try_from(reduce_threads_per_group).map_err(|_| {
15977                ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
15978                    "Hogbom Metal reduce threadgroup width exceeds u32".to_string(),
15979                )
15980            })?,
15981        };
15982        let reduce_params_buffer =
15983            hogbom_metal_params_buffer(device, &reduce_params, storage_options, "reduce params")?;
15984        reduce_param_buffers.push(reduce_params_buffer);
15985        reduce_plan.push((input_a, output_count, reduce_threads_per_group));
15986        input_a = !input_a;
15987        current_count = output_count.max(1);
15988    }
15989    let final_candidate_from_a = input_a;
15990
15991    let component_budget = usize::try_from(params.component_budget).map_err(|_| {
15992        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Hogbom Metal component budget overflowed".to_string())
15993    })?;
15994    let mut peak_dispatches = 0usize;
15995    let mut reduce_dispatches = 0usize;
15996    let mut select_dispatches = 0usize;
15997    let mut subtract_peak_dispatches = 0usize;
15998
15999    if component_budget > 0 {
16000        let peak_encoder = command_buffer.computeCommandEncoder().ok_or_else(|| {
16001            ImagingError::Unsupported(
16002                "Hogbom minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create resident peak encoder"
16003                    .to_string(),
16004            )
16005        })?;
16006        peak_encoder.setComputePipelineState(peak_pipeline);
16007        unsafe {
16008            peak_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(residual_buffer), 0, 0);
16009            peak_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(mask_buffer), 0, 1);
16010            peak_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(candidate_a), 0, 2);
16011            peak_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&cycle_params_buffer), 0, 3);
16012            peak_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&state_buffer), 0, 4);
16013        }
16014        peak_encoder.dispatchThreadgroups_threadsPerThreadgroup(
16015            MTLSize {
16016                width: peak_group_count,
16017                height: 1,
16018                depth: 1,
16019            },
16020            MTLSize {
16021                width: peak_threads_per_group,
16022                height: 1,
16023                depth: 1,
16024            },
16025        );
16026        peak_encoder.endEncoding();
16027        peak_dispatches = peak_dispatches.saturating_add(1);
16028
16029        reduce_dispatches = reduce_dispatches.saturating_add(hogbom_metal_encode_reduce_plan(
16030            &command_buffer,
16031            reduce_pipeline,
16032            candidate_a,
16033            candidate_b,
16034            &reduce_param_buffers,
16035            &reduce_plan,
16036            &state_buffer,
16037        )?);
16038
16039        let final_candidate_buffer = if final_candidate_from_a {
16040            candidate_a
16041        } else {
16042            candidate_b
16043        };
16044        hogbom_metal_encode_select_peak(
16045            &command_buffer,
16046            select_pipeline,
16047            final_candidate_buffer,
16048            selected_peak_buffer,
16049            &state_buffer,
16050            model_buffer,
16051            &cycle_params_buffer,
16052            trace_buffer,
16053        )?;
16054        select_dispatches = select_dispatches.saturating_add(1);
16055
16056        for component_index in 0..component_budget {
16057            let subtract_encoder = command_buffer.computeCommandEncoder().ok_or_else(|| {
16058                ImagingError::Unsupported(
16059                    "Hogbom minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create resident subtract/peak encoder"
16060                        .to_string(),
16061                )
16062            })?;
16063            subtract_encoder.setComputePipelineState(subtract_peak_pipeline);
16064            unsafe {
16065                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(selected_peak_buffer), 0, 0);
16066                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(residual_buffer), 0, 1);
16067                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(psf_buffer), 0, 2);
16068                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(mask_buffer), 0, 3);
16069                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(candidate_a), 0, 4);
16070                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&cycle_params_buffer), 0, 5);
16071                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&state_buffer), 0, 6);
16072            }
16073            subtract_encoder.dispatchThreadgroups_threadsPerThreadgroup(
16074                MTLSize {
16075                    width: peak_group_count,
16076                    height: 1,
16077                    depth: 1,
16078                },
16079                MTLSize {
16080                    width: peak_threads_per_group,
16081                    height: 1,
16082                    depth: 1,
16083                },
16084            );
16085            subtract_encoder.endEncoding();
16086            subtract_peak_dispatches = subtract_peak_dispatches.saturating_add(1);
16087
16088            if component_index + 1 == component_budget {
16089                break;
16090            }
16091            reduce_dispatches = reduce_dispatches.saturating_add(hogbom_metal_encode_reduce_plan(
16092                &command_buffer,
16093                reduce_pipeline,
16094                candidate_a,
16095                candidate_b,
16096                &reduce_param_buffers,
16097                &reduce_plan,
16098                &state_buffer,
16099            )?);
16100            hogbom_metal_encode_select_peak(
16101                &command_buffer,
16102                select_pipeline,
16103                final_candidate_buffer,
16104                selected_peak_buffer,
16105                &state_buffer,
16106                model_buffer,
16107                &cycle_params_buffer,
16108                trace_buffer,
16109            )?;
16110            select_dispatches = select_dispatches.saturating_add(1);
16111        }
16112    }
16113
16114    command_buffer.commit();
16115    command_buffer.waitUntilCompleted();
16116    let timing = HogbomMetalCommandTiming::from_command_buffer(&command_buffer);
16117    if command_buffer.status() == MTLCommandBufferStatus::Error {
16118        let message = command_buffer
16119            .error()
16120            .map(|error| format!("{error:?}"))
16121            .unwrap_or_else(|| "unknown Metal command buffer error".to_string());
16122        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
16123            "Hogbom minor-cycle backend 'metal' resident command failed: {message}"
16124        )));
16125    }
16126    let final_state = unsafe {
16127        *std::slice::from_raw_parts(
16128            state_buffer
16129                .contents()
16130                .as_ptr()
16131                .cast::<HogbomMetalCycleState>(),
16132            1,
16133        )
16134        .first()
16135        .expect("one Hogbom Metal cycle state")
16136    };
16137    Ok((
16138        final_state,
16139        timing,
16140        peak_dispatches,
16141        reduce_dispatches,
16142        select_dispatches,
16143        subtract_peak_dispatches,
16144    ))
16145}
16146
16147#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
16148#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
16149fn hogbom_metal_encode_reduce_plan(
16150    command_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLCommandBuffer>,
16151    reduce_pipeline: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState>,
16152    candidate_a: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
16153    candidate_b: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
16154    reduce_param_buffers: &[HogbomMetalBuffer],
16155    reduce_plan: &[(bool, usize, usize)],
16156    state_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
16157) -> Result<usize, ImagingError> {
16158    use objc2_metal::{MTLCommandBuffer, MTLCommandEncoder, MTLComputeCommandEncoder, MTLSize};
16159
16160    let mut dispatches = 0usize;
16161    for (reduce_index, (input_a_for_reduce, output_count, reduce_threads_per_group)) in
16162        reduce_plan.iter().copied().enumerate()
16163    {
16164        let reduce_encoder = command_buffer.computeCommandEncoder().ok_or_else(|| {
16165            ImagingError::Unsupported(
16166                "Hogbom minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create resident reduce encoder"
16167                    .to_string(),
16168            )
16169        })?;
16170        reduce_encoder.setComputePipelineState(reduce_pipeline);
16171        let (input_buffer, output_buffer) = if input_a_for_reduce {
16172            (candidate_a, candidate_b)
16173        } else {
16174            (candidate_b, candidate_a)
16175        };
16176        unsafe {
16177            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(input_buffer), 0, 0);
16178            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(output_buffer), 0, 1);
16179            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(
16180                Some(&reduce_param_buffers[reduce_index]),
16181                0,
16182                2,
16183            );
16184            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(state_buffer), 0, 3);
16185        }
16186        reduce_encoder.dispatchThreadgroups_threadsPerThreadgroup(
16187            MTLSize {
16188                width: output_count,
16189                height: 1,
16190                depth: 1,
16191            },
16192            MTLSize {
16193                width: reduce_threads_per_group,
16194                height: 1,
16195                depth: 1,
16196            },
16197        );
16198        reduce_encoder.endEncoding();
16199        dispatches = dispatches.saturating_add(1);
16200    }
16201    Ok(dispatches)
16202}
16203
16204#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
16205#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
16206fn hogbom_metal_encode_select_peak(
16207    command_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLCommandBuffer>,
16208    select_pipeline: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState>,
16209    final_candidate_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
16210    selected_peak_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
16211    state_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
16212    model_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
16213    cycle_params_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
16214    trace_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
16215) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
16216    use objc2_metal::{MTLCommandBuffer, MTLCommandEncoder, MTLComputeCommandEncoder, MTLSize};
16217
16218    let select_encoder = command_buffer.computeCommandEncoder().ok_or_else(|| {
16219        ImagingError::Unsupported(
16220            "Hogbom minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create resident peak-select encoder"
16221                .to_string(),
16222        )
16223    })?;
16224    select_encoder.setComputePipelineState(select_pipeline);
16225    unsafe {
16226        select_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(final_candidate_buffer), 0, 0);
16227        select_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(selected_peak_buffer), 0, 1);
16228        select_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(state_buffer), 0, 2);
16229        select_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(model_buffer), 0, 3);
16230        select_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(cycle_params_buffer), 0, 4);
16231        select_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(trace_buffer), 0, 5);
16232    }
16233    select_encoder.dispatchThreads_threadsPerThreadgroup(
16234        MTLSize {
16235            width: 1,
16236            height: 1,
16237            depth: 1,
16238        },
16239        MTLSize {
16240            width: 1,
16241            height: 1,
16242            depth: 1,
16243        },
16244    );
16245    select_encoder.endEncoding();
16246    Ok(())
16247}
16248
16249#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
16250fn hogbom_metal_threads_per_group(
16251    pipeline: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState>,
16252    thread_count: usize,
16253) -> usize {
16254    use objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState;
16255
16256    let thread_width = pipeline.threadExecutionWidth().max(1);
16257    let max_threads = pipeline.maxTotalThreadsPerThreadgroup().max(1);
16258    let capped = HOGBOM_METAL_THREADS_PER_GROUP
16259        .min(thread_width.max(1).saturating_mul(32))
16260        .min(max_threads)
16261        .min(thread_count)
16262        .max(1);
16263    let mut power_of_two = 1usize;
16264    while power_of_two.saturating_mul(2) <= capped {
16265        power_of_two = power_of_two.saturating_mul(2);
16266    }
16267    power_of_two
16268}
16269
16270#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
16271const MULTISCALE_MINOR_CYCLE_METAL_SHADER: &str = r#"
16272#include <metal_stdlib>
16273using namespace metal;
16274#pragma clang fp contract(off)
16275
16276struct HogbomPeakCandidate {
16277    float abs_value;
16278    float value;
16279    uint flat_index;
16280    uint valid;
16281};
16282
16283struct MultiscaleCycleParams {
16284    uint cell_count;
16285    uint nx;
16286    uint ny;
16287    uint scale_count;
16288    uint has_scale_masks;
16289    uint threads_per_group;
16290    uint reduce_threads_per_group;
16291    uint reduce_level_count;
16292    uint component_budget;
16293    float gain;
16294    float threshold_jy_per_beam;
16295    float cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam;
16296    float nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam;
16297};
16298
16299struct MultiscaleReduceParams {
16300    uint candidate_count;
16301    uint cell_count;
16302    uint nx;
16303    uint ny;
16304    uint scale_count;
16305    uint threads_per_group;
16306    uint2 _pad0;
16307};
16308
16309struct MultiscaleCycleState {
16310    HogbomPeakCandidate peak;
16311    float component;
16312    uint updates;
16313    uint stopped;
16314    uint stop_reason;
16315    uint selected_scale_index;
16316    uint window_x0;
16317    uint window_y0;
16318    uint window_x1;
16319    uint window_y1;
16320    float initial_component_abs;
16321    uint2 _pad0;
16322};
16323
16324struct MultiscaleDispatchArgs {
16325    uint threadgroups_per_grid[3];
16326};
16327
16328struct MultiscaleWindowIndex {
16329    uint combined_index;
16330    uint scale_index;
16331    uint flat_index;
16332    uint x;
16333    uint y;
16334    uint valid;
16335};
16336
16337static inline HogbomPeakCandidate multiscale_invalid_candidate() {
16338    HogbomPeakCandidate candidate;
16339    candidate.abs_value = 0.0f;
16340    candidate.value = 0.0f;
16341    candidate.flat_index = 0u;
16342    candidate.valid = 0u;
16343    return candidate;
16344}
16345
16346static inline uint multiscale_order_key(uint combined_index, uint cell_count, uint nx, uint ny) {
16347    const uint scale_index = combined_index / cell_count;
16348    const uint flat_index = combined_index - scale_index * cell_count;
16349    const uint x = flat_index / ny;
16350    const uint y = flat_index - x * ny;
16351    return scale_index * cell_count + y * nx + x;
16352}
16353
16354static inline bool multiscale_candidate_better(
16355    HogbomPeakCandidate candidate,
16356    HogbomPeakCandidate best,
16357    uint cell_count,
16358    uint nx,
16359    uint ny
16360) {
16361    if (candidate.valid == 0u) {
16362        return false;
16363    }
16364    if (best.valid == 0u) {
16365        return true;
16366    }
16367    if (candidate.abs_value > best.abs_value) {
16368        return true;
16369    }
16370    if (candidate.abs_value == best.abs_value) {
16371        return multiscale_order_key(candidate.flat_index, cell_count, nx, ny) <
16372               multiscale_order_key(best.flat_index, cell_count, nx, ny);
16373    }
16374    return false;
16375}
16376
16377static inline uint multiscale_stop_reason(float component_abs, constant MultiscaleCycleParams &params) {
16378    const bool threshold_floor_active =
16379        params.threshold_jy_per_beam > 0.0f &&
16380        (0.01f * params.threshold_jy_per_beam) < 2.0e-8f &&
16381        params.cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam <= params.threshold_jy_per_beam;
16382    if (component_abs < params.threshold_jy_per_beam ||
16383        (threshold_floor_active &&
16384         (component_abs <= params.threshold_jy_per_beam ||
16385          fabs(component_abs - params.threshold_jy_per_beam) <= max(0.01f * params.threshold_jy_per_beam, 2.0e-8f)))) {
16386        return 1u;
16387    }
16388    if (params.nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam > params.threshold_jy_per_beam &&
16389        component_abs < params.nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam) {
16390        return 2u;
16391    }
16392    if (component_abs < params.cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam) {
16393        return 3u;
16394    }
16395    return 0u;
16396}
16397
16398static inline uint multiscale_div_ceil(uint value, uint divisor) {
16399    return (value + divisor - 1u) / divisor;
16400}
16401
16402static inline uint multiscale_window_width(device const MultiscaleCycleState *state) {
16403    return state->window_x1 >= state->window_x0 ? state->window_x1 - state->window_x0 + 1u : 0u;
16404}
16405
16406static inline uint multiscale_window_height(device const MultiscaleCycleState *state) {
16407    return state->window_y1 >= state->window_y0 ? state->window_y1 - state->window_y0 + 1u : 0u;
16408}
16409
16410static inline uint multiscale_window_candidate_count(
16411    constant MultiscaleCycleParams &params,
16412    device const MultiscaleCycleState *state
16413) {
16414    if (state->stopped != 0u) {
16415        return 0u;
16416    }
16417    return multiscale_window_width(state) * multiscale_window_height(state) * params.scale_count;
16418}
16419
16420static inline void multiscale_prepare_window_dispatch_args(
16421    device const MultiscaleCycleState *state,
16422    constant MultiscaleCycleParams &params,
16423    device MultiscaleReduceParams *reduce_params,
16424    device MultiscaleDispatchArgs *dispatch_args,
16425    device ulong *dispatch_stats
16426) {
16427    const uint active_candidates = multiscale_window_candidate_count(params, state);
16428    dispatch_stats[0] += ulong(active_candidates);
16429    if (state->updates > 0u) {
16430        dispatch_stats[1] += ulong(active_candidates);
16431    }
16432    uint current_count = max(1u, multiscale_div_ceil(max(1u, active_candidates), params.threads_per_group));
16433    dispatch_args[0].threadgroups_per_grid[0] = current_count;
16434    dispatch_args[0].threadgroups_per_grid[1] = 1u;
16435    dispatch_args[0].threadgroups_per_grid[2] = 1u;
16436    for (uint level = 0u; level < params.reduce_level_count; ++level) {
16437        reduce_params[level].candidate_count = current_count;
16438        reduce_params[level].cell_count = params.cell_count;
16439        reduce_params[level].nx = params.nx;
16440        reduce_params[level].ny = params.ny;
16441        reduce_params[level].scale_count = params.scale_count;
16442        reduce_params[level].threads_per_group = params.reduce_threads_per_group;
16443        reduce_params[level]._pad0 = uint2(0u, 0u);
16444        current_count = max(1u, multiscale_div_ceil(max(1u, current_count), params.reduce_threads_per_group));
16445        dispatch_args[level + 1u].threadgroups_per_grid[0] = current_count;
16446        dispatch_args[level + 1u].threadgroups_per_grid[1] = 1u;
16447        dispatch_args[level + 1u].threadgroups_per_grid[2] = 1u;
16448    }
16449}
16450
16451static inline MultiscaleWindowIndex multiscale_window_index(
16452    uint window_index,
16453    constant MultiscaleCycleParams &params,
16454    device const MultiscaleCycleState *state
16455) {
16456    MultiscaleWindowIndex mapped;
16457    mapped.combined_index = 0u;
16458    mapped.scale_index = 0u;
16459    mapped.flat_index = 0u;
16460    mapped.x = 0u;
16461    mapped.y = 0u;
16462    mapped.valid = 0u;
16463    const uint width = multiscale_window_width(state);
16464    const uint height = multiscale_window_height(state);
16465    const uint window_pixels = width * height;
16466    if (window_pixels == 0u || window_index >= window_pixels * params.scale_count) {
16467        return mapped;
16468    }
16469    mapped.scale_index = window_index / window_pixels;
16470    const uint window_flat = window_index - mapped.scale_index * window_pixels;
16471    mapped.x = state->window_x0 + window_flat / height;
16472    mapped.y = state->window_y0 + window_flat - (mapped.x - state->window_x0) * height;
16473    if (mapped.x >= params.nx || mapped.y >= params.ny) {
16474        return mapped;
16475    }
16476    mapped.flat_index = mapped.x * params.ny + mapped.y;
16477    mapped.combined_index = mapped.scale_index * params.cell_count + mapped.flat_index;
16478    mapped.valid = 1u;
16479    return mapped;
16480}
16481
16482kernel void multiscale_prepare_window_dispatch(
16483    device const MultiscaleCycleState *state [[buffer(0)]],
16484    constant MultiscaleCycleParams &params [[buffer(1)]],
16485    device MultiscaleReduceParams *reduce_params [[buffer(2)]],
16486    device MultiscaleDispatchArgs *dispatch_args [[buffer(3)]],
16487    device ulong *dispatch_stats [[buffer(4)]],
16488    uint thread_index [[thread_position_in_grid]]
16489) {
16490    if (thread_index != 0u) {
16491        return;
16492    }
16493    multiscale_prepare_window_dispatch_args(
16494        state, params, reduce_params, dispatch_args, dispatch_stats);
16495}
16496
16497static inline HogbomPeakCandidate multiscale_make_candidate(
16498    device const float *dirty_scales,
16499    device const uint *scale_masks,
16500    device const float *peak_psf,
16501    device const float *scale_bias,
16502    uint window_index,
16503    constant MultiscaleCycleParams &params,
16504    device const MultiscaleCycleState *state
16505) {
16506    HogbomPeakCandidate candidate = multiscale_invalid_candidate();
16507    if (state->stopped != 0u) {
16508        return candidate;
16509    }
16510    const MultiscaleWindowIndex mapped = multiscale_window_index(window_index, params, state);
16511    if (mapped.valid == 0u) {
16512        return candidate;
16513    }
16514    if (params.has_scale_masks != 0u && scale_masks[mapped.combined_index] == 0u) {
16515        return candidate;
16516    }
16517    const float peak = peak_psf[mapped.scale_index];
16518    const float value = dirty_scales[mapped.combined_index];
16519    if (peak <= 0.0f || value == 0.0f) {
16520        return candidate;
16521    }
16522    const float strength = value / peak;
16523    const float score = scale_bias[mapped.scale_index] * value * strength;
16524    candidate.abs_value = fabs(score);
16525    candidate.value = value;
16526    candidate.flat_index = mapped.combined_index;
16527    candidate.valid = 1u;
16528    return candidate;
16529}
16530
16531kernel void multiscale_peak_reduce(
16532    device const float *dirty_scales [[buffer(0)]],
16533    device const uint *scale_masks [[buffer(1)]],
16534    device const float *peak_psf [[buffer(2)]],
16535    device const float *scale_bias [[buffer(3)]],
16536    device HogbomPeakCandidate *candidates [[buffer(4)]],
16537    constant MultiscaleCycleParams &params [[buffer(5)]],
16538    device const MultiscaleCycleState *state [[buffer(6)]],
16539    uint thread_index [[thread_position_in_grid]],
16540    uint local_index [[thread_index_in_threadgroup]],
16541    uint group_index [[threadgroup_position_in_grid]]
16542) {
16543    threadgroup HogbomPeakCandidate local_candidates[1024];
16544    HogbomPeakCandidate candidate = multiscale_make_candidate(
16545        dirty_scales, scale_masks, peak_psf, scale_bias, thread_index, params, state);
16546    local_candidates[local_index] = candidate;
16547    threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
16548
16549    for (uint stride = params.threads_per_group >> 1; stride > 0u; stride >>= 1) {
16550        if (local_index < stride) {
16551            const HogbomPeakCandidate other = local_candidates[local_index + stride];
16552            const HogbomPeakCandidate best = local_candidates[local_index];
16553            if (multiscale_candidate_better(other, best, params.cell_count, params.nx, params.ny)) {
16554                local_candidates[local_index] = other;
16555            }
16556        }
16557        threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
16558    }
16559    if (local_index == 0u) {
16560        candidates[group_index] = local_candidates[0];
16561    }
16562}
16563
16564kernel void multiscale_reduce_candidates(
16565    device const HogbomPeakCandidate *input [[buffer(0)]],
16566    device HogbomPeakCandidate *output [[buffer(1)]],
16567    constant MultiscaleReduceParams &params [[buffer(2)]],
16568    device const MultiscaleCycleState *state [[buffer(3)]],
16569    uint thread_index [[thread_position_in_grid]],
16570    uint local_index [[thread_index_in_threadgroup]],
16571    uint group_index [[threadgroup_position_in_grid]]
16572) {
16573    threadgroup HogbomPeakCandidate local_candidates[1024];
16574    HogbomPeakCandidate candidate = multiscale_invalid_candidate();
16575    if (state->stopped == 0u && thread_index < params.candidate_count) {
16576        candidate = input[thread_index];
16577    }
16578    local_candidates[local_index] = candidate;
16579    threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
16580
16581    for (uint stride = params.threads_per_group >> 1; stride > 0u; stride >>= 1) {
16582        if (local_index < stride) {
16583            const HogbomPeakCandidate other = local_candidates[local_index + stride];
16584            const HogbomPeakCandidate best = local_candidates[local_index];
16585            if (multiscale_candidate_better(other, best, params.cell_count, params.nx, params.ny)) {
16586                local_candidates[local_index] = other;
16587            }
16588        }
16589        threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
16590    }
16591    if (local_index == 0u) {
16592        output[group_index] = local_candidates[0];
16593    }
16594}
16595
16596kernel void multiscale_select_component(
16597    device const HogbomPeakCandidate *peak_candidate [[buffer(0)]],
16598    device HogbomPeakCandidate *selected_peak [[buffer(1)]],
16599    device MultiscaleCycleState *state [[buffer(2)]],
16600    device float *model [[buffer(3)]],
16601    device const float *scale_kernels [[buffer(4)]],
16602    device uint *scale_counts [[buffer(5)]],
16603    constant MultiscaleCycleParams &params [[buffer(6)]],
16604    device const float *peak_psf [[buffer(7)]],
16605    uint thread_index [[thread_position_in_grid]]
16606) {
16607    if (thread_index != 0u || state->stopped != 0u) {
16608        return;
16609    }
16610    const HogbomPeakCandidate peak = peak_candidate[0];
16611    selected_peak[0] = peak;
16612    state->peak = peak;
16613    if (peak.valid == 0u) {
16614        state->stopped = 1u;
16615        state->stop_reason = 6u;
16616        return;
16617    }
16618    const uint scale_index = peak.flat_index / params.cell_count;
16619    const uint flat_index = peak.flat_index - scale_index * params.cell_count;
16620    const float scale_peak_psf = max(1.0e-20f, peak_psf[scale_index]);
16621    const float strength = peak.value / scale_peak_psf;
16622    const float component_abs = fabs(strength);
16623    state->selected_scale_index = scale_index;
16624    const uint reason = multiscale_stop_reason(component_abs, params);
16625    if (reason != 0u) {
16626        state->stopped = 1u;
16627        state->stop_reason = reason;
16628        return;
16629    }
16630    if (state->updates > 0u && component_abs > state->initial_component_abs * 1.5f) {
16631        state->stopped = 1u;
16632        state->stop_reason = 7u;
16633        return;
16634    }
16635    if (state->updates == 0u) {
16636        state->initial_component_abs = component_abs;
16637    }
16638    state->component = params.gain * strength;
16639    state->updates += 1u;
16640    scale_counts[scale_index] += 1u;
16641    const uint peak_x = flat_index / params.ny;
16642    const uint peak_y = flat_index - peak_x * params.ny;
16643    const uint half_x = params.nx / 2u;
16644    const uint half_y = params.ny / 2u;
16645    state->window_x0 = peak_x > half_x ? peak_x - half_x : 0u;
16646    state->window_y0 = peak_y > half_y ? peak_y - half_y : 0u;
16647    state->window_x1 = min(params.nx - 1u, peak_x + half_x - 1u);
16648    state->window_y1 = min(params.ny - 1u, peak_y + half_y - 1u);
16649}
16650
16651kernel void multiscale_subtract_and_find_next(
16652    device const HogbomPeakCandidate *selected_peak [[buffer(0)]],
16653    device float *dirty_scales [[buffer(1)]],
16654    device const float *psf_scales [[buffer(2)]],
16655    device const float *scale_kernels [[buffer(3)]],
16656    device const uint *scale_masks [[buffer(4)]],
16657    device const float *peak_psf [[buffer(5)]],
16658    device const float *scale_bias [[buffer(6)]],
16659    device HogbomPeakCandidate *candidates [[buffer(7)]],
16660    device float *model [[buffer(8)]],
16661    constant MultiscaleCycleParams &params [[buffer(9)]],
16662    device const MultiscaleCycleState *state [[buffer(10)]],
16663    uint thread_index [[thread_position_in_grid]],
16664    uint local_index [[thread_index_in_threadgroup]],
16665    uint group_index [[threadgroup_position_in_grid]]
16666) {
16667    threadgroup HogbomPeakCandidate local_candidates[1024];
16668    const MultiscaleWindowIndex mapped = multiscale_window_index(thread_index, params, state);
16669    if (state->stopped == 0u && mapped.valid != 0u) {
16670        const HogbomPeakCandidate peak = selected_peak[0];
16671        const uint selected_scale = state->selected_scale_index;
16672        const uint peak_flat = peak.flat_index - selected_scale * params.cell_count;
16673        const uint peak_x = peak_flat / params.ny;
16674        const uint peak_y = peak_flat - peak_x * params.ny;
16675        const int kernel_x = int(mapped.x) - int(peak_x) + int(params.nx / 2u);
16676        const int kernel_y = int(mapped.y) - int(peak_y) + int(params.ny / 2u);
16677        if (kernel_x >= 0 && kernel_y >= 0 &&
16678            kernel_x < int(params.nx) && kernel_y < int(params.ny)) {
16679            const uint kernel_index = uint(kernel_x) * params.ny + uint(kernel_y);
16680            if (mapped.scale_index == 0u) {
16681                const float model_delta =
16682                    state->component * scale_kernels[selected_scale * params.cell_count + kernel_index];
16683                model[mapped.flat_index] = model[mapped.flat_index] + model_delta;
16684            }
16685            const uint psf_index =
16686                ((mapped.scale_index * params.scale_count + selected_scale) * params.cell_count) +
16687                kernel_index;
16688            const float dirty_delta = state->component * psf_scales[psf_index];
16689            dirty_scales[mapped.combined_index] = dirty_scales[mapped.combined_index] - dirty_delta;
16690        }
16691    }
16692
16693    HogbomPeakCandidate candidate = multiscale_make_candidate(
16694        dirty_scales, scale_masks, peak_psf, scale_bias, thread_index, params, state);
16695    local_candidates[local_index] = candidate;
16696    threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
16697
16698    for (uint stride = params.threads_per_group >> 1; stride > 0u; stride >>= 1) {
16699        if (local_index < stride) {
16700            const HogbomPeakCandidate other = local_candidates[local_index + stride];
16701            const HogbomPeakCandidate best = local_candidates[local_index];
16702            if (multiscale_candidate_better(other, best, params.cell_count, params.nx, params.ny)) {
16703                local_candidates[local_index] = other;
16704            }
16705        }
16706        threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
16707    }
16708    if (local_index == 0u) {
16709        candidates[group_index] = local_candidates[0];
16710    }
16711}
16712"#;
16713
16714#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
16715const HOGBOM_MINOR_CYCLE_METAL_SHADER: &str = r#"
16716#include <metal_stdlib>
16717using namespace metal;
16718#pragma clang fp contract(off)
16719
16720struct HogbomPeakCandidate {
16721    float abs_value;
16722    float value;
16723    uint flat_index;
16724    uint valid;
16725};
16726
16727struct HogbomReduceParams {
16728    uint candidate_count;
16729    uint nx;
16730    uint ny;
16731    uint threads_per_group;
16732};
16733
16734struct HogbomCycleParams {
16735    uint cell_count;
16736    uint nx;
16737    uint ny;
16738    uint has_mask;
16739    uint peak_threads_per_group;
16740    uint component_budget;
16741    float gain;
16742    float threshold_jy_per_beam;
16743    float cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam;
16744    float nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam;
16745    uint trace_components;
16746    uint _pad0;
16747};
16748
16749struct HogbomCycleState {
16750    HogbomPeakCandidate peak;
16751    float component;
16752    uint updates;
16753    uint stopped;
16754    uint stop_reason;
16755};
16756
16757struct HogbomComponentTrace {
16758    float value;
16759    float component;
16760    uint flat_index;
16761    uint update_index;
16762};
16763
16764static inline uint hogbom_order_key(uint flat_index, uint ny, uint nx) {
16765    const uint x = flat_index / ny;
16766    const uint y = flat_index - x * ny;
16767    return y * nx + x;
16768}
16769
16770static inline HogbomPeakCandidate hogbom_invalid_candidate() {
16771    HogbomPeakCandidate candidate;
16772    candidate.abs_value = 0.0f;
16773    candidate.value = 0.0f;
16774    candidate.flat_index = 0u;
16775    candidate.valid = 0u;
16776    return candidate;
16777}
16778
16779static inline bool hogbom_candidate_better(
16780    HogbomPeakCandidate candidate,
16781    HogbomPeakCandidate best,
16782    uint ny,
16783    uint nx
16784) {
16785    if (candidate.valid == 0u) {
16786        return false;
16787    }
16788    if (best.valid == 0u) {
16789        return true;
16790    }
16791    if (candidate.abs_value > best.abs_value) {
16792        return true;
16793    }
16794    if (candidate.abs_value == best.abs_value) {
16795        return hogbom_order_key(candidate.flat_index, ny, nx) <
16796               hogbom_order_key(best.flat_index, ny, nx);
16797    }
16798    return false;
16799}
16800
16801static inline bool hogbom_threshold_reached_with_tolerance(float peak_abs, float threshold) {
16802    if (threshold <= 0.0f) {
16803        return peak_abs <= threshold;
16804    }
16805    const float tolerance = max(0.01f * threshold, 2.0e-8f);
16806    return peak_abs <= threshold || fabs(peak_abs - threshold) <= tolerance;
16807}
16808
16809static inline uint hogbom_stop_reason(float peak_abs, constant HogbomCycleParams &params) {
16810    const bool threshold_floor_active =
16811        params.threshold_jy_per_beam > 0.0f &&
16812        (0.01f * params.threshold_jy_per_beam) < 2.0e-8f &&
16813        params.cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam <= params.threshold_jy_per_beam;
16814    if (peak_abs < params.threshold_jy_per_beam ||
16815        (threshold_floor_active &&
16816         hogbom_threshold_reached_with_tolerance(peak_abs, params.threshold_jy_per_beam))) {
16817        return 1u;
16818    }
16819    if (params.nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam > params.threshold_jy_per_beam &&
16820        peak_abs < params.nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam) {
16821        return 2u;
16822    }
16823    if (peak_abs < params.cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam) {
16824        return 3u;
16825    }
16826    return 0u;
16827}
16828
16829kernel void hogbom_peak_reduce_pixels(
16830    device const float *residual [[buffer(0)]],
16831    device const uint *mask [[buffer(1)]],
16832    device HogbomPeakCandidate *candidates [[buffer(2)]],
16833    constant HogbomCycleParams &params [[buffer(3)]],
16834    device const HogbomCycleState *state [[buffer(4)]],
16835    uint thread_index [[thread_position_in_grid]],
16836    uint local_index [[thread_index_in_threadgroup]],
16837    uint group_index [[threadgroup_position_in_grid]]
16838) {
16839    threadgroup HogbomPeakCandidate local_candidates[1024];
16840    HogbomPeakCandidate candidate = hogbom_invalid_candidate();
16841    if (state->stopped == 0u &&
16842        thread_index < params.cell_count &&
16843        (params.has_mask == 0u || mask[thread_index] != 0u)) {
16844        const float value = residual[thread_index];
16845        candidate.abs_value = fabs(value);
16846        candidate.value = value;
16847        candidate.flat_index = thread_index;
16848        candidate.valid = 1u;
16849    }
16850    local_candidates[local_index] = candidate;
16851    threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
16852
16853    for (uint stride = params.peak_threads_per_group >> 1; stride > 0u; stride >>= 1) {
16854        if (local_index < stride) {
