16855            const HogbomPeakCandidate other = local_candidates[local_index + stride];
16856            const HogbomPeakCandidate best = local_candidates[local_index];
16857            if (hogbom_candidate_better(other, best, params.ny, params.nx)) {
16858                local_candidates[local_index] = other;
16859            }
16860        }
16861        threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
16862    }
16863    if (local_index == 0u) {
16864        candidates[group_index] = local_candidates[0];
16865    }
16866}
16867
16868kernel void hogbom_reduce_candidates(
16869    device const HogbomPeakCandidate *input [[buffer(0)]],
16870    device HogbomPeakCandidate *output [[buffer(1)]],
16871    constant HogbomReduceParams &params [[buffer(2)]],
16872    device const HogbomCycleState *state [[buffer(3)]],
16873    uint thread_index [[thread_position_in_grid]],
16874    uint local_index [[thread_index_in_threadgroup]],
16875    uint group_index [[threadgroup_position_in_grid]]
16876) {
16877    threadgroup HogbomPeakCandidate local_candidates[1024];
16878    HogbomPeakCandidate candidate = hogbom_invalid_candidate();
16879    if (state->stopped == 0u && thread_index < params.candidate_count) {
16880        candidate = input[thread_index];
16881    }
16882    local_candidates[local_index] = candidate;
16883    threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
16884
16885    for (uint stride = params.threads_per_group >> 1; stride > 0u; stride >>= 1) {
16886        if (local_index < stride) {
16887            const HogbomPeakCandidate other = local_candidates[local_index + stride];
16888            const HogbomPeakCandidate best = local_candidates[local_index];
16889            if (hogbom_candidate_better(other, best, params.ny, params.nx)) {
16890                local_candidates[local_index] = other;
16891            }
16892        }
16893        threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
16894    }
16895    if (local_index == 0u) {
16896        output[group_index] = local_candidates[0];
16897    }
16898}
16899
16900kernel void hogbom_select_peak_from_candidate(
16901    device const HogbomPeakCandidate *peak_candidate [[buffer(0)]],
16902    device HogbomPeakCandidate *selected_peak [[buffer(1)]],
16903    device HogbomCycleState *state [[buffer(2)]],
16904    device float *model [[buffer(3)]],
16905    constant HogbomCycleParams &params [[buffer(4)]],
16906    device HogbomComponentTrace *component_trace [[buffer(5)]],
16907    uint thread_index [[thread_position_in_grid]]
16908) {
16909    if (thread_index != 0u || state->stopped != 0u) {
16910        return;
16911    }
16912    const HogbomPeakCandidate peak = peak_candidate[0];
16913    selected_peak[0] = peak;
16914    state->peak = peak;
16915    if (peak.valid == 0u) {
16916        state->stopped = 1u;
16917        state->stop_reason = 6u;
16918        return;
16919    }
16920    const uint reason = hogbom_stop_reason(peak.abs_value, params);
16921    if (reason != 0u) {
16922        state->stopped = 1u;
16923        state->stop_reason = reason;
16924        return;
16925    }
16926    const float component = params.gain * peak.value;
16927    state->component = component;
16928    const uint update_index = state->updates;
16929    if (params.trace_components != 0u && update_index < params.component_budget) {
16930        component_trace[update_index].value = peak.value;
16931        component_trace[update_index].component = component;
16932        component_trace[update_index].flat_index = peak.flat_index;
16933        component_trace[update_index].update_index = update_index;
16934    }
16935    state->updates = update_index + 1u;
16936    model[peak.flat_index] += component;
16937}
16938
16939kernel void hogbom_subtract_psf_and_find_next_peak(
16940    device const HogbomPeakCandidate *selected_peak [[buffer(0)]],
16941    device float *residual [[buffer(1)]],
16942    device const float *psf [[buffer(2)]],
16943    device const uint *mask [[buffer(3)]],
16944    device HogbomPeakCandidate *candidates [[buffer(4)]],
16945    constant HogbomCycleParams &params [[buffer(5)]],
16946    device const HogbomCycleState *state [[buffer(6)]],
16947    uint thread_index [[thread_position_in_grid]],
16948    uint local_index [[thread_index_in_threadgroup]],
16949    uint group_index [[threadgroup_position_in_grid]]
16950) {
16951    threadgroup HogbomPeakCandidate local_candidates[1024];
16952    HogbomPeakCandidate candidate = hogbom_invalid_candidate();
16953    if (state->stopped == 0u && thread_index < params.cell_count) {
16954        const HogbomPeakCandidate peak = selected_peak[0];
16955        if (peak.valid != 0u) {
16956            const uint x = thread_index / params.ny;
16957            const uint y = thread_index - x * params.ny;
16958            const uint peak_x = peak.flat_index / params.ny;
16959            const uint peak_y = peak.flat_index - peak_x * params.ny;
16960            const int kernel_x = int(x) - int(peak_x) + int(params.nx / 2u);
16961            const int kernel_y = int(y) - int(peak_y) + int(params.ny / 2u);
16962            if (kernel_x >= 0 && kernel_y >= 0 &&
16963                kernel_x < int(params.nx) && kernel_y < int(params.ny)) {
16964                const uint kernel_index = uint(kernel_x) * params.ny + uint(kernel_y);
16965                float delta = state->component * psf[kernel_index];
16966                float updated = residual[thread_index] - delta;
16967                residual[thread_index] = updated;
16968            }
16969        }
16970        if (params.has_mask == 0u || mask[thread_index] != 0u) {
16971            const float value = residual[thread_index];
16972            candidate.abs_value = fabs(value);
16973            candidate.value = value;
16974            candidate.flat_index = thread_index;
16975            candidate.valid = 1u;
16976        }
16977    }
16978    local_candidates[local_index] = candidate;
16979    threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
16980
16981    for (uint stride = params.peak_threads_per_group >> 1; stride > 0u; stride >>= 1) {
16982        if (local_index < stride) {
16983            const HogbomPeakCandidate other = local_candidates[local_index + stride];
16984            const HogbomPeakCandidate best = local_candidates[local_index];
16985            if (hogbom_candidate_better(other, best, params.ny, params.nx)) {
16986                local_candidates[local_index] = other;
16987            }
16988        }
16989        threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
16990    }
16991    if (local_index == 0u) {
16992        candidates[group_index] = local_candidates[0];
16993    }
16994}
16995"#;
16996
16997#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
16998const CLARK_MINOR_CYCLE_METAL_SHADER: &str = r#"
16999#include <metal_stdlib>
17000using namespace metal;
17001#pragma clang fp contract(off)
17002
17003struct ClarkPeakCandidate {
17004    float abs_value;
17005    float value;
17006    uint flat_index;
17007    uint valid;
17008};
17009
17010struct ClarkReduceParams {
17011    uint candidate_count;
17012    uint nx;
17013    uint ny;
17014    uint threads_per_group;
17015};
17016
17017struct ClarkSubcycleParams {
17018    uint active_count;
17019    uint nx;
17020    uint ny;
17021    uint patch_nx;
17022    uint patch_ny;
17023    uint patch_radius_x;
17024    uint patch_radius_y;
17025    uint threads_per_group;
17026    uint component_budget;
17027    uint cycle_update_start;
17028    float gain;
17029    float threshold_jy_per_beam;
17030    float cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam;
17031    float nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam;
17032    float flux_limit;
17033    float iter_flux_limit;
17034    float fac;
17035    uint _pad0;
17036};
17037
17038struct ClarkSubcycleState {
17039    ClarkPeakCandidate peak;
17040    float component;
17041    uint updates;
17042    uint stopped;
17043    uint stop_reason;
17044    float fmn;
17045    float iter_flux_limit;
17046};
17047
17048static inline ClarkPeakCandidate clark_invalid_candidate() {
17049    ClarkPeakCandidate candidate;
17050    candidate.abs_value = 0.0f;
17051    candidate.value = 0.0f;
17052    candidate.flat_index = 0u;
17053    candidate.valid = 0u;
17054    return candidate;
17055}
17056
17057static inline bool clark_candidate_better(ClarkPeakCandidate candidate, ClarkPeakCandidate best) {
17058    if (candidate.valid == 0u) {
17059        return false;
17060    }
17061    if (best.valid == 0u) {
17062        return true;
17063    }
17064    if (candidate.abs_value > best.abs_value) {
17065        return true;
17066    }
17067    if (candidate.abs_value == best.abs_value) {
17068        return candidate.flat_index < best.flat_index;
17069    }
17070    return false;
17071}
17072
17073static inline bool clark_threshold_reached_with_tolerance(float peak_abs, float threshold) {
17074    if (threshold <= 0.0f) {
17075        return peak_abs <= threshold;
17076    }
17077    const float tolerance = max(0.01f * threshold, 2.0e-8f);
17078    return peak_abs <= threshold || fabs(peak_abs - threshold) <= tolerance;
17079}
17080
17081static inline uint clark_stop_reason(float peak_abs, float iter_flux_limit, constant ClarkSubcycleParams &params) {
17082    const bool threshold_floor_active =
17083        params.threshold_jy_per_beam > 0.0f &&
17084        (0.01f * params.threshold_jy_per_beam) < 2.0e-8f &&
17085        iter_flux_limit <= params.threshold_jy_per_beam;
17086    if (peak_abs < params.threshold_jy_per_beam ||
17087        (threshold_floor_active &&
17088         clark_threshold_reached_with_tolerance(peak_abs, params.threshold_jy_per_beam))) {
17089        return 1u;
17090    }
17091    if (params.nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam > params.threshold_jy_per_beam &&
17092        peak_abs < params.nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam) {
17093        return 2u;
17094    }
17095    if (peak_abs < iter_flux_limit) {
17096        return 3u;
17097    }
17098    return 0u;
17099}
17100
17101kernel void clark_peak_active(
17102    device const float *active_values [[buffer(0)]],
17103    device ClarkPeakCandidate *candidates [[buffer(1)]],
17104    constant ClarkSubcycleParams &params [[buffer(2)]],
17105    device const ClarkSubcycleState *state [[buffer(3)]],
17106    uint thread_index [[thread_position_in_grid]],
17107    uint local_index [[thread_index_in_threadgroup]],
17108    uint group_index [[threadgroup_position_in_grid]]
17109) {
17110    threadgroup ClarkPeakCandidate local_candidates[1024];
17111    ClarkPeakCandidate candidate = clark_invalid_candidate();
17112    if (state->stopped == 0u && thread_index < params.active_count) {
17113        const float value = active_values[thread_index];
17114        candidate.abs_value = fabs(value);
17115        candidate.value = value;
17116        candidate.flat_index = thread_index;
17117        candidate.valid = 1u;
17118    }
17119    local_candidates[local_index] = candidate;
17120    threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
17121    for (uint stride = params.threads_per_group >> 1; stride > 0u; stride >>= 1) {
17122        if (local_index < stride) {
17123            const ClarkPeakCandidate other = local_candidates[local_index + stride];
17124            const ClarkPeakCandidate best = local_candidates[local_index];
17125            if (clark_candidate_better(other, best)) {
17126                local_candidates[local_index] = other;
17127            }
17128        }
17129        threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
17130    }
17131    if (local_index == 0u) {
17132        candidates[group_index] = local_candidates[0];
17133    }
17134}
17135
17136kernel void clark_reduce_candidates(
17137    device const ClarkPeakCandidate *input [[buffer(0)]],
17138    device ClarkPeakCandidate *output [[buffer(1)]],
17139    constant ClarkReduceParams &params [[buffer(2)]],
17140    device const ClarkSubcycleState *state [[buffer(3)]],
17141    uint thread_index [[thread_position_in_grid]],
17142    uint local_index [[thread_index_in_threadgroup]],
17143    uint group_index [[threadgroup_position_in_grid]]
17144) {
17145    threadgroup ClarkPeakCandidate local_candidates[1024];
17146    ClarkPeakCandidate candidate = clark_invalid_candidate();
17147    if (state->stopped == 0u && thread_index < params.candidate_count) {
17148        candidate = input[thread_index];
17149    }
17150    local_candidates[local_index] = candidate;
17151    threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
17152    for (uint stride = params.threads_per_group >> 1; stride > 0u; stride >>= 1) {
17153        if (local_index < stride) {
17154            const ClarkPeakCandidate other = local_candidates[local_index + stride];
17155            const ClarkPeakCandidate best = local_candidates[local_index];
17156            if (clark_candidate_better(other, best)) {
17157                local_candidates[local_index] = other;
17158            }
17159        }
17160        threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
17161    }
17162    if (local_index == 0u) {
17163        output[group_index] = local_candidates[0];
17164    }
17165}
17166
17167kernel void clark_select_peak(
17168    device const ClarkPeakCandidate *peak_candidate [[buffer(0)]],
17169    device ClarkPeakCandidate *selected_peak [[buffer(1)]],
17170    device ClarkSubcycleState *state [[buffer(2)]],
17171    device float *model [[buffer(3)]],
17172    device float *delta_model [[buffer(4)]],
17173    constant ClarkSubcycleParams &params [[buffer(5)]],
17174    device const uint *active_indices [[buffer(6)]],
17175    uint thread_index [[thread_position_in_grid]]
17176) {
17177    if (thread_index != 0u || state->stopped != 0u) {
17178        return;
17179    }
17180    const ClarkPeakCandidate peak = peak_candidate[0];
17181    selected_peak[0] = peak;
17182    state->peak = peak;
17183    if (peak.valid == 0u) {
17184        state->stopped = 1u;
17185        state->stop_reason = 6u;
17186        return;
17187    }
17188    const uint reason = clark_stop_reason(peak.abs_value, state->iter_flux_limit, params);
17189    if (reason != 0u) {
17190        state->stopped = 1u;
17191        state->stop_reason = reason;
17192        return;
17193    }
17194    const float component = params.gain * peak.value;
17195    const uint active_index = peak.flat_index;
17196    const uint image_index = active_indices[active_index];
17197    state->component = component;
17198    state->updates += 1u;
17199    model[image_index] += component;
17200    delta_model[image_index] += component;
17201    const uint total_updates = params.cycle_update_start + state->updates;
17202    if (total_updates > 0u) {
17203        state->fmn += params.fac / float(total_updates);
17204    }
17205    state->iter_flux_limit = max(params.flux_limit * state->fmn, params.cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam);
17206}
17207
17208kernel void clark_subtract_active_and_find_next_peak(
17209    device const ClarkPeakCandidate *selected_peak [[buffer(0)]],
17210    device float *active_values [[buffer(1)]],
17211    device const uint *active_indices [[buffer(2)]],
17212    device const float *patch [[buffer(3)]],
17213    device ClarkPeakCandidate *candidates [[buffer(4)]],
17214    constant ClarkSubcycleParams &params [[buffer(5)]],
17215    device const ClarkSubcycleState *state [[buffer(6)]],
17216    uint thread_index [[thread_position_in_grid]],
17217    uint local_index [[thread_index_in_threadgroup]],
17218    uint group_index [[threadgroup_position_in_grid]]
17219) {
17220    threadgroup ClarkPeakCandidate local_candidates[1024];
17221    ClarkPeakCandidate candidate = clark_invalid_candidate();
17222    if (state->stopped == 0u && thread_index < params.active_count) {
17223        const ClarkPeakCandidate peak = selected_peak[0];
17224        if (peak.valid != 0u) {
17225            const uint active_index = thread_index;
17226            const uint image_index = active_indices[active_index];
17227            const uint peak_image_index = active_indices[peak.flat_index];
17228            const uint x = image_index / params.ny;
17229            const uint y = image_index - x * params.ny;
17230            const uint peak_x = peak_image_index / params.ny;
17231            const uint peak_y = peak_image_index - peak_x * params.ny;
17232            const int patch_x = int(x) - int(peak_x) + int(params.patch_radius_x);
17233            const int patch_y = int(y) - int(peak_y) + int(params.patch_radius_y);
17234            if (patch_x >= 0 && patch_y >= 0 &&
17235                patch_x < int(params.patch_nx) && patch_y < int(params.patch_ny)) {
17236                const uint patch_index = uint(patch_x) * params.patch_ny + uint(patch_y);
17237                const float active_delta = state->component * patch[patch_index];
17238                active_values[active_index] = active_values[active_index] - active_delta;
17239            }
17240            const float value = active_values[active_index];
17241            candidate.abs_value = fabs(value);
17242            candidate.value = value;
17243            candidate.flat_index = active_index;
17244            candidate.valid = 1u;
17245        }
17246    }
17247    local_candidates[local_index] = candidate;
17248    threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
17249    for (uint stride = params.threads_per_group >> 1; stride > 0u; stride >>= 1) {
17250        if (local_index < stride) {
17251            const ClarkPeakCandidate other = local_candidates[local_index + stride];
17252            const ClarkPeakCandidate best = local_candidates[local_index];
17253            if (clark_candidate_better(other, best)) {
17254                local_candidates[local_index] = other;
17255            }
17256        }
17257        threadgroup_barrier(mem_flags::mem_threadgroup);
17258    }
17259    if (local_index == 0u) {
17260        candidates[group_index] = local_candidates[0];
17261    }
17262}
17263
17264kernel void clark_store_peak_only(
17265    device const ClarkPeakCandidate *peak_candidate [[buffer(0)]],
17266    device ClarkSubcycleState *state [[buffer(1)]],
17267    uint thread_index [[thread_position_in_grid]]
17268) {
17269    if (thread_index != 0u || state->stopped != 0u) {
17270        return;
17271    }
17272    state->peak = peak_candidate[0];
17273}
17274"#;
17275
17276#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
17277fn run_clark_minor_cycle(
17278    request: &ImagingRequest,
17279    model: &mut Array2<f32>,
17280    residual: &mut Array2<f32>,
17281    psf: &Array2<f32>,
17282    cycle_reported_niter: usize,
17283    cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
17284    nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
17285    psf_patch: &ClarkPsfPatch,
17286    minor_cycle_backend: StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend,
17287    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
17288) -> Result<HogbomMinorCycleOutcome, ImagingError> {
17289    match minor_cycle_backend {
17290        StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend::Cpu => Ok(run_clark_minor_cycle_cpu(
17291            request,
17292            model,
17293            residual,
17294            psf,
17295            cycle_reported_niter,
17296            cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17297            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17298            psf_patch,
17299            stage_timings,
17300        )),
17301        StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend::Metal => run_clark_minor_cycle_metal(
17302            request,
17303            model,
17304            residual,
17305            psf,
17306            cycle_reported_niter,
17307            cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17308            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17309            psf_patch,
17310            stage_timings,
17311        ),
17312    }
17313}
17314
17315#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
17316fn run_clark_minor_cycle_cpu(
17317    request: &ImagingRequest,
17318    model: &mut Array2<f32>,
17319    residual: &mut Array2<f32>,
17320    psf: &Array2<f32>,
17321    cycle_reported_niter: usize,
17322    cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
17323    nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
17324    psf_patch: &ClarkPsfPatch,
17325    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
17326) -> HogbomMinorCycleOutcome {
17327    let mut cycle_component_updates = 0usize;
17328    let mut updated_model = false;
17329    let mut stop_reason = None;
17330    let minor_started = Instant::now();
17331    let image_pixels = residual.len();
17332    let mut peak_search_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
17333    let mut active_set_build_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
17334    let mut model_update_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
17335    let mut subtract_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
17336    let mut peak_searches = 0usize;
17337    let mut model_updates = 0usize;
17338    let mut subtract_updates = 0usize;
17339    let mut pixels_searched = 0usize;
17340    let mut pixels_touched = 0usize;
17341    let mut approximate_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref());
17342    let mut previous_approximate_peak = approximate_peak;
17343    let mut factor = 1.5f32 / 4.5f32;
17344    let mut warn_flag = false;
17345    let mut max_minor_iterations = cycle_reported_niter;
17346    if psf_patch.max_exterior_abs > 0.5 {
17347        max_minor_iterations = max_minor_iterations.min(5);
17348    } else if psf_patch.max_exterior_abs > 0.35 {
17349        max_minor_iterations = max_minor_iterations.min(50);
17350    }
17351    let mut subcycle = 0usize;
17352    while cycle_component_updates < cycle_reported_niter && subcycle < CASA_CLARK_MAX_MAJOR_CYCLES {
17353        if let Some(reason) = minor_cycle_stop_reason(
17354            approximate_peak,
17355            request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
17356            cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17357            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17358        ) {
17359            stop_reason = Some(reason);
17360            break;
17361        }
17362
17363        let mut flux_limit = approximate_peak * psf_patch.max_exterior_abs * factor;
17364        if factor > 1.0 {
17365            flux_limit = flux_limit.min(0.95 * approximate_peak);
17366        }
17367        let selection_limit = flux_limit.max(cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam);
17368        let active_set_started = Instant::now();
17369        let mut active_pixels =
17370            collect_clark_active_pixels(residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref(), selection_limit);
17371        active_set_build_elapsed += active_set_started.elapsed();
17372        pixels_searched = pixels_searched.saturating_add(image_pixels);
17373        let (patch_nx, patch_ny) = psf_patch.patch.dim();
17374        append_clark_trace(format!(
17375            "{{\"event\":\"subcycle_start\",\"subcycle\":{},\"cycle_update_start\":{},\"reffreq_hz\":{:.17e},\"selected_frequency_min_hz\":{:.17e},\"selected_frequency_max_hz\":{:.17e},\"cycle_peak_abs\":{:.17e},\"max_exterior_abs\":{:.17e},\"factor\":{:.17e},\"flux_limit\":{:.17e},\"cycle_threshold\":{:.17e},\"selection_limit\":{:.17e},\"active_pixels\":{},\"cycle_reported_niter\":{},\"psf_patch_nx\":{},\"psf_patch_ny\":{},\"psf_patch_radius_x\":{},\"psf_patch_radius_y\":{},\"algorithm\":\"casa_clark_lat_solve\"}}",
17376            subcycle,
17377            cycle_component_updates,
17378            request.reffreq_hz,
17379            request.selected_frequency_range_hz[0],
17380            request.selected_frequency_range_hz[1],
17381            approximate_peak,
17382            psf_patch.max_exterior_abs,
17383            factor,
17384            flux_limit,
17385            cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17386            selection_limit,
17387            active_pixels.len(),
17388            cycle_reported_niter,
17389            patch_nx,
17390            patch_ny,
17391            psf_patch.radius_x,
17392            psf_patch.radius_y,
17393        ));
17394        if active_pixels.is_empty() {
17395            if warn_flag {
17396                stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels);
17397                break;
17398            }
17399            factor *= 1.2;
17400            warn_flag = true;
17401            subcycle = subcycle.saturating_add(1);
17402            continue;
17403        }
17404
17405        let subcycle_limit =
17406            (cycle_reported_niter - cycle_component_updates).min(max_minor_iterations);
17407        let mut subcycle_updates = 0usize;
17408        let mut subcycle_delta_model = Array2::<f32>::zeros(model.dim());
17409        let mut fmn = 0.0f32;
17410        let mut iter_flux_limit = selection_limit;
17411        let subcycle_initial_peak = peak_clark_active_pixel(&active_pixels)
17412            .map(|(_, pixel)| pixel.value.abs())
17413            .unwrap_or(0.0);
17414        let fac = if flux_limit > 0.0 && subcycle_initial_peak > 0.0 {
17415            subcycle_initial_peak / flux_limit
17416        } else {
17417            1.0
17418        };
17419        while subcycle_updates < subcycle_limit {
17420            let active_len = active_pixels.len();
17421            let active_peak_started = Instant::now();
17422            let active_peak = peak_clark_active_pixel(&active_pixels);
17423            peak_search_elapsed += active_peak_started.elapsed();
17424            peak_searches = peak_searches.saturating_add(1);
17425            pixels_searched = pixels_searched.saturating_add(active_len);
17426            let Some((_, peak_pixel)) = active_peak else {
17427                break;
17428            };
17429            let peak_abs = peak_pixel.value.abs();
17430            if let Some(reason) = minor_cycle_stop_reason(
17431                peak_abs,
17432                request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
17433                iter_flux_limit,
17434                nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17435            ) {
17436                stop_reason = Some(reason);
17437                append_clark_trace(format!(
17438                    "{{\"event\":\"stop\",\"subcycle\":{},\"cycle_update\":{},\"subcycle_update\":{},\"reffreq_hz\":{:.17e},\"reason\":\"{:?}\",\"peak_abs\":{:.17e},\"iter_flux_limit\":{:.17e}}}",
17439                    subcycle,
17440                    cycle_component_updates,
17441                    subcycle_updates,
17442                    request.reffreq_hz,
17443                    reason,
17444                    peak_abs,
17445                    iter_flux_limit
17446                ));
17447                break;
17448            }
17449            let component = request.clean.gain * peak_pixel.value;
17450            append_clark_trace(format!(
17451                "{{\"event\":\"component\",\"subcycle\":{},\"cycle_update\":{},\"subcycle_update\":{},\"reffreq_hz\":{:.17e},\"x\":{},\"y\":{},\"peak\":{:.17e},\"component\":{:.17e},\"iter_flux_limit\":{:.17e},\"fmn\":{:.17e}}}",
17452                subcycle,
17453                cycle_component_updates,
17454                subcycle_updates,
17455                request.reffreq_hz,
17456                peak_pixel.x,
17457                peak_pixel.y,
17458                peak_pixel.value,
17459                component,
17460                iter_flux_limit,
17461                fmn
17462            ));
17463            let model_update_started = Instant::now();
17464            model[(peak_pixel.x, peak_pixel.y)] += component;
17465            subcycle_delta_model[(peak_pixel.x, peak_pixel.y)] += component;
17466            model_update_elapsed += model_update_started.elapsed();
17467            let subtract_started = Instant::now();
17468            subtract_clark_component_from_active(
17469                &mut active_pixels,
17470                peak_pixel.x,
17471                peak_pixel.y,
17472                component,
17473                psf_patch,
17474            );
17475            subtract_elapsed += subtract_started.elapsed();
17476            subtract_updates = subtract_updates.saturating_add(1);
17477            pixels_touched = pixels_touched.saturating_add(active_len);
17478            cycle_component_updates += 1;
17479            subcycle_updates += 1;
17480            model_updates = model_updates.saturating_add(1);
17481            updated_model = true;
17482            fmn += fac / cycle_component_updates as f32;
17483            iter_flux_limit = (flux_limit * fmn).max(cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam);
17484        }
17485
17486        approximate_peak = peak_clark_active_pixel(&active_pixels)
17487            .map(|(_, pixel)| pixel.value.abs())
17488            .unwrap_or(0.0);
17489        if subcycle_updates > 0 {
17490            *residual = &*residual - &fft_convolve_real(psf, &subcycle_delta_model);
17491        }
17492        if approximate_peak > previous_approximate_peak {
17493            factor *= 3.0;
17494            max_minor_iterations = max_minor_iterations.min(10);
17495            warn_flag = true;
17496        }
17497        previous_approximate_peak = approximate_peak;
17498        if subcycle_updates == 0 {
17499            break;
17500        }
17501        if stop_reason.is_some() && cycle_component_updates < cycle_reported_niter {
17502            stop_reason = None;
17503        }
17504        subcycle = subcycle.saturating_add(1);
17505    }
17506    if !updated_model && stop_reason.is_none() {
17507        stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels);
17508    }
17509    let minor_elapsed = minor_started.elapsed();
17510    stage_timings.minor_cycle += minor_elapsed;
17511    stage_timings.minor_cycle_solve += minor_elapsed;
17512    stage_timings.deconvolver_peak_search += peak_search_elapsed;
17513    stage_timings.deconvolver_active_set_build += active_set_build_elapsed;
17514    stage_timings.deconvolver_model_update += model_update_elapsed;
17515    stage_timings.deconvolver_psf_subtract += subtract_elapsed;
17516    stage_timings.deconvolver_peak_searches = stage_timings
17517        .deconvolver_peak_searches
17518        .saturating_add(peak_searches as u64);
17519    stage_timings.deconvolver_model_updates = stage_timings
17520        .deconvolver_model_updates
17521        .saturating_add(model_updates as u64);
17522    stage_timings.deconvolver_subtract_updates = stage_timings
17523        .deconvolver_subtract_updates
17524        .saturating_add(subtract_updates as u64);
17525    stage_timings.deconvolver_pixels_searched = stage_timings
17526        .deconvolver_pixels_searched
17527        .saturating_add(pixels_searched as u64);
17528    stage_timings.deconvolver_pixels_touched = stage_timings
17529        .deconvolver_pixels_touched
17530        .saturating_add(pixels_touched as u64);
17531    HogbomMinorCycleOutcome {
17532        updated_model,
17533        actual_updates: cycle_component_updates,
17534        reported_updates: cycle_component_updates,
17535        stop_reason,
17536        final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17537        final_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17538    }
17539}
17540
17541#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
17542#[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
17543fn run_clark_minor_cycle_metal(
17544    _request: &ImagingRequest,
17545    _model: &mut Array2<f32>,
17546    _residual: &mut Array2<f32>,
17547    _psf: &Array2<f32>,
17548    _cycle_reported_niter: usize,
17549    _cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
17550    _nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
17551    _psf_patch: &ClarkPsfPatch,
17552    _stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
17553) -> Result<HogbomMinorCycleOutcome, ImagingError> {
17554    Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
17555        "Clark minor-cycle backend 'metal' requires macOS Metal".to_string(),
17556    ))
17557}
17558
17559#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
17560#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
17561fn run_clark_minor_cycle_metal(
17562    request: &ImagingRequest,
17563    model: &mut Array2<f32>,
17564    residual: &mut Array2<f32>,
17565    psf: &Array2<f32>,
17566    cycle_reported_niter: usize,
17567    cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
17568    nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
17569    psf_patch: &ClarkPsfPatch,
17570    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
17571) -> Result<HogbomMinorCycleOutcome, ImagingError> {
17572    use std::slice;
17573
17574    use objc2_metal::{MTLBuffer, MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice, MTLDevice, MTLResourceOptions};
17575
17576    let (nx, ny) = residual.dim();
17577    if nx == 0 || ny == 0 {
17578        return Ok(HogbomMinorCycleOutcome {
17579            updated_model: false,
17580            actual_updates: 0,
17581            reported_updates: 0,
17582            stop_reason: Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels),
17583            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17584            final_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17585        });
17586    }
17587    if model.dim() != (nx, ny) || psf.dim() != (nx, ny) {
17588        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
17589            "Clark Metal minor cycle requires model, residual, and PSF shapes to match".to_string(),
17590        ));
17591    }
17592    let cell_count = nx
17593        .checked_mul(ny)
17594        .ok_or_else(|| ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Clark image is too large".to_string()))?;
17595    let cell_count_u32 = u32::try_from(cell_count).map_err(|_| {
17596        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Clark Metal image cell count exceeds u32".to_string())
17597    })?;
17598    let nx_u32 = u32::try_from(nx).map_err(|_| {
17599        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Clark Metal image width exceeds u32".to_string())
17600    })?;
17601    let ny_u32 = u32::try_from(ny).map_err(|_| {
17602        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Clark Metal image height exceeds u32".to_string())
17603    })?;
17604    let (patch_nx, patch_ny) = psf_patch.patch.dim();
17605    let patch_nx_u32 = u32::try_from(patch_nx).map_err(|_| {
17606        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Clark Metal PSF patch width exceeds u32".to_string())
17607    })?;
17608    let patch_ny_u32 = u32::try_from(patch_ny).map_err(|_| {
17609        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Clark Metal PSF patch height exceeds u32".to_string())
17610    })?;
17611    let patch_radius_x_u32 = u32::try_from(psf_patch.radius_x).map_err(|_| {
17612        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Clark Metal PSF patch x radius exceeds u32".to_string())
17613    })?;
17614    let patch_radius_y_u32 = u32::try_from(psf_patch.radius_y).map_err(|_| {
17615        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Clark Metal PSF patch y radius exceeds u32".to_string())
17616    })?;
17617
17618    let total_started = Instant::now();
17619    let collect_profile = profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled();
17620    let setup_started = Instant::now();
17621    let device = MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice().ok_or_else(|| {
17622        ImagingError::Unsupported(
17623            "Clark minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not find a default Metal device".to_string(),
17624        )
17625    })?;
17626    let queue = device.newCommandQueue().ok_or_else(|| {
17627        ImagingError::Unsupported(
17628            "Clark minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create a Metal command queue".to_string(),
17629        )
17630    })?;
17631    let source = objc2_foundation::NSString::from_str(CLARK_MINOR_CYCLE_METAL_SHADER);
17632    let library = device
17633        .newLibraryWithSource_options_error(&source, None)
17634        .map_err(|error| {
17635            ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
17636                "Clark minor-cycle backend 'metal' failed to compile shader: {error:?}"
17637            ))
17638        })?;
17639    let active_peak_pipeline = hogbom_metal_pipeline(&device, &library, "clark_peak_active")?;
17640    let reduce_pipeline = hogbom_metal_pipeline(&device, &library, "clark_reduce_candidates")?;
17641    let select_pipeline = hogbom_metal_pipeline(&device, &library, "clark_select_peak")?;
17642    let subtract_peak_pipeline = hogbom_metal_pipeline(
17643        &device,
17644        &library,
17645        "clark_subtract_active_and_find_next_peak",
17646    )?;
17647    let store_peak_pipeline = hogbom_metal_pipeline(&device, &library, "clark_store_peak_only")?;
17648    let storage_options = MTLResourceOptions::StorageModeShared;
17649    let model_values = hogbom_flatten_array2_x_major(model);
17650    let model_buffer =
17651        hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(&device, model_values.as_slice(), storage_options, "model")?;
17652    let patch_values = hogbom_flatten_array2_x_major(&psf_patch.patch);
17653    let patch_buffer =
17654        hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(&device, patch_values.as_slice(), storage_options, "patch")?;
17655    let setup_elapsed = setup_started.elapsed();
17656
17657    let mut cycle_component_updates = 0usize;
17658    let mut updated_model = false;
17659    let mut stop_reason = None;
17660    let mut peak_search_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
17661    let mut active_set_build_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
17662    let mut model_update_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
17663    let mut subtract_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
17664    let mut peak_searches = 0usize;
17665    let mut model_updates = 0usize;
17666    let mut subtract_updates = 0usize;
17667    let mut pixels_searched = 0usize;
17668    let mut pixels_touched = 0usize;
17669    let mut approximate_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref());
17670    let mut previous_approximate_peak = approximate_peak;
17671    let mut factor = 1.5f32 / 4.5f32;
17672    let mut warn_flag = false;
17673    let mut max_minor_iterations = cycle_reported_niter;
17674    if psf_patch.max_exterior_abs > 0.5 {
17675        max_minor_iterations = max_minor_iterations.min(5);
17676    } else if psf_patch.max_exterior_abs > 0.35 {
17677        max_minor_iterations = max_minor_iterations.min(50);
17678    }
17679    let mut subcycle = 0usize;
17680    let mut command_kernel_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
17681    let mut command_wall_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
17682    let mut readback_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
17683
17684    while cycle_component_updates < cycle_reported_niter && subcycle < CASA_CLARK_MAX_MAJOR_CYCLES {
17685        if let Some(reason) = minor_cycle_stop_reason(
17686            approximate_peak,
17687            request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
17688            cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17689            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17690        ) {
17691            stop_reason = Some(reason);
17692            break;
17693        }
17694
17695        let mut flux_limit = approximate_peak * psf_patch.max_exterior_abs * factor;
17696        if factor > 1.0 {
17697            flux_limit = flux_limit.min(0.95 * approximate_peak);
17698        }
17699        let selection_limit = flux_limit.max(cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam);
17700        let active_set_started = Instant::now();
17701        let active_pixels =
17702            collect_clark_active_pixels(residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref(), selection_limit);
17703        active_set_build_elapsed += active_set_started.elapsed();
17704        pixels_searched = pixels_searched.saturating_add(cell_count);
17705        if active_pixels.is_empty() {
17706            if warn_flag {
17707                stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels);
17708                break;
17709            }
17710            factor *= 1.2;
17711            warn_flag = true;
17712            subcycle = subcycle.saturating_add(1);
17713            continue;
17714        }
17715
17716        let subcycle_limit =
17717            (cycle_reported_niter - cycle_component_updates).min(max_minor_iterations);
17718        let subcycle_initial_peak = peak_clark_active_pixel(&active_pixels)
17719            .map(|(_, pixel)| pixel.value.abs())
17720            .unwrap_or(0.0);
17721        let fac = if flux_limit > 0.0 && subcycle_initial_peak > 0.0 {
17722            subcycle_initial_peak / flux_limit
17723        } else {
17724            1.0
17725        };
17726        let subcycle_started = Instant::now();
17727        let subcycle_result = clark_metal_run_active_subcycle(
17728            &queue,
17729            &device,
17730            &active_peak_pipeline,
17731            &reduce_pipeline,
17732            &select_pipeline,
17733            &subtract_peak_pipeline,
17734            &store_peak_pipeline,
17735            &model_buffer,
17736            &patch_buffer,
17737            storage_options,
17738            &active_pixels,
17739            cell_count_u32,
17740            nx_u32,
17741            ny_u32,
17742            patch_nx_u32,
17743            patch_ny_u32,
17744            patch_radius_x_u32,
17745            patch_radius_y_u32,
17746            subcycle_limit,
17747            cycle_component_updates,
17748            request.clean.gain,
17749            request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
17750            cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17751            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17752            flux_limit,
17753            selection_limit,
17754            fac,
17755        )?;
17756        command_kernel_elapsed += subcycle_result.command_timing.kernel_elapsed;
17757        command_wall_elapsed += subcycle_started.elapsed();
17758        readback_elapsed += subcycle_result.readback_elapsed;
17759        peak_search_elapsed += subcycle_result.command_timing.kernel_elapsed;
17760        peak_searches = peak_searches.saturating_add(subcycle_result.peak_searches);
17761        subtract_elapsed += subcycle_result.command_timing.kernel_elapsed;
17762        subtract_updates = subtract_updates.saturating_add(subcycle_result.actual_updates);
17763        pixels_searched = pixels_searched.saturating_add(
17764            subcycle_result
17765                .peak_searches
17766                .saturating_mul(active_pixels.len()),
17767        );
17768        pixels_touched = pixels_touched.saturating_add(
17769            subcycle_result
17770                .actual_updates
17771                .saturating_mul(active_pixels.len()),
17772        );
17773        model_updates = model_updates.saturating_add(subcycle_result.actual_updates);
17774        model_update_elapsed += Duration::ZERO;
17775        cycle_component_updates =
17776            cycle_component_updates.saturating_add(subcycle_result.actual_updates);
17777        updated_model |= subcycle_result.actual_updates > 0;
17778        approximate_peak = subcycle_result.final_peak_abs;
17779
17780        if subcycle_result.actual_updates > 0 {
17781            let delta_model = Array2::from_shape_vec((nx, ny), subcycle_result.delta_model)
17782                .map_err(|error| {
17783                    ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
17784                        "Clark Metal delta model shape mismatch: {error}"
17785                    ))
17786                })?;
17787            *residual = &*residual - &fft_convolve_real(psf, &delta_model);
17788        }
17789        if let Some(reason) = subcycle_result.stop_reason {
17790            stop_reason = Some(reason);
17791        }
17792        if approximate_peak > previous_approximate_peak {
17793            factor *= 3.0;
17794            max_minor_iterations = max_minor_iterations.min(10);
17795            warn_flag = true;
17796        }
17797        previous_approximate_peak = approximate_peak;
17798        if subcycle_result.actual_updates == 0 {
17799            break;
17800        }
17801        if stop_reason.is_some() && cycle_component_updates < cycle_reported_niter {
17802            stop_reason = None;
17803        }
17804        subcycle = subcycle.saturating_add(1);
17805    }
17806
17807    if !updated_model && stop_reason.is_none() {
17808        stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels);
17809    }
17810    let readback_started = Instant::now();
17811    let model_slice = unsafe {
17812        slice::from_raw_parts(model_buffer.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(), cell_count)
17813    };
17814    copy_x_major_slice_to_array2(model, model_slice)?;
17815    readback_elapsed += readback_started.elapsed();
17816
17817    let minor_elapsed = total_started.elapsed();
17818    if collect_profile {
17819        eprintln!(
17820            "standard_mfs_clark_minor_cycle_summary backend=metal_active_set updates={} reported_budget={} stop_reason={:?} image_pixels={} peak_searches={} subtract_updates={} setup_ms={:.3} command_wall_ms={:.3} command_gpu_ms={:.3} readback_ms={:.3} total_ms={:.3}",
17821            cycle_component_updates,
17822            cycle_reported_niter,
17823            stop_reason,
17824            cell_count,
17825            peak_searches,
17826            subtract_updates,
17827            profile::millis(setup_elapsed),
17828            profile::millis(command_wall_elapsed),
17829            profile::millis(command_kernel_elapsed),
17830            profile::millis(readback_elapsed),
17831            profile::millis(minor_elapsed),
17832        );
17833    }
17834    stage_timings.minor_cycle += minor_elapsed;
17835    stage_timings.minor_cycle_solve += minor_elapsed;
17836    stage_timings.deconvolver_peak_search += peak_search_elapsed;
17837    stage_timings.deconvolver_active_set_build += active_set_build_elapsed;
17838    stage_timings.deconvolver_model_update += model_update_elapsed;
17839    stage_timings.deconvolver_psf_subtract += subtract_elapsed;
17840    stage_timings.deconvolver_peak_searches = stage_timings
17841        .deconvolver_peak_searches
17842        .saturating_add(peak_searches as u64);
17843    stage_timings.deconvolver_model_updates = stage_timings
17844        .deconvolver_model_updates
17845        .saturating_add(model_updates as u64);
17846    stage_timings.deconvolver_subtract_updates = stage_timings
17847        .deconvolver_subtract_updates
17848        .saturating_add(subtract_updates as u64);
17849    stage_timings.deconvolver_pixels_searched = stage_timings
17850        .deconvolver_pixels_searched
17851        .saturating_add(pixels_searched as u64);
17852    stage_timings.deconvolver_pixels_touched = stage_timings
17853        .deconvolver_pixels_touched
17854        .saturating_add(pixels_touched as u64);
17855
17856    Ok(HogbomMinorCycleOutcome {
17857        updated_model,
17858        actual_updates: cycle_component_updates,
17859        reported_updates: cycle_component_updates.min(cycle_reported_niter),
17860        stop_reason,
17861        final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17862        final_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
17863    })
17864}
17865
17866#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
17867struct ClarkMetalSubcycleResult {
17868    actual_updates: usize,
17869    stop_reason: Option<CleanStopReason>,
17870    final_peak_abs: f32,
17871    peak_searches: usize,
17872    delta_model: Vec<f32>,
17873    command_timing: HogbomMetalCommandTiming,
17874    readback_elapsed: Duration,
17875}
17876
17877#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
17878#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
17879fn clark_metal_run_active_subcycle(
17880    queue: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLCommandQueue>,
17881    device: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLDevice>,
17882    active_peak_pipeline: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState>,
17883    reduce_pipeline: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState>,
17884    select_pipeline: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState>,
17885    subtract_peak_pipeline: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<
17886        dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState,
17887    >,
17888    store_peak_pipeline: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState>,
17889    model_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
17890    patch_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
17891    storage_options: objc2_metal::MTLResourceOptions,
17892    active_pixels: &ClarkActiveSet,
17893    cell_count: u32,
17894    nx: u32,
17895    ny: u32,
17896    patch_nx: u32,
17897    patch_ny: u32,
17898    patch_radius_x: u32,
17899    patch_radius_y: u32,
17900    component_budget: usize,
17901    cycle_update_start: usize,
17902    gain: f32,
17903    threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
17904    cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
17905    nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
17906    flux_limit: f32,
17907    iter_flux_limit: f32,
17908    fac: f32,
17909) -> Result<ClarkMetalSubcycleResult, ImagingError> {
17910    use std::slice;
17911
17912    use objc2_metal::{
17913        MTLBuffer, MTLCommandBuffer, MTLCommandBufferStatus, MTLCommandEncoder, MTLCommandQueue,
17914        MTLComputeCommandEncoder, MTLDevice, MTLSize,
17915    };
17916
17917    let active_count = active_pixels.len();
17918    if active_count == 0 || component_budget == 0 {
17919        return Ok(ClarkMetalSubcycleResult {
17920            actual_updates: 0,
17921            stop_reason: Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels),
17922            final_peak_abs: 0.0,
17923            peak_searches: 0,
17924            delta_model: vec![0.0; usize::try_from(cell_count).unwrap_or(0)],
17925            command_timing: HogbomMetalCommandTiming::default(),
17926            readback_elapsed: Duration::ZERO,
17927        });
17928    }
17929    let active_count_u32 = u32::try_from(active_count).map_err(|_| {
17930        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Clark Metal active set exceeds u32".to_string())
17931    })?;
17932    let component_budget_u32 = u32::try_from(component_budget).map_err(|_| {
17933        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Clark Metal component budget exceeds u32".to_string())
17934    })?;
17935    let cycle_update_start_u32 = u32::try_from(cycle_update_start).map_err(|_| {
17936        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Clark Metal cycle update count exceeds u32".to_string())
17937    })?;
17938    let active_values = active_pixels
17939        .pixels
17940        .iter()
17941        .map(|pixel| pixel.value)
17942        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
17943    let active_indices = active_pixels
17944        .pixels
17945        .iter()
17946        .map(|pixel| {
17947            let flat = pixel
17948                .x
17949                .saturating_mul(active_pixels.image_ny)
17950                .saturating_add(pixel.y);
17951            u32::try_from(flat).map_err(|_| {
17952                ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
17953                    "Clark Metal active pixel index exceeds u32".to_string(),
17954                )
17955            })
17956        })
17957        .collect::<Result<Vec<_>, _>>()?;
17958    let cell_count_usize = usize::try_from(cell_count).map_err(|_| {
17959        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Clark Metal cell count overflowed".to_string())
17960    })?;
17961    let zero_delta = vec![0.0f32; cell_count_usize];
17962    let active_values_buffer = hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(
17963        device,
17964        active_values.as_slice(),
17965        storage_options,
17966        "active",
17967    )?;
17968    let active_indices_buffer = hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(
17969        device,
17970        active_indices.as_slice(),
17971        storage_options,
17972        "active indices",
17973    )?;
17974    let delta_model_buffer =
17975        hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(device, zero_delta.as_slice(), storage_options, "delta")?;
17976
17977    let active_threads_per_group =
17978        hogbom_metal_threads_per_group(active_peak_pipeline, active_count);
17979    let first_candidate_count = active_count.div_ceil(active_threads_per_group);
17980    let candidate_bytes = first_candidate_count
17981        .max(1)
17982        .checked_mul(std::mem::size_of::<HogbomMetalPeakCandidate>())
17983        .ok_or_else(|| {
17984            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Clark Metal candidate buffer is too large".to_string())
17985        })?;
17986    let candidate_a = device
17987        .newBufferWithLength_options(candidate_bytes, storage_options)
17988        .ok_or_else(|| {
17989            ImagingError::Unsupported(
17990                "Clark minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not allocate candidate buffer".to_string(),
17991            )
17992        })?;
17993    let candidate_b = device
17994        .newBufferWithLength_options(candidate_bytes, storage_options)
17995        .ok_or_else(|| {
17996            ImagingError::Unsupported(
17997                "Clark minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not allocate reduction buffer".to_string(),
17998            )
17999        })?;
18000    let selected_peak_buffer = hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(
18001        device,
18002        &[HogbomMetalPeakCandidate::default()],
18003        storage_options,
18004        "selected peak",
18005    )?;
18006    let params = ClarkMetalSubcycleParams {
18007        active_count: active_count_u32,
18008        nx,
18009        ny,
18010        patch_nx,
18011        patch_ny,
18012        patch_radius_x,
18013        patch_radius_y,
18014        threads_per_group: u32::try_from(active_threads_per_group).map_err(|_| {
18015            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
18016                "Clark Metal active threadgroup width exceeds u32".to_string(),
18017            )
18018        })?,
18019        component_budget: component_budget_u32,
18020        cycle_update_start: cycle_update_start_u32,
18021        gain,
18022        threshold_jy_per_beam,
18023        cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
18024        nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
18025        flux_limit,
18026        iter_flux_limit,
18027        fac,
18028        _pad0: 0,
18029    };
18030    let params_buffer =
18031        hogbom_metal_params_buffer(device, &params, storage_options, "Clark subcycle params")?;
18032    let initial_state = ClarkMetalSubcycleState {
18033        iter_flux_limit,
18034        ..Default::default()
18035    };
18036    let state_buffer =
18037        hogbom_metal_buffer_from_slice(device, &[initial_state], storage_options, "Clark state")?;
18038
18039    let mut reduce_param_buffers = Vec::new();
18040    let mut reduce_plan = Vec::new();
18041    let mut input_a = true;
18042    let mut current_count = first_candidate_count.max(1);
18043    while current_count > 1 {
18044        let reduce_threads_per_group =
18045            hogbom_metal_threads_per_group(reduce_pipeline, current_count);
18046        let output_count = current_count.div_ceil(reduce_threads_per_group);
18047        let reduce_params = HogbomMetalReduceParams {
18048            candidate_count: u32::try_from(current_count).map_err(|_| {
18049                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Clark Metal candidate count exceeds u32".to_string())
18050            })?,
18051            nx,
18052            ny,
18053            threads_per_group: u32::try_from(reduce_threads_per_group).map_err(|_| {
18054                ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
18055                    "Clark Metal reduce threadgroup width exceeds u32".to_string(),
18056                )
18057            })?,
18058        };
18059        let reduce_params_buffer = hogbom_metal_params_buffer(
18060            device,
18061            &reduce_params,
18062            storage_options,
18063            "Clark reduce params",
18064        )?;
18065        reduce_param_buffers.push(reduce_params_buffer);
18066        reduce_plan.push((input_a, output_count, reduce_threads_per_group));
18067        input_a = !input_a;
18068        current_count = output_count.max(1);
18069    }
18070    let final_candidate_from_a = input_a;
18071    let final_candidate_buffer = if final_candidate_from_a {
18072        &candidate_a
18073    } else {
18074        &candidate_b
18075    };
18076
18077    let active_group_count = active_count.div_ceil(active_threads_per_group);
18078    let command_component_budget = component_budget.min(64);
18079    let mut command_timing = HogbomMetalCommandTiming::default();
18080    let mut peak_searches = 0usize;
18081    let mut candidate_ready = false;
18082    let mut final_state = initial_state;
18083    while usize::try_from(final_state.updates).unwrap_or(usize::MAX) < component_budget
18084        && final_state.stopped == 0
18085    {
18086        let updates_done = usize::try_from(final_state.updates).map_err(|_| {
18087            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Clark Metal update count overflowed".to_string())
18088        })?;
18089        let updates_remaining = component_budget.saturating_sub(updates_done);
18090        if updates_remaining == 0 {
18091            break;
18092        }
18093        let chunk_updates = updates_remaining.min(command_component_budget);
18094        let command_buffer = queue.commandBuffer().ok_or_else(|| {
18095            ImagingError::Unsupported(
18096                "Clark minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create command buffer".to_string(),
18097            )
18098        })?;
18099        if !candidate_ready {
18100            let active_encoder = command_buffer.computeCommandEncoder().ok_or_else(|| {
18101                ImagingError::Unsupported(
18102                    "Clark minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create active peak encoder"
18103                        .to_string(),
18104                )
18105            })?;
18106            active_encoder.setComputePipelineState(active_peak_pipeline);
18107            unsafe {
18108                active_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&active_values_buffer), 0, 0);
18109                active_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&candidate_a), 0, 1);
18110                active_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&params_buffer), 0, 2);
18111                active_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&state_buffer), 0, 3);
18112            }
18113            active_encoder.dispatchThreadgroups_threadsPerThreadgroup(
18114                MTLSize {
18115                    width: active_group_count,
18116                    height: 1,
18117                    depth: 1,
18118                },
18119                MTLSize {
18120                    width: active_threads_per_group,
18121                    height: 1,
18122                    depth: 1,
18123                },
18124            );
18125            active_encoder.endEncoding();
18126            peak_searches = peak_searches.saturating_add(1);
18127            hogbom_metal_encode_reduce_plan(
18128                &command_buffer,
18129                reduce_pipeline,
18130                &candidate_a,
18131                &candidate_b,
18132                &reduce_param_buffers,
18133                &reduce_plan,
18134                &state_buffer,
18135            )?;
18136        }
18137        clark_metal_encode_select_peak(
18138            &command_buffer,
18139            select_pipeline,
18140            final_candidate_buffer,
18141            &selected_peak_buffer,
18142            &state_buffer,
18143            model_buffer,
18144            &delta_model_buffer,
18145            &params_buffer,
18146            &active_indices_buffer,
18147        )?;
18148
18149        for component_index in 0..chunk_updates {
18150            let subtract_encoder = command_buffer.computeCommandEncoder().ok_or_else(|| {
18151                ImagingError::Unsupported(
18152                    "Clark minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create subtract encoder"
18153                        .to_string(),
18154                )
18155            })?;
18156            subtract_encoder.setComputePipelineState(subtract_peak_pipeline);
18157            unsafe {
18158                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&selected_peak_buffer), 0, 0);
18159                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&active_values_buffer), 0, 1);
18160                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&active_indices_buffer), 0, 2);
18161                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(patch_buffer), 0, 3);
18162                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&candidate_a), 0, 4);
18163                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&params_buffer), 0, 5);
18164                subtract_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&state_buffer), 0, 6);
18165            }
18166            subtract_encoder.dispatchThreadgroups_threadsPerThreadgroup(
18167                MTLSize {
18168                    width: active_group_count,
18169                    height: 1,
18170                    depth: 1,
18171                },
18172                MTLSize {
18173                    width: active_threads_per_group,
18174                    height: 1,
18175                    depth: 1,
18176                },
18177            );
18178            subtract_encoder.endEncoding();
18179            peak_searches = peak_searches.saturating_add(1);
18180
18181            hogbom_metal_encode_reduce_plan(
18182                &command_buffer,
18183                reduce_pipeline,
18184                &candidate_a,
18185                &candidate_b,
18186                &reduce_param_buffers,
18187                &reduce_plan,
18188                &state_buffer,
18189            )?;
18190            if component_index + 1 == chunk_updates {
18191                clark_metal_encode_store_peak(
18192                    &command_buffer,
18193                    store_peak_pipeline,
18194                    final_candidate_buffer,
18195                    &state_buffer,
18196                )?;
18197                break;
18198            }
18199            clark_metal_encode_select_peak(
18200                &command_buffer,
18201                select_pipeline,
18202                final_candidate_buffer,
18203                &selected_peak_buffer,
18204                &state_buffer,
18205                model_buffer,
18206                &delta_model_buffer,
18207                &params_buffer,
18208                &active_indices_buffer,
18209            )?;
18210        }
18211
18212        command_buffer.commit();
18213        command_buffer.waitUntilCompleted();
18214        command_timing.kernel_elapsed +=
18215            HogbomMetalCommandTiming::from_command_buffer(&command_buffer).kernel_elapsed;
18216        if command_buffer.status() == MTLCommandBufferStatus::Error {
18217            let message = command_buffer
18218                .error()
18219                .map(|error| format!("{error:?}"))
18220                .unwrap_or_else(|| "unknown Metal command buffer error".to_string());
18221            return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
18222                "Clark minor-cycle backend 'metal' command failed: {message}"
18223            )));
18224        }
18225        final_state = unsafe {
18226            *slice::from_raw_parts(
18227                state_buffer
18228                    .contents()
18229                    .as_ptr()
18230                    .cast::<ClarkMetalSubcycleState>(),
18231                1,
18232            )
18233            .first()
18234            .expect("one Clark Metal state")
18235        };
18236        candidate_ready = true;
18237    }
18238
18239    let readback_started = Instant::now();
18240    let delta_slice = unsafe {
18241        slice::from_raw_parts(
18242            delta_model_buffer.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(),
18243            zero_delta.len(),
18244        )
18245    };
18246    let delta_model = delta_slice.to_vec();
18247    let readback_elapsed = readback_started.elapsed();
18248    let actual_updates = usize::try_from(final_state.updates).map_err(|_| {
18249        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("Clark Metal update count overflowed".to_string())
18250    })?;
18251    Ok(ClarkMetalSubcycleResult {
18252        actual_updates,
18253        stop_reason: hogbom_metal_stop_reason(final_state.stop_reason),
18254        final_peak_abs: final_state.peak.abs_value,
18255        peak_searches,
18256        delta_model,
18257        command_timing,
18258        readback_elapsed,
18259    })
18260}
18261
18262#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
18263#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
18264fn clark_metal_encode_select_peak(
18265    command_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLCommandBuffer>,
18266    select_pipeline: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState>,
18267    final_candidate_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
18268    selected_peak_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
18269    state_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
18270    model_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
18271    delta_model_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
18272    params_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
18273    active_indices_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
18274) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
18275    use objc2_metal::{MTLCommandBuffer, MTLCommandEncoder, MTLComputeCommandEncoder, MTLSize};
18276
18277    let select_encoder = command_buffer.computeCommandEncoder().ok_or_else(|| {
18278        ImagingError::Unsupported(
18279            "Clark minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create select encoder".to_string(),
18280        )
18281    })?;
18282    select_encoder.setComputePipelineState(select_pipeline);
18283    unsafe {
18284        select_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(final_candidate_buffer), 0, 0);
18285        select_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(selected_peak_buffer), 0, 1);
18286        select_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(state_buffer), 0, 2);
18287        select_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(model_buffer), 0, 3);
18288        select_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(delta_model_buffer), 0, 4);
18289        select_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(params_buffer), 0, 5);
18290        select_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(active_indices_buffer), 0, 6);
18291    }
18292    select_encoder.dispatchThreads_threadsPerThreadgroup(
18293        MTLSize {
18294            width: 1,
18295            height: 1,
18296            depth: 1,
18297        },
18298        MTLSize {
18299            width: 1,
18300            height: 1,
18301            depth: 1,
18302        },
18303    );
18304    select_encoder.endEncoding();
18305    Ok(())
18306}
18307
18308#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
18309fn clark_metal_encode_store_peak(
18310    command_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLCommandBuffer>,
18311    store_pipeline: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLComputePipelineState>,
18312    final_candidate_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
18313    state_buffer: &objc2::runtime::ProtocolObject<dyn objc2_metal::MTLBuffer>,
18314) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
18315    use objc2_metal::{MTLCommandBuffer, MTLCommandEncoder, MTLComputeCommandEncoder, MTLSize};
18316
18317    let encoder = command_buffer.computeCommandEncoder().ok_or_else(|| {
18318        ImagingError::Unsupported(
18319            "Clark minor-cycle backend 'metal' could not create peak-store encoder".to_string(),
18320        )
18321    })?;
18322    encoder.setComputePipelineState(store_pipeline);
18323    unsafe {
18324        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(final_candidate_buffer), 0, 0);
18325        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(state_buffer), 0, 1);
18326    }
18327    encoder.dispatchThreads_threadsPerThreadgroup(
18328        MTLSize {
18329            width: 1,
18330            height: 1,
18331            depth: 1,
18332        },
18333        MTLSize {
18334            width: 1,
18335            height: 1,
18336            depth: 1,
18337        },
18338    );
18339    encoder.endEncoding();
18340    Ok(())
18341}
18342
18343fn casa_clark_step_niter(cycle_reported_niter: usize) -> usize {
18344    if cycle_reported_niter < 5000 {
18345        cycle_reported_niter
18346    } else {
18347        2000
18348    }
18349}
18350
18351const CASA_CLARK_MAX_MAJOR_CYCLES: usize = 10;
18352
18353struct ClarkPsfPatch {
18354    patch: Array2<f32>,
18355    radius_x: usize,
18356    radius_y: usize,
18357    max_exterior_abs: f32,
18358}
18359
18360struct MultiscaleState {
18361    scales: Vec<Array2<f32>>,
18362    scale_supports: Vec<Option<KernelSupport>>,
18363    dirty_conv_scales: Vec<Array2<f32>>,
18364    psf_conv_scales: Vec<Vec<Array2<f32>>>,
18365    peak_psf_conv_scales: Vec<f32>,
18366    scale_bias: Vec<f32>,
18367    scale_masks: Option<Vec<Array2<bool>>>,
18368}
18369
18370#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
18371struct KernelSupport {
18372    x0: usize,
18373    y0: usize,
18374    x1: usize,
18375    y1: usize,
18376}
18377
18378#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
18379struct ImageWindow {
18380    x0: usize,
18381    y0: usize,
18382    x1: usize,
18383    y1: usize,
18384}
18385
18386impl ImageWindow {
18387    fn full(shape: (usize, usize)) -> Self {
18388        Self {
18389            x0: 0,
18390            y0: 0,
18391            x1: shape.0.saturating_sub(1),
18392            y1: shape.1.saturating_sub(1),
18393        }
18394    }
18395
18396    fn from_casa_shifted_support(shape: (usize, usize), position: (usize, usize)) -> Self {
18397        let half_x = shape.0 / 2;
18398        let half_y = shape.1 / 2;
18399        Self {
18400            x0: position.0.saturating_sub(half_x),
18401            y0: position.1.saturating_sub(half_y),
18402            x1: position
18403                .0
18404                .saturating_add(half_x)
18405                .saturating_sub(1)
18406                .min(shape.0.saturating_sub(1)),
18407            y1: position
18408                .1
18409                .saturating_add(half_y)
18410                .saturating_sub(1)
18411                .min(shape.1.saturating_sub(1)),
18412        }
18413    }
18414
18415    fn bounded_pixel_count(self, shape: (usize, usize)) -> usize {
18416        if shape.0 == 0 || shape.1 == 0 {
18417            return 0;
18418        }
18419        let x0 = self.x0.min(shape.0 - 1);
18420        let y0 = self.y0.min(shape.1 - 1);
18421        let x1 = self.x1.min(shape.0 - 1);
18422        let y1 = self.y1.min(shape.1 - 1);
18423        if x0 > x1 || y0 > y1 {
18424            return 0;
18425        }
18426        x1.saturating_sub(x0)
18427            .saturating_add(1)
18428            .saturating_mul(y1.saturating_sub(y0).saturating_add(1))
18429    }
18430
18431    fn is_full(self, shape: (usize, usize)) -> bool {
18432        self.bounded_pixel_count(shape) == shape.0.saturating_mul(shape.1)
18433    }
18434}
18435
18436fn refresh_multiscale_dirty_conv_scales(state: &mut MultiscaleState, residual: &Array2<f32>) {
18437    state.dirty_conv_scales = state
18438        .scales
18439        .iter()
18440        .map(|scale| fft_convolve_real(residual, scale))
18441        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
18442}
18443
18444#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
18445struct ClarkActivePixel {
18446    x: usize,
18447    y: usize,
18448    value: f32,
18449}
18450
18451struct ClarkActiveSet {
18452    pixels: Vec<ClarkActivePixel>,
18453    pixel_to_active_index: Vec<usize>,
18454    image_ny: usize,
18455}
18456
18457impl ClarkActiveSet {
18458    const MISSING_INDEX: usize = usize::MAX;
18459
18460    fn new(image_shape: (usize, usize)) -> Self {
18461        Self {
18462            pixels: Vec::new(),
18463            pixel_to_active_index: vec![Self::MISSING_INDEX; image_shape.0 * image_shape.1],
18464            image_ny: image_shape.1,
18465        }
18466    }
18467
18468    fn len(&self) -> usize {
18469        self.pixels.len()
18470    }
18471
18472    fn is_empty(&self) -> bool {
18473        self.pixels.is_empty()
18474    }
18475
18476    fn push(&mut self, pixel: ClarkActivePixel) {
18477        let index = self.pixels.len();
18478        self.pixel_to_active_index[pixel.x * self.image_ny + pixel.y] = index;
18479        self.pixels.push(pixel);
18480    }
18481
18482    fn active_index(&self, x: usize, y: usize) -> Option<usize> {
18483        let index = self.pixel_to_active_index[x * self.image_ny + y];
18484        (index != Self::MISSING_INDEX).then_some(index)
18485    }
18486}
18487
18488#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
18489fn run_clark_cotton_schwab(
18490    request: &ImagingRequest,
18491    psf_state: &PsfState,
18492    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
18493    refresh_residual: &mut ResidualRefreshCallback<'_>,
18494    model: &mut Array2<f32>,
18495    mut residual: Array2<f32>,
18496    minor_cycle_backend: StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend,
18497    max_psf_sidelobe_level: f32,
18498    initial_peak: f32,
18499    cycle_threshold_override_jy_per_beam: Option<f32>,
18500    warnings: &mut Vec<String>,
18501) -> Result<CottonSchwabState, ImagingError> {
18502    let deconvolver_setup_started = Instant::now();
18503    let psf_patch = build_clark_psf_patch(
18504        &psf_state.psf,
18505        request.geometry.cell_size_rad,
18506        request.clean.psf_cutoff,
18507    );
18508    stage_timings.deconvolver_setup += deconvolver_setup_started.elapsed();
18509    let mut minor_iterations = 0usize;
18510    let mut reported_minor_iterations = 0usize;
18511    let mut major_cycles = 0usize;
18512    let mut clean_stop_reason = None::<CleanStopReason>;
18513    let mut minor_cycle_traces = Vec::<MinorCycleTrace>::new();
18514    let mut final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam = request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam;
18515    let mut min_residual_peak_jy_per_beam = initial_peak;
18516    let mut divergence_warned = false;
18517
18518    while reported_minor_iterations < request.clean.niter {
18519        if request
18520            .clean
18521            .major_cycle_limit
18522            .is_some_and(|limit| major_cycles >= limit)
18523        {
18524            clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::MajorCycleLimitReached);
18525            break;
18526        }
18527        let cycle_setup_started = Instant::now();
18528        let Some((_, cycle_peak_value)) =
18529            peak_location_masked(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref())
18530        else {
18531            stage_timings.clean_cycle_setup += cycle_setup_started.elapsed();
18532            clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels);
18533            break;
18534        };
18535        let cycle_peak = cycle_peak_value.abs();
18536        let cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam =
18537            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref(), request.clean);
18538        if let Some(stop_reason) = tolerant_clean_stop_reason(
18539            cycle_peak,
18540            request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
18541            cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
18542        ) {
18543            stage_timings.clean_cycle_setup += cycle_setup_started.elapsed();
18544            clean_stop_reason = Some(stop_reason);
18545            break;
18546        }
18547        let remaining_reported = request.clean.niter - reported_minor_iterations;
18548        let cycle_reported_niter = remaining_reported.min(request.clean.minor_cycle_length);
18549        let casa_step_reported_niter = casa_clark_step_niter(cycle_reported_niter);
18550        let start_reported_iteration = reported_minor_iterations;
18551        final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam =
18552            cycle_threshold_override_jy_per_beam.unwrap_or_else(|| {
18553                clean_cycle_threshold(cycle_peak, max_psf_sidelobe_level, request.clean)
18554            });
18555        stage_timings.clean_cycle_setup += cycle_setup_started.elapsed();
18556        let outcome = run_clark_minor_cycle(
18557            request,
18558            model,
18559            &mut residual,
18560            &psf_state.psf,
18561            casa_step_reported_niter,
18562            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
18563            cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
18564            &psf_patch,
18565            minor_cycle_backend,
18566            stage_timings,
18567        )?;
18568        let reported_after_outcome =
18569            reported_minor_iterations.saturating_add(outcome.reported_updates);
18570        if outcome.updated_model {
18571            residual = refresh_residual(model, stage_timings)?;
18572            if reported_after_outcome < request.clean.niter {
18573                major_cycles += 1;
18574            }
18575        }
18576        minor_cycle_traces.push(make_minor_cycle_trace(
18577            minor_cycle_traces.len(),
18578            start_reported_iteration,
18579            outcome,
18580            cycle_peak,
18581            &residual,
18582            model,
18583            MinorCycleProbe::default(),
18584        ));
18585        minor_iterations += outcome.actual_updates;
18586        reported_minor_iterations = reported_after_outcome;
18587        let mut stop_after_cycle = false;
18588        if let Some(reason) = outcome.stop_reason {
18589            match reason {
18590                CleanStopReason::CycleThresholdReached if outcome.updated_model => {}
18591                CleanStopReason::CycleThresholdReached => {
18592                    clean_stop_reason = Some(reason);
18593                }
18594                _ => {
18595                    clean_stop_reason = Some(reason);
18596                    stop_after_cycle = true;
18597                }
18598            }
18599        }
18600        if !outcome.updated_model {
18601            break;
18602        }
18603        if stop_after_cycle {
18604            break;
18605        }
18606        let minor_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref());
18607        if let Some(stop_reason) = update_divergence_state(
18608            warnings,
18609            &mut min_residual_peak_jy_per_beam,
18610            minor_peak,
18611            &mut divergence_warned,
18612        ) {
18613            clean_stop_reason = Some(stop_reason);
18614            break;
18615        }
18616        if clean_stop_reason.is_none() && reported_minor_iterations >= request.clean.niter {
18617            clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::IterationLimitReached);
18618            break;
18619        }
18620        let refreshed_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref());
18621        let refreshed_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam =
18622            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref(), request.clean);
18623        if let Some(stop_reason) = tolerant_clean_stop_reason(
18624            refreshed_peak,
18625            request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
18626            refreshed_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
18627        ) {
18628            clean_stop_reason = Some(stop_reason);
18629            break;
18630        }
18631    }
18632    if request.clean.niter > 0 && clean_stop_reason.is_none() {
18633        clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::IterationLimitReached);
18634    }
18635
18636    Ok(CottonSchwabState {
18637        residual,
18638        major_cycles,
18639        minor_iterations,
18640        clean_stop_reason,
18641        minor_cycle_traces,
18642        final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
18643    })
18644}
18645
18646#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
18647fn run_multiscale_cotton_schwab(
18648    request: &ImagingRequest,
18649    psf_state: &PsfState,
18650    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
18651    refresh_residual: &mut ResidualRefreshCallback<'_>,
18652    model: &mut Array2<f32>,
18653    mut residual: Array2<f32>,
18654    minor_cycle_backend: StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend,
18655    max_psf_sidelobe_level: f32,
18656    initial_peak: f32,
18657    cycle_threshold_override_jy_per_beam: Option<f32>,
18658    warnings: &mut Vec<String>,
18659) -> Result<CottonSchwabState, ImagingError> {
