18660    if minor_cycle_backend == StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend::Metal {
18661        return run_multiscale_cotton_schwab_metal(
18662            request,
18663            psf_state,
18664            stage_timings,
18665            refresh_residual,
18666            model,
18667            residual,
18668            max_psf_sidelobe_level,
18669            initial_peak,
18670            cycle_threshold_override_jy_per_beam,
18671            warnings,
18672        );
18673    }
18674    let deconvolver_setup_started = Instant::now();
18675    let scales = effective_multiscale_scales(request);
18676    let mut multiscale_state = build_multiscale_state(
18677        &residual,
18678        &psf_state.psf,
18679        &scales,
18680        request.small_scale_bias,
18681        request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
18682    );
18683    stage_timings.deconvolver_setup += deconvolver_setup_started.elapsed();
18684    let mut minor_iterations = 0usize;
18685    let mut reported_minor_iterations = 0usize;
18686    let mut major_cycles = 0usize;
18687    let mut clean_stop_reason = None::<CleanStopReason>;
18688    let mut minor_cycle_traces = Vec::<MinorCycleTrace>::new();
18689    let mut final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam = request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam;
18690    let mut min_residual_peak_jy_per_beam = initial_peak;
18691    let mut divergence_warned = false;
18692    let mut residual_needs_refresh = false;
18693    let multiscale_trace = multiscale_trace_sink();
18694    let scale_count = scales.len();
18695    let mut stats = MultiscaleMinorCycleStats::new(scale_count);
18696    let mut peak_search_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
18697    let mut model_update_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
18698    let mut subtract_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
18699    let mut model_updates = 0usize;
18700
18701    while reported_minor_iterations < request.clean.niter {
18702        if request
18703            .clean
18704            .major_cycle_limit
18705            .is_some_and(|limit| major_cycles >= limit)
18706        {
18707            clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::MajorCycleLimitReached);
18708            break;
18709        }
18710        let cycle_setup_started = Instant::now();
18711        let full_window = ImageWindow::full(residual.dim());
18712        let cycle_candidate_started = Instant::now();
18713        let cycle_candidate = select_multiscale_candidate(
18714            &multiscale_state,
18715            request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
18716            full_window,
18717        );
18718        peak_search_elapsed += cycle_candidate_started.elapsed();
18719        stats.record_peak_search(full_window, residual.dim());
18720        let Some(cycle_candidate) = cycle_candidate else {
18721            stage_timings.clean_cycle_setup += cycle_setup_started.elapsed();
18722            clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels);
18723            break;
18724        };
18725        let cycle_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(
18726            &multiscale_state.dirty_conv_scales[0],
18727            request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
18728        );
18729        let cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam =
18730            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref(), request.clean);
18731        if let Some(stop_reason) = tolerant_clean_stop_reason(
18732            cycle_peak,
18733            request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
18734            cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
18735        ) {
18736            stage_timings.clean_cycle_setup += cycle_setup_started.elapsed();
18737            clean_stop_reason = Some(stop_reason);
18738            break;
18739        }
18740        let remaining_reported = request.clean.niter - reported_minor_iterations;
18741        let cycle_reported_niter = remaining_reported.min(request.clean.minor_cycle_length);
18742        let start_reported_iteration = reported_minor_iterations;
18743        final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam =
18744            cycle_threshold_override_jy_per_beam.unwrap_or_else(|| {
18745                clean_cycle_threshold(cycle_peak, max_psf_sidelobe_level, request.clean)
18746            });
18747        let probe = MinorCycleProbe {
18748            initial_scale_pixels: Some(scales[cycle_candidate.scale_index]),
18749            initial_candidate_strength_jy_per_beam: Some(cycle_candidate.strength),
18750            initial_candidate_position: Some([
18751                cycle_candidate.position.0,
18752                cycle_candidate.position.1,
18753            ]),
18754        };
18755        if let Some(trace) = &multiscale_trace {
18756            append_multiscale_trace(
18757                trace,
18758                format!(
18759                    "{{\"event\":\"cycle_start\",\"cycle_index\":{},\"start_reported_iteration\":{},\"cycle_reported_niter\":{},\"cycle_peak\":{:.17e},\"cycle_threshold\":{:.17e},\"nsigma_threshold\":{:.17e},\"initial_scale\":{:.17e},\"initial_x\":{},\"initial_y\":{},\"initial_strength\":{:.17e},\"initial_dirty_value\":{:.17e},\"initial_peak_psf\":{:.17e},\"model_flux\":{:.17e}}}",
18760                    minor_cycle_traces.len(),
18761                    start_reported_iteration,
18762                    cycle_reported_niter,
18763                    cycle_peak,
18764                    final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
18765                    cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
18766                    scales[cycle_candidate.scale_index],
18767                    cycle_candidate.position.0,
18768                    cycle_candidate.position.1,
18769                    cycle_candidate.strength,
18770                    cycle_candidate.dirty_value,
18771                    cycle_candidate.peak_psf,
18772                    model.iter().copied().sum::<f32>(),
18773                ),
18774            );
18775        }
18776        let initial_cycle_component = cycle_candidate.strength.abs();
18777        let mut cycle_component_updates = 0usize;
18778        let mut updated_model = false;
18779        let mut cycle_stop_reason = None::<CleanStopReason>;
18780        stage_timings.clean_cycle_setup += cycle_setup_started.elapsed();
18781        let mut dirty_window = full_window;
18782        let minor_started = Instant::now();
18783        while cycle_component_updates < cycle_reported_niter {
18784            let candidate_started = Instant::now();
18785            let candidate = select_multiscale_candidate(
18786                &multiscale_state,
18787                request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
18788                dirty_window,
18789            );
18790            peak_search_elapsed += candidate_started.elapsed();
18791            stats.record_peak_search(dirty_window, residual.dim());
18792            let Some(candidate) = candidate else {
18793                cycle_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels);
18794                break;
18795            };
18796            let component_abs = candidate.strength.abs();
18797            if let Some(stop_reason) = minor_cycle_stop_reason(
18798                component_abs,
18799                request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
18800                final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
18801                cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
18802            ) {
18803                cycle_stop_reason = Some(stop_reason);
18804                break;
18805            }
18806            if let Some(stop_reason) = casa_multiscale_divergence_stop_reason(
18807                candidate,
18808                multiscale_state.dirty_conv_scales.len(),
18809                initial_cycle_component,
18810                cycle_component_updates,
18811            ) {
18812                cycle_stop_reason = Some(stop_reason);
18813                break;
18814            }
18815
18816            let component = request.clean.gain * candidate.strength;
18817            if let Some(trace) = &multiscale_trace {
18818                append_multiscale_trace(
18819                    trace,
18820                    format!(
18821                        "{{\"event\":\"component\",\"cycle_index\":{},\"cycle_update\":{},\"reported_iteration\":{},\"scale\":{:.17e},\"x\":{},\"y\":{},\"strength\":{:.17e},\"dirty_value\":{:.17e},\"peak_psf\":{:.17e},\"component\":{:.17e},\"component_abs\":{:.17e},\"cycle_threshold\":{:.17e}}}",
18822                        minor_cycle_traces.len(),
18823                        cycle_component_updates,
18824                        start_reported_iteration + cycle_component_updates,
18825                        scales[candidate.scale_index],
18826                        candidate.position.0,
18827                        candidate.position.1,
18828                        candidate.strength,
18829                        candidate.dirty_value,
18830                        candidate.peak_psf,
18831                        component,
18832                        component_abs,
18833                        final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
18834                    ),
18835                );
18836            }
18837            let model_update_started = Instant::now();
18838            add_shifted_kernel_with_support(
18839                model,
18840                &multiscale_state.scales[candidate.scale_index],
18841                multiscale_state.scale_supports[candidate.scale_index],
18842                candidate.position,
18843                component,
18844            );
18845            model_update_elapsed += model_update_started.elapsed();
18846            model_updates = model_updates.saturating_add(1);
18847            stats.record_component(
18848                candidate.scale_index,
18849                shifted_kernel_support_pixel_count(
18850                    residual.dim(),
18851                    &multiscale_state.scales[candidate.scale_index],
18852                    multiscale_state.scale_supports[candidate.scale_index],
18853                    candidate.position,
18854                ),
18855            );
18856            let component_window =
18857                ImageWindow::from_casa_shifted_support(residual.dim(), candidate.position);
18858            let subtract_started = Instant::now();
18859            subtract_multiscale_component(
18860                &mut multiscale_state,
18861                candidate.scale_index,
18862                candidate.position,
18863                component,
18864                component_window,
18865            );
18866            subtract_elapsed += subtract_started.elapsed();
18867            stats.record_subtract(component_window, residual.dim());
18868            dirty_window = component_window;
18869            cycle_component_updates += 1;
18870            minor_iterations += 1;
18871            updated_model = true;
18872        }
18873        let minor_elapsed = minor_started.elapsed();
18874        stage_timings.minor_cycle += minor_elapsed;
18875        stage_timings.minor_cycle_solve += minor_elapsed;
18876        let reported_updates = casa_multiscale_reported_updates(
18877            cycle_component_updates,
18878            cycle_reported_niter,
18879            cycle_stop_reason,
18880            updated_model,
18881        );
18882        if let Some(trace) = &multiscale_trace {
18883            let stop_reason = cycle_stop_reason
18884                .map(|reason| format!("{reason:?}"))
18885                .unwrap_or_else(|| "null".to_string());
18886            append_multiscale_trace(
18887                trace,
18888                format!(
18889                    "{{\"event\":\"cycle_end\",\"cycle_index\":{},\"actual_updates\":{},\"reported_updates\":{},\"stop_reason\":\"{}\",\"updated_model\":{},\"minor_iterations\":{},\"reported_minor_iterations_before\":{},\"model_flux\":{:.17e}}}",
18890                    minor_cycle_traces.len(),
18891                    cycle_component_updates,
18892                    reported_updates,
18893                    stop_reason,
18894                    updated_model,
18895                    minor_iterations,
18896                    reported_minor_iterations,
18897                    model.iter().copied().sum::<f32>(),
18898                ),
18899            );
18900        }
18901        minor_cycle_traces.push(make_minor_cycle_trace(
18902            minor_cycle_traces.len(),
18903            start_reported_iteration,
18904            HogbomMinorCycleOutcome {
18905                updated_model,
18906                actual_updates: cycle_component_updates,
18907                reported_updates,
18908                stop_reason: cycle_stop_reason,
18909                final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
18910                final_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: cycle_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
18911            },
18912            cycle_peak,
18913            &multiscale_state.dirty_conv_scales[0],
18914            model,
18915            probe,
18916        ));
18917        reported_minor_iterations += reported_updates;
18918        if !updated_model {
18919            clean_stop_reason = cycle_stop_reason;
18920            break;
18921        }
18922        residual = multiscale_state.dirty_conv_scales[0].clone();
18923        residual_needs_refresh = true;
18924        let minor_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref());
18925        if let Some(stop_reason) = update_divergence_state(
18926            warnings,
18927            &mut min_residual_peak_jy_per_beam,
18928            minor_peak,
18929            &mut divergence_warned,
18930        ) {
18931            clean_stop_reason = Some(stop_reason);
18932            break;
18933        }
18934        if clean_stop_reason.is_none() && reported_minor_iterations >= request.clean.niter {
18935            clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::IterationLimitReached);
18936            break;
18937        }
18938        residual = refresh_residual(model, stage_timings)?;
18939        let multiscale_refresh_started = Instant::now();
18940        refresh_multiscale_dirty_conv_scales(&mut multiscale_state, &residual);
18941        stage_timings.multiscale_scale_refresh += multiscale_refresh_started.elapsed();
18942        major_cycles += 1;
18943        residual_needs_refresh = false;
18944        let refreshed_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref());
18945        let refreshed_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam =
18946            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam(&residual, request.clean_mask.as_ref(), request.clean);
18947        if let Some(stop_reason) = tolerant_clean_stop_reason(
18948            refreshed_peak,
18949            request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
18950            refreshed_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
18951        ) {
18952            clean_stop_reason = Some(stop_reason);
18953            break;
18954        }
18955    }
18956    if request.clean.niter > 0 && clean_stop_reason.is_none() {
18957        clean_stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::IterationLimitReached);
18958    }
18959    if residual_needs_refresh {
18960        residual = refresh_residual(model, stage_timings)?;
18961        major_cycles += 1;
18962    }
18963    stage_timings.deconvolver_peak_search += peak_search_elapsed;
18964    stage_timings.deconvolver_model_update += model_update_elapsed;
18965    stage_timings.deconvolver_psf_subtract += subtract_elapsed;
18966    stage_timings.deconvolver_model_updates = stage_timings
18967        .deconvolver_model_updates
18968        .saturating_add(model_updates as u64);
18969    stats.add_to_stage_timings(stage_timings);
18970    log_standard_mfs_multiscale_minor_cycle_summary(
18971        "cpu",
18972        minor_iterations,
18973        request.clean.niter,
18974        clean_stop_reason,
18975        &stats,
18976        peak_search_elapsed,
18977        model_update_elapsed,
18978        subtract_elapsed,
18979        stage_timings.minor_cycle,
18980    );
18981
18982    Ok(CottonSchwabState {
18983        residual,
18984        major_cycles,
18985        minor_iterations,
18986        clean_stop_reason,
18987        minor_cycle_traces,
18988        final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
18989    })
18990}
18991
18992#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
18993struct MultiscaleCandidate {
18994    scale_index: usize,
18995    position: (usize, usize),
18996    strength: f32,
18997    dirty_value: f32,
18998    peak_psf: f32,
18999}
19000
19001fn casa_multiscale_divergence_stop_reason(
19002    candidate: MultiscaleCandidate,
19003    _scale_count: usize,
19004    initial_cycle_component_abs: f32,
19005    cycle_component_updates: usize,
19006) -> Option<CleanStopReason> {
19007    if cycle_component_updates > 0
19008        && candidate.strength.abs() > initial_cycle_component_abs.abs() * 1.5
19009    {
19010        return Some(CleanStopReason::DivergenceDetected);
19011    }
19012    None
19013}
19014
19015#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
19016struct MultiscaleMinorCycleStats {
19017    scale_component_counts: Vec<usize>,
19018    peak_searches: usize,
19019    full_window_peak_searches: usize,
19020    subtract_updates: usize,
19021    full_window_subtract_updates: usize,
19022    pixels_searched: usize,
19023    pixels_touched: usize,
19024    peak_search_window_pixels_max: usize,
19025    subtract_window_pixels_max: usize,
19026}
19027
19028impl MultiscaleMinorCycleStats {
19029    fn new(scale_count: usize) -> Self {
19030        Self {
19031            scale_component_counts: vec![0; scale_count],
19032            peak_searches: 0,
19033            full_window_peak_searches: 0,
19034            subtract_updates: 0,
19035            full_window_subtract_updates: 0,
19036            pixels_searched: 0,
19037            pixels_touched: 0,
19038            peak_search_window_pixels_max: 0,
19039            subtract_window_pixels_max: 0,
19040        }
19041    }
19042
19043    fn record_peak_search(&mut self, window: ImageWindow, shape: (usize, usize)) {
19044        let window_pixels = window.bounded_pixel_count(shape);
19045        self.peak_searches = self
19046            .peak_searches
19047            .saturating_add(self.scale_component_counts.len());
19048        self.pixels_searched = self.pixels_searched.saturating_add(
19049            self.scale_component_counts
19050                .len()
19051                .saturating_mul(window_pixels),
19052        );
19053        self.peak_search_window_pixels_max = self.peak_search_window_pixels_max.max(window_pixels);
19054        if window.is_full(shape) {
19055            self.full_window_peak_searches = self
19056                .full_window_peak_searches
19057                .saturating_add(self.scale_component_counts.len());
19058        }
19059    }
19060
19061    fn record_component(&mut self, scale_index: usize, model_pixels_touched: usize) {
19062        if let Some(count) = self.scale_component_counts.get_mut(scale_index) {
19063            *count = count.saturating_add(1);
19064        }
19065        self.pixels_touched = self.pixels_touched.saturating_add(model_pixels_touched);
19066    }
19067
19068    fn record_subtract(&mut self, window: ImageWindow, shape: (usize, usize)) {
19069        let window_pixels = window.bounded_pixel_count(shape);
19070        let scale_count = self.scale_component_counts.len();
19071        self.subtract_updates = self.subtract_updates.saturating_add(scale_count);
19072        self.pixels_touched = self
19073            .pixels_touched
19074            .saturating_add(scale_count.saturating_mul(window_pixels));
19075        self.subtract_window_pixels_max = self.subtract_window_pixels_max.max(window_pixels);
19076        if window.is_full(shape) {
19077            self.full_window_subtract_updates = self
19078                .full_window_subtract_updates
19079                .saturating_add(scale_count);
19080        }
19081    }
19082
19083    fn add_to_stage_timings(&self, stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings) {
19084        stage_timings.deconvolver_peak_searches = stage_timings
19085            .deconvolver_peak_searches
19086            .saturating_add(self.peak_searches as u64);
19087        stage_timings.deconvolver_subtract_updates = stage_timings
19088            .deconvolver_subtract_updates
19089            .saturating_add(self.subtract_updates as u64);
19090        stage_timings.deconvolver_pixels_searched = stage_timings
19091            .deconvolver_pixels_searched
19092            .saturating_add(self.pixels_searched as u64);
19093        stage_timings.deconvolver_pixels_touched = stage_timings
19094            .deconvolver_pixels_touched
19095            .saturating_add(self.pixels_touched as u64);
19096        stage_timings.deconvolver_full_window_peak_searches = stage_timings
19097            .deconvolver_full_window_peak_searches
19098            .saturating_add(self.full_window_peak_searches as u64);
19099        stage_timings.deconvolver_full_window_subtract_updates = stage_timings
19100            .deconvolver_full_window_subtract_updates
19101            .saturating_add(self.full_window_subtract_updates as u64);
19102        stage_timings.deconvolver_peak_search_window_pixels_max = stage_timings
19103            .deconvolver_peak_search_window_pixels_max
19104            .max(self.peak_search_window_pixels_max as u64);
19105        stage_timings.deconvolver_subtract_window_pixels_max = stage_timings
19106            .deconvolver_subtract_window_pixels_max
19107            .max(self.subtract_window_pixels_max as u64);
19108    }
19109
19110    fn scale_counts_label(&self) -> String {
19111        self.scale_component_counts
19112            .iter()
19113            .enumerate()
19114            .map(|(scale_index, count)| format!("{scale_index}:{count}"))
19115            .collect::<Vec<_>>()
19116            .join(",")
19117    }
19118}
19119
19120#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
19121fn log_standard_mfs_multiscale_minor_cycle_summary(
19122    backend: &str,
19123    updates: usize,
19124    reported_budget: usize,
19125    stop_reason: Option<CleanStopReason>,
19126    stats: &MultiscaleMinorCycleStats,
19127    peak_search_elapsed: Duration,
19128    model_update_elapsed: Duration,
19129    subtract_elapsed: Duration,
19130    total_elapsed: Duration,
19131) {
19132    eprintln!(
19133        "standard_mfs_multiscale_minor_cycle_summary backend={} updates={} reported_budget={} stop_reason={:?} scale_component_counts={} peak_searches={} full_window_peak_searches={} subtract_updates={} full_window_subtract_updates={} pixels_searched={} pixels_touched={} peak_search_window_pixels_max={} subtract_window_pixels_max={} peak_search_ms={:.3} model_update_ms={:.3} subtract_ms={:.3} total_ms={:.3}",
19134        backend,
19135        updates,
19136        reported_budget,
19137        stop_reason,
19138        stats.scale_counts_label(),
19139        stats.peak_searches,
19140        stats.full_window_peak_searches,
19141        stats.subtract_updates,
19142        stats.full_window_subtract_updates,
19143        stats.pixels_searched,
19144        stats.pixels_touched,
19145        stats.peak_search_window_pixels_max,
19146        stats.subtract_window_pixels_max,
19147        peak_search_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 1000.0,
19148        model_update_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 1000.0,
19149        subtract_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 1000.0,
19150        total_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 1000.0,
19151    );
19152}
19153
19154fn effective_multiscale_scales(request: &ImagingRequest) -> Vec<f32> {
19155    if request.multiscale_scales.is_empty() {
19156        vec![0.0]
19157    } else {
19158        request.multiscale_scales.clone()
19159    }
19160}
19161
19162fn build_multiscale_state(
19163    residual: &Array2<f32>,
19164    psf: &Array2<f32>,
19165    scales: &[f32],
19166    small_scale_bias: f32,
19167    mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
19168) -> MultiscaleState {
19169    let scale_images = scales
19170        .iter()
19171        .map(|scale| make_multiscale_kernel(residual.dim(), *scale))
19172        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
19173    let scale_supports = scale_images
19174        .iter()
19175        .map(kernel_nonzero_support)
19176        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
19177    let dirty_conv_scales = scale_images
19178        .iter()
19179        .map(|scale| fft_convolve_real(residual, scale))
19180        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
19181    let psf_conv_scales = (0..scale_images.len())
19182        .map(|scale_index| {
19183            (0..scale_images.len())
19184                .map(|other_index| {
19185                    fft_convolve_real(
19186                        &fft_convolve_real(psf, &scale_images[scale_index]),
19187                        &scale_images[other_index],
19188                    )
19189                })
19190                .collect::<Vec<_>>()
19191        })
19192        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
19193    let peak_psf_conv_scales = (0..scale_images.len())
19194        .map(|scale_index| peak_abs_value(&psf_conv_scales[scale_index][scale_index]).max(1.0e-6))
19195        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
19196    let max_scale = scales.iter().copied().fold(0.0f32, f32::max);
19197    let scale_bias = if max_scale > 0.0 && scales.len() > 1 {
19198        scales
19199            .iter()
19200            .map(|scale| 1.0 - small_scale_bias * (*scale / max_scale))
19201            .collect::<Vec<_>>()
19202    } else {
19203        vec![1.0; scales.len()]
19204    };
19205    let scale_masks =
19206        mask.map(|clean_mask| build_multiscale_scale_masks(clean_mask, &scale_images, scales));
19207
19208    MultiscaleState {
19209        scales: scale_images,
19210        scale_supports,
19211        dirty_conv_scales,
19212        psf_conv_scales,
19213        peak_psf_conv_scales,
19214        scale_bias,
19215        scale_masks,
19216    }
19217}
19218
19219fn build_multiscale_scale_masks(
19220    mask: &Array2<bool>,
19221    scale_images: &[Array2<f32>],
19222    scale_sizes: &[f32],
19223) -> Vec<Array2<bool>> {
19224    let mask_values = mask.mapv(|cleanable| if cleanable { 1.0 } else { 0.0 });
19225    scale_images
19226        .iter()
19227        .zip(scale_sizes.iter().copied())
19228        .map(|(scale_image, scale_size)| {
19229            let convolved = fft_convolve_real(&mask_values, scale_image);
19230            let mut scale_mask = convolved.mapv(|value| value > 0.9);
19231            apply_casa_multiscale_edge_mask(&mut scale_mask, scale_size);
19232            scale_mask
19233        })
19234        .collect()
19235}
19236
19237fn apply_casa_multiscale_edge_mask(mask: &mut Array2<bool>, scale_size: f32) {
19238    let (nx, ny) = mask.dim();
19239    let border = (scale_size * 1.5) as usize;
19240    for x in 0..nx {
19241        for y in 0..ny {
19242            if x <= border
19243                || y <= border
19244                || x >= nx.saturating_sub(border + 1)
19245                || y >= ny.saturating_sub(border + 1)
19246            {
19247                mask[(x, y)] = false;
19248            }
19249        }
19250    }
19251}
19252
19253fn select_multiscale_candidate(
19254    state: &MultiscaleState,
19255    mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
19256    window: ImageWindow,
19257) -> Option<MultiscaleCandidate> {
19258    let mut best = None::<(MultiscaleCandidate, f32)>;
19259    for scale_index in 0..state.dirty_conv_scales.len() {
19260        let search_mask = state
19261            .scale_masks
19262            .as_ref()
19263            .map(|scale_masks| &scale_masks[scale_index])
19264            .or(mask);
19265        let Some((position, value)) = peak_location_masked_in_window(
19266            &state.dirty_conv_scales[scale_index],
19267            search_mask,
19268            window,
19269        ) else {
19270            continue;
19271        };
19272        let peak_psf = state.peak_psf_conv_scales[scale_index];
19273        if peak_psf <= 0.0 || value == 0.0 {
19274            continue;
19275        }
19276        let strength = value / peak_psf;
19277        let score = state.scale_bias[scale_index] * value * strength;
19278        if best
19279            .map(|(_, best_score)| score.abs() > best_score.abs())
19280            .unwrap_or(true)
19281        {
19282            best = Some((
19283                MultiscaleCandidate {
19284                    scale_index,
19285                    position,
19286                    strength,
19287                    dirty_value: value,
19288                    peak_psf,
19289                },
19290                score,
19291            ));
19292        }
19293    }
19294    best.map(|(candidate, _)| candidate)
19295}
19296
19297fn subtract_multiscale_component(
19298    state: &mut MultiscaleState,
19299    optimum_scale: usize,
19300    position: (usize, usize),
19301    scale_factor: f32,
19302    window: ImageWindow,
19303) {
19304    for scale_index in 0..state.dirty_conv_scales.len() {
19305        subtract_shifted_kernel_in_window(
19306            &mut state.dirty_conv_scales[scale_index],
19307            &state.psf_conv_scales[scale_index][optimum_scale],
19308            position,
19309            scale_factor,
19310            window,
19311        );
19312    }
19313}
19314
19315fn make_multiscale_kernel(shape: (usize, usize), scale_size: f32) -> Array2<f32> {
19316    let (nx, ny) = shape;
19317    let mut kernel = Array2::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny));
19318    let refi = nx as f32 / 2.0;
19319    let refj = ny as f32 / 2.0;
19320    if scale_size == 0.0 {
19321        kernel[(refi as usize, refj as usize)] = 1.0;
19322        return kernel;
19323    }
19324
19325    let mini = ((refi - scale_size).floor() as isize).max(0) as usize;
19326    let maxi = ((refi + scale_size).ceil() as usize).min(nx - 1);
19327    let minj = ((refj - scale_size).floor() as isize).max(0) as usize;
19328    let maxj = ((refj + scale_size).ceil() as usize).min(ny - 1);
19329    let mut volume = 0.0f32;
19330    for j in minj..=maxj {
19331        let ypart = ((refj - j as f32) / scale_size).powi(2);
19332        for i in mini..=maxi {
19333            let rad2 = ypart + ((refi - i as f32) / scale_size).powi(2);
19334            if rad2 < 1.0 {
19335                let rad = if rad2 <= 0.0 { 0.0 } else { rad2.sqrt() };
19336                let value = (1.0 - rad2) * multiscale_spheroidal(rad);
19337                kernel[(i, j)] = value;
19338                volume += value;
19339            }
19340        }
19341    }
19342    if volume > 0.0 {
19343        kernel /= volume;
19344    }
19345    kernel
19346}
19347
19348fn multiscale_spheroidal(nu: f32) -> f32 {
19349    if nu <= 0.0 {
19350        return 1.0;
19351    }
19352    if nu >= 1.0 {
19353        return 0.0;
19354    }
19355
19356    let (p, q, nuend) = if nu < 0.75 {
19357        (
19358            [
19359                8.203343e-2,
19360                -3.644705e-1,
19361                6.278_66e-1,
19362                -5.335581e-1,
19363                2.312756e-1,
19364            ],
19365            [1.0, 8.212018e-1, 2.078043e-1],
19366            0.75f32,
19367        )
19368    } else {
19369        (
19370            [
19371                4.028559e-3,
19372                -3.697768e-2,
19373                1.021332e-1,
19374                -1.201436e-1,
19375                6.412774e-2,
19376            ],
19377            [1.0, 9.599102e-1, 2.918724e-1],
19378            1.0f32,
19379        )
19380    };
19381    let delnusq = nu * nu - nuend * nuend;
19382    let numerator = p
19383        .iter()
19384        .rev()
19385        .fold(0.0f32, |acc, coefficient| acc * delnusq + coefficient);
19386    let denominator = q
19387        .iter()
19388        .rev()
19389        .fold(0.0f32, |acc, coefficient| acc * delnusq + coefficient);
19390    if denominator == 0.0 {
19391        0.0
19392    } else {
19393        numerator / denominator
19394    }
19395}
19396
19397fn fft_convolve_real(lhs: &Array2<f32>, rhs: &Array2<f32>) -> Array2<f32> {
19398    let lhs_complex = lhs.mapv(|value| Complex32::new(value, 0.0));
19399    let rhs_complex = rhs.mapv(|value| Complex32::new(value, 0.0));
19400    let product = centered_fft2(&lhs_complex) * centered_fft2(&rhs_complex);
19401    centered_ifft2(&product).mapv(|value| value.re)
19402}
19403
19404fn build_clark_psf_patch(
19405    psf: &Array2<f32>,
19406    cell_size_rad: [f64; 2],
19407    psf_cutoff: f32,
19408) -> ClarkPsfPatch {
19409    let BeamFitOutcome { beam, .. } = fit_beam_from_psf(psf, cell_size_rad, psf_cutoff);
19410    let (major_pixels, minor_pixels) = beam
19411        .map(|beam| {
19412            (
19413                (beam.major_fwhm_rad / cell_size_rad[0]).ceil().max(1.0) as usize,
19414                (beam.minor_fwhm_rad / cell_size_rad[1]).ceil().max(1.0) as usize,
19415            )
19416        })
19417        .unwrap_or((4, 4));
19418    let ncent = 4usize.max(major_pixels).max(minor_pixels);
19419    let patch_size_x = 3 * ncent + 1;
19420    let patch_size_y = 3 * ncent + 1;
19421    let center_x = psf.dim().0 / 2;
19422    let center_y = psf.dim().1 / 2;
19423    let radius_x = patch_size_x / 2;
19424    let radius_y = patch_size_y / 2;
19425    let x0 = center_x.saturating_sub(radius_x);
19426    let y0 = center_y.saturating_sub(radius_y);
19427    let x1 = (x0 + patch_size_x).min(psf.dim().0);
19428    let y1 = (y0 + patch_size_y).min(psf.dim().1);
19429    let patch = psf.slice(s![x0..x1, y0..y1]).to_owned();
19430    let max_exterior_abs = max_abs_outside_patch(psf, x0, x1, y0, y1);
19431    ClarkPsfPatch {
19432        patch,
19433        radius_x,
19434        radius_y,
19435        max_exterior_abs,
19436    }
19437}
19438
19439fn max_abs_outside_patch(psf: &Array2<f32>, x0: usize, x1: usize, y0: usize, y1: usize) -> f32 {
19440    let mut max_abs = 0.0f32;
19441    for ((x, y), value) in psf.indexed_iter() {
19442        if x < x0 || x >= x1 || y < y0 || y >= y1 {
19443            max_abs = max_abs.max(value.abs());
19444        }
19445    }
19446    max_abs
19447}
19448
19449fn collect_clark_active_pixels(
19450    residual: &Array2<f32>,
19451    mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
19452    flux_limit: f32,
19453) -> ClarkActiveSet {
19454    let mut active = ClarkActiveSet::new(residual.dim());
19455    for ((x, y), value) in residual.indexed_iter() {
19456        if value.abs() < flux_limit {
19457            continue;
19458        }
19459        if mask.is_some_and(|mask| !mask[(x, y)]) {
19460            continue;
19461        }
19462        active.push(ClarkActivePixel {
19463            x,
19464            y,
19465            value: *value,
19466        });
19467    }
19468    active
19469}
19470
19471fn peak_clark_active_pixel(active_pixels: &ClarkActiveSet) -> Option<(usize, ClarkActivePixel)> {
19472    let mut best = None::<(usize, ClarkActivePixel)>;
19473    for (index, pixel) in active_pixels.pixels.iter().copied().enumerate() {
19474        match best {
19475            None => best = Some((index, pixel)),
19476            Some((_, current)) if pixel.value.abs() > current.value.abs() => {
19477                best = Some((index, pixel))
19478            }
19479            _ => {}
19480        }
19481    }
19482    best
19483}
19484
19485fn subtract_clark_component_from_active(
19486    active_pixels: &mut ClarkActiveSet,
19487    peak_x: usize,
19488    peak_y: usize,
19489    component: f32,
19490    psf_patch: &ClarkPsfPatch,
19491) {
19492    let (patch_nx, patch_ny) = psf_patch.patch.dim();
19493    let image_nx = active_pixels.pixel_to_active_index.len() / active_pixels.image_ny;
19494    for patch_x in 0..patch_nx {
19495        let Some(pixel_x) = peak_x
19496            .checked_add(patch_x)
19497            .and_then(|value| value.checked_sub(psf_patch.radius_x))
19498        else {
19499            continue;
19500        };
19501        if pixel_x >= image_nx {
19502            continue;
19503        }
19504        for patch_y in 0..patch_ny {
19505            let Some(pixel_y) = peak_y
19506                .checked_add(patch_y)
19507                .and_then(|value| value.checked_sub(psf_patch.radius_y))
19508            else {
19509                continue;
19510            };
19511            if pixel_y >= active_pixels.image_ny {
19512                continue;
19513            }
19514            let Some(active_index) = active_pixels.active_index(pixel_x, pixel_y) else {
19515                continue;
19516            };
19517            active_pixels.pixels[active_index].value -=
19518                component * psf_patch.patch[(patch_x, patch_y)];
19519        }
19520    }
19521}
19522
19523fn hogbom_component_budget(reported_cycle_niter: usize, clean: CleanConfig) -> usize {
19524    match clean.hogbom_iteration_mode {
19525        // CASA's `SDAlgorithmHogbomClean` passes `siter = 0` and
19526        // `cycleNiter` into casacore's Fortran `hclean`, whose
19527        // `do iter=siter,niter` loop is inclusive. The kernel can therefore
19528        // commit one more component than the reported `iterdone`, which is
19529        // clamped back to `cycleNiter` before returning.
19530        HogbomIterationMode::CasaInclusive => reported_cycle_niter.saturating_add(1),
19531        HogbomIterationMode::Strict => reported_cycle_niter,
19532    }
19533}
19534
19535/// Control parameters for one Hogbom image-plane minor cycle.
19536#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq)]
19537pub struct HogbomPlaneMinorCycleControl {
19538    clean: CleanConfig,
19539    cycle_limit: usize,
19540    cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
19541    peak_relative_tolerance: f32,
19542}
19543
19544impl HogbomPlaneMinorCycleControl {
19545    /// Build one Hogbom image-plane minor-cycle control block.
19546    pub fn new(
19547        clean: CleanConfig,
19548        cycle_limit: usize,
19549        cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
19550        peak_relative_tolerance: f32,
19551    ) -> Self {
19552        Self {
19553            clean,
19554            cycle_limit,
19555            cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
19556            peak_relative_tolerance,
19557        }
19558    }
19559}
19560
19561/// One component selected during a Hogbom image-plane minor cycle.
19562#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq)]
19563pub struct HogbomPlaneComponent {
19564    position: (usize, usize),
19565    peak_value_jy_per_beam: f32,
19566    component_jy: f32,
19567}
19568
19569impl HogbomPlaneComponent {
19570    /// Component position in image-pixel coordinates.
19571    pub fn position(&self) -> (usize, usize) {
19572        self.position
19573    }
19574
19575    /// Peak residual value selected for this component.
19576    pub fn peak_value_jy_per_beam(&self) -> f32 {
19577        self.peak_value_jy_per_beam
19578    }
19579
19580    /// Flux added to the model plane.
19581    pub fn component_jy(&self) -> f32 {
19582        self.component_jy
19583    }
19584}
19585
19586/// Result of one Hogbom image-plane minor cycle.
19587#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq)]
19588pub struct HogbomPlaneMinorCycleOutcome {
19589    actual_updates: usize,
19590    reported_updates: usize,
19591    components: Vec<HogbomPlaneComponent>,
19592}
19593
19594impl HogbomPlaneMinorCycleOutcome {
19595    /// Number of model/residual updates actually applied.
19596    pub fn actual_updates(&self) -> usize {
19597        self.actual_updates
19598    }
19599
19600    /// CASA-compatible iteration count reported to clean control.
19601    pub fn reported_updates(&self) -> usize {
19602        self.reported_updates
19603    }
19604
19605    /// Components selected during this minor cycle.
19606    pub fn components(&self) -> &[HogbomPlaneComponent] {
19607        &self.components
19608    }
19609}
19610
19611/// Run a finite masked Hogbom minor cycle on one image plane.
19612pub fn run_hogbom_plane_minor_cycle(
19613    model: &mut Array2<f32>,
19614    residual: &mut Array2<f32>,
19615    psf: &Array2<f32>,
19616    clean_mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
19617    control: HogbomPlaneMinorCycleControl,
19618) -> HogbomPlaneMinorCycleOutcome {
19619    let clean = control.clean;
19620    let cycle_component_budget = hogbom_component_budget(control.cycle_limit, clean);
19621    let mut components = Vec::new();
19622    while components.len() < cycle_component_budget {
19623        let Some(((peak_x, peak_y), peak_value)) =
19624            finite_peak_location_masked_with_relative_tolerance(
19625                residual,
19626                clean_mask,
19627                control.peak_relative_tolerance,
19628            )
19629        else {
19630            break;
19631        };
19632        let peak_abs = peak_value.abs();
19633        if peak_abs <= clean.threshold_jy_per_beam
19634            || peak_abs <= control.cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam
19635        {
19636            break;
19637        }
19638        let component = clean.gain * peak_value;
19639        model[(peak_x, peak_y)] += component;
19640        subtract_shifted_psf(residual, psf, (peak_x, peak_y), component);
19641        components.push(HogbomPlaneComponent {
19642            position: (peak_x, peak_y),
19643            peak_value_jy_per_beam: peak_value,
19644            component_jy: component,
19645        });
19646    }
19647    let actual_updates = components.len();
19648    let stopped_by_limit = actual_updates >= cycle_component_budget && cycle_component_budget > 0;
19649    let reported_updates =
19650        if clean.hogbom_iteration_mode == HogbomIterationMode::CasaInclusive && stopped_by_limit {
19651            actual_updates.min(control.cycle_limit)
19652        } else {
19653            actual_updates
19654        };
19655    HogbomPlaneMinorCycleOutcome {
19656        actual_updates,
19657        reported_updates,
19658        components,
19659    }
19660}
19661
19662struct PsfState {
19663    psf: Array2<f32>,
19664    normalization_sumwt: f32,
19665    reported_sumwt: f32,
19666    psf_peak: f32,
19667    gridded_samples: usize,
19668    skipped_samples: usize,
19669}
19670
19671struct MtmfsPsfState {
19672    psf_terms: Vec<Array2<f32>>,
19673    normalization_sumwt: f32,
19674    reported_sumwt_terms: Vec<f32>,
19675    psf_peak: f32,
19676    gridded_samples: usize,
19677    skipped_samples: usize,
19678}
19679
19680#[derive(Debug)]
19681struct MtmfsPsfGridAccumulation {
19682    psf_grids: Vec<Array2<Complex32>>,
19683    normalization_sumwt: f64,
19684    reported_sumwt_terms: Vec<f64>,
19685    gridded_samples: usize,
19686    skipped_samples: usize,
19687}
19688
19689#[derive(Debug)]
19690struct MtmfsResidualGridAccumulation {
19691    residual_grids: Vec<Array2<Complex32>>,
19692}
19693
19694struct MtmfsAccelerationBackend<'a> {
19695    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
19696    metal: Option<StandardMfsMetalExecutor<'a>>,
19697    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
19698    metal_input_cache: Option<MtmfsMetalInputCache>,
19699    _gridder_lifetime: std::marker::PhantomData<&'a StandardGridder>,
19700}
19701
19702impl<'a> MtmfsAccelerationBackend<'a> {
19703    fn new(request: &MtmfsRequest, gridder: &'a StandardGridder) -> Result<Self, ImagingError> {
19704        let _ = gridder;
19705        if standard_mfs_mtmfs_metal_backend_enabled() && request.w_term_mode != WTermMode::WProject
19706        {
19707            #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
19708            {
19709                return Ok(Self {
19710                    metal: Some(StandardMfsMetalExecutor::new_with_resident_bytes(
19711                        gridder, None,
19712                    )?),
19713                    metal_input_cache: None,
19714                    _gridder_lifetime: std::marker::PhantomData,
19715                });
19716            }
19717            #[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
19718            {
19719                return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
19720                    "MTMFS Metal backend requires macOS Metal and is not available on this platform"
19721                        .to_string(),
19722                ));
19723            }
19724        }
19725        Ok(Self {
19726            #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
19727            metal: None,
19728            #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
19729            metal_input_cache: None,
19730            _gridder_lifetime: std::marker::PhantomData,
19731        })
19732    }
19733
19734    fn prepare_weighted_batches(
19735        &mut self,
19736        request: &MtmfsRequest,
19737        batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
19738    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
19739        #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
19740        {
19741            if let Some(metal) = self.metal.as_ref() {
19742                self.metal_input_cache = Some(metal.prepare_mtmfs_input_cache(
19743                    batches,
19744                    &request.sample_frequency_batches_hz,
19745                    request.reffreq_hz,
19746                    2 * request.nterms - 1,
19747                )?);
19748                if let Some(cache) = self.metal_input_cache.as_ref() {
19749                    eprintln!(
19750                        "mtmfs_runtime_plan backend=metal-sample-cache terms={} psf_terms={} samples={} cache_host_bytes={} gridded_samples={} skipped_samples={}",
19751                        request.nterms,
19752                        2 * request.nterms - 1,
19753                        cache.sample_count(),
19754                        cache.host_bytes(),
19755                        cache.gridded_samples,
19756                        cache.skipped_samples
19757                    );
19758                }
19759            }
19760        }
19761        let _ = (request, batches);
19762        Ok(())
19763    }
19764
19765    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
19766    fn metal(&self) -> Option<&StandardMfsMetalExecutor<'a>> {
19767        self.metal.as_ref()
19768    }
19769
19770    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
19771    fn metal_input_cache(&self) -> Option<&MtmfsMetalInputCache> {
19772        self.metal_input_cache.as_ref()
19773    }
19774}
19775
19776#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, Default)]
19777struct PsfComputationTimings {
19778    grid: Duration,
19779    fft: Duration,
19780    normalize: Duration,
19781}
19782
19783#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, Default)]
19784struct ResidualComputationTimings {
19785    model_fft: Duration,
19786    degrid_grid: Duration,
19787    fft: Duration,
19788    normalize: Duration,
19789}
19790
19791fn fill_mtmfs_taylor_weights(
19792    weights: &mut Vec<f32>,
19793    frequency_hz: f64,
19794    reffreq_hz: f64,
19795    count: usize,
19796) {
19797    weights.clear();
19798    let scaled = ((frequency_hz - reffreq_hz) / reffreq_hz) as f32;
19799    let mut value = 1.0f32;
19800    for _ in 0..count {
19801        weights.push(value);
19802        value *= scaled;
19803    }
19804}
19805
19806fn mtmfs_worker_threads(work_items: usize) -> usize {
19807    if work_items <= 1 {
19808        return 1;
19809    }
19810    if !(standard_mfs_fixed_tile_backend_enabled() || standard_mfs_metal_backend_enabled()) {
19811        return 1;
19812    }
19813    standard_mfs_grid_threads().min(work_items).max(1)
19814}
19815
19816#[allow(clippy::needless_range_loop)]
19817fn compute_mtmfs_psf_terms(
19818    request: &MtmfsRequest,
19819    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
19820    gridder: &StandardGridder,
19821    acceleration_backend: &MtmfsAccelerationBackend<'_>,
19822    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
19823) -> Result<MtmfsPsfState, ImagingError> {
19824    let _ = acceleration_backend;
19825    if request.w_term_mode == WTermMode::WProject {
19826        return compute_mtmfs_psf_terms_w_project(request, batches, gridder, stage_timings);
19827    }
19828    let term_count = 2 * request.nterms - 1;
19829    let mut timings = PsfComputationTimings::default();
19830
19831    let grid_started = Instant::now();
19832    let worker_threads = mtmfs_worker_threads(batches.len());
19833    let accumulation = if cfg!(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))
19834        && standard_mfs_mtmfs_metal_backend_enabled()
19835    {
19836        #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
19837        {
19838            let executor = acceleration_backend.metal().ok_or_else(|| {
19839                ImagingError::Unsupported(
19840                    "MTMFS Metal backend was selected but no Metal executor was prepared"
19841                        .to_string(),
19842                )
19843            })?;
19844            let cache = acceleration_backend.metal_input_cache().ok_or_else(|| {
19845                ImagingError::Unsupported(
19846                    "MTMFS Metal backend was selected but no input cache was prepared".to_string(),
19847                )
19848            })?;
19849            let metal = executor.accumulate_mtmfs_psf_grids_from_cache(cache, term_count)?;
19850            MtmfsPsfGridAccumulation {
19851                psf_grids: metal.psf_grids,
19852                normalization_sumwt: metal.normalization_sumwt,
19853                reported_sumwt_terms: metal.reported_sumwt_terms,
19854                gridded_samples: metal.gridded_samples,
19855                skipped_samples: metal.skipped_samples,
19856            }
19857        }
19858        #[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
19859        {
19860            return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
19861                "MTMFS Metal backend requires macOS Metal and is not available on this platform"
19862                    .to_string(),
19863            ));
19864        }
19865    } else if worker_threads > 1 {
19866        accumulate_mtmfs_psf_grids_parallel(request, batches, gridder, term_count, worker_threads)?
19867    } else {
19868        accumulate_mtmfs_psf_grid_range(request, batches, gridder, term_count, 0, batches.len())?
19869    };
19870    let MtmfsPsfGridAccumulation {
19871        psf_grids,
19872        normalization_sumwt,
19873        reported_sumwt_terms,
19874        gridded_samples,
19875        skipped_samples,
19876    } = accumulation;
19877    timings.grid = grid_started.elapsed();
19878
19879    if normalization_sumwt <= 0.0
19880        || !reported_sumwt_terms[0].is_finite()
19881        || reported_sumwt_terms[0] <= 0.0
19882    {
19883        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
19884    }
19885
19886    let fft_started = Instant::now();
19887    let raw_terms = psf_grids.iter().map(centered_ifft2).collect::<Vec<_>>();
19888    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
19889    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
19890    let mut psf_terms = raw_terms
19891        .iter()
19892        .map(|raw| {
19893            let mut corrected = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid(raw);
19894            corrected.mapv_inplace(|value| value / normalization_sumwt as f32);
19895            corrected
19896        })
19897        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
19898    let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&psf_terms[0]);
19899    if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
19900        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
19901            "MTMFS PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
19902        ));
19903    }
19904    for psf_term in &mut psf_terms {
19905        psf_term.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
19906    }
19907    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
19908    stage_timings.psf_grid += timings.grid;
19909    stage_timings.psf_fft += timings.fft;
19910    stage_timings.psf_normalize += timings.normalize;
19911
19912    Ok(MtmfsPsfState {
19913        psf_terms,
19914        normalization_sumwt: normalization_sumwt as f32,
19915        reported_sumwt_terms: reported_sumwt_terms
19916            .into_iter()
19917            .map(|value| value as f32)
19918            .collect(),
19919        psf_peak,
19920        gridded_samples,
19921        skipped_samples,
19922    })
19923}
19924
19925fn accumulate_mtmfs_psf_grids_parallel(
19926    request: &MtmfsRequest,
19927    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
19928    gridder: &StandardGridder,
19929    term_count: usize,
19930    worker_threads: usize,
19931) -> Result<MtmfsPsfGridAccumulation, ImagingError> {
19932    let chunk_size = batches.len().div_ceil(worker_threads);
19933    let partials = thread::scope(|scope| {
19934        let mut handles = Vec::new();
19935        for start in (0..batches.len()).step_by(chunk_size) {
19936            let end = (start + chunk_size).min(batches.len());
19937            handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
19938                accumulate_mtmfs_psf_grid_range(request, batches, gridder, term_count, start, end)
19939            }));
19940        }
19941        handles
19942            .into_iter()
19943            .map(|handle| {
19944                handle.join().map_err(|_| {
19945                    ImagingError::InvalidRequest("MTMFS PSF worker thread panicked".to_string())
19946                })?
19947            })
19948            .collect::<Result<Vec<_>, _>>()
19949    })?;
19950    merge_mtmfs_psf_accumulations(partials, term_count, gridder.grid_shape())
19951}
19952
19953fn accumulate_mtmfs_psf_grid_range(
19954    request: &MtmfsRequest,
19955    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
19956    gridder: &StandardGridder,
19957    term_count: usize,
19958    start_batch: usize,
19959    end_batch: usize,
19960) -> Result<MtmfsPsfGridAccumulation, ImagingError> {
19961    let [nx, ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
19962    let mut psf_grids = (0..term_count)
19963        .map(|_| Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((nx, ny)))
19964        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
19965    let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
19966    let mut reported_sumwt_terms = vec![0.0f64; term_count];
19967    let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
19968    let mut skipped_samples = 0usize;
19969    let mut taylor_weights = Vec::<f32>::with_capacity(term_count);
19970
19971    for (batch_index, batch) in batches.iter().enumerate().take(end_batch).skip(start_batch) {
19972        let frequencies_hz = request
19973            .sample_frequency_batches_hz
19974            .get(batch_index)
19975            .ok_or_else(|| {
19976                ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
19977                    "missing MTMFS sample-frequency batch for visibility batch {batch_index}"
19978                ))
19979            })?;
19980        for (index, &frequency_hz) in frequencies_hz.iter().enumerate().take(batch.len()) {
19981            if !batch.gridable[index] {
19982                skipped_samples += 1;
19983                continue;
19984            }
19985            let weight = batch.weight[index];
19986            let sumwt_factor = batch.sumwt_factor[index];
19987            if !(weight.is_finite()
19988                && weight > 0.0
19989                && sumwt_factor.is_finite()
19990                && sumwt_factor > 0.0
19991                && frequency_hz.is_finite()
19992                && frequency_hz > 0.0)
19993            {
19994                skipped_samples += 1;
19995                continue;
19996            }
19997            let Some(plan) = gridder.plan_sample(batch.u_lambda[index], batch.v_lambda[index])
19998            else {
19999                skipped_samples += 1;
20000                continue;
20001            };
20002            let scaled = ((frequency_hz - request.reffreq_hz) / request.reffreq_hz) as f32;
20003            normalization_sumwt += 2.0 * f64::from(weight);
20004            if term_count == 3 {
20005                for (order, factor) in [1.0, scaled, scaled * scaled].into_iter().enumerate() {
20006                    let psf_weight = Complex32::new(weight * factor, 0.0);
20007                    gridder.grid_sample_product_planned(
20008                        &mut psf_grids[order],
20009                        &plan.positive,
20010                        psf_weight,
20011                    );
20012                    gridder.grid_sample_product_planned(
20013                        &mut psf_grids[order],
20014                        &plan.negative,
20015                        psf_weight,
20016                    );
20017                    reported_sumwt_terms[order] +=
20018                        f64::from(weight) * f64::from(factor) * f64::from(sumwt_factor);
20019                }
20020            } else {
20021                fill_mtmfs_taylor_weights(
20022                    &mut taylor_weights,
20023                    frequency_hz,
20024                    request.reffreq_hz,
20025                    term_count,
20026                );
20027                for (order, &factor) in taylor_weights.iter().enumerate() {
20028                    let psf_weight = Complex32::new(weight * factor, 0.0);
20029                    gridder.grid_sample_product_planned(
20030                        &mut psf_grids[order],
20031                        &plan.positive,
20032                        psf_weight,
20033                    );
20034                    gridder.grid_sample_product_planned(
20035                        &mut psf_grids[order],
20036                        &plan.negative,
20037                        psf_weight,
20038                    );
20039                    reported_sumwt_terms[order] +=
20040                        f64::from(weight) * f64::from(factor) * f64::from(sumwt_factor);
20041                }
20042            }
20043            gridded_samples += 1;
20044        }
20045    }
20046
20047    Ok(MtmfsPsfGridAccumulation {
20048        psf_grids,
20049        normalization_sumwt,
20050        reported_sumwt_terms,
20051        gridded_samples,
20052        skipped_samples,
20053    })
20054}
20055
20056fn merge_mtmfs_psf_accumulations(
20057    partials: Vec<MtmfsPsfGridAccumulation>,
20058    term_count: usize,
20059    [nx, ny]: [usize; 2],
20060) -> Result<MtmfsPsfGridAccumulation, ImagingError> {
20061    let mut merged = MtmfsPsfGridAccumulation {
20062        psf_grids: (0..term_count)
20063            .map(|_| Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((nx, ny)))
20064            .collect(),
20065        normalization_sumwt: 0.0,
20066        reported_sumwt_terms: vec![0.0; term_count],
20067        gridded_samples: 0,
20068        skipped_samples: 0,
20069    };
20070    for partial in partials {
20071        if partial.psf_grids.len() != term_count || partial.reported_sumwt_terms.len() != term_count
20072        {
20073            return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
20074                "MTMFS PSF worker returned an unexpected Taylor-term count".to_string(),
20075            ));
20076        }
20077        for (target, source) in merged.psf_grids.iter_mut().zip(partial.psf_grids.iter()) {
20078            *target += source;
20079        }
20080        for (target, source) in merged
20081            .reported_sumwt_terms
20082            .iter_mut()
20083            .zip(partial.reported_sumwt_terms.iter())
20084        {
20085            *target += *source;
20086        }
20087        merged.normalization_sumwt += partial.normalization_sumwt;
20088        merged.gridded_samples += partial.gridded_samples;
20089        merged.skipped_samples += partial.skipped_samples;
20090    }
20091    Ok(merged)
20092}
20093
20094#[allow(clippy::needless_range_loop)]
20095fn compute_mtmfs_psf_terms_w_project(
20096    request: &MtmfsRequest,
20097    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
20098    gridder: &StandardGridder,
20099    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
20100) -> Result<MtmfsPsfState, ImagingError> {
20101    let prepare_started = Instant::now();
20102    let prepared =
20103        prepare_w_project_data(request.geometry, batches, gridder, request.w_project_planes)?;
20104    let mut timings = PsfComputationTimings {
20105        grid: prepare_started.elapsed(),
20106        ..PsfComputationTimings::default()
20107    };
20108    let term_count = 2 * request.nterms - 1;
20109    let [nx, ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
20110    let mut psf_grids = (0..term_count)
20111        .map(|_| Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((nx, ny)))
20112        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
20113    let mut reported_sumwt_terms = vec![0.0f64; term_count];
20114    let mut taylor_weights = Vec::<f32>::with_capacity(term_count);
20115
20116    let grid_started = Instant::now();
20117    for sample in &prepared.samples {
20118        let frequency_hz =
20119            mtmfs_sample_frequency(request, sample.batch_index, sample.sample_index)?;
20120        fill_mtmfs_taylor_weights(
20121            &mut taylor_weights,
20122            frequency_hz,
20123            request.reffreq_hz,
20124            term_count,
20125        );
20126        for (order, &factor) in taylor_weights.iter().enumerate().take(term_count) {
20127            let psf_weight = Complex32::new(sample.weight * factor, 0.0);
20128            prepared.projector.grid_sample_planned(
20129                &mut psf_grids[order],
20130                &sample.positive_plan,
20131                psf_weight,
20132            );
20133            reported_sumwt_terms[order] +=
20134                f64::from(sample.weight) * f64::from(factor) * f64::from(sample.sumwt_factor);
20135        }
20136    }
20137    timings.grid += grid_started.elapsed();
20138
20139    if prepared.normalization_sumwt <= 0.0
20140        || !reported_sumwt_terms[0].is_finite()
20141        || reported_sumwt_terms[0] <= 0.0
20142    {
20143        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
20144    }
20145
20146    let fft_started = Instant::now();
20147    let raw_terms = psf_grids.iter().map(centered_ifft2).collect::<Vec<_>>();
20148    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
20149    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
20150    let mut psf_terms = raw_terms
20151        .iter()
20152        .map(|raw| {
20153            let mut corrected =
20154                gridder.corrected_w_project_image_from_grid(raw, prepared.projector.sampling());
20155            corrected.mapv_inplace(|value| 2.0 * value / prepared.normalization_sumwt);
20156            corrected
20157        })
20158        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
20159    let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&psf_terms[0]);
20160    if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
20161        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
20162            "MTMFS W-projection PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
20163        ));
20164    }
20165    for psf_term in &mut psf_terms {
20166        psf_term.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
20167    }
20168    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
20169    stage_timings.psf_grid += timings.grid;
20170    stage_timings.psf_fft += timings.fft;
20171    stage_timings.psf_normalize += timings.normalize;
20172
20173    Ok(MtmfsPsfState {
20174        psf_terms,
20175        normalization_sumwt: prepared.normalization_sumwt,
20176        reported_sumwt_terms: reported_sumwt_terms
20177            .into_iter()
20178            .map(|value| value as f32)
20179            .collect(),
20180        psf_peak,
20181        gridded_samples: prepared.gridded_samples,
20182        skipped_samples: prepared.skipped_samples.len(),
20183    })
20184}
20185
20186#[allow(clippy::needless_range_loop)]
20187fn compute_mtmfs_residual_terms(
20188    request: &MtmfsRequest,
20189    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
20190    gridder: &StandardGridder,
20191    acceleration_backend: &MtmfsAccelerationBackend<'_>,
20192    model_terms: &[Array2<f32>],
20193    psf_state: &MtmfsPsfState,
20194    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
20195) -> Result<Vec<Array2<f32>>, ImagingError> {
20196    let _ = acceleration_backend;
20197    if request.w_term_mode == WTermMode::WProject {
20198        return compute_mtmfs_residual_terms_w_project(
20199            request,
20200            batches,
20201            gridder,
20202            model_terms,
20203            psf_state,
20204            stage_timings,
20205        );
20206    }
20207    let mut timings = ResidualComputationTimings::default();
20208    let model_grids = if model_terms
20209        .iter()
20210        .any(|term| term.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0))
20211    {
20212        let model_fft_started = Instant::now();
20213        let grids = model_terms
20214            .iter()
20215            .map(|model_term| centered_fft2(&gridder.apodize_model(model_term)))
20216            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
20217        timings.model_fft = model_fft_started.elapsed();
20218        Some(grids)
20219    } else {
20220        None
20221    };
20222
20223    let degrid_grid_started = Instant::now();
20224    let worker_threads = mtmfs_worker_threads(batches.len());
20225    let residual_grids = if cfg!(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))
20226        && standard_mfs_mtmfs_metal_backend_enabled()
20227    {
20228        #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
20229        {
20230            let executor = acceleration_backend.metal().ok_or_else(|| {
20231                ImagingError::Unsupported(
20232                    "MTMFS Metal backend was selected but no Metal executor was prepared"
20233                        .to_string(),
20234                )
20235            })?;
20236            let cache = acceleration_backend.metal_input_cache().ok_or_else(|| {
20237                ImagingError::Unsupported(
20238                    "MTMFS Metal backend was selected but no input cache was prepared".to_string(),
20239                )
20240            })?;
20241            executor
20242                .accumulate_mtmfs_residual_grids_from_cache(
20243                    cache,
20244                    request.nterms,
20245                    model_grids.as_deref(),
20246                )?
20247                .residual_grids
20248        }
20249        #[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
20250        {
20251            return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
20252                "MTMFS Metal backend requires macOS Metal and is not available on this platform"
20253                    .to_string(),
20254            ));
20255        }
20256    } else if worker_threads > 1 {
20257        accumulate_mtmfs_residual_grids_parallel(
20258            request,
20259            batches,
20260            gridder,
20261            model_grids.as_deref(),
20262            worker_threads,
20263        )?
20264        .residual_grids
20265    } else {
20266        accumulate_mtmfs_residual_grid_range(
20267            request,
20268            batches,
20269            gridder,
20270            model_grids.as_deref(),
20271            0,
20272            batches.len(),
20273        )?
20274        .residual_grids
20275    };
20276    timings.degrid_grid = degrid_grid_started.elapsed();
20277
20278    let fft_started = Instant::now();
20279    let raw_terms = residual_grids
20280        .iter()
20281        .map(centered_ifft2)
20282        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
20283    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
20284    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
20285    let residual_terms = raw_terms
20286        .iter()
20287        .map(|raw| {
20288            let mut image = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid(raw);
20289            image.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_state.normalization_sumwt / psf_state.psf_peak);
20290            image
20291        })
20292        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
20293    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
20294    stage_timings.model_fft += timings.model_fft;
20295    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += timings.degrid_grid;
20296    stage_timings.residual_fft += timings.fft;
20297    stage_timings.residual_normalize += timings.normalize;
20298    Ok(residual_terms)
20299}
20300
20301#[allow(clippy::needless_range_loop)]
20302fn compute_mtmfs_residual_terms_w_project(
20303    request: &MtmfsRequest,
20304    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
20305    gridder: &StandardGridder,
20306    model_terms: &[Array2<f32>],
20307    psf_state: &MtmfsPsfState,
20308    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
20309) -> Result<Vec<Array2<f32>>, ImagingError> {
20310    let prepare_started = Instant::now();
20311    let prepared =
20312        prepare_w_project_data(request.geometry, batches, gridder, request.w_project_planes)?;
20313    let mut timings = ResidualComputationTimings {
20314        degrid_grid: prepare_started.elapsed(),
20315        ..ResidualComputationTimings::default()
20316    };
20317    let [nx, ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
20318    let mut residual_grids = (0..request.nterms)
20319        .map(|_| Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((nx, ny)))
20320        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
20321    let model_grids = if model_terms
20322        .iter()
20323        .any(|term| term.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0))
20324    {
20325        let model_fft_started = Instant::now();
20326        let grids = model_terms
20327            .iter()
20328            .map(|model_term| {
20329                centered_fft2(
20330                    &gridder.apodize_w_project_model(model_term, prepared.projector.sampling()),
20331                )
20332            })
20333            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
20334        timings.model_fft = model_fft_started.elapsed();
20335        Some(grids)
20336    } else {
20337        None
20338    };
20339
20340    let degrid_started = Instant::now();
20341    let mut taylor_weights = Vec::<f32>::with_capacity(2 * request.nterms);
20342    let mut predicted_visibility_terms = Vec::<Complex32>::with_capacity(request.nterms);
20343    for sample in &prepared.samples {
20344        let frequency_hz =
20345            mtmfs_sample_frequency(request, sample.batch_index, sample.sample_index)?;
20346        fill_mtmfs_taylor_weights(
20347            &mut taylor_weights,
20348            frequency_hz,
20349            request.reffreq_hz,
20350            2 * request.nterms,
20351        );
20352        predicted_visibility_terms.clear();
20353        if let Some(model_grids) = model_grids.as_ref() {
20354            for grid in model_grids.iter().take(request.nterms) {
20355                predicted_visibility_terms.push(
20356                    prepared
20357                        .projector
20358                        .degrid_sample_planned(grid, &sample.positive_plan),
20359                );
20360            }
20361        }
20362        for (residual_order, residual_grid) in
20363            residual_grids.iter_mut().enumerate().take(request.nterms)
20364        {
20365            let observed_term = sample.visibility * taylor_weights[residual_order];
20366            let mut predicted_term = Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0);
20367            if model_grids.is_some() {
20368                for (model_order, predicted_visibility) in predicted_visibility_terms
20369                    .iter()
20370                    .enumerate()
20371                    .take(request.nterms)
20372                {
20373                    predicted_term +=
20374                        *predicted_visibility * taylor_weights[residual_order + model_order];
20375                }
20376            }
20377            let residual = (observed_term - predicted_term) * sample.weight;
20378            prepared
20379                .projector
20380                .grid_sample_planned(residual_grid, &sample.positive_plan, residual);
20381        }
20382    }
20383    timings.degrid_grid += degrid_started.elapsed();
20384
20385    let fft_started = Instant::now();
20386    let raw_terms = residual_grids
20387        .iter()
20388        .map(centered_ifft2)
20389        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
20390    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
20391    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
20392    let residual_terms = raw_terms
20393        .iter()
20394        .map(|raw| {
20395            let mut image =
20396                gridder.corrected_w_project_image_from_grid(raw, prepared.projector.sampling());
20397            image.mapv_inplace(|value| {
20398                2.0 * value / psf_state.normalization_sumwt / psf_state.psf_peak
20399            });
20400            image
20401        })
20402        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
20403    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
20404    stage_timings.model_fft += timings.model_fft;
20405    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += timings.degrid_grid;
20406    stage_timings.residual_fft += timings.fft;
20407    stage_timings.residual_normalize += timings.normalize;
20408    Ok(residual_terms)
20409}
20410
20411fn accumulate_mtmfs_residual_grids_parallel(
20412    request: &MtmfsRequest,
20413    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
20414    gridder: &StandardGridder,
20415    model_grids: Option<&[Array2<Complex32>]>,
20416    worker_threads: usize,
20417) -> Result<MtmfsResidualGridAccumulation, ImagingError> {
20418    let chunk_size = batches.len().div_ceil(worker_threads);
20419    let partials = thread::scope(|scope| {
20420        let mut handles = Vec::new();
20421        for start in (0..batches.len()).step_by(chunk_size) {
20422            let end = (start + chunk_size).min(batches.len());
20423            handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
20424                accumulate_mtmfs_residual_grid_range(
20425                    request,
20426                    batches,
20427                    gridder,
20428                    model_grids,
20429                    start,
20430                    end,
20431                )
20432            }));
20433        }
20434        handles
20435            .into_iter()
20436            .map(|handle| {
20437                handle.join().map_err(|_| {
20438                    ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
20439                        "MTMFS residual worker thread panicked".to_string(),
20440                    )
20441                })?
20442            })
20443            .collect::<Result<Vec<_>, _>>()
20444    })?;
20445    merge_mtmfs_residual_accumulations(partials, request.nterms, gridder.grid_shape())
20446}
20447
20448fn accumulate_mtmfs_residual_grid_range(
20449    request: &MtmfsRequest,
20450    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
20451    gridder: &StandardGridder,
20452    model_grids: Option<&[Array2<Complex32>]>,
20453    start_batch: usize,
20454    end_batch: usize,
20455) -> Result<MtmfsResidualGridAccumulation, ImagingError> {
20456    let [nx, ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
20457    let mut residual_grids = (0..request.nterms)
20458        .map(|_| Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((nx, ny)))
20459        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
20460    let mut taylor_weights = Vec::<f32>::with_capacity(2 * request.nterms);
20461    let mut predicted_visibility_terms = Vec::<Complex32>::with_capacity(request.nterms);
20462
20463    for (batch_index, batch) in batches.iter().enumerate().take(end_batch).skip(start_batch) {
20464        let frequencies_hz = request
20465            .sample_frequency_batches_hz
20466            .get(batch_index)
20467            .ok_or_else(|| {
20468                ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
20469                    "missing MTMFS sample-frequency batch for visibility batch {batch_index}"
20470                ))
20471            })?;
20472        for (index, &frequency_hz) in frequencies_hz.iter().enumerate().take(batch.len()) {
20473            let weight = batch.weight[index];
20474            let observed_visibility = batch.visibility[index];
20475            let gridable = batch.gridable[index];
20476            let planned_sample = if gridable
20477                && weight.is_finite()
20478                && weight > 0.0
20479                && observed_visibility.re.is_finite()
20480                && observed_visibility.im.is_finite()
20481                && frequency_hz.is_finite()
20482                && frequency_hz > 0.0
20483            {
20484                gridder.plan_sample(batch.u_lambda[index], batch.v_lambda[index])
20485            } else {
20486                None
20487            };
20488            let Some(plan) = planned_sample.as_ref() else {
20489                continue;
20490            };
20491            if request.nterms == 2 {
20492                let scaled = ((frequency_hz - request.reffreq_hz) / request.reffreq_hz) as f32;
20493                let taylor0 = 1.0f32;
20494                let taylor1 = scaled;
20495                let taylor2 = scaled * scaled;
20496                let (predicted0, predicted1) = if let Some(model_grids) = model_grids {
20497                    (
20498                        gridder.degrid_sample_product_planned_normalized(
20499                            &model_grids[0],
20500                            &plan.positive,
20501                        ),
20502                        gridder.degrid_sample_product_planned_normalized(
20503                            &model_grids[1],
20504                            &plan.positive,
20505                        ),
20506                    )
20507                } else {
20508                    (Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0), Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0))
20509                };
20510                let residual0 =
20511                    observed_visibility * taylor0 - (predicted0 * taylor0 + predicted1 * taylor1);
20512                let residual1 =
20513                    observed_visibility * taylor1 - (predicted0 * taylor1 + predicted1 * taylor2);
20514                let residual0 = residual0 * weight;
20515                let residual1 = residual1 * weight;
20516                gridder.grid_sample_product_planned(
20517                    &mut residual_grids[0],
20518                    &plan.positive,
20519                    residual0,
20520                );
20521                gridder.grid_sample_product_planned(
20522                    &mut residual_grids[0],
20523                    &plan.negative,
20524                    residual0.conj(),
20525                );
20526                gridder.grid_sample_product_planned(
20527                    &mut residual_grids[1],
20528                    &plan.positive,
20529                    residual1,
20530                );
20531                gridder.grid_sample_product_planned(
20532                    &mut residual_grids[1],
20533                    &plan.negative,
20534                    residual1.conj(),
20535                );
20536                continue;
20537            }
20538            fill_mtmfs_taylor_weights(
20539                &mut taylor_weights,
20540                frequency_hz,
20541                request.reffreq_hz,
20542                2 * request.nterms,
20543            );
20544            predicted_visibility_terms.clear();
20545            if let Some(model_grids) = model_grids {
20546                for grid in model_grids.iter().take(request.nterms) {
20547                    predicted_visibility_terms.push(
20548                        gridder.degrid_sample_product_planned_normalized(grid, &plan.positive),
20549                    );
20550                }
20551            }
20552            for (residual_order, residual_grid) in
20553                residual_grids.iter_mut().enumerate().take(request.nterms)
20554            {
20555                let observed_term = observed_visibility * taylor_weights[residual_order];
20556                let mut predicted_term = Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0);
20557                if model_grids.is_some() {
20558                    for (model_order, predicted_visibility) in predicted_visibility_terms
20559                        .iter()
20560                        .enumerate()
20561                        .take(request.nterms)
20562                    {
20563                        predicted_term +=
20564                            *predicted_visibility * taylor_weights[residual_order + model_order];
20565                    }
20566                }
20567                let residual_visibility = observed_term - predicted_term;
20568                let residual = residual_visibility * weight;
20569                gridder.grid_sample_product_planned(residual_grid, &plan.positive, residual);
20570                gridder.grid_sample_product_planned(residual_grid, &plan.negative, residual.conj());
