20571            }
20572        }
20573    }
20574
20575    Ok(MtmfsResidualGridAccumulation { residual_grids })
20576}
20577
20578fn merge_mtmfs_residual_accumulations(
20579    partials: Vec<MtmfsResidualGridAccumulation>,
20580    term_count: usize,
20581    [nx, ny]: [usize; 2],
20582) -> Result<MtmfsResidualGridAccumulation, ImagingError> {
20583    let mut merged = MtmfsResidualGridAccumulation {
20584        residual_grids: (0..term_count)
20585            .map(|_| Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((nx, ny)))
20586            .collect(),
20587    };
20588    for partial in partials {
20589        if partial.residual_grids.len() != term_count {
20590            return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
20591                "MTMFS residual worker returned an unexpected Taylor-term count".to_string(),
20592            ));
20593        }
20594        for (target, source) in merged
20595            .residual_grids
20596            .iter_mut()
20597            .zip(partial.residual_grids.iter())
20598        {
20599            *target += source;
20600        }
20601    }
20602    Ok(merged)
20603}
20604
20605fn mtmfs_sample_frequency(
20606    request: &MtmfsRequest,
20607    batch_index: usize,
20608    sample_index: usize,
20609) -> Result<f64, ImagingError> {
20610    let frequency_hz = request
20611        .sample_frequency_batches_hz
20612        .get(batch_index)
20613        .and_then(|batch| batch.get(sample_index))
20614        .copied()
20615        .ok_or_else(|| {
20616            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
20617                "missing MTMFS sample frequency for batch {batch_index} sample {sample_index}"
20618            ))
20619        })?;
20620    if !(frequency_hz.is_finite() && frequency_hz > 0.0) {
20621        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
20622            "MTMFS sample frequency for batch {batch_index} sample {sample_index} must be finite and > 0 Hz"
20623        )));
20624    }
20625    Ok(frequency_hz)
20626}
20627
20628fn mtmfs_hessian(psf_terms: &[Array2<f32>], nterms: usize) -> Result<Vec<Vec<f32>>, ImagingError> {
20629    if psf_terms.len() < 2 * nterms - 1 {
20630        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
20631            "MTMFS PSF stack length {} is smaller than required {}",
20632            psf_terms.len(),
20633            2 * nterms - 1
20634        )));
20635    }
20636    let center = (psf_terms[0].dim().0 / 2, psf_terms[0].dim().1 / 2);
20637    Ok((0..nterms)
20638        .map(|row| {
20639            (0..nterms)
20640                .map(|col| psf_terms[row + col][center])
20641                .collect::<Vec<_>>()
20642        })
20643        .collect())
20644}
20645
20646#[allow(clippy::needless_range_loop)]
20647fn invert_small_matrix(matrix: &[Vec<f32>]) -> Result<Vec<Vec<f32>>, ImagingError> {
20648    let n = matrix.len();
20649    if n == 0 || matrix.iter().any(|row| row.len() != n) {
20650        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
20651            "MTMFS Hessian must be a non-empty square matrix".to_string(),
20652        ));
20653    }
20654    let mut augmented = vec![vec![0.0f64; 2 * n]; n];
20655    for row in 0..n {
20656        for col in 0..n {
20657            augmented[row][col] = matrix[row][col] as f64;
20658        }
20659        augmented[row][n + row] = 1.0;
20660    }
20661    for pivot in 0..n {
20662        let mut best_row = pivot;
20663        let mut best_value = augmented[pivot][pivot].abs();
20664        for row in (pivot + 1)..n {
20665            let value = augmented[row][pivot].abs();
20666            if value > best_value {
20667                best_value = value;
20668                best_row = row;
20669            }
20670        }
20671        if !(best_value.is_finite() && best_value > 0.0) {
20672            return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
20673                "MTMFS Hessian is singular at the image center".to_string(),
20674            ));
20675        }
20676        if best_row != pivot {
20677            augmented.swap(best_row, pivot);
20678        }
20679        let pivot_value = augmented[pivot][pivot];
20680        for col in 0..(2 * n) {
20681            augmented[pivot][col] /= pivot_value;
20682        }
20683        for row in 0..n {
20684            if row == pivot {
20685                continue;
20686            }
20687            let factor = augmented[row][pivot];
20688            if factor == 0.0 {
20689                continue;
20690            }
20691            for col in 0..(2 * n) {
20692                augmented[row][col] -= factor * augmented[pivot][col];
20693            }
20694        }
20695    }
20696    Ok((0..n)
20697        .map(|row| {
20698            (0..n)
20699                .map(|col| augmented[row][n + col] as f32)
20700                .collect::<Vec<_>>()
20701        })
20702        .collect())
20703}
20704
20705fn solve_mtmfs_coefficients(rhs: &[f32], inv_hessian: &[Vec<f32>]) -> Vec<f32> {
20706    inv_hessian
20707        .iter()
20708        .map(|row| {
20709            row.iter()
20710                .zip(rhs.iter())
20711                .map(|(left, right)| *left * *right)
20712                .sum()
20713        })
20714        .collect()
20715}
20716
20717fn principal_solution_terms(
20718    residual_terms: &[Array2<f32>],
20719    inv_hessian: &[Vec<f32>],
20720) -> Vec<Array2<f32>> {
20721    let nterms = residual_terms.len();
20722    let shape = residual_terms[0].raw_dim();
20723    let mut principal_terms = (0..nterms)
20724        .map(|_| Array2::<f32>::zeros(shape))
20725        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
20726    for x in 0..shape[0] {
20727        for y in 0..shape[1] {
20728            let rhs = residual_terms
20729                .iter()
20730                .map(|term| term[(x, y)])
20731                .collect::<Vec<_>>();
20732            let coeffs = solve_mtmfs_coefficients(&rhs, inv_hessian);
20733            for (term, coeff) in coeffs.into_iter().enumerate() {
20734                principal_terms[term][(x, y)] = coeff;
20735            }
20736        }
20737    }
20738    principal_terms
20739}
20740
20741fn find_mtmfs_component(
20742    residual_terms: &[Array2<f32>],
20743    hessian: &[Vec<f32>],
20744    inv_hessian: &[Vec<f32>],
20745    clean_mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
20746) -> Option<((usize, usize), Vec<f32>, f32)> {
20747    let (nx, ny) = residual_terms.first()?.dim();
20748    let worker_threads = mtmfs_worker_threads(nx);
20749    if worker_threads <= 1 {
20750        return find_mtmfs_component_range(
20751            residual_terms,
20752            hessian,
20753            inv_hessian,
20754            clean_mask,
20755            0,
20756            nx,
20757            ny,
20758        );
20759    }
20760    let chunk_size = nx.div_ceil(worker_threads);
20761    thread::scope(|scope| {
20762        let mut handles = Vec::new();
20763        for start_x in (0..nx).step_by(chunk_size) {
20764            let end_x = (start_x + chunk_size).min(nx);
20765            handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
20766                find_mtmfs_component_range(
20767                    residual_terms,
20768                    hessian,
20769                    inv_hessian,
20770                    clean_mask,
20771                    start_x,
20772                    end_x,
20773                    ny,
20774                )
20775            }));
20776        }
20777        handles
20778            .into_iter()
20779            .filter_map(|handle| handle.join().ok().flatten())
20780            .max_by(|left, right| left.2.total_cmp(&right.2))
20781    })
20782}
20783
20784fn find_mtmfs_component_range(
20785    residual_terms: &[Array2<f32>],
20786    hessian: &[Vec<f32>],
20787    inv_hessian: &[Vec<f32>],
20788    clean_mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
20789    start_x: usize,
20790    end_x: usize,
20791    ny: usize,
20792) -> Option<((usize, usize), Vec<f32>, f32)> {
20793    let mut best = None::<((usize, usize), Vec<f32>, f32)>;
20794    let mut best_penalty = -1.0f32;
20795    for x in start_x..end_x {
20796        for y in 0..ny {
20797            if clean_mask.is_some_and(|mask| !mask[(x, y)]) {
20798                continue;
20799            }
20800            let rhs = residual_terms
20801                .iter()
20802                .map(|term| term[(x, y)])
20803                .collect::<Vec<_>>();
20804            let coeffs = solve_mtmfs_coefficients(&rhs, inv_hessian);
20805            let mut penalty = 0.0f32;
20806            for row in 0..coeffs.len() {
20807                penalty += 2.0 * coeffs[row] * rhs[row];
20808                for col in 0..coeffs.len() {
20809                    penalty -= coeffs[row] * coeffs[col] * hessian[row][col];
20810                }
20811            }
20812            let penalty_abs = penalty.abs();
20813            if penalty_abs > best_penalty {
20814                best_penalty = penalty_abs;
20815                best = Some(((x, y), coeffs, penalty_abs));
20816            }
20817        }
20818    }
20819    best
20820}
20821
20822#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
20823fn run_mtmfs_minor_cycle(
20824    request: &MtmfsRequest,
20825    psf_terms: &[Array2<f32>],
20826    hessian: &[Vec<f32>],
20827    inv_hessian: &[Vec<f32>],
20828    model_terms: &mut [Array2<f32>],
20829    residual_terms: &mut [Array2<f32>],
20830    cycle_reported_niter: usize,
20831    cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
20832    nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
20833    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
20834) -> (HogbomMinorCycleOutcome, MinorCycleProbe) {
20835    if !request.multiscale_scales.is_empty() {
20836        return run_mtmfs_multiscale_minor_cycle(
20837            request,
20838            psf_terms,
20839            hessian,
20840            inv_hessian,
20841            model_terms,
20842            residual_terms,
20843            cycle_reported_niter,
20844            cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
20845            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
20846            stage_timings,
20847        );
20848    }
20849    let cycle_component_budget = hogbom_component_budget(cycle_reported_niter, request.clean);
20850    let mut cycle_component_updates = 0usize;
20851    let mut updated_model = false;
20852    let mut stop_reason = None;
20853    let mut probe = MinorCycleProbe::default();
20854    let minor_started = Instant::now();
20855    while cycle_component_updates < cycle_component_budget {
20856        let peak_abs = peak_abs_value_masked(&residual_terms[0], request.clean_mask.as_ref());
20857        if let Some(reason) = minor_cycle_stop_reason(
20858            peak_abs,
20859            request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
20860            cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
20861            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
20862        ) {
20863            stop_reason = Some(reason);
20864            break;
20865        }
20866        let Some(((peak_x, peak_y), coeffs, candidate_strength)) = find_mtmfs_component(
20867            residual_terms,
20868            hessian,
20869            inv_hessian,
20870            request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
20871        ) else {
20872            stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels);
20873            break;
20874        };
20875        if cycle_component_updates == 0 {
20876            probe = MinorCycleProbe {
20877                initial_scale_pixels: Some(0.0),
20878                initial_candidate_strength_jy_per_beam: Some(candidate_strength),
20879                initial_candidate_position: Some([peak_x, peak_y]),
20880            };
20881        }
20882        for (term_index, coefficient) in coeffs.iter().enumerate() {
20883            let component = request.clean.gain * *coefficient;
20884            model_terms[term_index][(peak_x, peak_y)] += component;
20885        }
20886        for residual_order in 0..request.nterms {
20887            for model_order in 0..request.nterms {
20888                let component = request.clean.gain * coeffs[model_order];
20889                subtract_shifted_kernel(
20890                    &mut residual_terms[residual_order],
20891                    &psf_terms[residual_order + model_order],
20892                    (peak_x, peak_y),
20893                    component,
20894                );
20895            }
20896        }
20897        cycle_component_updates += 1;
20898        updated_model = true;
20899    }
20900    let minor_elapsed = minor_started.elapsed();
20901    stage_timings.minor_cycle += minor_elapsed;
20902    stage_timings.minor_cycle_solve += minor_elapsed;
20903    (
20904        HogbomMinorCycleOutcome {
20905            updated_model,
20906            actual_updates: cycle_component_updates,
20907            reported_updates: cycle_component_updates.min(cycle_reported_niter),
20908            stop_reason,
20909            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
20910            final_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
20911        },
20912        probe,
20913    )
20914}
20915
20916#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
20917fn run_mtmfs_multiscale_minor_cycle(
20918    request: &MtmfsRequest,
20919    psf_terms: &[Array2<f32>],
20920    _hessian: &[Vec<f32>],
20921    inv_hessian: &[Vec<f32>],
20922    model_terms: &mut [Array2<f32>],
20923    residual_terms: &mut [Array2<f32>],
20924    cycle_reported_niter: usize,
20925    cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
20926    nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
20927    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
20928) -> (HogbomMinorCycleOutcome, MinorCycleProbe) {
20929    let scales = effective_mtmfs_multiscale_scales(request);
20930    let mut principal_terms = principal_solution_terms(residual_terms, inv_hessian);
20931    let mut multiscale_state = build_multiscale_state(
20932        &principal_terms[0],
20933        &psf_terms[0],
20934        &scales,
20935        request.small_scale_bias,
20936        request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
20937    );
20938    let full_window = ImageWindow::full(principal_terms[0].dim());
20939    let Some(first_candidate) =
20940        select_multiscale_candidate(&multiscale_state, request.clean_mask.as_ref(), full_window)
20941    else {
20942        return (
20943            HogbomMinorCycleOutcome {
20944                updated_model: false,
20945                actual_updates: 0,
20946                reported_updates: 0,
20947                stop_reason: Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels),
20948                final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
20949                final_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
20950            },
20951            MinorCycleProbe::default(),
20952        );
20953    };
20954    let probe = MinorCycleProbe {
20955        initial_scale_pixels: Some(scales[first_candidate.scale_index]),
20956        initial_candidate_strength_jy_per_beam: Some(first_candidate.strength.abs()),
20957        initial_candidate_position: Some([first_candidate.position.0, first_candidate.position.1]),
20958    };
20959    let initial_cycle_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(
20960        &multiscale_state.dirty_conv_scales[0],
20961        request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
20962    );
20963    if let Some(reason) = minor_cycle_stop_reason(
20964        initial_cycle_peak,
20965        request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
20966        cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
20967        nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
20968    ) {
20969        return (
20970            HogbomMinorCycleOutcome {
20971                updated_model: false,
20972                actual_updates: 0,
20973                reported_updates: 0,
20974                stop_reason: Some(reason),
20975                final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
20976                final_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
20977            },
20978            probe,
20979        );
20980    }
20981
20982    let cycle_component_budget = hogbom_component_budget(cycle_reported_niter, request.clean);
20983    let psf_scale_terms = build_mtmfs_psf_scale_terms(psf_terms, &multiscale_state.scales);
20984    let mut cycle_component_updates = 0usize;
20985    let mut updated_model = false;
20986    let mut stop_reason = None;
20987    let minor_started = Instant::now();
20988    while cycle_component_updates < cycle_component_budget {
20989        let Some(candidate) = select_multiscale_candidate(
20990            &multiscale_state,
20991            request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
20992            full_window,
20993        ) else {
20994            stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::NoCleanablePixels);
20995            break;
20996        };
20997        let peak_abs = peak_abs_value_masked(
20998            &multiscale_state.dirty_conv_scales[0],
20999            request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
21000        );
21001        if let Some(reason) = minor_cycle_stop_reason(
21002            peak_abs,
21003            request.clean.threshold_jy_per_beam,
21004            cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
21005            nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
21006        ) {
21007            stop_reason = Some(reason);
21008            break;
21009        }
21010        if cycle_component_updates > 0 && peak_abs > initial_cycle_peak * 1.5 {
21011            stop_reason = Some(CleanStopReason::DivergenceDetected);
21012            break;
21013        }
21014
21015        let coeffs = mtmfs_multiscale_coefficients(
21016            residual_terms,
21017            &multiscale_state.scales[candidate.scale_index],
21018            candidate.position,
21019            inv_hessian,
21020        );
21021        for (term_index, coefficient) in coeffs.iter().enumerate().take(request.nterms) {
21022            let component = request.clean.gain * *coefficient;
21023            add_shifted_kernel_with_support(
21024                &mut model_terms[term_index],
21025                &multiscale_state.scales[candidate.scale_index],
21026                multiscale_state.scale_supports[candidate.scale_index],
21027                candidate.position,
21028                component,
21029            );
21030        }
21031        for residual_order in 0..request.nterms {
21032            for model_order in 0..request.nterms {
21033                let component = request.clean.gain * coeffs[model_order];
21034                subtract_shifted_kernel(
21035                    &mut residual_terms[residual_order],
21036                    &psf_scale_terms[residual_order + model_order][candidate.scale_index],
21037                    candidate.position,
21038                    component,
21039                );
21040            }
21041        }
21042        cycle_component_updates += 1;
21043        updated_model = true;
21044        principal_terms = principal_solution_terms(residual_terms, inv_hessian);
21045        refresh_multiscale_dirty_conv_scales(&mut multiscale_state, &principal_terms[0]);
21046    }
21047    let minor_elapsed = minor_started.elapsed();
21048    stage_timings.minor_cycle += minor_elapsed;
21049    stage_timings.minor_cycle_solve += minor_elapsed;
21050    let reported_updates = casa_multiscale_reported_updates(
21051        cycle_component_updates,
21052        cycle_reported_niter,
21053        stop_reason,
21054        updated_model,
21055    );
21056    (
21057        HogbomMinorCycleOutcome {
21058            updated_model,
21059            actual_updates: cycle_component_updates,
21060            reported_updates,
21061            stop_reason,
21062            final_cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam,
21063            final_nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam,
21064        },
21065        probe,
21066    )
21067}
21068
21069fn effective_mtmfs_multiscale_scales(request: &MtmfsRequest) -> Vec<f32> {
21070    if request.multiscale_scales.is_empty() {
21071        vec![0.0]
21072    } else {
21073        request.multiscale_scales.clone()
21074    }
21075}
21076
21077fn build_mtmfs_psf_scale_terms(
21078    psf_terms: &[Array2<f32>],
21079    scale_kernels: &[Array2<f32>],
21080) -> Vec<Vec<Array2<f32>>> {
21081    psf_terms
21082        .iter()
21083        .map(|psf| {
21084            scale_kernels
21085                .iter()
21086                .map(|scale| fft_convolve_real(psf, scale))
21087                .collect::<Vec<_>>()
21088        })
21089        .collect()
21090}
21091
21092fn mtmfs_multiscale_coefficients(
21093    residual_terms: &[Array2<f32>],
21094    scale_kernel: &Array2<f32>,
21095    position: (usize, usize),
21096    inv_hessian: &[Vec<f32>],
21097) -> Vec<f32> {
21098    let rhs = residual_terms
21099        .iter()
21100        .map(|term| fft_convolve_real(term, scale_kernel)[position])
21101        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
21102    solve_mtmfs_coefficients(&rhs, inv_hessian)
21103}
21104
21105fn compute_mtmfs_alpha_products(
21106    image_terms: &[Array2<f32>],
21107    residual_terms: &[Array2<f32>],
21108) -> (Option<Array2<f32>>, Option<Array2<f32>>) {
21109    if image_terms.len() < 2 || residual_terms.len() < 2 {
21110        return (None, None);
21111    }
21112    let tt0 = &image_terms[0];
21113    let tt1 = &image_terms[1];
21114    let residual0 = &residual_terms[0];
21115    let residual1 = &residual_terms[1];
21116    let specthreshold = peak_abs_value(residual0) / 10.0;
21117    let (nx, ny) = tt0.dim();
21118    let mut alpha = Array2::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny));
21119    let mut alpha_error = Array2::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny));
21120    for x in 0..nx {
21121        for y in 0..ny {
21122            let image0 = tt0[(x, y)];
21123            if image0 <= specthreshold {
21124                continue;
21125            }
21126            let image1 = tt1[(x, y)];
21127            if image0 == 0.0 || image1 == 0.0 {
21128                continue;
21129            }
21130            let alpha_value = image1 / image0;
21131            alpha[(x, y)] = alpha_value;
21132            let term0 = residual0[(x, y)] / image0;
21133            let term1 = residual1[(x, y)] / image1;
21134            alpha_error[(x, y)] = alpha_value.abs() * (term0 * term0 + term1 * term1).sqrt();
21135        }
21136    }
21137    (Some(alpha), Some(alpha_error))
21138}
21139
21140fn compute_psf(
21141    request: &ImagingRequest,
21142    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
21143    gridder: &StandardGridder,
21144    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
21145) -> Result<PsfState, ImagingError> {
21146    match request.w_term_mode {
21147        WTermMode::Direct => {
21148            return compute_psf_direct(request.geometry, batches, stage_timings);
21149        }
21150        WTermMode::WProject => {
21151            return compute_psf_w_project(
21152                request.geometry,
21153                batches,
21154                gridder,
21155                request.w_project_planes,
21156                stage_timings,
21157            );
21158        }
21159        WTermMode::None => {}
21160    }
21161    if standard_mfs_fixed_tile_backend_enabled() {
21162        return compute_psf_standard_tiled(
21163            batches,
21164            gridder,
21165            StandardMfsExecutionConfig::default(),
21166            stage_timings,
21167        );
21168    }
21169    if standard_mfs_metal_backend_enabled() {
21170        return compute_psf_standard_metal(
21171            batches,
21172            gridder,
21173            StandardMfsExecutionConfig::default(),
21174            stage_timings,
21175        );
21176    }
21177    if standard_mfs_sample_count(batches) > standard_mfs_executor_max_samples() {
21178        return compute_psf_standard_streaming(batches, gridder, stage_timings);
21179    }
21180    let executor_build_started = Instant::now();
21181    let mut executor = StandardMfsCpuExecutor::new(gridder, batches)?;
21182    let executor_build_elapsed = executor_build_started.elapsed();
21183    stage_timings.executor_build += executor_build_elapsed;
21184    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled() {
21185        eprintln!(
21186            "standard_mfs_executor_build caller=compute_psf samples={} elapsed_ms={:.3}",
21187            standard_mfs_sample_count(batches),
21188            profile::millis(executor_build_elapsed),
21189        );
21190    }
21191    compute_psf_standard(&mut executor, stage_timings)
21192}
21193
21194fn compute_psf_standard(
21195    executor: &mut StandardMfsCpuExecutor<'_>,
21196    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
21197) -> Result<PsfState, ImagingError> {
21198    let mut timings = PsfComputationTimings::default();
21199    let (gridder, plan, workspace) = executor.parts_mut();
21200    let psf_grid = workspace.clear_psf_grid();
21201
21202    let grid_started = Instant::now();
21203    for sample in plan.samples() {
21204        gridder.grid_sample_taps_real_planned_f64(
21205            psf_grid,
21206            &sample.positive_taps,
21207            sample.grid_weight_f64(),
21208        );
21209    }
21210    timings.grid = grid_started.elapsed();
21211
21212    let normalization_sumwt = plan.normalization_sumwt();
21213    let reported_sumwt = plan.reported_sumwt();
21214    if normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 || reported_sumwt <= 0.0 {
21215        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
21216    }
21217
21218    let fft_started = Instant::now();
21219    let raw_psf = centered_ifft2_f64(psf_grid);
21220    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
21221    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
21222    let mut psf = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_psf);
21223    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / normalization_sumwt as f32);
21224    let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&psf);
21225    if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
21226        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
21227            "PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
21228        ));
21229    }
21230    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
21231    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
21232    stage_timings.psf_grid += timings.grid;
21233    stage_timings.psf_fft += timings.fft;
21234    stage_timings.psf_normalize += timings.normalize;
21235
21236    Ok(PsfState {
21237        psf,
21238        normalization_sumwt: normalization_sumwt as f32,
21239        reported_sumwt: reported_sumwt as f32,
21240        psf_peak,
21241        gridded_samples: plan.gridded_samples(),
21242        skipped_samples: plan.skipped_samples(),
21243    })
21244}
21245
21246fn compute_psf_standard_streaming(
21247    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
21248    gridder: &StandardGridder,
21249    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
21250) -> Result<PsfState, ImagingError> {
21251    let mut timings = PsfComputationTimings::default();
21252    let [nx, ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
21253    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((nx, ny));
21254    let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
21255    let mut reported_sumwt = 0.0f64;
21256    let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
21257    let mut skipped_samples = 0usize;
21258
21259    let grid_started = Instant::now();
21260    for batch in batches {
21261        for sample_index in 0..batch.len() {
21262            if !batch.gridable[sample_index] {
21263                skipped_samples += 1;
21264                continue;
21265            }
21266            let weight = batch.weight[sample_index];
21267            let sumwt_factor = batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index];
21268            if !(weight.is_finite()
21269                && weight > 0.0
21270                && sumwt_factor.is_finite()
21271                && sumwt_factor > 0.0)
21272            {
21273                skipped_samples += 1;
21274                continue;
21275            }
21276            let Some(plan) = gridder
21277                .plan_positive_taps(batch.u_lambda[sample_index], batch.v_lambda[sample_index])
21278            else {
21279                skipped_samples += 1;
21280                continue;
21281            };
21282            let grid_weight = f64::from(weight * sumwt_factor);
21283            normalization_sumwt += grid_weight;
21284            reported_sumwt += grid_weight;
21285            gridded_samples += 1;
21286            gridder.grid_sample_taps_real_planned_f64(&mut psf_grid, &plan, grid_weight);
21287        }
21288    }
21289    timings.grid = grid_started.elapsed();
21290
21291    if normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 || reported_sumwt <= 0.0 {
21292        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
21293    }
21294
21295    let fft_started = Instant::now();
21296    let raw_psf = centered_ifft2_f64(&psf_grid);
21297    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
21298    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
21299    let mut psf = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_psf);
21300    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / normalization_sumwt as f32);
21301    let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&psf);
21302    if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
21303        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
21304            "PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
21305        ));
21306    }
21307    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
21308    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
21309    stage_timings.psf_grid += timings.grid;
21310    stage_timings.psf_fft += timings.fft;
21311    stage_timings.psf_normalize += timings.normalize;
21312
21313    Ok(PsfState {
21314        psf,
21315        normalization_sumwt: normalization_sumwt as f32,
21316        reported_sumwt: reported_sumwt as f32,
21317        psf_peak,
21318        gridded_samples,
21319        skipped_samples,
21320    })
21321}
21322
21323fn compute_psf_standard_tiled(
21324    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
21325    gridder: &StandardGridder,
21326    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
21327    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
21328) -> Result<PsfState, ImagingError> {
21329    let mut timings = PsfComputationTimings::default();
21330    let [nx, ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
21331    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((nx, ny));
21332    let executor =
21333        StandardMfsTiledCpuExecutor::new_with_execution_config(gridder, execution_config)?;
21334
21335    let grid_started = Instant::now();
21336    let accumulation = executor.accumulate_psf_grid(batches, &mut psf_grid)?;
21337    timings.grid = grid_started.elapsed();
21338
21339    if accumulation.normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 || accumulation.reported_sumwt <= 0.0 {
21340        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
21341    }
21342
21343    let fft_started = Instant::now();
21344    let raw_psf = centered_ifft2_f64(&psf_grid);
21345    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
21346    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
21347    let mut psf = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_psf);
21348    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32);
21349    let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&psf);
21350    if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
21351        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
21352            "PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
21353        ));
21354    }
21355    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
21356    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
21357    stage_timings.psf_grid += timings.grid;
21358    stage_timings.psf_fft += timings.fft;
21359    stage_timings.psf_normalize += timings.normalize;
21360
21361    Ok(PsfState {
21362        psf,
21363        normalization_sumwt: accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32,
21364        reported_sumwt: accumulation.reported_sumwt as f32,
21365        psf_peak,
21366        gridded_samples: accumulation.gridded_samples,
21367        skipped_samples: accumulation.skipped_samples,
21368    })
21369}
21370
21371fn compute_psf_standard_metal(
21372    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
21373    gridder: &StandardGridder,
21374    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
21375    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
21376) -> Result<PsfState, ImagingError> {
21377    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
21378    {
21379        let mut timings = PsfComputationTimings::default();
21380        let [nx, ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
21381        let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((nx, ny));
21382        let executor = StandardMfsMetalExecutor::new_with_resident_bytes(
21383            gridder,
21384            execution_config.fixed_tile_resident_bytes,
21385        )?;
21386
21387        let grid_started = Instant::now();
21388        let accumulation = executor.accumulate_psf_grid(batches, &mut psf_grid)?;
21389        timings.grid = grid_started.elapsed();
21390
21391        if accumulation.normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 || accumulation.reported_sumwt <= 0.0 {
21392            return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
21393        }
21394
21395        let fft_started = Instant::now();
21396        let raw_psf = centered_ifft2_f64(&psf_grid);
21397        timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
21398        let normalize_started = Instant::now();
21399        let mut psf = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_psf);
21400        psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32);
21401        let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&psf);
21402        if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
21403            return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
21404                "PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
21405            ));
21406        }
21407        psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
21408        timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
21409        stage_timings.psf_grid += timings.grid;
21410        stage_timings.psf_fft += timings.fft;
21411        stage_timings.psf_normalize += timings.normalize;
21412
21413        Ok(PsfState {
21414            psf,
21415            normalization_sumwt: accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32,
21416            reported_sumwt: accumulation.reported_sumwt as f32,
21417            psf_peak,
21418            gridded_samples: accumulation.gridded_samples,
21419            skipped_samples: accumulation.skipped_samples,
21420        })
21421    }
21422    #[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
21423    {
21424        let _ = (batches, gridder, execution_config, stage_timings);
21425        Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
21426            "standard MFS backend 'metal' requires macOS Metal and is not available on this platform"
21427                .to_string(),
21428        ))
21429    }
21430}
21431
21432#[cfg(test)]
21433fn compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard(
21434    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
21435    gridder: &StandardGridder,
21436    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
21437) -> Result<(PsfState, Array2<f32>), ImagingError> {
21438    let mut executor = StandardMfsCpuExecutor::new(gridder, batches)?;
21439    compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_with_executor(&mut executor, stage_timings)
21440}
21441
21442fn compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_with_executor(
21443    executor: &mut StandardMfsCpuExecutor<'_>,
21444    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
21445) -> Result<(PsfState, Array2<f32>), ImagingError> {
21446    let (gridder, plan, workspace) = executor.parts_mut();
21447    let (psf_grid, residual_grid) = workspace.clear_dirty_grids();
21448
21449    let grid_started = Instant::now();
21450    for sample in plan.samples() {
21451        let grid_weight = sample.grid_weight_f64();
21452        gridder.grid_sample_taps_real_planned_f64(psf_grid, &sample.positive_taps, grid_weight);
21453
21454        let observed_visibility = sample.visibility;
21455        if finite_visibility(observed_visibility) {
21456            let residual = Complex64::new(
21457                f64::from(observed_visibility.re) * grid_weight,
21458                f64::from(observed_visibility.im) * grid_weight,
21459            );
21460            gridder.grid_sample_taps_planned_f64(residual_grid, &sample.positive_taps, residual);
21461        }
21462    }
21463    let grid_elapsed = grid_started.elapsed();
21464    let split_grid_elapsed = Duration::from_secs_f64(grid_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 0.5);
21465    stage_timings.psf_grid += split_grid_elapsed;
21466    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += grid_elapsed.saturating_sub(split_grid_elapsed);
21467
21468    let normalization_sumwt = plan.normalization_sumwt();
21469    let reported_sumwt = plan.reported_sumwt();
21470    if normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 || reported_sumwt <= 0.0 {
21471        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
21472    }
21473
21474    let psf_fft_started = Instant::now();
21475    let raw_psf = centered_ifft2_f64(psf_grid);
21476    stage_timings.psf_fft += psf_fft_started.elapsed();
21477    let psf_normalize_started = Instant::now();
21478    let mut psf = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_psf);
21479    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / normalization_sumwt as f32);
21480    let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&psf);
21481    if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
21482        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
21483            "PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
21484        ));
21485    }
21486    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
21487    stage_timings.psf_normalize += psf_normalize_started.elapsed();
21488
21489    let residual_fft_started = Instant::now();
21490    let raw_residual = centered_ifft2_f64(residual_grid);
21491    stage_timings.residual_fft += residual_fft_started.elapsed();
21492    let residual_normalize_started = Instant::now();
21493    let mut residual = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_residual);
21494    residual.mapv_inplace(|value| value / normalization_sumwt as f32 / psf_peak);
21495    stage_timings.residual_normalize += residual_normalize_started.elapsed();
21496
21497    Ok((
21498        PsfState {
21499            psf,
21500            normalization_sumwt: normalization_sumwt as f32,
21501            reported_sumwt: reported_sumwt as f32,
21502            psf_peak,
21503            gridded_samples: plan.gridded_samples(),
21504            skipped_samples: plan.skipped_samples(),
21505        },
21506        residual,
21507    ))
21508}
21509
21510fn compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_streaming(
21511    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
21512    gridder: &StandardGridder,
21513    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
21514) -> Result<(PsfState, Array2<f32>), ImagingError> {
21515    let [nx, ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
21516    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((nx, ny));
21517    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((nx, ny));
21518
21519    let grid_started = Instant::now();
21520    let DirtyGridAccumulation {
21521        normalization_sumwt,
21522        reported_sumwt,
21523        gridded_samples,
21524        skipped_samples,
21525        ..
21526    } = accumulate_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_streaming_grid(
21527        batches,
21528        gridder,
21529        &mut psf_grid,
21530        &mut residual_grid,
21531    )?;
21532    let grid_elapsed = grid_started.elapsed();
21533    let split_grid_elapsed = Duration::from_secs_f64(grid_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 0.5);
21534    stage_timings.psf_grid += split_grid_elapsed;
21535    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += grid_elapsed.saturating_sub(split_grid_elapsed);
21536
21537    if normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 || reported_sumwt <= 0.0 {
21538        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
21539    }
21540
21541    let psf_fft_started = Instant::now();
21542    let raw_psf = centered_ifft2_f64(&psf_grid);
21543    stage_timings.psf_fft += psf_fft_started.elapsed();
21544    let psf_normalize_started = Instant::now();
21545    let mut psf = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_psf);
21546    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / normalization_sumwt as f32);
21547    let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&psf);
21548    if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
21549        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
21550            "PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
21551        ));
21552    }
21553    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
21554    stage_timings.psf_normalize += psf_normalize_started.elapsed();
21555
21556    let residual_fft_started = Instant::now();
21557    let raw_residual = centered_ifft2_f64(&residual_grid);
21558    stage_timings.residual_fft += residual_fft_started.elapsed();
21559    let residual_normalize_started = Instant::now();
21560    let mut residual = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_residual);
21561    residual.mapv_inplace(|value| value / normalization_sumwt as f32 / psf_peak);
21562    stage_timings.residual_normalize += residual_normalize_started.elapsed();
21563
21564    Ok((
21565        PsfState {
21566            psf,
21567            normalization_sumwt: normalization_sumwt as f32,
21568            reported_sumwt: reported_sumwt as f32,
21569            psf_peak,
21570            gridded_samples,
21571            skipped_samples,
21572        },
21573        residual,
21574    ))
21575}
21576
21577fn compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_tiled(
21578    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
21579    gridder: &StandardGridder,
21580    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
21581    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
21582) -> Result<(PsfState, Array2<f32>), ImagingError> {
21583    let [nx, ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
21584    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((nx, ny));
21585    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((nx, ny));
21586    let executor =
21587        StandardMfsTiledCpuExecutor::new_with_execution_config(gridder, execution_config)?;
21588
21589    let grid_started = Instant::now();
21590    let accumulation =
21591        executor.accumulate_dirty_grids(batches, &mut psf_grid, &mut residual_grid)?;
21592    let grid_elapsed = grid_started.elapsed();
21593    let split_grid_elapsed = Duration::from_secs_f64(grid_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 0.5);
21594    stage_timings.psf_grid += split_grid_elapsed;
21595    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += grid_elapsed.saturating_sub(split_grid_elapsed);
21596
21597    if accumulation.normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 || accumulation.reported_sumwt <= 0.0 {
21598        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
21599    }
21600
21601    let psf_fft_started = Instant::now();
21602    let raw_psf = centered_ifft2_f64(&psf_grid);
21603    stage_timings.psf_fft += psf_fft_started.elapsed();
21604    let psf_normalize_started = Instant::now();
21605    let mut psf = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_psf);
21606    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32);
21607    let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&psf);
21608    if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
21609        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
21610            "PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
21611        ));
21612    }
21613    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
21614    stage_timings.psf_normalize += psf_normalize_started.elapsed();
21615
21616    let residual_fft_started = Instant::now();
21617    let raw_residual = centered_ifft2_f64(&residual_grid);
21618    stage_timings.residual_fft += residual_fft_started.elapsed();
21619    let residual_normalize_started = Instant::now();
21620    let mut residual = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_residual);
21621    residual.mapv_inplace(|value| value / accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32 / psf_peak);
21622    stage_timings.residual_normalize += residual_normalize_started.elapsed();
21623
21624    Ok((
21625        PsfState {
21626            psf,
21627            normalization_sumwt: accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32,
21628            reported_sumwt: accumulation.reported_sumwt as f32,
21629            psf_peak,
21630            gridded_samples: accumulation.gridded_samples,
21631            skipped_samples: accumulation.skipped_samples,
21632        },
21633        residual,
21634    ))
21635}
21636
21637fn compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_metal(
21638    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
21639    gridder: &StandardGridder,
21640    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
21641    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
21642) -> Result<(PsfState, Array2<f32>), ImagingError> {
21643    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
21644    {
21645        let [nx, ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
21646        let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((nx, ny));
21647        let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((nx, ny));
21648        let executor = StandardMfsMetalExecutor::new_with_resident_bytes(
21649            gridder,
21650            execution_config.fixed_tile_resident_bytes,
21651        )?;
21652
21653        let grid_started = Instant::now();
21654        let accumulation =
21655            executor.accumulate_dirty_grids(batches, &mut psf_grid, &mut residual_grid)?;
21656        let grid_elapsed = grid_started.elapsed();
21657        let split_grid_elapsed = Duration::from_secs_f64(grid_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 0.5);
21658        stage_timings.psf_grid += split_grid_elapsed;
21659        stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += grid_elapsed.saturating_sub(split_grid_elapsed);
21660
21661        if accumulation.normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 || accumulation.reported_sumwt <= 0.0 {
21662            return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
21663        }
21664
21665        let psf_fft_started = Instant::now();
21666        let raw_psf = centered_ifft2_f64(&psf_grid);
21667        stage_timings.psf_fft += psf_fft_started.elapsed();
21668        let psf_normalize_started = Instant::now();
21669        let mut psf = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_psf);
21670        psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32);
21671        let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&psf);
21672        if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
21673            return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
21674                "PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
21675            ));
21676        }
21677        psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
21678        stage_timings.psf_normalize += psf_normalize_started.elapsed();
21679
21680        let residual_fft_started = Instant::now();
21681        let raw_residual = centered_ifft2_f64(&residual_grid);
21682        stage_timings.residual_fft += residual_fft_started.elapsed();
21683        let residual_normalize_started = Instant::now();
21684        let mut residual = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw_residual);
21685        residual.mapv_inplace(|value| value / accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32 / psf_peak);
21686        stage_timings.residual_normalize += residual_normalize_started.elapsed();
21687
21688        Ok((
21689            PsfState {
21690                psf,
21691                normalization_sumwt: accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32,
21692                reported_sumwt: accumulation.reported_sumwt as f32,
21693                psf_peak,
21694                gridded_samples: accumulation.gridded_samples,
21695                skipped_samples: accumulation.skipped_samples,
21696            },
21697            residual,
21698        ))
21699    }
21700    #[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
21701    {
21702        let _ = (batches, gridder, execution_config, stage_timings);
21703        Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
21704            "standard MFS backend 'metal' requires macOS Metal and is not available on this platform"
21705                .to_string(),
21706        ))
21707    }
21708}
21709
21710#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, Default)]
21711struct DirtyGridAccumulation {
21712    normalization_sumwt: f64,
21713    reported_sumwt: f64,
21714    gridded_samples: usize,
21715    skipped_samples: usize,
21716    finite_visibility_samples: usize,
21717    nonfinite_visibility_samples: usize,
21718    skipped_not_gridable: usize,
21719    skipped_invalid_weight: usize,
21720    skipped_invalid_sumwt: usize,
21721    skipped_out_of_grid: usize,
21722}
21723
21724impl DirtyGridAccumulation {
21725    fn add(&mut self, other: Self) {
21726        self.normalization_sumwt += other.normalization_sumwt;
21727        self.reported_sumwt += other.reported_sumwt;
21728        self.gridded_samples += other.gridded_samples;
21729        self.skipped_samples += other.skipped_samples;
21730        self.finite_visibility_samples += other.finite_visibility_samples;
21731        self.nonfinite_visibility_samples += other.nonfinite_visibility_samples;
21732        self.skipped_not_gridable += other.skipped_not_gridable;
21733        self.skipped_invalid_weight += other.skipped_invalid_weight;
21734        self.skipped_invalid_sumwt += other.skipped_invalid_sumwt;
21735        self.skipped_out_of_grid += other.skipped_out_of_grid;
21736    }
21737}
21738
21739fn accumulate_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_streaming_grid(
21740    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
21741    gridder: &StandardGridder,
21742    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
21743    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
21744) -> Result<DirtyGridAccumulation, ImagingError> {
21745    let requested_threads = standard_mfs_grid_threads();
21746    let thread_count = requested_threads
21747        .min(batches.len())
21748        .min(thread::available_parallelism().map_or(1, |value| value.get()))
21749        .max(1);
21750    if thread_count <= 1 || batches.len() < 2 {
21751        return Ok(
21752            accumulate_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_streaming_grid_serial(
21753                batches,
21754                gridder,
21755                psf_grid,
21756                residual_grid,
21757            ),
21758        );
21759    }
21760
21761    let [nx, ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
21762    let chunk_len = batches.len().div_ceil(thread_count);
21763    let stage_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
21764    let mut local_results = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
21765    let join_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
21766    thread::scope(|scope| {
21767        let mut handles = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
21768        for (chunk_index, chunk) in batches.chunks(chunk_len).enumerate() {
21769            let batch_offset = chunk_index * chunk_len;
21770            let worker_samples = standard_mfs_sample_count(chunk);
21771            handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
21772                let alloc_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
21773                let mut local_psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((nx, ny));
21774                let mut local_residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((nx, ny));
21775                let alloc_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(alloc_started);
21776                let compute_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
21777                let counts = accumulate_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_streaming_grid_serial(
21778                    chunk,
21779                    gridder,
21780                    &mut local_psf_grid,
21781                    &mut local_residual_grid,
21782                );
21783                let compute_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(compute_started);
21784                (
21785                    batch_offset,
21786                    worker_samples,
21787                    local_psf_grid,
21788                    local_residual_grid,
21789                    counts,
21790                    alloc_elapsed,
21791                    compute_elapsed,
21792                )
21793            }));
21794        }
21795        for handle in handles {
21796            local_results.push(handle.join().map_err(|_| {
21797                ImagingError::Unsupported("standard MFS dirty grid worker panicked".to_string())
21798            })?);
21799        }
21800        Ok::<(), ImagingError>(())
21801    })?;
21802    let join_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(join_started);
21803
21804    local_results.sort_by_key(|(batch_offset, _, _, _, _, _, _)| *batch_offset);
21805    let mut counts = DirtyGridAccumulation::default();
21806    let merge_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
21807    for (_, _, local_psf_grid, local_residual_grid, local_counts, _, _) in &local_results {
21808        add_complex64_grid(psf_grid, local_psf_grid);
21809        add_complex64_grid(residual_grid, local_residual_grid);
21810        counts.add(*local_counts);
21811    }
21812    let merge_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(merge_started);
21813    profile::log_parallel_stage(profile::ParallelStageProfile {
21814        stage: "dirty_psf_residual_grid",
21815        requested_threads,
21816        actual_threads: local_results.len(),
21817        chunking: "batch",
21818        chunk_len,
21819        samples_total: standard_mfs_sample_count(batches),
21820        samples_per_worker: local_results
21821            .iter()
21822            .map(|(_, worker_samples, _, _, _, _, _)| *worker_samples)
21823            .collect(),
21824        local_grid_bytes_per_worker: complex64_grid_bytes(nx, ny, 2),
21825        local_grid_count: 2,
21826        local_alloc_zero_by_worker: local_results
21827            .iter()
21828            .map(|(_, _, _, _, _, alloc_elapsed, _)| *alloc_elapsed)
21829            .collect(),
21830        worker_compute_by_worker: local_results
21831            .iter()
21832            .map(|(_, _, _, _, _, _, compute_elapsed)| *compute_elapsed)
21833            .collect(),
21834        join_duration: join_elapsed,
21835        merge_duration: merge_elapsed,
21836        stage_duration: profile::elapsed_since(stage_started),
21837    });
21838    for (worker_index, (_, worker_samples, _, _, local_counts, alloc_elapsed, compute_elapsed)) in
21839        local_results.iter().enumerate()
21840    {
21841        profile::log_parallel_worker(profile::ParallelWorkerProfile {
21842            stage: "dirty_psf_residual_grid",
21843            worker_index,
21844            samples: *worker_samples,
21845            accepted_samples: local_counts.gridded_samples,
21846            finite_visibility_samples: local_counts.finite_visibility_samples,
21847            nonfinite_visibility_samples: local_counts.nonfinite_visibility_samples,
21848            skipped_not_gridable: local_counts.skipped_not_gridable,
21849            skipped_invalid_weight: local_counts.skipped_invalid_weight,
21850            skipped_invalid_sumwt: local_counts.skipped_invalid_sumwt,
21851            skipped_invalid_density: 0,
21852            skipped_out_of_grid: local_counts.skipped_out_of_grid,
21853            degrid_tap_visits: 0,
21854            grid_tap_visits: local_counts.gridded_samples.saturating_mul(49),
21855            density_cell_hits: 0,
21856            local_alloc_zero: *alloc_elapsed,
21857            worker_compute: *compute_elapsed,
21858        });
21859    }
21860    Ok(counts)
21861}
21862
21863fn accumulate_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_streaming_grid_serial(
21864    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
21865    gridder: &StandardGridder,
21866    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
21867    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
21868) -> DirtyGridAccumulation {
21869    let mut counts = DirtyGridAccumulation::default();
21870    let collect_profile = profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled();
21871    for batch in batches {
21872        for sample_index in 0..batch.len() {
21873            if !batch.gridable[sample_index] {
21874                counts.skipped_samples += 1;
21875                if collect_profile {
21876                    counts.skipped_not_gridable += 1;
21877                }
21878                continue;
21879            }
21880            let weight = batch.weight[sample_index];
21881            let sumwt_factor = batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index];
21882            if !(weight.is_finite()
21883                && weight > 0.0
21884                && sumwt_factor.is_finite()
21885                && sumwt_factor > 0.0)
21886            {
21887                counts.skipped_samples += 1;
21888                if collect_profile {
21889                    if !(weight.is_finite() && weight > 0.0) {
21890                        counts.skipped_invalid_weight += 1;
21891                    } else {
21892                        counts.skipped_invalid_sumwt += 1;
21893                    }
21894                }
21895                continue;
21896            }
21897            let Some(plan) = gridder
21898                .plan_positive_taps(batch.u_lambda[sample_index], batch.v_lambda[sample_index])
21899            else {
21900                counts.skipped_samples += 1;
21901                if collect_profile {
21902                    counts.skipped_out_of_grid += 1;
21903                }
21904                continue;
21905            };
21906            let grid_weight = f64::from(weight * sumwt_factor);
21907            counts.normalization_sumwt += grid_weight;
21908            counts.reported_sumwt += grid_weight;
21909            counts.gridded_samples += 1;
21910            let observed_visibility = batch.visibility[sample_index];
21911            if finite_visibility(observed_visibility) {
21912                if collect_profile {
21913                    counts.finite_visibility_samples += 1;
21914                }
21915                let residual = Complex64::new(
21916                    f64::from(observed_visibility.re) * grid_weight,
21917                    f64::from(observed_visibility.im) * grid_weight,
21918                );
21919                gridder.grid_sample_taps_real_complex_pair_planned_f64(
21920                    psf_grid,
21921                    grid_weight,
21922                    residual_grid,
21923                    residual,
21924                    &plan,
21925                );
21926            } else {
21927                if collect_profile {
21928                    counts.nonfinite_visibility_samples += 1;
21929                }
21930                gridder.grid_sample_taps_real_planned_f64(psf_grid, &plan, grid_weight);
21931            }
21932        }
21933    }
21934    counts
21935}
21936
21937fn compute_residual(
21938    request: &ImagingRequest,
21939    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
21940    gridder: &StandardGridder,
21941    model: &Array2<f32>,
21942    psf_state: &PsfState,
21943    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
21944    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
21945) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
21946    match request.w_term_mode {
21947        WTermMode::Direct => {
21948            return compute_residual_direct(
21949                request.geometry,
21950                batches,
21951                model,
21952                psf_state,
21953                stage_timings,
21954            );
21955        }
21956        WTermMode::WProject => {
21957            return compute_residual_w_project(
21958                request.geometry,
21959                batches,
21960                gridder,
21961                model,
21962                psf_state,
21963                request.w_project_planes,
21964                stage_timings,
21965            );
21966        }
21967        WTermMode::None => {}
21968    }
21969    compute_residual_standard(
21970        request.geometry,
21971        batches,
21972        gridder,
21973        model,
21974        psf_state,
21975        false,
21976        execution_config,
21977        stage_timings,
21978    )
21979}
21980
21981#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
21982struct ResidualRefreshTimingSnapshot {
21983    model_fft: Duration,
21984    residual_degrid_grid: Duration,
21985    residual_fft: Duration,
21986    residual_normalize: Duration,
21987}
21988
21989impl ResidualRefreshTimingSnapshot {
21990    fn capture(timings: &ImagingStageTimings) -> Self {
21991        Self {
21992            model_fft: timings.model_fft,
21993            residual_degrid_grid: timings.residual_degrid_grid,
21994            residual_fft: timings.residual_fft,
21995            residual_normalize: timings.residual_normalize,
21996        }
21997    }
21998
21999    fn accounted_delta(self, timings: &ImagingStageTimings) -> Duration {
22000        timings
22001            .model_fft
22002            .saturating_sub(self.model_fft)
22003            .saturating_add(
22004                timings
22005                    .residual_degrid_grid
22006                    .saturating_sub(self.residual_degrid_grid),
22007            )
22008            .saturating_add(timings.residual_fft.saturating_sub(self.residual_fft))
22009            .saturating_add(
22010                timings
22011                    .residual_normalize
22012                    .saturating_sub(self.residual_normalize),
22013            )
22014    }
22015}
22016
22017#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
22018struct ResidualRefreshTimingDelta {
22019    model_fft: Duration,
22020    residual_degrid_grid: Duration,
22021    residual_fft: Duration,
22022    residual_normalize: Duration,
22023}
22024
22025impl ResidualRefreshTimingSnapshot {
22026    fn delta(self, timings: &ImagingStageTimings) -> ResidualRefreshTimingDelta {
22027        ResidualRefreshTimingDelta {
22028            model_fft: timings.model_fft.saturating_sub(self.model_fft),
22029            residual_degrid_grid: timings
22030                .residual_degrid_grid
22031                .saturating_sub(self.residual_degrid_grid),
22032            residual_fft: timings.residual_fft.saturating_sub(self.residual_fft),
22033            residual_normalize: timings
22034                .residual_normalize
22035                .saturating_sub(self.residual_normalize),
22036        }
22037    }
22038}
22039
22040fn log_standard_mfs_clean_residual_refresh_summary(
22041    request: &ImagingRequest,
22042    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
22043    before: ResidualRefreshTimingSnapshot,
22044    stage_timings: &ImagingStageTimings,
22045    refresh_elapsed: Duration,
22046    accounted: Duration,
22047) {
22048    if !profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled() {
22049        return;
22050    }
22051    let delta = before.delta(stage_timings);
22052    let residual_backend =
22053        env::var(STANDARD_MFS_RESIDUAL_BACKEND_ENV).unwrap_or_else(|_| "cpu".to_string());
22054    eprintln!(
22055        "standard_mfs_clean_residual_refresh_summary deconvolver={:?} residual_backend={} refresh_ms={:.3} accounted_ms={:.3} overhead_ms={:.3} model_fft_ms={:.3} residual_degrid_grid_ms={:.3} residual_fft_ms={:.3} residual_normalize_ms={:.3} fixed_tile_use_planned_run_blocks={} metal_grouped_input_cache={} materialized_sample_plan_max_samples={}",
22056        request.deconvolver,
22057        residual_backend,
22058        profile::millis(refresh_elapsed),
22059        profile::millis(accounted),
22060        profile::millis(refresh_elapsed.saturating_sub(accounted)),
22061        profile::millis(delta.model_fft),
22062        profile::millis(delta.residual_degrid_grid),
22063        profile::millis(delta.residual_fft),
22064        profile::millis(delta.residual_normalize),
22065        execution_config.fixed_tile_use_planned_run_blocks,
22066        execution_config.metal_grouped_input_cache,
22067        execution_config
22068            .materialized_sample_plan_max_samples
22069            .map_or_else(|| "default".to_string(), |value| value.to_string()),
22070    );
22071}
22072
22073#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
22074fn refresh_standard_mfs_residual(
22075    request: &ImagingRequest,
22076    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
22077    standard_executor: &mut Option<StandardMfsCpuExecutor<'_>>,
22078    gridder: &StandardGridder,
22079    model: &Array2<f32>,
22080    psf_state: &PsfState,
22081    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
22082    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
22083) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
22084    let before = ResidualRefreshTimingSnapshot::capture(stage_timings);
22085    let refresh_started = Instant::now();
22086    let residual = if let Some(executor) = standard_executor.as_mut() {
22087        compute_residual_standard_with_executor(executor, model, psf_state, stage_timings)?
22088    } else {
22089        compute_residual(
22090            request,
22091            batches,
22092            gridder,
22093            model,
22094            psf_state,
22095            execution_config,
22096            stage_timings,
22097        )?
22098    };
22099    let refresh_elapsed = refresh_started.elapsed();
22100    let accounted = before.accounted_delta(stage_timings);
22101    stage_timings.major_cycle_refresh += refresh_elapsed;
22102    stage_timings.residual_refresh_overhead += refresh_elapsed.saturating_sub(accounted);
22103    log_standard_mfs_clean_residual_refresh_summary(
22104        request,
22105        execution_config,
22106        before,
22107        stage_timings,
22108        refresh_elapsed,
22109        accounted,
22110    );
22111    Ok(residual)
22112}
22113
22114fn build_standard_residual_sample_plans(
22115    gridder: &StandardGridder,
22116    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
22117) -> Vec<Vec<Option<PlannedSample>>> {
22118    batches
22119        .iter()
22120        .map(|batch| {
22121            batch
22122                .u_lambda
22123                .iter()
22124                .zip(batch.v_lambda.iter())
22125                .zip(batch.weight.iter())
22126                .zip(batch.visibility.iter())
22127                .zip(batch.gridable.iter())
22128                .map(
22129                    |((((&u_lambda, &v_lambda), &weight), &visibility), &gridable)| {
22130                        if gridable
22131                            && weight.is_finite()
22132                            && weight > 0.0
22133                            && visibility.re.is_finite()
22134                            && visibility.im.is_finite()
22135                        {
22136                            gridder.plan_sample(u_lambda, v_lambda)
22137                        } else {
22138                            None
22139                        }
22140                    },
22141                )
22142                .collect()
22143        })
22144        .collect()
22145}
22146
22147#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
22148fn compute_residual_standard(
22149    geometry: ImageGeometry,
22150    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
22151    gridder: &StandardGridder,
22152    model: &Array2<f32>,
22153    psf_state: &PsfState,
22154    use_direct_point_predict: bool,
22155    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
22156    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
22157) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
22158    if !use_direct_point_predict
22159        && (standard_mfs_fixed_tile_backend_enabled() || standard_mfs_metal_backend_enabled())
22160    {
22161        return compute_residual_standard_tiled(
22162            batches,
22163            gridder,
22164            model,
22165            psf_state,
22166            execution_config,
22167            stage_timings,
22168        );
22169    }
22170    if !use_direct_point_predict
22171        && standard_mfs_sample_count(batches) <= standard_mfs_executor_max_samples()
22172    {
22173        let executor_build_started = Instant::now();
22174        let mut executor = StandardMfsCpuExecutor::new(gridder, batches)?;
22175        let executor_build_elapsed = executor_build_started.elapsed();
22176        stage_timings.executor_build += executor_build_elapsed;
22177        if profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled() {
22178            eprintln!(
22179                "standard_mfs_executor_build caller=compute_residual_standard samples={} elapsed_ms={:.3}",
22180                standard_mfs_sample_count(batches),
22181                profile::millis(executor_build_elapsed),
22182            );
22183        }
22184        return compute_residual_standard_with_executor(
22185            &mut executor,
22186            model,
22187            psf_state,
22188            stage_timings,
22189        );
22190    }
22191    compute_residual_standard_streaming(
22192        geometry,
22193        batches,
22194        gridder,
22195        model,
22196        psf_state,
22197        use_direct_point_predict,
22198        stage_timings,
22199    )
22200}
22201
22202fn compute_residual_standard_streaming(
22203    geometry: ImageGeometry,
22204    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
22205    gridder: &StandardGridder,
22206    model: &Array2<f32>,
22207    psf_state: &PsfState,
22208    use_direct_point_predict: bool,
22209    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
22210) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
22211    Ok(compute_residual_standard_internal(
22212        geometry,
22213        batches,
22214        gridder,
22215        model,
22216        psf_state,
22217        use_direct_point_predict,
22218        false,
22219        stage_timings,
22220    )?
22221    .residual_image)
22222}
22223
22224fn compute_residual_standard_tiled(
22225    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
22226    gridder: &StandardGridder,
22227    model: &Array2<f32>,
22228    psf_state: &PsfState,
22229    execution_config: StandardMfsExecutionConfig,
22230    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
22231) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
22232    let [nx, ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
22233    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((nx, ny));
22234    let mut timings = ResidualComputationTimings::default();
22235    let model_grid = if model.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0) {
22236        let model_fft_started = Instant::now();
22237        let transformed = centered_fft2(&gridder.apodize_model(model));
22238        timings.model_fft = model_fft_started.elapsed();
22239        Some(transformed)
22240    } else {
22241        None
22242    };
22243
22244    let degrid_grid_started = Instant::now();
22245    let executor =
22246        StandardMfsTiledCpuExecutor::new_with_execution_config(gridder, execution_config)?;
22247    let counts =
22248        executor.accumulate_residual_grid(batches, model_grid.as_ref(), &mut residual_grid)?;
22249    timings.degrid_grid = degrid_grid_started.elapsed();
22250
22251    let fft_started = Instant::now();
22252    let raw = centered_ifft2_f64(&residual_grid);
22253    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
22254    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
22255    let mut image = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw);
22256    image.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_state.normalization_sumwt / psf_state.psf_peak);
22257    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
22258    stage_timings.model_fft += timings.model_fft;
22259    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += timings.degrid_grid;
22260    stage_timings.residual_fft += timings.fft;
22261    stage_timings.residual_normalize += timings.normalize;
22262
22263    profile::log_serial_stage(profile::SerialStageProfile {
22264        stage: "tiled_residual_refresh",
22265        samples_total: standard_mfs_sample_count(batches),
22266        finite_visibility_samples: counts.valid_samples,
22267        nonfinite_visibility_samples: counts.skipped_nonfinite_visibility,
22268        planned_samples: counts.planned_samples,
22269        model_grid_present_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
22270            counts.gridded_residual_samples
22271        } else {
22272            0
22273        },
22274        model_grid_absent_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
22275            0
22276        } else {
22277            counts.gridded_residual_samples
22278        },
22279        degrid_tap_visits: if model_grid.is_some() {
22280            counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49)
22281        } else {
22282            0
22283        },
22284        grid_tap_visits: counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49),
22285        stage_duration: timings.degrid_grid,
22286    });
22287
22288    Ok(image)
22289}
22290
22291fn compute_residual_standard_with_executor(
22292    executor: &mut StandardMfsCpuExecutor<'_>,
22293    model: &Array2<f32>,
22294    psf_state: &PsfState,
22295    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
22296) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
22297    let (gridder, plan, workspace) = executor.parts_mut();
22298    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled() {
22299        let [nx, ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
22300        eprintln!(
22301            "standard_mfs_executor_plan stage=residual_refresh samples={} skipped_samples={} normalization_sumwt={:.12e} reported_sumwt={:.12e} sample_plan_bytes={} residual_grid_bytes={}",
22302            plan.gridded_samples(),
22303            plan.skipped_samples(),
22304            plan.normalization_sumwt(),
22305            plan.reported_sumwt(),
22306            plan.estimated_bytes(),
22307            complex64_grid_bytes(nx, ny, 1),
22308        );
22309    }
22310    let residual_grid = workspace.clear_residual_grid();
22311    let mut timings = ResidualComputationTimings::default();
22312    let model_grid = if model.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0) {
22313        let model_fft_started = Instant::now();
22314        let transformed = centered_fft2(&gridder.apodize_model(model));
22315        timings.model_fft = model_fft_started.elapsed();
22316        Some(transformed)
22317    } else {
22318        None
22319    };
22320
22321    let degrid_grid_started = Instant::now();
22322    accumulate_standard_mfs_residual_grid(gridder, plan, model_grid.as_ref(), residual_grid)?;
22323    timings.degrid_grid = degrid_grid_started.elapsed();
22324
22325    let fft_started = Instant::now();
22326    let raw = centered_ifft2_f64(residual_grid);
22327    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
22328    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
22329    let mut image = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw);
22330    image.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_state.normalization_sumwt / psf_state.psf_peak);
22331    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
22332    stage_timings.model_fft += timings.model_fft;
22333    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += timings.degrid_grid;
22334    stage_timings.residual_fft += timings.fft;
22335    stage_timings.residual_normalize += timings.normalize;
22336    Ok(image)
22337}
22338
22339fn accumulate_standard_mfs_residual_grid(
22340    gridder: &StandardGridder,
22341    plan: &StandardMfsVisibilityPlan,
22342    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
22343    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
22344) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
22345    let requested_threads = standard_mfs_grid_threads();
22346    let thread_count = requested_threads
22347        .min(plan.samples().len())
22348        .min(thread::available_parallelism().map_or(1, |value| value.get()))
22349        .max(1);
22350    if thread_count <= 1 || plan.samples().len() < 100_000 {
22351        let stage_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
22352        let mut finite_samples = 0usize;
22353        for sample in plan.samples() {
22354            if finite_visibility(sample.visibility) {
22355                finite_samples += 1;
22356            }
22357            accumulate_standard_mfs_residual_sample(gridder, model_grid, sample, residual_grid);
22358        }
22359        let stage_duration = profile::elapsed_since(stage_started);
22360        profile::log_serial_stage(profile::SerialStageProfile {
22361            stage: "executor_residual_refresh",
22362            samples_total: plan.samples().len(),
22363            finite_visibility_samples: finite_samples,
22364            nonfinite_visibility_samples: plan.samples().len().saturating_sub(finite_samples),
22365            planned_samples: plan.samples().len(),
22366            model_grid_present_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
22367                finite_samples
22368            } else {
22369                0
22370            },
22371            model_grid_absent_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
22372                0
22373            } else {
22374                finite_samples
22375            },
22376            degrid_tap_visits: if model_grid.is_some() {
22377                finite_samples.saturating_mul(49)
22378            } else {
22379                0
22380            },
22381            grid_tap_visits: finite_samples.saturating_mul(49),
22382            stage_duration,
22383        });
22384        return Ok(());
22385    }
22386
22387    let [nx, ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
22388    let chunk_len = plan.samples().len().div_ceil(thread_count);
22389    let stage_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
22390    let mut local_grids = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
22391    let join_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
22392    thread::scope(|scope| {
22393        let mut handles = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
22394        for samples in plan.samples().chunks(chunk_len) {
22395            handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
22396                let alloc_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
22397                let mut local_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((nx, ny));
22398                let alloc_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(alloc_started);
22399                let compute_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
22400                let mut finite_samples = 0usize;
22401                for sample in samples {
22402                    if finite_visibility(sample.visibility) {
22403                        finite_samples += 1;
22404                    }
22405                    accumulate_standard_mfs_residual_sample(
22406                        gridder,
22407                        model_grid,
22408                        sample,
22409                        &mut local_grid,
22410                    );
22411                }
22412                let compute_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(compute_started);
22413                (
22414                    samples.len(),
22415                    finite_samples,
22416                    local_grid,
22417                    alloc_elapsed,
22418                    compute_elapsed,
22419                )
22420            }));
22421        }
22422        for handle in handles {
22423            local_grids.push(handle.join().map_err(|_| {
22424                ImagingError::Unsupported("standard MFS grid worker panicked".to_string())
22425            })?);
22426        }
22427        Ok::<(), ImagingError>(())
22428    })?;
22429    let join_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(join_started);
22430
22431    let merge_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
22432    for (_, _, local_grid, _, _) in &local_grids {
22433        add_complex64_grid(residual_grid, local_grid);
22434    }
22435    let merge_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(merge_started);
22436    let finite_samples = local_grids
22437        .iter()
22438        .map(|(_, finite_samples, _, _, _)| *finite_samples)
22439        .sum::<usize>();
22440    profile::log_parallel_stage(profile::ParallelStageProfile {
22441        stage: "executor_residual_refresh_grid",
22442        requested_threads,
22443        actual_threads: local_grids.len(),
22444        chunking: "planned_sample",
22445        chunk_len,
22446        samples_total: plan.samples().len(),
22447        samples_per_worker: local_grids
22448            .iter()
22449            .map(|(worker_samples, _, _, _, _)| *worker_samples)
22450            .collect(),
22451        local_grid_bytes_per_worker: complex64_grid_bytes(nx, ny, 1),
22452        local_grid_count: 1,
22453        local_alloc_zero_by_worker: local_grids
22454            .iter()
22455            .map(|(_, _, _, alloc_elapsed, _)| *alloc_elapsed)
22456            .collect(),
22457        worker_compute_by_worker: local_grids
22458            .iter()
22459            .map(|(_, _, _, _, compute_elapsed)| *compute_elapsed)
22460            .collect(),
22461        join_duration: join_elapsed,
22462        merge_duration: merge_elapsed,
22463        stage_duration: profile::elapsed_since(stage_started),
22464    });
22465    for (worker_index, (worker_samples, finite_samples, _, alloc_elapsed, compute_elapsed)) in
