22466        local_grids.iter().enumerate()
22467    {
22468        profile::log_parallel_worker(profile::ParallelWorkerProfile {
22469            stage: "executor_residual_refresh_grid",
22470            worker_index,
22471            samples: *worker_samples,
22472            accepted_samples: *finite_samples,
22473            finite_visibility_samples: *finite_samples,
22474            nonfinite_visibility_samples: worker_samples.saturating_sub(*finite_samples),
22475            skipped_not_gridable: 0,
22476            skipped_invalid_weight: 0,
22477            skipped_invalid_sumwt: 0,
22478            skipped_invalid_density: 0,
22479            skipped_out_of_grid: 0,
22480            degrid_tap_visits: if model_grid.is_some() {
22481                finite_samples.saturating_mul(49)
22482            } else {
22483                0
22484            },
22485            grid_tap_visits: finite_samples.saturating_mul(49),
22486            density_cell_hits: 0,
22487            local_alloc_zero: *alloc_elapsed,
22488            worker_compute: *compute_elapsed,
22489        });
22490    }
22491    profile::log_serial_stage(profile::SerialStageProfile {
22492        stage: "executor_residual_refresh_counts",
22493        samples_total: plan.samples().len(),
22494        finite_visibility_samples: finite_samples,
22495        nonfinite_visibility_samples: plan.samples().len().saturating_sub(finite_samples),
22496        planned_samples: plan.samples().len(),
22497        model_grid_present_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
22498            finite_samples
22499        } else {
22500            0
22501        },
22502        model_grid_absent_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
22503            0
22504        } else {
22505            finite_samples
22506        },
22507        degrid_tap_visits: if model_grid.is_some() {
22508            finite_samples.saturating_mul(49)
22509        } else {
22510            0
22511        },
22512        grid_tap_visits: finite_samples.saturating_mul(49),
22513        stage_duration: Duration::ZERO,
22514    });
22515    Ok(())
22516}
22517
22518fn accumulate_standard_mfs_residual_sample(
22519    gridder: &StandardGridder,
22520    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
22521    sample: &StandardMfsPlannedSample,
22522    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
22523) {
22524    let observed_visibility = sample.visibility;
22525    if !finite_visibility(observed_visibility) {
22526        return;
22527    }
22528    let residual_weight = sample.grid_weight_f64();
22529    if let Some(model_grid) = model_grid {
22530        gridder.degrid_model_and_grid_residual_taps_planned_f64(
22531            model_grid,
22532            residual_grid,
22533            &sample.positive_taps,
22534            observed_visibility,
22535            residual_weight,
22536        );
22537    } else {
22538        let residual = Complex64::new(
22539            f64::from(observed_visibility.re) * residual_weight,
22540            f64::from(observed_visibility.im) * residual_weight,
22541        );
22542        gridder.grid_sample_taps_planned_f64(residual_grid, &sample.positive_taps, residual);
22543    }
22544}
22545
22546fn add_complex64_grid(target: &mut Array2<Complex64>, source: &Array2<Complex64>) {
22547    if let (Some(target), Some(source)) = (
22548        target.as_slice_memory_order_mut(),
22549        source.as_slice_memory_order(),
22550    ) {
22551        for (target, source) in target.iter_mut().zip(source.iter()) {
22552            *target += *source;
22553        }
22554        return;
22555    }
22556    Zip::from(target).and(source).for_each(|target, source| {
22557        *target += *source;
22558    });
22559}
22560
22561fn add_complex32_grid(target: &mut Array2<Complex32>, source: &Array2<Complex32>) {
22562    if let (Some(target), Some(source)) = (
22563        target.as_slice_memory_order_mut(),
22564        source.as_slice_memory_order(),
22565    ) {
22566        for (target, source) in target.iter_mut().zip(source.iter()) {
22567            *target += *source;
22568        }
22569        return;
22570    }
22571    Zip::from(target).and(source).for_each(|target, source| {
22572        *target += *source;
22573    });
22574}
22575
22576#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, Default)]
22577struct ResidualGridAccumulation {
22578    valid_samples: usize,
22579    planned_samples: usize,
22580    gridded_residual_samples: usize,
22581    skipped_not_gridable: usize,
22582    skipped_invalid_weight: usize,
22583    skipped_invalid_sumwt: usize,
22584    skipped_out_of_grid: usize,
22585    skipped_nonfinite_visibility: usize,
22586}
22587
22588impl ResidualGridAccumulation {
22589    fn add(&mut self, other: Self) {
22590        self.valid_samples += other.valid_samples;
22591        self.planned_samples += other.planned_samples;
22592        self.gridded_residual_samples += other.gridded_residual_samples;
22593        self.skipped_not_gridable += other.skipped_not_gridable;
22594        self.skipped_invalid_weight += other.skipped_invalid_weight;
22595        self.skipped_invalid_sumwt += other.skipped_invalid_sumwt;
22596        self.skipped_out_of_grid += other.skipped_out_of_grid;
22597        self.skipped_nonfinite_visibility += other.skipped_nonfinite_visibility;
22598    }
22599}
22600
22601#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
22602fn accumulate_streaming_standard_mfs_residual_grid_serial(
22603    gridder: &StandardGridder,
22604    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
22605    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
22606    direct_components: Option<&Vec<DirectComponent>>,
22607    use_direct_point_predict: bool,
22608    mut samples: Option<&mut Vec<ResidualSampleTraceInternal>>,
22609    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
22610) -> ResidualGridAccumulation {
22611    let mut counts = ResidualGridAccumulation::default();
22612    let mut census = StandardMfsTapCensus::new("streaming_residual_grid");
22613    let collect_profile = profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled();
22614    for (batch_index, batch) in batches.iter().enumerate() {
22615        for index in 0..batch.len() {
22616            accumulate_streaming_standard_mfs_residual_sample(
22617                gridder,
22618                batch,
22619                batch_index,
22620                index,
22621                model_grid,
22622                direct_components,
22623                use_direct_point_predict,
22624                samples.as_deref_mut(),
22625                residual_grid,
22626                &mut counts,
22627                collect_profile,
22628                census.as_mut(),
22629            );
22630        }
22631    }
22632    if let Some(census) = census {
22633        census.log(std::mem::size_of::<StandardMfsPlannedSample>());
22634    }
22635    counts
22636}
22637
22638fn accumulate_streaming_standard_mfs_residual_grid_parallel(
22639    gridder: &StandardGridder,
22640    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
22641    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
22642    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
22643    requested_threads: usize,
22644) -> Result<ResidualGridAccumulation, ImagingError> {
22645    let thread_count = requested_threads
22646        .min(batches.len())
22647        .min(thread::available_parallelism().map_or(1, |value| value.get()))
22648        .max(1);
22649    if thread_count <= 1 || batches.len() < 2 {
22650        let stage_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
22651        let counts = accumulate_streaming_standard_mfs_residual_grid_serial(
22652            gridder,
22653            batches,
22654            model_grid,
22655            None,
22656            false,
22657            None,
22658            residual_grid,
22659        );
22660        let samples_total = standard_mfs_sample_count(batches);
22661        profile::log_serial_stage(profile::SerialStageProfile {
22662            stage: "streaming_residual_refresh",
22663            samples_total,
22664            finite_visibility_samples: counts.valid_samples,
22665            nonfinite_visibility_samples: samples_total.saturating_sub(counts.valid_samples),
22666            planned_samples: counts.planned_samples,
22667            model_grid_present_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
22668                counts.gridded_residual_samples
22669            } else {
22670                0
22671            },
22672            model_grid_absent_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
22673                0
22674            } else {
22675                counts.gridded_residual_samples
22676            },
22677            degrid_tap_visits: if model_grid.is_some() {
22678                counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49)
22679            } else {
22680                0
22681            },
22682            grid_tap_visits: counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49),
22683            stage_duration: profile::elapsed_since(stage_started),
22684        });
22685        return Ok(counts);
22686    }
22687
22688    let [nx, ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
22689    let chunk_len = batches.len().div_ceil(thread_count);
22690    let stage_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
22691    let mut local_results = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
22692    let join_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
22693    thread::scope(|scope| {
22694        let mut handles = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
22695        for (chunk_index, chunk) in batches.chunks(chunk_len).enumerate() {
22696            let batch_offset = chunk_index * chunk_len;
22697            let worker_samples = standard_mfs_sample_count(chunk);
22698            handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
22699                let alloc_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
22700                let mut local_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((nx, ny));
22701                let alloc_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(alloc_started);
22702                let compute_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
22703                let counts = accumulate_streaming_standard_mfs_residual_grid_serial(
22704                    gridder,
22705                    chunk,
22706                    model_grid,
22707                    None,
22708                    false,
22709                    None,
22710                    &mut local_grid,
22711                );
22712                let compute_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(compute_started);
22713                (
22714                    batch_offset,
22715                    worker_samples,
22716                    local_grid,
22717                    counts,
22718                    alloc_elapsed,
22719                    compute_elapsed,
22720                )
22721            }));
22722        }
22723        for handle in handles {
22724            local_results.push(handle.join().map_err(|_| {
22725                ImagingError::Unsupported("standard MFS streaming grid worker panicked".to_string())
22726            })?);
22727        }
22728        Ok::<(), ImagingError>(())
22729    })?;
22730    let join_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(join_started);
22731
22732    local_results.sort_by_key(|(batch_offset, _, _, _, _, _)| *batch_offset);
22733    let mut counts = ResidualGridAccumulation::default();
22734    let merge_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
22735    for (_, _, local_grid, local_counts, _, _) in &local_results {
22736        add_complex64_grid(residual_grid, local_grid);
22737        counts.add(*local_counts);
22738    }
22739    let merge_elapsed = profile::elapsed_since(merge_started);
22740    profile::log_parallel_stage(profile::ParallelStageProfile {
22741        stage: "streaming_residual_refresh_grid",
22742        requested_threads,
22743        actual_threads: local_results.len(),
22744        chunking: "batch",
22745        chunk_len,
22746        samples_total: standard_mfs_sample_count(batches),
22747        samples_per_worker: local_results
22748            .iter()
22749            .map(|(_, worker_samples, _, _, _, _)| *worker_samples)
22750            .collect(),
22751        local_grid_bytes_per_worker: complex64_grid_bytes(nx, ny, 1),
22752        local_grid_count: 1,
22753        local_alloc_zero_by_worker: local_results
22754            .iter()
22755            .map(|(_, _, _, _, alloc_elapsed, _)| *alloc_elapsed)
22756            .collect(),
22757        worker_compute_by_worker: local_results
22758            .iter()
22759            .map(|(_, _, _, _, _, compute_elapsed)| *compute_elapsed)
22760            .collect(),
22761        join_duration: join_elapsed,
22762        merge_duration: merge_elapsed,
22763        stage_duration: profile::elapsed_since(stage_started),
22764    });
22765    for (worker_index, (_, worker_samples, _, local_counts, alloc_elapsed, compute_elapsed)) in
22766        local_results.iter().enumerate()
22767    {
22768        profile::log_parallel_worker(profile::ParallelWorkerProfile {
22769            stage: "streaming_residual_refresh_grid",
22770            worker_index,
22771            samples: *worker_samples,
22772            accepted_samples: local_counts.planned_samples,
22773            finite_visibility_samples: local_counts.valid_samples,
22774            nonfinite_visibility_samples: local_counts.skipped_nonfinite_visibility,
22775            skipped_not_gridable: local_counts.skipped_not_gridable,
22776            skipped_invalid_weight: local_counts.skipped_invalid_weight,
22777            skipped_invalid_sumwt: local_counts.skipped_invalid_sumwt,
22778            skipped_invalid_density: 0,
22779            skipped_out_of_grid: local_counts.skipped_out_of_grid,
22780            degrid_tap_visits: if model_grid.is_some() {
22781                local_counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49)
22782            } else {
22783                0
22784            },
22785            grid_tap_visits: local_counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49),
22786            density_cell_hits: 0,
22787            local_alloc_zero: *alloc_elapsed,
22788            worker_compute: *compute_elapsed,
22789        });
22790    }
22791    profile::log_serial_stage(profile::SerialStageProfile {
22792        stage: "streaming_residual_refresh_counts",
22793        samples_total: standard_mfs_sample_count(batches),
22794        finite_visibility_samples: counts.valid_samples,
22795        nonfinite_visibility_samples: standard_mfs_sample_count(batches)
22796            .saturating_sub(counts.valid_samples),
22797        planned_samples: counts.planned_samples,
22798        model_grid_present_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
22799            counts.gridded_residual_samples
22800        } else {
22801            0
22802        },
22803        model_grid_absent_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
22804            0
22805        } else {
22806            counts.gridded_residual_samples
22807        },
22808        degrid_tap_visits: if model_grid.is_some() {
22809            counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49)
22810        } else {
22811            0
22812        },
22813        grid_tap_visits: counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49),
22814        stage_duration: Duration::ZERO,
22815    });
22816    Ok(counts)
22817}
22818
22819#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
22820fn accumulate_streaming_standard_mfs_residual_sample(
22821    gridder: &StandardGridder,
22822    batch: &VisibilityBatch,
22823    batch_index: usize,
22824    index: usize,
22825    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
22826    direct_components: Option<&Vec<DirectComponent>>,
22827    use_direct_point_predict: bool,
22828    samples: Option<&mut Vec<ResidualSampleTraceInternal>>,
22829    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex64>,
22830    counts: &mut ResidualGridAccumulation,
22831    collect_profile: bool,
22832    mut census: Option<&mut StandardMfsTapCensus>,
22833) {
22834    let weight = batch.weight[index];
22835    let observed_visibility = batch.visibility[index];
22836    let gridable = batch.gridable[index];
22837    let planned_sample: Option<PositiveTapSet> =
22838        if gridable && weight.is_finite() && weight > 0.0 && finite_visibility(observed_visibility)
22839        {
22840            counts.valid_samples += 1;
22841            let planned_sample =
22842                gridder.plan_positive_taps(batch.u_lambda[index], batch.v_lambda[index]);
22843            if let Some(plan) = planned_sample.as_ref() {
22844                counts.planned_samples += 1;
22845                if let Some(census) = census.as_mut() {
22846                    census.observe_accepted(plan);
22847                }
22848            } else {
22849                if collect_profile {
22850                    counts.skipped_out_of_grid += 1;
22851                }
22852                if let Some(census) = census.as_mut() {
22853                    census.observe_skip(StandardMfsTapSkipReason::OutOfGrid);
22854                }
22855            }
22856            planned_sample
22857        } else {
22858            if !gridable {
22859                if collect_profile {
22860                    counts.skipped_not_gridable += 1;
22861                }
22862                if let Some(census) = census.as_mut() {
22863                    census.observe_skip(StandardMfsTapSkipReason::NotGridable);
22864                }
22865            } else if !(weight.is_finite() && weight > 0.0) {
22866                if collect_profile {
22867                    counts.skipped_invalid_weight += 1;
22868                }
22869                if let Some(census) = census.as_mut() {
22870                    census.observe_skip(StandardMfsTapSkipReason::InvalidWeight);
22871                }
22872            } else {
22873                if collect_profile {
22874                    counts.skipped_nonfinite_visibility += 1;
22875                }
22876                if let Some(census) = census.as_mut() {
22877                    census.observe_skip(StandardMfsTapSkipReason::NonfiniteVisibility);
22878                }
22879            }
22880            None
22881        };
22882    let sumwt_factor = batch.sumwt_factor[index];
22883    let sumwt_valid = sumwt_factor.is_finite() && sumwt_factor > 0.0;
22884    let mut fused_residual_gridded = false;
22885    let predicted_visibility = if let Some(plan) = planned_sample.as_ref() {
22886        if use_direct_point_predict {
22887            direct_components.map_or_else(
22888                || Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0),
22889                |components| {
22890                    direct_predict_visibility(
22891                        components,
22892                        batch.u_lambda[index],
22893                        batch.v_lambda[index],
22894                        0.0,
22895                    )
22896                },
22897            )
22898        } else if let Some(model_grid) = model_grid {
22899            if sumwt_valid {
22900                let residual_weight = f64::from(weight * sumwt_factor);
22901                counts.gridded_residual_samples += 1;
22902                fused_residual_gridded = true;
22903                gridder.degrid_model_and_grid_residual_taps_planned_f64(
22904                    model_grid,
22905                    residual_grid,
22906                    plan,
22907                    observed_visibility,
22908                    residual_weight,
22909                )
22910            } else {
22911                gridder.degrid_sample_taps_planned_normalized(model_grid, plan)
22912            }
22913        } else {
22914            Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0)
22915        }
22916    } else {
22917        Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0)
22918    };
22919    let residual_visibility = observed_visibility - predicted_visibility;
22920    if let Some(samples) = samples {
22921        samples.push(ResidualSampleTraceInternal {
22922            batch_index,
22923            sample_index: index,
22924            u_lambda: batch.u_lambda[index],
22925            v_lambda: batch.v_lambda[index],
22926            w_lambda: batch.w_lambda[index],
22927            observed_visibility,
22928            predicted_visibility,
22929            residual_visibility,
22930            weight,
22931            gridable,
22932        });
22933    }
22934    let Some(plan) = planned_sample.as_ref() else {
22935        return;
22936    };
22937    if !sumwt_valid {
22938        if collect_profile {
22939            counts.skipped_invalid_sumwt += 1;
22940        }
22941        if let Some(census) = census.as_mut() {
22942            census.observe_skip(StandardMfsTapSkipReason::InvalidSumwt);
22943        }
22944        return;
22945    }
22946    if fused_residual_gridded {
22947        return;
22948    }
22949    counts.gridded_residual_samples += 1;
22950    let residual_weight = f64::from(weight * sumwt_factor);
22951    let residual = Complex64::new(
22952        f64::from(residual_visibility.re) * residual_weight,
22953        f64::from(residual_visibility.im) * residual_weight,
22954    );
22955    gridder.grid_sample_taps_planned_f64(residual_grid, plan, residual);
22956}
22957
22958fn compute_residual_trace_standard(
22959    geometry: ImageGeometry,
22960    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
22961    gridder: &StandardGridder,
22962    model: &Array2<f32>,
22963    psf_state: &PsfState,
22964    use_direct_point_predict: bool,
22965    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
22966) -> Result<ResidualRefreshTraceInternal, ImagingError> {
22967    compute_residual_standard_internal(
22968        geometry,
22969        batches,
22970        gridder,
22971        model,
22972        psf_state,
22973        use_direct_point_predict,
22974        true,
22975        stage_timings,
22976    )
22977}
22978
22979#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
22980fn compute_residual_standard_internal(
22981    geometry: ImageGeometry,
22982    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
22983    gridder: &StandardGridder,
22984    model: &Array2<f32>,
22985    psf_state: &PsfState,
22986    use_direct_point_predict: bool,
22987    capture_samples: bool,
22988    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
22989) -> Result<ResidualRefreshTraceInternal, ImagingError> {
22990    let trace_timing = env::var_os("CASA_RS_TRACE_RESIDUAL_TIMING").is_some();
22991    let total_started = trace_timing.then(Instant::now);
22992    let [nx, ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
22993    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((nx, ny));
22994    let mut timings = ResidualComputationTimings::default();
22995    let mut samples = if capture_samples {
22996        Vec::with_capacity(batches.iter().map(VisibilityBatch::len).sum())
22997    } else {
22998        Vec::new()
22999    };
23000    let model_nonzero_components = model.iter().filter(|&&value| value.abs() > 0.0).count();
23001    let direct_setup_started = trace_timing.then(Instant::now);
23002    let direct_pixels = use_direct_point_predict.then(|| build_direct_pixel_coordinates(geometry));
23003    let direct_components = direct_pixels
23004        .as_ref()
23005        .map(|pixels| build_direct_components(model, pixels, geometry.image_shape[1]));
23006    let direct_setup_elapsed = direct_setup_started.map(|started| started.elapsed());
23007    let model_grid = if !use_direct_point_predict && model_nonzero_components > 0 {
23008        let model_fft_started = Instant::now();
23009        let transformed = centered_fft2(&gridder.apodize_model(model));
23010        timings.model_fft = model_fft_started.elapsed();
23011        Some(transformed)
23012    } else {
23013        None
23014    };
23015
23016    let degrid_grid_started = Instant::now();
23017    let grid_threads = if capture_samples || use_direct_point_predict {
23018        1
23019    } else {
23020        standard_mfs_grid_threads()
23021    };
23022    let samples_total = standard_mfs_sample_count(batches);
23023    let ResidualGridAccumulation {
23024        valid_samples,
23025        planned_samples,
23026        gridded_residual_samples,
23027        ..
23028    } = if grid_threads > 1 {
23029        accumulate_streaming_standard_mfs_residual_grid_parallel(
23030            gridder,
23031            batches,
23032            model_grid.as_ref(),
23033            &mut residual_grid,
23034            grid_threads,
23035        )?
23036    } else {
23037        let stage_started = profile::maybe_profile_now();
23038        let counts = accumulate_streaming_standard_mfs_residual_grid_serial(
23039            gridder,
23040            batches,
23041            model_grid.as_ref(),
23042            direct_components.as_ref(),
23043            use_direct_point_predict,
23044            capture_samples.then_some(&mut samples),
23045            &mut residual_grid,
23046        );
23047        profile::log_serial_stage(profile::SerialStageProfile {
23048            stage: "streaming_residual_refresh",
23049            samples_total,
23050            finite_visibility_samples: counts.valid_samples,
23051            nonfinite_visibility_samples: samples_total.saturating_sub(counts.valid_samples),
23052            planned_samples: counts.planned_samples,
23053            model_grid_present_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
23054                counts.gridded_residual_samples
23055            } else {
23056                0
23057            },
23058            model_grid_absent_samples: if model_grid.is_some() {
23059                0
23060            } else {
23061                counts.gridded_residual_samples
23062            },
23063            degrid_tap_visits: if model_grid.is_some() {
23064                counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49)
23065            } else {
23066                0
23067            },
23068            grid_tap_visits: counts.gridded_residual_samples.saturating_mul(49),
23069            stage_duration: profile::elapsed_since(stage_started),
23070        });
23071        counts
23072    };
23073    timings.degrid_grid = degrid_grid_started.elapsed();
23074
23075    let fft_started = Instant::now();
23076    let raw = centered_ifft2_f64(&residual_grid);
23077    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
23078    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
23079    let mut image = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw);
23080    image.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_state.normalization_sumwt / psf_state.psf_peak);
23081    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
23082    stage_timings.model_fft += timings.model_fft;
23083    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += timings.degrid_grid;
23084    stage_timings.residual_fft += timings.fft;
23085    stage_timings.residual_normalize += timings.normalize;
23086    if trace_timing {
23087        eprintln!(
23088            "CASA_RS_TRACE_RESIDUAL_TIMING residual_refresh mode={} grid_threads={} batches={} input_samples={} valid_samples={} planned_samples={} gridded_residual_samples={} model_nonzero={} direct_components={} direct_setup_ms={:.3} model_fft_ms={:.3} degrid_grid_ms={:.3} residual_fft_ms={:.3} normalize_ms={:.3} total_ms={:.3}",
23089            if use_direct_point_predict {
23090                "direct"
23091            } else {
23092                "fft_grid"
23093            },
23094            grid_threads,
23095            batches.len(),
23096            batches.iter().map(VisibilityBatch::len).sum::<usize>(),
23097            valid_samples,
23098            planned_samples,
23099            gridded_residual_samples,
23100            model_nonzero_components,
23101            direct_components.as_ref().map_or(0, Vec::len),
23102            direct_setup_elapsed.unwrap_or_default().as_secs_f64() * 1000.0,
23103            timings.model_fft.as_secs_f64() * 1000.0,
23104            timings.degrid_grid.as_secs_f64() * 1000.0,
23105            timings.fft.as_secs_f64() * 1000.0,
23106            timings.normalize.as_secs_f64() * 1000.0,
23107            total_started
23108                .map(|started| started.elapsed().as_secs_f64() * 1000.0)
23109                .unwrap_or_default()
23110        );
23111    }
23112    Ok(ResidualRefreshTraceInternal {
23113        samples,
23114        residual_image: image,
23115        normalization_sumwt: psf_state.normalization_sumwt,
23116        reported_sumwt: psf_state.reported_sumwt,
23117        psf_peak: psf_state.psf_peak,
23118        gridded_samples: psf_state.gridded_samples,
23119        skipped_samples: psf_state.skipped_samples,
23120    })
23121}
23122
23123#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
23124fn compute_residual_trace_cube_standard(
23125    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
23126    model_interpolation_batches: &[CubeModelInterpolationBatch],
23127    gridder: &StandardGridder,
23128    model_planes: &[Array2<f32>],
23129    identity_model_channel_index: usize,
23130    output_channel_frequency_hz: f64,
23131    model_channel_frequencies_hz: &[f64],
23132    prediction_lambda_mode: CubePredictionLambdaMode,
23133    psf_state: &PsfState,
23134    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
23135) -> Result<ResidualRefreshTraceInternal, ImagingError> {
23136    let mut timings = ResidualComputationTimings::default();
23137    let model_grids = build_cube_model_grids(gridder, model_planes.iter(), &mut timings);
23138    let planned_batches = build_standard_residual_sample_plans(gridder, batches);
23139    let trace = compute_residual_trace_cube_standard_with_model_grids(
23140        batches,
23141        Some(&planned_batches),
23142        model_interpolation_batches,
23143        gridder,
23144        &model_grids,
23145        identity_model_channel_index,
23146        output_channel_frequency_hz,
23147        model_channel_frequencies_hz,
23148        prediction_lambda_mode,
23149        psf_state,
23150        true,
23151        &mut timings,
23152    )?;
23153    stage_timings.model_fft += timings.model_fft;
23154    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += timings.degrid_grid;
23155    stage_timings.residual_fft += timings.fft;
23156    stage_timings.residual_normalize += timings.normalize;
23157    Ok(trace)
23158}
23159
23160fn build_cube_model_grids<'a, I>(
23161    gridder: &StandardGridder,
23162    model_planes: I,
23163    timings: &mut ResidualComputationTimings,
23164) -> Vec<Option<Array2<Complex32>>>
23165where
23166    I: IntoIterator<Item = &'a Array2<f32>>,
23167{
23168    let model_planes = model_planes.into_iter();
23169    let (lower_bound, _) = model_planes.size_hint();
23170    let mut model_grids = Vec::with_capacity(lower_bound);
23171    for model_plane in model_planes {
23172        if model_plane.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0) {
23173            let model_fft_started = Instant::now();
23174            let transformed = centered_fft2(&gridder.apodize_model(model_plane));
23175            timings.model_fft += model_fft_started.elapsed();
23176            model_grids.push(Some(transformed));
23177        } else {
23178            model_grids.push(None);
23179        }
23180    }
23181    model_grids
23182}
23183
23184#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
23185fn compute_residual_trace_cube_standard_with_model_grids(
23186    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
23187    planned_batches: Option<&[Vec<Option<PlannedSample>>]>,
23188    model_interpolation_batches: &[CubeModelInterpolationBatch],
23189    gridder: &StandardGridder,
23190    model_grids: &[Option<Array2<Complex32>>],
23191    identity_model_channel_index: usize,
23192    output_channel_frequency_hz: f64,
23193    model_channel_frequencies_hz: &[f64],
23194    prediction_lambda_mode: CubePredictionLambdaMode,
23195    psf_state: &PsfState,
23196    capture_samples: bool,
23197    timings: &mut ResidualComputationTimings,
23198) -> Result<ResidualRefreshTraceInternal, ImagingError> {
23199    let use_identity_model_interpolation = model_interpolation_batches.is_empty();
23200    if use_identity_model_interpolation && identity_model_channel_index >= model_grids.len() {
23201        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
23202            "cube identity model interpolation references channel {identity_model_channel_index} beyond {} model planes",
23203            model_grids.len()
23204        )));
23205    }
23206    if !use_identity_model_interpolation && model_interpolation_batches.len() != batches.len() {
23207        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
23208            "cube model interpolation batch count {} does not match visibility batch count {}",
23209            model_interpolation_batches.len(),
23210            batches.len()
23211        )));
23212    }
23213    if let Some(plans) = planned_batches
23214        && plans.len() != batches.len()
23215    {
23216        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
23217            "planned batch count {} does not match visibility batch count {}",
23218            plans.len(),
23219            batches.len()
23220        )));
23221    }
23222    let [nx, ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
23223    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((nx, ny));
23224    let mut samples = if capture_samples {
23225        Vec::with_capacity(batches.iter().map(VisibilityBatch::len).sum())
23226    } else {
23227        Vec::new()
23228    };
23229    let degrid_grid_started = Instant::now();
23230    for (batch_index, batch) in batches.iter().enumerate() {
23231        let interpolation_batch = model_interpolation_batches.get(batch_index);
23232        if let Some(interpolation_batch) = interpolation_batch
23233            && interpolation_batch.sample_contributions.len() != batch.len()
23234        {
23235            return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
23236                "cube model interpolation batch {batch_index} length {} does not match visibility batch length {}",
23237                interpolation_batch.sample_contributions.len(),
23238                batch.len()
23239            )));
23240        }
23241        for index in 0..batch.len() {
23242            let weight = batch.weight[index];
23243            let observed_visibility = batch.visibility[index];
23244            let gridable = batch.gridable[index];
23245            let planned_sample = planned_batches
23246                .and_then(|plans| {
23247                    plans
23248                        .get(batch_index)
23249                        .and_then(|batch_plans| batch_plans.get(index))
23250                })
23251                .copied()
23252                .flatten()
23253                .or_else(|| {
23254                    if gridable
23255                        && weight.is_finite()
23256                        && weight > 0.0
23257                        && observed_visibility.re.is_finite()
23258                        && observed_visibility.im.is_finite()
23259                    {
23260                        gridder.plan_sample(batch.u_lambda[index], batch.v_lambda[index])
23261                    } else {
23262                        None
23263                    }
23264                });
23265            let predicted_visibility = if let Some(plan) = planned_sample.as_ref() {
23266                let mut predicted = Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0);
23267                let identity_contribution = [CubeModelChannelContribution {
23268                    model_channel_index: identity_model_channel_index,
23269                    factor: 1.0,
23270                }];
23271                let contributions = interpolation_batch
23272                    .map(|batch| batch.sample_contributions[index].as_slice())
23273                    .unwrap_or(identity_contribution.as_slice());
23274                for contribution in contributions {
23275                    if !(contribution.factor.is_finite() && contribution.factor > 0.0) {
23276                        continue;
23277                    }
23278                    let Some(model_grid) = model_grids.get(contribution.model_channel_index) else {
23279                        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
23280                            "cube model interpolation references channel {} beyond {} model planes",
23281                            contribution.model_channel_index,
23282                            model_grids.len()
23283                        )));
23284                    };
23285                    if let Some(model_grid) = model_grid.as_ref() {
23286                        let contribution_prediction = match prediction_lambda_mode {
23287                            CubePredictionLambdaMode::OutputChannel => gridder
23288                                .degrid_sample_product_planned_normalized(
23289                                    model_grid,
23290                                    &plan.positive,
23291                                ),
23292                            CubePredictionLambdaMode::ModelChannel => {
23293                                let Some(&model_frequency_hz) = model_channel_frequencies_hz
23294                                    .get(contribution.model_channel_index)
23295                                else {
23296                                    return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(format!(
23297                                        "cube model interpolation references model frequency for channel {} beyond {} channels",
23298                                        contribution.model_channel_index,
23299                                        model_channel_frequencies_hz.len()
23300                                    )));
23301                                };
23302                                if !(output_channel_frequency_hz.is_finite()
23303                                    && output_channel_frequency_hz > 0.0
23304                                    && model_frequency_hz.is_finite()
23305                                    && model_frequency_hz > 0.0)
23306                                {
23307                                    continue;
23308                                }
23309                                let uv_scale = model_frequency_hz / output_channel_frequency_hz;
23310                                let Some(model_plan) = gridder.plan_sample(
23311                                    batch.u_lambda[index] * uv_scale,
23312                                    batch.v_lambda[index] * uv_scale,
23313                                ) else {
23314                                    continue;
23315                                };
23316                                gridder.degrid_sample_product_planned_normalized(
23317                                    model_grid,
23318                                    &model_plan.positive,
23319                                )
23320                            }
23321                        };
23322                        predicted += contribution_prediction * contribution.factor;
23323                    }
23324                }
23325                predicted
23326            } else {
23327                Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0)
23328            };
23329            let residual_visibility = observed_visibility - predicted_visibility;
23330            if capture_samples {
23331                samples.push(ResidualSampleTraceInternal {
23332                    batch_index,
23333                    sample_index: index,
23334                    u_lambda: batch.u_lambda[index],
23335                    v_lambda: batch.v_lambda[index],
23336                    w_lambda: batch.w_lambda[index],
23337                    observed_visibility,
23338                    predicted_visibility,
23339                    residual_visibility,
23340                    weight,
23341                    gridable,
23342                });
23343            }
23344            let Some(plan) = planned_sample.as_ref() else {
23345                continue;
23346            };
23347            let sumwt_factor = batch.sumwt_factor[index];
23348            if !(sumwt_factor.is_finite() && sumwt_factor > 0.0) {
23349                continue;
23350            }
23351            let residual_weight = f64::from(weight * sumwt_factor);
23352            let residual = Complex64::new(
23353                f64::from(residual_visibility.re) * residual_weight,
23354                f64::from(residual_visibility.im) * residual_weight,
23355            );
23356            gridder.grid_sample_product_planned_f64(&mut residual_grid, &plan.positive, residual);
23357        }
23358    }
23359    timings.degrid_grid = degrid_grid_started.elapsed();
23360
23361    let fft_started = Instant::now();
23362    let raw = centered_ifft2_f64(&residual_grid);
23363    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
23364    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
23365    let mut image = gridder.corrected_image_from_grid_f64(&raw);
23366    image.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_state.normalization_sumwt / psf_state.psf_peak);
23367    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
23368    Ok(ResidualRefreshTraceInternal {
23369        samples,
23370        residual_image: image,
23371        normalization_sumwt: psf_state.normalization_sumwt,
23372        reported_sumwt: psf_state.reported_sumwt,
23373        psf_peak: psf_state.psf_peak,
23374        gridded_samples: psf_state.gridded_samples,
23375        skipped_samples: psf_state.skipped_samples,
23376    })
23377}
23378
23379#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
23380struct RawWProjectSample {
23381    batch_index: usize,
23382    sample_index: usize,
23383    u_lambda: f64,
23384    v_lambda: f64,
23385    w_lambda: f64,
23386    weight: f32,
23387    visibility: Complex32,
23388    sumwt_factor: f32,
23389}
23390
23391#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
23392struct WProjectSkippedSample {
23393    batch_index: usize,
23394    sample_index: usize,
23395    u_lambda: f64,
23396    v_lambda: f64,
23397    w_lambda: f64,
23398    weight: f32,
23399    sumwt_factor: f32,
23400    reason: WProjectSkipReason,
23401}
23402
23403#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
23404struct WProjectPreparedSample {
23405    batch_index: usize,
23406    sample_index: usize,
23407    u_lambda: f64,
23408    v_lambda: f64,
23409    w_lambda: f64,
23410    sumwt_factor: f32,
23411    positive_plan: WProjectSamplePlan,
23412    weight: f32,
23413    visibility: Complex32,
23414}
23415
23416struct WProjectPreparedData {
23417    requested_plane_count: Option<usize>,
23418    max_abs_w_lambda: f64,
23419    projector: WProjector,
23420    samples: Vec<WProjectPreparedSample>,
23421    skipped_samples: Vec<WProjectSkippedSample>,
23422    normalization_sumwt: f32,
23423    reported_sumwt: f32,
23424    gridded_samples: usize,
23425}
23426
23427struct WProjectMetalPreparedData {
23428    requested_plane_count: Option<usize>,
23429    max_abs_w_lambda: f64,
23430    projector: WProjector,
23431    samples: Vec<WProjectMetalSample>,
23432    skipped_samples: usize,
23433    max_support: u16,
23434    tap_visits: usize,
23435    normalization_sumwt: f32,
23436    reported_sumwt: f32,
23437    gridded_samples: usize,
23438}
23439
23440struct WProjectMetalPreparedLocal {
23441    sample_start: usize,
23442    samples: Vec<WProjectMetalSample>,
23443    skipped_samples: usize,
23444    normalization_sumwt: f64,
23445    reported_sumwt: f64,
23446    gridded_samples: usize,
23447    max_support: u16,
23448    tap_visits: usize,
23449    worker_elapsed: Duration,
23450}
23451
23452#[derive(Debug, Default)]
23453#[cfg_attr(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage), allow(dead_code))]
23454struct WProjectMetalStreamingChunk {
23455    samples: Vec<WProjectMetalSample>,
23456    skipped_samples: usize,
23457    normalization_sumwt: f64,
23458    reported_sumwt: f64,
23459    gridded_samples: usize,
23460    max_support: u16,
23461    tap_visits: usize,
23462    boundary_merges: usize,
23463    prepare_elapsed: Duration,
23464}
23465
23466#[derive(Debug, Default)]
23467#[cfg_attr(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage), allow(dead_code))]
23468struct WProjectMetalStreamingStats {
23469    chunk_count: usize,
23470    sample_count: usize,
23471    skipped_samples: usize,
23472    gridded_samples: usize,
23473    max_support: u16,
23474    tap_visits: usize,
23475    boundary_merges: usize,
23476    prepare_elapsed: Duration,
23477    sample_buffer_bytes: usize,
23478    encode_elapsed: Duration,
23479    dispatch_wait_elapsed: Duration,
23480}
23481
23482fn log_w_project_prepare_profile(mode: &str, prepared: &WProjectPreparedData, elapsed: Duration) {
23483    if !profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled() {
23484        return;
23485    }
23486    let [grid_width, grid_height] = prepared.projector.grid_shape();
23487    eprintln!(
23488        "wproject_prepare mode={} samples={} skipped={} grid={}x{} planes={} requested_planes={:?} max_abs_w_lambda={:.6e} kernel_width={} sampling={} elapsed_ms={:.3}",
23489        mode,
23490        prepared.samples.len(),
23491        prepared.skipped_samples.len(),
23492        grid_width,
23493        grid_height,
23494        prepared.projector.plane_count(),
23495        prepared.requested_plane_count,
23496        prepared.max_abs_w_lambda,
23497        prepared.projector.kernel_weight_width(),
23498        prepared.projector.sampling(),
23499        profile::millis(elapsed),
23500    );
23501}
23502
23503fn log_w_project_metal_prepare_profile(
23504    mode: &str,
23505    prepared: &WProjectMetalPreparedData,
23506    elapsed: Duration,
23507) {
23508    if !profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled() {
23509        return;
23510    }
23511    let [grid_width, grid_height] = prepared.projector.grid_shape();
23512    let atomic_updates = prepared.tap_visits.saturating_mul(match mode {
23513        "dirty" => 4,
23514        "psf" => 2,
23515        "residual" => 2,
23516        _ => 0,
23517    });
23518    let avg_taps_per_sample = prepared.tap_visits as f64 / prepared.samples.len().max(1) as f64;
23519    let grouped_sample_ratio =
23520        prepared.samples.len() as f64 / prepared.gridded_samples.max(1) as f64;
23521    eprintln!(
23522        "wproject_metal_prepare mode={} samples={} gridded_samples={} grouped_sample_ratio={:.6} skipped={} grid={}x{} planes={} requested_planes={:?} max_abs_w_lambda={:.6e} kernel_width={} sampling={} max_support={} avg_taps_per_sample={:.3} tap_visits={} atomic_updates={} elapsed_ms={:.3}",
23523        mode,
23524        prepared.samples.len(),
23525        prepared.gridded_samples,
23526        grouped_sample_ratio,
23527        prepared.skipped_samples,
23528        grid_width,
23529        grid_height,
23530        prepared.projector.plane_count(),
23531        prepared.requested_plane_count,
23532        prepared.max_abs_w_lambda,
23533        prepared.projector.kernel_weight_width(),
23534        prepared.projector.sampling(),
23535        prepared.max_support,
23536        avg_taps_per_sample,
23537        prepared.tap_visits,
23538        atomic_updates,
23539        profile::millis(elapsed),
23540    );
23541}
23542
23543fn compute_psf_w_project(
23544    geometry: ImageGeometry,
23545    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
23546    gridder: &StandardGridder,
23547    w_project_planes: Option<usize>,
23548    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
23549) -> Result<PsfState, ImagingError> {
23550    if !w_project_initial_dirty_metal_backend_enabled() {
23551        return compute_psf_w_project_streaming(
23552            geometry,
23553            batches,
23554            gridder,
23555            w_project_planes,
23556            stage_timings,
23557        );
23558    }
23559    let prepare_started = Instant::now();
23560    let prepared = prepare_w_project_data(geometry, batches, gridder, w_project_planes)?;
23561    let prepare_elapsed = prepare_started.elapsed();
23562    log_w_project_prepare_profile("psf", &prepared, prepare_elapsed);
23563    let mut timings = PsfComputationTimings {
23564        grid: prepare_elapsed,
23565        ..PsfComputationTimings::default()
23566    };
23567    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
23568    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
23569
23570    let grid_started = Instant::now();
23571    if w_project_initial_dirty_metal_backend_enabled() {
23572        accumulate_w_project_psf_grid_metal(&prepared, &mut psf_grid)?;
23573    } else {
23574        accumulate_w_project_psf_grid(&prepared, &mut psf_grid)?;
23575    }
23576    timings.grid += grid_started.elapsed();
23577
23578    if prepared.normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 || prepared.reported_sumwt <= 0.0 {
23579        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
23580    }
23581
23582    let fft_started = Instant::now();
23583    let raw_psf = centered_ifft2(&psf_grid);
23584    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
23585    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
23586    let mut psf =
23587        gridder.corrected_w_project_image_from_grid(&raw_psf, prepared.projector.sampling());
23588    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| 2.0 * value / prepared.normalization_sumwt);
23589    let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&psf);
23590    if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
23591        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
23592            "PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
23593        ));
23594    }
23595    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
23596    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
23597    stage_timings.psf_grid += timings.grid;
23598    stage_timings.psf_fft += timings.fft;
23599    stage_timings.psf_normalize += timings.normalize;
23600
23601    Ok(PsfState {
23602        psf,
23603        normalization_sumwt: prepared.normalization_sumwt,
23604        reported_sumwt: prepared.reported_sumwt,
23605        psf_peak,
23606        gridded_samples: prepared.gridded_samples,
23607        skipped_samples: prepared.skipped_samples.len(),
23608    })
23609}
23610
23611fn compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_w_project(
23612    geometry: ImageGeometry,
23613    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
23614    gridder: &StandardGridder,
23615    w_project_planes: Option<usize>,
23616    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
23617) -> Result<(PsfState, Array2<f32>), ImagingError> {
23618    if !w_project_initial_dirty_metal_backend_enabled() {
23619        return compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_w_project_streaming(
23620            geometry,
23621            batches,
23622            gridder,
23623            w_project_planes,
23624            stage_timings,
23625        );
23626    }
23627    let prepare_started = Instant::now();
23628    let prepared = prepare_w_project_metal_data(geometry, batches, gridder, w_project_planes)?;
23629    let prepare_elapsed = prepare_started.elapsed();
23630    log_w_project_metal_prepare_profile("dirty", &prepared, prepare_elapsed);
23631    let mut timings = PsfComputationTimings {
23632        grid: prepare_elapsed,
23633        ..PsfComputationTimings::default()
23634    };
23635    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
23636    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
23637    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
23638
23639    let grid_started = Instant::now();
23640    if w_project_initial_dirty_metal_backend_enabled() {
23641        accumulate_w_project_grid_metal_samples(
23642            &prepared.projector,
23643            &prepared.samples,
23644            Duration::ZERO,
23645            None,
23646            &mut psf_grid,
23647            &mut residual_grid,
23648            W_PROJECT_METAL_MODE_DIRTY,
23649        )?;
23650    } else {
23651        unreachable!("wproject dirty Metal path should have returned streaming CPU earlier");
23652    }
23653    let grid_elapsed = grid_started.elapsed();
23654    let split_grid_elapsed = Duration::from_secs_f64(grid_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 0.5);
23655    timings.grid += split_grid_elapsed;
23656    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += grid_elapsed.saturating_sub(split_grid_elapsed);
23657
23658    if prepared.normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 || prepared.reported_sumwt <= 0.0 {
23659        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
23660    }
23661
23662    let psf_fft_started = Instant::now();
23663    let raw_psf = centered_ifft2(&psf_grid);
23664    timings.fft = psf_fft_started.elapsed();
23665    let psf_normalize_started = Instant::now();
23666    let mut psf =
23667        gridder.corrected_w_project_image_from_grid(&raw_psf, prepared.projector.sampling());
23668    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| 2.0 * value / prepared.normalization_sumwt);
23669    let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&psf);
23670    if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
23671        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
23672            "PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
23673        ));
23674    }
23675    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
23676    timings.normalize = psf_normalize_started.elapsed();
23677
23678    let residual_fft_started = Instant::now();
23679    let raw_residual = centered_ifft2(&residual_grid);
23680    stage_timings.residual_fft += residual_fft_started.elapsed();
23681    let residual_normalize_started = Instant::now();
23682    let mut residual =
23683        gridder.corrected_w_project_image_from_grid(&raw_residual, prepared.projector.sampling());
23684    residual.mapv_inplace(|value| 2.0 * value / prepared.normalization_sumwt / psf_peak);
23685    stage_timings.residual_normalize += residual_normalize_started.elapsed();
23686
23687    stage_timings.psf_grid += timings.grid;
23688    stage_timings.psf_fft += timings.fft;
23689    stage_timings.psf_normalize += timings.normalize;
23690
23691    Ok((
23692        PsfState {
23693            psf,
23694            normalization_sumwt: prepared.normalization_sumwt,
23695            reported_sumwt: prepared.reported_sumwt,
23696            psf_peak,
23697            gridded_samples: prepared.gridded_samples,
23698            skipped_samples: prepared.skipped_samples,
23699        },
23700        residual,
23701    ))
23702}
23703
23704fn compute_psf_w_project_streaming(
23705    geometry: ImageGeometry,
23706    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
23707    gridder: &StandardGridder,
23708    w_project_planes: Option<usize>,
23709    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
23710) -> Result<PsfState, ImagingError> {
23711    let prepare_started = Instant::now();
23712    let (raw_sample_count, max_abs_w_lambda) = w_project_raw_sample_summary(batches);
23713    if raw_sample_count == 0 {
23714        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
23715    }
23716    let projector = WProjector::new(geometry, gridder, max_abs_w_lambda, w_project_planes)?;
23717    let mut timings = PsfComputationTimings {
23718        grid: prepare_started.elapsed(),
23719        ..PsfComputationTimings::default()
23720    };
23721    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
23722    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
23723
23724    let grid_started = Instant::now();
23725    let accumulation = accumulate_w_project_psf_grid_streaming(batches, &projector, &mut psf_grid)?;
23726    timings.grid += grid_started.elapsed();
23727
23728    let psf_state =
23729        psf_grid_to_w_project_state(gridder, &projector, &psf_grid, accumulation, &mut timings)?;
23730    stage_timings.psf_grid += timings.grid;
23731    stage_timings.psf_fft += timings.fft;
23732    stage_timings.psf_normalize += timings.normalize;
23733    Ok(psf_state)
23734}
23735
23736fn compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_w_project_streaming(
23737    geometry: ImageGeometry,
23738    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
23739    gridder: &StandardGridder,
23740    w_project_planes: Option<usize>,
23741    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
23742) -> Result<(PsfState, Array2<f32>), ImagingError> {
23743    let prepare_started = Instant::now();
23744    let (raw_sample_count, max_abs_w_lambda) = w_project_raw_sample_summary(batches);
23745    if raw_sample_count == 0 {
23746        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
23747    }
23748    let projector = WProjector::new(geometry, gridder, max_abs_w_lambda, w_project_planes)?;
23749    let mut timings = PsfComputationTimings {
23750        grid: prepare_started.elapsed(),
23751        ..PsfComputationTimings::default()
23752    };
23753    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
23754    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
23755    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
23756
23757    let grid_started = Instant::now();
23758    let accumulation = accumulate_w_project_dirty_grids_streaming(
23759        batches,
23760        &projector,
23761        &mut psf_grid,
23762        &mut residual_grid,
23763    )?;
23764    let grid_elapsed = grid_started.elapsed();
23765    let split_grid_elapsed = Duration::from_secs_f64(grid_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 0.5);
23766    timings.grid += split_grid_elapsed;
23767    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += grid_elapsed.saturating_sub(split_grid_elapsed);
23768
23769    let psf_state =
23770        psf_grid_to_w_project_state(gridder, &projector, &psf_grid, accumulation, &mut timings)?;
23771    let residual_fft_started = Instant::now();
23772    let raw_residual = centered_ifft2(&residual_grid);
23773    stage_timings.residual_fft += residual_fft_started.elapsed();
23774    let residual_normalize_started = Instant::now();
23775    let mut residual =
23776        gridder.corrected_w_project_image_from_grid(&raw_residual, projector.sampling());
23777    residual.mapv_inplace(|value| 2.0 * value / psf_state.normalization_sumwt / psf_state.psf_peak);
23778    stage_timings.residual_normalize += residual_normalize_started.elapsed();
23779
23780    stage_timings.psf_grid += timings.grid;
23781    stage_timings.psf_fft += timings.fft;
23782    stage_timings.psf_normalize += timings.normalize;
23783    Ok((psf_state, residual))
23784}
23785
23786fn compute_residual_w_project_streaming(
23787    geometry: ImageGeometry,
23788    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
23789    gridder: &StandardGridder,
23790    model: &Array2<f32>,
23791    psf_state: &PsfState,
23792    w_project_planes: Option<usize>,
23793    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
23794) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
23795    let prepare_started = Instant::now();
23796    let (raw_sample_count, max_abs_w_lambda) = w_project_raw_sample_summary(batches);
23797    if raw_sample_count == 0 {
23798        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
23799    }
23800    let projector = WProjector::new(geometry, gridder, max_abs_w_lambda, w_project_planes)?;
23801    let mut timings = ResidualComputationTimings {
23802        degrid_grid: prepare_started.elapsed(),
23803        ..ResidualComputationTimings::default()
23804    };
23805    let model_nonzero = model.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0);
23806    let model_grid = if model_nonzero {
23807        let model_fft_started = Instant::now();
23808        let transformed =
23809            centered_fft2(&gridder.apodize_w_project_model(model, projector.sampling()));
23810        timings.model_fft = model_fft_started.elapsed();
23811        Some(transformed)
23812    } else {
23813        None
23814    };
23815    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
23816    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
23817    let degrid_started = Instant::now();
23818    accumulate_w_project_residual_grid_streaming(
23819        batches,
23820        &projector,
23821        model_grid.as_ref(),
23822        &mut residual_grid,
23823    )?;
23824    timings.degrid_grid += degrid_started.elapsed();
23825
23826    let fft_started = Instant::now();
23827    let raw = centered_ifft2(&residual_grid);
23828    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
23829    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
23830    let mut image = gridder.corrected_w_project_image_from_grid(&raw, projector.sampling());
23831    image.mapv_inplace(|value| 2.0 * value / psf_state.normalization_sumwt / psf_state.psf_peak);
23832    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
23833    stage_timings.model_fft += timings.model_fft;
23834    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += timings.degrid_grid;
23835    stage_timings.residual_fft += timings.fft;
23836    stage_timings.residual_normalize += timings.normalize;
23837    Ok(image)
23838}
23839
23840fn compute_residual_w_project(
23841    geometry: ImageGeometry,
23842    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
23843    gridder: &StandardGridder,
23844    model: &Array2<f32>,
23845    psf_state: &PsfState,
23846    w_project_planes: Option<usize>,
23847    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
23848) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
23849    if !w_project_residual_metal_backend_enabled() {
23850        return compute_residual_w_project_streaming(
23851            geometry,
23852            batches,
23853            gridder,
23854            model,
23855            psf_state,
23856            w_project_planes,
23857            stage_timings,
23858        );
23859    }
23860    let prepare_started = Instant::now();
23861    let prepared = prepare_w_project_metal_data(geometry, batches, gridder, w_project_planes)?;
23862    let prepare_elapsed = prepare_started.elapsed();
23863    log_w_project_metal_prepare_profile("residual", &prepared, prepare_elapsed);
23864    let mut timings = ResidualComputationTimings {
23865        degrid_grid: prepare_elapsed,
23866        ..ResidualComputationTimings::default()
23867    };
23868    let model_nonzero = model.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0);
23869    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
23870    let model_grid = if model_nonzero {
23871        let model_fft_started = Instant::now();
23872        let transformed =
23873            centered_fft2(&gridder.apodize_w_project_model(model, prepared.projector.sampling()));
23874        timings.model_fft = model_fft_started.elapsed();
23875        Some(transformed)
23876    } else {
23877        None
23878    };
23879
23880    let degrid_started = Instant::now();
23881    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
23882    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
23883    if w_project_residual_metal_backend_enabled() {
23884        accumulate_w_project_grid_metal_samples(
23885            &prepared.projector,
23886            &prepared.samples,
23887            Duration::ZERO,
23888            model_grid.as_ref(),
23889            &mut psf_grid,
23890            &mut residual_grid,
23891            W_PROJECT_METAL_MODE_RESIDUAL,
23892        )?;
23893    } else {
23894        unreachable!("wproject residual Metal path should have returned streaming CPU earlier");
23895    }
23896    timings.degrid_grid += degrid_started.elapsed();
23897
23898    let fft_started = Instant::now();
23899    let raw = centered_ifft2(&residual_grid);
23900    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
23901    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
23902    let mut image =
23903        gridder.corrected_w_project_image_from_grid(&raw, prepared.projector.sampling());
23904    image.mapv_inplace(|value| 2.0 * value / psf_state.normalization_sumwt / psf_state.psf_peak);
23905    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
23906    stage_timings.model_fft += timings.model_fft;
23907    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += timings.degrid_grid;
23908    stage_timings.residual_fft += timings.fft;
23909    stage_timings.residual_normalize += timings.normalize;
23910    Ok(image)
23911}
23912
23913fn scan_w_project_replay<F>(replay_weighted_batches: &mut F) -> Result<f64, ImagingError>
23914where
23915    F: FnMut(
23916        &mut dyn FnMut(Vec<VisibilityBatch>) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
23917    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
23918{
23919    let mut raw_sample_count = 0usize;
23920    let mut max_abs_w_lambda = 0.0f64;
23921    replay_weighted_batches(&mut |batches| {
23922        for batch in &batches {
23923            for sample_index in 0..batch.len() {
23924                let sample = RawWProjectSample {
23925                    batch_index: 0,
23926                    sample_index,
23927                    u_lambda: batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
23928                    v_lambda: batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
23929                    w_lambda: batch.w_lambda[sample_index],
23930                    weight: batch.weight[sample_index],
23931                    visibility: batch.visibility[sample_index],
23932                    sumwt_factor: batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index],
23933                };
23934                if batch.gridable[sample_index] && raw_w_project_sample_is_valid(sample) {
23935                    raw_sample_count += 1;
23936                    max_abs_w_lambda = max_abs_w_lambda.max(sample.w_lambda.abs());
23937                }
23938            }
23939        }
23940        Ok(())
23941    })?;
23942    if raw_sample_count == 0 {
23943        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
23944    }
23945    Ok(max_abs_w_lambda)
23946}
23947
23948fn compute_psf_w_project_replay<F>(
23949    gridder: &StandardGridder,
23950    projector: &WProjector,
23951    replay_weighted_batches: &mut F,
23952    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
23953) -> Result<PsfState, ImagingError>
23954where
23955    F: FnMut(
23956        &mut dyn FnMut(Vec<VisibilityBatch>) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
23957    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
23958{
23959    let mut timings = PsfComputationTimings::default();
23960    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
23961    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
23962
23963    let grid_started = Instant::now();
23964    let mut accumulation = WProjectGridAccumulation::default();
23965    replay_weighted_batches(&mut |batches| {
23966        accumulation.add(accumulate_w_project_psf_grid_streaming(
23967            &batches,
23968            projector,
23969            &mut psf_grid,
23970        )?);
23971        Ok(())
23972    })?;
23973    timings.grid += grid_started.elapsed();
23974
23975    let psf_state =
23976        psf_grid_to_w_project_state(gridder, projector, &psf_grid, accumulation, &mut timings)?;
23977    stage_timings.psf_grid += timings.grid;
23978    stage_timings.psf_fft += timings.fft;
23979    stage_timings.psf_normalize += timings.normalize;
23980    Ok(psf_state)
23981}
23982
23983fn compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_w_project_replay<F>(
23984    gridder: &StandardGridder,
23985    projector: &WProjector,
23986    max_abs_w_lambda: f64,
23987    replay_weighted_batches: &mut F,
23988    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
23989) -> Result<(PsfState, Array2<f32>, f64), ImagingError>
23990where
23991    F: FnMut(
23992        &mut dyn FnMut(Vec<VisibilityBatch>) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
23993    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
23994{
23995    let mut timings = PsfComputationTimings::default();
23996    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
23997    let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
23998    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
23999
24000    let grid_started = Instant::now();
24001    let accumulation = if w_project_initial_dirty_metal_backend_enabled() {
24002        accumulate_w_project_grid_metal_streaming_replay(
24003            projector,
24004            None,
24005            &mut psf_grid,
24006            &mut residual_grid,
24007            W_PROJECT_METAL_MODE_DIRTY,
24008            replay_weighted_batches,
24009        )?
24010    } else {
24011        let mut accumulation = WProjectGridAccumulation::default();
24012        replay_weighted_batches(&mut |batches| {
24013            accumulation.add(accumulate_w_project_dirty_grids_streaming(
24014                &batches,
24015                projector,
24016                &mut psf_grid,
24017                &mut residual_grid,
24018            )?);
24019            Ok(())
24020        })?;
24021        accumulation
24022    };
24023    let grid_elapsed = grid_started.elapsed();
24024    let split_grid_elapsed = Duration::from_secs_f64(grid_elapsed.as_secs_f64() * 0.5);
24025    timings.grid += split_grid_elapsed;
24026    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += grid_elapsed.saturating_sub(split_grid_elapsed);
24027
24028    let psf_state =
24029        psf_grid_to_w_project_state(gridder, projector, &psf_grid, accumulation, &mut timings)?;
24030    let residual_fft_started = Instant::now();
24031    let raw_residual = centered_ifft2(&residual_grid);
24032    stage_timings.residual_fft += residual_fft_started.elapsed();
24033    let residual_normalize_started = Instant::now();
24034    let mut residual =
24035        gridder.corrected_w_project_image_from_grid(&raw_residual, projector.sampling());
24036    residual.mapv_inplace(|value| 2.0 * value / psf_state.normalization_sumwt / psf_state.psf_peak);
24037    stage_timings.residual_normalize += residual_normalize_started.elapsed();
24038
24039    stage_timings.psf_grid += timings.grid;
24040    stage_timings.psf_fft += timings.fft;
24041    stage_timings.psf_normalize += timings.normalize;
24042    Ok((psf_state, residual, max_abs_w_lambda))
24043}
24044
24045fn compute_residual_w_project_replay<F>(
24046    gridder: &StandardGridder,
24047    model: &Array2<f32>,
24048    psf_state: &PsfState,
24049    projector: &WProjector,
24050    replay_weighted_batches: &mut F,
24051    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
24052) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError>
24053where
24054    F: FnMut(
24055        &mut dyn FnMut(Vec<VisibilityBatch>) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
24056    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
24057{
24058    let mut timings = ResidualComputationTimings::default();
24059    let model_nonzero = model.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0);
24060    let model_grid = if model_nonzero {
24061        let model_fft_started = Instant::now();
24062        let transformed =
24063            centered_fft2(&gridder.apodize_w_project_model(model, projector.sampling()));
24064        timings.model_fft = model_fft_started.elapsed();
24065        Some(transformed)
24066    } else {
24067        None
24068    };
24069    let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
24070    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
24071
24072    let degrid_started = Instant::now();
24073    if w_project_residual_metal_backend_enabled() {
24074        let mut psf_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
24075        accumulate_w_project_grid_metal_streaming_replay(
24076            projector,
24077            model_grid.as_ref(),
24078            &mut psf_grid,
24079            &mut residual_grid,
24080            W_PROJECT_METAL_MODE_RESIDUAL,
24081            replay_weighted_batches,
24082        )?;
24083    } else {
24084        replay_weighted_batches(&mut |batches| {
24085            accumulate_w_project_residual_grid_streaming(
24086                &batches,
24087                projector,
24088                model_grid.as_ref(),
24089                &mut residual_grid,
24090            )?;
24091            Ok(())
24092        })?;
24093    }
24094    timings.degrid_grid += degrid_started.elapsed();
24095
24096    let fft_started = Instant::now();
24097    let raw = centered_ifft2(&residual_grid);
24098    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
24099    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
24100    let mut image = gridder.corrected_w_project_image_from_grid(&raw, projector.sampling());
24101    image.mapv_inplace(|value| 2.0 * value / psf_state.normalization_sumwt / psf_state.psf_peak);
24102    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
24103    stage_timings.model_fft += timings.model_fft;
24104    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += timings.degrid_grid;
24105    stage_timings.residual_fft += timings.fft;
24106    stage_timings.residual_normalize += timings.normalize;
24107    Ok(image)
24108}
24109
24110fn w_project_grid_threads(sample_count: usize) -> usize {
24111    let requested_threads = standard_mfs_grid_threads();
24112    requested_threads
24113        .min(sample_count)
24114        .min(thread::available_parallelism().map_or(1, |value| value.get()))
24115        .max(1)
24116}
24117
24118#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, Default)]
24119struct WProjectGridAccumulation {
24120    normalization_sumwt: f64,
24121    reported_sumwt: f64,
24122    gridded_samples: usize,
24123    skipped_samples: usize,
24124}
24125
24126impl WProjectGridAccumulation {
24127    fn add(&mut self, other: Self) {
24128        self.normalization_sumwt += other.normalization_sumwt;
24129        self.reported_sumwt += other.reported_sumwt;
24130        self.gridded_samples += other.gridded_samples;
24131        self.skipped_samples += other.skipped_samples;
24132    }
24133}
24134
24135fn psf_grid_to_w_project_state(
24136    gridder: &StandardGridder,
24137    projector: &WProjector,
24138    psf_grid: &Array2<Complex32>,
24139    accumulation: WProjectGridAccumulation,
24140    timings: &mut PsfComputationTimings,
24141) -> Result<PsfState, ImagingError> {
24142    if accumulation.normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 || accumulation.reported_sumwt <= 0.0 {
24143        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
24144    }
24145
24146    let fft_started = Instant::now();
24147    let raw_psf = centered_ifft2(psf_grid);
24148    timings.fft = fft_started.elapsed();
24149    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
24150    let mut psf = gridder.corrected_w_project_image_from_grid(&raw_psf, projector.sampling());
24151    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| 2.0 * value / accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32);
24152    let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&psf);
24153    if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
24154        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
24155            "PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
24156        ));
24157    }
24158    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
24159    timings.normalize = normalize_started.elapsed();
24160
24161    Ok(PsfState {
24162        psf,
24163        normalization_sumwt: accumulation.normalization_sumwt as f32,
24164        reported_sumwt: accumulation.reported_sumwt as f32,
24165        psf_peak,
24166        gridded_samples: accumulation.gridded_samples,
24167        skipped_samples: accumulation.skipped_samples,
24168    })
24169}
24170
24171fn accumulate_w_project_psf_grid_streaming(
24172    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
24173    projector: &WProjector,
24174    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24175) -> Result<WProjectGridAccumulation, ImagingError> {
24176    let thread_count = w_project_grid_threads(batches.iter().map(VisibilityBatch::len).sum());
24177    if thread_count <= 1 {
24178        return Ok(accumulate_w_project_psf_grid_streaming_serial(
24179            batches, 0, projector, psf_grid,
24180        ));
24181    }
24182    let [nx, ny] = projector.grid_shape();
24183    let local_results = accumulate_w_project_streaming_parallel(
24184        "wproject_psf",
24185        batches,
24186        thread_count,
24187        || {
24188            (
24189                Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((nx, ny)),
24190                Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((0, 0)),
24191            )
24192        },
24193        |batch, batch_index, sample_index, (psf_grid, _)| {
24194            accumulate_w_project_psf_streaming_sample(
24195                projector,
24196                batch,
24197                batch_index,
24198                sample_index,
24199                psf_grid,
24200            )
24201        },
24202    )?;
24203    let mut accumulation = WProjectGridAccumulation::default();
24204    let merge_started = Instant::now();
24205    for (local_accumulation, (local_psf_grid, _)) in &local_results {
24206        accumulation.add(*local_accumulation);
24207        add_complex32_grid(psf_grid, local_psf_grid);
24208    }
24209    log_w_project_streaming_merge_profile(
24210        "wproject_psf",
24211        local_results.len(),
24212        merge_started.elapsed(),
24213    );
24214    Ok(accumulation)
24215}
24216
24217fn accumulate_w_project_dirty_grids_streaming(
24218    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
24219    projector: &WProjector,
24220    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24221    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24222) -> Result<WProjectGridAccumulation, ImagingError> {
24223    let thread_count = w_project_grid_threads(batches.iter().map(VisibilityBatch::len).sum());
24224    if thread_count <= 1 {
24225        return Ok(accumulate_w_project_dirty_grids_streaming_serial(
24226            batches,
24227            0,
24228            projector,
24229            psf_grid,
24230            residual_grid,
24231        ));
24232    }
24233    let [nx, ny] = projector.grid_shape();
24234    let local_results = accumulate_w_project_streaming_parallel(
24235        "wproject_dirty",
24236        batches,
24237        thread_count,
24238        || {
24239            (
24240                Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((nx, ny)),
24241                Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((nx, ny)),
24242            )
24243        },
24244        |batch, batch_index, sample_index, (psf_grid, residual_grid)| {
24245            accumulate_w_project_dirty_streaming_sample(
24246                projector,
24247                batch,
24248                batch_index,
24249                sample_index,
24250                psf_grid,
24251                residual_grid,
24252            )
24253        },
24254    )?;
24255    let mut accumulation = WProjectGridAccumulation::default();
24256    let merge_started = Instant::now();
24257    for (local_accumulation, (local_psf_grid, local_residual_grid)) in &local_results {
24258        accumulation.add(*local_accumulation);
24259        add_complex32_grid(psf_grid, local_psf_grid);
24260        add_complex32_grid(residual_grid, local_residual_grid);
24261    }
24262    log_w_project_streaming_merge_profile(
24263        "wproject_dirty",
24264        local_results.len(),
24265        merge_started.elapsed(),
24266    );
24267    Ok(accumulation)
24268}
24269
24270fn accumulate_w_project_residual_grid_streaming(
24271    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
24272    projector: &WProjector,
24273    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
24274    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24275) -> Result<WProjectGridAccumulation, ImagingError> {
24276    let thread_count = w_project_grid_threads(batches.iter().map(VisibilityBatch::len).sum());
24277    if thread_count <= 1 {
24278        return Ok(accumulate_w_project_residual_grid_streaming_serial(
24279            batches,
24280            0,
24281            projector,
24282            model_grid,
24283            residual_grid,
24284        ));
24285    }
24286    let [nx, ny] = projector.grid_shape();
24287    let local_results = accumulate_w_project_streaming_parallel(
24288        "wproject_residual",
24289        batches,
24290        thread_count,
24291        || {
24292            (
24293                Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((0, 0)),
24294                Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((nx, ny)),
24295            )
24296        },
24297        |batch, batch_index, sample_index, (_, residual_grid)| {
24298            accumulate_w_project_residual_streaming_sample(
24299                projector,
24300                batch,
24301                batch_index,
24302                sample_index,
24303                model_grid,
24304                residual_grid,
24305            )
24306        },
24307    )?;
24308    let mut accumulation = WProjectGridAccumulation::default();
24309    let merge_started = Instant::now();
24310    for (local_accumulation, (_, local_residual_grid)) in &local_results {
24311        accumulation.add(*local_accumulation);
24312        add_complex32_grid(residual_grid, local_residual_grid);
24313    }
24314    log_w_project_streaming_merge_profile(
24315        "wproject_residual",
24316        local_results.len(),
24317        merge_started.elapsed(),
24318    );
24319    Ok(accumulation)
24320}
24321
