24322fn accumulate_w_project_streaming_parallel<S, I, F>(
24323    stage_name: &'static str,
24324    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
24325    thread_count: usize,
24326    init_state: I,
24327    accumulate_sample: F,
24328) -> Result<Vec<(WProjectGridAccumulation, S)>, ImagingError>
24329where
24330    S: Send,
24331    I: Fn() -> S + Copy + Send + Sync,
24332    F: Fn(&VisibilityBatch, usize, usize, &mut S) -> WProjectGridAccumulation + Copy + Send + Sync,
24333{
24334    let profile_detail = profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled();
24335    let stage_started = Instant::now();
24336    let input_sample_count: usize = batches.iter().map(VisibilityBatch::len).sum();
24337    let chunk_len = input_sample_count.div_ceil(thread_count);
24338    let mut local_results = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
24339    thread::scope(|scope| {
24340        let mut handles = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
24341        for chunk_index in 0..thread_count {
24342            let sample_start = chunk_index * chunk_len;
24343            let sample_end = ((chunk_index + 1) * chunk_len).min(input_sample_count);
24344            if sample_start >= sample_end {
24345                continue;
24346            }
24347            handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
24348                let worker_started = Instant::now();
24349                let mut state = init_state();
24350                let mut accumulation = WProjectGridAccumulation::default();
24351                let mut global_sample_offset = 0usize;
24352                for (batch_index, batch) in batches.iter().enumerate() {
24353                    let batch_start = global_sample_offset;
24354                    let batch_end = batch_start + batch.len();
24355                    global_sample_offset = batch_end;
24356                    if batch_end <= sample_start {
24357                        continue;
24358                    }
24359                    if batch_start >= sample_end {
24360                        break;
24361                    }
24362                    let local_start = sample_start.saturating_sub(batch_start);
24363                    let local_end = (sample_end - batch_start).min(batch.len());
24364                    for sample_index in local_start..local_end {
24365                        accumulation.add(accumulate_sample(
24366                            batch,
24367                            batch_index,
24368                            sample_index,
24369                            &mut state,
24370                        ));
24371                    }
24372                }
24373                (
24374                    chunk_index,
24375                    sample_end - sample_start,
24376                    worker_started.elapsed(),
24377                    accumulation,
24378                    state,
24379                )
24380            }));
24381        }
24382        for handle in handles {
24383            local_results.push(handle.join().map_err(|_| {
24384                ImagingError::Unsupported("wproject streaming worker panicked".to_string())
24385            })?);
24386        }
24387        Ok::<(), ImagingError>(())
24388    })?;
24389    local_results.sort_by_key(|(worker_index, _, _, _, _)| *worker_index);
24390    if profile_detail {
24391        log_w_project_streaming_parallel_profile(
24392            stage_name,
24393            thread_count,
24394            chunk_len,
24395            input_sample_count,
24396            &local_results,
24397            stage_started.elapsed(),
24398        );
24399    }
24400    Ok(local_results
24401        .into_iter()
24402        .map(|(_, _, _, accumulation, state)| (accumulation, state))
24403        .collect())
24404}
24405
24406fn log_w_project_streaming_parallel_profile<S>(
24407    stage_name: &str,
24408    requested_threads: usize,
24409    chunk_len: usize,
24410    samples_total: usize,
24411    local_results: &[(usize, usize, Duration, WProjectGridAccumulation, S)],
24412    stage_elapsed: Duration,
24413) {
24414    if !profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled() {
24415        return;
24416    }
24417    if local_results.is_empty() {
24418        return;
24419    }
24420    let mut worker_times = local_results
24421        .iter()
24422        .map(|(_, _, elapsed, _, _)| profile::millis(*elapsed))
24423        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
24424    worker_times.sort_by(|a, b| a.total_cmp(b));
24425    let min_ms = worker_times[0];
24426    let p50_ms = worker_times[worker_times.len() / 2];
24427    let max_ms = worker_times[worker_times.len() - 1];
24428    let samples_min = local_results
24429        .iter()
24430        .map(|(_, samples, _, _, _)| *samples)
24431        .min()
24432        .unwrap_or(0);
24433    let samples_max = local_results
24434        .iter()
24435        .map(|(_, samples, _, _, _)| *samples)
24436        .max()
24437        .unwrap_or(0);
24438    eprintln!(
24439        "wproject_streaming_stage stage={} requested_threads={} actual_threads={} chunk_len={} samples_total={} samples_per_worker_min={} samples_per_worker_max={} worker_compute_min_ms={:.3} worker_compute_p50_ms={:.3} worker_compute_max_ms={:.3} stage_total_ms={:.3}",
24440        stage_name,
24441        requested_threads,
24442        local_results.len(),
24443        chunk_len,
24444        samples_total,
24445        samples_min,
24446        samples_max,
24447        min_ms,
24448        p50_ms,
24449        max_ms,
24450        profile::millis(stage_elapsed),
24451    );
24452    for (worker_index, samples, elapsed, accumulation, _) in local_results {
24453        eprintln!(
24454            "wproject_streaming_worker stage={} worker_index={} samples={} gridded_samples={} skipped_samples={} worker_compute_ms={:.3}",
24455            stage_name,
24456            worker_index,
24457            samples,
24458            accumulation.gridded_samples,
24459            accumulation.skipped_samples,
24460            profile::millis(*elapsed),
24461        );
24462    }
24463}
24464
24465fn log_w_project_streaming_merge_profile(stage_name: &str, grid_count: usize, elapsed: Duration) {
24466    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_block_detail_enabled() {
24467        eprintln!(
24468            "wproject_streaming_merge stage={} local_grid_count={} merge_ms={:.3}",
24469            stage_name,
24470            grid_count,
24471            profile::millis(elapsed),
24472        );
24473    }
24474}
24475
24476fn accumulate_w_project_psf_grid_streaming_serial(
24477    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
24478    batch_offset: usize,
24479    projector: &WProjector,
24480    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24481) -> WProjectGridAccumulation {
24482    let mut accumulation = WProjectGridAccumulation::default();
24483    for (relative_batch_index, batch) in batches.iter().enumerate() {
24484        let batch_index = batch_offset + relative_batch_index;
24485        for sample_index in 0..batch.len() {
24486            accumulation.add(accumulate_w_project_psf_streaming_sample(
24487                projector,
24488                batch,
24489                batch_index,
24490                sample_index,
24491                psf_grid,
24492            ));
24493        }
24494    }
24495    accumulation
24496}
24497
24498fn accumulate_w_project_dirty_grids_streaming_serial(
24499    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
24500    batch_offset: usize,
24501    projector: &WProjector,
24502    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24503    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24504) -> WProjectGridAccumulation {
24505    let mut accumulation = WProjectGridAccumulation::default();
24506    for (relative_batch_index, batch) in batches.iter().enumerate() {
24507        let batch_index = batch_offset + relative_batch_index;
24508        for sample_index in 0..batch.len() {
24509            accumulation.add(accumulate_w_project_dirty_streaming_sample(
24510                projector,
24511                batch,
24512                batch_index,
24513                sample_index,
24514                psf_grid,
24515                residual_grid,
24516            ));
24517        }
24518    }
24519    accumulation
24520}
24521
24522fn accumulate_w_project_residual_grid_streaming_serial(
24523    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
24524    batch_offset: usize,
24525    projector: &WProjector,
24526    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
24527    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24528) -> WProjectGridAccumulation {
24529    let mut accumulation = WProjectGridAccumulation::default();
24530    for (relative_batch_index, batch) in batches.iter().enumerate() {
24531        let batch_index = batch_offset + relative_batch_index;
24532        for sample_index in 0..batch.len() {
24533            accumulation.add(accumulate_w_project_residual_streaming_sample(
24534                projector,
24535                batch,
24536                batch_index,
24537                sample_index,
24538                model_grid,
24539                residual_grid,
24540            ));
24541        }
24542    }
24543    accumulation
24544}
24545
24546fn w_project_streaming_plan_for_sample(
24547    projector: &WProjector,
24548    batch: &VisibilityBatch,
24549    batch_index: usize,
24550    sample_index: usize,
24551) -> Result<(RawWProjectSample, WProjectSamplePlan), WProjectGridAccumulation> {
24552    let sample = RawWProjectSample {
24553        batch_index,
24554        sample_index,
24555        u_lambda: batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
24556        v_lambda: batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
24557        w_lambda: batch.w_lambda[sample_index],
24558        weight: batch.weight[sample_index],
24559        visibility: batch.visibility[sample_index],
24560        sumwt_factor: batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index],
24561    };
24562    if !batch.gridable[sample_index] || !raw_w_project_sample_is_valid(sample) {
24563        return Err(WProjectGridAccumulation {
24564            skipped_samples: 1,
24565            ..WProjectGridAccumulation::default()
24566        });
24567    }
24568    let Some(plan) = projector.plan_sample(sample.u_lambda, sample.v_lambda, sample.w_lambda)
24569    else {
24570        return Err(WProjectGridAccumulation {
24571            skipped_samples: 1,
24572            ..WProjectGridAccumulation::default()
24573        });
24574    };
24575    Ok((sample, plan))
24576}
24577
24578fn w_project_accumulation_for_sample(
24579    sample: RawWProjectSample,
24580    plan: &WProjectSamplePlan,
24581) -> WProjectGridAccumulation {
24582    WProjectGridAccumulation {
24583        normalization_sumwt: 2.0 * f64::from(sample.weight) * f64::from(plan.normalization),
24584        reported_sumwt: f64::from(sample.weight) * f64::from(sample.sumwt_factor),
24585        gridded_samples: 1,
24586        skipped_samples: 0,
24587    }
24588}
24589
24590fn accumulate_w_project_psf_streaming_sample(
24591    projector: &WProjector,
24592    batch: &VisibilityBatch,
24593    batch_index: usize,
24594    sample_index: usize,
24595    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24596) -> WProjectGridAccumulation {
24597    let Ok((sample, plan)) =
24598        w_project_streaming_plan_for_sample(projector, batch, batch_index, sample_index)
24599    else {
24600        return WProjectGridAccumulation {
24601            skipped_samples: 1,
24602            ..WProjectGridAccumulation::default()
24603        };
24604    };
24605    projector.grid_sample_planned(psf_grid, &plan, Complex32::new(sample.weight, 0.0));
24606    w_project_accumulation_for_sample(sample, &plan)
24607}
24608
24609fn accumulate_w_project_dirty_streaming_sample(
24610    projector: &WProjector,
24611    batch: &VisibilityBatch,
24612    batch_index: usize,
24613    sample_index: usize,
24614    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24615    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24616) -> WProjectGridAccumulation {
24617    let Ok((sample, plan)) =
24618        w_project_streaming_plan_for_sample(projector, batch, batch_index, sample_index)
24619    else {
24620        return WProjectGridAccumulation {
24621            skipped_samples: 1,
24622            ..WProjectGridAccumulation::default()
24623        };
24624    };
24625    projector.grid_sample_planned_pair(
24626        psf_grid,
24627        Complex32::new(sample.weight, 0.0),
24628        residual_grid,
24629        sample.visibility * sample.weight,
24630        &plan,
24631    );
24632    w_project_accumulation_for_sample(sample, &plan)
24633}
24634
24635fn accumulate_w_project_residual_streaming_sample(
24636    projector: &WProjector,
24637    batch: &VisibilityBatch,
24638    batch_index: usize,
24639    sample_index: usize,
24640    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
24641    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24642) -> WProjectGridAccumulation {
24643    let Ok((sample, plan)) =
24644        w_project_streaming_plan_for_sample(projector, batch, batch_index, sample_index)
24645    else {
24646        return WProjectGridAccumulation {
24647            skipped_samples: 1,
24648            ..WProjectGridAccumulation::default()
24649        };
24650    };
24651    let predicted = model_grid.as_ref().map_or_else(
24652        || Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0),
24653        |grid| projector.degrid_sample_planned(grid, &plan),
24654    );
24655    let residual = (sample.visibility - predicted) * sample.weight;
24656    projector.grid_sample_planned(residual_grid, &plan, residual);
24657    w_project_accumulation_for_sample(sample, &plan)
24658}
24659
24660fn accumulate_w_project_psf_grid(
24661    prepared: &WProjectPreparedData,
24662    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24663) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
24664    let samples = &prepared.samples;
24665    let thread_count = w_project_grid_threads(samples.len());
24666    if thread_count <= 1 || samples.len() < 10_000 {
24667        for sample in samples {
24668            let psf_weight = Complex32::new(sample.weight, 0.0);
24669            prepared
24670                .projector
24671                .grid_sample_planned(psf_grid, &sample.positive_plan, psf_weight);
24672        }
24673        return Ok(());
24674    }
24675
24676    let [nx, ny] = prepared.projector.grid_shape();
24677    let chunk_len = samples.len().div_ceil(thread_count);
24678    let mut local_grids = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
24679    thread::scope(|scope| {
24680        let mut handles = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
24681        for chunk in samples.chunks(chunk_len) {
24682            handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
24683                let mut local_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((nx, ny));
24684                for sample in chunk {
24685                    let psf_weight = Complex32::new(sample.weight, 0.0);
24686                    prepared.projector.grid_sample_planned(
24687                        &mut local_grid,
24688                        &sample.positive_plan,
24689                        psf_weight,
24690                    );
24691                }
24692                local_grid
24693            }));
24694        }
24695        for handle in handles {
24696            local_grids.push(handle.join().map_err(|_| {
24697                ImagingError::Unsupported("wproject PSF grid worker panicked".to_string())
24698            })?);
24699        }
24700        Ok::<(), ImagingError>(())
24701    })?;
24702    for local_grid in &local_grids {
24703        add_complex32_grid(psf_grid, local_grid);
24704    }
24705    Ok(())
24706}
24707
24708#[repr(C)]
24709#[derive(Clone, Copy, Debug)]
24710struct WProjectMetalSample {
24711    loc: u32,
24712    plane_support_offsets: u32,
24713    weight: f32,
24714    visibility_re: f32,
24715    visibility_im: f32,
24716}
24717
24718impl WProjectMetalSample {
24719    fn support(self) -> u16 {
24720        ((self.plane_support_offsets >> 10) & 0x1f) as u16
24721    }
24722
24723    fn has_same_plan(self, other: Self) -> bool {
24724        self.loc == other.loc && self.plane_support_offsets == other.plane_support_offsets
24725    }
24726
24727    fn merge_weighted_visibility(&mut self, other: Self) -> bool {
24728        if !self.has_same_plan(other) {
24729            return false;
24730        }
24731        let total_weight = self.weight + other.weight;
24732        if !(total_weight.is_finite() && total_weight > 0.0) {
24733            return false;
24734        }
24735        self.visibility_re =
24736            (self.visibility_re * self.weight + other.visibility_re * other.weight) / total_weight;
24737        self.visibility_im =
24738            (self.visibility_im * self.weight + other.visibility_im * other.weight) / total_weight;
24739        self.weight = total_weight;
24740        true
24741    }
24742}
24743
24744#[repr(C)]
24745#[derive(Clone, Copy)]
24746#[cfg_attr(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage), allow(dead_code))]
24747struct WProjectMetalComplex {
24748    re: f32,
24749    im: f32,
24750}
24751
24752#[repr(C)]
24753#[derive(Clone, Copy)]
24754#[cfg_attr(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage), allow(dead_code))]
24755struct WProjectMetalParams {
24756    sample_count: u32,
24757    grid_width: u32,
24758    grid_height: u32,
24759    kernel_width: u32,
24760    sampling: u32,
24761    mode: u32,
24762    model_present: u32,
24763    partial_grid_count: u32,
24764    partial_chunk_len: u32,
24765    _pad0: u32,
24766}
24767
24768#[cfg_attr(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage), allow(dead_code))]
24769const W_PROJECT_METAL_MODE_PSF: u32 = 0;
24770const W_PROJECT_METAL_MODE_RESIDUAL: u32 = 2;
24771const W_PROJECT_METAL_MODE_DIRTY: u32 = 1;
24772#[cfg_attr(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage), allow(dead_code))]
24773const W_PROJECT_METAL_DIRTY_PARTIAL_GRID_TARGET_BYTES: usize = 256 * 1024 * 1024;
24774#[cfg_attr(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage), allow(dead_code))]
24775const W_PROJECT_METAL_DIRTY_TARGET_SAMPLES_PER_PARTIAL_GRID: usize = 8_000_000;
24776
24777#[cfg_attr(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage), allow(dead_code))]
24778fn w_project_metal_dirty_partial_grid_count(sample_count: usize, cell_count: usize) -> usize {
24779    let bytes_per_partial_grid = cell_count
24780        .checked_mul(std::mem::size_of::<f32>())
24781        .and_then(|bytes| bytes.checked_mul(4))
24782        .unwrap_or(usize::MAX);
24783    let max_by_memory = W_PROJECT_METAL_DIRTY_PARTIAL_GRID_TARGET_BYTES
24784        .checked_div(bytes_per_partial_grid)
24785        .unwrap_or(1)
24786        .max(1);
24787    sample_count
24788        .div_ceil(W_PROJECT_METAL_DIRTY_TARGET_SAMPLES_PER_PARTIAL_GRID)
24789        .clamp(1, max_by_memory.min(32))
24790}
24791
24792fn w_project_metal_sample_from_plan(
24793    projector: &WProjector,
24794    plan: &WProjectSamplePlan,
24795    weight: f32,
24796    visibility: Complex32,
24797) -> Result<WProjectMetalSample, ImagingError> {
24798    let support = projector.kernel_support(plan.plane_index);
24799    let loc_x = u16::try_from(plan.loc_x).map_err(|_| {
24800        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal sample x coordinate exceeds u16".to_string())
24801    })?;
24802    let loc_y = u16::try_from(plan.loc_y).map_err(|_| {
24803        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal sample y coordinate exceeds u16".to_string())
24804    })?;
24805    let plane_index = u16::try_from(plan.plane_index).map_err(|_| {
24806        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal plane index exceeds u16".to_string())
24807    })?;
24808    if plane_index > 0x03ff {
24809        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
24810            "wproject Metal compact sample plane index exceeds 10 bits".to_string(),
24811        ));
24812    }
24813    let support = u8::try_from(support).map_err(|_| {
24814        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal support exceeds u8".to_string())
24815    })?;
24816    if support > 0x1f {
24817        return Err(ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
24818            "wproject Metal compact sample support exceeds 5 bits".to_string(),
24819        ));
24820    }
24821    let off_x = i8::try_from(plan.off_x).map_err(|_| {
24822        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal x subpixel offset exceeds i8".to_string())
24823    })?;
24824    let off_y = i8::try_from(plan.off_y).map_err(|_| {
24825        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal y subpixel offset exceeds i8".to_string())
24826    })?;
24827    Ok(WProjectMetalSample {
24828        loc: u32::from(loc_x) | (u32::from(loc_y) << 16),
24829        plane_support_offsets: u32::from(plane_index)
24830            | (u32::from(support) << 10)
24831            | (u32::from(plan.conjugate_kernel) << 15)
24832            | (u32::from((i16::from(off_x) + 128) as u8) << 16)
24833            | (u32::from((i16::from(off_y) + 128) as u8) << 24),
24834        weight,
24835        visibility_re: visibility.re,
24836        visibility_im: visibility.im,
24837    })
24838}
24839
24840fn push_w_project_metal_sample(
24841    samples: &mut Vec<WProjectMetalSample>,
24842    sample: WProjectMetalSample,
24843) -> bool {
24844    if let Some(last) = samples.last_mut()
24845        && last.merge_weighted_visibility(sample)
24846    {
24847        return false;
24848    }
24849    samples.push(sample);
24850    true
24851}
24852
24853#[cfg_attr(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage), allow(dead_code))]
24854fn w_project_metal_samples(
24855    prepared: &WProjectPreparedData,
24856) -> Result<Vec<WProjectMetalSample>, ImagingError> {
24857    let mut samples = Vec::with_capacity(prepared.samples.len());
24858    for sample in &prepared.samples {
24859        let metal_sample = w_project_metal_sample_from_plan(
24860            &prepared.projector,
24861            &sample.positive_plan,
24862            sample.weight,
24863            sample.visibility,
24864        )?;
24865        push_w_project_metal_sample(&mut samples, metal_sample);
24866    }
24867    Ok(samples)
24868}
24869
24870#[cfg_attr(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage), allow(dead_code))]
24871fn w_project_metal_kernel_weights(projector: &WProjector) -> Vec<WProjectMetalComplex> {
24872    projector
24873        .flattened_kernel_weights()
24874        .into_iter()
24875        .map(|value| WProjectMetalComplex {
24876            re: value.re,
24877            im: value.im,
24878        })
24879        .collect()
24880}
24881
24882#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
24883fn accumulate_w_project_psf_grid_metal(
24884    prepared: &WProjectPreparedData,
24885    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24886) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
24887    let mut residual_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros(psf_grid.raw_dim());
24888    accumulate_w_project_grid_metal(
24889        prepared,
24890        None,
24891        psf_grid,
24892        &mut residual_grid,
24893        W_PROJECT_METAL_MODE_PSF,
24894    )
24895}
24896
24897#[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
24898fn accumulate_w_project_psf_grid_metal(
24899    _prepared: &WProjectPreparedData,
24900    _psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24901) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
24902    Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
24903        "wproject backend 'metal' requires macOS Metal and is not available on this platform"
24904            .to_string(),
24905    ))
24906}
24907
24908#[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
24909fn accumulate_w_project_grid_metal_samples(
24910    _projector: &WProjector,
24911    _samples: &[WProjectMetalSample],
24912    _sample_pack_elapsed: Duration,
24913    _model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
24914    _psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24915    _residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24916    _mode: u32,
24917) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
24918    Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
24919        "wproject backend 'metal' requires macOS Metal and is not available on this platform"
24920            .to_string(),
24921    ))
24922}
24923
24924#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
24925fn accumulate_w_project_grid_metal(
24926    prepared: &WProjectPreparedData,
24927    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
24928    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24929    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24930    mode: u32,
24931) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
24932    let sample_pack_started = Instant::now();
24933    let samples = w_project_metal_samples(prepared)?;
24934    let sample_pack_elapsed = sample_pack_started.elapsed();
24935    accumulate_w_project_grid_metal_samples(
24936        &prepared.projector,
24937        &samples,
24938        sample_pack_elapsed,
24939        model_grid,
24940        psf_grid,
24941        residual_grid,
24942        mode,
24943    )
24944}
24945
24946#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
24947fn accumulate_w_project_grid_metal_samples(
24948    projector: &WProjector,
24949    samples: &[WProjectMetalSample],
24950    sample_pack_elapsed: Duration,
24951    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
24952    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24953    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
24954    mode: u32,
24955) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
24956    use std::{ffi::c_void, mem, ptr, ptr::NonNull, slice};
24957
24958    use objc2_metal::{
24959        MTLBuffer, MTLCommandBuffer, MTLCommandBufferStatus, MTLCommandEncoder, MTLCommandQueue,
24960        MTLComputeCommandEncoder, MTLComputePipelineState, MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice, MTLDevice,
24961        MTLLibrary, MTLResourceOptions, MTLSize,
24962    };
24963
24964    let profile_detail = profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled();
24965    let total_started = Instant::now();
24966    let [grid_width, grid_height] = projector.grid_shape();
24967    let cell_count = grid_width.checked_mul(grid_height).ok_or_else(|| {
24968        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal grid is too large".to_string())
24969    })?;
24970    if samples.is_empty() {
24971        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
24972    }
24973    let partial_grid_count = if mode == W_PROJECT_METAL_MODE_DIRTY {
24974        w_project_metal_dirty_partial_grid_count(samples.len(), cell_count)
24975    } else {
24976        1
24977    };
24978    let partial_chunk_len = samples.len().div_ceil(partial_grid_count);
24979    let sample_buffer_bytes = mem::size_of_val(samples);
24980    let kernel_pack_started = Instant::now();
24981    let kernel_weights = w_project_metal_kernel_weights(projector);
24982    let kernel_pack_elapsed = kernel_pack_started.elapsed();
24983    let kernel_buffer_bytes = mem::size_of_val(kernel_weights.as_slice());
24984    let kernel_width = projector.kernel_weight_width();
24985    let params = WProjectMetalParams {
24986        sample_count: u32::try_from(samples.len()).map_err(|_| {
24987            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal sample count exceeds u32".to_string())
24988        })?,
24989        grid_width: u32::try_from(grid_width).map_err(|_| {
24990            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal grid width exceeds u32".to_string())
24991        })?,
24992        grid_height: u32::try_from(grid_height).map_err(|_| {
24993            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal grid height exceeds u32".to_string())
24994        })?,
24995        kernel_width: u32::try_from(kernel_width).map_err(|_| {
24996            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal kernel width exceeds u32".to_string())
24997        })?,
24998        sampling: u32::try_from(projector.sampling()).map_err(|_| {
24999            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal sampling exceeds u32".to_string())
25000        })?,
25001        mode,
25002        model_present: u32::from(model_grid.is_some()),
25003        partial_grid_count: u32::try_from(partial_grid_count).map_err(|_| {
25004            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
25005                "wproject Metal partial grid count exceeds u32".to_string(),
25006            )
25007        })?,
25008        partial_chunk_len: u32::try_from(partial_chunk_len).map_err(|_| {
25009            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
25010                "wproject Metal partial grid chunk length exceeds u32".to_string(),
25011            )
25012        })?,
25013        _pad0: 0,
25014    };
25015
25016    let device_queue_started = Instant::now();
25017    let device = MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice().ok_or_else(|| {
25018        ImagingError::Unsupported(
25019            "wproject backend 'metal' could not find a default Metal device".to_string(),
25020        )
25021    })?;
25022    let queue = device.newCommandQueue().ok_or_else(|| {
25023        ImagingError::Unsupported(
25024            "wproject backend 'metal' could not create a Metal command queue".to_string(),
25025        )
25026    })?;
25027    let device_queue_elapsed = device_queue_started.elapsed();
25028    let shader_compile_started = Instant::now();
25029    let source = objc2_foundation::NSString::from_str(W_PROJECT_METAL_SHADER);
25030    let library = device
25031        .newLibraryWithSource_options_error(&source, None)
25032        .map_err(|error| {
25033            ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
25034                "wproject backend 'metal' failed to compile shader: {error:?}"
25035            ))
25036        })?;
25037    let shader_compile_elapsed = shader_compile_started.elapsed();
25038    let pipeline_started = Instant::now();
25039    let use_dirty_partial_grids = mode == W_PROJECT_METAL_MODE_DIRTY && partial_grid_count > 1;
25040    let entry_point = match (mode, use_dirty_partial_grids) {
25041        (W_PROJECT_METAL_MODE_DIRTY, true) => "wproject_grid_dirty_chunked_samples",
25042        (W_PROJECT_METAL_MODE_DIRTY, false) => "wproject_grid_dirty_samples",
25043        _ => "wproject_grid_samples",
25044    };
25045    let function_name = objc2_foundation::NSString::from_str(entry_point);
25046    let function = library.newFunctionWithName(&function_name).ok_or_else(|| {
25047        ImagingError::Unsupported(
25048            "wproject backend 'metal' shader entry point was not found".to_string(),
25049        )
25050    })?;
25051    let pipeline = device
25052        .newComputePipelineStateWithFunction_error(&function)
25053        .map_err(|error| {
25054            ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
25055                "wproject backend 'metal' failed to create pipeline: {error:?}"
25056            ))
25057        })?;
25058    let pipeline_elapsed = pipeline_started.elapsed();
25059    let reduce_pipeline = if use_dirty_partial_grids {
25060        let reduce_function_name =
25061            objc2_foundation::NSString::from_str("wproject_reduce_dirty_chunked_grids");
25062        let reduce_function = library
25063            .newFunctionWithName(&reduce_function_name)
25064            .ok_or_else(|| {
25065                ImagingError::Unsupported(
25066                    "wproject backend 'metal' reduction shader entry point was not found"
25067                        .to_string(),
25068                )
25069            })?;
25070        Some(
25071            device
25072                .newComputePipelineStateWithFunction_error(&reduce_function)
25073                .map_err(|error| {
25074                    ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
25075                        "wproject backend 'metal' failed to create reduction pipeline: {error:?}"
25076                    ))
25077                })?,
25078        )
25079    } else {
25080        None
25081    };
25082    let storage_options = MTLResourceOptions::StorageModeShared;
25083
25084    let buffer_alloc_started = Instant::now();
25085    let sample_buffer = unsafe {
25086        let pointer =
25087            NonNull::new(samples.as_ptr().cast::<c_void>() as *mut c_void).ok_or_else(|| {
25088                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal sample pointer was null".to_string())
25089            })?;
25090        device
25091            .newBufferWithBytesNoCopy_length_options_deallocator(
25092                pointer,
25093                sample_buffer_bytes,
25094                storage_options,
25095                None,
25096            )
25097            .ok_or_else(|| {
25098                ImagingError::Unsupported(
25099                    "wproject backend 'metal' could not wrap sample buffer without copying"
25100                        .to_string(),
25101                )
25102            })?
25103    };
25104    let kernel_buffer = unsafe {
25105        let pointer = NonNull::new(kernel_weights.as_ptr().cast::<c_void>() as *mut c_void)
25106            .ok_or_else(|| {
25107                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal kernel pointer was null".to_string())
25108            })?;
25109        device
25110            .newBufferWithBytesNoCopy_length_options_deallocator(
25111                pointer,
25112                kernel_buffer_bytes,
25113                storage_options,
25114                None,
25115            )
25116            .ok_or_else(|| {
25117                ImagingError::Unsupported(
25118                    "wproject backend 'metal' could not wrap kernel buffer without copying"
25119                        .to_string(),
25120                )
25121            })?
25122    };
25123    let params_buffer = unsafe {
25124        let params_slice = slice::from_ref(&params);
25125        let byte_len = mem::size_of_val(params_slice);
25126        let pointer = NonNull::new(params_slice.as_ptr().cast::<c_void>() as *mut c_void)
25127            .ok_or_else(|| {
25128                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal params pointer was null".to_string())
25129            })?;
25130        device
25131            .newBufferWithBytes_length_options(pointer, byte_len, storage_options)
25132            .ok_or_else(|| {
25133                ImagingError::Unsupported(
25134                    "wproject backend 'metal' could not allocate params buffer".to_string(),
25135                )
25136            })?
25137    };
25138    let buffer_alloc_pre_model_elapsed = buffer_alloc_started.elapsed();
25139    let model_pack_started = Instant::now();
25140    let model_values = if let Some(model_grid) = model_grid {
25141        model_grid
25142            .iter()
25143            .map(|value| WProjectMetalComplex {
25144                re: value.re,
25145                im: value.im,
25146            })
25147            .collect::<Vec<_>>()
25148    } else {
25149        vec![WProjectMetalComplex { re: 0.0, im: 0.0 }]
25150    };
25151    let model_pack_elapsed = model_pack_started.elapsed();
25152    let model_buffer_bytes = mem::size_of_val(model_values.as_slice());
25153    let model_buffer_started = Instant::now();
25154    let model_buffer = unsafe {
25155        let pointer = NonNull::new(model_values.as_ptr().cast::<c_void>() as *mut c_void)
25156            .ok_or_else(|| {
25157                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal model pointer was null".to_string())
25158            })?;
25159        device
25160            .newBufferWithBytesNoCopy_length_options_deallocator(
25161                pointer,
25162                model_buffer_bytes,
25163                storage_options,
25164                None,
25165            )
25166            .ok_or_else(|| {
25167                ImagingError::Unsupported(
25168                    "wproject backend 'metal' could not wrap model buffer without copying"
25169                        .to_string(),
25170                )
25171            })?
25172    };
25173    let model_buffer_elapsed = model_buffer_started.elapsed();
25174    let output_bytes = cell_count
25175        .checked_mul(mem::size_of::<u32>())
25176        .ok_or_else(|| {
25177            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal output grid is too large".to_string())
25178        })?;
25179    let partial_output_bytes = output_bytes
25180        .checked_mul(partial_grid_count)
25181        .ok_or_else(|| {
25182            ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
25183                "wproject Metal partial output grid is too large".to_string(),
25184            )
25185        })?;
25186    let output_alloc_started = Instant::now();
25187    let psf_re = device
25188        .newBufferWithLength_options(output_bytes, storage_options)
25189        .ok_or_else(|| {
25190            ImagingError::Unsupported(
25191                "wproject backend 'metal' could not allocate PSF real buffer".to_string(),
25192            )
25193        })?;
25194    let psf_im = device
25195        .newBufferWithLength_options(output_bytes, storage_options)
25196        .ok_or_else(|| {
25197            ImagingError::Unsupported(
25198                "wproject backend 'metal' could not allocate PSF imag buffer".to_string(),
25199            )
25200        })?;
25201    let residual_re = device
25202        .newBufferWithLength_options(output_bytes, storage_options)
25203        .ok_or_else(|| {
25204            ImagingError::Unsupported(
25205                "wproject backend 'metal' could not allocate residual real buffer".to_string(),
25206            )
25207        })?;
25208    let residual_im = device
25209        .newBufferWithLength_options(output_bytes, storage_options)
25210        .ok_or_else(|| {
25211            ImagingError::Unsupported(
25212                "wproject backend 'metal' could not allocate residual imag buffer".to_string(),
25213            )
25214        })?;
25215    let partial_psf_re = if use_dirty_partial_grids {
25216        Some(
25217            device
25218                .newBufferWithLength_options(partial_output_bytes, storage_options)
25219                .ok_or_else(|| {
25220                    ImagingError::Unsupported(
25221                        "wproject backend 'metal' could not allocate partial PSF real buffer"
25222                            .to_string(),
25223                    )
25224                })?,
25225        )
25226    } else {
25227        None
25228    };
25229    let partial_psf_im = if use_dirty_partial_grids {
25230        Some(
25231            device
25232                .newBufferWithLength_options(partial_output_bytes, storage_options)
25233                .ok_or_else(|| {
25234                    ImagingError::Unsupported(
25235                        "wproject backend 'metal' could not allocate partial PSF imag buffer"
25236                            .to_string(),
25237                    )
25238                })?,
25239        )
25240    } else {
25241        None
25242    };
25243    let partial_residual_re = if use_dirty_partial_grids {
25244        Some(
25245            device
25246                .newBufferWithLength_options(partial_output_bytes, storage_options)
25247                .ok_or_else(|| {
25248                    ImagingError::Unsupported(
25249                        "wproject backend 'metal' could not allocate partial residual real buffer"
25250                            .to_string(),
25251                    )
25252                })?,
25253        )
25254    } else {
25255        None
25256    };
25257    let partial_residual_im = if use_dirty_partial_grids {
25258        Some(
25259            device
25260                .newBufferWithLength_options(partial_output_bytes, storage_options)
25261                .ok_or_else(|| {
25262                    ImagingError::Unsupported(
25263                        "wproject backend 'metal' could not allocate partial residual imag buffer"
25264                            .to_string(),
25265                    )
25266                })?,
25267        )
25268    } else {
25269        None
25270    };
25271    let output_alloc_elapsed = output_alloc_started.elapsed();
25272    let accum_psf_re = partial_psf_re.as_ref().unwrap_or(&psf_re);
25273    let accum_psf_im = partial_psf_im.as_ref().unwrap_or(&psf_im);
25274    let accum_residual_re = partial_residual_re.as_ref().unwrap_or(&residual_re);
25275    let accum_residual_im = partial_residual_im.as_ref().unwrap_or(&residual_im);
25276    let accum_output_bytes = if use_dirty_partial_grids {
25277        partial_output_bytes
25278    } else {
25279        output_bytes
25280    };
25281    let zero_outputs_started = Instant::now();
25282    unsafe {
25283        ptr::write_bytes(
25284            accum_psf_re.contents().as_ptr().cast::<u8>(),
25285            0,
25286            accum_output_bytes,
25287        );
25288        ptr::write_bytes(
25289            accum_psf_im.contents().as_ptr().cast::<u8>(),
25290            0,
25291            accum_output_bytes,
25292        );
25293        ptr::write_bytes(
25294            accum_residual_re.contents().as_ptr().cast::<u8>(),
25295            0,
25296            accum_output_bytes,
25297        );
25298        ptr::write_bytes(
25299            accum_residual_im.contents().as_ptr().cast::<u8>(),
25300            0,
25301            accum_output_bytes,
25302        );
25303    }
25304    let zero_outputs_elapsed = zero_outputs_started.elapsed();
25305
25306    let encode_started = Instant::now();
25307    let command_buffer = queue.commandBuffer().ok_or_else(|| {
25308        ImagingError::Unsupported(
25309            "wproject backend 'metal' could not create a command buffer".to_string(),
25310        )
25311    })?;
25312    let encoder = command_buffer.computeCommandEncoder().ok_or_else(|| {
25313        ImagingError::Unsupported(
25314            "wproject backend 'metal' could not create a compute encoder".to_string(),
25315        )
25316    })?;
25317    encoder.setComputePipelineState(&pipeline);
25318    unsafe {
25319        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&sample_buffer), 0, 0);
25320        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&kernel_buffer), 0, 1);
25321        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&model_buffer), 0, 2);
25322        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(accum_psf_re), 0, 3);
25323        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(accum_psf_im), 0, 4);
25324        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(accum_residual_re), 0, 5);
25325        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(accum_residual_im), 0, 6);
25326        encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&params_buffer), 0, 7);
25327    }
25328    let thread_count = samples.len();
25329    let thread_width = pipeline.threadExecutionWidth().max(1);
25330    let max_threads = pipeline.maxTotalThreadsPerThreadgroup().max(1);
25331    let threads_per_group = thread_width.min(max_threads).min(thread_count).max(1);
25332    encoder.dispatchThreads_threadsPerThreadgroup(
25333        MTLSize {
25334            width: thread_count,
25335            height: 1,
25336            depth: 1,
25337        },
25338        MTLSize {
25339            width: threads_per_group,
25340            height: 1,
25341            depth: 1,
25342        },
25343    );
25344    encoder.endEncoding();
25345    let encode_elapsed = encode_started.elapsed();
25346    let dispatch_wait_started = Instant::now();
25347    command_buffer.commit();
25348    command_buffer.waitUntilCompleted();
25349    let dispatch_wait_elapsed = dispatch_wait_started.elapsed();
25350    if command_buffer.status() == MTLCommandBufferStatus::Error {
25351        let message = command_buffer
25352            .error()
25353            .map(|error| format!("{error:?}"))
25354            .unwrap_or_else(|| "unknown Metal command buffer error".to_string());
25355        return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
25356            "wproject backend 'metal' command failed: {message}"
25357        )));
25358    }
25359    let mut reduce_wait_elapsed = Duration::ZERO;
25360    if use_dirty_partial_grids {
25361        let reduce_started = Instant::now();
25362        let reduce_command_buffer = queue.commandBuffer().ok_or_else(|| {
25363            ImagingError::Unsupported(
25364                "wproject backend 'metal' could not create a reduction command buffer".to_string(),
25365            )
25366        })?;
25367        let reduce_encoder = reduce_command_buffer
25368            .computeCommandEncoder()
25369            .ok_or_else(|| {
25370                ImagingError::Unsupported(
25371                    "wproject backend 'metal' could not create a reduction compute encoder"
25372                        .to_string(),
25373                )
25374            })?;
25375        reduce_encoder
25376            .setComputePipelineState(reduce_pipeline.as_ref().expect("reduction pipeline"));
25377        unsafe {
25378            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(accum_psf_re), 0, 0);
25379            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(accum_psf_im), 0, 1);
25380            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(accum_residual_re), 0, 2);
25381            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(accum_residual_im), 0, 3);
25382            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&psf_re), 0, 4);
25383            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&psf_im), 0, 5);
25384            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&residual_re), 0, 6);
25385            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&residual_im), 0, 7);
25386            reduce_encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&params_buffer), 0, 8);
25387        }
25388        let reduce_thread_count = cell_count;
25389        let reduce_thread_width = reduce_pipeline
25390            .as_ref()
25391            .expect("reduction pipeline")
25392            .threadExecutionWidth()
25393            .max(1);
25394        let reduce_max_threads = reduce_pipeline
25395            .as_ref()
25396            .expect("reduction pipeline")
25397            .maxTotalThreadsPerThreadgroup()
25398            .max(1);
25399        let reduce_threads_per_group = reduce_thread_width
25400            .min(reduce_max_threads)
25401            .min(reduce_thread_count)
25402            .max(1);
25403        reduce_encoder.dispatchThreads_threadsPerThreadgroup(
25404            MTLSize {
25405                width: reduce_thread_count,
25406                height: 1,
25407                depth: 1,
25408            },
25409            MTLSize {
25410                width: reduce_threads_per_group,
25411                height: 1,
25412                depth: 1,
25413            },
25414        );
25415        reduce_encoder.endEncoding();
25416        reduce_command_buffer.commit();
25417        reduce_command_buffer.waitUntilCompleted();
25418        reduce_wait_elapsed = reduce_started.elapsed();
25419        if reduce_command_buffer.status() == MTLCommandBufferStatus::Error {
25420            let message = reduce_command_buffer
25421                .error()
25422                .map(|error| format!("{error:?}"))
25423                .unwrap_or_else(|| "unknown Metal command buffer error".to_string());
25424            return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
25425                "wproject backend 'metal' reduction command failed: {message}"
25426            )));
25427        }
25428    }
25429
25430    let readback_started = Instant::now();
25431    let psf_re_values =
25432        unsafe { slice::from_raw_parts(psf_re.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(), cell_count) };
25433    let psf_im_values =
25434        unsafe { slice::from_raw_parts(psf_im.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(), cell_count) };
25435    let residual_re_values =
25436        unsafe { slice::from_raw_parts(residual_re.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(), cell_count) };
25437    let residual_im_values =
25438        unsafe { slice::from_raw_parts(residual_im.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(), cell_count) };
25439    for (
25440        (((psf_cell, &psf_re_value), &psf_im_value), residual_cell),
25441        (&residual_re_value, &residual_im_value),
25442    ) in psf_grid
25443        .as_slice_memory_order_mut()
25444        .expect("wproject PSF grid should be contiguous")
25445        .iter_mut()
25446        .zip(psf_re_values)
25447        .zip(psf_im_values)
25448        .zip(
25449            residual_grid
25450                .as_slice_memory_order_mut()
25451                .expect("wproject residual grid should be contiguous")
25452                .iter_mut(),
25453        )
25454        .zip(residual_re_values.iter().zip(residual_im_values))
25455    {
25456        *psf_cell = Complex32::new(psf_re_value, psf_im_value);
25457        *residual_cell = Complex32::new(residual_re_value, residual_im_value);
25458    }
25459    let readback_elapsed = readback_started.elapsed();
25460
25461    if profile_detail {
25462        let buffer_alloc_copy_elapsed =
25463            buffer_alloc_pre_model_elapsed + model_buffer_elapsed + output_alloc_elapsed;
25464        eprintln!(
25465            "wproject_metal_grid mode={} entry={} samples={} grid={}x{} planes={} kernel_width={} sampling={} partial_grids={} partial_chunk_len={} sample_bytes={} kernel_bytes={} model_bytes={} output_bytes={} partial_output_bytes={} thread_width={} max_threads={} threads_per_group={} sample_pack_ms={:.3} kernel_pack_ms={:.3} device_queue_ms={:.3} shader_compile_ms={:.3} pipeline_ms={:.3} buffer_alloc_copy_ms={:.3} model_pack_ms={:.3} zero_outputs_ms={:.3} encode_ms={:.3} dispatch_wait_ms={:.3} reduce_wait_ms={:.3} readback_ms={:.3} total_ms={:.3}",
25466            mode,
25467            entry_point,
25468            samples.len(),
25469            grid_width,
25470            grid_height,
25471            projector.plane_count(),
25472            kernel_width,
25473            projector.sampling(),
25474            partial_grid_count,
25475            partial_chunk_len,
25476            sample_buffer_bytes,
25477            kernel_buffer_bytes,
25478            model_buffer_bytes,
25479            output_bytes * 4,
25480            if use_dirty_partial_grids {
25481                partial_output_bytes * 4
25482            } else {
25483                0
25484            },
25485            thread_width,
25486            max_threads,
25487            threads_per_group,
25488            profile::millis(sample_pack_elapsed),
25489            profile::millis(kernel_pack_elapsed),
25490            profile::millis(device_queue_elapsed),
25491            profile::millis(shader_compile_elapsed),
25492            profile::millis(pipeline_elapsed),
25493            profile::millis(buffer_alloc_copy_elapsed),
25494            profile::millis(model_pack_elapsed),
25495            profile::millis(zero_outputs_elapsed),
25496            profile::millis(encode_elapsed),
25497            profile::millis(dispatch_wait_elapsed),
25498            profile::millis(reduce_wait_elapsed),
25499            profile::millis(readback_elapsed),
25500            profile::millis(total_started.elapsed()),
25501        );
25502    }
25503    Ok(())
25504}
25505
25506#[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
25507fn accumulate_w_project_grid_metal_streaming_replay<F>(
25508    _projector: &WProjector,
25509    _model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
25510    _psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
25511    _residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
25512    _mode: u32,
25513    _replay_weighted_batches: &mut F,
25514) -> Result<WProjectGridAccumulation, ImagingError>
25515where
25516    F: FnMut(
25517        &mut dyn FnMut(Vec<VisibilityBatch>) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
25518    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
25519{
25520    Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(
25521        "wproject backend 'metal' requires macOS Metal and is not available on this platform"
25522            .to_string(),
25523    ))
25524}
25525
25526#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
25527fn accumulate_w_project_grid_metal_streaming_replay<F>(
25528    projector: &WProjector,
25529    model_grid: Option<&Array2<Complex32>>,
25530    psf_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
25531    residual_grid: &mut Array2<Complex32>,
25532    mode: u32,
25533    replay_weighted_batches: &mut F,
25534) -> Result<WProjectGridAccumulation, ImagingError>
25535where
25536    F: FnMut(
25537        &mut dyn FnMut(Vec<VisibilityBatch>) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
25538    ) -> Result<(), ImagingError>,
25539{
25540    use std::{ffi::c_void, mem, ptr, ptr::NonNull, slice};
25541
25542    use objc2_metal::{
25543        MTLBuffer, MTLCommandBuffer, MTLCommandBufferStatus, MTLCommandEncoder, MTLCommandQueue,
25544        MTLComputeCommandEncoder, MTLComputePipelineState, MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice, MTLDevice,
25545        MTLLibrary, MTLResourceOptions, MTLSize,
25546    };
25547
25548    let total_started = Instant::now();
25549    let profile_detail = profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled();
25550    let [grid_width, grid_height] = projector.grid_shape();
25551    let cell_count = grid_width.checked_mul(grid_height).ok_or_else(|| {
25552        ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal grid is too large".to_string())
25553    })?;
25554    let output_bytes = cell_count
25555        .checked_mul(mem::size_of::<u32>())
25556        .ok_or_else(|| {
25557            ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal output grid is too large".to_string())
25558        })?;
25559
25560    let device_queue_started = Instant::now();
25561    let device = MTLCreateSystemDefaultDevice().ok_or_else(|| {
25562        ImagingError::Unsupported(
25563            "wproject backend 'metal' could not find a default Metal device".to_string(),
25564        )
25565    })?;
25566    let queue = device.newCommandQueue().ok_or_else(|| {
25567        ImagingError::Unsupported(
25568            "wproject backend 'metal' could not create a Metal command queue".to_string(),
25569        )
25570    })?;
25571    let device_queue_elapsed = device_queue_started.elapsed();
25572
25573    let shader_compile_started = Instant::now();
25574    let source = objc2_foundation::NSString::from_str(W_PROJECT_METAL_SHADER);
25575    let library = device
25576        .newLibraryWithSource_options_error(&source, None)
25577        .map_err(|error| {
25578            ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
25579                "wproject backend 'metal' failed to compile shader: {error:?}"
25580            ))
25581        })?;
25582    let shader_compile_elapsed = shader_compile_started.elapsed();
25583
25584    let pipeline_started = Instant::now();
25585    let entry_point = if mode == W_PROJECT_METAL_MODE_DIRTY {
25586        "wproject_grid_dirty_samples"
25587    } else {
25588        "wproject_grid_samples"
25589    };
25590    let function_name = objc2_foundation::NSString::from_str(entry_point);
25591    let function = library.newFunctionWithName(&function_name).ok_or_else(|| {
25592        ImagingError::Unsupported(
25593            "wproject backend 'metal' shader entry point was not found".to_string(),
25594        )
25595    })?;
25596    let pipeline = device
25597        .newComputePipelineStateWithFunction_error(&function)
25598        .map_err(|error| {
25599            ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
25600                "wproject backend 'metal' failed to create pipeline: {error:?}"
25601            ))
25602        })?;
25603    let pipeline_elapsed = pipeline_started.elapsed();
25604    let thread_width = pipeline.threadExecutionWidth().max(1);
25605    let max_threads = pipeline.maxTotalThreadsPerThreadgroup().max(1);
25606
25607    let storage_options = MTLResourceOptions::StorageModeShared;
25608    let buffer_alloc_started = Instant::now();
25609    let kernel_weights = w_project_metal_kernel_weights(projector);
25610    let kernel_buffer_bytes = mem::size_of_val(kernel_weights.as_slice());
25611    let kernel_buffer = unsafe {
25612        let pointer = NonNull::new(kernel_weights.as_ptr().cast::<c_void>() as *mut c_void)
25613            .ok_or_else(|| {
25614                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal kernel pointer was null".to_string())
25615            })?;
25616        device
25617            .newBufferWithBytesNoCopy_length_options_deallocator(
25618                pointer,
25619                kernel_buffer_bytes,
25620                storage_options,
25621                None,
25622            )
25623            .ok_or_else(|| {
25624                ImagingError::Unsupported(
25625                    "wproject backend 'metal' could not wrap kernel buffer without copying"
25626                        .to_string(),
25627                )
25628            })?
25629    };
25630    let model_pack_started = Instant::now();
25631    let model_values = if let Some(model_grid) = model_grid {
25632        model_grid
25633            .iter()
25634            .map(|value| WProjectMetalComplex {
25635                re: value.re,
25636                im: value.im,
25637            })
25638            .collect::<Vec<_>>()
25639    } else {
25640        vec![WProjectMetalComplex { re: 0.0, im: 0.0 }]
25641    };
25642    let model_pack_elapsed = model_pack_started.elapsed();
25643    let model_buffer_bytes = mem::size_of_val(model_values.as_slice());
25644    let model_buffer = unsafe {
25645        let pointer = NonNull::new(model_values.as_ptr().cast::<c_void>() as *mut c_void)
25646            .ok_or_else(|| {
25647                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal model pointer was null".to_string())
25648            })?;
25649        device
25650            .newBufferWithBytesNoCopy_length_options_deallocator(
25651                pointer,
25652                model_buffer_bytes,
25653                storage_options,
25654                None,
25655            )
25656            .ok_or_else(|| {
25657                ImagingError::Unsupported(
25658                    "wproject backend 'metal' could not wrap model buffer without copying"
25659                        .to_string(),
25660                )
25661            })?
25662    };
25663    let psf_re = device
25664        .newBufferWithLength_options(output_bytes, storage_options)
25665        .ok_or_else(|| {
25666            ImagingError::Unsupported(
25667                "wproject backend 'metal' could not allocate PSF real buffer".to_string(),
25668            )
25669        })?;
25670    let psf_im = device
25671        .newBufferWithLength_options(output_bytes, storage_options)
25672        .ok_or_else(|| {
25673            ImagingError::Unsupported(
25674                "wproject backend 'metal' could not allocate PSF imag buffer".to_string(),
25675            )
25676        })?;
25677    let residual_re = device
25678        .newBufferWithLength_options(output_bytes, storage_options)
25679        .ok_or_else(|| {
25680            ImagingError::Unsupported(
25681                "wproject backend 'metal' could not allocate residual real buffer".to_string(),
25682            )
25683        })?;
25684    let residual_im = device
25685        .newBufferWithLength_options(output_bytes, storage_options)
25686        .ok_or_else(|| {
25687            ImagingError::Unsupported(
25688                "wproject backend 'metal' could not allocate residual imag buffer".to_string(),
25689            )
25690        })?;
25691    let buffer_alloc_elapsed = buffer_alloc_started.elapsed();
25692
25693    let zero_outputs_started = Instant::now();
25694    unsafe {
25695        ptr::write_bytes(psf_re.contents().as_ptr().cast::<u8>(), 0, output_bytes);
25696        ptr::write_bytes(psf_im.contents().as_ptr().cast::<u8>(), 0, output_bytes);
25697        ptr::write_bytes(
25698            residual_re.contents().as_ptr().cast::<u8>(),
25699            0,
25700            output_bytes,
25701        );
25702        ptr::write_bytes(
25703            residual_im.contents().as_ptr().cast::<u8>(),
25704            0,
25705            output_bytes,
25706        );
25707    }
25708    let zero_outputs_elapsed = zero_outputs_started.elapsed();
25709
25710    let kernel_width = projector.kernel_weight_width();
25711    let mut accumulation = WProjectGridAccumulation::default();
25712    let mut stats = WProjectMetalStreamingStats::default();
25713    let mut threads_per_group_for_log = 1usize;
25714    replay_weighted_batches(&mut |batches| {
25715        let chunk = prepare_w_project_metal_streaming_chunk(projector, &batches)?;
25716        stats.prepare_elapsed += chunk.prepare_elapsed;
25717        stats.skipped_samples += chunk.skipped_samples;
25718        stats.gridded_samples += chunk.gridded_samples;
25719        stats.max_support = stats.max_support.max(chunk.max_support);
25720        stats.tap_visits += chunk.tap_visits;
25721        stats.boundary_merges += chunk.boundary_merges;
25722        accumulation.normalization_sumwt += chunk.normalization_sumwt;
25723        accumulation.reported_sumwt += chunk.reported_sumwt;
25724        accumulation.gridded_samples += chunk.gridded_samples;
25725        accumulation.skipped_samples += chunk.skipped_samples;
25726        if chunk.samples.is_empty() {
25727            return Ok(());
25728        }
25729
25730        stats.chunk_count += 1;
25731        stats.sample_count += chunk.samples.len();
25732        let sample_buffer_bytes = mem::size_of_val(chunk.samples.as_slice());
25733        stats.sample_buffer_bytes += sample_buffer_bytes;
25734        let params = WProjectMetalParams {
25735            sample_count: u32::try_from(chunk.samples.len()).map_err(|_| {
25736                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal sample count exceeds u32".to_string())
25737            })?,
25738            grid_width: u32::try_from(grid_width).map_err(|_| {
25739                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal grid width exceeds u32".to_string())
25740            })?,
25741            grid_height: u32::try_from(grid_height).map_err(|_| {
25742                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal grid height exceeds u32".to_string())
25743            })?,
25744            kernel_width: u32::try_from(kernel_width).map_err(|_| {
25745                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal kernel width exceeds u32".to_string())
25746            })?,
25747            sampling: u32::try_from(projector.sampling()).map_err(|_| {
25748                ImagingError::InvalidRequest("wproject Metal sampling exceeds u32".to_string())
25749            })?,
25750            mode,
25751            model_present: u32::from(model_grid.is_some()),
25752            partial_grid_count: 1,
25753            partial_chunk_len: u32::try_from(chunk.samples.len()).map_err(|_| {
25754                ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
25755                    "wproject Metal partial grid chunk length exceeds u32".to_string(),
25756                )
25757            })?,
25758            _pad0: 0,
25759        };
25760
25761        let sample_buffer = unsafe {
25762            let pointer = NonNull::new(chunk.samples.as_ptr().cast::<c_void>() as *mut c_void)
25763                .ok_or_else(|| {
25764                    ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
25765                        "wproject Metal sample pointer was null".to_string(),
25766                    )
25767                })?;
25768            device
25769                .newBufferWithBytesNoCopy_length_options_deallocator(
25770                    pointer,
25771                    sample_buffer_bytes,
25772                    storage_options,
25773                    None,
25774                )
25775                .ok_or_else(|| {
25776                    ImagingError::Unsupported(
25777                        "wproject backend 'metal' could not wrap streaming sample buffer without copying"
25778                            .to_string(),
25779                    )
25780                })?
25781        };
25782        let params_buffer = unsafe {
25783            let params_slice = slice::from_ref(&params);
25784            let byte_len = mem::size_of_val(params_slice);
25785            let pointer = NonNull::new(params_slice.as_ptr().cast::<c_void>() as *mut c_void)
25786                .ok_or_else(|| {
25787                    ImagingError::InvalidRequest(
25788                        "wproject Metal params pointer was null".to_string(),
25789                    )
25790                })?;
25791            device
25792                .newBufferWithBytes_length_options(pointer, byte_len, storage_options)
25793                .ok_or_else(|| {
25794                    ImagingError::Unsupported(
25795                        "wproject backend 'metal' could not allocate streaming params buffer"
25796                            .to_string(),
25797                    )
25798                })?
25799        };
25800
25801        let encode_started = Instant::now();
25802        let command_buffer = queue.commandBuffer().ok_or_else(|| {
25803            ImagingError::Unsupported(
25804                "wproject backend 'metal' could not create a command buffer".to_string(),
25805            )
25806        })?;
25807        let encoder = command_buffer.computeCommandEncoder().ok_or_else(|| {
25808            ImagingError::Unsupported(
25809                "wproject backend 'metal' could not create a compute encoder".to_string(),
25810            )
25811        })?;
25812        encoder.setComputePipelineState(&pipeline);
25813        unsafe {
25814            encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&sample_buffer), 0, 0);
25815            encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&kernel_buffer), 0, 1);
25816            encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&model_buffer), 0, 2);
25817            encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&psf_re), 0, 3);
25818            encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&psf_im), 0, 4);
25819            encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&residual_re), 0, 5);
25820            encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&residual_im), 0, 6);
25821            encoder.setBuffer_offset_atIndex(Some(&params_buffer), 0, 7);
25822        }
25823        let thread_count = chunk.samples.len();
25824        let threads_per_group = thread_width.min(max_threads).min(thread_count).max(1);
25825        threads_per_group_for_log = threads_per_group;
25826        encoder.dispatchThreads_threadsPerThreadgroup(
25827            MTLSize {
25828                width: thread_count,
25829                height: 1,
25830                depth: 1,
25831            },
25832            MTLSize {
25833                width: threads_per_group,
25834                height: 1,
25835                depth: 1,
25836            },
25837        );
25838        encoder.endEncoding();
25839        stats.encode_elapsed += encode_started.elapsed();
25840
25841        let dispatch_wait_started = Instant::now();
25842        command_buffer.commit();
25843        command_buffer.waitUntilCompleted();
25844        stats.dispatch_wait_elapsed += dispatch_wait_started.elapsed();
25845        if command_buffer.status() == MTLCommandBufferStatus::Error {
25846            let message = command_buffer
25847                .error()
25848                .map(|error| format!("{error:?}"))
25849                .unwrap_or_else(|| "unknown Metal command buffer error".to_string());
25850            return Err(ImagingError::Unsupported(format!(
25851                "wproject backend 'metal' command failed: {message}"
25852            )));
25853        }
25854        Ok(())
25855    })?;
25856
25857    if stats.sample_count == 0 || accumulation.normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 {
25858        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
25859    }
25860
25861    let readback_started = Instant::now();
25862    let psf_re_values =
25863        unsafe { slice::from_raw_parts(psf_re.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(), cell_count) };
25864    let psf_im_values =
25865        unsafe { slice::from_raw_parts(psf_im.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(), cell_count) };
25866    let residual_re_values =
25867        unsafe { slice::from_raw_parts(residual_re.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(), cell_count) };
25868    let residual_im_values =
25869        unsafe { slice::from_raw_parts(residual_im.contents().as_ptr().cast::<f32>(), cell_count) };
25870    for (
25871        (((psf_cell, &psf_re_value), &psf_im_value), residual_cell),
25872        (&residual_re_value, &residual_im_value),
25873    ) in psf_grid
25874        .as_slice_memory_order_mut()
25875        .expect("wproject PSF grid should be contiguous")
25876        .iter_mut()
25877        .zip(psf_re_values)
25878        .zip(psf_im_values)
25879        .zip(
25880            residual_grid
25881                .as_slice_memory_order_mut()
25882                .expect("wproject residual grid should be contiguous")
25883                .iter_mut(),
25884        )
25885        .zip(residual_re_values.iter().zip(residual_im_values))
25886    {
25887        *psf_cell = Complex32::new(psf_re_value, psf_im_value);
25888        *residual_cell = Complex32::new(residual_re_value, residual_im_value);
25889    }
25890    let readback_elapsed = readback_started.elapsed();
25891
25892    if profile_detail {
25893        let avg_taps_per_sample = stats.tap_visits as f64 / stats.sample_count.max(1) as f64;
25894        let grouped_sample_ratio = stats.sample_count as f64 / stats.gridded_samples.max(1) as f64;
25895        eprintln!(
25896            "wproject_metal_streaming_grid mode={} entry={} chunks={} samples={} gridded_samples={} grouped_sample_ratio={:.6} skipped={} grid={}x{} planes={} kernel_width={} sampling={} max_support={} avg_taps_per_sample={:.3} tap_visits={} boundary_merges={} sample_bytes_total={} kernel_bytes={} model_bytes={} output_bytes={} thread_width={} max_threads={} threads_per_group={} device_queue_ms={:.3} shader_compile_ms={:.3} pipeline_ms={:.3} buffer_alloc_copy_ms={:.3} model_pack_ms={:.3} zero_outputs_ms={:.3} prepare_ms={:.3} encode_ms={:.3} dispatch_wait_ms={:.3} readback_ms={:.3} total_ms={:.3}",
25897            mode,
25898            entry_point,
25899            stats.chunk_count,
25900            stats.sample_count,
25901            stats.gridded_samples,
25902            grouped_sample_ratio,
25903            stats.skipped_samples,
25904            grid_width,
25905            grid_height,
25906            projector.plane_count(),
25907            kernel_width,
25908            projector.sampling(),
25909            stats.max_support,
25910            avg_taps_per_sample,
25911            stats.tap_visits,
25912            stats.boundary_merges,
25913            stats.sample_buffer_bytes,
25914            kernel_buffer_bytes,
25915            model_buffer_bytes,
25916            output_bytes * 4,
25917            thread_width,
25918            max_threads,
25919            threads_per_group_for_log,
25920            profile::millis(device_queue_elapsed),
25921            profile::millis(shader_compile_elapsed),
25922            profile::millis(pipeline_elapsed),
25923            profile::millis(buffer_alloc_elapsed),
25924            profile::millis(model_pack_elapsed),
25925            profile::millis(zero_outputs_elapsed),
25926            profile::millis(stats.prepare_elapsed),
25927            profile::millis(stats.encode_elapsed),
25928            profile::millis(stats.dispatch_wait_elapsed),
25929            profile::millis(readback_elapsed),
25930            profile::millis(total_started.elapsed()),
25931        );
25932    }
25933    Ok(accumulation)
25934}
25935
25936#[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
25937const W_PROJECT_METAL_SHADER: &str = r#"
25938#include <metal_stdlib>
25939using namespace metal;
25940
25941struct WProjectSample {
25942    uint loc;
25943    uint plane_support_offsets;
25944    float weight;
25945    float visibility_re;
25946    float visibility_im;
25947};
25948
25949struct WProjectParams {
25950    uint sample_count;
25951    uint grid_width;
25952    uint grid_height;
25953    uint kernel_width;
25954    uint sampling;
25955    uint mode;
25956    uint model_present;
25957    uint partial_grid_count;
25958    uint partial_chunk_len;
25959    uint _pad0;
25960};
25961
25962static inline void atomic_add_float(device atomic_float *address, float value) {
25963    atomic_fetch_add_explicit(address, value, memory_order_relaxed);
25964}
25965
25966static inline uint sample_loc_x(WProjectSample sample) {
25967    return sample.loc & 0xffffu;
25968}
25969
25970static inline uint sample_loc_y(WProjectSample sample) {
25971    return sample.loc >> 16;
25972}
25973
25974static inline uint sample_plane_index(WProjectSample sample) {
25975    return sample.plane_support_offsets & 0x3ffu;
25976}
25977
25978static inline int sample_support(WProjectSample sample) {
25979    return int((sample.plane_support_offsets >> 10) & 0x1fu);
25980}
25981
25982static inline int sample_off_x(WProjectSample sample) {
25983    return int((sample.plane_support_offsets >> 16) & 0xffu) - 128;
25984}
25985
25986static inline int sample_off_y(WProjectSample sample) {
25987    return int((sample.plane_support_offsets >> 24) & 0xffu) - 128;
25988}
25989
25990static inline bool sample_conjugate_kernel(WProjectSample sample) {
25991    return (sample.plane_support_offsets & (1u << 15)) != 0u;
25992}
25993
25994kernel void wproject_grid_samples(
25995    device const WProjectSample *samples [[buffer(0)]],
25996    device const float2 *kernels [[buffer(1)]],
25997    device const float2 *model [[buffer(2)]],
25998    device atomic_float *psf_re [[buffer(3)]],
25999    device atomic_float *psf_im [[buffer(4)]],
26000    device atomic_float *residual_re [[buffer(5)]],
26001    device atomic_float *residual_im [[buffer(6)]],
26002    constant WProjectParams &params [[buffer(7)]],
26003    uint sample_index [[thread_position_in_grid]]
26004) {
26005    if (sample_index >= params.sample_count) {
26006        return;
26007    }
26008    const WProjectSample sample = samples[sample_index];
26009    const int support = sample_support(sample);
26010    const uint plane_offset =
26011        sample_plane_index(sample) * params.kernel_width * params.kernel_width;
26012
26013    float predicted_re = 0.0f;
26014    float predicted_im = 0.0f;
26015    const bool needs_model = params.mode == 2u && params.model_present != 0u;
26016    if (needs_model) {
26017        for (int iy = -support; iy <= support; ++iy) {
26018            const uint kernel_y = uint(abs(iy * int(params.sampling) + sample_off_y(sample)));
26019            const uint grid_y = uint(int(sample_loc_y(sample)) + iy);
26020            for (int ix = -support; ix <= support; ++ix) {
26021                const uint kernel_x = uint(abs(ix * int(params.sampling) + sample_off_x(sample)));
26022                const uint grid_x = uint(int(sample_loc_x(sample)) + ix);
26023                float2 cwt = kernels[plane_offset + kernel_x * params.kernel_width + kernel_y];
26024                if (sample_conjugate_kernel(sample)) {
26025                    cwt.y = -cwt.y;
26026                }
26027                const float2 cell = model[grid_x * params.grid_height + grid_y];
26028                predicted_re += cwt.x * cell.x + cwt.y * cell.y;
26029                predicted_im += cwt.x * cell.y - cwt.y * cell.x;
26030            }
26031        }
26032    }
26033
26034    const bool write_psf = params.mode == 0u || params.mode == 1u;
26035    const bool write_residual = params.mode == 1u || params.mode == 2u;
26036    const float residual_value_re = sample.visibility_re - predicted_re;
26037    const float residual_value_im = sample.visibility_im - predicted_im;
26038    for (int iy = -support; iy <= support; ++iy) {
26039        const uint kernel_y = uint(abs(iy * int(params.sampling) + sample_off_y(sample)));
26040        const uint grid_y = uint(int(sample_loc_y(sample)) + iy);
26041        for (int ix = -support; ix <= support; ++ix) {
26042            const uint kernel_x = uint(abs(ix * int(params.sampling) + sample_off_x(sample)));
26043            const uint grid_x = uint(int(sample_loc_x(sample)) + ix);
26044            float2 cwt = kernels[plane_offset + kernel_x * params.kernel_width + kernel_y];
26045            if (sample_conjugate_kernel(sample)) {
26046                cwt.y = -cwt.y;
26047            }
26048            const uint cell = grid_x * params.grid_height + grid_y;
26049            if (write_psf) {
26050                atomic_add_float(&psf_re[cell], sample.weight * cwt.x);
26051                atomic_add_float(&psf_im[cell], sample.weight * cwt.y);
26052            }
26053            if (write_residual) {
26054                const float weighted_re =
26055                    sample.weight * (residual_value_re * cwt.x - residual_value_im * cwt.y);
26056                const float weighted_im =
26057                    sample.weight * (residual_value_re * cwt.y + residual_value_im * cwt.x);
26058                atomic_add_float(&residual_re[cell], weighted_re);
26059                atomic_add_float(&residual_im[cell], weighted_im);
26060            }
26061        }
26062    }
26063}
26064
26065kernel void wproject_grid_dirty_samples(
26066    device const WProjectSample *samples [[buffer(0)]],
26067    device const float2 *kernels [[buffer(1)]],
26068    device atomic_float *psf_re [[buffer(3)]],
26069    device atomic_float *psf_im [[buffer(4)]],
26070    device atomic_float *residual_re [[buffer(5)]],
26071    device atomic_float *residual_im [[buffer(6)]],
26072    constant WProjectParams &params [[buffer(7)]],
26073    uint sample_index [[thread_position_in_grid]]
26074) {
26075    if (sample_index >= params.sample_count) {
26076        return;
26077    }
26078    const WProjectSample sample = samples[sample_index];
26079    const int support = sample_support(sample);
26080    const uint plane_offset =
26081        sample_plane_index(sample) * params.kernel_width * params.kernel_width;
26082    for (int iy = -support; iy <= support; ++iy) {
26083        const uint kernel_y = uint(abs(iy * int(params.sampling) + sample_off_y(sample)));
26084        const uint grid_y = uint(int(sample_loc_y(sample)) + iy);
26085        for (int ix = -support; ix <= support; ++ix) {
26086            const uint kernel_x = uint(abs(ix * int(params.sampling) + sample_off_x(sample)));
26087            const uint grid_x = uint(int(sample_loc_x(sample)) + ix);
26088            float2 cwt = kernels[plane_offset + kernel_x * params.kernel_width + kernel_y];
26089            if (sample_conjugate_kernel(sample)) {
26090                cwt.y = -cwt.y;
26091            }
26092            const uint cell = grid_x * params.grid_height + grid_y;
26093            atomic_add_float(&psf_re[cell], sample.weight * cwt.x);
26094            atomic_add_float(&psf_im[cell], sample.weight * cwt.y);
26095            atomic_add_float(
26096                &residual_re[cell],
26097                sample.weight * (sample.visibility_re * cwt.x - sample.visibility_im * cwt.y)
26098            );
26099            atomic_add_float(
26100                &residual_im[cell],
26101                sample.weight * (sample.visibility_re * cwt.y + sample.visibility_im * cwt.x)
26102            );
26103        }
26104    }
26105}
26106
26107kernel void wproject_grid_dirty_chunked_samples(
26108    device const WProjectSample *samples [[buffer(0)]],
26109    device const float2 *kernels [[buffer(1)]],
26110    device atomic_float *psf_re [[buffer(3)]],
26111    device atomic_float *psf_im [[buffer(4)]],
26112    device atomic_float *residual_re [[buffer(5)]],
26113    device atomic_float *residual_im [[buffer(6)]],
26114    constant WProjectParams &params [[buffer(7)]],
26115    uint sample_index [[thread_position_in_grid]]
26116) {
26117    if (sample_index >= params.sample_count) {
26118        return;
26119    }
26120    const WProjectSample sample = samples[sample_index];
26121    const int support = sample_support(sample);
26122    const uint plane_offset =
26123        sample_plane_index(sample) * params.kernel_width * params.kernel_width;
26124    const uint partial_grid_index = min(
26125        sample_index / max(params.partial_chunk_len, 1u),
26126        params.partial_grid_count - 1u
26127    );
26128    const uint partial_grid_offset = partial_grid_index * params.grid_width * params.grid_height;
26129    for (int iy = -support; iy <= support; ++iy) {
