26130        const uint kernel_y = uint(abs(iy * int(params.sampling) + sample_off_y(sample)));
26131        const uint grid_y = uint(int(sample_loc_y(sample)) + iy);
26132        for (int ix = -support; ix <= support; ++ix) {
26133            const uint kernel_x = uint(abs(ix * int(params.sampling) + sample_off_x(sample)));
26134            const uint grid_x = uint(int(sample_loc_x(sample)) + ix);
26135            float2 cwt = kernels[plane_offset + kernel_x * params.kernel_width + kernel_y];
26136            if (sample_conjugate_kernel(sample)) {
26137                cwt.y = -cwt.y;
26138            }
26139            const uint cell = partial_grid_offset + grid_x * params.grid_height + grid_y;
26140            atomic_add_float(&psf_re[cell], sample.weight * cwt.x);
26141            atomic_add_float(&psf_im[cell], sample.weight * cwt.y);
26142            atomic_add_float(
26143                &residual_re[cell],
26144                sample.weight * (sample.visibility_re * cwt.x - sample.visibility_im * cwt.y)
26145            );
26146            atomic_add_float(
26147                &residual_im[cell],
26148                sample.weight * (sample.visibility_re * cwt.y + sample.visibility_im * cwt.x)
26149            );
26150        }
26151    }
26152}
26153
26154kernel void wproject_reduce_dirty_chunked_grids(
26155    device const float *partial_psf_re [[buffer(0)]],
26156    device const float *partial_psf_im [[buffer(1)]],
26157    device const float *partial_residual_re [[buffer(2)]],
26158    device const float *partial_residual_im [[buffer(3)]],
26159    device float *psf_re [[buffer(4)]],
26160    device float *psf_im [[buffer(5)]],
26161    device float *residual_re [[buffer(6)]],
26162    device float *residual_im [[buffer(7)]],
26163    constant WProjectParams &params [[buffer(8)]],
26164    uint cell [[thread_position_in_grid]]
26165) {
26166    const uint cell_count = params.grid_width * params.grid_height;
26167    if (cell >= cell_count) {
26168        return;
26169    }
26170
26171    float sum_psf_re = 0.0f;
26172    float sum_psf_im = 0.0f;
26173    float sum_residual_re = 0.0f;
26174    float sum_residual_im = 0.0f;
26175    for (uint partial = 0; partial < params.partial_grid_count; ++partial) {
26176        const uint index = partial * cell_count + cell;
26177        sum_psf_re += partial_psf_re[index];
26178        sum_psf_im += partial_psf_im[index];
26179        sum_residual_re += partial_residual_re[index];
26180        sum_residual_im += partial_residual_im[index];
26181    }
26182    psf_re[cell] = sum_psf_re;
26183    psf_im[cell] = sum_psf_im;
26184    residual_re[cell] = sum_residual_re;
26185    residual_im[cell] = sum_residual_im;
26186}
26187"#;
26188
26189fn prepare_w_project_data(
26190    geometry: ImageGeometry,
26191    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
26192    gridder: &StandardGridder,
26193    w_project_planes: Option<usize>,
26194) -> Result<WProjectPreparedData, ImagingError> {
26195    let input_sample_count: usize = batches.iter().map(VisibilityBatch::len).sum();
26196    let (raw_sample_count, max_abs_w_lambda) = w_project_raw_sample_summary(batches);
26197    if raw_sample_count == 0 {
26198        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
26199    }
26200    let projector = WProjector::new(geometry, gridder, max_abs_w_lambda, w_project_planes)?;
26201    let thread_count = w_project_grid_threads(input_sample_count);
26202    if thread_count > 1 && raw_sample_count >= 10_000 {
26203        return prepare_w_project_data_parallel(
26204            w_project_planes,
26205            max_abs_w_lambda,
26206            projector,
26207            batches,
26208            raw_sample_count,
26209            input_sample_count,
26210            thread_count,
26211        );
26212    }
26213    prepare_w_project_data_serial(
26214        w_project_planes,
26215        max_abs_w_lambda,
26216        projector,
26217        batches,
26218        raw_sample_count,
26219    )
26220}
26221
26222fn prepare_w_project_metal_data(
26223    geometry: ImageGeometry,
26224    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
26225    gridder: &StandardGridder,
26226    w_project_planes: Option<usize>,
26227) -> Result<WProjectMetalPreparedData, ImagingError> {
26228    let input_sample_count: usize = batches.iter().map(VisibilityBatch::len).sum();
26229    let (raw_sample_count, max_abs_w_lambda) = w_project_raw_sample_summary(batches);
26230    if raw_sample_count == 0 {
26231        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
26232    }
26233    let projector = WProjector::new(geometry, gridder, max_abs_w_lambda, w_project_planes)?;
26234    let thread_count = w_project_grid_threads(input_sample_count);
26235    if thread_count > 1 && raw_sample_count >= 10_000 {
26236        return prepare_w_project_metal_data_parallel(
26237            w_project_planes,
26238            max_abs_w_lambda,
26239            projector,
26240            batches,
26241            raw_sample_count,
26242            input_sample_count,
26243            thread_count,
26244        );
26245    }
26246    prepare_w_project_metal_data_serial(
26247        w_project_planes,
26248        max_abs_w_lambda,
26249        projector,
26250        batches,
26251        raw_sample_count,
26252    )
26253}
26254
26255fn prepare_w_project_metal_data_serial(
26256    w_project_planes: Option<usize>,
26257    max_abs_w_lambda: f64,
26258    projector: WProjector,
26259    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
26260    raw_sample_count: usize,
26261) -> Result<WProjectMetalPreparedData, ImagingError> {
26262    let mut samples = Vec::with_capacity(raw_sample_count);
26263    let mut skipped_samples = 0usize;
26264    let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
26265    let mut reported_sumwt = 0.0f64;
26266    let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
26267    let mut max_support = 0u16;
26268    let mut tap_visits = 0usize;
26269
26270    for (batch_index, batch) in batches.iter().enumerate() {
26271        for sample_index in 0..batch.len() {
26272            accumulate_w_project_metal_prepared_sample(
26273                &projector,
26274                batch,
26275                batch_index,
26276                sample_index,
26277                &mut samples,
26278                &mut skipped_samples,
26279                &mut normalization_sumwt,
26280                &mut reported_sumwt,
26281                &mut gridded_samples,
26282                &mut max_support,
26283                &mut tap_visits,
26284            )?;
26285        }
26286    }
26287
26288    finish_w_project_metal_prepared_data(
26289        w_project_planes,
26290        max_abs_w_lambda,
26291        projector,
26292        samples,
26293        skipped_samples,
26294        normalization_sumwt,
26295        reported_sumwt,
26296        gridded_samples,
26297        max_support,
26298        tap_visits,
26299    )
26300}
26301
26302fn prepare_w_project_metal_data_parallel(
26303    w_project_planes: Option<usize>,
26304    max_abs_w_lambda: f64,
26305    projector: WProjector,
26306    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
26307    raw_sample_count: usize,
26308    input_sample_count: usize,
26309    thread_count: usize,
26310) -> Result<WProjectMetalPreparedData, ImagingError> {
26311    let chunk_len = input_sample_count.div_ceil(thread_count);
26312    let mut local_results = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
26313    thread::scope(|scope| {
26314        let mut handles = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
26315        for chunk_index in 0..thread_count {
26316            let sample_start = chunk_index * chunk_len;
26317            let sample_end = ((chunk_index + 1) * chunk_len).min(input_sample_count);
26318            if sample_start >= sample_end {
26319                continue;
26320            }
26321            let projector = &projector;
26322            handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
26323                let worker_started = Instant::now();
26324                let mut samples =
26325                    Vec::<WProjectMetalSample>::with_capacity(sample_end - sample_start);
26326                let mut skipped_samples = 0usize;
26327                let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
26328                let mut reported_sumwt = 0.0f64;
26329                let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
26330                let mut max_support = 0u16;
26331                let mut tap_visits = 0usize;
26332                let mut global_sample_offset = 0usize;
26333                for (batch_index, batch) in batches.iter().enumerate() {
26334                    let batch_start = global_sample_offset;
26335                    let batch_end = batch_start + batch.len();
26336                    global_sample_offset = batch_end;
26337                    if batch_end <= sample_start {
26338                        continue;
26339                    }
26340                    if batch_start >= sample_end {
26341                        break;
26342                    }
26343                    let local_start = sample_start.saturating_sub(batch_start);
26344                    let local_end = (sample_end - batch_start).min(batch.len());
26345                    for sample_index in local_start..local_end {
26346                        accumulate_w_project_metal_prepared_sample(
26347                            projector,
26348                            batch,
26349                            batch_index,
26350                            sample_index,
26351                            &mut samples,
26352                            &mut skipped_samples,
26353                            &mut normalization_sumwt,
26354                            &mut reported_sumwt,
26355                            &mut gridded_samples,
26356                            &mut max_support,
26357                            &mut tap_visits,
26358                        )?;
26359                    }
26360                }
26361                Ok::<_, ImagingError>(WProjectMetalPreparedLocal {
26362                    sample_start,
26363                    samples,
26364                    skipped_samples,
26365                    normalization_sumwt,
26366                    reported_sumwt,
26367                    gridded_samples,
26368                    max_support,
26369                    tap_visits,
26370                    worker_elapsed: worker_started.elapsed(),
26371                })
26372            }));
26373        }
26374        for handle in handles {
26375            local_results.push(handle.join().map_err(|_| {
26376                ImagingError::Unsupported(
26377                    "wproject Metal sample planning worker panicked".to_string(),
26378                )
26379            })??);
26380        }
26381        Ok::<(), ImagingError>(())
26382    })?;
26383    local_results.sort_by_key(|local| local.sample_start);
26384
26385    let local_sample_count = local_results
26386        .iter()
26387        .map(|local| local.samples.len())
26388        .sum::<usize>();
26389    let merge_started = Instant::now();
26390    let mut samples = Vec::<WProjectMetalSample>::with_capacity(local_sample_count);
26391    let mut skipped_samples = 0usize;
26392    let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
26393    let mut reported_sumwt = 0.0f64;
26394    let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
26395    let mut max_support = 0u16;
26396    let mut tap_visits = 0usize;
26397    let mut boundary_merges = 0usize;
26398    let mut worker_elapsed = Vec::with_capacity(local_results.len());
26399    for mut local in local_results {
26400        worker_elapsed.push(local.worker_elapsed);
26401        skipped_samples += local.skipped_samples;
26402        normalization_sumwt += local.normalization_sumwt;
26403        reported_sumwt += local.reported_sumwt;
26404        gridded_samples += local.gridded_samples;
26405        max_support = max_support.max(local.max_support);
26406        tap_visits += local.tap_visits;
26407        if local.samples.is_empty() {
26408            continue;
26409        }
26410        if let Some(last) = samples.last_mut()
26411            && last.merge_weighted_visibility(local.samples[0])
26412        {
26413            let axis = usize::from(local.samples[0].support()) * 2 + 1;
26414            tap_visits = tap_visits.saturating_sub(axis * axis);
26415            boundary_merges += 1;
26416            samples.extend_from_slice(&local.samples[1..]);
26417            continue;
26418        }
26419        samples.append(&mut local.samples);
26420    }
26421    let merge_elapsed = merge_started.elapsed();
26422    if profile::standard_mfs_profile_detail_enabled() {
26423        worker_elapsed.sort();
26424        let worker_min = worker_elapsed.first().copied().unwrap_or(Duration::ZERO);
26425        let worker_p50 = worker_elapsed
26426            .get(worker_elapsed.len().saturating_sub(1) / 2)
26427            .copied()
26428            .unwrap_or(Duration::ZERO);
26429        let worker_max = worker_elapsed.last().copied().unwrap_or(Duration::ZERO);
26430        eprintln!(
26431            "wproject_metal_prepare_parallel requested_threads={} actual_threads={} chunk_len={} input_samples={} raw_samples={} local_grouped_samples={} final_grouped_samples={} boundary_merges={} final_capacity={} worker_compute_min_ms={:.3} worker_compute_p50_ms={:.3} worker_compute_max_ms={:.3} merge_ms={:.3}",
26432            thread_count,
26433            worker_elapsed.len(),
26434            chunk_len,
26435            input_sample_count,
26436            raw_sample_count,
26437            local_sample_count,
26438            samples.len(),
26439            boundary_merges,
26440            samples.capacity(),
26441            profile::millis(worker_min),
26442            profile::millis(worker_p50),
26443            profile::millis(worker_max),
26444            profile::millis(merge_elapsed),
26445        );
26446    }
26447
26448    finish_w_project_metal_prepared_data(
26449        w_project_planes,
26450        max_abs_w_lambda,
26451        projector,
26452        samples,
26453        skipped_samples,
26454        normalization_sumwt,
26455        reported_sumwt,
26456        gridded_samples,
26457        max_support,
26458        tap_visits,
26459    )
26460}
26461
26462#[cfg_attr(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage), allow(dead_code))]
26463fn prepare_w_project_metal_streaming_chunk(
26464    projector: &WProjector,
26465    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
26466) -> Result<WProjectMetalStreamingChunk, ImagingError> {
26467    let prepare_started = Instant::now();
26468    let input_sample_count: usize = batches.iter().map(VisibilityBatch::len).sum();
26469    if input_sample_count == 0 {
26470        return Ok(WProjectMetalStreamingChunk {
26471            prepare_elapsed: prepare_started.elapsed(),
26472            ..WProjectMetalStreamingChunk::default()
26473        });
26474    }
26475
26476    let thread_count = w_project_grid_threads(input_sample_count);
26477    if thread_count <= 1 || input_sample_count < 10_000 {
26478        let mut chunk = WProjectMetalStreamingChunk {
26479            samples: Vec::with_capacity(input_sample_count),
26480            ..WProjectMetalStreamingChunk::default()
26481        };
26482        for (batch_index, batch) in batches.iter().enumerate() {
26483            for sample_index in 0..batch.len() {
26484                accumulate_w_project_metal_prepared_sample(
26485                    projector,
26486                    batch,
26487                    batch_index,
26488                    sample_index,
26489                    &mut chunk.samples,
26490                    &mut chunk.skipped_samples,
26491                    &mut chunk.normalization_sumwt,
26492                    &mut chunk.reported_sumwt,
26493                    &mut chunk.gridded_samples,
26494                    &mut chunk.max_support,
26495                    &mut chunk.tap_visits,
26496                )?;
26497            }
26498        }
26499        chunk.prepare_elapsed = prepare_started.elapsed();
26500        return Ok(chunk);
26501    }
26502
26503    let chunk_len = input_sample_count.div_ceil(thread_count);
26504    let mut local_results = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
26505    thread::scope(|scope| {
26506        let mut handles = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
26507        for chunk_index in 0..thread_count {
26508            let sample_start = chunk_index * chunk_len;
26509            let sample_end = ((chunk_index + 1) * chunk_len).min(input_sample_count);
26510            if sample_start >= sample_end {
26511                continue;
26512            }
26513            handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
26514                let worker_started = Instant::now();
26515                let mut samples =
26516                    Vec::<WProjectMetalSample>::with_capacity(sample_end - sample_start);
26517                let mut skipped_samples = 0usize;
26518                let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
26519                let mut reported_sumwt = 0.0f64;
26520                let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
26521                let mut max_support = 0u16;
26522                let mut tap_visits = 0usize;
26523                let mut global_sample_offset = 0usize;
26524                for (batch_index, batch) in batches.iter().enumerate() {
26525                    let batch_start = global_sample_offset;
26526                    let batch_end = batch_start + batch.len();
26527                    global_sample_offset = batch_end;
26528                    if batch_end <= sample_start {
26529                        continue;
26530                    }
26531                    if batch_start >= sample_end {
26532                        break;
26533                    }
26534                    let local_start = sample_start.saturating_sub(batch_start);
26535                    let local_end = (sample_end - batch_start).min(batch.len());
26536                    for sample_index in local_start..local_end {
26537                        accumulate_w_project_metal_prepared_sample(
26538                            projector,
26539                            batch,
26540                            batch_index,
26541                            sample_index,
26542                            &mut samples,
26543                            &mut skipped_samples,
26544                            &mut normalization_sumwt,
26545                            &mut reported_sumwt,
26546                            &mut gridded_samples,
26547                            &mut max_support,
26548                            &mut tap_visits,
26549                        )?;
26550                    }
26551                }
26552                Ok::<_, ImagingError>(WProjectMetalPreparedLocal {
26553                    sample_start,
26554                    samples,
26555                    skipped_samples,
26556                    normalization_sumwt,
26557                    reported_sumwt,
26558                    gridded_samples,
26559                    max_support,
26560                    tap_visits,
26561                    worker_elapsed: worker_started.elapsed(),
26562                })
26563            }));
26564        }
26565        for handle in handles {
26566            local_results.push(handle.join().map_err(|_| {
26567                ImagingError::Unsupported(
26568                    "wproject Metal streaming sample planning worker panicked".to_string(),
26569                )
26570            })??);
26571        }
26572        Ok::<(), ImagingError>(())
26573    })?;
26574    local_results.sort_by_key(|local| local.sample_start);
26575
26576    let local_sample_count = local_results
26577        .iter()
26578        .map(|local| local.samples.len())
26579        .sum::<usize>();
26580    let mut chunk = WProjectMetalStreamingChunk {
26581        samples: Vec::with_capacity(local_sample_count),
26582        ..WProjectMetalStreamingChunk::default()
26583    };
26584    for mut local in local_results {
26585        chunk.skipped_samples += local.skipped_samples;
26586        chunk.normalization_sumwt += local.normalization_sumwt;
26587        chunk.reported_sumwt += local.reported_sumwt;
26588        chunk.gridded_samples += local.gridded_samples;
26589        chunk.max_support = chunk.max_support.max(local.max_support);
26590        chunk.tap_visits += local.tap_visits;
26591        if local.samples.is_empty() {
26592            continue;
26593        }
26594        if let Some(last) = chunk.samples.last_mut()
26595            && last.merge_weighted_visibility(local.samples[0])
26596        {
26597            let axis = usize::from(local.samples[0].support()) * 2 + 1;
26598            chunk.tap_visits = chunk.tap_visits.saturating_sub(axis * axis);
26599            chunk.boundary_merges += 1;
26600            chunk.samples.extend_from_slice(&local.samples[1..]);
26601            continue;
26602        }
26603        chunk.samples.append(&mut local.samples);
26604    }
26605    chunk.prepare_elapsed = prepare_started.elapsed();
26606    Ok(chunk)
26607}
26608
26609fn prepare_w_project_data_serial(
26610    w_project_planes: Option<usize>,
26611    max_abs_w_lambda: f64,
26612    projector: WProjector,
26613    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
26614    raw_sample_count: usize,
26615) -> Result<WProjectPreparedData, ImagingError> {
26616    let mut samples = Vec::with_capacity(raw_sample_count);
26617    let mut skipped_samples = Vec::<WProjectSkippedSample>::new();
26618    let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
26619    let mut reported_sumwt = 0.0f64;
26620    let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
26621
26622    for (batch_index, batch) in batches.iter().enumerate() {
26623        for sample_index in 0..batch.len() {
26624            accumulate_w_project_prepared_sample(
26625                &projector,
26626                batch,
26627                batch_index,
26628                sample_index,
26629                &mut samples,
26630                &mut skipped_samples,
26631                &mut normalization_sumwt,
26632                &mut reported_sumwt,
26633                &mut gridded_samples,
26634            );
26635        }
26636    }
26637
26638    finish_w_project_prepared_data(
26639        w_project_planes,
26640        max_abs_w_lambda,
26641        projector,
26642        samples,
26643        skipped_samples,
26644        normalization_sumwt,
26645        reported_sumwt,
26646        gridded_samples,
26647    )
26648}
26649
26650fn prepare_w_project_data_parallel(
26651    w_project_planes: Option<usize>,
26652    max_abs_w_lambda: f64,
26653    projector: WProjector,
26654    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
26655    raw_sample_count: usize,
26656    input_sample_count: usize,
26657    thread_count: usize,
26658) -> Result<WProjectPreparedData, ImagingError> {
26659    let chunk_len = input_sample_count.div_ceil(thread_count);
26660    let mut local_results = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
26661    thread::scope(|scope| {
26662        let mut handles = Vec::with_capacity(thread_count);
26663        for chunk_index in 0..thread_count {
26664            let sample_start = chunk_index * chunk_len;
26665            let sample_end = ((chunk_index + 1) * chunk_len).min(input_sample_count);
26666            if sample_start >= sample_end {
26667                continue;
26668            }
26669            let projector = &projector;
26670            handles.push(scope.spawn(move || {
26671                let mut samples = Vec::<WProjectPreparedSample>::new();
26672                let mut skipped_samples = Vec::<WProjectSkippedSample>::new();
26673                let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
26674                let mut reported_sumwt = 0.0f64;
26675                let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
26676                let mut global_sample_offset = 0usize;
26677                for (batch_index, batch) in batches.iter().enumerate() {
26678                    let batch_start = global_sample_offset;
26679                    let batch_end = batch_start + batch.len();
26680                    global_sample_offset = batch_end;
26681                    if batch_end <= sample_start {
26682                        continue;
26683                    }
26684                    if batch_start >= sample_end {
26685                        break;
26686                    }
26687                    let local_start = sample_start.saturating_sub(batch_start);
26688                    let local_end = (sample_end - batch_start).min(batch.len());
26689                    for sample_index in local_start..local_end {
26690                        accumulate_w_project_prepared_sample(
26691                            projector,
26692                            batch,
26693                            batch_index,
26694                            sample_index,
26695                            &mut samples,
26696                            &mut skipped_samples,
26697                            &mut normalization_sumwt,
26698                            &mut reported_sumwt,
26699                            &mut gridded_samples,
26700                        );
26701                    }
26702                }
26703                (
26704                    sample_start,
26705                    samples,
26706                    skipped_samples,
26707                    normalization_sumwt,
26708                    reported_sumwt,
26709                    gridded_samples,
26710                )
26711            }));
26712        }
26713        for handle in handles {
26714            local_results.push(handle.join().map_err(|_| {
26715                ImagingError::Unsupported("wproject sample planning worker panicked".to_string())
26716            })?);
26717        }
26718        Ok::<(), ImagingError>(())
26719    })?;
26720    local_results.sort_by_key(|(batch_offset, _, _, _, _, _)| *batch_offset);
26721
26722    let mut samples = Vec::with_capacity(raw_sample_count);
26723    let mut skipped_samples = Vec::<WProjectSkippedSample>::new();
26724    let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
26725    let mut reported_sumwt = 0.0f64;
26726    let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
26727    for (
26728        _,
26729        mut local_samples,
26730        mut local_skipped,
26731        local_normalization,
26732        local_reported,
26733        local_gridded,
26734    ) in local_results
26735    {
26736        samples.append(&mut local_samples);
26737        skipped_samples.append(&mut local_skipped);
26738        normalization_sumwt += local_normalization;
26739        reported_sumwt += local_reported;
26740        gridded_samples += local_gridded;
26741    }
26742
26743    finish_w_project_prepared_data(
26744        w_project_planes,
26745        max_abs_w_lambda,
26746        projector,
26747        samples,
26748        skipped_samples,
26749        normalization_sumwt,
26750        reported_sumwt,
26751        gridded_samples,
26752    )
26753}
26754
26755#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
26756fn accumulate_w_project_prepared_sample(
26757    projector: &WProjector,
26758    batch: &VisibilityBatch,
26759    batch_index: usize,
26760    sample_index: usize,
26761    samples: &mut Vec<WProjectPreparedSample>,
26762    skipped_samples: &mut Vec<WProjectSkippedSample>,
26763    normalization_sumwt: &mut f64,
26764    reported_sumwt: &mut f64,
26765    gridded_samples: &mut usize,
26766) {
26767    let sample = RawWProjectSample {
26768        batch_index,
26769        sample_index,
26770        u_lambda: batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
26771        v_lambda: batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
26772        w_lambda: batch.w_lambda[sample_index],
26773        weight: batch.weight[sample_index],
26774        visibility: batch.visibility[sample_index],
26775        sumwt_factor: batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index],
26776    };
26777    if !batch.gridable[sample_index] {
26778        skipped_samples.push(w_project_skipped_sample(
26779            sample,
26780            WProjectSkipReason::NotGridable,
26781        ));
26782        return;
26783    }
26784    if !raw_w_project_sample_is_valid(sample) {
26785        skipped_samples.push(w_project_skipped_sample(
26786            sample,
26787            WProjectSkipReason::InvalidInput,
26788        ));
26789        return;
26790    }
26791    let Some(positive_plan) =
26792        projector.plan_sample(sample.u_lambda, sample.v_lambda, sample.w_lambda)
26793    else {
26794        skipped_samples.push(w_project_skipped_sample(
26795            sample,
26796            WProjectSkipReason::OutsideGrid,
26797        ));
26798        return;
26799    };
26800    *normalization_sumwt += 2.0 * f64::from(sample.weight) * f64::from(positive_plan.normalization);
26801    *reported_sumwt += f64::from(sample.weight) * f64::from(sample.sumwt_factor);
26802    *gridded_samples += 1;
26803    samples.push(WProjectPreparedSample {
26804        batch_index: sample.batch_index,
26805        sample_index: sample.sample_index,
26806        u_lambda: sample.u_lambda,
26807        v_lambda: sample.v_lambda,
26808        w_lambda: sample.w_lambda,
26809        sumwt_factor: sample.sumwt_factor,
26810        positive_plan,
26811        weight: sample.weight,
26812        visibility: sample.visibility,
26813    });
26814}
26815
26816#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
26817fn accumulate_w_project_metal_prepared_sample(
26818    projector: &WProjector,
26819    batch: &VisibilityBatch,
26820    batch_index: usize,
26821    sample_index: usize,
26822    samples: &mut Vec<WProjectMetalSample>,
26823    skipped_samples: &mut usize,
26824    normalization_sumwt: &mut f64,
26825    reported_sumwt: &mut f64,
26826    gridded_samples: &mut usize,
26827    max_support: &mut u16,
26828    tap_visits: &mut usize,
26829) -> Result<(), ImagingError> {
26830    let sample = RawWProjectSample {
26831        batch_index,
26832        sample_index,
26833        u_lambda: batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
26834        v_lambda: batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
26835        w_lambda: batch.w_lambda[sample_index],
26836        weight: batch.weight[sample_index],
26837        visibility: batch.visibility[sample_index],
26838        sumwt_factor: batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index],
26839    };
26840    if !batch.gridable[sample_index] || !raw_w_project_sample_is_valid(sample) {
26841        *skipped_samples += 1;
26842        return Ok(());
26843    }
26844    let Some(positive_plan) =
26845        projector.plan_sample(sample.u_lambda, sample.v_lambda, sample.w_lambda)
26846    else {
26847        *skipped_samples += 1;
26848        return Ok(());
26849    };
26850    *normalization_sumwt += 2.0 * f64::from(sample.weight) * f64::from(positive_plan.normalization);
26851    *reported_sumwt += f64::from(sample.weight) * f64::from(sample.sumwt_factor);
26852    *gridded_samples += 1;
26853    let metal_sample = w_project_metal_sample_from_plan(
26854        projector,
26855        &positive_plan,
26856        sample.weight,
26857        sample.visibility,
26858    )?;
26859    *max_support = (*max_support).max(metal_sample.support());
26860    if push_w_project_metal_sample(samples, metal_sample) {
26861        let axis = usize::from(metal_sample.support()) * 2 + 1;
26862        *tap_visits += axis * axis;
26863    }
26864    Ok(())
26865}
26866
26867#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
26868fn finish_w_project_prepared_data(
26869    w_project_planes: Option<usize>,
26870    max_abs_w_lambda: f64,
26871    projector: WProjector,
26872    samples: Vec<WProjectPreparedSample>,
26873    mut skipped_samples: Vec<WProjectSkippedSample>,
26874    normalization_sumwt: f64,
26875    reported_sumwt: f64,
26876    gridded_samples: usize,
26877) -> Result<WProjectPreparedData, ImagingError> {
26878    if samples.is_empty() || normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 || reported_sumwt <= 0.0 {
26879        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
26880    }
26881
26882    skipped_samples.sort_by_key(|sample| (sample.batch_index, sample.sample_index));
26883    Ok(WProjectPreparedData {
26884        requested_plane_count: w_project_planes,
26885        max_abs_w_lambda,
26886        projector,
26887        samples,
26888        skipped_samples,
26889        normalization_sumwt: normalization_sumwt as f32,
26890        reported_sumwt: reported_sumwt as f32,
26891        gridded_samples,
26892    })
26893}
26894
26895#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
26896fn finish_w_project_metal_prepared_data(
26897    w_project_planes: Option<usize>,
26898    max_abs_w_lambda: f64,
26899    projector: WProjector,
26900    samples: Vec<WProjectMetalSample>,
26901    skipped_samples: usize,
26902    normalization_sumwt: f64,
26903    reported_sumwt: f64,
26904    gridded_samples: usize,
26905    max_support: u16,
26906    tap_visits: usize,
26907) -> Result<WProjectMetalPreparedData, ImagingError> {
26908    if samples.is_empty() || normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 || reported_sumwt <= 0.0 {
26909        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
26910    }
26911
26912    Ok(WProjectMetalPreparedData {
26913        requested_plane_count: w_project_planes,
26914        max_abs_w_lambda,
26915        projector,
26916        samples,
26917        skipped_samples,
26918        max_support,
26919        tap_visits,
26920        normalization_sumwt: normalization_sumwt as f32,
26921        reported_sumwt: reported_sumwt as f32,
26922        gridded_samples,
26923    })
26924}
26925
26926fn w_project_raw_sample_summary(batches: &[VisibilityBatch]) -> (usize, f64) {
26927    let mut raw_sample_count = 0usize;
26928    let mut max_abs_w_lambda = 0.0f64;
26929    for batch in batches {
26930        for sample_index in 0..batch.len() {
26931            let sample = RawWProjectSample {
26932                batch_index: 0,
26933                sample_index,
26934                u_lambda: batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
26935                v_lambda: batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
26936                w_lambda: batch.w_lambda[sample_index],
26937                weight: batch.weight[sample_index],
26938                visibility: batch.visibility[sample_index],
26939                sumwt_factor: batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index],
26940            };
26941            if batch.gridable[sample_index] && raw_w_project_sample_is_valid(sample) {
26942                raw_sample_count += 1;
26943                max_abs_w_lambda = max_abs_w_lambda.max(sample.w_lambda.abs());
26944            }
26945        }
26946    }
26947    (raw_sample_count, max_abs_w_lambda)
26948}
26949
26950fn raw_w_project_sample_is_valid(sample: RawWProjectSample) -> bool {
26951    sample.weight.is_finite()
26952        && sample.weight > 0.0
26953        && sample.sumwt_factor.is_finite()
26954        && sample.sumwt_factor > 0.0
26955        && sample.visibility.re.is_finite()
26956        && sample.visibility.im.is_finite()
26957        && sample.u_lambda.is_finite()
26958        && sample.v_lambda.is_finite()
26959        && sample.w_lambda.is_finite()
26960}
26961
26962fn w_project_skipped_sample(
26963    sample: RawWProjectSample,
26964    reason: WProjectSkipReason,
26965) -> WProjectSkippedSample {
26966    WProjectSkippedSample {
26967        batch_index: sample.batch_index,
26968        sample_index: sample.sample_index,
26969        u_lambda: sample.u_lambda,
26970        v_lambda: sample.v_lambda,
26971        w_lambda: sample.w_lambda,
26972        weight: sample.weight,
26973        sumwt_factor: sample.sumwt_factor,
26974        reason,
26975    }
26976}
26977
26978#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
26979struct DirectPixelCoordinate {
26980    l: f64,
26981    m: f64,
26982    n_minus_one: f64,
26983}
26984
26985#[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
26986struct DirectComponent {
26987    value: f32,
26988    l: f64,
26989    m: f64,
26990    n_minus_one: f64,
26991}
26992
26993fn compute_psf_direct(
26994    geometry: ImageGeometry,
26995    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
26996    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
26997) -> Result<PsfState, ImagingError> {
26998    let [nx, ny] = geometry.image_shape;
26999    let pixels = build_direct_pixel_coordinates(geometry);
27000    let mut psf = Array2::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny));
27001    let mut normalization_sumwt = 0.0f64;
27002    let mut reported_sumwt = 0.0f64;
27003    let mut gridded_samples = 0usize;
27004    let mut skipped_samples = 0usize;
27005
27006    let accumulate_started = Instant::now();
27007    for batch in batches {
27008        for index in 0..batch.len() {
27009            if !batch.gridable[index] {
27010                skipped_samples += 1;
27011                continue;
27012            }
27013            let weight = batch.weight[index];
27014            let sumwt_factor = batch.sumwt_factor[index];
27015            if !(weight.is_finite()
27016                && weight > 0.0
27017                && sumwt_factor.is_finite()
27018                && sumwt_factor > 0.0)
27019            {
27020                skipped_samples += 1;
27021                continue;
27022            }
27023            normalization_sumwt += 2.0 * f64::from(weight);
27024            reported_sumwt += f64::from(weight) * f64::from(sumwt_factor);
27025            gridded_samples += 1;
27026            accumulate_direct_adjoint(
27027                &mut psf,
27028                &pixels,
27029                ny,
27030                batch.u_lambda[index],
27031                batch.v_lambda[index],
27032                batch.w_lambda[index],
27033                Complex32::new(weight, 0.0),
27034            );
27035        }
27036    }
27037    stage_timings.psf_grid += accumulate_started.elapsed();
27038
27039    if normalization_sumwt <= 0.0 || reported_sumwt <= 0.0 {
27040        return Err(ImagingError::NoUsableSamples);
27041    }
27042
27043    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
27044    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / normalization_sumwt as f32);
27045    let psf_peak = peak_abs_value(&psf);
27046    if !(psf_peak.is_finite() && psf_peak > 0.0) {
27047        return Err(ImagingError::Normalization(
27048            "PSF peak is non-finite or zero".to_string(),
27049        ));
27050    }
27051    psf.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_peak);
27052    stage_timings.psf_normalize += normalize_started.elapsed();
27053
27054    Ok(PsfState {
27055        psf,
27056        normalization_sumwt: normalization_sumwt as f32,
27057        reported_sumwt: reported_sumwt as f32,
27058        psf_peak,
27059        gridded_samples,
27060        skipped_samples,
27061    })
27062}
27063
27064fn compute_residual_direct(
27065    geometry: ImageGeometry,
27066    batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
27067    model: &Array2<f32>,
27068    psf_state: &PsfState,
27069    stage_timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings,
27070) -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
27071    let [nx, ny] = geometry.image_shape;
27072    let pixels = build_direct_pixel_coordinates(geometry);
27073    let components = build_direct_components(model, &pixels, ny);
27074    let mut image = Array2::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny));
27075
27076    let accumulate_started = Instant::now();
27077    for batch in batches {
27078        for index in 0..batch.len() {
27079            if !batch.gridable[index] {
27080                continue;
27081            }
27082            let weight = batch.weight[index];
27083            let sample = batch.visibility[index];
27084            if !(weight.is_finite()
27085                && weight > 0.0
27086                && sample.re.is_finite()
27087                && sample.im.is_finite())
27088            {
27089                continue;
27090            }
27091            let predicted = if components.is_empty() {
27092                Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0)
27093            } else {
27094                direct_predict_visibility(
27095                    &components,
27096                    batch.u_lambda[index],
27097                    batch.v_lambda[index],
27098                    batch.w_lambda[index],
27099                )
27100            };
27101            let residual = (sample - predicted) * weight;
27102            accumulate_direct_adjoint(
27103                &mut image,
27104                &pixels,
27105                ny,
27106                batch.u_lambda[index],
27107                batch.v_lambda[index],
27108                batch.w_lambda[index],
27109                residual,
27110            );
27111        }
27112    }
27113    stage_timings.residual_degrid_grid += accumulate_started.elapsed();
27114
27115    let normalize_started = Instant::now();
27116    image.mapv_inplace(|value| value / psf_state.normalization_sumwt / psf_state.psf_peak);
27117    stage_timings.residual_normalize += normalize_started.elapsed();
27118    Ok(image)
27119}
27120
27121fn build_direct_pixel_coordinates(geometry: ImageGeometry) -> Vec<DirectPixelCoordinate> {
27122    let [nx, ny] = geometry.image_shape;
27123    let center_x = nx as f64 / 2.0;
27124    let center_y = ny as f64 / 2.0;
27125    let mut pixels = Vec::with_capacity(nx * ny);
27126    for x in 0..nx {
27127        for y in 0..ny {
27128            let l = (x as f64 - center_x) * geometry.cell_size_rad[0];
27129            // Match CASA GridFT's effective Dec-axis convention. The C++
27130            // gridder negates UVW's first two axes before locating samples on
27131            // the padded grid, which maps positive m to lower array indices.
27132            let m = (center_y - y as f64) * geometry.cell_size_rad[1];
27133            let radius_sq = l * l + m * m;
27134            let n_minus_one = if radius_sq < 1.0 {
27135                (1.0 - radius_sq).sqrt() - 1.0
27136            } else {
27137                -1.0
27138            };
27139            pixels.push(DirectPixelCoordinate { l, m, n_minus_one });
27140        }
27141    }
27142    pixels
27143}
27144
27145fn build_direct_components(
27146    model: &Array2<f32>,
27147    pixels: &[DirectPixelCoordinate],
27148    ny: usize,
27149) -> Vec<DirectComponent> {
27150    model
27151        .indexed_iter()
27152        .filter_map(|((x, y), value)| {
27153            if value.abs() <= 0.0 {
27154                return None;
27155            }
27156            let pixel = pixels[x * ny + y];
27157            Some(DirectComponent {
27158                value: *value,
27159                l: pixel.l,
27160                m: pixel.m,
27161                n_minus_one: pixel.n_minus_one,
27162            })
27163        })
27164        .collect()
27165}
27166
27167fn direct_predict_visibility(
27168    components: &[DirectComponent],
27169    u_lambda: f64,
27170    v_lambda: f64,
27171    w_lambda: f64,
27172) -> Complex32 {
27173    let mut predicted = Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0);
27174    for component in components {
27175        let phase = std::f64::consts::TAU
27176            * (u_lambda * component.l + v_lambda * component.m + w_lambda * component.n_minus_one);
27177        predicted.re += component.value * phase.cos() as f32;
27178        predicted.im -= component.value * phase.sin() as f32;
27179    }
27180    predicted
27181}
27182
27183fn accumulate_direct_adjoint(
27184    image: &mut Array2<f32>,
27185    pixels: &[DirectPixelCoordinate],
27186    ny: usize,
27187    u_lambda: f64,
27188    v_lambda: f64,
27189    w_lambda: f64,
27190    value: Complex32,
27191) {
27192    for (index, pixel) in pixels.iter().enumerate() {
27193        let phase = std::f64::consts::TAU
27194            * (u_lambda * pixel.l + v_lambda * pixel.m + w_lambda * pixel.n_minus_one);
27195        let contribution = 2.0 * (value.re * phase.cos() as f32 - value.im * phase.sin() as f32);
27196        image[(index / ny, index % ny)] += contribution;
27197    }
27198}
27199
27200fn peak_abs_value_masked(image: &Array2<f32>, mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>) -> f32 {
27201    peak_location_masked(image, mask)
27202        .map(|(_, value)| value.abs())
27203        .unwrap_or(0.0)
27204}
27205
27206fn peak_location_masked(
27207    image: &Array2<f32>,
27208    mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
27209) -> Option<((usize, usize), f32)> {
27210    peak_location_masked_with_relative_tolerance(image, mask, 0.0)
27211}
27212
27213fn peak_location_masked_in_window(
27214    image: &Array2<f32>,
27215    mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
27216    window: ImageWindow,
27217) -> Option<((usize, usize), f32)> {
27218    let (nx, ny) = image.dim();
27219    if nx == 0 || ny == 0 {
27220        return None;
27221    }
27222    let x0 = window.x0.min(nx - 1);
27223    let y0 = window.y0.min(ny - 1);
27224    let x1 = window.x1.min(nx - 1);
27225    let y1 = window.y1.min(ny - 1);
27226    if x0 > x1 || y0 > y1 {
27227        return None;
27228    }
27229
27230    peak_location_masked_in_bounds_zero_tolerance(image, mask, x0, y0, x1, y1)
27231}
27232
27233fn hclean_peak_location_masked(
27234    image: &Array2<f32>,
27235    mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
27236) -> Option<((usize, usize), f32)> {
27237    peak_location_masked_with_relative_tolerance(image, mask, 0.0)
27238}
27239
27240/// Return the finite masked peak location using a relative tie tolerance.
27241pub fn clean_peak_location_masked_with_relative_tolerance(
27242    image: &Array2<f32>,
27243    mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
27244    relative_tolerance: f32,
27245) -> Option<((usize, usize), f32)> {
27246    finite_peak_location_masked_with_relative_tolerance(image, mask, relative_tolerance)
27247}
27248
27249fn finite_peak_location_masked_with_relative_tolerance(
27250    image: &Array2<f32>,
27251    mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
27252    relative_tolerance: f32,
27253) -> Option<((usize, usize), f32)> {
27254    let (nx, ny) = image.dim();
27255    let mut best = None;
27256    for y in 0..ny {
27257        for x in 0..nx {
27258            if mask.is_some_and(|current| !current[(x, y)]) {
27259                continue;
27260            }
27261            let value = image[(x, y)];
27262            if !value.is_finite() {
27263                continue;
27264            }
27265            match best {
27266                None => best = Some(((x, y), value)),
27267                Some((_, best_value))
27268                    if value.abs() > best_value.abs() * (1.0 + relative_tolerance) =>
27269                {
27270                    best = Some(((x, y), value));
27271                }
27272                _ => {}
27273            }
27274        }
27275    }
27276    best
27277}
27278
27279fn peak_location_masked_with_relative_tolerance(
27280    image: &Array2<f32>,
27281    mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
27282    relative_tolerance: f32,
27283) -> Option<((usize, usize), f32)> {
27284    let (nx, ny) = image.dim();
27285    if relative_tolerance == 0.0 {
27286        if nx == 0 || ny == 0 {
27287            return None;
27288        }
27289        return peak_location_masked_in_bounds_zero_tolerance(image, mask, 0, 0, nx - 1, ny - 1);
27290    }
27291
27292    let mut best = None;
27293    // Match casacore's `hclean` search order: y-major, with an optional
27294    // tolerance to keep near-tied peaks stable against gridding roundoff.
27295    for y in 0..ny {
27296        for x in 0..nx {
27297            if mask.is_some_and(|current| !current[(x, y)]) {
27298                continue;
27299            }
27300            let value = image[(x, y)];
27301            match best {
27302                None => best = Some(((x, y), value)),
27303                Some((_, best_value))
27304                    if value.abs() > best_value.abs() * (1.0 + relative_tolerance) =>
27305                {
27306                    best = Some(((x, y), value));
27307                }
27308                _ => {}
27309            }
27310        }
27311    }
27312    best
27313}
27314
27315fn peak_location_masked_in_bounds_zero_tolerance(
27316    image: &Array2<f32>,
27317    mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
27318    x0: usize,
27319    y0: usize,
27320    x1: usize,
27321    y1: usize,
27322) -> Option<((usize, usize), f32)> {
27323    let (nx, _) = image.dim();
27324    let mut best = None::<((usize, usize), f32, usize)>;
27325    match mask {
27326        Some(mask) => {
27327            for x in x0..=x1 {
27328                for y in y0..=y1 {
27329                    if !mask[(x, y)] {
27330                        continue;
27331                    }
27332                    let value = image[(x, y)];
27333                    let order_key = y.saturating_mul(nx).saturating_add(x);
27334                    match best {
27335                        None => best = Some(((x, y), value, order_key)),
27336                        Some((_, best_value, best_key))
27337                            if value.abs() > best_value.abs()
27338                                || (value.abs() == best_value.abs() && order_key < best_key) =>
27339                        {
27340                            best = Some(((x, y), value, order_key));
27341                        }
27342                        _ => {}
27343                    }
27344                }
27345            }
27346        }
27347        None => {
27348            for x in x0..=x1 {
27349                for y in y0..=y1 {
27350                    let value = image[(x, y)];
27351                    let order_key = y.saturating_mul(nx).saturating_add(x);
27352                    match best {
27353                        None => best = Some(((x, y), value, order_key)),
27354                        Some((_, best_value, best_key))
27355                            if value.abs() > best_value.abs()
27356                                || (value.abs() == best_value.abs() && order_key < best_key) =>
27357                        {
27358                            best = Some(((x, y), value, order_key));
27359                        }
27360                        _ => {}
27361                    }
27362                }
27363            }
27364        }
27365    }
27366    best.map(|(position, value, _)| (position, value))
27367}
27368
27369/// Compute the Cotton-Schwab minor-cycle threshold from the current peak and
27370/// PSF sidelobe estimate.
27371pub fn clean_cycle_threshold(
27372    peak_residual_jy_per_beam: f32,
27373    max_psf_sidelobe_level: f32,
27374    clean: CleanConfig,
27375) -> f32 {
27376    let psf_fraction = (max_psf_sidelobe_level * clean.cyclefactor)
27377        .clamp(clean.min_psf_fraction, clean.max_psf_fraction);
27378    (peak_residual_jy_per_beam * psf_fraction).max(clean.threshold_jy_per_beam)
27379}
27380
27381fn robust_rms_jy_per_beam(residual: &Array2<f32>, clean_mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>) -> f32 {
27382    let full_mask = clean_mask
27383        .map(|mask| mask.iter().all(|value| *value))
27384        .unwrap_or(true);
27385    let mut values = residual_noise_values(residual, clean_mask, full_mask);
27386    if values.is_empty() {
27387        return 0.0;
27388    }
27389    if full_mask {
27390        apply_chauvenet_clipping(&mut values, -1.0, 5);
27391    }
27392    if values.is_empty() {
27393        return 0.0;
27394    }
27395    let clipped = ndarray::Array1::from_vec(values).into_dyn();
27396    (array_madfm(&clipped) as f32) * 1.4826
27397}
27398
27399fn nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam(
27400    residual: &Array2<f32>,
27401    clean_mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
27402    clean: CleanConfig,
27403) -> f32 {
27404    if clean.nsigma > 0.0 {
27405        clean.nsigma * robust_rms_jy_per_beam(residual, clean_mask)
27406    } else {
27407        0.0
27408    }
27409}
27410
27411fn residual_noise_values(
27412    residual: &Array2<f32>,
27413    clean_mask: Option<&Array2<bool>>,
27414    full_mask: bool,
27415) -> Vec<f32> {
27416    residual
27417        .iter()
27418        .zip(
27419            clean_mask
27420                .into_iter()
27421                .flat_map(|mask| mask.iter())
27422                .chain(std::iter::repeat(&false)),
27423        )
27424        .filter_map(|(value, masked)| {
27425            if !value.is_finite() {
27426                return None;
27427            }
27428            if !full_mask && *masked {
27429                None
27430            } else {
27431                Some(*value)
27432            }
27433        })
27434        .collect()
27435}
27436
27437fn apply_chauvenet_clipping(values: &mut Vec<f32>, zscore: f64, max_iterations: i32) {
27438    if values.is_empty() {
27439        return;
27440    }
27441    let max_i = if max_iterations >= 0 {
27442        max_iterations as usize
27443    } else {
27444        1000usize
27445    };
27446    let mut prev_npts = 0usize;
27447    let mut iteration = 0usize;
27448    while iteration <= max_i && !values.is_empty() {
27449        let current_npts = values.len();
27450        if iteration > 0 && current_npts == prev_npts {
27451            break;
27452        }
27453        let (mean, stddev) = mean_stddev(values);
27454        if !mean.is_finite() || !stddev.is_finite() || stddev <= 0.0 {
27455            break;
27456        }
27457        let z = if zscore >= 0.0 {
27458            zscore
27459        } else {
27460            chauvenet_max_zscore(current_npts as u64)
27461        };
27462        let low = mean - z * stddev;
27463        let high = mean + z * stddev;
27464        values.retain(|value| {
27465            let value = *value as f64;
27466            value >= low && value <= high
27467        });
27468        prev_npts = current_npts;
27469        iteration += 1;
27470    }
27471}
27472
27473fn mean_stddev(values: &[f32]) -> (f64, f64) {
27474    let n = values.len() as f64;
27475    let mean = values.iter().map(|value| *value as f64).sum::<f64>() / n;
27476    let sumsq = values
27477        .iter()
27478        .map(|value| {
27479            let diff = *value as f64 - mean;
27480            diff * diff
27481        })
27482        .sum::<f64>();
27483    let variance = if values.len() > 1 {
27484        sumsq / (n - 1.0)
27485    } else {
27486        0.0
27487    };
27488    (mean, variance.sqrt())
27489}
27490
27491fn chauvenet_max_zscore(npts: u64) -> f64 {
27492    const NPTS_TO_MAX_ZSCORE: &[(u64, f64)] = &[
27493        (0, 0.5),
27494        (1, 1.0),
27495        (3, 1.5),
27496        (10, 2.0),
27497        (40, 2.5),
27498        (185, 3.0),
27499        (1074, 3.5),
27500        (7893, 4.0),
27501        (73579, 4.5),
27502        (872138, 5.0),
27503        (13165126, 5.5),
27504        (253398672, 6.0),
27505        (6225098696, 6.5),
27506        (195341107722, 7.0),
27507    ];
27508    if let Some((_, zscore)) = NPTS_TO_MAX_ZSCORE.iter().find(|(count, _)| *count == npts) {
27509        return *zscore;
27510    }
27511    let mut low_index = 0usize;
27512    let mut high_index = 1usize;
27513    if npts > NPTS_TO_MAX_ZSCORE[NPTS_TO_MAX_ZSCORE.len() - 1].0 {
27514        let mut z = NPTS_TO_MAX_ZSCORE[NPTS_TO_MAX_ZSCORE.len() - 1].1 + 0.5;
27515        loop {
27516            let npts_min = chauvenet_zscore_to_npts(z);
27517            if npts_min >= npts {
27518                low_index = NPTS_TO_MAX_ZSCORE.len() - 2;
27519                high_index = NPTS_TO_MAX_ZSCORE.len() - 1;
27520                break;
27521            }
27522            z += 0.5;
27523        }
27524    } else {
27525        while high_index < NPTS_TO_MAX_ZSCORE.len() && NPTS_TO_MAX_ZSCORE[high_index].0 < npts {
27526            low_index += 1;
27527            high_index += 1;
27528        }
27529    }
27530    let (mut low_z, mut high_z) = (
27531        NPTS_TO_MAX_ZSCORE[low_index].1,
27532        NPTS_TO_MAX_ZSCORE[high_index].1,
27533    );
27534    let mut z = (low_z + high_z) / 2.0;
27535    loop {
27536        let npts_min = chauvenet_zscore_to_npts(z);
27537        if npts_min == npts || (high_z - low_z).abs() <= 1e-12 {
27538            return z;
27539        }
27540        if npts_min > npts {
27541            high_z = z;
27542        } else {
27543            low_z = z;
27544        }
27545        z = (low_z + high_z) / 2.0;
27546    }
27547}
27548
27549fn chauvenet_zscore_to_npts(zscore: f64) -> u64 {
27550    (0.5 / erfc(zscore / std::f64::consts::SQRT_2)) as u64
27551}
27552
27553fn threshold_reached_with_tolerance(peak_abs_jy_per_beam: f32, threshold_jy_per_beam: f32) -> bool {
27554    if threshold_jy_per_beam <= 0.0 {
27555        return peak_abs_jy_per_beam <= threshold_jy_per_beam;
27556    }
27557    let tolerance_jy_per_beam = (0.01 * threshold_jy_per_beam).max(2.0e-8);
27558    peak_abs_jy_per_beam <= threshold_jy_per_beam
27559        || (peak_abs_jy_per_beam - threshold_jy_per_beam).abs() <= tolerance_jy_per_beam
27560}
27561
27562fn tolerant_clean_stop_reason(
27563    peak_abs_jy_per_beam: f32,
27564    threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
27565    nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
27566) -> Option<CleanStopReason> {
27567    if threshold_reached_with_tolerance(peak_abs_jy_per_beam, threshold_jy_per_beam) {
27568        Some(CleanStopReason::GlobalThresholdReached)
27569    } else if nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam > threshold_jy_per_beam
27570        && threshold_reached_with_tolerance(peak_abs_jy_per_beam, nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam)
27571    {
27572        Some(CleanStopReason::NsigmaThresholdReached)
27573    } else {
27574        None
27575    }
27576}
27577
27578fn minor_cycle_stop_reason(
27579    peak_abs_jy_per_beam: f32,
27580    threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
27581    cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
27582    nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam: f32,
27583) -> Option<CleanStopReason> {
27584    let threshold_floor_active = threshold_jy_per_beam > 0.0
27585        && (0.01 * threshold_jy_per_beam) < 2.0e-8
27586        && cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam <= threshold_jy_per_beam;
27587    if peak_abs_jy_per_beam < threshold_jy_per_beam
27588        || (threshold_floor_active
27589            && threshold_reached_with_tolerance(peak_abs_jy_per_beam, threshold_jy_per_beam))
27590    {
27591        Some(CleanStopReason::GlobalThresholdReached)
27592    } else if nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam > threshold_jy_per_beam
27593        && peak_abs_jy_per_beam < nsigma_threshold_jy_per_beam
27594    {
27595        Some(CleanStopReason::NsigmaThresholdReached)
27596    } else if peak_abs_jy_per_beam < cycle_threshold_jy_per_beam {
27597        Some(CleanStopReason::CycleThresholdReached)
27598    } else {
27599        None
27600    }
27601}
27602
27603fn update_divergence_state(
27604    warnings: &mut Vec<String>,
27605    min_residual_peak_jy_per_beam: &mut f32,
27606    current_peak: f32,
27607    divergence_warned: &mut bool,
27608) -> Option<CleanStopReason> {
27609    if current_peak < *min_residual_peak_jy_per_beam {
27610        *min_residual_peak_jy_per_beam = current_peak;
27611        return None;
27612    } else if *min_residual_peak_jy_per_beam > 0.0
27613        && (current_peak - *min_residual_peak_jy_per_beam) / *min_residual_peak_jy_per_beam > 0.1
27614    {
27615        if !*divergence_warned {
27616            warnings.push(format!(
27617                "minor-cycle divergence detected: residual peak {:.6} Jy/beam exceeded prior minimum {:.6} Jy/beam by more than 10%",
27618                current_peak, *min_residual_peak_jy_per_beam
27619            ));
27620            *divergence_warned = true;
27621        }
27622        return Some(CleanStopReason::DivergenceDetected);
27623    }
27624    None
27625}
27626
27627fn subtract_shifted_psf(
27628    residual: &mut Array2<f32>,
27629    psf: &Array2<f32>,
27630    peak_index: (usize, usize),
27631    component: f32,
27632) {
27633    subtract_shifted_kernel(residual, psf, peak_index, component);
27634}
27635
27636fn subtract_shifted_kernel(
27637    image: &mut Array2<f32>,
27638    kernel: &Array2<f32>,
27639    peak_index: (usize, usize),
27640    scale_factor: f32,
27641) {
27642    subtract_shifted_kernel_in_window(
27643        image,
27644        kernel,
27645        peak_index,
27646        scale_factor,
27647        ImageWindow::full(image.dim()),
27648    );
27649}
27650
27651fn subtract_shifted_kernel_in_window(
27652    image: &mut Array2<f32>,
27653    kernel: &Array2<f32>,
27654    peak_index: (usize, usize),
27655    scale_factor: f32,
27656    window: ImageWindow,
27657) {
27658    let kernel_center = (kernel.shape()[0] / 2, kernel.shape()[1] / 2);
27659    let (nx, ny) = image.dim();
27660    if nx == 0 || ny == 0 {
27661        return;
27662    }
27663    let x0 = window.x0.min(nx - 1);
27664    let y0 = window.y0.min(ny - 1);
27665    let x1 = window.x1.min(nx - 1);
27666    let y1 = window.y1.min(ny - 1);
27667    if x0 > x1 || y0 > y1 {
27668        return;
27669    }
27670
27671    let kernel_x_min_image = peak_index.0 as isize - kernel_center.0 as isize;
27672    let kernel_y_min_image = peak_index.1 as isize - kernel_center.1 as isize;
27673    let kernel_x_max_image = kernel_x_min_image + kernel.shape()[0] as isize - 1;
27674    let kernel_y_max_image = kernel_y_min_image + kernel.shape()[1] as isize - 1;
27675    if kernel_x_max_image < 0
27676        || kernel_y_max_image < 0
27677        || kernel_x_min_image > nx as isize - 1
27678        || kernel_y_min_image > ny as isize - 1
27679    {
27680        return;
27681    }
27682    let x0 = x0.max(kernel_x_min_image.max(0) as usize);
27683    let y0 = y0.max(kernel_y_min_image.max(0) as usize);
27684    let x1 = x1.min(kernel_x_max_image.min(nx as isize - 1) as usize);
27685    let y1 = y1.min(kernel_y_max_image.min(ny as isize - 1) as usize);
27686    if x0 > x1 || y0 > y1 {
27687        return;
27688    }
27689
27690    if image.is_standard_layout()
27691        && kernel.is_standard_layout()
27692        && let (Some(image_values), Some(kernel_values)) = (
27693            image.as_slice_memory_order_mut(),
27694            kernel.as_slice_memory_order(),
27695        )
27696    {
27697        let kernel_ny = kernel.shape()[1];
27698        for x in x0..=x1 {
27699            let image_row_offset = x * ny;
27700            let kernel_x = (x as isize - kernel_x_min_image) as usize;
27701            let kernel_row_offset = kernel_x * kernel_ny;
27702            for y in y0..=y1 {
27703                let kernel_y = (y as isize - kernel_y_min_image) as usize;
27704                image_values[image_row_offset + y] -=
27705                    scale_factor * kernel_values[kernel_row_offset + kernel_y];
27706            }
27707        }
27708        return;
27709    }
27710
27711    for x in x0..=x1 {
27712        let kernel_x = (x as isize - kernel_x_min_image) as usize;
27713        for y in y0..=y1 {
27714            let kernel_y = (y as isize - kernel_y_min_image) as usize;
27715            image[(x, y)] -= scale_factor * kernel[(kernel_x, kernel_y)];
27716        }
27717    }
27718}
27719
27720#[cfg(test)]
27721fn add_shifted_kernel(
27722    image: &mut Array2<f32>,
27723    kernel: &Array2<f32>,
27724    peak_index: (usize, usize),
27725    scale_factor: f32,
27726) {
27727    add_shifted_kernel_with_support(
27728        image,
27729        kernel,
27730        kernel_nonzero_support(kernel),
27731        peak_index,
27732        scale_factor,
27733    );
27734}
27735
27736fn kernel_nonzero_support(kernel: &Array2<f32>) -> Option<KernelSupport> {
27737    let mut support = None::<KernelSupport>;
27738    for x in 0..kernel.shape()[0] {
27739        for y in 0..kernel.shape()[1] {
27740            if kernel[(x, y)] == 0.0 {
27741                continue;
27742            }
27743            support = Some(match support {
27744                Some(current) => KernelSupport {
27745                    x0: current.x0.min(x),
27746                    y0: current.y0.min(y),
27747                    x1: current.x1.max(x),
27748                    y1: current.y1.max(y),
27749                },
27750                None => KernelSupport {
27751                    x0: x,
27752                    y0: y,
27753                    x1: x,
27754                    y1: y,
27755                },
27756            });
27757        }
27758    }
27759    support
27760}
27761
27762fn add_shifted_kernel_with_support(
27763    image: &mut Array2<f32>,
27764    kernel: &Array2<f32>,
27765    support: Option<KernelSupport>,
27766    peak_index: (usize, usize),
27767    scale_factor: f32,
27768) {
27769    let Some(support) = support else {
27770        return;
27771    };
27772    let Some((x0, x1, y0, y1)) =
27773        shifted_kernel_image_bounds(image.dim(), kernel, support, peak_index)
27774    else {
27775        return;
27776    };
27777    let kernel_center = (kernel.shape()[0] / 2, kernel.shape()[1] / 2);
27778    for x in x0..=x1 {
27779        for y in y0..=y1 {
27780            let kernel_x = x as isize - peak_index.0 as isize + kernel_center.0 as isize;
27781            let kernel_y = y as isize - peak_index.1 as isize + kernel_center.1 as isize;
27782            image[(x, y)] += scale_factor * kernel[(kernel_x as usize, kernel_y as usize)];
27783        }
27784    }
27785}
27786
27787fn shifted_kernel_support_pixel_count(
27788    image_shape: (usize, usize),
27789    kernel: &Array2<f32>,
27790    support: Option<KernelSupport>,
27791    peak_index: (usize, usize),
27792) -> usize {
27793    let Some(support) = support else {
27794        return 0;
27795    };
27796    let Some((x0, x1, y0, y1)) =
27797        shifted_kernel_image_bounds(image_shape, kernel, support, peak_index)
27798    else {
27799        return 0;
27800    };
27801    x1.saturating_sub(x0)
27802        .saturating_add(1)
27803        .saturating_mul(y1.saturating_sub(y0).saturating_add(1))
27804}
27805
27806fn shifted_kernel_image_bounds(
27807    image_shape: (usize, usize),
27808    kernel: &Array2<f32>,
27809    support: KernelSupport,
27810    peak_index: (usize, usize),
27811) -> Option<(usize, usize, usize, usize)> {
27812    if image_shape.0 == 0 || image_shape.1 == 0 {
27813        return None;
27814    }
27815    let kernel_center = (kernel.shape()[0] / 2, kernel.shape()[1] / 2);
27816    let image_x0 = peak_index.0 as isize + support.x0 as isize - kernel_center.0 as isize;
27817    let image_x1 = peak_index.0 as isize + support.x1 as isize - kernel_center.0 as isize;
27818    let image_y0 = peak_index.1 as isize + support.y0 as isize - kernel_center.1 as isize;
27819    let image_y1 = peak_index.1 as isize + support.y1 as isize - kernel_center.1 as isize;
27820    let max_x = image_shape.0 as isize - 1;
27821    let max_y = image_shape.1 as isize - 1;
27822    if image_x1 < 0 || image_y1 < 0 || image_x0 > max_x || image_y0 > max_y {
27823        return None;
27824    }
27825    let x0 = image_x0.max(0) as usize;
27826    let y0 = image_y0.max(0) as usize;
27827    let x1 = image_x1.min(max_x) as usize;
27828    let y1 = image_y1.min(max_y) as usize;
27829    (x0 <= x1 && y0 <= y1).then_some((x0, x1, y0, y1))
27830}
27831
27832fn peak_abs_value(image: &Array2<f32>) -> f32 {
27833    image
27834        .iter()
27835        .fold(0.0f32, |best, value| best.max(value.abs()))
27836}
27837
27838#[cfg(test)]
27839fn dirty_clean_config(psf_cutoff: f32) -> CleanConfig {
27840    CleanConfig {
27841        niter: 0,
27842        major_cycle_limit: None,
27843        gain: 0.1,
27844        threshold_jy_per_beam: 0.0,
27845        nsigma: 0.0,
27846        psf_cutoff,
27847        minor_cycle_length: 1,
27848        cyclefactor: 1.0,
27849        min_psf_fraction: 0.05,
27850        max_psf_fraction: 0.8,
27851        hogbom_iteration_mode: HogbomIterationMode::Strict,
27852    }
27853}
27854
27855fn casa_major_cycle_count(refreshes: usize, clean_niter: usize) -> usize {
27856    if clean_niter > 0 { refreshes + 1 } else { 0 }
27857}
27858
27859fn expand_plane(plane: &Array2<f32>) -> Array4<f32> {
27860    let (nx, ny) = plane.dim();
27861    let mut expanded = Array4::<f32>::zeros((nx, ny, 1, 1).f());
27862    expanded.slice_mut(s![.., .., 0, 0]).assign(plane);
27863    expanded
27864}
27865
27866fn expand_scalar(value: f32) -> Array4<f32> {
27867    let mut expanded = Array4::<f32>::zeros((1, 1, 1, 1));
27868    expanded[(0, 0, 0, 0)] = value;
27869    expanded
27870}
27871
