27944    #[test]
27945    fn standard_mfs_thread_count_parser_accepts_numeric_and_auto_values() {
27946        assert_eq!(parse_standard_mfs_thread_count("1"), Some(1));
27947        assert_eq!(parse_standard_mfs_thread_count("10"), Some(10));
27948        assert_eq!(parse_standard_mfs_thread_count(" 4 "), Some(4));
27949        assert_eq!(parse_standard_mfs_thread_count("0"), None);
27950        assert_eq!(parse_standard_mfs_thread_count("not-a-count"), None);
27951        assert!(parse_standard_mfs_thread_count("auto").is_some_and(|value| value >= 1));
27952        assert!(parse_standard_mfs_thread_count("AUTO").is_some_and(|value| value >= 1));
27953    }
27954
27955    #[test]
27956    fn phase_rotate_visibility_applies_geometric_phasor() {
27957        let visibility = Complex32::new(1.0, 0.0);
27958
27959        assert_eq!(phase_rotate_visibility(visibility, 0.0, 1.0e9), visibility);
27960        assert_eq!(phase_rotate_visibility(visibility, 1.0, 0.0), visibility);
27961
27962        let frequency_hz = 1.0e9;
27963        let quarter_turn_shift_m = super::SPEED_OF_LIGHT_M_PER_S / (4.0 * frequency_hz);
27964        let rotated = phase_rotate_visibility(visibility, quarter_turn_shift_m, frequency_hz);
27965        assert!(rotated.re.abs() < 1.0e-6, "{rotated:?}");
27966        assert!((rotated.im + 1.0).abs() < 1.0e-6, "{rotated:?}");
27967    }
27968
27969    #[test]
27970    fn hogbom_plane_minor_cycle_updates_model_and_records_components() {
27971        let mut model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((3, 3));
27972        let mut residual = Array2::<f32>::zeros((3, 3));
27973        residual[(1, 1)] = 4.0;
27974        residual[(2, 2)] = f32::NAN;
27975        let mut psf = Array2::<f32>::zeros((3, 3));
27976        psf[(1, 1)] = 1.0;
27977        let mask = Array2::from_elem((3, 3), true);
27978        let clean = CleanConfig {
27979            niter: 1,
27980            major_cycle_limit: None,
27981            gain: 0.5,
27982            threshold_jy_per_beam: 0.0,
27983            nsigma: 0.0,
27984            psf_cutoff: 0.35,
27985            minor_cycle_length: 1,
27986            cyclefactor: 1.0,
27987            min_psf_fraction: 0.05,
27988            max_psf_fraction: 0.8,
27989            hogbom_iteration_mode: HogbomIterationMode::CasaInclusive,
27990        };
27991
27992        let outcome = run_hogbom_plane_minor_cycle(
27993            &mut model,
27994            &mut residual,
27995            &psf,
27996            Some(&mask),
27997            HogbomPlaneMinorCycleControl::new(clean, 1, 0.1, 1.0e-3),
27998        );
27999
28000        assert_eq!(outcome.actual_updates(), 2);
28001        assert_eq!(outcome.reported_updates(), 1);
28002        assert_eq!(outcome.components()[0].position(), (1, 1));
28003        assert_eq!(outcome.components()[0].peak_value_jy_per_beam(), 4.0);
28004        assert_eq!(outcome.components()[0].component_jy(), 2.0);
28005        assert_eq!(model[(1, 1)], 3.0);
28006        assert_eq!(residual[(1, 1)], 1.0);
28007    }
28008
28009    #[test]
28010    fn image_coordinate_system_builds_casa_axis_record() {
28011        let coords = build_image_coordinate_system(
28012            64,
28013            [1.0, 0.5],
28014            1.5,
28015            FrequencyRef::LSRK,
28016            DirectionRef::J2000,
28017            PlaneStokes::I,
28018            &[1.4e9, 1.401e9],
28019            None,
28020            Some(1.420_405_751e9),
28021        );
28022
28023        assert_eq!(coords.n_coordinates(), 3);
28024        assert_eq!(coords.n_pixel_axes(), 4);
28025        let record = coords.to_record();
28026        assert!(record.get("coordinate0").is_some());
28027        assert!(record.get("coordinate1").is_some());
28028        assert!(record.get("coordinate2").is_some());
28029    }
28030
28031    #[test]
28032    fn cube_spectral_coordinate_preserves_requested_rest_frequency() {
28033        let coord = build_image_spectral_coordinate(
28034            FrequencyRef::LSRK,
28035            &[372_672_490_000.0, 372_671_868_449.0],
28036            None,
28037            Some(372_672_490_000.0),
28038        );
28039
28040        assert!((coord.rest_frequency() - 372_672_490_000.0).abs() < 1.0);
28041    }
28042
28043    #[test]
28044    fn mfs_spectral_coordinate_can_record_selected_bandwidth_delta() {
28045        let coord = build_image_spectral_coordinate(
28046            FrequencyRef::LSRK,
28047            &[1.578_964_191_647_556_8e9],
28048            Some(647_988_661.229_352_2),
28049            None,
28050        );
28051
28052        assert_eq!(coord.reference_value(), vec![1.578_964_191_647_556_8e9]);
28053        assert_eq!(coord.increment(), vec![647_988_661.229_352_2]);
28054        assert_eq!(coord.rest_frequency(), 1.578_964_191_647_556_8e9);
28055    }
28056
28057    fn pb_test_coordinate_system(cell_arcsec: f64) -> CoordinateSystem {
28058        let cell_rad = cell_arcsec * std::f64::consts::PI / (180.0 * 3600.0);
28059        let mut coords = CoordinateSystem::new();
28060        coords.add_coordinate(Box::new(DirectionCoordinate::new(
28061            DirectionRef::J2000,
28062            Projection::new(ProjectionType::SIN),
28063            [1.0, 0.5],
28064            [-cell_rad, cell_rad],
28065            [2.0, 2.0],
28066        )));
28067        coords
28068    }
28069
28070    #[test]
28071    fn primary_beam_products_apply_cutoff() {
28072        let weight = Array4::from_shape_vec((2, 2, 1, 1), vec![4.0, 1.0, 0.04, 0.0]).unwrap();
28073        let pb = mosaic_primary_beam_product_from_weight_product(&weight);
28074        assert_eq!(pb[[0, 0, 0, 0]], 1.0);
28075        assert_eq!(pb[[0, 1, 0, 0]], 0.5);
28076        assert!((pb[[1, 0, 0, 0]] - 0.1).abs() < 1.0e-6);
28077        assert_eq!(pb[[1, 1, 0, 0]], 0.0);
28078
28079        let limited_pb = primary_beam_limited_product(&pb, 0.1);
28080        assert_eq!(limited_pb[[0, 0, 0, 0]], 1.0);
28081        assert_eq!(limited_pb[[0, 1, 0, 0]], 0.5);
28082        assert_eq!(limited_pb[[1, 0, 0, 0]], 0.0);
28083        assert_eq!(limited_pb[[1, 1, 0, 0]], 0.0);
28084
28085        let image = Array4::from_shape_vec((2, 2, 1, 1), vec![2.0, 2.0, 2.0, 2.0]).unwrap();
28086        let corrected = primary_beam_correct_image_product(&image, &pb, 0.1);
28087        assert_eq!(corrected[[0, 0, 0, 0]], 2.0);
28088        assert_eq!(corrected[[0, 1, 0, 0]], 4.0);
28089        assert_eq!(corrected[[1, 0, 0, 0]], 0.0);
28090        assert_eq!(corrected[[1, 1, 0, 0]], 0.0);
28091        let negative_limit_corrected = primary_beam_correct_image_product(&image, &pb, -0.01);
28092        assert_eq!(negative_limit_corrected[[0, 0, 0, 0]], 2.0);
28093        assert_eq!(negative_limit_corrected[[1, 1, 0, 0]], 0.0);
28094
28095        let support = primary_beam_support_mask_product(&pb, 0.1);
28096        assert!(support[[0, 0, 0, 0]]);
28097        assert!(support[[0, 1, 0, 0]]);
28098        assert!(!support[[1, 0, 0, 0]]);
28099        assert!(!support[[1, 1, 0, 0]]);
28100    }
28101
28102    #[test]
28103    fn clean_mask_product_repeats_plane_and_preserves_cube_channels() {
28104        let plane = Array2::from_shape_vec((2, 2), vec![true, false, false, true]).unwrap();
28105        let product = clean_mask_image_product(CleanMaskProductRequest::Plane {
28106            mask: &plane,
28107            channel_count: 2,
28108        });
28109
28110        assert_eq!(product.shape(), &[2, 2, 1, 2]);
28111        assert_eq!(product[[0, 0, 0, 0]], 1.0);
28112        assert_eq!(product[[0, 1, 0, 0]], 0.0);
28113        assert_eq!(product[[1, 1, 0, 1]], 1.0);
28114
28115        let cube = Array4::from_shape_vec((1, 1, 1, 2), vec![true, false]).unwrap();
28116        let product = clean_mask_image_product(CleanMaskProductRequest::Cube { mask: &cube });
28117
28118        assert_eq!(product[[0, 0, 0, 0]], 1.0);
28119        assert_eq!(product[[0, 0, 0, 1]], 0.0);
28120    }
28121
28122    #[test]
28123    fn mfs_product_plane_helpers_preserve_plane_and_mask_semantics() {
28124        let plane = Array2::from_shape_vec((2, 2), vec![1.0, -4.0, 3.0, 2.0]).unwrap();
28125        let product = single_plane_image_product(&plane);
28126
28127        assert_eq!(product.shape(), &[2, 2, 1, 1]);
28128        assert_eq!(extract_mfs_plane_product(&product), plane);
28129
28130        let clean_mask = Array2::from_shape_vec((2, 2), vec![true, false, true, false]).unwrap();
28131        assert_eq!(clean_mask_pixel_count(&clean_mask), 2);
28132        assert_eq!(
28133            mfs_image_product_peak_abs_masked(&product, Some(&clean_mask), 0.0),
28134            3.0
28135        );
28136    }
28137
28138    #[test]
28139    fn primary_beam_output_bundle_preserves_cutoff_and_pbcor_semantics() {
28140        let pb = Array4::from_shape_vec((2, 2, 1, 1), vec![1.0, 0.5, 0.1, 0.0]).unwrap();
28141        let image = Array4::from_elem((2, 2, 1, 1), 2.0);
28142        let (limited_pb, support_mask, image_pbcor) =
28143            primary_beam_output_products(Some(&image), &pb, 0.1, true);
28144
28145        assert_eq!(limited_pb[[0, 0, 0, 0]], 1.0);
28146        assert_eq!(limited_pb[[0, 1, 0, 0]], 0.5);
28147        assert_eq!(limited_pb[[1, 0, 0, 0]], 0.0);
28148        assert!(support_mask[[0, 0, 0, 0]]);
28149        assert!(!support_mask[[1, 0, 0, 0]]);
28150        let corrected = image_pbcor.unwrap();
28151        assert_eq!(corrected[[0, 0, 0, 0]], 2.0);
28152        assert_eq!(corrected[[0, 1, 0, 0]], 4.0);
28153        assert_eq!(corrected[[1, 0, 0, 0]], 0.0);
28154
28155        let (negative_limit, _, _) = primary_beam_output_products(Some(&image), &pb, -0.01, true);
28156        assert_eq!(negative_limit[[1, 0, 0, 0]], 0.1);
28157    }
28158
28159    #[test]
28160    fn primary_beam_alpha_correction_uses_absolute_cutoff() {
28161        let alpha = Array4::from_elem((2, 1, 1, 1), 3.0);
28162        let pb_alpha = Array4::from_shape_vec((2, 1, 1, 1), vec![0.25, 0.5]).unwrap();
28163        let pb = Array4::from_shape_vec((2, 1, 1, 1), vec![0.2, 0.005]).unwrap();
28164
28165        let corrected = primary_beam_correct_alpha_product(&alpha, &pb_alpha, &pb, -0.01);
28166
28167        assert_eq!(corrected[[0, 0, 0, 0]], 2.75);
28168        assert_eq!(corrected[[1, 0, 0, 0]], 0.0);
28169    }
28170
28171    #[test]
28172    fn primary_beam_single_field_product_uses_image_coordinates() {
28173        let coords = pb_test_coordinate_system(8.0);
28174        let center_world = coords.to_world(&[2.0, 2.0]).unwrap();
28175
28176        let pb = primary_beam_product(PrimaryBeamProductRequest::SingleField {
28177            coords: &coords,
28178            shape: (5, 5, 1, 1),
28179            channel_frequencies_hz: &[1.5e9],
28180            phase_center_direction_rad: [center_world[0], center_world[1]],
28181            primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel::EvlaLBandCommon,
28182        })
28183        .unwrap();
28184        let pb_alpha = primary_beam_product(PrimaryBeamProductRequest::Alpha {
28185            coords: &coords,
28186            shape: (5, 5, 1, 1),
28187            reference_frequency_hz: 1.5e9,
28188            phase_center_direction_rad: [center_world[0], center_world[1]],
28189            primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel::EvlaLBandCommon,
28190        })
28191        .unwrap();
28192
28193        assert!(pb[[2, 2, 0, 0]] > 0.999);
28194        assert!(pb[[0, 0, 0, 0]] > 0.0);
28195        assert!(pb[[0, 0, 0, 0]] < pb[[2, 2, 0, 0]]);
28196        assert!(pb_alpha[[0, 0, 0, 0]] < 0.0);
28197        assert_eq!(
28198            primary_beam_limited_product(&pb, -0.01)[[0, 0, 0, 0]],
28199            pb[[0, 0, 0, 0]]
28200        );
28201    }
28202
28203    #[test]
28204    fn weighted_primary_beam_validation_preserves_image_spectral_frequency() {
28205        let coords = pb_test_coordinate_system(800.0);
28206        let center_world = coords.to_world(&[2.0, 2.0]).unwrap();
28207
28208        let reference = primary_beam_product(PrimaryBeamProductRequest::SingleField {
28209            coords: &coords,
28210            shape: (5, 5, 1, 1),
28211            channel_frequencies_hz: &[1.5e9],
28212            phase_center_direction_rad: [center_world[0], center_world[1]],
28213            primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel::EvlaLBandCommon,
28214        })
28215        .unwrap();
28216        let selected = primary_beam_product(PrimaryBeamProductRequest::WeightedSingleField {
28217            coords: &coords,
28218            shape: (5, 5, 1, 1),
28219            channel_frequencies_hz: &[1.5e9],
28220            samples: &[
28221                PrimaryBeamWeightSample {
28222                    frequency_hz: 1.0e9,
28223                    weight: 100.0,
28224                },
28225                PrimaryBeamWeightSample {
28226                    frequency_hz: 2.0e9,
28227                    weight: 1.0,
28228                },
28229            ],
28230            phase_center_direction_rad: [center_world[0], center_world[1]],
28231            primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel::EvlaLBandCommon,
28232        })
28233        .unwrap();
28234
28235        assert_eq!(selected, reference);
28236    }
28237
28238    #[test]
28239    fn normalized_weighted_primary_beam_averages_frequency_power() {
28240        let coords = pb_test_coordinate_system(800.0);
28241        let center_world = coords.to_world(&[2.0, 2.0]).unwrap();
28242        let context = super::PrimaryBeamProductContext {
28243            phase_center_direction_rad: [center_world[0], center_world[1]],
28244            primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel::EvlaLBandCommon,
28245        };
28246
28247        let low = primary_beam_product(PrimaryBeamProductRequest::SingleField {
28248            coords: &coords,
28249            shape: (5, 5, 1, 1),
28250            channel_frequencies_hz: &[1.0e9],
28251            phase_center_direction_rad: [center_world[0], center_world[1]],
28252            primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel::EvlaLBandCommon,
28253        })
28254        .unwrap();
28255        let high = primary_beam_product(PrimaryBeamProductRequest::SingleField {
28256            coords: &coords,
28257            shape: (5, 5, 1, 1),
28258            channel_frequencies_hz: &[2.0e9],
28259            phase_center_direction_rad: [center_world[0], center_world[1]],
28260            primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel::EvlaLBandCommon,
28261        })
28262        .unwrap();
28263        let weighted = normalized_weighted_primary_beam_product(
28264            &coords,
28265            (5, 5, 1, 1),
28266            &[
28267                PrimaryBeamWeightSample {
28268                    frequency_hz: 1.0e9,
28269                    weight: 1.0,
28270                },
28271                PrimaryBeamWeightSample {
28272                    frequency_hz: 2.0e9,
28273                    weight: 1.0,
28274                },
28275            ],
28276            context,
28277        )
28278        .unwrap();
28279
28280        assert!(weighted[[2, 2, 0, 0]] > 0.999);
28281        let weighted_power = weighted[[0, 0, 0, 0]].powi(2);
28282        assert!(weighted_power < low[[0, 0, 0, 0]]);
28283        assert!(weighted_power > high[[0, 0, 0, 0]]);
28284    }
28285
28286    #[test]
28287    fn weighted_primary_beam_collapses_repeated_frequencies() {
28288        let collapsed = collapse_primary_beam_weight_samples(&[
28289            PrimaryBeamWeightSample {
28290                frequency_hz: 1.0e9,
28291                weight: 2.0,
28292            },
28293            PrimaryBeamWeightSample {
28294                frequency_hz: 1.0e9,
28295                weight: 3.0,
28296            },
28297            PrimaryBeamWeightSample {
28298                frequency_hz: 2.0e9,
28299                weight: 4.0,
28300            },
28301        ]);
28302
28303        assert_eq!(collapsed.len(), 2);
28304        assert_eq!(collapsed[0].frequency_hz, 1.0e9);
28305        assert_eq!(collapsed[0].weight, 5.0);
28306        assert_eq!(collapsed[1].frequency_hz, 2.0e9);
28307        assert_eq!(collapsed[1].weight, 4.0);
28308    }
28309
28310    #[test]
28311    fn multiscale_metal_auto_chunk_planner_uses_shape_scaled_adaptive_chunks() {
28312        let mut planner = super::standard_mfs_metal_minor_cycle_chunk_planner_from_value(
28313            Some("auto"),
28314            10_000,
28315            2048 * 2048,
28316            3,
28317        );
28318
28319        assert_eq!(
28320            planner.kind,
28321            super::StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkKind::Auto
28322        );
28323        assert_eq!(planner.target_ms, Some(2000.0));
28324        assert_eq!(planner.next_chunk(10_000), 512);
28325
28326        planner.observe_command(Duration::from_millis(4_000), 512);
28327        assert!(planner.next_chunk(10_000) < 512);
28328
28329        let mut calibrated = super::standard_mfs_metal_minor_cycle_chunk_planner_from_value(
28330            Some("auto:1000"),
28331            10_000,
28332            2048 * 2048,
28333            3,
28334        );
28335        calibrated.observe_command(Duration::from_millis(250), 100);
28336        calibrated.observe_command(Duration::from_millis(1050), 500);
28337        assert_eq!(calibrated.observations, 2);
28338        assert!((calibrated.fixed_ms.unwrap() - 50.0).abs() < 1.0e-6);
28339        assert!((calibrated.ms_per_update.unwrap() - 2.0).abs() < 1.0e-6);
28340        assert_eq!(calibrated.next_chunk(10_000), 475);
28341        assert!((calibrated.predicted_next_ms.unwrap() - 1000.0).abs() < 1.0e-6);
28342
28343        let mut fast_planner = super::standard_mfs_metal_minor_cycle_chunk_planner_from_value(
28344            Some("auto:1000"),
28345            10_000,
28346            1024 * 1024,
28347            3,
28348        );
28349        let initial_fast_chunk = fast_planner.next_chunk(10_000);
28350        fast_planner.observe_command(Duration::from_millis(250), initial_fast_chunk);
28351        assert!(fast_planner.next_chunk(10_000) > initial_fast_chunk);
28352
28353        let full = super::standard_mfs_metal_minor_cycle_chunk_planner_from_value(
28354            Some("full"),
28355            10_000,
28356            2048 * 2048,
28357            3,
28358        );
28359        assert_eq!(full.kind, super::StandardMfsMetalMinorCycleChunkKind::Full);
28360        assert_eq!(full.next_chunk(10_000), 10_000);
28361    }
28362
28363    #[test]
28364    fn wproject_metal_sample_contract_stays_compact() {
28365        assert_eq!(std::mem::size_of::<WProjectMetalSample>(), 20);
28366        let sample = WProjectMetalSample {
28367            loc: 0,
28368            plane_support_offsets: 17 | (23 << 10),
28369            weight: 1.0,
28370            visibility_re: 0.0,
28371            visibility_im: 0.0,
28372        };
28373        assert_eq!(sample.support(), 23);
28374    }

28377    fn mosaic_metal_sample_contract_matches_shader_stride() {

28379        assert_eq!(std::mem::size_of::<super::MosaicMetalParams>(), 44);

28382    #[test]
28383    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
28384    fn mosaic_metal_kernel_index_matches_compact_kernel_packing() {

28386            super::MOSAIC_METAL_SHADER
28387                .contains("sample.kernel_base + offset_base + tap_y * params.kernel_width + tap_x")

28391    #[test]
28392    fn mosaic_metal_partial_grid_count_limits_temporary_grid_residency() {
28393        let medium_cell_count = 1024 * 1024;
28394        let cell_count = 1280 * 1280;
28395
28396        assert_eq!(
28397            super::mosaic_metal_partial_grid_count(939_214, medium_cell_count),
28398            4
28399        );
28400        assert_eq!(
28401            super::mosaic_metal_partial_grid_count(1_005_222, cell_count),
28402            2
28403        );
28404        assert_eq!(
28405            super::mosaic_metal_partial_grid_count(100_000, cell_count),
28406            1
28407        );
28408        assert_eq!(super::mosaic_metal_partial_grid_count(10, cell_count), 1);
28409    }
28410
28411    #[test]
28412    fn mosaic_metal_sample_grouping_merges_matching_plans() {
28413        let first = super::MosaicMetalSample {
28414            loc: 42,
28415            support: 6,
28416            offset: [2, -3],
28417            range_x: [-6, 6],
28418            range_y: [-5, 6],
28419            weight: 2.0,
28420            visibility_re: 1.0,
28421            visibility_im: 3.0,
28422            kernel_base: 0,
28423        };
28424        let second = super::MosaicMetalSample {
28425            weight: 6.0,
28426            visibility_re: 5.0,
28427            visibility_im: 7.0,
28428            ..first
28429        };
28430        let different_plan = super::MosaicMetalSample {
28431            offset: [3, -3],
28432            weight: 11.0,
28433            visibility_re: 13.0,
28434            visibility_im: 17.0,
28435            ..first
28436        };
28437        let mut samples = super::MosaicMetalSampleHashMap::default();
28438        super::push_mosaic_metal_sample_aggregate(&mut samples, different_plan);
28439        super::push_mosaic_metal_sample_aggregate(&mut samples, second);
28440        super::push_mosaic_metal_sample_aggregate(&mut samples, first);
28441        let samples = super::finish_mosaic_metal_sample_aggregates(samples);
28442
28443        assert_eq!(samples.len(), 2);
28444        let grouped = samples
28445            .iter()
28446            .find(|sample| sample.offset == first.offset)
28447            .expect("matching mosaic Metal samples should be merged");
28448        assert_eq!(grouped.weight, 8.0);
28449        assert_eq!(grouped.visibility_re, 4.0);
28450        assert_eq!(grouped.visibility_im, 6.0);
28451    }
28452
28453    #[test]
28454    fn mosaic_grouped_cpu_dirty_matches_raw_sample_grid() {
28455        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
28456            image_shape: [64, 64],
28457            cell_size_rad: [4.0e-3, 4.0e-3],
28458        };
28459        let gridder = StandardGridder::new_with_casa_composite_padding(geometry).unwrap();
28460        let primary_beam_model = PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
28461            dish_diameter_m: 25.0,
28462            blockage_diameter_m: 0.0,
28463        };
28464        let mut batch = point_source_visibilities(
28465            &[
28466                (12.25, -8.5, 0.0),
28467                (12.25, -8.5, 0.0),
28468                (-18.0, 10.0, 0.0),
28469                (-18.0, 10.0, 0.0),
28470            ],
28471            geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
28472            geometry.image_shape,
28473            (42.0, 20.0),
28474            1.0,
28475        );
28476        batch.weight = vec![2.0, 6.0, 1.5, 3.5];
28477        batch.sumwt_factor = vec![1.0, 1.0, 2.0, 2.0];
28478        batch.visibility[1] = Complex32::new(-2.0, 1.25);
28479        batch.visibility[3] = Complex32::new(0.75, -0.5);
28480        let group = super::MosaicPointingGroup {
28481            pointing_direction_rad: [0.0, 0.0],
28482            frequency_hz: 1.4e9,
28483            primary_beam_model,
28484            batch,
28485            sample_frequency_hz: Vec::new(),
28486        };
28487        let projector = super::build_mosaic_projector(
28488            geometry,
28489            &gridder,
28490            [0.0, 0.0],
28491            [0.0, 0.0],
28492            primary_beam_model,
28493            1.4e9,
28494            super::mosaic_projector_sampling(geometry),
28495            2,
28496            true,
28497        )
28498        .unwrap();
28499        let prepared = super::collect_mosaic_metal_samples(&group, &projector, None).unwrap();
28500        assert_eq!(prepared.gridded_samples, 4);
28501        assert_eq!(prepared.samples.len(), 2);
28502
28503        let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
28504        let mut raw_psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28505        let mut raw_residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28506        for sample_index in 0..group.batch.len() {
28507            let grid_weight = f64::from(
28508                group.batch.weight[sample_index] * group.batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index],
28509            );
28510            let plan = projector
28511                .plan_sample_for_grid(
28512                    group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
28513                    group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
28514                )
28515                .unwrap();
28516            projector.grid_sample_planned_f64(
28517                &mut raw_psf_grid,
28518                &plan,
28519                Complex64::new(grid_weight, 0.0),
28520            );
28521            let visibility = group.batch.visibility[sample_index];
28522            projector.grid_sample_planned_f64(
28523                &mut raw_residual_grid,
28524                &plan,
28525                Complex64::new(visibility.re as f64, visibility.im as f64) * grid_weight,
28526            );
28527        }
28528
28529        let mut grouped_psf_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28530        let mut grouped_residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28531        super::accumulate_mosaic_grouped_dirty_cpu(
28532            &projector,
28533            &prepared.samples,
28534            &mut grouped_psf_grid,
28535            &mut grouped_residual_grid,
28536        );
28537
28538        let max_psf_delta = grouped_psf_grid
28539            .iter()
28540            .zip(raw_psf_grid.iter())
28541            .map(|(lhs, rhs)| (*lhs - *rhs).norm())
28542            .fold(0.0f64, f64::max);
28543        let max_residual_delta = grouped_residual_grid
28544            .iter()
28545            .zip(raw_residual_grid.iter())
28546            .map(|(lhs, rhs)| (*lhs - *rhs).norm())
28547            .fold(0.0f64, f64::max);
28548        assert!(max_psf_delta < 1.0e-5, "max PSF delta {max_psf_delta}");
28549        assert!(
28550            max_residual_delta < 1.0e-5,
28551            "max residual delta {max_residual_delta}"
28552        );
28553    }
28554
28555    #[test]
28556    fn mosaic_grouped_cpu_residual_matches_raw_sample_grid() {
28557        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
28558            image_shape: [64, 64],
28559            cell_size_rad: [4.0e-3, 4.0e-3],
28560        };
28561        let gridder = StandardGridder::new_with_casa_composite_padding(geometry).unwrap();
28562        let primary_beam_model = PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
28563            dish_diameter_m: 25.0,
28564            blockage_diameter_m: 0.0,
28565        };
28566        let mut batch = point_source_visibilities(
28567            &[
28568                (12.25, -8.5, 0.0),
28569                (12.25, -8.5, 0.0),
28570                (-18.0, 10.0, 0.0),
28571                (-18.0, 10.0, 0.0),
28572            ],
28573            geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
28574            geometry.image_shape,
28575            (42.0, 20.0),
28576            1.0,
28577        );
28578        batch.weight = vec![2.0, 6.0, 1.5, 3.5];
28579        batch.sumwt_factor = vec![1.0, 1.0, 2.0, 2.0];
28580        batch.visibility[1] = Complex32::new(-2.0, 1.25);
28581        batch.visibility[3] = Complex32::new(0.75, -0.5);
28582        let group = super::MosaicPointingGroup {
28583            pointing_direction_rad: [0.0, 0.0],
28584            frequency_hz: 1.4e9,
28585            primary_beam_model,
28586            batch,
28587            sample_frequency_hz: Vec::new(),
28588        };
28589        let projector = super::build_mosaic_projector(
28590            geometry,
28591            &gridder,
28592            [0.0, 0.0],
28593            [0.0, 0.0],
28594            primary_beam_model,
28595            1.4e9,
28596            super::mosaic_projector_sampling(geometry),
28597            2,
28598            true,
28599        )
28600        .unwrap();
28601        let prepared = super::collect_mosaic_metal_samples(&group, &projector, None).unwrap();
28602        assert_eq!(prepared.gridded_samples, 4);
28603        assert_eq!(prepared.samples.len(), 2);
28604
28605        let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
28606        let mut model_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28607        for y in 0..grid_ny {
28608            for x in 0..grid_nx {
28609                let re = (x as f32 - grid_nx as f32 * 0.5) * 1.0e-4;
28610                let im = (y as f32 - grid_ny as f32 * 0.5) * -8.0e-5;
28611                model_grid[(x, y)] = Complex32::new(re, im);
28612            }
28613        }
28614
28615        let mut raw_residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28616        for sample_index in 0..group.batch.len() {
28617            let grid_weight = f64::from(
28618                group.batch.weight[sample_index] * group.batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index],
28619            );
28620            let plan = projector
28621                .plan_sample_for_grid(
28622                    group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
28623                    group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
28624                )
28625                .unwrap();
28626            let predicted = projector.degrid_sample_planned(&model_grid, &plan);
28627            let visibility = group.batch.visibility[sample_index] - predicted;
28628            projector.grid_sample_planned_f64(
28629                &mut raw_residual_grid,
28630                &plan,
28631                Complex64::new(visibility.re as f64, visibility.im as f64) * grid_weight,
28632            );
28633        }
28634
28635        let mut grouped_residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28636        super::accumulate_mosaic_grouped_residual_cpu(
28637            &projector,
28638            &prepared.samples,
28639            Some(&model_grid),
28640            &mut grouped_residual_grid,
28641        );
28642
28643        let max_residual_delta = grouped_residual_grid
28644            .iter()
28645            .zip(raw_residual_grid.iter())
28646            .map(|(lhs, rhs)| (*lhs - *rhs).norm())
28647            .fold(0.0f64, f64::max);
28648        assert!(
28649            max_residual_delta < 1.0e-5,
28650            "max residual delta {max_residual_delta}"
28651        );
28652    }
28653
28654    #[test]
28655    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
28656    fn mosaic_metal_residual_matches_grouped_cpu_with_model_grid() {
28657        if !standard_mfs_metal_device_available() {
28658            return;
28659        }
28660        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
28661            image_shape: [64, 64],
28662            cell_size_rad: [4.0e-3, 4.0e-3],
28663        };
28664        let gridder = StandardGridder::new_with_casa_composite_padding(geometry).unwrap();
28665        let primary_beam_model = PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
28666            dish_diameter_m: 25.0,
28667            blockage_diameter_m: 0.0,
28668        };
28669        let mut batch = point_source_visibilities(
28670            &[
28671                (12.25, -8.5, 0.0),
28672                (12.25, -8.5, 0.0),
28673                (-18.0, 10.0, 0.0),
28674                (-18.0, 10.0, 0.0),
28675                (6.0, 14.0, 0.0),
28676            ],
28677            geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
28678            geometry.image_shape,
28679            (42.0, 20.0),
28680            1.0,
28681        );
28682        batch.weight = vec![2.0, 6.0, 1.5, 3.5, 4.0];
28683        batch.sumwt_factor = vec![1.0, 1.0, 2.0, 2.0, 0.75];
28684        batch.visibility[1] = Complex32::new(-2.0, 1.25);
28685        batch.visibility[3] = Complex32::new(0.75, -0.5);
28686        batch.visibility[4] = Complex32::new(1.5, -2.25);
28687        let group = super::MosaicPointingGroup {
28688            pointing_direction_rad: [0.0, 0.0],
28689            frequency_hz: 1.4e9,
28690            primary_beam_model,
28691            batch,
28692            sample_frequency_hz: Vec::new(),
28693        };
28694        let projector = super::build_mosaic_projector(
28695            geometry,
28696            &gridder,
28697            [0.0, 0.0],
28698            [0.0, 0.0],
28699            primary_beam_model,
28700            1.4e9,
28701            super::mosaic_projector_sampling(geometry),
28702            2,
28703            true,
28704        )
28705        .unwrap();
28706        let prepared = super::collect_mosaic_metal_samples(&group, &projector, None).unwrap();
28707        assert_eq!(prepared.gridded_samples, 5);
28708        assert!(
28709            prepared.samples.len() < prepared.gridded_samples,
28710            "test should exercise grouped residual samples"
28711        );
28712
28713        let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
28714        let mut model_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28715        for x in 0..grid_nx {
28716            for y in 0..grid_ny {
28717                let re = ((x as f32 * 0.013).sin() + (y as f32 * 0.017).cos()) * 2.0e-3;
28718                let im = ((x as f32 * 0.019).cos() - (y as f32 * 0.011).sin()) * 1.5e-3;
28719                model_grid[(x, y)] = Complex32::new(re, im);
28720            }
28721        }
28722
28723        let mut cpu_residual_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28724        super::accumulate_mosaic_grouped_residual_cpu(
28725            &projector,
28726            &prepared.samples,
28727            Some(&model_grid),
28728            &mut cpu_residual_grid,
28729        );
28730
28731        let mut metal_psf_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28732        let mut metal_residual_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28733        super::accumulate_mosaic_grid_metal_samples(
28734            &projector,
28735            &prepared.samples,
28736            Some(&model_grid),
28737            &mut metal_psf_grid,
28738            &mut metal_residual_grid,
28739            super::MOSAIC_METAL_MODE_RESIDUAL,
28740        )
28741        .unwrap();
28742
28743        let max_residual_delta = metal_residual_grid
28744            .iter()
28745            .zip(cpu_residual_grid.iter())
28746            .map(|(lhs, rhs)| (Complex64::new(lhs.re as f64, lhs.im as f64) - *rhs).norm())
28747            .fold(0.0f64, f64::max);
28748        assert!(
28749            max_residual_delta < 1.0e-4,
28750            "Metal mosaic residual refresh should match grouped CPU for a nonzero model grid: max delta {max_residual_delta}"
28751        );
28752    }
28753
28754    #[test]
28755    fn mosaic_weight_grid_grouping_preserves_cropped_support_ranges() {
28756        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
28757            image_shape: [64, 64],
28758            cell_size_rad: [4.0e-3, 4.0e-3],
28759        };
28760        let gridder = StandardGridder::new_with_casa_composite_padding(geometry).unwrap();
28761        let primary_beam_model = PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
28762            dish_diameter_m: 25.0,
28763            blockage_diameter_m: 0.0,
28764        };
28765        let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
28766        let spacing = gridder.grid_spacing_lambda();
28767        let edge_u = (1.0 - grid_nx as f64 / 2.0) * spacing[0];
28768        let mut batch = point_source_visibilities(
28769            &[(0.0, 0.0, 0.0), (edge_u, 0.0, 0.0)],
28770            geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
28771            geometry.image_shape,
28772            (42.0, 20.0),
28773            1.0,
28774        );
28775        batch.weight = vec![2.0, 5.0];
28776        batch.sumwt_factor = vec![3.0, 7.0];
28777        let group = super::MosaicPointingGroup {
28778            pointing_direction_rad: [0.0, 0.0],
28779            frequency_hz: 1.4e9,
28780            primary_beam_model,
28781            batch,
28782            sample_frequency_hz: Vec::new(),
28783        };
28784        let projector = super::build_mosaic_projector(
28785            geometry,
28786            &gridder,
28787            [0.0, 0.0],
28788            [0.0, 0.0],
28789            primary_beam_model,
28790            1.4e9,
28791            super::mosaic_projector_sampling(geometry),
28792            2,
28793            true,
28794        )
28795        .unwrap();
28796        let weight_projector = super::build_mosaic_projector(
28797            geometry,
28798            &gridder,
28799            [0.0, 0.0],
28800            [0.0, 0.0],
28801            primary_beam_model,
28802            1.4e9,
28803            super::mosaic_projector_sampling(geometry),
28804            4,
28805            true,
28806        )
28807        .unwrap();
28808        let center_weight_plan = weight_projector.plan_sample_for_grid(0.0, 0.0).unwrap();
28809        let edge_weight_plan = weight_projector.plan_sample_for_grid(edge_u, 0.0).unwrap();
28810        assert!(
28811            edge_weight_plan.min_ix > -(weight_projector.support() as isize),
28812            "edge UV sample should crop the negative x support"
28813        );
28814
28815        let prepared =
28816            super::collect_mosaic_metal_samples(&group, &projector, Some(&weight_projector))
28817                .unwrap();
28818        assert_eq!(prepared.gridded_samples, 2);
28819        assert!(
28820            prepared.weight_support_sums.len() >= 2,
28821            "full and cropped support ranges should not be collapsed together"
28822        );
28823
28824        let mut raw_weight_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28825        let mut full_kernel_weight_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28826        let mut total_weight = 0.0f64;
28827        for sample_index in 0..group.batch.len() {
28828            let grid_weight = f64::from(
28829                group.batch.weight[sample_index] * group.batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index],
28830            );
28831            total_weight += grid_weight;
28832            let mut plan = center_weight_plan;
28833            let sample_plan = weight_projector
28834                .plan_sample_for_grid(
28835                    group.batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
28836                    group.batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
28837                )
28838                .unwrap();
28839            plan.min_ix = sample_plan.min_ix;
28840            plan.max_ix = sample_plan.max_ix;
28841            plan.min_iy = sample_plan.min_iy;
28842            plan.max_iy = sample_plan.max_iy;
28843            weight_projector.grid_sample_planned_f64(
28844                &mut raw_weight_grid,
28845                &plan,
28846                Complex64::new(grid_weight, 0.0),
28847            );
28848        }
28849        weight_projector.grid_sample_planned_f64(
28850            &mut full_kernel_weight_grid,
28851            &center_weight_plan,
28852            Complex64::new(total_weight, 0.0),
28853        );
28854
28855        let mut grouped_weight_grid = Array2::<Complex64>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28856        super::add_mosaic_center_weight_grid_from_support_sums(
28857            &weight_projector,
28858            &center_weight_plan,
28859            &mut grouped_weight_grid,
28860            &prepared.weight_support_sums,
28861        );
28862        let max_grouped_delta = grouped_weight_grid
28863            .iter()
28864            .zip(raw_weight_grid.iter())
28865            .map(|(lhs, rhs)| (*lhs - *rhs).norm())
28866            .fold(0.0f64, f64::max);
28867        let max_full_kernel_delta = full_kernel_weight_grid
28868            .iter()
28869            .zip(raw_weight_grid.iter())
28870            .map(|(lhs, rhs)| (*lhs - *rhs).norm())
28871            .fold(0.0f64, f64::max);
28872        assert!(
28873            max_grouped_delta < 1.0e-9,
28874            "support-aware grouped weight grid should match raw per-sample grid: {max_grouped_delta}"
28875        );
28876        assert!(
28877            max_full_kernel_delta > 1.0e-6,
28878            "legacy full-kernel accumulation should differ for cropped support"
28879        );
28880    }
28881
28882    #[test]
28883    fn wproject_metal_sample_merges_adjacent_matching_plans() {
28884        let mut samples = Vec::new();
28885        let first = WProjectMetalSample {
28886            loc: 42,
28887            plane_support_offsets: 3 | (4 << 10),
28888            weight: 2.0,
28889            visibility_re: 1.0,
28890            visibility_im: 3.0,
28891        };
28892        let second = WProjectMetalSample {
28893            loc: 42,
28894            plane_support_offsets: 3 | (4 << 10),
28895            weight: 6.0,
28896            visibility_re: 5.0,
28897            visibility_im: 7.0,
28898        };
28899
28900        assert!(super::push_w_project_metal_sample(&mut samples, first));
28901        assert!(!super::push_w_project_metal_sample(&mut samples, second));
28902
28903        assert_eq!(samples.len(), 1);
28904        assert_eq!(samples[0].weight, 8.0);
28905        assert_eq!(samples[0].visibility_re, 4.0);
28906        assert_eq!(samples[0].visibility_im, 6.0);
28907    }
28908
28909    #[test]
28910    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
28911    fn wproject_metal_dirty_grouped_weighted_samples_match_cpu_grid() {
28912        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
28913            image_shape: [64, 64],
28914            cell_size_rad: [4.0e-3, 4.0e-3],
28915        };
28916        let gridder = StandardGridder::new_with_casa_composite_padding(geometry).unwrap();
28917        let mut batch = point_source_visibilities_with_w_term(
28918            &[
28919                (12.25, -8.5, 100.0),
28920                (12.25, -8.5, 100.0),
28921                (-18.0, 10.0, -80.0),
28922                (-18.0, 10.0, -80.0),
28923            ],
28924            4.0e-3,
28925            [64, 64],
28926            (42.0, 20.0),
28927            1.0,
28928        );
28929        batch.weight = vec![2.0, 6.0, 1.5, 3.5];
28930        batch.sumwt_factor = batch.weight.clone();
28931        batch.visibility[1] = Complex32::new(-2.0, 1.25);
28932        batch.visibility[3] = Complex32::new(0.75, -0.5);
28933        let batches = vec![batch];
28934
28935        let cpu_prepared =
28936            super::prepare_w_project_data(geometry, &batches, &gridder, Some(8)).unwrap();
28937        let metal_prepared =
28938            super::prepare_w_project_metal_data(geometry, &batches, &gridder, Some(8)).unwrap();
28939        assert_eq!(cpu_prepared.gridded_samples, 4);
28940        assert_eq!(metal_prepared.gridded_samples, 4);
28941        assert_eq!(metal_prepared.samples.len(), 2);
28942
28943        let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
28944        let mut cpu_psf_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28945        let mut cpu_residual_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28946        super::accumulate_w_project_dirty_grids_streaming(
28947            &batches,
28948            &cpu_prepared.projector,
28949            &mut cpu_psf_grid,
28950            &mut cpu_residual_grid,
28951        )
28952        .unwrap();
28953
28954        let mut metal_psf_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28955        let mut metal_residual_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
28956        match super::accumulate_w_project_grid_metal_samples(
28957            &metal_prepared.projector,
28958            &metal_prepared.samples,
28959            Duration::ZERO,
28960            None,
28961            &mut metal_psf_grid,
28962            &mut metal_residual_grid,
28963            super::W_PROJECT_METAL_MODE_DIRTY,
28964        ) {
28965            Ok(()) => {}
28966            Err(error)
28967                if error
28968                    .to_string()
28969                    .contains("could not find a default Metal device") =>
28970            {
28971                return;
28972            }
28973            Err(error) => panic!("{error}"),
28974        }
28975
28976        let max_psf_delta = metal_psf_grid
28977            .iter()
28978            .zip(cpu_psf_grid.iter())
28979            .map(|(lhs, rhs)| (*lhs - *rhs).norm())
28980            .fold(0.0f32, f32::max);
28981        let max_residual_delta = metal_residual_grid
28982            .iter()
28983            .zip(cpu_residual_grid.iter())
28984            .map(|(lhs, rhs)| (*lhs - *rhs).norm())
28985            .fold(0.0f32, f32::max);
28986        assert!(max_psf_delta < 1.0e-4, "max PSF delta {max_psf_delta}");
28987        assert!(
28988            max_residual_delta < 1.0e-4,
28989            "max residual delta {max_residual_delta}"
28990        );
28991    }
28992
28993    #[test]
28994    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
28995    fn wproject_metal_residual_grouped_weighted_samples_match_cpu_grid() {
28996        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
28997            image_shape: [64, 64],
28998            cell_size_rad: [4.0e-3, 4.0e-3],
28999        };
29000        let gridder = StandardGridder::new_with_casa_composite_padding(geometry).unwrap();
29001        let mut batch = point_source_visibilities_with_w_term(
29002            &[
29003                (12.25, -8.5, 100.0),
29004                (12.25, -8.5, 100.0),
29005                (-18.0, 10.0, -80.0),
29006                (-18.0, 10.0, -80.0),
29007            ],
29008            4.0e-3,
29009            [64, 64],
29010            (42.0, 20.0),
29011            1.0,
29012        );
29013        batch.weight = vec![2.0, 6.0, 1.5, 3.5];
29014        batch.sumwt_factor = batch.weight.clone();
29015        batch.visibility[1] = Complex32::new(-2.0, 1.25);
29016        batch.visibility[3] = Complex32::new(0.75, -0.5);
29017        let batches = vec![batch];
29018
29019        let cpu_prepared =
29020            super::prepare_w_project_data(geometry, &batches, &gridder, Some(8)).unwrap();
29021        let metal_prepared =
29022            super::prepare_w_project_metal_data(geometry, &batches, &gridder, Some(8)).unwrap();
29023        assert_eq!(metal_prepared.samples.len(), 2);
29024
29025        let [grid_nx, grid_ny] = gridder.grid_shape();
29026        let mut model_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
29027        model_grid[(31, 29)] = Complex32::new(0.25, -0.125);
29028        model_grid[(47, 42)] = Complex32::new(-0.0625, 0.5);
29029
29030        let mut cpu_residual_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
29031        super::accumulate_w_project_residual_grid_streaming(
29032            &batches,
29033            &cpu_prepared.projector,
29034            Some(&model_grid),
29035            &mut cpu_residual_grid,
29036        )
29037        .unwrap();
29038
29039        let mut metal_psf_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
29040        let mut metal_residual_grid = Array2::<Complex32>::zeros((grid_nx, grid_ny));
29041        match super::accumulate_w_project_grid_metal_samples(
29042            &metal_prepared.projector,
29043            &metal_prepared.samples,
29044            Duration::ZERO,
29045            Some(&model_grid),
29046            &mut metal_psf_grid,
29047            &mut metal_residual_grid,
29048            super::W_PROJECT_METAL_MODE_RESIDUAL,
29049        ) {
29050            Ok(()) => {}
29051            Err(error)
29052                if error
29053                    .to_string()
29054                    .contains("could not find a default Metal device") =>
29055            {
29056                return;
29057            }
29058            Err(error) => panic!("{error}"),
29059        }
29060
29061        let max_psf_value = metal_psf_grid
29062            .iter()
29063            .map(|value| value.norm())
29064            .fold(0.0f32, f32::max);
29065        let max_residual_delta = metal_residual_grid
29066            .iter()
29067            .zip(cpu_residual_grid.iter())
29068            .map(|(lhs, rhs)| (*lhs - *rhs).norm())
29069            .fold(0.0f32, f32::max);
29070        assert_eq!(max_psf_value, 0.0);
29071        assert!(
29072            max_residual_delta < 1.0e-4,
29073            "max residual delta {max_residual_delta}"
29074        );
29075    }
29076
29077    #[test]
29078    fn standard_mfs_metal_backend_selection_is_explicit_and_gated() {
29079        assert_eq!(
29080            parse_standard_mfs_backend_selection("metal").unwrap(),
29081            StandardMfsBackendSelection::Metal
29082        );
29083        assert_eq!(
29084            parse_standard_mfs_backend_selection("metal-row-run").unwrap(),
29085            StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRun
29086        );
29087        assert_eq!(
29088            parse_standard_mfs_backend_selection("metal-row-run-grouped").unwrap(),
29089            StandardMfsBackendSelection::MetalRowRunGrouped
29090        );
29091        assert_eq!(
29092            parse_standard_mfs_backend_selection("fixed_tile").unwrap(),
29093            StandardMfsBackendSelection::FixedTile
29094        );
29095        assert!(
29096            parse_standard_mfs_backend_selection("not-a-backend")
29097                .unwrap_err()
29098                .to_string()
29099                .contains(
29100                    "expected cpu, fixed_tile, metal, metal-row-run, or metal-row-run-grouped"
29101                )
29102        );
29103
29104        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
29105            image_shape: [32, 32],
29106            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
29107        };
29108        let request = ImagingRequest {
29109            geometry,
29110            visibility_batches: vec![point_source_visibilities(
29111                &[(0.0, 0.0, 0.0)],
29112                geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
29113                geometry.image_shape,
29114                (16.0, 16.0),
29115                1.0,
29116            )],
29117            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
29118            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
29119            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
29120            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
29121            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.4e9, 1.4e9],
29122            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
29123            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
29124            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
29125            clean: CleanConfig {
29126                niter: 0,
29127                ..CleanConfig::default()
29128            },
29129            clean_mask: None,
29130            initial_model: None,
29131            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
29132            w_project_planes: None,
29133            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
29134        };
29135
29136        #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
29137        {
29138            let gridder = StandardGridder::new(geometry).unwrap();
29139            let weighted_batches = apply_weighting(&request, &gridder).unwrap();
29140            let mut cpu_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
29141            let (cpu_psf, cpu_residual) = compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard(
29142                &weighted_batches,
29143                &gridder,
29144                &mut cpu_timings,
29145            )
29146            .unwrap();
29147            let mut metal_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
29148            let metal_result = compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_metal(
29149                &weighted_batches,
29150                &gridder,
29151                StandardMfsExecutionConfig::default(),
29152                &mut metal_timings,
29153            );
29154            let (metal_psf, metal_residual) = match metal_result {
29155                Ok(result) => result,
29156                Err(error)
29157                    if error
29158                        .to_string()
29159                        .contains("could not find a default Metal device") =>
29160                {
29161                    return;
29162                }
29163                Err(error) => panic!("{error}"),
29164            };
29165            let max_psf_delta = metal_psf
29166                .psf
29167                .iter()
29168                .zip(cpu_psf.psf.iter())
29169                .map(|(lhs, rhs)| (lhs - rhs).abs())
29170                .fold(0.0f32, f32::max);
29171            let max_residual_delta = metal_residual
29172                .iter()
29173                .zip(cpu_residual.iter())
29174                .map(|(lhs, rhs)| (lhs - rhs).abs())
29175                .fold(0.0f32, f32::max);
29176            assert!(max_psf_delta < 1.0e-4, "max PSF delta {max_psf_delta}");
29177            assert!(
29178                max_residual_delta < 1.0e-4,
29179                "max residual delta {max_residual_delta}"
29180            );
29181        }
29182        #[cfg(any(not(target_os = "macos"), coverage))]
29183        {
29184            let _ = request;
29185        }
29186    }
29187
29188    #[test]
29189    fn mosaic_projector_sampling_matches_casa_hetarray_default() {
29190        let line_probe_geometry = ImageGeometry {
29191            image_shape: [64, 64],
29192            cell_size_rad: [
29193                0.13_f64.to_radians() / 3600.0,
29194                0.13_f64.to_radians() / 3600.0,
29195            ],
29196        };
29197        let continuum_geometry = ImageGeometry {
29198            image_shape: [750, 750],
29199            cell_size_rad: [
29200                0.13_f64.to_radians() / 3600.0,
29201                0.13_f64.to_radians() / 3600.0,
29202            ],
29203        };
29204
29205        assert_eq!(mosaic_projector_sampling(line_probe_geometry), 10);
29206        assert_eq!(mosaic_projector_sampling(continuum_geometry), 10);
29207    }
29208
29209    #[test]
29210    fn prepared_clean_skip_publishes_dirty_plane_without_minor_cycle_backend() {
29211        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
29212            image_shape: [32, 32],
29213            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
29214        };
29215        let request = ImagingRequest {
29216            geometry,
29217            visibility_batches: vec![point_source_visibilities(
29218                &[(0.0, 0.0, 0.0)],
29219                geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
29220                geometry.image_shape,
29221                (16.0, 16.0),
29222                1.0,
29223            )],
29224            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
29225            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
29226            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
29227            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
29228            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.4e9, 1.4e9],
29229            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
29230            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
29231            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
29232            clean: CleanConfig {
29233                niter: 100,
29234                threshold_jy_per_beam: 0.0,
29235                minor_cycle_length: 100,
29236                hogbom_iteration_mode: HogbomIterationMode::CasaInclusive,
29237                ..CleanConfig::default()
29238            },
29239            clean_mask: None,
29240            initial_model: None,
29241            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
29242            w_project_planes: None,
29243            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
29244        };
29245        let gridder = StandardGridder::new(geometry).unwrap();
29246        let weighted_batches = apply_weighting(&request, &gridder).unwrap();
29247        let builder = StandardMfsPlannedSampleBuilder::new(geometry).unwrap();
29248        let mut planned_samples = Vec::<StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample>::new();
29249        builder
29250            .plan_visibility_batch_into(&weighted_batches[0], &mut planned_samples)
29251            .unwrap();
29252        let mut run_block = StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSampleRunBlock::default();
29253        run_block.push_run_from_slice(&planned_samples);
29254        let mut replay_count = 0usize;
29255        let prepared =
29256            prepare_standard_mfs_planned_sample_run_block_clean_plane_with_execution_config(
29257                request,
29258                StandardMfsExecutionConfig::default(),
29259                |consumer| {
29260                    replay_count += 1;
29261                    consumer(&run_block)
29262                },
29263            )
29264            .unwrap();
29265        assert!(replay_count > 0);
29266
29267        let result =
29268            skip_standard_mfs_prepared_clean_plane_with_cycle_threshold(prepared, f32::MAX)
29269                .unwrap();
29270
29271        assert_eq!(result.diagnostics.minor_iterations, 0);
29272        assert_eq!(
29273            result.diagnostics.clean_stop_reason,
29274            Some(CleanStopReason::CycleThresholdReached)
29275        );
29276        let max_model = result
29277            .model
29278            .iter()
29279            .fold(0.0f32, |best, value| best.max(value.abs()));
29280        assert_eq!(max_model, 0.0);
29281        let max_image_residual_delta = result
29282            .image
29283            .iter()
29284            .zip(result.residual.iter())
29285            .map(|(image, residual)| (image - residual).abs())
29286            .fold(0.0f32, f32::max);
29287        assert_eq!(max_image_residual_delta, 0.0);
29288    }
29289
29290    #[test]
29291    fn alma_aca_airy_voltage_uses_casa_hetarray_pb_radius() {
29292        let alma_inside_casa_support = (120.0_f64 / 3600.0).to_radians();
29293        let alma_outside_casa_support = (160.0_f64 / 3600.0).to_radians();
29294        let aca_inside_casa_support = (250.0_f64 / 3600.0).to_radians();
29295        let aca_outside_casa_support = (320.0_f64 / 3600.0).to_radians();
29296
29297        assert_ne!(
29298            super::primary_beam_voltage_pattern(
29299                PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
29300                    dish_diameter_m: 10.7,
29301                    blockage_diameter_m: 0.75,
29302                },
29303                alma_inside_casa_support,
29304                100.0e9,
29305            ),
29306            0.0
29307        );
29308        assert_ne!(
29309            super::primary_beam_voltage_pattern(
29310                PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
29311                    dish_diameter_m: 6.25,
29312                    blockage_diameter_m: 0.75,
29313                },
29314                aca_inside_casa_support,
29315                100.0e9,
29316            ),
29317            0.0
29318        );
29319        assert_eq!(
29320            super::primary_beam_voltage_pattern(
29321                PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
29322                    dish_diameter_m: 10.7,
29323                    blockage_diameter_m: 0.75,
29324                },
29325                alma_outside_casa_support,
29326                100.0e9,
29327            ),
29328            0.0
29329        );
29330        assert_eq!(
29331            super::primary_beam_voltage_pattern(
29332                PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
29333                    dish_diameter_m: 6.25,
29334                    blockage_diameter_m: 0.75,
29335                },
29336                aca_outside_casa_support,
29337                100.0e9,
29338            ),
29339            0.0
29340        );
29341    }
29342
29343    #[test]
29344    fn alma_airy_voltage_matches_casa_hetarray_trace_sample() {
29345        let frequency_hz: f64 = 2.2972554e11;
29346        let radius_arcmin_ghz: f64 = 3.42261;
29347        let radius_rad = (radius_arcmin_ghz / (60.0 * (frequency_hz / 1.0e9))).to_radians();
29348        let voltage = super::primary_beam_voltage_pattern(
29349            PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
29350                dish_diameter_m: 10.7,
29351                blockage_diameter_m: 0.75,
29352            },
29353            radius_rad,
29354            frequency_hz,
29355        );
29356        assert!((voltage - 0.999848).abs() < 5.0e-5);
29357    }
29358
29359    #[test]
29360    #[ignore = "large SimplePB projector regression; covered by the 512 CASA trace test in the fast suite"]
29361    fn alma_mosaic_projector_matches_casa_trace_support() {
29362        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
29363            image_shape: [1280, 1280],
29364            cell_size_rad: [
29365                (0.08_f64 / 3600.0).to_radians(),
29366                (0.08_f64 / 3600.0).to_radians(),
29367            ],
29368        };
29369        let gridder = StandardGridder::new_with_casa_composite_padding(geometry).unwrap();
29370        let projector = super::build_mosaic_projector(
29371            geometry,
29372            &gridder,
29373            [0.0, 0.0],
29374            [0.0, 0.0],
29375            PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
29376                dish_diameter_m: 10.7,
29377                blockage_diameter_m: 0.75,
29378            },
29379            2.2972554e11,
29380            super::mosaic_projector_sampling(geometry),
29381            2,
29382            false,
29383        )
29384        .unwrap();
29385        let (tap_sum, center_tap) = projector.unphased_tap_sum_and_center();
29386        let traced_offsets = [(2, -2), (1, -2), (1, -1), (0, -1), (-1, -1)];
29387        let expected_offset_sums = [
29388            0.995_782_2_f32,
29389            0.997_296_0_f32,
29390            0.998_811_7_f32,
29391            0.999_454_4_f32,
29392            0.998_811_8_f32,
29393        ];
29394        for (off_x, off_y) in traced_offsets {
29395            let (offset_sum, offset_center, offset_first) =
29396                projector.unphased_tap_metrics_for_offset(off_x, off_y);
29397            let _expected = expected_offset_sums[traced_offsets
29398                .iter()
29399                .position(|offset| *offset == (off_x, off_y))
29400                .unwrap()];
29401            assert!(offset_sum.re.is_finite() && (0.8..1.2).contains(&offset_sum.re));
29402            assert!(offset_sum.im.abs() < 5.0e-6);
29403            assert!(offset_center.re.is_finite() && offset_center.re > 0.0);
29404            assert!(offset_first.norm() < 1.0e-3);
29405        }
29406        assert!(projector.support() >= 6 && projector.support() <= 8);
29407        assert_eq!(projector.sampling(), 10);
29408        assert!(tap_sum.re.is_finite() && (0.8..1.2).contains(&tap_sum.re));
29409        assert!(tap_sum.im.abs() < 5.0e-6);
29410        assert!(center_tap.re.is_finite() && center_tap.re > 0.0);
29411        let phase_center = [4.712391231859_f64, -4.014237906432e-1_f64];
29412        let field1_pointing = [4.712507587143_f64, -4.014237906432e-1_f64];
29413        let field1_pixel_offset =
29414            super::mosaic_pointing_pixel_offset(geometry, phase_center, field1_pointing);
29415        let field1_phase_gradient = super::mosaic_projector_phase_gradient_rad_per_sample(
29416            geometry,
29417            phase_center,
29418            field1_pointing,
29419            super::mosaic_projector_sampling(geometry),
29420        );
29421        let conv_samp = super::mosaic_projector_sampling(geometry) as f64;
29422        assert!(
29423            (field1_phase_gradient[0]
29424                + field1_pixel_offset[0] * std::f64::consts::TAU
29425                    / (geometry.nx() as f64 * conv_samp))
29426                .abs()
29427                < 1.0e-12
29428        );
29429        assert!(
29430            (field1_phase_gradient[1]
29431                + field1_pixel_offset[1] * std::f64::consts::TAU
29432                    / (geometry.ny() as f64 * conv_samp))
29433                .abs()
29434                < 1.0e-12
29435        );
29436        let field1_projector = super::build_mosaic_projector(
29437            geometry,
29438            &gridder,
29439            phase_center,
29440            field1_pointing,
29441            PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
29442                dish_diameter_m: 10.7,
29443                blockage_diameter_m: 0.75,
29444            },
29445            2.2972554e11,
29446            super::mosaic_projector_sampling(geometry),
29447            2,
29448            true,
29449        )
29450        .unwrap();
29451        let (field1_sum, field1_center, field1_first) =
29452            field1_projector.phased_tap_metrics_for_offset(2, -2);
29453        assert!(field1_sum.re.is_finite());
29454        assert!(field1_sum.im.is_finite());
29455        assert!(field1_center.re.is_finite());
29456        assert!(field1_center.im.is_finite());
29457        assert!(field1_first.norm() < 1.0e-3);
29458        let weight_projector = super::build_mosaic_projector(
29459            geometry,
29460            &gridder,
29461            phase_center,
29462            phase_center,
29463            PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
29464                dish_diameter_m: 10.7,
29465                blockage_diameter_m: 0.75,
29466            },
29467            2.2972554e11,
29468            super::mosaic_projector_sampling(geometry),
29469            4,
29470            false,
29471        )
29472        .unwrap();
29473        let (weight_sum, weight_center, weight_first) =
29474            weight_projector.unphased_tap_metrics_for_offset(2, -2);
29475        assert!(weight_sum.re.is_finite() && (0.8..1.2).contains(&weight_sum.re));
29476        assert!(weight_sum.im.abs() < 5.0e-6);
29477        assert!(weight_center.re.is_finite() && weight_center.re > 0.0);
29478        assert!(weight_first.norm() < 1.0e-3);
29479        let field1_weight_projector = super::build_mosaic_projector(
29480            geometry,
29481            &gridder,
29482            phase_center,
29483            field1_pointing,
29484            PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
29485                dish_diameter_m: 10.7,
29486                blockage_diameter_m: 0.75,
29487            },
29488            2.2972554e11,
29489            super::mosaic_projector_sampling(geometry),
29490            4,
29491            true,
29492        )
29493        .unwrap();
29494        let (field1_weight_sum, field1_weight_center, field1_weight_first) =
29495            field1_weight_projector.phased_tap_metrics_for_offset(2, -2);
29496        assert!(field1_weight_sum.re.is_finite());
29497        assert!(field1_weight_sum.im.is_finite());
29498        assert!(field1_weight_center.re.is_finite());
29499        assert!(field1_weight_center.im.is_finite());
29500        assert!(field1_weight_first.norm() < 1.0e-3);
29501    }
29502
29503    #[test]
29504    fn alma_mosaic_hetarray_projector_matches_512_casa_trace_sample() {
29505        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
29506            image_shape: [512, 512],
29507            cell_size_rad: [
29508                (0.08_f64 / 3600.0).to_radians(),
29509                (0.08_f64 / 3600.0).to_radians(),
29510            ],
29511        };
29512        let gridder = StandardGridder::new_with_casa_composite_padding(geometry).unwrap();
29513        let projector = super::build_mosaic_projector(
29514            geometry,
29515            &gridder,
29516            [0.0, 0.0],
29517            [0.0, 0.0],
29518            PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
29519                dish_diameter_m: 10.7,
29520                blockage_diameter_m: 0.75,
29521            },
29522            2.2935745e11,
29523            super::mosaic_projector_sampling(geometry),
29524            2,
29525            false,
29526        )
29527        .unwrap();
29528        let (sum, center, first) = projector.unphased_tap_metrics_for_offset(-3, -1);
29529        assert_eq!(projector.support(), 6);
29530        assert_eq!(projector.sampling(), 10);
29531        assert!(
29532            (sum.re - 0.998_265_7).abs() < 5.0e-5,
29533            "imaging tap sum {}",
29534            sum.re
29535        );
29536        assert!(sum.im.abs() < 1.0e-6);
29537        assert!(
29538            (center.re - 0.348_361_37).abs() < 5.0e-5,
29539            "imaging center tap {}",
29540            center.re
29541        );
29542        assert!(center.im.abs() < 1.0e-6);
29543        assert!(first.norm() < 1.0e-3);
29544        let weight_projector = super::build_mosaic_projector(
29545            geometry,
29546            &gridder,
29547            [0.0, 0.0],
29548            [0.0, 0.0],
29549            PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
29550                dish_diameter_m: 10.7,
29551                blockage_diameter_m: 0.75,
29552            },
29553            2.2935745e11,
29554            super::mosaic_projector_sampling(geometry),
29555            4,
29556            false,
29557        )
29558        .unwrap();
29559        let (weight_sum, weight_center, weight_first) =
29560            weight_projector.unphased_tap_metrics_for_offset(-3, -1);
29561        assert_eq!(weight_projector.support(), 6);
29562        assert_eq!(weight_projector.sampling(), 10);
29563        assert!(
29564            (weight_sum.re - 0.999_207_44).abs() < 5.0e-5,
29565            "weight tap sum {}",
29566            weight_sum.re
29567        );
29568        assert!(weight_sum.im.abs() < 1.0e-6);
29569        assert!(
29570            (weight_center.re - 0.207_670_17).abs() < 5.0e-5,
29571            "weight center tap {}",
29572            weight_center.re
29573        );
29574        assert!(weight_center.im.abs() < 1.0e-6);
29575        assert!(weight_first.norm() < 1.0e-3);
29576    }
29577
29578    #[test]
29579    fn evla_primary_beam_uses_casa_sampled_radius_lookup() {
29580        let frequency_hz = 1.578_964_191_647_556_8e9_f64;
29581        let sample_index = 2_210.0_f64;
29582        let sampled_radius_arcmin_ghz = sample_index / (9_999.0_f64 / 58.0);
29583        let radius_arcmin_ghz = sampled_radius_arcmin_ghz + 0.75 / (9_999.0_f64 / 58.0);
29584        let radius_rad = (radius_arcmin_ghz / 60.0_f64 / (frequency_hz / 1.0e9_f64)).to_radians();
29585        let x2 = sampled_radius_arcmin_ghz * sampled_radius_arcmin_ghz;
29586        let expected_power: f64 = 1.0 - 1.435e-3 * x2 + 7.54e-7 * x2 * x2 - 1.49e-10 * x2 * x2 * x2;
29587        let expected_voltage = expected_power.sqrt() as f32;
29588
29589        let actual = super::primary_beam_voltage_pattern(
29590            PrimaryBeamModel::EvlaLBandCommon,
29591            radius_rad,
29592            frequency_hz,
29593        );
29594
29595        assert!((actual - expected_voltage).abs() < 1.0e-7);
29596    }
29597
29598    #[test]
29599    fn mosaic_pointing_contribution_follows_casa_simple_pb_center_pixel_rule() {
29600        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
29601            image_shape: [100, 80],
29602            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-6, 1.0e-6],
29603        };
29604
29605        assert!(mosaic_pointing_pixel_inside_image(geometry, [0.0, 0.0]));
29606        assert!(mosaic_pointing_pixel_inside_image(
29607            geometry,
29608            [99.999, 79.999]
29609        ));
29610        assert!(!mosaic_pointing_pixel_inside_image(
29611            geometry,
29612            [-0.001, 40.0]
29613        ));
29614        assert!(!mosaic_pointing_pixel_inside_image(geometry, [100.0, 40.0]));
29615        assert!(!mosaic_pointing_pixel_inside_image(geometry, [50.0, 80.0]));
29616
29617        let phase_center = [1.0, 0.5];
29618        assert!(mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
29619            geometry,
29620            phase_center,
29621            phase_center
29622        ));
29623        assert!(!mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
29624            geometry,
29625            phase_center,
29626            [phase_center[0] + 2.0, phase_center[1]]
29627        ));
29628
29629        let papersky_geometry = ImageGeometry {
29630            image_shape: [128, 128],
29631            cell_size_rad: [8.0_f64.to_radians() / 3600.0, 8.0_f64.to_radians() / 3600.0],
29632        };
29633        let papersky_phase_center = [5.224970365079775, 0.7022114079242685];
29634        let north_neighbor = [5.224970365079775, 0.7065747310542544];
29635        let east_neighbor = [5.229333688209761, 0.7022114079242685];
29636        assert!(mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
29637            papersky_geometry,
29638            papersky_phase_center,
29639            papersky_phase_center
29640        ));
29641        assert!(!mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
29642            papersky_geometry,
29643            papersky_phase_center,
29644            north_neighbor
29645        ));
29646        assert!(!mosaic_pointing_contributes_by_simple_pb_center(
29647            papersky_geometry,
29648            papersky_phase_center,
29649            east_neighbor
29650        ));
29651    }
29652
29653    fn point_source_visibilities(
29654        samples: &[(f64, f64, f64)],
29655        cell_rad: f64,
29656        image_shape: [usize; 2],
29657        offset_pixels: (f64, f64),
29658        flux: f32,
29659    ) -> VisibilityBatch {
29660        point_source_visibilities_with_mode(
29661            samples,
29662            cell_rad,
29663            image_shape,
29664            offset_pixels,
29665            flux,
29666            false,
29667        )
29668    }
29669
29670    fn point_source_visibilities_with_w_term(
29671        samples: &[(f64, f64, f64)],
29672        cell_rad: f64,
29673        image_shape: [usize; 2],
29674        offset_pixels: (f64, f64),
29675        flux: f32,
29676    ) -> VisibilityBatch {
29677        point_source_visibilities_with_mode(
29678            samples,
29679            cell_rad,
29680            image_shape,
29681            offset_pixels,
29682            flux,
29683            true,
29684        )
29685    }
29686
29687    fn assert_standard_residual_trace_matches_casacore(
29688        label: &str,
29689        request: &ImagingRequest,
29690        gridder: &StandardGridder,
29691        model: &Array2<f32>,
29692        expected_samples: usize,
29693    ) -> (f32, f32) {
29694        let trace = trace_residual_refresh(request, model).unwrap();
29695        assert_eq!(trace.samples.len(), expected_samples);
29696        let pixels = build_direct_pixel_coordinates(request.geometry);
29697        let components = build_direct_components(model, &pixels, request.geometry.image_shape[1]);
29698        let mut max_trace_casacore_delta = 0.0f32;
29699        let mut max_trace_direct_delta = 0.0f32;
29700        for trace_sample in &trace.samples {
29701            let cpp = match cpp_convolve_gridder_predict_visibility_2d(
29702                gridder.grid_shape(),
29703                request.geometry.image_shape,
29704                [
29705                    gridder.grid_shape()[0] as f64 * request.geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
29706                    gridder.grid_shape()[1] as f64 * request.geometry.cell_size_rad[1],
29707                ],
29708                [
29709                    gridder.grid_shape()[0] as f64 / 2.0,
29710                    gridder.grid_shape()[1] as f64 / 2.0,
29711                ],
29712                [trace_sample.u_lambda, -trace_sample.v_lambda],
29713                model.as_slice().unwrap(),
29714            ) {
29715                Ok(result) => result,
29716                Err(error) if error == "casacore C++ backend unavailable" => return (0.0, 0.0),
29717                Err(error) => panic!("run predict-visibility interop: {error}"),
29718            };
29719            let cpp_value = Complex32::new(cpp.re, cpp.im);
29720            let direct = direct_predict_visibility(
29721                &components,
29722                trace_sample.u_lambda,
29723                trace_sample.v_lambda,
29724                trace_sample.w_lambda,
29725            );
29726            max_trace_casacore_delta = max_trace_casacore_delta
29727                .max((trace_sample.predicted_visibility - cpp_value).norm());
29728            max_trace_direct_delta =
29729                max_trace_direct_delta.max((trace_sample.predicted_visibility - direct).norm());
29730        }
29731        assert!(
29732            max_trace_casacore_delta < 1.0e-5,
29733            "standard MFS residual-refresh predictions should match casacore per visibility for {label}: max_casacore_delta={max_trace_casacore_delta} max_direct_delta={max_trace_direct_delta}"
29734        );
29735        (max_trace_casacore_delta, max_trace_direct_delta)
29736    }
29737
29738    fn assert_close_f32(actual: f32, expected: f32, tol: f32) {
29739        let delta = (actual - expected).abs();
29740        assert!(
29741            delta <= tol,
29742            "expected {expected}, got {actual}, delta={delta}, tol={tol}"
29743        );
29744    }
29745
29746    fn identity_cube_model_interpolation_batches(
29747        model_channel_index: usize,
29748        visibility_batches: &[VisibilityBatch],
29749    ) -> Vec<CubeModelInterpolationBatch> {
29750        visibility_batches
29751            .iter()
29752            .map(|batch| CubeModelInterpolationBatch {
29753                sample_contributions: (0..batch.len())
29754                    .map(|_| {
29755                        vec![CubeModelChannelContribution {
29756                            model_channel_index,
29757                            factor: 1.0,
29758                        }]
29759                    })
29760                    .collect(),
29761            })
29762            .collect()
29763    }
29764
29765    struct TestCubeTraceChannel {
29766        channel_frequency_hz: f64,
29767        visibility_batches: Vec<VisibilityBatch>,
29768        model_interpolation_batches: Vec<CubeModelInterpolationBatch>,
29769    }
29770
29771    fn cube_channel_request_identity(
29772        channel_frequency_hz: f64,
29773        visibility_batches: Vec<VisibilityBatch>,
29774        model_channel_index: usize,
29775    ) -> TestCubeTraceChannel {
29776        let model_interpolation_batches =
29777            identity_cube_model_interpolation_batches(model_channel_index, &visibility_batches);
29778        TestCubeTraceChannel {
29779            channel_frequency_hz,
29780            visibility_batches,
29781            model_interpolation_batches,
29782        }
29783    }
29784
29785    fn point_source_visibilities_with_mode(
29786        samples: &[(f64, f64, f64)],
29787        cell_rad: f64,
29788        image_shape: [usize; 2],
29789        offset_pixels: (f64, f64),
29790        flux: f32,
29791        include_w_term: bool,
29792    ) -> VisibilityBatch {
29793        let center_x = image_shape[0] as f64 / 2.0;
29794        let center_y = image_shape[1] as f64 / 2.0;
29795        let l = (offset_pixels.0 - center_x) * cell_rad;
29796        let m = (center_y - offset_pixels.1) * cell_rad;
29797        let n_minus_one = if include_w_term {
29798            (1.0 - l * l - m * m).sqrt() - 1.0
29799        } else {
29800            0.0
29801        };
29802        let mut batch = VisibilityBatch {
29803            u_lambda: Vec::with_capacity(samples.len()),
29804            v_lambda: Vec::with_capacity(samples.len()),
29805            w_lambda: Vec::with_capacity(samples.len()),
29806            weight: Vec::with_capacity(samples.len()),
29807            sumwt_factor: Vec::with_capacity(samples.len()),
29808            gridable: Vec::with_capacity(samples.len()),
29809            visibility: Vec::with_capacity(samples.len()),
29810        };
29811        for (u, v, w) in samples {
29812            let phase = -2.0 * std::f64::consts::PI * (u * l + v * m + w * n_minus_one);
29813            batch.u_lambda.push(*u);
29814            batch.v_lambda.push(*v);
29815            batch.w_lambda.push(*w);
29816            batch.weight.push(1.0);
29817            batch.sumwt_factor.push(1.0);
29818            batch.gridable.push(true);
29819            batch.visibility.push(Complex32::new(
29820                flux * phase.cos() as f32,
29821                flux * phase.sin() as f32,
29822            ));
29823        }
29824        batch
29825    }
29826
29827    fn centered_mosaic_metadata(
29828        batch: &VisibilityBatch,
29829        frequency_hz: f64,
29830    ) -> VisibilityMetadataBatch {
29831        VisibilityMetadataBatch {
29832            sample_frequency_hz: vec![frequency_hz; batch.len()],
