29833            beam_frequency_hz: vec![frequency_hz; batch.len()],
29834            primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
29835                dish_diameter_m: 25.0,
29836                blockage_diameter_m: 1.0,
29837            },
29838            pointing_direction_rad: vec![[0.0, 0.0]; batch.len()],
29839        }
29840    }
29841
29842    fn assert_array4_close(actual: &Array4<f32>, expected: &Array4<f32>, tolerance: f32) {
29843        assert_eq!(actual.dim(), expected.dim());
29844        let max_abs = actual
29845            .iter()
29846            .zip(expected.iter())
29847            .map(|(actual, expected)| (actual - expected).abs())
29848            .fold(0.0f32, f32::max);
29849        assert!(
29850            max_abs <= tolerance,
29851            "max abs difference {max_abs:.6e} exceeded tolerance {tolerance:.6e}"
29852        );
29853    }
29854
29855    #[test]
29856    fn owned_standard_mfs_briggs_clean_matches_borrowed_run() {
29857        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
29858            image_shape: [64, 64],
29859            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
29860        };
29861        let samples = [
29862            (-95.0, -35.0, 0.0),
29863            (-70.0, 40.0, 0.0),
29864            (-35.0, -80.0, 0.0),
29865            (22.0, 75.0, 0.0),
29866            (55.0, -25.0, 0.0),
29867            (105.0, 50.0, 0.0),
29868        ];
29869        let request = ImagingRequest {
29870            geometry,
29871            visibility_batches: vec![point_source_visibilities(
29872                &samples,
29873                geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
29874                geometry.image_shape,
29875                (34.0, 30.0),
29876                1.0,
29877            )],
29878            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
29879            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
29880            weighting: WeightingMode::Briggs { robust: 0.5 },
29881            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
29882            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.399e9, 1.401e9],
29883            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
29884            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
29885            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
29886            clean: CleanConfig {
29887                niter: 4,
29888                gain: 0.2,
29889                minor_cycle_length: 2,
29890                ..CleanConfig::default()
29891            },
29892            clean_mask: None,
29893            initial_model: None,
29894            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
29895            w_project_planes: None,
29896            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
29897        };
29898
29899        let borrowed = run_imaging(&request).unwrap();
29900        let owned = run_imaging_owned(request).unwrap();
29901
29902        assert_eq!(owned.psf, borrowed.psf);
29903        assert_eq!(owned.residual, borrowed.residual);
29904        assert_eq!(owned.model, borrowed.model);
29905        assert_eq!(owned.image, borrowed.image);
29906        assert_eq!(owned.sumwt, borrowed.sumwt);
29907        assert_eq!(
29908            owned.diagnostics.minor_iterations,
29909            borrowed.diagnostics.minor_iterations
29910        );
29911        assert_eq!(
29912            owned.diagnostics.clean_stop_reason,
29913            borrowed.diagnostics.clean_stop_reason
29914        );
29915    }
29916
29917    #[test]
29918    fn streaming_weighted_standard_mfs_clean_matches_retained_batches() {
29919        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
29920            image_shape: [64, 64],
29921            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
29922        };
29923        let samples = [
29924            (-95.0, -35.0, 0.0),
29925            (-70.0, 40.0, 0.0),
29926            (-35.0, -80.0, 0.0),
29927            (22.0, 75.0, 0.0),
29928            (55.0, -25.0, 0.0),
29929            (105.0, 50.0, 0.0),
29930        ];
29931        let request = ImagingRequest {
29932            geometry,
29933            visibility_batches: vec![point_source_visibilities(
29934                &samples,
29935                geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
29936                geometry.image_shape,
29937                (34.0, 30.0),
29938                1.0,
29939            )],
29940            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
29941            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
29942            weighting: WeightingMode::Briggs { robust: 0.5 },
29943            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
29944            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.399e9, 1.401e9],
29945            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
29946            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
29947            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
29948            clean: CleanConfig {
29949                niter: 4,
29950                gain: 0.2,
29951                minor_cycle_length: 2,
29952                ..CleanConfig::default()
29953            },
29954            clean_mask: None,
29955            initial_model: None,
29956            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
29957            w_project_planes: None,
29958            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
29959        };
29960        let gridder = StandardGridder::new(geometry).unwrap();
29961        let weighted_batches = apply_weighting(&request, &gridder).unwrap();
29962        let retained = run_imaging(&request).unwrap();
29963        let mut streaming_request = request.clone();
29964        streaming_request.visibility_batches.clear();
29965        let execution_config = StandardMfsExecutionConfig {
29966            minor_cycle_backend: StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend::Cpu,
29967            fixed_tile_resident_bytes: Some(usize::MAX),
29968            fixed_tile_edge: Some(16),
29969            fixed_tile_center_boundary: false,
29970            fixed_tile_max_live_row_blocks: 1,
29971            ..StandardMfsExecutionConfig::default()
29972        };
29973        let streaming = run_standard_mfs_plan(StandardMfsPlan::weighted_batches(
29974            streaming_request,
29975            execution_config,
29976            |consumer| {
29977                for batch in &weighted_batches {
29978                    consumer(vec![batch.clone()])?;
29979                }
29980                Ok(())
29981            },
29982        ))
29983        .unwrap();
29984
29985        assert_array4_close(&streaming.psf, &retained.psf, 1.0e-5);
29986        assert_array4_close(&streaming.residual, &retained.residual, 1.0e-5);
29987        assert_array4_close(&streaming.model, &retained.model, 1.0e-5);
29988        assert_array4_close(&streaming.image, &retained.image, 1.0e-5);
29989        assert_eq!(
29990            streaming.diagnostics.minor_iterations,
29991            retained.diagnostics.minor_iterations
29992        );
29993        assert_eq!(
29994            streaming.diagnostics.clean_stop_reason,
29995            retained.diagnostics.clean_stop_reason
29996        );
29997    }
29998
29999    #[test]
30000    fn sample_streaming_weighted_standard_mfs_clean_matches_batch_streaming() {
30001        // Internal adapter coverage: public callers enter through
30002        // StandardMfsPlan, while these test-only helpers prove the scalar
30003        // sample adapters remain equivalent to the public weighted-batch path.
30004        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
30005            image_shape: [64, 64],
30006            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
30007        };
30008        let samples = [
30009            (-95.0, -35.0, 0.0),
30010            (-70.0, 40.0, 0.0),
30011            (-35.0, -80.0, 0.0),
30012            (22.0, 75.0, 0.0),
30013            (55.0, -25.0, 0.0),
30014            (105.0, 50.0, 0.0),
30015        ];
30016        let request = ImagingRequest {
30017            geometry,
30018            visibility_batches: Vec::new(),
30019            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
30020            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
30021            weighting: WeightingMode::Briggs { robust: 0.5 },
30022            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
30023            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.399e9, 1.401e9],
30024            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
30025            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
30026            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
30027            clean: CleanConfig {
30028                niter: 4,
30029                gain: 0.2,
30030                minor_cycle_length: 2,
30031                ..CleanConfig::default()
30032            },
30033            clean_mask: None,
30034            initial_model: None,
30035            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
30036            w_project_planes: None,
30037            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
30038        };
30039        let weighted_batches = vec![point_source_visibilities(
30040            &samples,
30041            geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
30042            geometry.image_shape,
30043            (34.0, 30.0),
30044            1.0,
30045        )];
30046        let execution_config = StandardMfsExecutionConfig {
30047            minor_cycle_backend: StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend::Cpu,
30048            fixed_tile_resident_bytes: Some(usize::MAX),
30049            fixed_tile_edge: Some(16),
30050            fixed_tile_center_boundary: false,
30051            fixed_tile_max_live_row_blocks: 1,
30052            ..StandardMfsExecutionConfig::default()
30053        };
30054        let batch_streaming = run_standard_mfs_plan(StandardMfsPlan::weighted_batches(
30055            request.clone(),
30056            execution_config,
30057            |consumer| {
30058                for batch in &weighted_batches {
30059                    consumer(vec![batch.clone()])?;
30060                }
30061                Ok(())
30062            },
30063        ))
30064        .unwrap();
30065        let block_streaming =
30066            run_standard_mfs_weighted_sample_block_streaming_with_execution_config(
30067                request.clone(),
30068                execution_config,
30069                |consumer| {
30070                    let mut block = Vec::<StandardMfsWeightedSample>::new();
30071                    for batch in &weighted_batches {
30072                        block.clear();
30073                        for sample_index in 0..batch.len() {
30074                            block.push(StandardMfsWeightedSample {
30075                                u_lambda: batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
30076                                v_lambda: batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
30077                                w_lambda: batch.w_lambda[sample_index],
30078                                weight: batch.weight[sample_index],
30079                                sumwt_factor: batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index],
30080                                gridable: batch.gridable[sample_index],
30081                                visibility: batch.visibility[sample_index],
30082                            });
30083                        }
30084                        consumer(&block)?;
30085                    }
30086                    Ok(())
30087                },
30088            )
30089            .unwrap();
30090        let planned_builder = StandardMfsPlannedSampleBuilder::new(geometry).unwrap();
30091        let planned_streaming =
30092            run_standard_mfs_planned_sample_block_streaming_with_execution_config(
30093                request.clone(),
30094                execution_config,
30095                |consumer| {
30096                    let mut block = Vec::<StandardMfsPlannedWeightedSample>::new();
30097                    for batch in &weighted_batches {
30098                        block.clear();
30099                        for sample_index in 0..batch.len() {
30100                            let sample = StandardMfsWeightedSample {
30101                                u_lambda: batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
30102                                v_lambda: batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
30103                                w_lambda: batch.w_lambda[sample_index],
30104                                weight: batch.weight[sample_index],
30105                                sumwt_factor: batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index],
30106                                gridable: batch.gridable[sample_index],
30107                                visibility: batch.visibility[sample_index],
30108                            };
30109                            if let Some(planned) = planned_builder.plan_sample(sample)? {
30110                                block.push(planned);
30111                            }
30112                        }
30113                        consumer(&block)?;
30114                    }
30115                    Ok(())
30116                },
30117            )
30118            .unwrap();
30119        let sample_streaming = run_standard_mfs_weighted_sample_streaming_with_execution_config(
30120            request,
30121            execution_config,
30122            |consumer| {
30123                for batch in &weighted_batches {
30124                    for sample_index in 0..batch.len() {
30125                        consumer(StandardMfsWeightedSample {
30126                            u_lambda: batch.u_lambda[sample_index],
30127                            v_lambda: batch.v_lambda[sample_index],
30128                            w_lambda: batch.w_lambda[sample_index],
30129                            weight: batch.weight[sample_index],
30130                            sumwt_factor: batch.sumwt_factor[sample_index],
30131                            gridable: batch.gridable[sample_index],
30132                            visibility: batch.visibility[sample_index],
30133                        })?;
30134                    }
30135                }
30136                Ok(())
30137            },
30138        )
30139        .unwrap();
30140
30141        assert_array4_close(&block_streaming.psf, &batch_streaming.psf, 1.0e-5);
30142        assert_array4_close(&block_streaming.residual, &batch_streaming.residual, 1.0e-5);
30143        assert_array4_close(&block_streaming.model, &batch_streaming.model, 1.0e-5);
30144        assert_array4_close(&block_streaming.image, &batch_streaming.image, 1.0e-5);
30145        assert_array4_close(&planned_streaming.psf, &batch_streaming.psf, 1.0e-5);
30146        assert_array4_close(
30147            &planned_streaming.residual,
30148            &batch_streaming.residual,
30149            1.0e-5,
30150        );
30151        assert_array4_close(&planned_streaming.model, &batch_streaming.model, 1.0e-5);
30152        assert_array4_close(&planned_streaming.image, &batch_streaming.image, 1.0e-5);
30153        assert_array4_close(&sample_streaming.psf, &batch_streaming.psf, 1.0e-5);
30154        assert_array4_close(
30155            &sample_streaming.residual,
30156            &batch_streaming.residual,
30157            1.0e-5,
30158        );
30159        assert_array4_close(&sample_streaming.model, &batch_streaming.model, 1.0e-5);
30160        assert_array4_close(&sample_streaming.image, &batch_streaming.image, 1.0e-5);
30161        assert_eq!(
30162            sample_streaming.diagnostics.minor_iterations,
30163            batch_streaming.diagnostics.minor_iterations
30164        );
30165        assert_eq!(
30166            sample_streaming.diagnostics.clean_stop_reason,
30167            batch_streaming.diagnostics.clean_stop_reason
30168        );
30169    }
30170
30171    #[test]
30172    fn mosaic_clean_reduces_residual_peak_and_tracks_pb_weight_image() {
30173        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
30174            image_shape: [64, 64],
30175            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
30176        };
30177        let samples = [
30178            (-95.0, -35.0, 0.0),
30179            (-70.0, 40.0, 0.0),
30180            (-35.0, -80.0, 0.0),
30181            (22.0, 75.0, 0.0),
30182            (55.0, -25.0, 0.0),
30183            (105.0, 50.0, 0.0),
30184        ];
30185        let batch = point_source_visibilities(
30186            &samples,
30187            geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
30188            geometry.image_shape,
30189            (34.0, 30.0),
30190            1.0,
30191        );
30192        let metadata = centered_mosaic_metadata(&batch, 1.4e9);
30193        let gridder_mode = GridderMode::Mosaic(MosaicGridderConfig {
30194            phase_center_direction_rad: [0.0, 0.0],
30195            primary_beam_model: PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
30196                dish_diameter_m: 25.0,
30197                blockage_diameter_m: 0.0,
30198            },
30199            pb_limit: 0.1,
30200            metadata_batches: vec![metadata],
30201            grouped_metadata_batches: Vec::new(),
30202        });
30203        let request = |niter| ImagingRequest {
30204            geometry,
30205            visibility_batches: vec![batch.clone()],
30206            gridder_mode: gridder_mode.clone(),
30207            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
30208            weighting: WeightingMode::Briggs { robust: 0.5 },
30209            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
30210            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.399e9, 1.401e9],
30211            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
30212            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
30213            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
30214            clean: CleanConfig {
30215                niter,
30216                gain: 0.2,
30217                minor_cycle_length: 2,
30218                ..CleanConfig::default()
30219            },
30220            clean_mask: None,
30221            initial_model: None,
30222            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
30223            w_project_planes: None,
30224            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
30225        };
30226        let dirty = run_imaging(&request(0)).unwrap();
30227        let clean = run_imaging(&request(8)).unwrap();
30228
30229        assert!(clean.diagnostics.mosaic_weight_image.is_some());
30230        assert!(clean.diagnostics.minor_iterations > 0);
30231        assert!(clean.diagnostics.major_cycles > 0);
30232        assert_eq!(
30233            clean.diagnostics.clean_stop_reason,
30234            Some(CleanStopReason::IterationLimitReached)
30235        );
30236        assert!(
30237            clean.diagnostics.final_residual_peak_jy_per_beam
30238                < dirty.diagnostics.initial_residual_peak_jy_per_beam
30239        );
30240        assert!(peak_abs_value(&clean.model.slice(s![.., .., 0, 0]).to_owned()) > 0.0);
30241    }
30242
30243    #[test]
30244    fn streaming_grouped_mosaic_clean_matches_retained_grouped_request() {
30245        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
30246            image_shape: [64, 64],
30247            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
30248        };
30249        let samples = [
30250            (-95.0, -35.0, 0.0),
30251            (-70.0, 40.0, 0.0),
30252            (-35.0, -80.0, 0.0),
30253            (22.0, 75.0, 0.0),
30254            (55.0, -25.0, 0.0),
30255            (105.0, 50.0, 0.0),
30256        ];
30257        let batch = point_source_visibilities(
30258            &samples,
30259            geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
30260            geometry.image_shape,
30261            (34.0, 30.0),
30262            1.0,
30263        );
30264        let primary_beam_model = PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
30265            dish_diameter_m: 25.0,
30266            blockage_diameter_m: 0.0,
30267        };
30268        let grouped_metadata = GroupedVisibilityMetadataBatch {
30269            sample_count: batch.len(),
30270            groups: vec![GroupedVisibilityMetadata {
30271                beam_frequency_hz: 1.4e9,
30272                primary_beam_model,
30273                pointing_direction_rad: [0.0, 0.0],
30274                sample_ranges: vec![VisibilitySampleRange {
30275                    start: 0,
30276                    end: batch.len(),
30277                }],
30278            }],
30279        };
30280        let gridder_mode = GridderMode::Mosaic(MosaicGridderConfig {
30281            phase_center_direction_rad: [0.0, 0.0],
30282            primary_beam_model,
30283            pb_limit: 0.1,
30284            metadata_batches: Vec::new(),
30285            grouped_metadata_batches: vec![grouped_metadata.clone()],
30286        });
30287        let request = ImagingRequest {
30288            geometry,
30289            visibility_batches: vec![batch.clone()],
30290            gridder_mode: gridder_mode.clone(),
30291            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
30292            weighting: WeightingMode::Briggs { robust: 0.5 },
30293            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
30294            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.399e9, 1.401e9],
30295            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
30296            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
30297            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
30298            clean: CleanConfig {
30299                niter: 4,
30300                gain: 0.2,
30301                minor_cycle_length: 2,
30302                ..CleanConfig::default()
30303            },
30304            clean_mask: None,
30305            initial_model: None,
30306            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
30307            w_project_planes: None,
30308            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
30309        };
30310        let retained = run_imaging(&request).unwrap();
30311        let mut streaming_request = request.clone();
30312        streaming_request.visibility_batches.clear();
30313        let streaming = run_mosaic_mfs_from_single_plane_stream(
30314            streaming_request,
30315            StandardMfsExecutionConfig::default(),
30316            WeightDensityMode::Combined,
30317            |_, consumer| {
30318                consumer(SinglePlaneVisibilityBlock {
30319                    visibility: batch.clone(),
30320                    gridder_metadata: SinglePlaneGridderMetadata::Mosaic(grouped_metadata.clone()),
30321                })
30322            },
30323        )
30324        .unwrap();
30325
30326        assert_array4_close(&streaming.psf, &retained.psf, 1.0e-5);
30327        assert_array4_close(&streaming.residual, &retained.residual, 1.0e-5);
30328        assert_array4_close(&streaming.model, &retained.model, 1.0e-5);
30329        assert_array4_close(&streaming.image, &retained.image, 1.0e-5);
30330        assert_eq!(
30331            streaming.diagnostics.minor_iterations,
30332            retained.diagnostics.minor_iterations
30333        );
30334        assert_eq!(
30335            streaming.diagnostics.clean_stop_reason,
30336            retained.diagnostics.clean_stop_reason
30337        );
30338        assert!(streaming.diagnostics.mosaic_weight_image.is_some());
30339    }
30340
30341    #[test]
30342    fn mosaic_weight_image_preserves_beam_frequency_buckets() {
30343        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
30344            image_shape: [33, 33],
30345            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-3, 1.0e-3],
30346        };
30347        let primary_beam_model = PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
30348            dish_diameter_m: 25.0,
30349            blockage_diameter_m: 0.0,
30350        };
30351        let config = MosaicGridderConfig {
30352            phase_center_direction_rad: [0.0, 0.0],
30353            primary_beam_model,
30354            pb_limit: 0.1,
30355            metadata_batches: Vec::new(),
30356            grouped_metadata_batches: Vec::new(),
30357        };
30358        let group_batch = |weight| VisibilityBatch {
30359            u_lambda: vec![0.0],
30360            v_lambda: vec![0.0],
30361            w_lambda: vec![0.0],
30362            weight: vec![weight],
30363            sumwt_factor: vec![1.0],
30364            gridable: vec![true],
30365            visibility: vec![Complex32::new(1.0, 0.0)],
30366        };
30367        let low_frequency_hz = 1.0e9_f64;
30368        let high_frequency_hz = 1.8e9_f64;
30369        let low_weight = 2.0_f32;
30370        let high_weight = 5.0_f32;
30371        let groups = vec![
30372            super::MosaicPointingGroup {
30373                pointing_direction_rad: [0.0, 0.0],
30374                frequency_hz: low_frequency_hz,
30375                primary_beam_model,
30376                batch: group_batch(low_weight),
30377                sample_frequency_hz: Vec::new(),
30378            },
30379            super::MosaicPointingGroup {
30380                pointing_direction_rad: [0.0, 0.0],
30381                frequency_hz: high_frequency_hz,
30382                primary_beam_model,
30383                batch: group_batch(high_weight),
30384                sample_frequency_hz: Vec::new(),
30385            },
30386        ];
30387
30388        let weight_image = super::build_mosaic_weight_image(geometry, &config, &groups).unwrap();
30389        let [pointing_x, pointing_y] =
30390            super::mosaic_pointing_pixel_position(geometry, [0.0, 0.0], [0.0, 0.0]);
30391        let sample_x = 30usize;
30392        let sample_y = 16usize;
30393        let l = (sample_x as f64 - pointing_x) * geometry.cell_size_rad[0].abs();
30394        let m = (sample_y as f64 - pointing_y) * geometry.cell_size_rad[1].abs();
30395        let pb2 = |frequency_hz| {
30396            let vp =
30397                primary_beam_voltage_pattern_for_offsets(primary_beam_model, l, m, frequency_hz);
30398            vp * vp * vp * vp
30399        };
30400        let expected = low_weight * pb2(low_frequency_hz) + high_weight * pb2(high_frequency_hz);
30401        let averaged_frequency_hz = (low_frequency_hz * f64::from(low_weight)
30402            + high_frequency_hz * f64::from(high_weight))
30403            / f64::from(low_weight + high_weight);
30404        let collapsed = (low_weight + high_weight) * pb2(averaged_frequency_hz);
30405        let actual = weight_image[(sample_x, sample_y)];
30406
30407        assert!(
30408            (actual - expected).abs() < 1.0e-6,
30409            "weight image should sum each beam-frequency bucket separately: actual={actual:.9e} expected={expected:.9e} collapsed={collapsed:.9e}"
30410        );
30411        assert!(
30412            (expected - collapsed).abs() > 1.0e-4,
30413            "test frequencies should expose averaged-frequency collapse: expected={expected:.9e} collapsed={collapsed:.9e}"
30414        );
30415    }
30416
30417    #[test]
30418    fn mosaic_projector_key_preserves_sub_mhz_frequency_drift() {
30419        let model = PrimaryBeamModel::Airy {
30420            dish_diameter_m: 12.0,
30421            blockage_diameter_m: 0.75,
30422        };
30423        let base = super::mosaic_projector_key(model, 229_986_867_803.0, 2);
30424        let near = super::mosaic_projector_key(model, 229_986_868_103.0, 2);
30425
30426        assert_ne!(base, near);
30427    }
30428
30429    fn rms_difference(left: &Array2<f32>, right: &Array2<f32>) -> f32 {
30430        let mut sum = 0.0f64;
30431        let mut count = 0usize;
30432        for (lhs, rhs) in left.iter().zip(right.iter()) {
30433            let delta = f64::from(*lhs - *rhs);
30434            sum += delta * delta;
30435            count += 1;
30436        }
30437        (sum / count as f64).sqrt() as f32
30438    }
30439
30440    fn assert_error_contains<T>(result: Result<T, super::ImagingError>, expected: &str) {
30441        let Err(err) = result else {
30442            panic!("expected request to fail");
30443        };
30444        let message = err.to_string();
30445        assert!(
30446            message.contains(expected),
30447            "expected error containing {expected:?}, got {message:?}"
30448        );
30449    }
30450
30451    #[test]
30452    fn strict_stokes_i_rejects_flagged_parallel_hand_samples() {
30453        let batch = ParallelHandBatch {
30454            u_lambda: vec![10.0, 20.0],
30455            v_lambda: vec![5.0, 8.0],
30456            w_lambda: vec![0.0, 0.0],
30457            first_visibility: vec![Complex32::new(1.0, 0.0); 2],
30458            second_visibility: vec![Complex32::new(1.0, 0.0); 2],
30459            first_weight: vec![1.0, 1.0],
30460            second_weight: vec![1.0, 1.0],
30461            first_flagged: vec![false, true],
30462            second_flagged: vec![false, false],
30463            gridable: vec![true, true],
30464        };
30465        let collapsed = batch.collapse_to_stokes_i().unwrap();
30466        assert_eq!(collapsed.len(), 1);
30467    }
30468
30469    #[test]
30470    fn strict_stokes_i_uses_half_sum_visibility_and_casa_style_weight() {
30471        let batch = ParallelHandBatch {
30472            u_lambda: vec![10.0],
30473            v_lambda: vec![5.0],
30474            w_lambda: vec![0.0],
30475            first_visibility: vec![Complex32::new(2.0, 1.0)],
30476            second_visibility: vec![Complex32::new(6.0, -1.0)],
30477            first_weight: vec![1.5],
30478            second_weight: vec![3.0],
30479            first_flagged: vec![false],
30480            second_flagged: vec![false],
30481            gridable: vec![true],
30482        };
30483        let collapsed = batch.collapse_to_stokes_i().unwrap();
30484        assert_eq!(collapsed.len(), 1);
30485        assert!((collapsed.visibility[0].re - 4.0).abs() < 1.0e-6);
30486        assert!(collapsed.visibility[0].im.abs() < 1.0e-6);
30487        assert!((collapsed.weight[0] - 2.25).abs() < 1.0e-6);
30488        assert!((collapsed.sumwt_factor[0] - 2.0).abs() < 1.0e-6);
30489    }
30490
30491    #[test]
30492    fn reported_sumwt_tracks_logical_samples_not_mirrored_normalization() {
30493        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
30494            image_shape: [32, 32],
30495            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
30496        };
30497        let batch = VisibilityBatch {
30498            u_lambda: vec![10.0],
30499            v_lambda: vec![5.0],
30500            w_lambda: vec![0.0],
30501            weight: vec![1.5],
30502            sumwt_factor: vec![1.0],
30503            gridable: vec![true],
30504            visibility: vec![Complex32::new(1.0, 0.0)],
30505        };
30506        let result = run_imaging(&ImagingRequest {
30507            geometry,
30508            visibility_batches: vec![batch],
30509            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
30510            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::XX,
30511            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
30512            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
30513            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.399e9, 1.401e9],
30514            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
30515            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
30516            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
30517            clean: dirty_clean_config(0.35),
30518            clean_mask: None,
30519            initial_model: None,
30520            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
30521            w_project_planes: None,
30522            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
30523        })
30524        .unwrap();
30525
30526        assert!((result.sumwt[(0, 0, 0, 0)] - 1.5).abs() < 1.0e-5);
30527    }
30528
30529    #[test]
30530    fn combined_dirty_standard_path_matches_separate_psf_and_residual_passes() {
30531        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
30532            image_shape: [64, 64],
30533            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
30534        };
30535        let batch = point_source_visibilities(
30536            &[
30537                (10.0, 5.0, 0.0),
30538                (25.5, -3.25, 0.0),
30539                (-16.0, 11.0, 0.0),
30540                (32.0, -18.0, 0.0),
30541            ],
30542            geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
30543            geometry.image_shape,
30544            (37.0, 29.0),
30545            2.0,
30546        );
30547        let request = ImagingRequest {
30548            geometry,
30549            visibility_batches: vec![batch],
30550            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
30551            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
30552            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
30553            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
30554            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.399e9, 1.401e9],
30555            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
30556            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
30557            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
30558            clean: dirty_clean_config(0.35),
30559            clean_mask: None,
30560            initial_model: None,
30561            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
30562            w_project_planes: None,
30563            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
30564        };
30565        let gridder = StandardGridder::new(geometry).unwrap();
30566        let weighted_batches = apply_weighting(&request, &gridder).unwrap();
30567        let mut separate_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
30568        let separate_psf =
30569            compute_psf(&request, &weighted_batches, &gridder, &mut separate_timings).unwrap();
30570        let model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((geometry.image_shape[0], geometry.image_shape[1]));
30571        let separate_residual = compute_residual(
30572            &request,
30573            &weighted_batches,
30574            &gridder,
30575            &model,
30576            &separate_psf,
30577            StandardMfsExecutionConfig::default(),
30578            &mut separate_timings,
30579        )
30580        .unwrap();
30581
30582        let mut combined_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
30583        let (combined_psf, combined_residual) = compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard(
30584            &weighted_batches,
30585            &gridder,
30586            &mut combined_timings,
30587        )
30588        .unwrap();
30589
30590        assert_close_f32(
30591            combined_psf.normalization_sumwt,
30592            separate_psf.normalization_sumwt,
30593            1.0e-6,
30594        );
30595        assert_close_f32(
30596            combined_psf.reported_sumwt,
30597            separate_psf.reported_sumwt,
30598            1.0e-6,
30599        );
30600        assert_close_f32(combined_psf.psf_peak, separate_psf.psf_peak, 1.0e-6);
30601        assert_eq!(combined_psf.gridded_samples, separate_psf.gridded_samples);
30602        assert_eq!(combined_psf.skipped_samples, separate_psf.skipped_samples);
30603        assert!(
30604            rms_difference(&combined_psf.psf, &separate_psf.psf) < 1.0e-6,
30605            "combined PSF should match separate PSF pass"
30606        );
30607        assert!(
30608            rms_difference(&combined_residual, &separate_residual) < 1.0e-6,
30609            "combined residual should match separate residual pass"
30610        );
30611
30612        let mut streaming_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
30613        let (streaming_psf, streaming_residual) =
30614            super::compute_dirty_psf_and_residual_standard_streaming(
30615                &weighted_batches,
30616                &gridder,
30617                &mut streaming_timings,
30618            )
30619            .unwrap();
30620
30621        assert_close_f32(
30622            streaming_psf.normalization_sumwt,
30623            combined_psf.normalization_sumwt,
30624            1.0e-6,
30625        );
30626        assert_close_f32(
30627            streaming_psf.reported_sumwt,
30628            combined_psf.reported_sumwt,
30629            1.0e-6,
30630        );
30631        assert_close_f32(streaming_psf.psf_peak, combined_psf.psf_peak, 1.0e-6);
30632        assert_eq!(streaming_psf.gridded_samples, combined_psf.gridded_samples);
30633        assert_eq!(streaming_psf.skipped_samples, combined_psf.skipped_samples);
30634        assert!(
30635            rms_difference(&streaming_psf.psf, &combined_psf.psf) < 1.0e-6,
30636            "streaming PSF should match planned combined PSF pass"
30637        );
30638        assert!(
30639            rms_difference(&streaming_residual, &combined_residual) < 1.0e-6,
30640            "streaming residual should match planned combined residual pass"
30641        );
30642    }
30643
30644    #[test]
30645    fn trace_weighting_reports_normalization_and_reported_sumwt_separately() {
30646        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
30647            image_shape: [32, 32],
30648            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
30649        };
30650        let batch = VisibilityBatch {
30651            u_lambda: vec![10.0],
30652            v_lambda: vec![5.0],
30653            w_lambda: vec![0.0],
30654            weight: vec![1.5],
30655            sumwt_factor: vec![1.0],
30656            gridable: vec![true],
30657            visibility: vec![Complex32::new(1.0, 0.0)],
30658        };
30659        let diagnostics = trace_weighting(&ImagingRequest {
30660            geometry,
30661            visibility_batches: vec![batch],
30662            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
30663            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::XX,
30664            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
30665            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
30666            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.399e9, 1.401e9],
30667            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
30668            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
30669            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
30670            clean: dirty_clean_config(0.35),
30671            clean_mask: None,
30672            initial_model: None,
30673            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
30674            w_project_planes: None,
30675            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
30676        })
30677        .unwrap();
30678
30679        assert_eq!(diagnostics.samples.len(), 1);
30680        assert!((diagnostics.normalization_sumwt - 1.5).abs() < 1.0e-5);
30681        assert!((diagnostics.reported_sumwt - 1.5).abs() < 1.0e-5);
30682        assert!((diagnostics.normalization_sumwt - diagnostics.reported_sumwt).abs() < 1.0e-5);
30683        let sample = &diagnostics.samples[0];
30684        assert!((sample.output_weight - 1.5).abs() < 1.0e-6);
30685        assert!((sample.normalization_contribution - 1.5).abs() < 1.0e-5);
30686        assert!((sample.reported_contribution - 1.5).abs() < 1.0e-5);
30687        assert_eq!(sample.density_weight, None);
30688    }
30689
30690    #[test]
30691    fn trace_cube_channel_residual_refresh_validates_channel_and_model_planes() {
30692        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
30693            image_shape: [64, 64],
30694            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
30695        };
30696        let samples = [(-120.0, -90.0, 0.0), (45.0, -75.0, 0.0), (110.0, 65.0, 0.0)];
30697        let channel_zero = cube_channel_request_identity(
30698            1.40e9,
30699            vec![point_source_visibilities(
30700                &samples,
30701                geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
30702                geometry.image_shape,
30703                (32.0, 32.0),
30704                1.0,
30705            )],
30706            0,
30707        );
30708        let channel_one = cube_channel_request_identity(
30709            1.41e9,
30710            vec![point_source_visibilities(
30711                &samples,
30712                geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
30713                geometry.image_shape,
30714                (34.0, 31.0),
30715                0.8,
30716            )],
30717            1,
30718        );
30719        let request = ImagingRequest {
30720            geometry,
30721            visibility_batches: channel_one.visibility_batches.clone(),
30722            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
30723            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
30724            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
30725            reffreq_hz: channel_one.channel_frequency_hz,
30726            selected_frequency_range_hz: [
30727                channel_one.channel_frequency_hz,
30728                channel_one.channel_frequency_hz,
30729            ],
30730            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
30731            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
30732            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
30733            clean: CleanConfig::default(),
30734            clean_mask: None,
30735            initial_model: None,
30736            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
30737            w_project_planes: None,
30738            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
30739        };
30740        let model_frequencies_hz = [
30741            channel_zero.channel_frequency_hz,
30742            channel_one.channel_frequency_hz,
30743        ];
30744        let model_planes = vec![
30745            Array2::<f32>::zeros((64, 64)),
30746            Array2::<f32>::zeros((64, 64)),
30747        ];
30748
30749        let trace = trace_cube_channel_residual_refresh(
30750            &request,
30751            &channel_one.model_interpolation_batches,
30752            1,
30753            &model_planes,
30754            &model_frequencies_hz,
30755        )
30756        .unwrap();
30757        assert_eq!(trace.samples.len(), samples.len());
30758        assert_eq!(trace.samples[0].batch_index, 0);
30759        assert_eq!(trace.samples[0].sample_index, 0);
30760        assert_eq!(
30761            trace.samples[0].observed_visibility,
30762            trace.samples[0].residual_visibility
30763        );
30764        assert_eq!(
30765            trace.samples[0].predicted_visibility,
30766            Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0)
30767        );
30768
30769        assert_error_contains(
30770            trace_cube_channel_residual_refresh(
30771                &request,
30772                &channel_one.model_interpolation_batches,
30773                2,
30774                &model_planes,
30775                &model_frequencies_hz,
30776            ),
30777            "cube residual-refresh trace identity channel index 2 is out of range for 2 model planes",
30778        );
30779        assert_error_contains(
30780            trace_cube_channel_residual_refresh(
30781                &request,
30782                &channel_one.model_interpolation_batches,
30783                1,
30784                &model_planes[..1],
30785                &model_frequencies_hz,
30786            ),
30787            "cube residual-refresh trace model plane count 1 does not match model frequency count 2",
30788        );
30789
30790        let wrong_shape_planes = vec![
30791            Array2::<f32>::zeros((64, 64)),
30792            Array2::<f32>::zeros((32, 64)),
30793        ];
30794        assert_error_contains(
30795            trace_cube_channel_residual_refresh(
30796                &request,
30797                &channel_one.model_interpolation_batches,
30798                1,
30799                &wrong_shape_planes,
30800                &model_frequencies_hz,
30801            ),
30802            "cube residual-refresh trace model plane 1 shape",
30803        );
30804    }
30805
30806    #[test]
30807    fn trace_cube_channel_residual_refresh_model_channel_lambda_differs_from_output_channel_lambda()
30808    {
30809        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
30810            image_shape: [64, 64],
30811            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
30812        };
30813        let batch = VisibilityBatch {
30814            u_lambda: vec![95.0, -80.0, 35.0],
30815            v_lambda: vec![42.0, 55.0, -70.0],
30816            w_lambda: vec![0.0, 0.0, 0.0],
30817            weight: vec![1.0, 1.0, 1.0],
30818            sumwt_factor: vec![1.0, 1.0, 1.0],
30819            gridable: vec![true, true, true],
30820            visibility: vec![Complex32::new(0.0, 0.0); 3],
30821        };
30822        let channel_zero = TestCubeTraceChannel {
30823            channel_frequency_hz: 1.0e9,
30824            visibility_batches: vec![batch.clone()],
30825            model_interpolation_batches: vec![CubeModelInterpolationBatch {
30826                sample_contributions: (0..batch.len())
30827                    .map(|_| {
30828                        vec![CubeModelChannelContribution {
30829                            model_channel_index: 1,
30830                            factor: 1.0,
30831                        }]
30832                    })
30833                    .collect(),
30834            }],
30835        };
30836        let channel_one = cube_channel_request_identity(1.8e9, vec![batch.clone()], 1);
30837        let request = ImagingRequest {
30838            geometry,
30839            visibility_batches: channel_zero.visibility_batches.clone(),
30840            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
30841            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
30842            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
30843            reffreq_hz: channel_zero.channel_frequency_hz,
30844            selected_frequency_range_hz: [
30845                channel_zero.channel_frequency_hz,
30846                channel_zero.channel_frequency_hz,
30847            ],
30848            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
30849            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
30850            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
30851            clean: CleanConfig::default(),
30852            clean_mask: None,
30853            initial_model: None,
30854            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
30855            w_project_planes: None,
30856            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
30857        };
30858        let model_frequencies_hz = [
30859            channel_zero.channel_frequency_hz,
30860            channel_one.channel_frequency_hz,
30861        ];
30862        let mut model_planes = vec![
30863            Array2::<f32>::zeros((64, 64)),
30864            Array2::<f32>::zeros((64, 64)),
30865        ];
30866        model_planes[1][(35, 29)] = 1.0;
30867
30868        let output_lambda_trace = trace_cube_channel_residual_refresh(
30869            &request,
30870            &channel_zero.model_interpolation_batches,
30871            0,
30872            &model_planes,
30873            &model_frequencies_hz,
30874        )
30875        .unwrap();
30876        let model_lambda_trace = trace_cube_channel_residual_refresh_model_channel_lambda(
30877            &request,
30878            &channel_zero.model_interpolation_batches,
30879            0,
30880            &model_planes,
30881            &model_frequencies_hz,
30882        )
30883        .unwrap();
30884
30885        assert_eq!(output_lambda_trace.samples.len(), batch.len());
30886        assert_eq!(model_lambda_trace.samples.len(), batch.len());
30887        let max_prediction_delta = output_lambda_trace
30888            .samples
30889            .iter()
30890            .zip(model_lambda_trace.samples.iter())
30891            .map(|(output_sample, model_sample)| {
30892                (output_sample.predicted_visibility - model_sample.predicted_visibility).norm()
30893            })
30894            .fold(0.0f32, f32::max);
30895        assert!(
30896            max_prediction_delta > 1.0e-4,
30897            "expected model-channel lambda to change cube predictions, max delta={max_prediction_delta}"
30898        );
30899        assert!(
30900            rms_difference(
30901                &output_lambda_trace.residual_image,
30902                &model_lambda_trace.residual_image
30903            ) > 1.0e-6
30904        );
30905    }
30906
30907    #[test]
30908    fn trace_residual_refresh_matches_fft_residual_and_prediction_order() {
30909        let samples = vec![
30910            (-310.25, -205.5, 0.0),
30911            (-248.75, 140.125, 0.0),
30912            (-180.5, 285.75, 0.0),
30913            (-95.125, -310.875, 0.0),
30914            (24.625, 96.5, 0.0),
30915            (77.25, -55.875, 0.0),
30916        ];
30917        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
30918            image_shape: [64, 64],
30919            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
30920        };
30921        let mut model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((64, 64));
30922        model[(31, 28)] = 0.75;
30923        model[(36, 34)] = -0.2;
30924        let pixels = build_direct_pixel_coordinates(geometry);
30925        let components = build_direct_components(&model, &pixels, 64);
30926        let batch = VisibilityBatch {
30927            u_lambda: samples.iter().map(|(u, _, _)| *u).collect(),
30928            v_lambda: samples.iter().map(|(_, v, _)| *v).collect(),
30929            w_lambda: samples.iter().map(|(_, _, w)| *w).collect(),
30930            visibility: samples
30931                .iter()
30932                .map(|(u, v, w)| direct_predict_visibility(&components, *u, *v, *w))
30933                .collect(),
30934            weight: vec![1.0; samples.len()],
30935            sumwt_factor: vec![1.0; samples.len()],
30936            gridable: vec![true; samples.len()],
30937        };
30938        let request = ImagingRequest {
30939            geometry,
30940            visibility_batches: vec![batch.clone()],
30941            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
30942            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
30943            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
30944            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
30945            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.399e9, 1.401e9],
30946            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
30947            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
30948            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
30949            clean: CleanConfig::default(),
30950            clean_mask: None,
30951            initial_model: None,
30952            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
30953            w_project_planes: None,
30954            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
30955        };
30956        let gridder = StandardGridder::new(geometry).unwrap();
30957        let weighted_batches = apply_weighting(&request, &gridder).unwrap();
30958        let mut stage_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
30959        let psf_state =
30960            compute_psf(&request, &weighted_batches, &gridder, &mut stage_timings).unwrap();
30961        let fft_residual = compute_residual(
30962            &request,
30963            &weighted_batches,
30964            &gridder,
30965            &model,
30966            &psf_state,
30967            StandardMfsExecutionConfig::default(),
30968            &mut stage_timings,
30969        )
30970        .unwrap();
30971
30972        let trace = trace_residual_refresh(&request, &model).unwrap();
30973        assert_eq!(trace.samples.len(), batch.len());
30974        for (sample, source) in trace.samples.iter().zip(samples.iter()) {
30975            assert_eq!(sample.u_lambda, source.0);
30976            assert_eq!(sample.v_lambda, source.1);
30977            assert_eq!(sample.w_lambda, source.2);
30978            assert!(sample.weight > 0.0);
30979            assert!(sample.gridable);
30980            let recomposed = sample.predicted_visibility + sample.residual_visibility;
30981            assert_close_f32(recomposed.re, sample.observed_visibility.re, 1.0e-5);
30982            assert_close_f32(recomposed.im, sample.observed_visibility.im, 1.0e-5);
30983        }
30984        let residual_rms = rms_difference(&trace.residual_image, &fft_residual);
30985        assert!(
30986            residual_rms < 1.0e-6,
30987            "trace/image mismatch rms={residual_rms}"
30988        );
30989    }
30990
30991    #[test]
30992    fn clean_global_threshold_can_stop_before_iterations() {
30993        let samples = vec![
30994            (-140.0, -110.0, 0.0),
30995            (-80.0, 60.0, 0.0),
30996            (45.0, -95.0, 0.0),
30997            (120.0, 70.0, 0.0),
30998            (0.0, 0.0, 0.0),
30999        ];
31000        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
31001            image_shape: [64, 64],
31002            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
31003        };
31004        let batch = point_source_visibilities(&samples, 1.0e-4, [64, 64], (32.0, 32.0), 1.0);
31005        let result = run_imaging(&ImagingRequest {
31006            geometry,
31007            visibility_batches: vec![batch],
31008            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
31009            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
31010            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
31011            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
31012            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.399e9, 1.401e9],
31013            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
31014            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
31015            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
31016            clean: CleanConfig {
31017                niter: 8,
31018                major_cycle_limit: None,
31019                gain: 0.2,
31020                threshold_jy_per_beam: 10.0,
31021                nsigma: 0.0,
31022                ..CleanConfig::default()
31023            },
31024            clean_mask: None,
31025            initial_model: None,
31026            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
31027            w_project_planes: None,
31028            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
31029        })
31030        .unwrap();
31031
31032        assert_eq!(
31033            result.diagnostics.clean_stop_reason,
31034            Some(CleanStopReason::GlobalThresholdReached)
31035        );
31036        assert_eq!(result.diagnostics.minor_iterations, 0);
31037        assert_eq!(result.diagnostics.major_cycles, 1);
31038    }
31039
31040    #[test]
31041    fn dirty_image_recovers_centered_point_source() {
31042        let samples = vec![
31043            (-140.0, -110.0, 0.0),
31044            (-80.0, 60.0, 0.0),
31045            (45.0, -95.0, 0.0),
31046            (120.0, 70.0, 0.0),
31047            (0.0, 0.0, 0.0),
31048        ];
31049        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
31050            image_shape: [64, 64],
31051            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
31052        };
31053        let batch = point_source_visibilities(&samples, 1.0e-4, [64, 64], (32.0, 32.0), 1.0);
31054        let result = run_imaging(&ImagingRequest {
31055            geometry,
31056            visibility_batches: vec![batch],
31057            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
31058            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
31059            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
31060            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
31061            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.399e9, 1.401e9],
31062            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
31063            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
31064            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
31065            clean: dirty_clean_config(0.35),
31066            clean_mask: None,
31067            initial_model: None,
31068            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
31069            w_project_planes: None,
31070            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
31071        })
31072        .unwrap();
31073
31074        let center = result.residual[(32, 32, 0, 0)];
31075        assert!(center > 0.7);
31076        assert!((result.psf[(32, 32, 0, 0)] - 1.0).abs() < 1.0e-4);
31077    }
31078
31079    #[test]
31080    fn dirty_image_tracks_off_center_peak_location() {
31081        let samples = vec![
31082            (-150.0, -120.0, 0.0),
31083            (-90.0, 75.0, 0.0),
31084            (60.0, -90.0, 0.0),
31085            (130.0, 85.0, 0.0),
31086            (20.0, 15.0, 0.0),
31087        ];
31088        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
31089            image_shape: [64, 64],
31090            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
31091        };
31092        let batch = point_source_visibilities(&samples, 1.0e-4, [64, 64], (37.0, 28.0), 1.0);
31093        let result = run_imaging(&ImagingRequest {
31094            geometry,
31095            visibility_batches: vec![batch],
31096            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
31097            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
31098            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
31099            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
31100            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.399e9, 1.401e9],
31101            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
31102            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
31103            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
31104            clean: CleanConfig::default(),
31105            clean_mask: None,
31106            initial_model: None,
31107            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
31108            w_project_planes: None,
31109            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
31110        })
31111        .unwrap();
31112
31113        let mut best = ((0usize, 0usize), 0.0f32);
31114        for x in 0..64 {
31115            for y in 0..64 {
31116                let value = result.residual[(x, y, 0, 0)].abs();
31117                if value > best.1 {
31118                    best = ((x, y), value);
31119                }
31120            }
31121        }
31122        assert!(
31123            (best.0.0 as isize - 37).abs() <= 2,
31124            "unexpected x peak location: {:?}",
31125            best.0
31126        );
31127        assert!(
31128            (best.0.1 as isize - 28).abs() <= 2,
31129            "unexpected y peak location: {:?}",
31130            best.0
31131        );
31132    }
31133
31134    #[test]
31135    fn dirty_image_matches_casa_dec_axis_convention_for_positive_m() {
31136        let samples = vec![
31137            (-150.0, -120.0, 0.0),
31138            (-90.0, 75.0, 0.0),
31139            (60.0, -90.0, 0.0),
31140            (130.0, 85.0, 0.0),
31141            (20.0, 15.0, 0.0),
31142        ];
31143        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
31144            image_shape: [64, 64],
31145            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
31146        };
31147        let center_x = 32.0f64;
31148        let center_y = 32.0f64;
31149        let target = (37usize, 28usize);
31150        let l = (target.0 as f64 - center_x) * geometry.cell_size_rad[0];
31151        let m = (center_y - target.1 as f64) * geometry.cell_size_rad[1];
31152        let visibility = VisibilityBatch {
31153            u_lambda: samples.iter().map(|(u, _, _)| *u).collect(),
31154            v_lambda: samples.iter().map(|(_, v, _)| *v).collect(),
31155            w_lambda: samples.iter().map(|(_, _, w)| *w).collect(),
31156            weight: vec![1.0; samples.len()],
31157            sumwt_factor: vec![1.0; samples.len()],
31158            gridable: vec![true; samples.len()],
31159            visibility: samples
31160                .iter()
31161                .map(|(u, v, w)| {
31162                    let phase = -2.0 * std::f64::consts::PI * (u * l + v * m + w * 0.0);
31163                    Complex32::new(phase.cos() as f32, phase.sin() as f32)
31164                })
31165                .collect(),
31166        };
31167        let result = run_imaging(&ImagingRequest {
31168            geometry,
31169            visibility_batches: vec![visibility],
31170            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
31171            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
31172            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
31173            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
31174            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.399e9, 1.401e9],
31175            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
31176            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
31177            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
31178            clean: CleanConfig::default(),
31179            clean_mask: None,
31180            initial_model: None,
31181            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
31182            w_project_planes: None,
31183            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
31184        })
31185        .unwrap();
31186
31187        let mut best = ((0usize, 0usize), 0.0f32);
31188        for x in 0..64 {
31189            for y in 0..64 {
31190                let value = result.residual[(x, y, 0, 0)].abs();
31191                if value > best.1 {
31192                    best = ((x, y), value);
31193                }
31194            }
31195        }
31196        assert!(
31197            (best.0.0 as isize - target.0 as isize).abs() <= 2,
31198            "unexpected x peak location: {:?}",
31199            best.0
31200        );
31201        assert!(
31202            (best.0.1 as isize - target.1 as isize).abs() <= 2,
31203            "unexpected y peak location: {:?}",
31204            best.0
31205        );
31206    }
31207
31208    #[test]
31209    #[serial(casa_cpp)]
31210    fn fft_major_cycle_prediction_matches_direct_for_off_center_source() {
31211        let samples = vec![
31212            (-150.0, -120.0, 0.0),
31213            (-90.0, 75.0, 0.0),
31214            (60.0, -90.0, 0.0),
31215            (130.0, 85.0, 0.0),
31216            (20.0, 15.0, 0.0),
31217            (-45.0, 40.0, 0.0),
31218        ];
31219        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
31220            image_shape: [64, 64],
31221            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
31222        };
31223        let batch = point_source_visibilities(&samples, 1.0e-4, [64, 64], (37.0, 28.0), 1.0);
31224        let request = ImagingRequest {
31225            geometry,
31226            visibility_batches: vec![batch.clone()],
31227            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
31228            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
31229            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
31230            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
31231            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.399e9, 1.401e9],
31232            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
31233            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
31234            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
31235            clean: CleanConfig::default(),
31236            clean_mask: None,
31237            initial_model: None,
31238            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
31239            w_project_planes: None,
31240            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
31241        };
31242        let gridder = StandardGridder::new(geometry).unwrap();
31243        let mut stage_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
31244        let psf_state = compute_psf(
31245            &request,
31246            std::slice::from_ref(&batch),
31247            &gridder,
31248            &mut stage_timings,
31249        )
31250        .unwrap();
31251        let mut model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((64, 64));
31252        model[(37, 28)] = 1.0;
31253
31254        let fft_residual = compute_residual(
31255            &request,
31256            std::slice::from_ref(&batch),
31257            &gridder,
31258            &model,
31259            &psf_state,
31260            StandardMfsExecutionConfig::default(),
31261            &mut stage_timings,
31262        )
31263        .unwrap();
31264        let fft_peak = peak_abs_value(&fft_residual);
31265        let (max_trace_casacore_delta, max_trace_direct_delta) =
31266            assert_standard_residual_trace_matches_casacore(
31267                "off-center source",
31268                &request,
31269                &gridder,
31270                &model,
31271                samples.len(),
31272            );
31273        let cpp = match cpp_convolve_gridder_make_model_residual_image_2d(
31274            gridder.grid_shape(),
31275            geometry.image_shape,
31276            [
31277                gridder.grid_shape()[0] as f64 * geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
31278                gridder.grid_shape()[1] as f64 * geometry.cell_size_rad[1],
31279            ],
31280            [
31281                gridder.grid_shape()[0] as f64 / 2.0,
31282                gridder.grid_shape()[1] as f64 / 2.0,
31283            ],
31284            &batch.u_lambda,
31285            &batch.v_lambda,
31286            &batch
31287                .visibility
31288                .iter()
31289                .map(|value| value.re)
31290                .collect::<Vec<_>>(),
31291            &batch
31292                .visibility
31293                .iter()
31294                .map(|value| value.im)
31295                .collect::<Vec<_>>(),
31296            &batch.weight,
31297            &batch.gridable,
31298            model.as_slice().unwrap(),
31299        ) {
31300            Ok(result) => result,
31301            Err(error) if error == "casacore C++ backend unavailable" => return,
31302            Err(error) => panic!("run model residual interop: {error}"),
31303        };
31304        let mut sum_sq = 0.0f64;
31305        let mut max_abs = 0.0f32;
31306        let mut cpp_peak = 0.0f32;
31307        for (&rust_value, &cpp_value) in fft_residual.iter().zip(&cpp.pixels) {
31308            let delta = rust_value - cpp_value;
31309            sum_sq += f64::from(delta) * f64::from(delta);
31310            max_abs = max_abs.max(delta.abs());
31311            cpp_peak = cpp_peak.max(cpp_value.abs());
31312        }
31313        let rms = (sum_sq / cpp.pixels.len() as f64).sqrt() as f32;
31314        eprintln!(
31315            "standard MFS off-center predictor diagnostics: max_trace_casacore_delta={max_trace_casacore_delta:.3e} max_trace_direct_delta={max_trace_direct_delta:.3e} residual_rms={rms:.3e} residual_max_abs={max_abs:.3e}"
31316        );
31317        assert!(
31318            rms < 1.0e-5 && max_abs < 1.0e-4,
31319            "FFT residual should match casacore for the off-center source: rust_peak={fft_peak} cpp_peak={cpp_peak} rms={rms} max_abs={max_abs}"
31320        );
31321    }
31322
31323    #[test]
31324    fn shifted_kernel_support_update_matches_full_update_at_edges() {
31325        let kernel = make_multiscale_kernel((32, 32), 6.0);
31326        let support = kernel_nonzero_support(&kernel);
31327        let positions = [(0usize, 0usize), (3, 29), (16, 16), (31, 31)];
31328        for position in positions {
31329            let mut full = Array2::<f32>::zeros((32, 32));
31330            let mut bounded = Array2::<f32>::zeros((32, 32));
31331            add_shifted_kernel(&mut full, &kernel, position, 0.7);
31332            add_shifted_kernel_with_support(&mut bounded, &kernel, support, position, 0.7);
31333            for (left, right) in full.iter().zip(bounded.iter()) {
31334                assert!((*left - *right).abs() <= f32::EPSILON);
31335            }
31336        }
31337    }
31338
31339    #[test]
31340    #[serial(casa_cpp)]
31341    fn fft_major_cycle_prediction_matches_direct_for_structured_model() {
31342        let samples = vec![
31343            (-310.25, -205.5, 0.0),
31344            (-248.75, 140.125, 0.0),
31345            (-180.5, 285.75, 0.0),
31346            (-95.125, -310.875, 0.0),
31347            (24.625, 96.5, 0.0),
31348            (77.25, -55.875, 0.0),
31349            (138.875, 228.125, 0.0),
31350            (255.5, -170.625, 0.0),
31351            (312.75, 45.25, 0.0),
31352        ];
31353        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
31354            image_shape: [64, 64],
31355            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
31356        };
31357        let mut model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((64, 64));
31358        let scale5 = make_multiscale_kernel((64, 64), 5.0);
31359        let scale12 = make_multiscale_kernel((64, 64), 12.0);
31360        add_shifted_kernel(&mut model, &scale5, (29, 34), 0.8);
31361        add_shifted_kernel(&mut model, &scale12, (39, 26), -0.35);
31362        model[(33, 31)] += 0.25;
31363        let pixels = build_direct_pixel_coordinates(geometry);
31364        let components = build_direct_components(&model, &pixels, 64);
31365        let visibilities = samples
31366            .iter()
31367            .map(|(u, v, w)| direct_predict_visibility(&components, *u, *v, *w))
31368            .collect::<Vec<_>>();
31369        let batch = VisibilityBatch {
31370            u_lambda: samples.iter().map(|(u, _, _)| *u).collect(),
31371            v_lambda: samples.iter().map(|(_, v, _)| *v).collect(),
31372            w_lambda: samples.iter().map(|(_, _, w)| *w).collect(),
31373            visibility: visibilities,
31374            weight: vec![1.0; samples.len()],
31375            sumwt_factor: vec![1.0; samples.len()],
31376            gridable: vec![true; samples.len()],
31377        };
31378        let request = ImagingRequest {
31379            geometry,
31380            visibility_batches: vec![batch.clone()],
31381            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
31382            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
31383            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
31384            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
31385            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.399e9, 1.401e9],
31386            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
31387            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
31388            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
31389            clean: CleanConfig::default(),
31390            clean_mask: None,
31391            initial_model: None,
31392            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
31393            w_project_planes: None,
31394            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
31395        };
31396        let gridder = StandardGridder::new(geometry).unwrap();
31397        let mut stage_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
31398        let psf_state = compute_psf(
31399            &request,
31400            std::slice::from_ref(&batch),
31401            &gridder,
31402            &mut stage_timings,
31403        )
31404        .unwrap();
31405
31406        let fft_residual = compute_residual(
31407            &request,
31408            std::slice::from_ref(&batch),
31409            &gridder,
31410            &model,
31411            &psf_state,
31412            StandardMfsExecutionConfig::default(),
31413            &mut stage_timings,
31414        )
31415        .unwrap();
31416        let fft_peak = peak_abs_value(&fft_residual);
31417        let (max_trace_casacore_delta, max_trace_direct_delta) =
31418            assert_standard_residual_trace_matches_casacore(
31419                "structured model",
31420                &request,
31421                &gridder,
31422                &model,
31423                samples.len(),
31424            );
31425        let cpp = match cpp_convolve_gridder_make_model_residual_image_2d(
31426            gridder.grid_shape(),
31427            geometry.image_shape,
31428            [
31429                gridder.grid_shape()[0] as f64 * geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
31430                gridder.grid_shape()[1] as f64 * geometry.cell_size_rad[1],
31431            ],
31432            [
31433                gridder.grid_shape()[0] as f64 / 2.0,
31434                gridder.grid_shape()[1] as f64 / 2.0,
31435            ],
31436            &batch.u_lambda,
31437            &batch.v_lambda,
31438            &batch
31439                .visibility
31440                .iter()
31441                .map(|value| value.re)
31442                .collect::<Vec<_>>(),
31443            &batch
31444                .visibility
31445                .iter()
31446                .map(|value| value.im)
31447                .collect::<Vec<_>>(),
31448            &batch.weight,
31449            &batch.gridable,
31450            model.as_slice().unwrap(),
31451        ) {
31452            Ok(result) => result,
31453            Err(error) if error == "casacore C++ backend unavailable" => return,
31454            Err(error) => panic!("run model residual interop: {error}"),
31455        };
31456        let mut sum_sq = 0.0f64;
31457        let mut max_abs = 0.0f32;
31458        let mut cpp_peak = 0.0f32;
31459        for (&rust_value, &cpp_value) in fft_residual.iter().zip(&cpp.pixels) {
31460            let delta = rust_value - cpp_value;
31461            sum_sq += f64::from(delta) * f64::from(delta);
31462            max_abs = max_abs.max(delta.abs());
31463            cpp_peak = cpp_peak.max(cpp_value.abs());
31464        }
31465        let rms = (sum_sq / cpp.pixels.len() as f64).sqrt() as f32;
31466        eprintln!(
31467            "standard MFS structured residual-refresh diagnostics: max_trace_casacore_delta={max_trace_casacore_delta:.3e} max_trace_direct_delta={max_trace_direct_delta:.3e} residual_rms={rms:.3e} residual_max_abs={max_abs:.3e}"
31468        );
31469        assert!(
31470            rms < 1.0e-5 && max_abs < 1.0e-4,
31471            "FFT residual should match casacore for the structured model: rust_peak={fft_peak} cpp_peak={cpp_peak} rms={rms} max_abs={max_abs}"
31472        );
31473    }
31474
31475    #[test]
31476    #[serial(casa_cpp)]
31477    fn standard_mfs_model_predictor_matches_casacore_for_structured_model() {
31478        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
31479            image_shape: [257, 257],
31480            cell_size_rad: [8.638_889_530_690e-7_f64.to_radians(); 2],
31481        };
31482        let mut model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((257, 257));
31483        for x in 0..257 {
31484            for y in 0..257 {
31485                let dx = (x as f32 - 129.25) / 27.0;
31486                let dy = (y as f32 - 126.5) / 19.0;
31487                let ring = (-(dx * dx + dy * dy)).exp();
31488                let shoulder = (-(((x as f32 - 87.0) / 13.0).powi(2)
31489                    + ((y as f32 - 169.0) / 21.0).powi(2)))
31490                .exp();
31491                model[(x, y)] = 0.0025 * ring - 0.0007 * shoulder;
31492            }
31493        }
31494        let predictor = StandardMfsModelPredictor::new(geometry, &model).unwrap();
31495        let gridder = StandardGridder::new_with_casa_composite_padding(geometry).unwrap();
31496        let pixels = build_direct_pixel_coordinates(geometry);
31497        let components = build_direct_components(&model, &pixels, geometry.image_shape[1]);
31498        let samples = [
31499            (4_806.297_926_382_51_f64, 41_290.840_313_424_32_f64),
31500            (-38_890.191_177_123_3_f64, -12_300.584_882_047_77_f64),
31501            (24_915.177_739_689_71_f64, -34_020.365_105_376_14_f64),
31502            (-9_024.365_419_946_97_f64, 7_115.436_092_750_48_f64),
31503        ];
31504
31505        let mut max_casacore_delta = 0.0f32;
31506        let mut max_direct_delta = 0.0f32;
31507        for &(u, v) in &samples {
31508            let rust = predictor.predict(u, v);
31509            let direct = direct_predict_visibility(&components, u, v, 0.0);
31510            let cpp = match cpp_convolve_gridder_predict_visibility_2d(
31511                gridder.grid_shape(),
31512                geometry.image_shape,
31513                [
31514                    gridder.grid_shape()[0] as f64 * geometry.cell_size_rad[0],
31515                    gridder.grid_shape()[1] as f64 * geometry.cell_size_rad[1],
31516                ],
31517                [
31518                    gridder.grid_shape()[0] as f64 / 2.0,
31519                    gridder.grid_shape()[1] as f64 / 2.0,
31520                ],
31521                [u, -v],
31522                model.as_slice().unwrap(),
31523            ) {
31524                Ok(result) => result,
31525                Err(error) if error == "casacore C++ backend unavailable" => return,
31526                Err(error) => panic!("run predict-visibility interop: {error}"),
31527            };
31528            let cpp_value = Complex32::new(cpp.re, cpp.im);
31529            max_casacore_delta = max_casacore_delta.max((rust - cpp_value).norm());
31530            max_direct_delta = max_direct_delta.max((rust - direct).norm());
31531        }
31532        assert!(
31533            max_casacore_delta < 1.0e-5,
31534            "standard MFS MODEL_DATA predictor should match casacore ConvolveGridder for a structured model: max_casacore_delta={max_casacore_delta} max_direct_delta={max_direct_delta}"
31535        );
31536        eprintln!(
31537            "standard MFS MODEL_DATA predictor diagnostics: max_casacore_delta={max_casacore_delta:.3e} max_direct_delta={max_direct_delta:.3e}"
31538        );
31539    }
31540
31541    #[test]
31542    fn fft_dirty_image_matches_direct_adjoint_for_off_center_source() {
31543        let samples = vec![
31544            (-310.25, -205.5, 0.0),
31545            (-248.75, 140.125, 0.0),
31546            (-180.5, 285.75, 0.0),
31547            (-95.125, -310.875, 0.0),
31548            (24.625, 96.5, 0.0),
31549            (77.25, -55.875, 0.0),
31550            (138.875, 228.125, 0.0),
31551            (255.5, -170.625, 0.0),
31552            (312.75, 45.25, 0.0),
31553        ];
31554        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
31555            image_shape: [64, 64],
31556            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
31557        };
31558        let batch = point_source_visibilities(&samples, 1.0e-4, [64, 64], (42.0, 21.0), 1.0);
31559        let request = ImagingRequest {
31560            geometry,
31561            visibility_batches: vec![batch.clone()],
31562            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
31563            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
31564            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
31565            reffreq_hz: 1.4e9,
31566            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.399e9, 1.401e9],
31567            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
31568            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
31569            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
31570            clean: CleanConfig::default(),
31571            clean_mask: None,
31572            initial_model: None,
31573            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
31574            w_project_planes: None,
31575            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
31576        };
31577        let gridder = StandardGridder::new(geometry).unwrap();
31578        let mut stage_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
31579        let psf_state = compute_psf(
31580            &request,
31581            std::slice::from_ref(&batch),
31582            &gridder,
31583            &mut stage_timings,
31584        )
31585        .unwrap();
31586        let direct_psf_state =
31587            compute_psf_direct(geometry, std::slice::from_ref(&batch), &mut stage_timings).unwrap();
31588        let model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((64, 64));
31589        let fft_dirty = compute_residual(
31590            &request,
31591            std::slice::from_ref(&batch),
31592            &gridder,
31593            &model,
31594            &psf_state,
31595            StandardMfsExecutionConfig::default(),
31596            &mut stage_timings,
31597        )
31598        .unwrap();
31599        let direct_dirty = compute_residual_direct(
31600            geometry,
31601            std::slice::from_ref(&batch),
31602            &model,
31603            &direct_psf_state,
31604            &mut stage_timings,
31605        )
31606        .unwrap();
31607        let psf_rms = rms_difference(&psf_state.psf, &direct_psf_state.psf);
31608        let rms = rms_difference(&fft_dirty, &direct_dirty);
31609        assert!(
31610            rms < 3.0e-2 && psf_rms < 3.0e-2,
31611            "FFT dirty image should match the direct adjoint: dirty_rms={rms} psf_rms={psf_rms} fft_peak={} direct_peak={} fft_psf_peak={} direct_psf_peak={}",
31612            peak_abs_value(&fft_dirty),
31613            peak_abs_value(&direct_dirty),
31614            peak_abs_value(&psf_state.psf),
31615            peak_abs_value(&direct_psf_state.psf),
31616        );
31617    }
31618
31619    #[test]
31620    fn partitioning_batches_is_invariant() {
31621        let samples = vec![
31622            (-150.0, -120.0, 0.0),
31623            (-90.0, 75.0, 0.0),
31624            (60.0, -90.0, 0.0),
31625            (130.0, 85.0, 0.0),
31626            (20.0, 15.0, 0.0),
31627            (-45.0, 40.0, 0.0),
31628        ];
31629        let geometry = ImageGeometry {
31630            image_shape: [64, 64],
31631            cell_size_rad: [1.0e-4, 1.0e-4],
31632        };
31633        let all = point_source_visibilities(&samples, 1.0e-4, [64, 64], (32.0, 32.0), 1.0);
31634        let split_left = VisibilityBatch {
31635            u_lambda: all.u_lambda[..3].to_vec(),
31636            v_lambda: all.v_lambda[..3].to_vec(),
31637            w_lambda: all.w_lambda[..3].to_vec(),
31638            weight: all.weight[..3].to_vec(),
31639            sumwt_factor: all.sumwt_factor[..3].to_vec(),
31640            gridable: all.gridable[..3].to_vec(),
31641            visibility: all.visibility[..3].to_vec(),
31642        };
31643        let split_right = VisibilityBatch {
31644            u_lambda: all.u_lambda[3..].to_vec(),
31645            v_lambda: all.v_lambda[3..].to_vec(),
31646            w_lambda: all.w_lambda[3..].to_vec(),
31647            weight: all.weight[3..].to_vec(),
31648            sumwt_factor: all.sumwt_factor[3..].to_vec(),
31649            gridable: all.gridable[3..].to_vec(),
31650            visibility: all.visibility[3..].to_vec(),
31651        };
31652        let full = run_imaging(&ImagingRequest {
31653            geometry,
31654            visibility_batches: vec![all],
31655            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
31656            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
