33608        )
33609        .expect("run Metal Hogbom minor cycle");
33610        assert_eq!(metal.actual_updates, cpu.actual_updates);
33611        assert_eq!(metal.reported_updates, cpu.reported_updates);
33612        assert_eq!(metal.stop_reason, cpu.stop_reason);
33613        for (&cpu_value, &metal_value) in cpu_model.iter().zip(metal_model.iter()) {
33614            assert!(
33615                (cpu_value - metal_value).abs() < 2.0e-6,
33616                "model mismatch cpu={cpu_value} metal={metal_value}"
33617            );
33618        }
33619        for (&cpu_value, &metal_value) in cpu_residual.iter().zip(metal_residual.iter()) {
33620            assert!(
33621                (cpu_value - metal_value).abs() < 2.0e-6,
33622                "residual mismatch cpu={cpu_value} metal={metal_value}"
33623            );
33624        }
33625    }
33626
33627    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
33628    #[test]
33629    fn hogbom_metal_minor_cycle_matches_cpu_with_masked_nonstandard_arrays() {
33630        if !standard_mfs_metal_device_available() {
33631            return;
33632        }
33633        let mut mask = Array2::<bool>::from_elem((8, 8).f(), false);
33634        for x in 2..=5 {
33635            for y in 3..=6 {
33636                mask[(x, y)] = true;
33637            }
33638        }
33639        let request = ImagingRequest {
33640            geometry: ImageGeometry {
33641                image_shape: [8, 8],
33642                cell_size_rad: [1.0, 1.0],
33643            },
33644            visibility_batches: Vec::new(),
33645            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
33646            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
33647            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
33648            reffreq_hz: 1.0,
33649            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.0, 1.0],
33650            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
33651            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
33652            small_scale_bias: 0.6,
33653            clean: CleanConfig {
33654                niter: 7,
33655                gain: 0.2,
33656                threshold_jy_per_beam: 0.0,
33657                nsigma: 0.0,
33658                cyclefactor: 1.0,
33659                min_psf_fraction: 0.05,
33660                max_psf_fraction: 0.8,
33661                minor_cycle_length: 7,
33662                major_cycle_limit: None,
33663                psf_cutoff: 0.35,
33664                hogbom_iteration_mode: HogbomIterationMode::Strict,
33665            },
33666            clean_mask: Some(mask),
33667            initial_model: None,
33668            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
33669            w_project_planes: None,
33670            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
33671        };
33672        let mut psf = Array2::<f32>::zeros((8, 8).f());
33673        psf[(4, 4)] = 1.0;
33674        psf[(3, 4)] = 0.2;
33675        psf[(5, 4)] = 0.18;
33676        psf[(4, 3)] = 0.16;
33677        psf[(4, 5)] = 0.12;
33678        psf[(3, 3)] = 0.04;
33679        psf[(5, 5)] = 0.03;
33680        let psf_state = PsfState {
33681            psf,
33682            normalization_sumwt: 1.0,
33683            reported_sumwt: 1.0,
33684            psf_peak: 1.0,
33685            gridded_samples: 0,
33686            skipped_samples: 0,
33687        };
33688        let mut cpu_model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((8, 8).f());
33689        let mut metal_model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((8, 8).f());
33690        let mut cpu_residual = Array2::<f32>::zeros((8, 8).f());
33691        cpu_residual[(0, 0)] = 10.0;
33692        cpu_residual[(2, 3)] = 1.2;
33693        cpu_residual[(5, 6)] = -0.9;
33694        cpu_residual[(4, 4)] = 0.7;
33695        cpu_residual[(1, 6)] = -0.5;
33696        let mut metal_residual = cpu_residual.clone();
33697        let mut cpu_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
33698        let mut metal_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
33699        let cpu = run_hogbom_minor_cycle_cpu(
33700            &request,
33701            &psf_state,
33702            &mut cpu_model,
33703            &mut cpu_residual,
33704            7,
33705            0.0,
33706            0.0,
33707            &mut cpu_timings,
33708        );
33709        let metal = run_hogbom_minor_cycle_metal(
33710            &request,
33711            &psf_state,
33712            &mut metal_model,
33713            &mut metal_residual,
33714            7,
33715            0.0,
33716            0.0,
33717            &mut metal_timings,
33718        )
33719        .expect("run Metal Hogbom minor cycle");
33720        assert_eq!(metal.actual_updates, cpu.actual_updates);
33721        assert_eq!(metal.reported_updates, cpu.reported_updates);
33722        assert_eq!(metal.stop_reason, cpu.stop_reason);
33723        for x in 0..8 {
33724            for y in 0..8 {
33725                assert!(
33726                    (cpu_model[(x, y)] - metal_model[(x, y)]).abs() < 2.0e-6,
33727                    "model mismatch at ({x}, {y}): cpu={} metal={}",
33728                    cpu_model[(x, y)],
33729                    metal_model[(x, y)]
33730                );
33731                assert!(
33732                    (cpu_residual[(x, y)] - metal_residual[(x, y)]).abs() < 2.0e-6,
33733                    "residual mismatch at ({x}, {y}): cpu={} metal={}",
33734                    cpu_residual[(x, y)],
33735                    metal_residual[(x, y)]
33736                );
33737            }
33738        }
33739    }
33740
33741    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
33742    #[test]
33743    fn multiscale_metal_minor_cycle_runs_resident_backend() {
33744        if !standard_mfs_metal_device_available() {
33745            return;
33746        }
33747        let request = ImagingRequest {
33748            geometry: ImageGeometry {
33749                image_shape: [16, 16],
33750                cell_size_rad: [1.0, 1.0],
33751            },
33752            visibility_batches: Vec::new(),
33753            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
33754            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
33755            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
33756            reffreq_hz: 1.0,
33757            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.0, 1.0],
33758            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Multiscale,
33759            multiscale_scales: vec![0.0, 3.0],
33760            small_scale_bias: 0.6,
33761            clean: CleanConfig {
33762                niter: 6,
33763                gain: 0.2,
33764                threshold_jy_per_beam: 0.0,
33765                nsigma: 0.0,
33766                cyclefactor: 1.0,
33767                min_psf_fraction: 0.05,
33768                max_psf_fraction: 0.8,
33769                minor_cycle_length: 6,
33770                major_cycle_limit: None,
33771                psf_cutoff: 0.35,
33772                hogbom_iteration_mode: HogbomIterationMode::Strict,
33773            },
33774            clean_mask: None,
33775            initial_model: None,
33776            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
33777            w_project_planes: None,
33778            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
33779        };
33780        let mut psf = Array2::<f32>::zeros((16, 16));
33781        psf[(8, 8)] = 1.0;
33782        psf[(7, 8)] = 0.12;
33783        psf[(9, 8)] = -0.09;
33784        psf[(8, 7)] = 0.08;
33785        psf[(8, 9)] = -0.06;
33786        let mut residual = Array2::<f32>::zeros((16, 16));
33787        residual[(7, 8)] = 2.0;
33788        residual[(8, 8)] = 2.4;
33789        residual[(9, 8)] = 1.8;
33790        residual[(4, 11)] = -1.2;
33791        let mut state = build_multiscale_state(
33792            &residual,
33793            &psf,
33794            &request.multiscale_scales,
33795            request.small_scale_bias,
33796            request.clean_mask.as_ref(),
33797        );
33798        let mut model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((16, 16));
33799        let initial_peak = peak_abs_value_masked(&state.dirty_conv_scales[0], None);
33800        let mut timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
33801        let outcome = run_multiscale_minor_cycle_metal(
33802            &request,
33803            &mut state,
33804            &mut model,
33805            &mut residual,
33806            6,
33807            0.0,
33808            0.0,
33809            &mut timings,
33810        )
33811        .expect("run Metal multiscale minor cycle");
33812        assert!(outcome.actual_updates > 0);
33813        assert!(model.iter().any(|value| value.abs() > 0.0));
33814        assert!(peak_abs_value_masked(&state.dirty_conv_scales[0], None) < initial_peak);
33815        assert!(timings.minor_cycle > Duration::ZERO);
33816        assert!(timings.deconvolver_model_updates > 0);
33817    }
33818
33819    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
33820    #[test]
33821    fn multiscale_metal_cotton_schwab_tracks_cpu_model() {
33822        if !standard_mfs_metal_device_available() {
33823            return;
33824        }
33825        let request = ImagingRequest {
33826            geometry: ImageGeometry {
33827                image_shape: [16, 16],
33828                cell_size_rad: [1.0, 1.0],
33829            },
33830            visibility_batches: Vec::new(),
33831            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
33832            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
33833            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
33834            reffreq_hz: 1.0,
33835            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.0, 1.0],
33836            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Multiscale,
33837            multiscale_scales: vec![0.0, 3.0],
33838            small_scale_bias: 0.6,
33839            clean: CleanConfig {
33840                niter: 8,
33841                gain: 0.18,
33842                threshold_jy_per_beam: 0.0,
33843                nsigma: 0.0,
33844                cyclefactor: 1.0,
33845                min_psf_fraction: 0.05,
33846                max_psf_fraction: 0.8,
33847                minor_cycle_length: 8,
33848                major_cycle_limit: None,
33849                psf_cutoff: 0.35,
33850                hogbom_iteration_mode: HogbomIterationMode::Strict,
33851            },
33852            clean_mask: None,
33853            initial_model: None,
33854            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
33855            w_project_planes: None,
33856            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
33857        };
33858        let mut psf = Array2::<f32>::zeros((16, 16));
33859        psf[(8, 8)] = 1.0;
33860        psf[(7, 8)] = 0.10;
33861        psf[(9, 8)] = -0.08;
33862        psf[(8, 7)] = 0.06;
33863        psf[(8, 9)] = -0.05;
33864        let psf_state = PsfState {
33865            psf: psf.clone(),
33866            normalization_sumwt: 1.0,
33867            reported_sumwt: 1.0,
33868            psf_peak: 1.0,
33869            gridded_samples: 0,
33870            skipped_samples: 0,
33871        };
33872        let mut residual = Array2::<f32>::zeros((16, 16));
33873        for x in 5..11 {
33874            for y in 6..10 {
33875                residual[(x, y)] = 0.6 + 0.03 * (x as f32 - y as f32);
33876            }
33877        }
33878        residual[(4, 12)] = -1.0;
33879        let initial_residual = residual.clone();
33880        let mut cpu_model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((16, 16));
33881        let mut metal_model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((16, 16));
33882        let mut cpu_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
33883        let mut metal_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
33884        let mut cpu_refresh = |current_model: &Array2<f32>,
33885                               _timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings|
33886         -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
33887            Ok(&initial_residual - &fft_convolve_real(&psf, current_model))
33888        };
33889        let cpu = run_multiscale_cotton_schwab(
33890            &request,
33891            &psf_state,
33892            &mut cpu_timings,
33893            &mut cpu_refresh,
33894            &mut cpu_model,
33895            residual.clone(),
33896            StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend::Cpu,
33897            0.1,
33898            peak_abs_value_masked(&residual, None),
33899            Some(0.0),
33900            &mut Vec::new(),
33901        )
33902        .expect("run CPU multiscale");
33903        let mut metal_refresh = |current_model: &Array2<f32>,
33904                                 _timings: &mut ImagingStageTimings|
33905         -> Result<Array2<f32>, ImagingError> {
33906            Ok(&initial_residual - &fft_convolve_real(&psf_state.psf, current_model))
33907        };
33908        let metal = run_multiscale_cotton_schwab(
33909            &request,
33910            &psf_state,
33911            &mut metal_timings,
33912            &mut metal_refresh,
33913            &mut metal_model,
33914            residual.clone(),
33915            StandardMfsMinorCycleBackend::Metal,
33916            0.1,
33917            peak_abs_value_masked(&residual, None),
33918            Some(0.0),
33919            &mut Vec::new(),
33920        )
33921        .expect("run Metal multiscale");
33922        assert_eq!(metal.minor_iterations, cpu.minor_iterations);
33923        for (index, (&cpu_value, &metal_value)) in
33924            cpu_model.iter().zip(metal_model.iter()).enumerate()
33925        {
33926            assert!(
33927                (cpu_value - metal_value).abs() < 2.0e-4,
33928                "model mismatch at {index}: cpu={cpu_value} metal={metal_value}"
33929            );
33930        }
33931        for (index, (&cpu_value, &metal_value)) in
33932            cpu.residual.iter().zip(metal.residual.iter()).enumerate()
33933        {
33934            assert!(
33935                (cpu_value - metal_value).abs() < 2.0e-4,
33936                "residual mismatch at {index}: cpu={cpu_value} metal={metal_value}"
33937            );
33938        }
33939    }
33940
33941    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
33942    #[test]
33943    fn hogbom_metal_minor_cycle_matches_cpu_for_long_component_sequence() {
33944        if !standard_mfs_metal_device_available() {
33945            return;
33946        }
33947        let request = ImagingRequest {
33948            geometry: ImageGeometry {
33949                image_shape: [32, 32],
33950                cell_size_rad: [1.0, 1.0],
33951            },
33952            visibility_batches: Vec::new(),
33953            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
33954            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
33955            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
33956            reffreq_hz: 1.0,
33957            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.0, 1.0],
33958            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
33959            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
33960            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
33961            clean: CleanConfig {
33962                niter: 64,
33963                gain: 0.12,
33964                threshold_jy_per_beam: 0.0,
33965                nsigma: 0.0,
33966                cyclefactor: 1.0,
33967                min_psf_fraction: 0.0,
33968                max_psf_fraction: 1.0,
33969                minor_cycle_length: 64,
33970                major_cycle_limit: None,
33971                psf_cutoff: 0.35,
33972                hogbom_iteration_mode: HogbomIterationMode::Strict,
33973            },
33974            clean_mask: None,
33975            initial_model: None,
33976            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
33977            w_project_planes: None,
33978            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
33979        };
33980        let mut psf = Array2::<f32>::zeros((32, 32));
33981        psf[(16, 16)] = 1.0;
33982        psf[(15, 16)] = 0.21;
33983        psf[(17, 16)] = -0.18;
33984        psf[(16, 15)] = 0.13;
33985        psf[(16, 17)] = -0.09;
33986        psf[(14, 16)] = 0.04;
33987        psf[(18, 16)] = -0.035;
33988        psf[(16, 14)] = 0.025;
33989        psf[(16, 18)] = -0.02;
33990        let psf_state = PsfState {
33991            psf,
33992            normalization_sumwt: 1.0,
33993            reported_sumwt: 1.0,
33994            psf_peak: 1.0,
33995            gridded_samples: 0,
33996            skipped_samples: 0,
33997        };
33998        let mut cpu_model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((32, 32));
33999        let mut metal_model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((32, 32));
34000        let mut cpu_residual = Array2::<f32>::zeros((32, 32));
34001        for x in 3..29 {
34002            for y in 2..30 {
34003                let value = ((x * 17 + y * 23) as f32).sin() * 0.17
34004                    + ((x * 11 + y * 7) as f32).cos() * 0.11;
34005                cpu_residual[(x, y)] = value;
34006            }
34007        }
34008        cpu_residual[(7, 9)] = 3.7;
34009        cpu_residual[(24, 22)] = -3.1;
34010        cpu_residual[(12, 25)] = 2.8;
34011        cpu_residual[(26, 5)] = -2.3;
34012        let mut metal_residual = cpu_residual.clone();
34013        let mut cpu_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
34014        let mut metal_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
34015        let cpu = run_hogbom_minor_cycle_cpu(
34016            &request,
34017            &psf_state,
34018            &mut cpu_model,
34019            &mut cpu_residual,
34020            64,
34021            0.0,
34022            0.0,
34023            &mut cpu_timings,
34024        );
34025        let metal = run_hogbom_minor_cycle_metal(
34026            &request,
34027            &psf_state,
34028            &mut metal_model,
34029            &mut metal_residual,
34030            64,
34031            0.0,
34032            0.0,
34033            &mut metal_timings,
34034        )
34035        .expect("run Metal Hogbom minor cycle");
34036        assert_eq!(metal.actual_updates, cpu.actual_updates);
34037        assert_eq!(metal.reported_updates, cpu.reported_updates);
34038        assert_eq!(metal.stop_reason, cpu.stop_reason);
34039        for (index, (&cpu_value, &metal_value)) in
34040            cpu_model.iter().zip(metal_model.iter()).enumerate()
34041        {
34042            assert!(
34043                (cpu_value - metal_value).abs() < 1.0e-4,
34044                "model mismatch at flat index {index}: cpu={cpu_value} metal={metal_value}"
34045            );
34046        }
34047        for (index, (&cpu_value, &metal_value)) in
34048            cpu_residual.iter().zip(metal_residual.iter()).enumerate()
34049        {
34050            assert!(
34051                (cpu_value - metal_value).abs() < 1.0e-4,
34052                "residual mismatch at flat index {index}: cpu={cpu_value} metal={metal_value}"
34053            );
34054        }
34055    }
34056
34057    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
34058    #[test]
34059    fn hogbom_metal_minor_cycle_matches_cpu_for_edge_components() {
34060        if !standard_mfs_metal_device_available() {
34061            return;
34062        }
34063        let request = ImagingRequest {
34064            geometry: ImageGeometry {
34065                image_shape: [8, 8],
34066                cell_size_rad: [1.0, 1.0],
34067            },
34068            visibility_batches: Vec::new(),
34069            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
34070            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
34071            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
34072            reffreq_hz: 1.0,
34073            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.0, 1.0],
34074            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
34075            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
34076            small_scale_bias: 0.0,
34077            clean: CleanConfig {
34078                niter: 1,
34079                gain: 0.35,
34080                threshold_jy_per_beam: 0.3,
34081                nsigma: 0.0,
34082                cyclefactor: 1.0,
34083                min_psf_fraction: 0.0,
34084                max_psf_fraction: 1.0,
34085                minor_cycle_length: 1,
34086                major_cycle_limit: None,
34087                psf_cutoff: 0.35,
34088                hogbom_iteration_mode: HogbomIterationMode::CasaInclusive,
34089            },
34090            clean_mask: None,
34091            initial_model: None,
34092            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
34093            w_project_planes: None,
34094            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
34095        };
34096        let mut psf = Array2::<f32>::zeros((8, 8));
34097        psf[(4, 4)] = 1.0;
34098        psf[(3, 4)] = 0.23;
34099        psf[(5, 4)] = -0.17;
34100        psf[(4, 3)] = 0.11;
34101        psf[(4, 5)] = -0.07;
34102        psf[(2, 4)] = 0.05;
34103        psf[(6, 4)] = -0.03;
34104        psf[(4, 2)] = 0.025;
34105        psf[(4, 6)] = -0.02;
34106        psf[(3, 2)] = 0.015;
34107        psf[(6, 5)] = -0.012;
34108        let psf_state = PsfState {
34109            psf,
34110            normalization_sumwt: 1.0,
34111            reported_sumwt: 1.0,
34112            psf_peak: 1.0,
34113            gridded_samples: 0,
34114            skipped_samples: 0,
34115        };
34116
34117        for (peak_index, peak_value) in [
34118            ((0, 0), 1.0),
34119            ((0, 7), -1.1),
34120            ((7, 0), 1.2),
34121            ((7, 7), -1.3),
34122            ((3, 0), 0.95),
34123            ((4, 7), -0.9),
34124        ] {
34125            let mut cpu_model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((8, 8));
34126            let mut metal_model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((8, 8));
34127            let mut cpu_residual = Array2::<f32>::zeros((8, 8));
34128            cpu_residual[peak_index] = peak_value;
34129            let mut metal_residual = cpu_residual.clone();
34130            let mut cpu_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
34131            let mut metal_timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
34132            let cpu = run_hogbom_minor_cycle_cpu(
34133                &request,
34134                &psf_state,
34135                &mut cpu_model,
34136                &mut cpu_residual,
34137                1,
34138                0.3,
34139                0.0,
34140                &mut cpu_timings,
34141            );
34142            let metal = run_hogbom_minor_cycle_metal(
34143                &request,
34144                &psf_state,
34145                &mut metal_model,
34146                &mut metal_residual,
34147                1,
34148                0.3,
34149                0.0,
34150                &mut metal_timings,
34151            )
34152            .expect("run Metal Hogbom minor cycle");
34153            assert_eq!(metal.actual_updates, cpu.actual_updates);
34154            assert_eq!(metal.reported_updates, cpu.reported_updates);
34155            assert_eq!(metal.stop_reason, cpu.stop_reason);
34156            for (index, (&cpu_value, &metal_value)) in
34157                cpu_model.iter().zip(metal_model.iter()).enumerate()
34158            {
34159                assert!(
34160                    (cpu_value - metal_value).abs() < 2.0e-6,
34161                    "model mismatch for peak {peak_index:?} at flat index {index}: cpu={cpu_value} metal={metal_value}"
34162                );
34163            }
34164            for (index, (&cpu_value, &metal_value)) in
34165                cpu_residual.iter().zip(metal_residual.iter()).enumerate()
34166            {
34167                assert!(
34168                    (cpu_value - metal_value).abs() < 2.0e-6,
34169                    "residual mismatch for peak {peak_index:?} at flat index {index}: cpu={cpu_value} metal={metal_value}"
34170                );
34171            }
34172        }
34173    }
34174
34175    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
34176    #[test]
34177    fn hogbom_metal_minor_cycle_reduces_all_threadgroups() {
34178        if !standard_mfs_metal_device_available() {
34179            return;
34180        }
34181        let request = ImagingRequest {
34182            geometry: ImageGeometry {
34183                image_shape: [32, 32],
34184                cell_size_rad: [1.0, 1.0],
34185            },
34186            visibility_batches: Vec::new(),
34187            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
34188            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
34189            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
34190            reffreq_hz: 1.0,
34191            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.0, 1.0],
34192            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
34193            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
34194            small_scale_bias: 0.6,
34195            clean: CleanConfig {
34196                niter: 1,
34197                gain: 0.25,
34198                threshold_jy_per_beam: 0.0,
34199                nsigma: 0.0,
34200                cyclefactor: 1.0,
34201                min_psf_fraction: 0.05,
34202                max_psf_fraction: 0.8,
34203                minor_cycle_length: 1,
34204                major_cycle_limit: None,
34205                psf_cutoff: 0.35,
34206                hogbom_iteration_mode: HogbomIterationMode::Strict,
34207            },
34208            clean_mask: None,
34209            initial_model: None,
34210            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
34211            w_project_planes: None,
34212            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
34213        };
34214        let mut psf = Array2::<f32>::zeros((32, 32));
34215        psf[(16, 16)] = 1.0;
34216        let psf_state = PsfState {
34217            psf,
34218            normalization_sumwt: 1.0,
34219            reported_sumwt: 1.0,
34220            psf_peak: 1.0,
34221            gridded_samples: 0,
34222            skipped_samples: 0,
34223        };
34224        let mut model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((32, 32));
34225        let mut residual = Array2::<f32>::zeros((32, 32));
34226        residual[(0, 0)] = 1.0;
34227        residual[(31, 31)] = 20.0;
34228        let mut timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
34229        let outcome = run_hogbom_minor_cycle_metal(
34230            &request,
34231            &psf_state,
34232            &mut model,
34233            &mut residual,
34234            1,
34235            10.0,
34236            0.0,
34237            &mut timings,
34238        )
34239        .expect("run Metal Hogbom minor cycle");
34240        assert_eq!(outcome.actual_updates, 1);
34241        assert_eq!(outcome.reported_updates, 1);
34242        assert_eq!(outcome.stop_reason, None);
34243        assert!((model[(31, 31)] - 5.0).abs() < 1.0e-6);
34244    }
34245
34246    #[cfg(all(target_os = "macos", not(coverage)))]
34247    #[test]
34248    fn hogbom_metal_minor_cycle_keeps_late_reduction_groups() {
34249        if !standard_mfs_metal_device_available() {
34250            return;
34251        }
34252        let request = ImagingRequest {
34253            geometry: ImageGeometry {
34254                image_shape: [512, 512],
34255                cell_size_rad: [1.0, 1.0],
34256            },
34257            visibility_batches: Vec::new(),
34258            gridder_mode: GridderMode::Standard,
34259            plane_stokes: PlaneStokes::I,
34260            weighting: WeightingMode::Natural,
34261            reffreq_hz: 1.0,
34262            selected_frequency_range_hz: [1.0, 1.0],
34263            deconvolver: Deconvolver::Hogbom,
34264            multiscale_scales: Vec::new(),
34265            small_scale_bias: 0.6,
34266            clean: CleanConfig {
34267                niter: 1,
34268                gain: 0.25,
34269                threshold_jy_per_beam: 0.0,
34270                nsigma: 0.0,
34271                cyclefactor: 1.0,
34272                min_psf_fraction: 0.05,
34273                max_psf_fraction: 0.8,
34274                minor_cycle_length: 1,
34275                major_cycle_limit: None,
34276                psf_cutoff: 0.35,
34277                hogbom_iteration_mode: HogbomIterationMode::Strict,
34278            },
34279            clean_mask: None,
34280            initial_model: None,
34281            w_term_mode: WTermMode::None,
34282            w_project_planes: None,
34283            compatibility: CompatibilityMode::CasaStandardMfs,
34284        };
34285        let mut psf = Array2::<f32>::zeros((512, 512));
34286        psf[(256, 256)] = 1.0;
34287        let psf_state = PsfState {
34288            psf,
34289            normalization_sumwt: 1.0,
34290            reported_sumwt: 1.0,
34291            psf_peak: 1.0,
34292            gridded_samples: 0,
34293            skipped_samples: 0,
34294        };
34295        let mut model = Array2::<f32>::zeros((512, 512));
34296        let mut residual = Array2::<f32>::zeros((512, 512));
34297        residual[(10, 10)] = 2.8;
34298        residual[(400, 400)] = 160.0;
34299        let mut timings = ImagingStageTimings::default();
34300        let outcome = run_hogbom_minor_cycle_metal(
34301            &request,
34302            &psf_state,
34303            &mut model,
34304            &mut residual,
34305            1,
34306            10.0,
34307            0.0,
34308            &mut timings,
34309        )
34310        .expect("run Metal Hogbom minor cycle");
34311        assert_eq!(outcome.actual_updates, 1);
34312        assert_eq!(outcome.reported_updates, 1);
34313        assert_eq!(outcome.stop_reason, None);
34314        assert!((model[(400, 400)] - 40.0).abs() < 1.0e-6);
34315        assert_eq!(model[(10, 10)], 0.0);
34316    }
34317
34318    #[test]
34319    fn clean_cycle_threshold_uses_psf_fraction_only() {
34320        let clean = CleanConfig {
34321            niter: 10,
34322            major_cycle_limit: None,
34323            gain: 0.1,
34324            threshold_jy_per_beam: 0.5,
34325            nsigma: 5.0,
34326            psf_cutoff: 0.35,
34327            minor_cycle_length: 5,
34328            cyclefactor: 1.0,
34329            min_psf_fraction: 0.05,
34330            max_psf_fraction: 0.8,
34331            hogbom_iteration_mode: HogbomIterationMode::CasaInclusive,
34332        };
34333        let cycle_threshold = clean_cycle_threshold(10.0, 0.02, clean);
34334        assert_eq!(cycle_threshold, 0.5);
34335    }
34336

34448
34449    #[test]
34450    fn chauvenet_clipping_matches_casacore_reference_counts() {
34451        let mut no_iterations = chauvenet_reference_fixture();
34452        apply_chauvenet_clipping(&mut no_iterations, 3.5, 0);
34453        assert_eq!(no_iterations.len(), 106);
34454        assert!(
34455            (no_iterations
34456                .iter()
34457                .copied()
34458                .fold(f32::NEG_INFINITY, f32::max)
34459                - 8.0)
34460                .abs()
34461                < 1.0e-6
34462        );
34463
34464        let mut one_iteration = chauvenet_reference_fixture();
34465        apply_chauvenet_clipping(&mut one_iteration, 3.5, 1);
34466        assert_eq!(one_iteration.len(), 104);
34467        assert!(
34468            (one_iteration
34469                .iter()
34470                .copied()
34471                .fold(f32::NEG_INFINITY, f32::max)
34472                - 6.0)
34473                .abs()
34474                < 1.0e-6
34475        );
34476
34477        let mut until_converged = chauvenet_reference_fixture();
34478        apply_chauvenet_clipping(&mut until_converged, 3.5, -1);
34479        assert_eq!(until_converged.len(), 102);
34480        assert!(
34481            (until_converged
34482                .iter()
34483                .copied()
34484                .fold(f32::NEG_INFINITY, f32::max)
34485                - 4.0)
34486                .abs()
34487                < 1.0e-6
34488        );
34489
34490        let mut automatic_zscore = chauvenet_reference_fixture();
34491        apply_chauvenet_clipping(&mut automatic_zscore, -1.0, -1);
34492        assert_eq!(automatic_zscore.len(), 100);
34493        assert!(
34494            (automatic_zscore
34495                .iter()
34496                .copied()
34497                .fold(f32::NEG_INFINITY, f32::max)
34498                - 2.21240473)
34499                .abs()
34500                < 1.0e-6
34501        );
34502    }
34503
34504    #[test]
34505    fn mean_stddev_uses_sample_variance_like_casacore_statsframework() {
34506        let values = [1.0_f32, 2.0, 3.0, 4.0];
34507        let (mean, stddev) = mean_stddev(&values);
34508        assert!((mean - 2.5).abs() < 1.0e-12);
34509        assert!((stddev - 1.290_994_448_735_805_6).abs() < 1.0e-12);
34510    }
34511}
